timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na biyu a cikin yara 8 a Ajaccio na tsibirin Corsica.
Ya wuce Faransa tare da yayansa Joseph kuma ya shiga makarantar addini ta keɓance da gidajen ibada na Autun.
Ya shiga makarantar soja ta Brienne.
Ya shiga makarantar soja ta Paris.
Mahaifinsa Carlo ya mutu saboda ciwon daji na ciki (gastric cancer).
Ya ci jarrabawar zama jami'in bindigar yaki kuma aka nada shi a matsayin mukaddashin soja (second lieutenant) yana da shekaru 16.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin jami'in bindigar yaki a rundunar La Fère da ke Valence.
Lokacin da rundunar La Fère ta koma Auxonne, ya yi aiki a can.
Juyin juya halin Faransa ya barke.
Ya sami hutu kuma ya koma mahaifarsa Corsica.
An kashe Louis XVI.
Bayan bangaren Paoli ya tsare shi kuma aka washe gidansa da gonarsa, ya gudu daga Corsica tare da iyalinsa.
Ya sake kwace katangar L'Éguillette da Balaguier a Siege of Toulon don samun nasara, kuma an kara masa girma zuwa Brigadier General.
Juyin mulkin Thermidor ya faru kuma aka kashe kungiyar Robespierre.
An tsare shi saboda abotarsa da kani na Robespierre, Augustin, amma ba da dadewa ba aka sake shi.
Ya danne bore na masu goyon bayan sarauta da ya faru a Paris.
Ya auri Joséphine de Beauharnais.
An zabe shi a matsayin kwamandan rundunar yakin Italiya.
Ya mamaye Vienna, babban birnin Austria, kuma ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Campo Formio.
Ya jagoranci sojoji kusan 50,000 don sauka a tashar jiragen ruwa ta Alexandria ta Masar, inda ya fara yakin Masar.
Rundunar sojan ruwa ta Faransa ta sha kashi a hannun rundunar sojan ruwan Birtaniya ta Horatio Nelson a yakin Aboukir Bay.
Ya tsere daga Masar kuma ya koma Faransa.
Ya gudanar da juyin mulkin Brumaire tare da Sieyès, mai iko na gwamnatin juyin juya hali.
Sabuwar tsarin mulki da ta kafa jakadu (consuls) guda uku an mika ta ga zaben raba gardama na kasa kuma aka amince da ita.
Rundunar yakin Faransa ta haye tuddan Saint-Bernard.
Ya sami nasara a Yakin Marengo da sojojin Austria.
Ya kafa Bankin Faransa domin tabbatar da daidaiton tattalin arziki.
Ya daidaita alaka da Amurka ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Mortefontaine.
Ya cimma yarjejeniyar addini da siyasa (Concordat) da Paparoma Pius VII.
Ya tura runduna ta mutane 30,000 zuwa Haiti (Saint-Domingue) don kokarin sake mamaye yankin da dawo da bauta.
Ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Amiens da Birtaniya, inda aka samu zaman lafiya bayan shekaru 10.
Ya kafa lambar yabo ta Légion d'honneur.
Ya zama Babban Consul na Har Abada (First Consul for Life) kuma ya karfafa ikon kama-karya.
Ya sayar da Louisiana ga Amurka a kan dalar Amurka miliyan 15.
An gano wata makarkashiyar kisan kai da Georges Cadoudal da masu goyon bayan dawo da masarautar Bourbon suka shirya don adawa da Napoleon.
Ya janye sojoji bayan ya bar shirin mamaye Haiti.
Haiti ta sami yancin kai a hukumance, inda ta zama jamhuriya ta farko ta bakaken fata.
An yanke shawarar kafa daular sarauta (Empire) ta hanyar zaben raba gardama na kasa.
Ya gudanar da bikin nadin sarauta a Cocin Notre-Dame, inda ya zama Napoleon I, sarki na farko na Daular Faransa.
Rundunar sojan ruwa ta Faransa ta sha kashi sosai a hannun rundunar sojan ruwan Birtaniya karkashin jagorancin Nelson a yakin Trafalgar.
Rundunar Faransa ta sami babban nasara a yakin Austerlitz, kuma Austria ta mika wuya ta hanyar sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Pressburg.
Ya nada kaninsa Louis a matsayin sarkin Netherlands.
Ya doke sojojin Prussia a Yakin Jena-Auerstedt kuma ya shiga Berlin.
Ya ba da Dokar Berlin don kafa Tsarin Katange Nahiyar (Continental System).
Ya sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Tilsit da Alexander I na Rasha.
Ya mamaye Portugal bayan ta karya Dokar Katange Nahiyar.
Ya mamaye Rome.
Mazauna birnin Madrid sun tayar da kayar baya ga sojojin Faransa.
Ya hade Daular Paparoma (Papal States) da kasarsa.
Bayan Paparoma ya sanar da korarsa daga coci (excommunication), ya kama shi kuma ya tsare shi a Savona.
Ya rabu da sarauniya Joséphine.
Ya sake auren Marie Louise, diyar Sarkin Austria Franz I.
Sweden ta taya Bernadotte, Marshal na Faransa, gadon sarautar Sweden na gaba.
Marie Louise ta haifi Napoleon II, Sarkin Rome.
Ya jagoranci sojoji 600,000 don kai hari a kasar Rasha.
Ya tilasta tura Paparoma zuwa Fontainebleau.
Rundunar Faransa ta yi nasara a wani babban yaki da aka yi kusa da Borodino.
Ya mamaye Moscow.
Rundunar Faransa ta janye daga Rasha.
Ya sanya hannu kan 'Concordat na Fontainebleau' da Paparoma Pius VII.
Ya sha kashi sosai a Yakin Leipzig bayan hadaddiyar rundunar sojoji ta kewaye shi ta kai masa hari.
Paris, babban birnin Faransa, ya fada hannun abokan gaba.
Bayan sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Fontainebleau, an kora shi a matsayin mai mulkin tsibirin Elba.
Ya gudu daga tsibirin Elba.
Ya shiga Paris kuma ya sake zama Sarkin Faransa.
Ya sha kashi a Yakin Waterloo sakamakon harin hadin gwiwa na Birtaniya da Prussia, wanda ya kawo karshen mulkinsa na Kwanaki Dari (Hundred Days).
An tsare shi a tsibirin Saint Helena da ke Kudancin Tekun Atlantika.
Ya rasu da misalin karfe 5:49 na yamma.
An mayar da gawarwarsa Faransa kuma aka binne shi a Les Invalides da ke Paris.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Dokar Napoleon (Napoleon Code)
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1804, ya kafa "Dokar Faransa ta Kasa" (Civil Code of the French), wato Dokar Napoleon, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a kan dokokin kasa a duk fadin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Ci gaban dabarun yaki da tsarin soja
keyAchievements.description: A fannin soja, ya yi tasiri har zuwa yakin zamani, kuma ya samar da ci gaba a fannoni kamar dabara, tsari, horo, kungiya, kayan yaki, tufafi, da tsarin bada kyaututtuka.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Siege of Toulon
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya jagoranci nasara a Siege of Toulon a shekara ta 1793, an kara masa girma zuwa Brigadier General yana da shekaru 24 don zama janar.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar Yakin Italiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar gudanar da yakin Italiya a shekara ta 1796, kuma ya ci gaba da samun nasarori a yakin farko na kawance da Faransa, wanda ya sa ya yi fice a matsayin soja.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Bankin Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Bankin Faransa a shekara ta 1800 domin tabbatar da daidaiton tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Lambar Yabo ta Légion d'honneur
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa shahararriyar lambar yabo ta Légion d'honneur a shekara ta 1802.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniyar Addini da Siyasa (Concordat)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kulla yarjejeniya da Paparoma Pius VII a shekara ta 1801 domin sulhuntawa da Cocin Roman Katolika da kuma amincewa da mabiya addinin Furotesta.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Gyaran Birnin Paris
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya zama sarki, ya kaddamar da manufofin zamanantar da birnin Paris, babban birnin Faransa, domin maida shi birni na farko a duniya.

faq.question: Shin tsayin Napoleon yana da gajarta a gaskiya?
faq.answer: A'a, tsayinsa na gaskiya ya kai 167-168cm, wanda ya fi matsakaicin tsayin sojojin Faransa na lokacin da ke da 164cm. An yada jita-jitar cewa yana da gajarta saboda bambancin ma'auni da kuma rikitarwa tsakaninsa da Napoleon III.

faq.question: Ta yaya Napoleon ya mutu?
faq.answer: Dalilin mutuwarsa na hukumance shi ne ciwon daji na ciki (gastric cancer), amma an samu sinadarin arsenic mai yawa a gashin kansa, wanda ya sa aka yi zargin cewa an kashe shi ta hynar guba.

faq.question: Shin Beethoven ya sadaukar da wakar nan ta "Hero" ga Napoleon?
faq.answer: Beethoven ya dauki Napoleon a matsayin gwarzo na jamhuriya kuma ya sanya wa wakarsa ta uku suna "Bonaparte," amma bayan Napoleon ya zama sarki, ya ji takaici ya fasa sadaukarwa gare shi kuma ya canza sunan wakar zuwa "Eroica" (Gwarzo).

faq.question: Daga me rugujewar Napoleon ta fara?
faq.answer: Rugujewarsa ta fara ne saboda karancin kayayyakin bukata na yau da kullum sakamakon Dokar Katange Nahiyar ta 1806, rashin nasarar mamaye yankin Iberian, da kuma gazawar yakin Rasha na 1812.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku na Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.
Lokacin da yayan shi Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, aka naɗa shi a matsayin sabon magajin gado.
Ya gaji karagar mulki daga Taejong kuma ya zama sarki na huɗu na Joseon a Gyeongbokgung Geunjeongjeon.
Ya naɗa Yi Jong-mu a matsayin kwamanda na sojojin ruwa, ya tura shi da jiragen ruwa 227 da sojoji 17,000 don mamaye Tsushima.
Ya kafa Cibiyar Jiphyeonjeon a cikin fadar don gudanar da tsarin tsakiya da bincike kan manufofin kasa.
An kebe shi daga bayar da kyautar 'yan mata, zinare da azurfa ga daular Ming.
Rundunar da Kim Jong-seo ke jagoranta ta kawar da mutanen Jurchen a yankin Hamgil-do, kuma suka kafa yankuna shida don fadada yankin arewa.
Ganin cewa talakawa suna fuskantar wahala wajen koyon haruffan Hanja na kasar Sin, ya kirkiri haruffa 28 da kansa.
Ya fitar da haruffan Hunminjeongeum da ya kirkira da kansa a hukumance.
Yanayin rashin lafiyarsa ya yi tsanani, kuma ya mutu bayan ya koma gidan Yarima Yeongeung.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa zasu iya koyo cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen ci gaban Kimiyya da Fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da cikakken goyon baya ga kirkire-kirkire kamar na Honcheonui, Angbuilgu, Jagyeokru da Cheugugi, kuma ya dauki nauyin malamai kamar Jang Yeong-sil da Choi Hae-san.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa tsaro
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura Yi Jong-mu don mamaye Tsushima, sannan ya tura Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa domin kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6, inda ya fadada iyakokin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki mutane irin su Hwang Hui, Maeng Sa-seong, Yun Hoe, da Kim Jong-seo don kula da harkokin gwamnati, wanda ya zama asalin tsarin Uijeongbuseosaje.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da tsarin harajin kasa na Joseon ta hanyar kafa dokoki kamar Jeonbun 6-deungbeop da Yeonbun 9-deungbeop.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara litattafai daban-daban da suka hada da Worin Cheongangjigok, Yongbieocheonga, Nongsajikseol, da Goryeosa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Sarki Sejong Babba?
faq.answer: An haifi Sejong a ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1397 a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku ga Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.

faq.question: Ta yaya Sarki Sejong ya hau karagar mulki?
faq.answer: Lokacin da babban wansa Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, an naɗa shi matsayin magajin gado, kuma a shekarar 1418 ya hau mulki bayan mahaifinsa Taejong ya janye.

faq.question: Menene babbar nasarar da Sarki Sejong ya samu?
faq.answer: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa za su iya koya a saukake, yana daya daga cikin manyan nasarorin da ya samu.

faq.question: Wace irin rawa Sarki Sejong ya taka a fannin tsaro?
faq.answer: Ya aike da Yi Jong-mu don kwace Tsushima, sannan ya aike da Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa inda suka fadada iyakokin kasar ta hanyar kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6.

faq.question: Yaushe Sarki Sejong ya mutu?
faq.answer: Sarki Sejong ya mutu a ranar 30 ga Maris, 1450.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga mahaifinsa Yesugei da mahaifiyarsa Hoelun a Deliun Boldog kusa da Kogin Onon.
An san shi a matsayin shekarar haihuwar Genghis Khan amma ya bambanta a littattafan tarihi daban-daban (bikin tunawa na Mongolia na yanzu shi ne 14 ga Nuwamba).
Ya ziyarci Dei Sechen na kabilar Onggirat kuma ya auri diyarsa Börte a hukumance.
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban tsohuwar kabilar Kiyad.
Shugabannin kabilar Kiyad Borjigin sun nada Temujin a matsayin Khan na Khamag Mongol kuma suka ba shi taken Genghis Khan.
Ikon kabilar Kiyad ya karfafa, kuma ya yi Yakin Fuka-fuki 13 da Jamukha a kwarin Dalan Balzhut.
Toghrul Khan, wanda aka kora saboda rikicin cikin gida na kabilar Kereyid, ya dawo kan mulki da taimakon Temujin.
Temujin ya sami taimakon Kereyid don kai hari da kuma ruguza dangin Jurkin, sannan ya hada dangin Borjigin.
Ya yi yaki ya kuma fatattaki kabilar Merkit da ta rage a arewacin tsaunuka.
Ya gudan a Kurultai a Temeen Keer kuma ya sanar da yakin mamaye kabilar Naiman.
Genghis Khan ya hada gwiwa da Kereyid don kai hari ga Naiman a yankin Dutsen Altai.
Ragowar kabilun Tatar, Merkit, da Tayichiud sun hada kai don nada Jamukha a matsayin Khan. Ya halaka kawancen Jamukha a Yakin Köiten da hadaddiyar kungiyar arewa maso gabas.
Temujin ya yi yaki da Tatar, inda ya kashe shugabansu Jalin Buqa da wasu mutane kusan dari na Tatar da suka rage.
Ong Khan ya kai hari a filin kiwon dabbobi na Temujin saboda makarkashiyar Senggum, amma Temujin ya kai hari ba tsammani a babban sansanin Kereyid kuma ya sami babban nasara.
Sojojin Khamag Mongol sun fatattaki tare da mamaye Naiman.
Temujin ya doke Naiman na Yamma da Merkit na Arewa, wadanda su ne manyan kabilu na karshe da suka rage a tsaunukan Mongolia, kuma ya kashe Jamukha.
A taron shugabannin kabilu da aka yi a gefen Kogin Onon, an nada Temujin a matsayin Genghis Khan kuma ya kafa Daular Mongol.
Ya tura dansa Jochi don mamaye kabilun daji. Sarkin Western Xia Li Anquan ya yi alkawarin mika wuya ga Mongolia kuma ya tura diyarsa ta auri Genghis Khan.
Ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Western Xia kuma aka amince da ikon Mongolia. Ya kuma mika Masarautar Uyghur ta Tianshan karkashin ikonsa.
Ya tura Kublai don mamaye Karluks, makiyaya na kabilar Turkic, kuma shugabansu Arslan Khan ya mika wuya. Genghis Khan ya sanar da Daular Jin cewa zai daina biyan haraji.
Ya sanar da yaki da Daular Jin kuma ya doke sojojin Jin 400,000 a Yakin Yehuling.
Ya jagoranci sojoji don kai hari ga Daular Jin, inda ya mamaye tare da hade yankunansu da ke kudancin Babban Katangar kasar Sin.
Lokacin da Daular Jin ta nemi zaman lafiya, ya auri Gimbar Gimbiya (Princess Qiguo) kuma ya janye bayan ya karbi diyya.
Sojojin Mongol sun kewaye tare da mamaye Zhongdu (Yanjing), tsohon babban birnin Daular Jin.
Genghis Khan ya tura tawagar kasuwanci zuwa Daular Khwarazmian, amma Inalchuq, gwamnan Otrar, ya kashe tawagar.
Genghis Khan ya fara mamaye Khwarazm da sojoji 200,000.
Genghis Khan ya janye bayan ya kammala yakin daukar fansa a kan Khwarazmshah.
Genghis Khan ya bar Peshawar ya koma tsaunukan Mongolia bayan ya ji labarin boren Western Xia.
Genghis Khan ya isa tsaunukan Mongolia.
Sojojin Mongol sun mamaye Western Xia kuma suka kai hari kan iyakokinta.
Genghis Khan ya zauna a tsaunin Liupan, ya karbi mika wuya na Western Xia, amma ya ki shawarar zaman lafiya ta Daular Jin.
Genghis Khan ya mutu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Mongol da zama Khagan na farko
keyAchievements.description: An nada shi a matsayin Genghis Khan a Kurultai na 1206, inda ya kafa Daular Mongol kuma ya zama Khagan na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kabilun Mongolia
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na jagoran soja da na siyasa wanda ya hada kabilun Mongolia daban-daban, ya mamaye kabilun tsaunukan Mongolia.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye manyan yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye yankuna masu yawa tun daga Mongolia da China, har zuwa Peninsula ta Koriya, Tsakiyar Asiya, da Gabashin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin soja bisa cancanta
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar sa a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi girman masu mamaye yanki kuma jagoran soja mai nasara a tarihi ta hanyar jagorantar jaruman sojoji bisa cancanta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa rubutun harshen Mongolia
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kafa tsarin rubutun harshen Mongolia tare da taimakon wani jami'i daga kabilar Naiman.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Genghis Khan?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Genghis Khan shi ne Borjigin Temujin.

faq.question: Yaushe Genghis Khan ya zama Khan na Daular Mongol?
faq.answer: A taron shugabannin kabilu da aka yi a gefen Kogin Onon a watan Fabrairu na 1206, an nada Temujin a matsayin Genghis Khan, inda ya kafa Daular Mongol kuma ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Khagan na farko.

faq.question: Wane irin kimantawa Genghis Khan yake samu?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin allah ko gwarzon da ya kafa kasa a Mongolia, amma akwai kimantawa daban a Gabashin Turai da Yammacin Asiya wadanda aka mamaye, inda ake kallonsa a matsayin mai kisan kiyashi, mai washe dukiya, kuma mai lalata wayewa.

faq.question: Ta yaya mahaifin Genghis Khan ya mutu?
faq.answer: Lokacin da Genghis Khan yake da shekaru 9, mahaifinsa Yesugei ya mutu sakamakon guba da kabilar Tatar ta ba shi, wadda ke da daddiyar gaba da dangin sarauta na Borjigin na Mongolia.

faq.question: Me yasa Genghis Khan ya kai hari ga Daular Khwarazmian?
faq.answer: Saboda Inalchuq, gwamnan birnin Otrar, ya kashe ayarin yan kasuwa Musulmi 450 da ke karkashin kariyar Genghis Khan, kuma Sarkin Daular Khwarazm ya ki biyan diyya kan hakan.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Philip II da Olympias a Pella, babban birnin Makidoniya.
Ya doke rundunonin Athens da Thebes a Yakin Chaeronea tare da Philip II.
Ya gudu daga Makidoniya tare da mahaifiyarsa kafin ya koma bayan wata 6.
Bayan kisan mahaifinsa Philip II, ya gaji karagar mulkin Makidoniya yana da shekaru 20.
Don tabbatar da iyakar arewa, ya yaki 'yan tawaye a Thrace, Triballi, da Illyria sannan ya murkushe tawayen Thebes kuma ya lalata birnin.
Ya tsallake Hellespont don fara mamaye Daular Achaemenid (Daular Farisa ta Farko) kuma ya sami nasara a Yakin Granicus.
Ya kai hari sannan ya ci Tyre, ya shiga Masar inda aka dauke shi a matsayin mai ceto.
Ya bar Masar zuwa Mesofotamiya, ya ci Darius III a Yakin Gaugamela kuma ya kama Babila.
Ya kai hari Indiya amma sojojinsa suka ki ci gaba, inda suka koma baya daga Kogin Hyphasis.
Ya mutu a Babila yana da shekaru 33.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Babbar Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina wata daula da ba a taba ganin irinta ba a yammacin Turai, tun daga Girka har zuwa Masar da arewa maso yammacin Indiya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a fagen Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, wanda yasa ake ganinsa a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi nasarar shugabannin soja a tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Rushewar Daular Farisa
keyAchievements.description: Ya murkushe sojojin Farisa a yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, wanda ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III kuma ya kawo karshen Daular Farisa ta Farko.

keyAchievements.title: Taimako wajen Al'adun Hellenism
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina birane masu suna 'Alexandria' a yankunan da ya ci, wanda ya bunkasa haduwar al'adun gabas da yamma da kirkirar al'adun Hellenistic.

keyAchievements.title: Siyasar Hadin Kan Gabas da Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya karbi al'adun Farisa, ya karfafa auren tsakanin Girkawa da mutanen yankunan da aka ci, kuma ya dauki ma'aikatan Farisa don hade gabas da yamma.

faq.question: Waye malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great)?
faq.answer: Ya yi karatu a karkashin masanin falsafa Aristotle har zuwa shekaru 16, tare da Anaximenes na Lampsacus wanda shima ya koya masa.

faq.question: Wace irin daula Iskandar Makidoniye ya gina?
faq.answer: Ya gina daula da ta fara daga Girka har zuwa Masar a kudu da arewa maso yammacin Indiya a gabas, wacce bata da tamka a tarihi.

faq.question: Shin Iskandar Makidoniye ya taba faduwa a yaki?
faq.answer: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, kuma ana daukarsa daya daga cikin jagororin soja mafi nasara a tarihi.

faq.question: Ta yaya Iskandar Makidoniye ya rusa Daular Farisa?
faq.answer: A yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, ya murkushe sojojin Farisa kuma ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III, inda ya rusa Daular Farisa ta farko.

faq.question: Wadanne birane Iskandar Makidoniye ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya gina birane da dama da aka sa wa suna 'Alexandria', inda Alexandria ta Masar ita ce wacce ta fi shahara.

alexander-the-great.missingDataNote: An tabbatar da duk bayanan ne daga asalin majiyoyin da aka bayar.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Walter Elias "Walt" Disney
Ya yanke shawarar zama mai zane kuma ya tafi Kansas
Ya kafa Disney Brothers Studio tare da yayansa Roy Disney
Ya samar da kuma nuna fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya, <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>
Ya kafa wani babban wurin shakatawa na yara mai suna Disneyland a kusa da Los Angeles
An gano yana da ciwon daji na huhu mataki na karshe kuma ya mutu

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Walt Disney Studios
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Walt Disney Studios a shekara ta 1923 tare da yayansa Roy Disney.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da hoton Oswald the Lucky Rabbit
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hoton zomo 'Oswald the Lucky Rabbit' a cikin shahararrun hotunan kyanwa na lokacin, kuma ya gabatar da shi a matsayin fim na farko na animation mai nuna hali na musamman.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Mickey Mouse
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro hoton 'Mickey Mouse' don kara shahara, kuma ya sanya masa suna 'Mickey' bisa shawarar matarsa Lillian Disney.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da fim din animation mai murya na farko a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da fim na uku na Mickey Mouse, 'Steamboat Willie', wanda ya zama fim din animation mai murya na farko a duniya kuma fim din da ya fara gabatar da Mickey Mouse a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Fim din animation mai launi na farko da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da 'Flowers and Trees', fim din animation mai launi na farko da ya yi amfani da tsarin bugun launi uku, kuma ya lashe lambar yabo ta Academy a fannin gajeren fim din animation na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da kuma nuna <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>, fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya a shekara ta 1937, wanda ya zama babban abin tattaunawa a lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Disneyland
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wani babban wurin shakatawa na yara mai suna Disneyland a kusa da Los Angeles a shekara ta 1955, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsa na dan kasuwa fiye da mai shirya fim kawai.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Walt Disney kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Walt Disney a ranar 5 ga Disamba, 1901 kuma ya mutu a ranar 15 ga Disamba, 1966 sakamakon ciwon daji na huhu mataki na karshe.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kafa Walt Disney Studios?
faq.answer: An kafa Walt Disney Studios tare da yayansa Roy Disney a shekara ta 1923.

faq.question: Wane ne babban hoton da Walt Disney ya kirkiro?
faq.answer: Walt Disney ya kirkiro 'Mickey Mouse' wanda ya samu babban shahara, kuma wannan hoton yana wakiltar Kamfanin Walt Disney har yau.

faq.question: Wane fim din animation mai tsawo Walt Disney ya fara samarwa a duniya?
faq.answer: Ya samar da kuma nuna <Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs>, fim din animation mai tsawo na farko a duniya a shekara ta 1937, wanda ya sami babban nasara.

faq.question: Shin jita-jitar cewa an daskare Walt Disney gaskiya ce?
faq.answer: Ko da yake jita-jitar cewa an daskare gawar Walt Disney ta taba yaduwa, amma karya ce; an kona gawarsa kuma an binne shi a Forest Lawn Memorial Park da ke Glendale.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Milan, Ohio, kuma ya girma a Port Huron, Michigan.
Samar da na'urar aika sako ta atomatik.
Kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park, wanda aka sani da dakin gwaje-gwaje na sirri na farko a duniya.
Samar da na'urar rikodin sauti (phonograph).
Samar da na'urar aika sauti na tarho.
Samar da sabuwar na'urar samar da wutar lantarki da kayan fitila.
Ya yi gwajin jirgin kasa na lantarki.
Gina tashar wutar lantarki da inganta masana'antu.
Ya samar da inji da baturi mai adana wuta.
Ya halarci kuma ya yi jawabi a bikin cikar shekaru 50 da kirkirar kwan fitila mai haske yana da shekaru 82.
Ya rasu a ranar 18 ga Oktoba yana da shekaru 84.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar na'urar rikodin sauti (phonograph)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan yana daya daga cikin mafi shahararriyar kirkira a duniya, kuma daya daga cikin takardun mallakar fasaha masu yawa da aka yi rajista a karkashin sunan Edison.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar kwan fitila
keyAchievements.description: Wannan kirkira ce da ta haskaka daren birni, kuma ta kawo ci gaba a fannin samarwa da raba wutar lantarki, wanda ya taimaka wajen shigar da wutar lantarki kowane gida.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na Menlo Park a shekara ta 1876, wanda aka sani da dakin gwaje-gwaje na sirri na farko a duniya, don ci gaba da kirkirar abubuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa General Electric
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa General Electric daga baya, wanda ya samo asali daga kamfanin hasken lantarki da Edison ya kafa.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Tasirin Edison (Edison Effect)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan wani muhimmin bincike ne na kimiyya wanda ya zama tushen kirkirar bututun vacuum mai electrodes uku, wanda ya bude hanya ga kirkirar rediyo.

faq.question: Takardun mallakar fasaha nawa Thomas Edison ya yi rajista?
faq.answer: Akwai takardun mallakar fasaha na Amurka guda 1,093 da aka yi rajista a karkashin sunan Edison, kuma an ce ya kirkiro abubuwa guda 2,332 ba tare da hukumance ba.

faq.question: Wane irin ilimi na yau da kullum Thomas Edison ya samu?
faq.answer: Edison ya sami watanni 3 kacal na ilimi na yau da kullum, amma ya nuna bajinta saboda jajircewar mahaifiyarsa wadda malama ce wajen koyar da shi.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Thomas Edison ga iyalinsa?
faq.answer: Ko da yake Edison ya mayar da hankali kan kirkira da kasuwanci, ya yi watsi da iyalinsa; bai halarci bikin binne matarsa ta farko ba, kuma rayuwar yaransa ba ta kasance mai kyau ba.

faq.question: Wane tasiri kirkirar Thomas Edison ta yi a kan kimiyya da fasahar Amurka?
faq.answer: Edison ya mayar da Amurka kasa da ta fi Turai karfi a fannin fasaha ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire ta amfani da gwaje-gwaje da sha'awa maimakon ka'idojin ilimi na makaranta.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Gaius Julius Caesar.
Ya zama shugaban iyali yana da shekaru 16 bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
An zabe shi a matsayin Flamen Dialis (babban firist na Jupiter) kuma ya auri Cornelia.
Ya koma Rome bayan mutuwar Sulla kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya.
Ya tafi karatu a tsibirin Rhodes don kammala karatunsa na iya magana (rhetoric).
An zabe shi a matsayin Quaestor, kuma gwaggonsa Julia da matarsa Cornelia sun mutu a shekara guda.
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile kuma ya auri Pompeia, jikanyar Sulla.
Ya tsaye takara kuma ya lashe zaben Pontifex Maximus (babban firist na addinin Rome).
Lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin Praetor, ya rabu da Pompeia saboda badakalar bikin Bona Dea, kuma aka nada shi gwamnan lardin Hispania Ulterior.
An zabe shi a matsayin Consul tare da Marcus Calpurnius Bibulus, kuma suka kafa Triumvirate na Farko.
An nada shi gwamnan lardunan Gallia Cisalpina da Illyricum, inda ya fara Yakin Gallic.
Shugabannin Triumvirate sun hadu a Luca na Gallia Cisalpina don kara tsawon wa'adin mulkin Caesar na gwamna da shekaru 5.
Bayan ya magance matsalolin kabilun Germania, ya zama Roman na farko da ya kaddamar da mamayar Birtaniya (Britannia).
Diyarsa Julia ta mutu yayin haihuwa, kuma Crassus ya mutu a Yakin Carrhae, wanda ya sa hadin gwiwar Triumvirate ya wargaje.
Ya danne babban boren da Vercingetorix ya tayar a tsakiyar Gallia a Yakin Alesia, inda ya mamaye Gallia kusan gaba daya.
Ya haye Kogin Rubicon tare da runduna daya kacal, wanda ya tayar da yakin basasa.
Ya kwantar da hankula a Hispania kuma ya zama Dictator ta hanyar Praetor Lepidus.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Consul a karo na biyu, kuma ya yi murabus daga mukamin Dictator bayan kwanaki 11.
Ya nufi Girka don yakar Pompey.
Ya fara yakin da sojojin Pompey a kwarin Pharsalus.
Wasu gungun sanatoci karkashin jagorancin Marcus Junius Brutus sun kashe shi.
Sanatocin Rome sun ayyana Caesar a matsayin allah na Rome a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye Gallia
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye Gallia daga shekara ta 58 zuwa 52 kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa (K.H), wanda ya fadada yankin Daular Rome har zuwa Tekun Arewa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Triumvirate na Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Triumvirate na Farko tare da Marcus Licinius Crassus da Gnaeus Pompeius Magnus, wanda ya ba su damar sarrafa siyasar Rome na tsawon shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara Jamhuriyar Rome
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya karbi mulki, ya gudanar da sauye-sauye masu yawa a cikin al'umma da siyasar Rome, kuma ya mayar da tsarin mulkin masu fada a ji na jamhuriyar zuwa tsarin mulki na tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyana Kansu a matsayin Dictator na Har Abada
keyAchievements.description: A karshe ya ayyana kansa a matsayin Dictator na Har Abada (Dictator perpetuo), wanda ya taka rawar gani wajen canza Jamhuriyar Rome zuwa Daular Rome.

keyAchievements.title: Mamayar Birtaniya (Britannia)
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 55 K.H, ya zama Roman na farko da ya kaddamar da mamayar Birtaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Acta Diurna
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Acta Diurna, wanda ke zama kamar jaridar zamani, ta hanyar lika ta a fili domin sanar da jama'a rahotannin majalisar dattijai da na jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar Dokar Kasa (Agrarian Law)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yunkurin gyara al'umma ta hanyar ba da shawarar Dokar Kasa (lex iulia de agraria) don sake raba filaye ga talakawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Littattafan Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Shi da kansa ya rubuta tarihin yake-yakensa kamar Commentarii de Bello Gallico (Tarihin Yakin Gallic) da Commentarii de Bello Civili (Tarihin Yakin Basasa) don sanar da rayuwarsa ga al'ummomin gaba.

faq.question: Menene asalin sunan Julius Caesar 'Caesar'?
faq.answer: Pliny Mai Girma ya yi da'awar cewa an sami wani kakan Caesar da aka haife shi ta hanyar tiyata (caesarean section), wanda ke nufin 'an yanke shi daga mahaifa'. Wasu ra'ayoyin sun ce sunan ya fito ne saboda gashi mai kauri ko idanu masu launin toka, ko kuma saboda kakansa ya kashe giwa.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa an haifi Julius Caesar ta hanyar tiyatar cesarean?
faq.answer: A'a. Kafin Julius Caesar ma an sami mutanen da ke da sunan 'Caesar'. Bayan haka, a lokacin ana yin tiyatar cesarean ne kawai a jikin matattun mata, amma mahaifiyar Caesar, Aurelia, ta yi tsawon rai bayan ta haife shi.

faq.question: Wane tsarin siyasa Caesar ya bi?
faq.answer: Caesar ya bi tafarkin Populares (masu goyon bayan talakawa), kuma ya kasance dan siyasa da ya fi son daukaka bukatunsa kai tsaye ga masu zabe maimakon bin tsarin gargajiya.

faq.question: Yaushe aka fadi shahararriyar maganar Caesar 'An riga an jefa guda (dice)'?
faq.answer: A ranar 12 ga Janairu, 49 K.H, lokacin da Caesar ya haye Kogin Rubicon da runduna daya kacal don fara yakin basasa, Plutarch ya ambaci maganar a harshen Girka a matsayin 'Ku jefa guda!', yayin da Suetonius ya rubuta ta a harshen Latin a matsayin 'Alea iacta est' (An riga an jefa guda).

faq.question: Ta yaya aka kashe Julius Caesar?
faq.answer: A ranar 15 ga Maris, 44 K.H, wasu gungun sanatoci karkashin jagorancin Marcus Junius Brutus, wadanda suka kulla makarkashiyar dawo da jamhuriya, sun kashe shi.

timeline.event: Yuli 30, an haife shi a wani gari a yammacin Detroit, Michigan, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarsa ta mutu lokacin yana da shekaru 12.
Ya bar makaranta yana da shekaru 15 don zama makaniki.
Aka gayyace shi ya yi aiki a matsayin injiniya a kamfanin wutar lantarki na Edison.
Ya kirkiri motarsa ta farko wacce ke amfani da injin konewa na ciki (internal combustion engine).
Bayan ya bar kamfanin Edison, ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motors yana da shekaru 40, inda ya fara kera Ford Model T ta hanyar tsarin taron sarrafawa (assembly line).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Yau da Gobe' (Today and Tomorrow).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Falsafar Masana'antata' (My Philosophy of Industry).
Afrilu 7, ya mutu yana da shekaru 84 a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1903, yana da shekaru 40, ya kafa Kamfanin kerar motoci na Ford.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Motar Farko
keyAchievements.description: A 1892, ya kirkiri injin konewa na ciki wanda ya yi amfani dashi wajen kera mota.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Tsarin Model T da Kera Da Yawa
keyAchievements.description: A 1903, ya kawo tsarin taron sarrafawa (belt conveyor system) a karon farko a duniya don fara kera motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Fordism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa falsafar gudanarwa guda hudu da suka hada da barin tsoron gaba, rashin yin aiki don gasa, sanya taimako gaban riba, da kerawa a farashi mai sauki don sayarwa a farashi mai sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa Tsarin Ford
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da gangamin 3S wanda ya shafi daidaita kayayyaki, saukake bangarori, da kwarewar aiki ta amfani da na'urar jigilar kaya wanda ya inganta aikin masu aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Rayuwar Ma'aikata
keyAchievements.description: Bayan kafa kamfaninsa, ya fito da sharudda na musamman ga ma'aikata kamar 'awanni 8 a rana da mafi karancin albashi na dala 5'.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Ford kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Henry Ford a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 1863, kuma ya mutu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1947 yana da shekaru 84.

faq.question: Wane kamfani Henry Ford ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor (Ford Motor Company) wajen kera motoci a shekarar 1903.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Henry Ford?
faq.answer: Ya kera mota a shekarar 1892 kuma a shekarar 1903 ya kirkiro tsarin taron sarrafawa wanda ya haifar da kerar motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin Henry Ford da Thomas Edison?
faq.answer: Henry Ford ya yi aiki a matsayin babban injiniya a kamfanin da Edison ya kafa, inda aka gayyace shi yin aiki a kamfanin hasken wutar lantarki na Edison a 1890.

timeline.event: An haife ta da suna Magdalena Carmen Frida Kahlo y Calderón.
Ta kamu da cutar shan-inna (polio) tana da shekaru 6, wanda ya sa kafar damanta ta zama gajaciya da rashin karfi.
Ta sami mummunan rauni a kashin baya, kafar dama, da mahaifa sakamakon hatsarin mota tana da shekaru 18.
Auren Diego Rivera
Rabuwa da Diego Rivera a watan Nuwamba.
Sake auren Diego Rivera.
Zanen "The Love Embrace of the Universe".
Ta rasu a ranar 13 ga Yuli sakamakon sake kamuwa da ciwon sanyi na huhu (pneumonia).
Nunin ayyukan Frida Kahlo a Gidan Kayan Tarihi na Sejong Center da Soma Museum of Art.
Nunin ayyukan Frida Kahlo da Diego Rivera a Seoul Arts Center.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da tsarin zanen Mexico (Mexican Art Style)
keyAchievements.description: Ta samar da nata salon zane na musamman ta hanyar hada salon gaskiya (realism), surrealism, da alama (symbolism) na Mexico tare da al'adun gargajiya na kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "Frida and the Miscarriage"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin shahararrun ayyukanta da ke nuna wahalar rayuwarta saboda matsalar kashin kwangila da ta haifa da ita.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "Henry Ford Hospital"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin shahararrun ayyukanta da ke nuna wahalar rayuwarta saboda matsalar kashin kwangila da ta haifa da ita.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren aiki: "The Love Embrace of the Universe"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan zanen yana nuna Frida Kahlo da kanta rike da masoyinta Diego Rivera wanda ya bayyana a matsayin jariri a hannunta.

faq.question: Wace irin mai zane ce Frida Kahlo?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai zane ta salon surrealism kuma yar gurguzu ta kasar Mexico, wadda ta kafa salon zane na musamman ta hanyar hada salon gaskiya, surrealism, symbolism na Mexico da al'adun gargajiya.

faq.question: Yaya rayuwar Frida Kahlo ta kasance?
faq.answer: Rayuwarta ta kasance cike da wahalhalu, ciki har da kamuwa da cutar shan-inna tana da shekaru 6 da kuma samun mummunan rauni a hatsarin mota tana da shekaru 18.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Frida Kahlo?
faq.answer: Sun hada da "Frida and the Miscarriage", "Henry Ford Hospital", da "The Love Embrace of the Universe".

faq.question: Wane ne Frida Kahlo ta aura?
faq.answer: Ta auri Diego Rivera, mai zane kuma mai fafutuka na kasar Mexico, kuma ta sake auren sa bayan sun taba rabuwa.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan Frida Kahlo 'Frida'?
faq.answer: Sunan da mahaifinta dan kasar Jamus, Guillermo Kahlo ya ba ta, kuma yana nufin zaman lafiya a harshen Jamusanci.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan fari a gidan masu hannu da shuni na dawaki a Arpinum, Italiya.
Ya yi aikin soja.
Yakin basasa tsakanin Gaius Marius da Sulla ya barke, a lokacin ya karanci falsafar Plato da Aristotle a karkashin Philo.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya a karon farko.
Ya sami daukaka bayan ya kare Roscius da aka zarga da kashe mahaifinsa.
Ya bar Roma zuwa Athens da Rhodes don karatun kissa (rhetoric) da falsafa karkashin Posidonius.
Ya shiga ofishin gwamnati a matsayin ma'aji (quaestor).
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile; ya dauki shari'ar Verres, inda ya tabbatar da laifin Verres kuma ya zama babban lauyan Roma inda ya rubuta jawabai kan Verres.
An zabe shi Praetor, ya rubuta jawabin goyon bayan Pompey sannan ya wallafa kariyarsa ga Murena.
Ya zama Consul wanda shine babban matsayin gudanarwa, ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline, kuma ya gabatar da jawabai kan Catiline.
Ya wallafa kariya ga Archias.
Tsarin mulki na mutum uku tsakanin Caesar, Pompey, da Crassus ya fara, wanda ya jefa shi cikin matsalar siyasa.
Dokar Tribune Clodius Pulcher ta tilasta shi barin Roma zuwa gudun hijira a Makidoniya, inda aka lalata gidajensa.
Ya koma Roma da taimakon magoya bayansa inda aka biya shi diyya kan asarar da ya yi.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Mai Magana' (De Oratore).
Ya wallafa 'Yadda Ake Tsara Jawabi' (De Partitione Oratoria).
An zabe shi a matsayin Augur don komawa ofishin jama'a.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Dokoki' (De Legibus).
An zabe shi gwamnan Cilicia kuma ya wallafa 'Game da Jamhuriya' (De Re Publica).
Yakin basasa tsakanin Caesar da Pompey ya barke kuma ya shiga bangaren Pompey bayan an zabe shi Gwamnan Capua.
Caesar ya ci Pompey a Pharsalus, kuma Cicero ya koma Italiya da amincewar Caesar.
Ya wallafa litattafai kamar 'Stoic Paradoxes', 'Brutus', da 'The Orator'.
Yarsa mai daraja Tullia ta mutu, sannan ya wallafa 'Consolation', 'Hortensius', da 'Game da Yanayin Alloli'.
An kashe Caesar, kuma Cicero ya dawo fagen siyasa.
Ya gabatar da jawabai na Philippic don sukar Mark Antony.
Ya wallafa litattafai da yawa da suka hada da 'Divination', 'Akan Tsufa', da 'Akan Ayyuka'.
Octavian, Antony, da Lepidus sun fara Tsarin Mulkin Mutum Uku na Biyu.
An kashe shi da sojojin Antony a Formia.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Harshen Latin na gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Cicero ne ya tsara tsarin harshen Latin na gargajiya, kuma ana ganin salonta a matsayin mizani na harshen.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Matsayin Babban Lauyan Roma
keyAchievements.description: A shari'ar Verres ta 70 K.Z., ya ci lauyan da yafi shahara a lokacin, inda ya zama babban lauyan Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Hana juyin mulkin Catiline a matsayin Consul
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da yake Consul a 63 K.Z., ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline tare da ceto jamhuriyar Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Shigo da falsafar Girka cikin Latin
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da ya daina siyasa, ya dukufa wajen fassara ka'idojin falsafar Girka zuwa harshen Latin.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Cicero kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Cicero a ranar 3 ga Janairu, 106 K.Z. a Arpinum, Italiya, kuma an kashe shi a Formia a ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z.

faq.question: Yaya kimar siyasar Cicero take?
faq.answer: Akimar siyasarsa gaba daya ba a girmama ta, inda ake daukarsa a matsayin mai hangen nesa da ya rude cikin siyasa da wani mai amfani da damar dake gabansa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Cicero ya yi akan harshen Latin na gargajiya?
faq.answer: Cicero ne ya kafa tubalin harshen Latin na gargajiya, wanda yasa salonsa ya zama ma'auni wajen koyon harshen Latin har wa yau.

faq.question: Ta yaya Cicero ya mutu?
faq.answer: A ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z., ya zama abin da Antony zai kashe saboda mulkin mutum uku, sannan aka yanke kansa da hannayensa aka nuna su a dandalin Roma.

timeline.event: An haifi Helen Adams Keller a gonar Ivy Green da ke Tuscumbia, Alabama, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarta Kate Keller ta karanta littafin Charles Dickens 'American Notes' kuma ta ziyarci J. Julian Chisolm a Baltimore don neman shawara.
Anne Sullivan ta isa gidan Helen don fara koya mata karatu.
Helen ta shiga makarantar Perkins ga makafi.
Ta rubuta 'The Frost King' tana da shekaru 11.
Helen Keller da Anne Sullivan sun koma New York don zuwa makarantun kutare da kurame na Wright-Humason da Horace Mann.
Ta koma Massachusetts kuma ta halarci Makarantar 'Yan Mata ta Cambridge.
An shigar da ita kwalejin Radcliffe, makarantar 'yan mata a karkashin Jami'ar Harvard.
Ta wallafa tarihin rayuwarta 'The Story of My Life' tare da Anne Sullivan da mijinta John Macy.
Ta kammala karatunta daga Radcliffe College tana da shekaru 24, wanda ya sa ta zama mutum na farko kurma da kuma makaho da ya sami digirin farko.
Ta wallafa 'The World I Live In'.
Ta shiga Jam'iyyar gurguzu ta Amurka tana da shekaru 29.
Ta shiga kungiyar Industrial Workers of the World (IWW).
An buga jeren rubutun 'Out of the Dark' wanda yayi bayani akan gurguzu.
Ta kafa kungiyar 'Helen Keller International' tare da George Kessler.
Ta yi rubutu don IWW.
Ta fito a wani fim maras sauti mai suna 'Deliverance'.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU).
An buga littafin 'My Religion'.
Anne Sullivan ta mutu.
Ta ziyarci yankin Akita na Japan sannan aka bata karen Akita mai suna 'Kamikaze-go' bayan ta tambaya akan karen Hachiko.
Bayan mutuwar 'Kamikaze-go', gwamnatin Japan ta bata dan uwansa 'Kenzan-go' a matsayin kyauta.
An aiwatar da aikin rubutun William Gibson 'The Miracle Worker'.
Polly Thomson ta mutu sakamakon bugun jini (stroke).
Ta yi fama da bugun jini, wanda yasa ta shafe karshen rayuwarta a gida.
Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' da Anne Bancroft da Patty Duke suka fito ya lashe kyautar Oscar.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Shugaban Kasa daga Shugaba Lyndon B. Johnson.
An shigar da ita cikin dakin shahararrun mata na Amurka a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York.
Ta mutu tana da shekaru 88 a gidanta a Arcan Ridge, Easton, Connecticut.
Ta zama daya daga cikin mutane 18 mafi daraja a karni na 20 a jerin Gallup.
Jihar Alabama ta sanya hoton Helen Keller akan tsabar kudi na kwata (quarter).
An kara wani mutum-mutumin gangar jiki na Helen Keller zuwa dakin nuna zane-zane na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digiri na farko a matsayin kurma kuma makaho
keyAchievements.description: A 1904, ta zama mace kurma kuma makauniya ta farko da ta kammala karatun digirin farko na Arts a kwalejin Radcliffe.

keyAchievements.title: Mawallafiya da malama
keyAchievements.description: Ta wallafa litattafai 12 tare da kasidu daban-daban kuma ta zama marubuciya kuma malama a Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Yin fafutuka a Gurguzu da Hakkin Dan Adam
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga kungiyoyi daban-daban na hakkin masu kada kuri'a, tabbatar da zaman lafiya, adawa da hukumcin kisa da wariyar launin fata.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Helen Keller International
keyAchievements.description: A 1915, ta kafa 'Helen Keller International' don bincike akan lafiyar gani, abinci, da walwala.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa ACLU
keyAchievements.description: Ta bada gudunmawa wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) a 1920.

keyAchievements.title: Kyaututtuka na Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami lambar yabon Shugaban Kasa a 1964, an shigar da ita cikin dakunan shahararrun mata a 1965, kuma an karrama ta bayan mutuwarta.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Helen Keller kuma yaushe ta mutu?
faq.answer: An haife ta a ranar 27 ga Yuni, 1880 kuma ta mutu a ranar 1 ga Yuni, 1968 tana da shekaru 88.

faq.question: Ta yaya Helen Keller ta rasa jininta da ganinta?
faq.answer: A watanni 19 da haihuwa, an gano tana da cutar zazzabin scarlet da sankarau (meningitis), wanda ya jawo mata makanta da kurmantaka na dindindin.

faq.question: Wanene ya fi tasiri wajen ilimantar da Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Anne Sullivan wacce ta zo gidan Helen a Maris 1887 kuma ta koya mata harshe ta hanyar rubuta kalmomi akan hannunta.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyin kare hakki Helen Keller ta shiga?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu wacce ta tsaya akan hakkin mata, wariyar launin fata, hakkin kananan yara, da sauransu.

faq.question: Wane shahararren fim akayi akan Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' yayi bayanin rayuwarta da alakarta da Anne Sullivan kuma fim din ya ci kyautar Oscar a 1962.

helen-keller.missingDataNote: Ba a fadi ainihin shekarar da ta rasa ganinta da jininta a asalin majiyar ba bayan cutar data kamata tana da watanni 19.

timeline.event: An yi masa baftisma a cocin St. Remigius na Katolika a Bonn, Jamus.
An nuna shi a matsayin 'yaron abin al'ajabi' yana da shekaru shida a fosta ta farko.
Ya fara karatun kida a karkashin Christian Gottlob Neefe a Bonn.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin mataimakin mai buga garaya (organist) na Neefe.
An wallafa aikinsa na farko, 'Bambancin Piano Guda Tara akan Taken Tattakin Dressler, WoO 63'.
An wallafa 'Piano Sonatas, WoO 47' guda uku.
Ya fara aikin albashi a coci kuma an nada shi a matsayin mai garaya na biyu na fada na din-din-din.
An tilasta wa mahaifinsa Johann barin aiki, kuma an ba da umarnin a rika baiwa Beethoven rabin kudin fanshonsa don ciyar da iyalinsa.
An gabatar da shi ga Joseph Haydn wanda ya tsaya a Bonn a kan hanyarsa ta zuwa Landan.
An umarce shi ya rubuta kidan rawa, 'Musik zu einem Ritterballett, WoO 1'.
Haydn ya sake ganin sa a Bonn kuma ya yi alkawarin daukarsa a matsayin dalibi.
Ya bar Bonn zuwa Vienna da taimakon magabata.
Ya yi suna a Vienna a matsayin babban mai buga fiyano.
Bonn ya koma karkashin mulkin Faransa.
Ya kade dayan wakokinsa na fiyano a wasansa na farko a Vienna.
Ya shirya ayyukansa na Op. 1 don wallafawa.
Ya yi rangadi a biranen Turai kamar Prague, Dresden, Leipzig, da Berlin.
Ya koma Vienna.
Ya fara gano cewa yana da matsalar ji.
Ya daina rangadin kide-kide bayan jin sa ya ci gaba da tabarbarewa.
Ya rubuta wakokinsa na farko na kida (string quartets, Op. 18).
Ya wallafa Piano Sonata lamba 8 'Pathétique', Op. 13.
An fara gudanar da wasan kidansa na farko (Symphony No. 1) a Burgtheater.
An wallafa wakokinsa shida na farko na kida, Op. 18.
Ya wallafa Piano Sonata lamba 14, Op. 27-2 ('Moonlight Sonata').
Ya koma Heiligenstadt a wajen Vienna kuma ya rubuta wasiyyarsa ta Heiligenstadt Testament.
Ya rubuta Symphony No. 3 'Eroica'.
Goge sunan Napoleon a kofin Symphony No. 3 bayan jin Napoleon ya bayyana kansa a matsayin sarki.
An gabatar da Symphony No. 3 'Eroica' a karon farko.
An fara wasan kwaikwayon opera na Fidelio.
An gudanar da babban wasan sadaka wanda ya hada da Symphony na 5 da na 6.
An kammala kidan Egmont (Op. 84).
Ya hadu da Goethe a Teplitz kuma ya rubuta wasikar soyayya ta shafuka 10 ga 'masoyiyarsa ta dindindin'.
An yi wasan Symphony No. 7 a taron sadaka ga wadanda abin ya shafa a yakin.
Ya fara amfani da na'urar kara ji (ear trumpet) wanda Maelzel ya kirkira.
Dan uwansa Kaspar ya mutu, inda ya afka rigima kan rikon dan uwansa Karl.
Ya yi nasarar samun rikon dan uwansa Karl.
Lafiyarsa ta samu sauki kuma dan uwansa Karl mai shekaru sha daya ya dawo da zama dashi.
Bayan gwabzawa a shari'a, ya dawo da rikon dan uwansa Karl.
An fara wasan Symphony No. 9 da Missa Solemnis a Kärntnertortheater tare da girmamawa sosai.
Ya koma gidan dan uwansa Johann a Gneixendorf tsawon watanni uku tare da dan yayansa.
Ya gaya wa Schindler da wasu cewa, 'Ku tafa hannu, abokai, wasan barkwanci ya kare'.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 56.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki a matsayin mai tsara kida da mai buga fiyano
keyAchievements.description: Kasancewarsa shahararren mai tsara kida a yammacin Turai da kuma kasancewa muhimmin mutum wajen sauyawar zamani tsakanin kida na gargajiya da na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Ana masa lakabi da 'Mawakin Waliyyi' (Musical Saint)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yawan bayyana shi a matsayin gwarzo ko wani waliyyi na kida a cikin tarihin al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan ayyukansa
keyAchievements.description: Symphony No. 3, 5, 6, 9, tare da Sonata na Pathetique da Moonlight suna daga cikin sanannun ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Wakarsa ta farko data fito
keyAchievements.description: A watan Maris 1783, ya fitar da wakarsa ta farko 'Bambancin Piano Guda Tara akan Taken Tattakin Dressler, WoO 63'.

keyAchievements.title: Wakokin Fiyano na farko (Piano Sonatas)
keyAchievements.description: Wakokin fiyano guda uku na WoO 47 da aka fitar a 1783 sun nuna hazakarsa a matsayin kwararre da wuri.

keyAchievements.title: Babban wasan Symphony No. 9
keyAchievements.description: Symphony ta 9 wacce ya rubuta daga 1818 zuwa 1823 an yabawa wannan aiki sosai domin ta bude wani sabon shafi na hikima da fasaha a kida.

faq.question: A ina kuma yaushe aka haifi Beethoven?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Bonn, Jamus, kuma an rubuta batismarsa a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1770.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Beethoven?
faq.answer: Symphony No. 3, 5, 6, 9, da kuma Moonlight Sonata sune daga cikin wakokinsa da suka fi shahara.

faq.question: Yaushe Beethoven ya mutu kuma menene dalilin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1827 yana da shekaru 56. Ana zargin ya mutu ne saboda cutar hanta ko pneumonia.

faq.question: Shin Beethoven ya zama kurma dindindin?
faq.answer: Ko da yake jinsa ya cigaba da raguwa a hankali, bai zama kurma dindindin ba, har a karshen rayuwarsa yana iya banbanta manyan sauti.

beethoven.missingDataNote: Ba a fadi ainihin ranar haihuwarsa ba a rubutun asali, kuma ana zargin cututtuka da yawa sune sanadin mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Hyde Park, New York
Mutuwar mahaifinsa James Roosevelt I
Kammala karatu a Jami'ar Harvard cikin shekaru 3
Shiga Makarantar Shari'a ta Jami'ar Columbia
Auren Eleanor Roosevelt
Samun nasara a jarrabawar lauyoyi ta New York da kuma barin Makarantar Shari'a ta Columbia
Zaben sa a matsayin Sanata na Jihar New York
Rantsar da shi a matsayin Sanata na Jihar New York
Sake zaben sa a matsayin Sanata na Jihar New York
Nada shi a matsayin Mataimakin Sakataren Sojan Ruwa karkashin Woodrow Wilson
Eleanor Roosevelt ta gano alakar neman mata da yake yi da Lucy Mercer
Tsayawa takarar Mataimakin Shugaban Kasa tare da James M. Cox amma bai yi nasara ba
Shanyewar jiki na kasa sakamakon cutar shan-inna (polio)
Kafa cibiyar farfado da lafiya a Warm Springs, Georgia
Zaben sa a matsayin Gwamnan Jihar New York
Rugujewar kasuwar hannun jari ta Wall Street da fara Babban Tawaye na Tattalin Arziki (Great Depression)
Sake zaben sa a matsayin Gwamnan Jihar New York
Nasara a zaben shugaban kasa na Amurka a kan Herbert Hoover
Tsira daga yunkurin kisan kai da Giuseppe Zangara ya yi masa
Rantsar da shi a matsayin Shugaban Kasa na 32 na Amurka
Sanar da hutun banki na kwanaki 4
Zartar da Dokar Gaggawa ta Banki
Sanya hannu kan Dokar Cullen-Harrison don kawo karshen dokar hana sayar da giya (Prohibition)
Kaddamar da Dokar Farfado da Masana'antu ta Kasa (NIRA)
Sauya tsarin kula da harkokin kudi ta hanyar Dokar Glass-Steagall
Kafa Hukumar Kula da Hannun Jari ta Amurka (SEC)
Kafa Hukumar Kula da Hanyoyin Sadarwa ta Tarayya (FCC)
Kotun Koli ta Amurka ta ayyana Dokar Farfado da Masana'antu ta Kasa a matsayin wadda ta saba wa tsarin mulki
Zartar da Dokar Tsaron Jama'a (Social Security Act)
Kafa Hukumar Samar da Ayyuka ta Kasa (WPA)
Samun babban nasara a zaben shugaban kasa na Amurka don sake zama shugaban kasa
Rashin nasarar zartar da dokar gyara tsarin shari'a
Zartar da Dokar Gidaje
Kafa Hukumar Kasa ta Yaki da Shan-inna (National Foundation for Infantile Paralysis)
Zartar da Dokar Daidaita Sharudan Aiki (FLSA)
Zartar da Dokar Sake Tsari da kafa Ofishin Shugaban Kasa
Barke yaki na biyu na duniya sakamakon mamayar Poland da Jamus ta yi
Zaben sa a zaben shugaban kasa na Amurka, wanda ya sanya shi zama shugaban kasa daya tilo da ya yi mulki fiye da sau biyu
Jawabi a kan 'Yanci Guda Hudu' (Four Freedoms Speech)
Samun amincewar majalisa kan Dokar Ba da Lamunin Makamai (Lend-Lease Act)
Karbar sanarwar yaki daga Japan bayan harin Pearl Harbor da Japan ta kai
Jamus da Italiya sun sanar da yaki ga Amurka
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban kasa mafi dadewa kan mulki a Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne shugaban kasa daya tilo a tarihin Amurka da ya yi mulki mafi dadewa kuma ya yi shugabanci fiye da sau uku (sauran sau hudu).

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal don magance Babban Tawaye na Tattalin Arziki, inda ya samar da taimako ga marasa aikin yi da manoma don farfado da tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Canza tsarin siyasa da bude hanyar yanci na zamani (modern liberalism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Kawancen New Deal' wanda ya canza siyasar Amurka zuwa Tsarin Jam'iyyu na Biyar da kuma samar da tsarin yanci na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Sauye-sauye a fannin kudi da aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da muhimman dokokin tsara harkokin kudi, sadarwa, da aiki kamar kafa Hukumar Kula da Hannun Jari (SEC), Hukumar Inshorar Ajiya (FDIC), da kuma zartar da Dokar Alakar Ma'aikata ta Kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Soke dokar hana sayar da giya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya hannu kan Dokar Cullen-Harrison wadda ta kawo karshen lokacin dokar hana sayar da giya.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Yakin Duniya na Biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki kafada da kafada da sauran shugabannin kasashe don jagorantar kasashen kawance (Allies) da ke yakar kasashen Axis, kuma ya kula da tattalin arzikin Amurka na lokacin yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Fara kera makamin nukiliya
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara kaddamar da aikin kera makamin nukiliya na farko a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UN)
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kai da sauran shugabannin kasashen kawance don kafa harsashin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya da sauran hukumomin bayan yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da Manufar Makwabci Nagari (Good Neighbor Policy)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da Manufar Makwabci Nagari wadda ta soke hakkin shiga tsakanin Amurka kai tsaye a cikin harkokin kasashen Latin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin tsaron jama'a (social security)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin tsaron jama'a a karkashin doka ta hynar Dokar Tsaron Jama'a don tabbatar da taimakon kudi ga tsofaffi, talakawa, da nakasassu.

keyAchievements.title: Kyautata ma'aunin aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya zartar da Dokar Daidaita Sharudan Aiki (FLSA) wadda ta haramta aikin yara tare da kafa mafi karancin albashi na tarayya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Ofishin Shugaban Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Ofishin Shugaban Kasa don zama cibiyar gudanarwa ta tarayya ta hanyar Dokar Sake Tsari ta shekara 1939.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin kare muhalli
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa fadadawa da tallafawa gandun daji na kasa da na jihohi, kuma ya yi kokarin kare muhalli ta hanyar amfani da kungiyoyin kiyaye muhalli na matasa.

faq.question: Franklin D. Roosevelt ya kasance shugaban kasa na nawa a Amurka?
faq.answer: Ya kasance Shugaban Kasa na 32 na Amurka.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Franklin D. Roosevelt?
faq.answer: Ya kaddamar da Tsarin New Deal don magance Babban Tawaye na Tattalin Arziki kuma ya jagoranci kasashen kawance a Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

faq.question: Sau nawa aka zabi Franklin D. Roosevelt a matsayin shugaban kasa?
faq.answer: Shi kadai ne a tarihin Amurka da aka zaba a matsayin shugaban kasa fiye da sau uku, wato sau hudu gaba daya.

faq.question: Wace rashin lafiya Franklin D. Roosevelt ya yi fama da ita?
faq.answer: An gano yana da cutar shan-inna (polio) wadda ta shanye kafafunsa a shekara ta 1921.

faq.question: Wace ce matar Franklin D. Roosevelt?
faq.answer: Matarsa ita ce Eleanor Roosevelt.

faq.question: Yaushe Franklin D. Roosevelt ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 12 ga Afrilu, 1945.

timeline.event: An haifi Marcus Aurelius Antoninus a Roma.
A bisa umarnin Diognetus, ya sanya tufafin masana falsafa kuma ya amince da salon rayuwarsu.
Antoninus Pius wanda zai gaji Hadrian ya dauke shi a matsayin danta.
Antoninus Pius ya zama sarki bayan mutuwar Hadrian.
Ya auri Faustina diyarta Antoninus Pius.
Marcus da Lucius Verus sun zama sarakuna tare bayan mutuwar Antoninus Pius.
Barkar yakin Parthian.
Marcus ya bayyana 'ya'yansa tagwaye Annius da Commodus a matsayin masu gajen shi.
Yaki da kabilun Jamus (Germanic tribes) ya barke.
Sarki Lucius ya mutu saboda annoba (plague).
Ya fara gudanar da mulki tare da dansa Commodus.
Ya mutu a sansanin soja kusa da Vindobona ko Sirmium yana da shekaru 58.

keyAchievements.title: Sarkin Daular Roma
keyAchievements.description: Sarki na 16 na Daular Roma kuma na karshe daga cikin Sarakuna Biyar na Kwarai, kuma na karshe a lokacin Pax Romana.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin falsafar Stoic
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'Meditations' a matsayin masanin falsafa wanda ya ba da muhimman bayanai kan falsafar Stoic.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a fagen Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yaki cikin nasara da Daular Parthian, Armeniya, da kuma kabilun Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Kudi
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki matakin daidaita kudin azurfa na denarius a Roma.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Marcus Aurelius?
faq.answer: Shi ne sarki na 16 na Daular Roma, masanin falsafar Stoic, kuma na karshe daga cikin Sarakunan Kwarai Biyar.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorinsa na soja?
faq.answer: Ya yi yaki cikin nasara da Daular Parthian a Gabas kuma ya murkushe kabilun Jamus a yakin Marcomannic.

faq.question: Wane littafi ne mai muhimmanci da ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Littafin da ya rubuta mai suna 'Meditations' yana da muhimmanci sosai wajen fahimtar falsafar Stoic.

faq.question: Wadanne matsaloli Daular Roma ta fuskanta a lokacin mulkinsa?
faq.answer: Akwai yake-yake da dama da kuma Annobar Antonine (Antonine plague) wanda ya kashe kusan mutane miliyan 5.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Corduba (Cordoba ta Spain a yanzu).
Bayan ya shafe lokaci a Masar, ya koma Roma inda ya fara aikin siyasa da shari'a.
Sarki Claudius ya yi masa gudun hijira zuwa tsibirin Corsica kan zargin zina.
An dawo da shi daga gudun hijira don ya zama malamin Nero, wanda zai zama sarki a nan gaba.
Sarki Nero ya tilasta masa kashe kansa kan zargin saka hannu a makircin Piso.
An haife shi a Jihar Lu karkashin mahaifinsa Shu Lianghe da mahaifiyarsa Yan Zhengzai.
Mahaifinsa ya mutu.
Ya yi aure.
Mahaifiyarsa ta mutu.
Ya sami danta Li.
Ya bude makaranta a Jihar Lu inda ya fara karantar da dalibai.
Ya fara aikin gwamnati a matsayin mai kula da asusu (Weili) da mai kula da filaye (Sizhi).
Ya bi Sarki Zhao na Lu zuwa Jihar Qi lokacin Tawayen 'Huan Uku'.
Ya koma daga Jihar Qi.
An ba shi mukamin babban magatakarda na tsaro (Dasikou).
Bayan ya bata rai da gwamnati, ya bar Jihar Lu zuwa wasu kasashe har tsawon shekaru 14.
Ya yi bakin ciki saboda mutuwar danta da wasu daga cikin dalibansa.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 72 a gaban dalibansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Makarantar Farko a Kasar Sin
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya kafa makarantar farko a tarihin kasar Sin inda ya karantar da dalibai.

keyAchievements.title: Kawar da Mugunyar Al'adar Binne Mutane Masu Rai
keyAchievements.description: Ya baiwa sarki shawara don kawar da mugunyar al'adar binne mutane tare da gawa.

keyAchievements.title: Maido da Tsohuwar Kasar Lu
keyAchievements.description: A tattaunawarsa da Jihar Qi, ya nuna kwazo wajen dawo da kasar da Jihar Lu ta rasa.

keyAchievements.title: Ilmantarwa akan Al'adu shida
keyAchievements.description: Ya karantar da dalibai ta amfani da litattafan gargajiya shida wato Book of Changes, Odes, History, Rites, Music, da Spring and Autumn Annals.

keyAchievements.title: Da'awar Falsafar 'Ren' (Mutuntaka)
keyAchievements.description: Ya jaddada falsafar 'Ren' a matsayin babban makasudin dabi'ar dan adam.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Confucius?
faq.answer: Masanin siyasa ne, masanin falsafa, kuma malami a zamanin 'Spring and Autumn' na kasar Sin wanda ake kallo a matsayin uban Confucianism.

faq.question: Menene babban akidar Confucius?
faq.answer: Babban akidarsa itace 'Ren' wanda ke nufin mutuntaka da kyautatawa ga dan adam.

faq.question: Wane irin harkar ilimi Confucius ya gudanar?
faq.answer: Ya kafa makarantar farko a kasar Sin inda ya karantar da litattafan gargajiya kamar Book of Songs da Book of Changes.

faq.question: Yaushe Confucius ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a shekarar 479 K.Z. yana da shekaru 72.

timeline.event: An haife shi a tsohon garin Athens ta Girka.
Ya shiga yake-yake guda uku kai tsaye a matsayin soja.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin malami don wayar da kan matasa.
Ya zama mamba a cikin Majalisar Dattawa 500 inda ya yi siyasa na shekara guda.
An gurfanar da shi kan laifin sabo da gurbata matasa, kuma an yanke masa hukuncin kisa ta hanyar shan guba yana da shekaru 71.

keyAchievements.title: Mutum na Farko a Falsafar Yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ana ganin shi a matsayin mutum na farko a Falsafar yammacin Turai domin ya shafe rayuwarsa yana tattaunawa akan al'amuran falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Fitar da Tsarin 'Maieutics'
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro tsarin Maieutics inda ake gano kura-kurai ta hanyar tambayoyi da jagoranci zuwa ga tunani mai kyau.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Mutunci da Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya jaddada tsarin da'a inda ya nuna cewa mugunta tana faruwa ne saboda rashin ilimi, yayin da mutunci ya samo asali daga tunani mai kyau.

keyAchievements.title: An kira shi da 'Mafi Girman Malami na Dan Adam'
keyAchievements.description: Mutane da dama sun yaba da hazakarsa da tsarin da'arsa wanda yasa aka bashi sunan mafi girman malami a tarihin dan adam.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ya bar wani rubutaccen littafi?
faq.answer: A'a, bai rubuta komai ba; an samo ra'ayoyinsa ne ta hanyar dalibansa da mutanen zamaninsa.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ne ya fadi cewa 'mummunar doka ita ma doka ce'?
faq.answer: Babu wata shaida da ke nuna Socrates ya fadi haka, kalmar ta samo asali ne daga masanin shari'a Ulpian a zamanin Roma.

faq.question: Ta yaya Socrates ya mutu?
faq.answer: An yi masa shari'a kan laifin 'sabo' da 'gurbata matasa' kuma aka yanke masa hukuncin kisa ta hanyar shan guba.

timeline.event: Ana kyautata zaton an haife shi ne a jihar Chu a lokacin Daular Zhou.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin rumbun ajiya na gidan sarautar Zhou.
Kamar yadda labari ya nuna, ya hadu da matashin Confucius inda suka tattauna akan falsafa da al'adu.
Ya bar Daular Zhou wacce ke durkushewa, inda ya hau saniya ya nufi yamma.
Bayan ya rubuta 'Tao Te Ching' a kofar iyakar yamma, ya bace a tarihi.
An haife shi a Stagira dake yankin Thrace a arewacin Girka.
Ya shiga makarantar Plato (Academy) yana da shekaru 17.
Kafin mutuwar Plato, ya tafi Atarneus a bisa goron gayyata na Hermias.
Sarki Philip II na Makidoniya ya sa ya koma Mieza a matsayin malamin Yarima Alexander.
Bayan Alexander ya fara gudanar da mulki, ya koma Stagira don cigaba da bincike.
Ya koma Athens inda ya kafa makarantar Lyceum kuma ya shafe shekaru 12 yana karantarwa da bincike.
Bayan mutuwar Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gudu zuwa Chalcis wato garin mahaifiyarsa don gujewa masu adawa da Makidoniya.
Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon ciki yana da shekaru 63.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Tsarin Falsafar Yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Shi ya fara kirkirar tsari mai yawa na falsafar yammacin Turai wanda ya hada da da'a, kimiyya, siyasa, da sauransu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin karatu a Lyceum da gidan ajiye dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Tare da taimakon Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gina dakin karatu a makarantar Lyceum sannan ya kafa gidan ajiye dabbobi na farko a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Fannin Logic
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama jigo a fannin ilimin logic ta hanyar wallafa ayyukansa sannan kuma ya kirkiro tsarin 'syllogism'.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a fannin Dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Ya lura da kuma rarraba dabbobi sama da nau'i 500 inda ya bari kyakkyawan bayani a kansu.

faq.question: Waye malamin Aristotle kuma waye dalibinsa?
faq.answer: Aristotle dalibi ne na Plato, kuma shi ne malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great).

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Aristotle ya wallafa littattafai akai?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta a kan darussa da yawa kamar physics, biology, dabbobi, siyasa, da sauransu.

faq.question: Mene ne asalin ilimin logic na Aristotle?
faq.answer: Misali mafi shahara a cikin ilimin logic na Aristotle shi ne tsarin 'syllogism' (ƙin yarda da hankali).

timeline.event: Haihuwa
A bisa gayyatar Dionysius II, ya tafi Sicily don gwada siyasarsa ta gari.
Mutuwa
Shekarar karshe da makarantar Academy da Plato ya kafa tayi aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Kwayoyin Ra'ayi na Falsafa (Objective Idealism)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne masanin falsafar Girka da ya kirkiri tsarin Kwayoyin Ra'ayi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya koyar a Academy, wacce ita ce makarantar farko dake matsayin jami'a a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Jawabai na Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta darussa a kan siyasa, da'a, da sauransu ta hanyar tattaunawa.

faq.question: Waye Plato?
faq.answer: Plato ɗalibi ne ga Socrates kuma malami ga Aristotle, sannan shi ne wanda ya kirkiri tsarin falsafa na 'Objective Idealism'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Plato?
faq.answer: Ya kirkiri tsarin Idealism, ya kafa makarantar Academy, sannan ya fitar da Falsafar sa kan Sarakuna.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Vinci, wani kauye da ke yankin Tuscany.
Rahoton haraji ya nuna cewa yana zama a gida daya da mahaifinsa.
Mutuwar mahaifiyarsa ta riko Albiere.
Ya koma Florence tare da iyalinsa yana da shekaru 14 kuma ya shiga cikin shagon aiki (workshop) na Andrea del Verrocchio.
Ya yi rajista a kungiyar masu zane ta Florence kuma ya shahara a matsayin mai zane.
Ya taimaka wajen kera aikin malaminsa Verrocchio, "The Baptism of Christ", inda ya zana mala'ika a bangaren hagu.
An gayyace shi ya zama mai zane na dangin Sforza a Milan.
Ya kera "Virgin of the Rocks" (da ke Louvre Museum).
Ya mayar da hankali kan binciken tsarin jikin dan adam da na dawakai, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga takardun bincike a kan tsarin jikin dan adam, tashiwar tsuntsaye, da optics.
Ya kera "The Last Supper".
Ya koma Florence a shekara ta 1500 sakamakon mamayar Milan da Sarki Louis XII na Faransa ya yi.
Cesare Borgia ya gayyace shi don gudanar da aikin injiniya na gina hanyoyin ruwa da tsara birane.
Ya koma Florence kuma ya fara zana "Mona Lisa".
Mahaifinsa Ser Piero ya mutu yana da shekaru 77.
Ya zama mai zane na fadar Sarki Louis XII na Faransa a Milan.
Ya koma Florence sannan ya koma Rome karkashin tallafin Giuliano de' Medici.
Ya hadu da Francis I a Bologna kuma aka gayyace shi zuwa Faransa.
Mai tallafa masa Giuliano de' Medici ya rasu.
Ya haye tuddan Alps tare da dalibinsa Francesco Melzi don nufar Amboise, Faransa.
Ya rubuta wasiyyarsa kamar yana jin mutuwar sa ta gabato.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 67 a gidansa na sirri da ke Clos Lucé, Faransa.
Mutuwar Francesco Melzi ta sanya yawancin hotunan zane-zane (croquis) da zane-zane na Leonardo da Vinci bayyana a fili ga duniya.
Ba a samu ragowar kashinsa ba a yanzu saboda an lalata kabarinsa lokacin da aka rushe cocin a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin fannoni daban-daban (Polymath)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban masanin kasar Italiya wanda ya yi ayyuka a fannoni daban-daban kamar zane, sassaka, kirkira, gine-gine, tsarin jiki (anatomy), geography, da kida.

keyAchievements.title: Zabar sa a matsayin mutum mafi kirkira
keyAchievements.description: Ya come na daya a matsayin mutum mafi kirkira a cikin kwararrun masana 10 da suka canza tarihin dan adam wadanda majallar Nature ta zaba a shekara ta 2007.

keyAchievements.title: Mona Lisa
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne zane mafi shahara a duniya a yanzu, kuma shi ne aikin da ke wakiltar Louvre Museum.

keyAchievements.title: The Last Supper
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya cikin shahararrun ayyukanta, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin babban aikin karni.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da salon zane na Sfumato
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dabarar Sfumato, wadda ke zana iska da ke kewaye da abubuwa don nuna ainihin siffa mai fuskoki uku (three-dimensional).

keyAchievements.title: Bincike da gano abubuwan kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano ka'idojin motsin igiyar ruwa (wave motion), karfin ruwa (fluid pressure), famfo, da hawan ruwa, kuma ya yi bincike a kan ka'idojin jirgin sama, aerodynamics, anatomy, da botany.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin "A Treatise on Painting" (De Pictura / Trattato della Pittura)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar kasidu da dama ciki har da littafin "A Treatise on Painting", wando ke zama muhimmin daftarin aiki na ka'idar fasaha ta Renaissance.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Leonardo da Vinci kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar Asabar, 15 ga Afrilu, 1452 da karfe 3 na dare a Vinci, wani kauye da ke yankin Tuscany.

faq.question: Menene shahararrun ayyukan Leonardo da Vinci?
faq.answer: A cikin ayyukansa daban-daban, 'Mona Lisa' ita ce tafi shahara a yanzu, kuma 'The Last Supper' ma tana daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Leonardo da Vinci ya yi aiki a kai?
faq.answer: Ya yi ayyuka da ayyukan yi daban-daban kamar mai zane, mai sassaka, mai kirkira, mai tsara gine-gine, masanin anatomy, masanin geography, da mai kida.

faq.question: Shin Leonardo da Vinci ya sami ilimi na yau da kullum?
faq.answer: Tun da shi dan shege ne, bai koyi karatu da rubutu a makarantar gwamnati ba, kuma bai sami ilimi na yau da kullum a kan harsunan Latin da Girka ko sauran ilimi ba.

faq.question: A ina Leonardo da Vinci ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 2 ga Mayu, 1519 yana da shekaru 67 a gidansa na sirri da ke Clos Lucé, Faransa.

faq.question: Shin kashin Leonardo da Vinci yana nan a yanzu?
faq.answer: Ba a samu ragowar kashinsa ba a yanzu saboda an lalata kabarinsa lokacin da aka rushe cocin a shekara ta 1802 a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa.

faq.question: Shin Leonardo da Vinci ya yi aure?
faq.answer: Ya rayu a matsayin gwauron daji a duk rayuwarsa don haka bai bar yara ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Salzburg, kasar Austria.
Ya kware sosai wajen kunna keyboard da violin, kuma ya fara tsara kida.
Ya yi tafiyar gabatar da wasanni zuwa kasashen Turai daban-daban kamar Jamus, Paris, da London.
Ya koyi tsara kida karkashin Johann Christian Bach a London, Birtaniya.
Ya koyi ka'idojin kida karkashin Giovanni Battista Martini lokacin da yake tafiya a Italiya.
Ya sami kwarin gwiwa na kwarai daga kidan Haydn, Wagenseil, da Monn lokacin da yake tafiya a Vienna.
Ya gabatar da Piano Concerto (K.242) a karon farko ta amfani da kayan kida da Stein ya samar.
An kori shi daga mukaminsa na mai kidan fadar Salzburg don haka ya tafi Vienna, inda ya zauna har mutuwarsa.
Ya auri Constanze.
Ya shiga kungiyar Freemasons reshen 'Beneficence'.
Ya rasu.
Matarsa Constanze ta sake auren wani jakadan Denmark Georg Nikolaus von Nissen.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara ayyukan kida masu yawa
keyAchievements.description: Duk da gajeriyar rayuwarsa, ya bar ayyukan kida fiye da 800 a kusan dukkan fannonin kidan gargajiya na yammacin duniya saboda saurin kirkirarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka mafi kyau na kowane fanni
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukar yawancin ayyukansa a matsayin mafi kyau a fannonin symphony, concerto, kidan daki (chamber music), opera, da choral repertoire.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara manyan wasannin opera
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara wasannin opera kamar "Idomeneo", "The Abduction from the Seraglio", "The Marriage of Figaro", "Don Giovanni", "Così fan tutte", da "The Magic Flute".

keyAchievements.title: Piano Concertos
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara piano concertos fiye da 12 a Vienna, wadanda ake dauka a matsayin daya cikin manyan nasarorinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara shahararrun ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara shahararrun ayyuka kamar symphonies dinsa guda uku na karshe ciki har da Symphony No. 41, serenade "Eine kleine Nachtmusik", Clarinet Concerto, da kuma "Requiem" wanda ya bar shi ba tare da kammalawa ba.

faq.question: Menene dalilin mutuwar Mozart?
faq.answer: Rahoton ya bayyana cewa dalilin shi ne 'zazzabi mai yawa', amma babu isasshen bayani don gano cutar ta hanyar magunguna na zamani, kuma akwai ra'ayoyi daban-daban kamar trichinosis, guba, da zazzabin rheumatic.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya mutu cikin talauci?
faq.answer: Ko da yake ana yawan fadar cewa ya mutu cikin talauci da rashin kulawa, akwai kuma hujja mai karfi da ke cewa yana da kudin shiga mai kyau.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya hadu da Beethoven?
faq.answer: Akwai labarin cewa sun hadu a Vienna a shekara ta 1784, amma tun da wannan labarin ya fito ne kawai daga littafin tarihin Mozart na Otto Jahn, ba shi da cikakken aminci a yanzu.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa Antonio Salieri ne ya kashe Mozart da guba?
faq.answer: Labarin gasar da ke tsakanin Mozart da Salieri da kuma kisan guba labari ne kawai na kan titi, kuma an yi amfani da shi a matsayin jigon ayyuka daban-daban kamar wasan kwaikwayo na Alexander Pushkin, wasan opera na Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov, da wasan kwaikwayo na Peter Shaffer.

faq.question: Shin Mozart ya tsara kida lokaci guda ne sakamakon samun kwarin gwiwa?
faq.answer: Jita-jitar cewa Mozart ya kammala kidan a kansa sannan ya rubuta shi ba tare da yin wani gyara ba tatsuniya ce kawai; a gaskiya ya kasance mai kida da ke yin aiki da taka-tsantsan da kokari.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stratford, Ingila.
Saboda tabarbarewar arzikin gidan, ya bar makaranta ya koma taimakawa a gida.
Ya auri Anne Hathaway wacce ta girme shi da shekaru takwas, yana da shekaru 18.
Ya sami takardar amincewar aure a kotun majami'ar Worcester.
Ya sami diyarsa Susanna.
An haifi tagwayen yara Hamnet da Judith.
Ya isa birnin London.
Ya shafe kimanin shekaru 24 yana rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo inda ya fitar da wasanni 38 da suka hada da na ban dariya da na bakin ciki.
Ana kyautata zaton cewa ya zama sanannen marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a London.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Venus and Adonis'.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Lucrece' sannan ya zama marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ga kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men.
An nuna wasansa 'A Midsummer Night's Dream' inda ya samu karbuwa sosai.
Kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men ta gina filin wasa na Globe kusa da kogin Thames.
Bayan mutuwar Sarauniya Elizabeth I, kungiyar ta canza suna zuwa King's Men.
Diyarsa Susanna ta auri likita John Hall.
An wallafa wakokinsa na 'Shakespeare's Sonnets'.
Ya dawo garinsu na Stratford 'yan shekaru kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
An gayyace shi a matsayin shaida a kotu dangane da wani aure.
Ya sayi wani tsohon gida a London Blackfriars.
Karamin diyarsa Judith ta auri Thomas Quiney.
Ya mutu inda ya bar matarsa da 'ya'yansa biyu.
An fitar da cikakken kundin wasanninsa da ya kunshi wasanni 36.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a matsayin Mafi Girman Marubucin Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya hau matsayin babban marubuci a lokacin ransa kuma ya samu yabo sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Littattafan Gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Wasan kwaikwayonsa kamar 'Romeo and Juliet' da 'Hamlet' sun zama abin misali a tsakanin mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Harshen Turanci
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun ba da gagarumar gudunmawa wajen inganta harshen Turanci na zamani.

faq.question: Shin William Shakespeare ya sami ilimin jami'a?
faq.answer: A'a, bai sami kowane ilimi na gaba da sakandare ba, amma hazakarsa ta sa ya zama babban marubuci.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan wasanninsa na bakin ciki guda hudu?
faq.answer: Wasanninsa guda hudu na bakin ciki (Tragedies) sune 'Hamlet', 'Othello', 'King Lear', da 'Macbeth'.

william-shakespeare.missingDataNote: Ba a da cikakken bayani game da shekarun kuruciyarsa da ainihin farkon lokacin da ya fara rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ulm na masarautar Württemberg a Jamus.
Ya koma Switzerland.
Don gujewa aikin soja, ya bar shaidar dan kasar Jamus kuma ya shiga shirin koyon lissafi da Physics a Polytechnic na Zurich.
Ya ci jarrabawar physics da lissafi kuma an bashi diploma.
Ya zama dan kasar Switzerland.
Ya auri Mileva Marić kuma ya sami aiki a ofishin duba kirkiro na Switzerland da ke Bern.
Ya sami digirinsa na uku daga Jami'ar Zurich kuma ya fitar da kasidu guda hudu da suka juyar da al'amuran kimiya.
An nada shi malami a Jami'ar Bern.
Ya zama farfesa a Jami'ar Zurich.
Ya zama cikakken farfesa a Jami'ar Charles-Ferdinand da ke Prague.
Ya dawo Berlin don shiga cibiyar kimiya ta Prussian da Jami'ar Humboldt.
Ya kammala ka'idarsa ta General Relativity.
Ya zama darekta a cibiyar Kaiser Wilhelm Institute for Physics kuma ya sake zama dan kasar Jamus.
Ya auri Elsa Löwenthal bayan sakin matarsa ta farko kuma tsinkayensa ya zama gaskiya a duniya baki daya.
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta Physics.
Ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa Asiya da Palestine.
Sakamakon hawawan Hitler kan mulki, ya kasa komawa Jamus don haka ya bar shaidar dan kasarsa ya koma Amurka dindindin.
Ya sanya hannu a wasika zuwa ga Shugaba Roosevelt don gargaɗi a kan shirin Jamus na yin makamin nukiliya.
Ya zama dan kasar Amurka.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 76.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Ka'idojin Relativity
keyAchievements.description: Ya canza yadda ake fahimtar sarari da lokaci ta hanyar samar da Special da General Relativity.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Lissafin E=mc²
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da lissafin E=mc² wanda ke nuna dangantaka tsakanin nauyi da karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Photoelectric Effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna cewa haske yana aiki a matsayin barbashi (photons), wanda yasa ya lashe kyautar Nobel a Physics.

faq.question: Meyasa Albert Einstein ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: Ya sami kyautar Nobel a 1921 a fannin Physics don ayyukansa a kan 'photoelectric effect'.

faq.question: Menene mafi shaharar kirkirar Einstein?
faq.answer: Lissafinsa na E=mc² sannan da ka'idojinsa na Relativity wanda suka canza kimiyya.

faq.question: Meyasa Einstein ya bar Jamus zuwa Amurka?
faq.answer: Sakamakon hawawan Adolf Hitler a kan karagar mulki a shekarar 1933 wanda ya kawo cikas ga Yahudawa.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin ta biyar a cikin yara biyar (namiji daya da mata hudu) a Warsaw.
Mahaifiyarta wadda ke fama da ciwon fuka na huhu (tuberculosis) ta rasu tana da shekaru 10.
Ta fara aiki a matsayin malama a gida tun tana da shekaru 17, kuma ta yanke shawarar tafiyar karatu zuwa Paris, Faransa.
Ta shiga Jami'ar Sorbonne da ke Paris don karantar lissafi da physics.
Ta auri masanin kimiyya Pierre Curie.
Tare da Pierre Curie, ta fara raba tare da gano radium chloride daga pitchblende, wani irin dutsen uranium.
Ta samu radium chloride mai kyau gram 0.1 bayan sarrafa tan 8 na datti na dutsen uranium.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare da mijinta Pierre Curie da Henri Becquerel.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Davy Medal tare da Pierre Curie.
Ta lashe lambar yabo ta Matteucci Medal tare da Pierre Curie.
