keyAchievements.description: Wani abin tunawa ne na jana'iza da aka kammala cikin shekaru 40 bayan an ba shi aikin gina kabarin Paparoma Julius II a shekarar 1505, kuma siffar "Musa" ce mafi shahara.

faq.question: Michelangelo ya kasance mai fasaha a wane fanni?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai sassaka dan kasar Italiya, mai zane, masanin zane-zanen gine-gine, kuma mawaki, sannan babban jagora ne na zamanin Renaissance.

faq.question: Menene fitattun ayyukan sassaka na Michelangelo?
faq.answer: Fitattun ayyukan sassakansa sun hada da "Pieta" da aka kammala a shekarar 1499 da "Dawuda" wanda aka yi shi cikin shekaru uku daga 1501.

faq.question: Wanene ya zana rufin dakin ibada na Sistine?
faq.answer: Michelangelo ne ya kammala shi cikin shekaru hudu bayan an bashi aikin a shekarar 1508 ta Paparoma Julius II.

faq.question: A ina "Hukuncin Karshe" na Michelangelo yake?
faq.answer: An kammala wannan aikin cikin shekaru shida bisa umarnin Paparoma Bulus III a shekarar 1535, kuma babban zanen bangon gaba ne na dakin ibada na Sistine.

timeline.event: An haifi Claude Monet a ranar 14 ga Nuwamba a gundumar 9 ta Paris.
An yi masa baftisma da sunan Oscar-Claude a Cocin Notre-Dame de Lorette a ranar 20 ga Mayu.
Iyalinsa sun koma Le Havre a Normandy.
Ya shiga Makarantar Sakandaren Fasaha ta Le Havre a ranar 1 ga Afrilu.
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu.
Ya hadu da abokin zanensa Eugène Boudin.
Ya isa Paris a watan Afrilu kuma ya sauka a otal din 'Du Nouveau Monde'.
A farkon (watan Fabrairu) ya shiga Académie Suisse wanda Charles Suisse ke gudanarwa, inda ya hadu da Camille Pissarro.
An dauke shi aikin soja a Le Havre a ranar 2 ga Maris sannan ya shiga rundunar dawakai na Afirka a ranar 29 ga Afrilu.
Ya kamu da zazzabin cizon sauro (typhoid) a lokacin bazara sannan ya koma Le Havre don murmurewa, kuma ya hadu da Johan Jongkind da rani.
Ya koma Paris a watan Disamba ya yi rajista a dakin zane na Charles Gleyre inda ya hadu da Auguste Renoir da Frédéric Bazille.
Ya fara nuna zane-zane cikin nasara a Salon da "Pointe de la Hève at Low Tide" da "Mouth of the Seine at Honfleur".
Ya gabatar da "Mace sanye da koren kaya" da "Titin Paving na Chailly" ga Salon inda aka zabe su.
Budurwarsa a wancan lokacin, Camille Doncieux, ta haifi dansu na fari Jean.
Ya auri Camille a ranar 28 ga Yuni, kuma ya rayu a matsayin dan gudun hijira a London da Netherlands gabanin barkewar yakin Franco-Prussian.
Mahaifinsa ya rasu, sannan iyalinsa sun koma Argenteuil.
Ya koma 'gidan ruwan hoda mai koren taga' a Argenteuil, kuma ya nuna "Impression, Sunrise" da sauransu a Bikin baje koli na Impressionism na farko.
Ya zana "Mace mai laima - Madame Monet da Danta".
Camille Monet ta yi rashin lafiya sosai, kuma ya gudanar da wani bikin baje koli don nuna adawa da Salon.
Ya gabatar da zane-zane 7 na "Gare Saint-Lazare" a Bikin baje koli na Impressionism na 3 a ranar 5 ga Afrilu.
An haifi dansa na biyu Michel, ya koma kauyen Vétheuil, kuma aka gano Camille tana da cutar daji ta mahaifa.
Camille ta rasu.
Ya gabatar da zane-zane biyu ga Salon wanda aka amince da daya.
A watan Disamba ya koma Poissy tare da Alice, matar Ernest Hoschedé, da 'ya'yanta.
Ya shiga Bikin baje koli na Impressionism na 7 a karo na karshe.
Ya koma wani gidan haya a Giverny tare da 'ya'yansa a ranar 29 ga Afrilu, kuma an gudanar da babban bikin baje kolin ayyukansa na farko.
Ya yi gajeruwar tafiya ta zane tare da Auguste Renoir zuwa yankin Riviera na Italiya da Genoa a watan Disamba.
Ya zauna a Bordighera daga 18 ga Janairu zuwa 5 ga Afrilu yana zana zane-zane guda 38.
Ya yi tafiya don zana furen tulip a Netherlands.
Ya hadu da John Singer Sargent a lokacin bazara.
Ya sayi gidan Giverny.
An nuna zane-zane 15 na "Haystacks" a Gidan zane na Durand-Ruel.
Ya zana zane-zane 26 na wuraren "Rouen Cathedral".
Ya nuna zane-zane 20 na "Rouen Cathedral".
An nuna zane-zane 61 a Galerie Georges Petit.
Ya fara zana furannin ruwa (Water Lilies), kuma ya zauna a London tsawon makonni 6.
Ya nuna zane-zanen lambunsa na farko da suka fi mayar da hankali kan gadar salon kasar Japan.
Ya fadada tafkin gidansa, kuma bikin baje kolin furannin ruwa a birnin New York a watan Fabrairu ya yi nasara sosai.
Ya fadada girman lambun ruwansa zuwa kusan murabba'in mita 4000.
An nuna zane-zanen 'Gare-garen Kogin Thames, London - 1900-1904' a watan Mayu da Yuni.
Ya zauna a Fadar Barbaro a Venice tare da Alice a lokacin kaka.
An gudanar da bikin baje koli mai taken "Water Lilies" a ranar 6 ga Mayu, inda aka nuna zane-zane 48.
Matarsa ta biyu Alice ta rasu.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa London don ganin likitan ido na kasar Jamus Richard Liebreich.
Dansa na fari Jean ya rasu.
Ya fara aikin 'zanen bango' don gwamnatin Faransa.
Ya fara tsarin zane-zanen wuri "da dukkan karfinsa".
Matsalar ganinsa ta dan samu sauki sakamakon maganin fadada idanu.
An yi masa aikin tiyatar cire yanar ido (cataract).
Ya fara yi wa wasu ayyukan da ya yi gabanin tiyatar kwaskwarima sakamakon samun saukin ganinsa.
Ya rasu sakamakon cutar sankarar huhu a ranar 5 ga Disamba yana da shekaru 86, kuma an binne shi a makabartar cocin Giverny.
An nuna zane-zanen alluna guda 27 a Gidan Tarihi na Orangerie a watan Mayu.
Mukalar André Masson ta taimaka wajen canza yadda ake kallon zane-zanen Monet.
Gobara a Gidan Tarihin Fasaha na Zamani da ke New York ta lalata zane-zanen furannin ruwa da suke adanawa.
Michel ya bayar da kyautar gidan Monet, lambun, da tafkin furannin ruwa ga Cibiyar Fasaha ta Faransa.
An gyara lambun Monet sannan aka bude shi ga jama'a.
An yi alamar Google Doodle don murnar cika shekaru 161 da haihuwar Claude Monet a ranar 14 ga Nuwamba.
An sayar da "London, the Parliament, Effects of Sun in the Fog" kan dalar Amurka miliyan 20.1.
An wallafa takarda a mujallar Proceedings of the Royal Society game da wuraren zane-zanen London.
An saci "Cliffs near Dieppe" a karo na biyu a watan Agusta.
An sayar da "The Railway Bridge at Argenteuil" a kan dala miliyan 41.4 a ranar 6 ga Mayu.
An gano "Cliffs near Dieppe" a watan Yuni.
An sayar da "Water Lily Pond" akan fam 40,921,250 (kimanin dala 80,451,178) a ranar 24 ga Yuni.
"The Church at Vétheuil" da "Water Lily Pond" sun zama batun shari'a a kotun New York a watan Oktoba.
An gano wani zanen Monet da wani dan kasuwan yahudawa ya mallaka a cikin akwatin Cornelius Gurlitt.
An mayar da "On the Beach", wani aikin da 'yan Nazi suka sace, ga jikokin Falgi.

keyAchievements.title: Samarwa da Fara Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiransa 'Uban Impressionism', an san shi a matsayin wanda ya kirkiro kuma ya fara Impressionism kuma babban jagora ne na fasahar zamani (Modernism).

keyAchievements.title: Asalin Kalmar Impressionism
keyAchievements.description: Kalmar 'Impressionism' ta samo asali ne daga sunan zanensa "Impression, Sunrise" da aka nuna a Bikin baje koli na Impressionism na farko a shekarar 1874.

keyAchievements.title: Aiwatar da Zane-zane na waje akai-akai
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai zane da ya fi dacewa wajen aiwatar da falsafar Impressionism a tsawon rayuwarsa ta aiki, ya bayyana fahimtarsa game da dabi'a ta hanyar zane-zane a waje.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Tsarin zane-zane (Series)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bullo da dabarar zana wuri guda sau da yawa don nuna sauyin haske da na yanayi, sannan fitattun ayyukansa sun hada da tsarin "Haystacks", tsarin "Rouen Cathedral", da tsarin "Water Lilies".

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Lambun Giverny
keyAchievements.description: Ya sayi gida da fili a Giverny da ke arewacin Faransa sannan ya fara babban aikin gyaran lambu wanda ya hada da tafkin furannin ruwa, wanda ya zama babban abin da ke karfafa masa gwiwa a fannin fasaha.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri ga Fasahar Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa na baya-bayan nan da yayi a Giverny karkashin tasirin yanar ido, ana kallonsu a matsayin abin da ya ba da 'babban' kwarin gwiwa ga fasahar karni na 20 da fasahar zamani ta (abstract).

faq.question: Wanene Claude Monet?
faq.answer: Claude Monet mai zanen Impressionist ne na kasar Faransa wanda ake kira 'Uban Impressionism', kuma shine wanda ya kirkiro sannan ya fara motsin Impressionism.

faq.question: Daga ina kalmar 'Impressionism' ta samo asali?
faq.answer: Kalmar 'Impressionism' ta samo asali ne daga taken zanensa "Impression, Sunrise" wanda aka nuna a Bikin baje koli na Impressionism na farko a shekarar 1874.

faq.question: Menene fitattun zane-zane na Monet?
faq.answer: Fitattun zane-zanensa sun hada da tsarin "Haystacks", tsarin "Rouen Cathedral", da tsarin "Water Lilies", wanda ya fi mayar da hankali akai a cikin shekaru 20 na karshen rayuwarsa.

faq.question: A ina Monet ya fi yin ayyukansa?
faq.answer: Ya rayu a Giverny da ke arewacin Faransa tun daga shekarar 1883, inda ya sayi gida da fili kuma ya fara wani babban aikin gyaran kasa wanda ya hada da tafkin furannin ruwa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri gani yayi a kan ayyukan Monet?
faq.answer: Saboda yanar ido, ya ci gaba da fuskantar wahala wajen gane launuka, don haka zane-zanensa suka zama manya kuma a lollokace (abstract), kuma bayan tiyatar, zanensa sun fi nuna launin shudi fiye da da.

faq.question: Wane tasiri ayyukan Monet sukayi ga fasahar zamani?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa na baya-bayan nan da yayi a Giverny karkashin tasirin yanar ido ana daukarsu a matsayin wani abu da ya ba da 'babban' kwarin gwiwa ga fasahar karni na 20 da fasahar zamani ta (abstract).

timeline.event: An haife shi a Moscow a matsayin da na biyu daga cikin yara bakwai na Mikhail Andreyevich da Maria Fyodorovna.
Ya shiga makarantar kwana ta Chermak a Moscow tare da dan'uwansa Mikhail, inda yayi karatu na shekaru 3.
Mahaifiyarsa Maria Fyodorovna ta rasu sakamakon tarin fuka; mahaifinsa ya tura shi da dan'uwansa Mikhail zuwa St. Petersburg don shiga makarantar injiniyan soji.
Ya ci jarrabawar shiga makarantar injiniyan soji kuma ya sami horon soja.
Bayin dake gonar mahaifinsa sun kashe shi.
Ya kammala makarantar injiniyan soji kuma an bashi matsayin laftanar a ofishin zane na Ma'aikatar Yaki.
Ya bar aikin soja don zama marubuci sannan ya mai da hankali kan adabi.
Ya fara rubutu tare da babban yabo daga mai sukar lamiri Vissarion Belinsky kan aikinsa na farko, "Matasa Masu Talauci".
Hukumomi sun kama shi saboda ya shiga kungiyar Mikhail Petrashevsky kuma ya karanta "Wasika zuwa ga Gogol" na Belinsky.
Ya kammala wa'adin daurinsa na shekaru 4 a gidan yarin Omsk.
Ya auri Maria Isaeva.
Ya koma Petersburg.
Ya wallafa mujallar "Lokaci" tare da dan'uwansa, kuma ya buga "Wadanda Aka Zalunta" da "Tarihin Gidan Matattu" a matsayin jerin labarai.
Ya kafa sabuwar mujalla "Karni" tare da dan'uwansa, amma bai yi nasara ba.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa "Zunubi da Hukunci".
Yayin da yake zaune a kasashen waje (musamman Dresden), ya rubuta "Wawa", "Shaidanu", da sauransu kafin ya dawo gida.
Ya wallafa "Saurayi", inda ya sami makudan kudi sannan ya tsira daga talauci.
Ya kammala rubuta babban aikinsa na karshe, wato littafin "'Yan Uwa Karamazov".
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 60 sakamakon fashewar jijiyar huhu.
An binne gawarsa a makabartar gidan ibada na Alexander Nevsky da ke Petersburg.

keyAchievements.title: Matasa Masu Talauci
keyAchievements.description: Aikinsa na farko a shekarar 1846 wanda ya ba shi damar fara rubutu cikin armashi inda ya sami yabo daga mai sukar lamiri Vissarion Belinsky a matsayin 'Gogol na biyu'.

keyAchievements.title: Tarihin Gidan Matattu
keyAchievements.description: Wannan aiki ne da aka wallafa bisa la'akari da abubuwan da ya fuskanta yayin zaman gudun hijira a Siberia.

keyAchievements.title: Zunubi da Hukunci
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala wannan aikin, wanda ake daukarsa a matsayin daya daga cikin fitattun ayyukansa, a shekarar 1866.

keyAchievements.title: Saurayi
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa wannan aikin a shekarar 1874 kuma ya sami makudan kudi, abin da ya ba shi damar tsira daga talauci.

keyAchievements.title: 'Yan Uwa Karamazov
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1880, ya kammala rubuta wani littafi da ake daukarsa a matsayin babban aikinsa na karshe.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Tarihin Marubuci
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada da bayanan adabi, sharhin siyasa da zamantakewa, makaloli, gajerun labarai, da sauransu, wadanda daga baya suka zama muhimman bayanai ga bincike akan Dostoevsky.

faq.question: Wane canji na akida Dostoevsky ya samu?
faq.answer: Ya fuskanci canjin akida daga gurguzu zuwa tsarin dan adam na Kirista sakamakon karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki da zurfi da kuma rayuwar fursunoni da mutanen da ya gani a gidan yari yayin gudun hijira a Siberia.

faq.question: Wane kwarewa ta kashin kai ce tayi tasiri a duniyar ayyukan Dostoevsky?
faq.answer: Abubuwan da suka shafe shi na siyasa inda aka rage masa hukunci gab da zartar da hukuncin kisa, gudun hijira a Siberia, cutar farfadiya, da kuma caca wadda tayi tasiri a matsayin muhimman abubuwa a cikin ayyukansa.

faq.question: Wane irin yanayi ne littattafan Dostoevsky ke da shi?
faq.answer: Littattafansa sukan nuna haruffa dake da halaye na daban kuma masu tsauri, inda suke nuna fahimta mai ban mamaki game da tunanin dan adam, kuma sun yi nazari sosai kan siyasa, zamantakewa, da ruhin Rasha a lokacinsa.

faq.question: Shin Dostoevsky yana da alaka da wanzuwa?
faq.answer: Walter Kaufmann ya siffanta littafin Dostoevsky "Bayanan Daga Karkashin Kasa" a matsayin 'mafi kyawun shiri don wanzuwa', kuma a wasu lokuta ana daukarsa a matsayin wanda ya kirkiro tsarin wanzuwa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Besançon, gabashin Faransa a matsayin da na uku na Leopold Hugo.
Ya yi sha'awar karatu da rubuta waka a makarantar kwana ta Cordier da ke Paris sannan ya yi alkawarin zama babban marubuci a Faransa.
Ya wallafa littafin wakokinsa na farko, "Odes et Poésies Diverses", kuma ya yi aure.
Ya wallafa littafin "Han d'Islande".
Gidan sarautar Faransa sun ba shi lambar yabo ta Chevalier de la Légion d'honneur a matsayin amincewa da gudummawarsa a matsayin marubuci.
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Odes et Ballades" da littafin "Bug-Jargal".
Ta hanyar wallafa gabatarwar wasan kwaikwayo "Cromwell", ya fito fili ya yi adawa da adabin gargajiya sannan ya jagoranci marubutan Romanticism.
Ya wallafa "Les Orientales" da "Ranar Karshe ta Mai Yanke Hukuncin Kisa".
Gabatowar wasan kwaikwayon "Hernani" na farko ya haifar da 'Yakin Hernani' tsakanin masu goyon bayan Romanticism da na gargajiya.
Ya wallafa littafin "Notre-Dame de Paris", littafin wakoki "Les Feuilles d'automne", da wasan kwaikwayo "Marion Delorme".
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Sarki yana jin dadi".
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Lucrèce Borgia" da "Marie Tudor".
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Wakokin Yamma".
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Muryoyin Ciki".
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo na waka "Ruy Blas".
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Haske da Inuwa".
Ya zama memba na Académie Française.
Wasan kwaikwayonsa "Les Burgraves" ya sha suka sosai, sannan babbar diyarsa Léopoldine da mijinta suka rasu a hatsarin juye jirgin ruwa.
Kusan bai wallafa kowane aiki ba inda ya sadaukar da kansa ga ayyukan siyasa.
Juyin Juya Halin Fabrairu da sauran yanayi sun sa ya karfafa manufarsa na tausayin dan adam.
Saboda adawarsa da juyin mulkin Napoleon III, an kore shi daga kasar inda ya fara rayuwar gudun hijira na kusan shekaru 19.
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Hukunci".
Ya wallafa littafin wakoki "Abubuwan Lura".
Ya wallafa kundi na farko na littafin wakoki "Almara na Karni".
Ya wallafa littafin "Les Misérables".
Ya wallafa littafin "Ma'aikatan Teku".
Ya rubuta "Shekaru Masu Tsauri", inda ya kwatanta halin da ma'aikata ke ciki.
Ya koma Paris a matsayin mai kare tsarin jamhuriya tare da faduwar Napoleon III sakamakon yakin Franco-Prussian.
Ya wallafa "Shekara Mai Muni".
Ya wallafa littafin "'93".
Ya wallafa kundi na biyu na "Almara na Karni".
Ya rubuta wasiyyarsa.
Ya wallafa kundi na uku na "Almara na Karni".
Ya rasu, sannan an binne gawarsa a Panthéon tare da jana'izar kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Adabin Romanticism
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ka'idar wasan kwaikwayo ta Romanticism a cikin gabatarwar "Cromwell", ya yi nasara a 'Yakin Hernani', kuma ya jagoranci marubutan Romanticism.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Litattafai Masu Kyau
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin marubucin litattafai da "Notre-Dame de Paris", kuma ya rubuta fitattun ayyuka da yawa ciki har da "Les Misérables" yayin gudun hijirarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar Zamantakewa da Tausayin Dan Adam
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana kaunarsa ga matalauta ma'aikata ta hanyar ayyukansa, ya jaddada fasahar jama'a, kuma ya karfafa manufofin tausayin dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Muhimmin Mutum a Adabin Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike matsayi mai mahimmanci a adabin Faransa, kamar karbar lambar yabo ta Chevalier de la Légion d'honneur a shekarar 1825 da zama memba na Académie Française a shekarar 1841.

faq.question: Wanene Victor Hugo?
faq.answer: Mawaki ne, marubucin litattafai, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na Faransa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Victor Hugo ya yi akan Romanticism?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da ka'idar wasan kwaikwayo ta Romanticism ta hanyar gabatarwar wasan kwaikwayo "Cromwell", yayi nasara a 'Yakin Hernani', kuma ya jagoranci marubutan Romanticism.

faq.question: Menene fitattun ayyukan Victor Hugo?
faq.answer: Sun hada da litattafan "Notre-Dame de Paris" da "Les Misérables".

faq.question: Me yasa Victor Hugo yayi rayuwar gudun hijira?
faq.answer: Saboda adawarsa da juyin mulkin Napoleon III a shekarar 1851, an kore shi daga kasar inda ya fara rayuwar gudun hijira ta kimanin shekaru 19.

faq.question: Wace dangantaka Victor Hugo ke da ita da Katolika?
faq.answer: Cocin Katolika ta haramta ayyukansa, sannan ya kasa yin sulhu da Katolika har ma ya ki amincewa da addu'o'in cocin.

faq.question: Yaushe Victor Hugo ya rasu kuma a ina aka binne shi?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 22 ga Mayu, 1885, kuma an binne gawarsa a Panthéon.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin da na uku a Taganrog, birnin tashar jiragen ruwa dake gabar Tekun Black Sea.
Ya halarci makarantar share fage wanda ke koyar da tsohon yaren Girka a garinsu.
Ya shiga makarantar sakandaren Taganrog wanda aka tsara don ba da ilimin gargajiya.
Ya sake yin aji uku saboda karancin maki.
Ya fadi jarabawar tsohon yaren Girka kuma ya sake yin aji biyar.
Ya kammala karatunsa a makarantar Taganrog sannan ya shiga sashen likitanci na Jami'ar Moscow.
Ya dauki nauyin rubuta labari a kowane mako biyu game da rayuwar yau da kullun ta Moscow a mujallar adabi "Oskolski".
Ya ci jarabawar kammala karatun likitanci kuma ya wallafa littafinsa na farko na gajerun labarai, "Tatsuniyoyin Melpomene".
An fara nuna wasan kwaikwayo "Ivanov", inda ya samu gagarumar nasara a Moscow da St. Petersburg.
Ya tashi daga Moscow don yin tafiya zuwa Siberia da tsibirin Sakhalin.
Ya sayi babban gida a wajen birnin Moscow, inda ya zauna tare da iyayensa da kanwarsa kuma ya yi aikin likita.
Ya gabatar da wasan kwaikwayo "The Seagull", wanda ke nuna farkon matakinsa na karshe na rubuta wasan kwaikwayo.
Saboda tabarbarewar lafiyarsa, ya koma yankin Crimean wanda ke fuskantar Yalta.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na Kwalejin Rasha.
Ya auri Olga Knipper, yar wasan kwaikwayo ta Gidan wasan kwaikwayo na Fasaha na Moscow.
Yayi murabus daga kasancewa memba na Kwalejin don nuna adawa da matakin da gwamnati ta dauka na cire Gorky daga matsayin memba.
Ya rasu sakamakon tarin fuka (TB) yana da shekaru 44.

keyAchievements.title: Kammala Karatun Likitanci da Ayyukansa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Moscow a shekarar 1884, inda ya kula da lafiyar manoma makwabtansa a matsayin likita sannan ya gina makaranta a kauyen.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a Matsayin Marubucin Gajerun Labarai
keyAchievements.description: Ya riga ya yi suna sosai a matsayin sabon marubuci a lokacin da ya kammala jami'a, inda ya rubuta gajerun labarai masu ban dariya da makaloli a mujallu daban-daban kuma ya wallafa littafinsa na farko na gajerun labarai "Tatsuniyoyin Melpomene".

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Matsayin Marubucin Wasan Kwaikwayo
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wani sabon tsari na wasan kwaikwayo na tattaunawa ta hanyar fitattun ayyukan wasan kwaikwayo na zamani irin su "The Seagull", "Uncle Vanya", "Three Sisters", da "The Cherry Orchard", bayan gagarumar nasarar da wasan kwaikwayon "Ivanov" ya samu.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Sukar Zamantakewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta labarin tafiya wanda ya rubuta halin kuncin rayuwa da fursunonin da aka kora tsibirin Sakhalin suke ciki, sannan ya yi murabus daga matsayin memba na Kwalejin Rasha don nuna adawa da matakan da gwamnati ta dauka na rashin adalci.

faq.question: Wane irin aiki Anton Chekhov ya yi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance likita dan kasar Rasha, marubucin gajerun labarai, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo.

faq.question: Menene fitattun ayyukan wasan kwaikwayo na Anton Chekhov?
faq.answer: Fitattun ayyukansa na wasan kwaikwayo sun hada da "The Seagull", "Uncle Vanya", "Three Sisters", da "The Cherry Orchard".

faq.question: Yaushe Anton Chekhov ya rasu, kuma menene sanadin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Anton Chekhov ya rasu a ranar 15 ga Yuli, 1904, yana da shekaru 44 sakamakon cutar tarin fuka (TB).

faq.question: Wadanne ayyuka Anton Chekhov yayi a matsayin likita?
faq.answer: Yayin da yake zaune a wajen birnin Moscow, yayi aikin sa-kai a matsayin likita ta hanyar kula da lafiyar manoma makwabtansa da gina makaranta a kauyen.

timeline.event: An haifi Frédéric François Chopin.
Iyalinsa sun koma Warsaw.
Warsaw ya zama wani bangare na Masarautar Poland ta Tsarin Tsarin Mulki.
Ya sami horon kida na farko na kwararru a wajen Wojciech Zywny.
Ya fara gudanar da kide-kiden jama'a yana da shekaru 7, kuma ya tsara wakokin polonaise guda biyu.
Ya tsara Polonaise a as-dur (A-flat major) kuma ya sadaukar dashi ga Zywny.
Ya kada wakokinsa na bapab-bapab da wasu bangarorin wakar concerto na Moscheles tare da aeolomelodicon.
Ya kada Rondo Op. 1 na kansa (aikinsa na farko da aka wallafa na kasuwanci) a wajen kade-kaden aeolopantaleon.
Ya halarci makarantar Warsaw Lyceum, kuma ya yi karatun tsarin kida, figured bass, da yin waka tsawon shekaru 3 a Cibiyar Kida ta Warsaw.
Iyalinsa sun koma Krakowskie Przedmieście jim kadan bayan rasuwar kanwarsa Emilia.
Ya ziyarci Berlin tare da wani abokin iyalinsu.
Ya tsara "Souvenir de Paganini" bayan sauraron kade-kaden violin na Niccolò Paganini.
Ya fara fitowa a Vienna inda ya gudanar da kide-kiden piano guda biyu kuma ya sami karbuwa sosai.
Ya fara kade kade na Piano Concerto No. 2 a cikin f minor, Op. 21.
Ya bar Warsaw.
An yi boren Nuwamba a Warsaw.
Ya bayyana bakin ciki a cikin littafin tarihinsa bayan samun labarin murkushe boren yayin tafiya daga Vienna zuwa Paris.
Ya isa Paris.
Robert Schumann ya ayyana a matsayin 'haziki' a bitarsa ta Op. 2 bambance-bambance.
Ya fara gudanar da kade-kadensa na farko a Paris, wanda ya sami yabo na gaba daya.
An wallafa Études Op. 10.
Ya halarci Bikin Kida na Rhine tare da Hiller inda ya hadu da Felix Mendelssohn.
Ya tafi Karlovy Vary (Carlsbad) inda ya kashe lokacinsa na karshe da iyayensa.
Ya sami takardar zama dan kasar Faransa.
Ya hadu da George Sand a wurin bikin da Marie d'Agoult ta shirya.
Ya zauna da iyalan Wodziński a Marienbad da Dresden, sannan ya nemi auren Maria.
Ya kai ziyarar sirri birnin London tare da Camille Pleyel, wanda ke yin piano.
An wallafa Études Op. 25.
Yayi soyayya da George Sand.
Ya yi lokacin sanyi a tsibirin Majorca tare da Sand.
An wallafa Preludes Op. 28.
Ya tsara Piano Sonata No. 2, Op. 35.
Ya wuce gidan Sand da ke Nohant don ciyar da lokacin zafi.
Fitowar sa ta karshe da jama'a tare da Liszt.
Ya rubuta wasika ga Grzymała game da tabarbarewar lafiyarsa bayan wasansa a Paris.
Ya tsara Piano Sonata No. 3, Op. 58.
Dangantakar Sand da Chopin tayi tsami.
Ya yanke alakarsa da Sand bayan musayar wasiku masu zafi.
Ya gudanar da kidansa na karshe a Paris tare da Auguste Franchomme mai kida da Cello.
Ya tashi zuwa London lokacin juyin juya halin 1848 a Paris.
Sarauniya Victoria da Yarima Albert sun halarci wasansa na farko a London a gidan Stafford.
Ya rubuta wasiyyarsa ta karshe a Edinburgh.
Yayi kidansa na karshe a gaban jama'a a Guildhall ta London.
Babbar yayarsa Ludwika ta iso Paris tare da mijinta da diyarta.
Ya rasu a Paris yana da shekaru 39.
An gudanar da jana'iza a Cocin Madeleine da ke Paris.
An kafa dutsen kabarin Chopin.
Babbar yayarsa Ludwika ta dauki zuciyar Chopin zuwa Poland.
Julian Fontana ya wallafa guda 23 na kide-kiden piano da ba a buga ba sannan ya sanya su a karkashin lambobin aiki takwas da aka kara (Op. 66–73).
An wallafa wakokin Poland guda 17 inda aka hada su a matsayin Op. 74.
An yi amfani da kide-kiden Chopin a cikin rawan ballet Chopiniana.
Claude Debussy ya sadaukar da aikin pianonsa don tunawa da Chopin.
An wallafa sakamakon gwajin gani na zuciyar Chopin da aka adana a cikin Mujallar Medicine ta Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran Mai Tsara Waka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kiyaye shahararsa a fadin duniya sakamakon hazakar wakarsa bisa fasahohin kwararru wadanda babu wanda ya kama kafa dashi a zamaninsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kwararre a Kide-Kiden Piano na Musamman
keyAchievements.description: Ya fi tsara wakokin kide kide na piano na musamman, kuma dukkan ayyukansa da aka sani sun hada da piano.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro Wakar Balad ta Kayan Kida
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara tsara wakar balad ta kayan kida a matsayin tsarin kida na kayan kida.

keyAchievements.title: Mayar da Scherzo a Matsayin Wakar Kade-Kade
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara tsara Scherzo a matsayin wakar kade-kade daban daban.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Tsarin Wakar Prelude
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wani sabon tsari mai inganci ta hanyar zabin wakokinsa na prelude na kansa (Op. 28).

keyAchievements.title: Amfani da Ingantacciyar Fasahar Étude na Waka
keyAchievements.description: Yayi amfani da ingantacciyar fasahar tunanin wakar concert étude a cikin saiti biyu na études (Op. 10, Op. 25).

keyAchievements.title: Daga Darajar Mazurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya sanya Mazurka a kan taswirar kide-kiden Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Sabon Matsayi na Tsarin Polonaise
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sabon matsayi na tsarin kide-kide na Polonaise.

keyAchievements.title: Zurfafa Tsarin Nocturne
keyAchievements.description: Ya daga Nocturne zuwa wani mataki na zurfin fasaha.

keyAchievements.title: Bullo da Tunanin Kasa a Kida
keyAchievements.description: An yaba masa saboda bullo da wani sabon tunani na kasa a cikin kida.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda Ya Kirkiro Makarantar Piano da Rubuta Waka
keyAchievements.description: An kira shi wanda ya kirkiro makarantar piano da makarantar rubuta waka.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Chopin?
faq.answer: An haifi Frédéric François Chopin a ranar 1 ga Maris, 1810.

faq.question: Menene cikakken sunan Chopin na asali?
faq.answer: Cikakken sunansa na asali shine Fryderyk Franciszek Chopin.

faq.question: Wane irin kayan kida Chopin ya fi tsara kade-kadensa dominsu?
faq.answer: Chopin ya fi tsara kide-kiden piano na musamman, kuma kowane daga cikin ayyukansa yana nuna piano.

faq.question: Sau nawa Chopin ya yi kade-kade a gaban jama'a a rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: Yayi kade-kade a gaban jama'a wanda bai wuce sau 30 ba a duk rayuwarsa, kuma ya gwammace kusa-kusan yanayin wuraren shakatawa na sirri.

faq.question: Ta yaya Chopin ya dauki nauyin kansa a Paris?
faq.answer: Ya dauki nauyin kansa ta hanyar sayar da wakoki da bayar da darussan koyon piano, inda darussan Chopin suka kasance masu farin jini a wancan lokacin.

faq.question: Wace dangantaka George Sand take da ita da Chopin?
faq.answer: George Sand marubuciyar Faransa ce kuma masoyiyar Chopin, kuma sun zama masoya a watan Yuli na 1838.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar Chopin da Franz Liszt take?
faq.answer: Su biyun abokai ne kuma sun mutunta juna, amma abokantakar tasu bata tabbata ba kuma tana dauke da siffofin kauna da kiyayya.

faq.question: Menene sanadin rasuwar Chopin?
faq.answer: Takardar mutuwarsa ta nuna tarin fuka a matsayin dalilin mutuwar, kuma bincike na baya-bayan nan ya nuna cewa da yiwuwar ciwon pericarditis ne da ba kasafai ake samunsa ba sanadiyyar sarkakiyar tarin fuka mai dorewa.

faq.question: A ina aka ajiye zuciyar Chopin?
faq.answer: Wani likita ne ya cire zuciyarsa sannan aka adana a cikin gilashi a cikin barasa, sannan babbar yayarsa Ludwika ta mayar dashi Poland a shekarar 1850.

faq.question: Shin Chopin ya ba wa ayyukansa lakabi na kwatance?
faq.answer: Ban da Wakarsa ta Jana'iza, mawakin bai taba sawa wakokinsa suna ba banda nuna tsarin wakar da kuma lamba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gidan masu aikin hannu a gundumar Katsushika na Edo (sunan yinta: Tokitaro).
Ya fara zane-zane tun yana kimanin shekaru 6.
Yayi aiki a shagon sayar da littattafai mai bayar da aron littattafai tun yana da shekaru 12.
Yayi aiki a matsayin mai koyan aikin sassakan itace yana da shekaru 14.
Ya shiga dakin zane-zane na Katsukawa Shunsho yana da shekaru 18.
Ya sami sunan Shunro daga malaminsa kuma ya wallafa zane na farko a kan itace mai nuna gungun 'yan wasan Kabuki.
Ya tsara "Wasan Wuta na Murna a Yammacin Gadon Ryogoku na Edo".
Malaminsa Katsukawa Shunsho ya rasu.
Aurensa na biyu.
Ya mika sunan Tawaraya Sori ga wani dalibinsa sannan ya fara aiki a matsayin mai zane mai cin gashin kansa, yana amfani da sunan 'Hokusai Tomisa'.
Ya fara amfani da sunan 'Katsushika Hokusai', ya wallafa littattafan zane na "Shahararrun Wuraren Babban Birnin Gabas" da "Ra'ayoyi Takwas na Edo", sannan ya fara daukar dalibai.
Ya zana wani katan hoton Daruma, fada na Buddah, wanda ya kai kusan murabba'in mita 200 yayin bikin Edo.
Yayi aiki tare da shahararren marubuci Kyokutei Bakin don samar da litattafai masu zane-zane da yawa.
Ya tsara zane-zane na littafin fantasy "Labarai Masu Ban Al'ajabi Na Jinin Wata".
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Taito yana da shekaru 51 sannan ya fara zana "Hokusai Manga" da kuma littattafan hotuna daban-daban don koyo.
Ya kirkiri "Gabatarwa Mai Sauri a Fannin Zane".
An wallafa kundi na farko na "Hokusai Manga" wanda ya sami gagarumar nasara.
Ya zana wani babban hoton Daruma a wajen masallacin Hongan-ji Nagoya Betsuin da ke Nagoya.
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Iitsu sannan ya fara samun kyakkyawan suna a matsayin mai zane a fadin Japan.
Ya kirkiri babban aikinsa na "Ra'ayoyi 36 na Dutsen Fuji".
Ya kirkiri "Hotuna na Gaskiya na Wakoki".
Ya fara aiki karkashin sunan 'Gakyo Rōjin Manji', sannan ya kirkiri "Ra'ayoyi 100 na Dutsen Fuji".
Ya kirkiri tsarinsa na karshe na rubutu a itace mai suna "Wakoki 100 Daga Marubuta 100 Daban Daban An Kwatanta".
Gobara ta lalata dakin zanen sa da galibin ayyukansa.
Ya ziyarci Obuse a jihar Shinano yana da shekaru 83 kuma ya shafe wasu shekaru a wurin.
Kowane safiya, ya zana zaki na kasar Sin (shishi) a matsayin laya don kare kansa daga bala'i.
Ya zana "Dodanniya Tana Hawan Hayaki daga Dutsen Fuji" da "Damisa a Cikin Dusar Kankara".
Ya rasu kuma an binne shi a makabartar Seikyo-ji da ke yankin Taito a Tokyo.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar "Ra'ayoyi 36 na Dutsen Fuji"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri tsarin zane-zane na Ukiyo-e, ciki har da gwanintar fasaha na "Babbar Teguwa daga Gabar Kanagawa", inda ya sami karbuwa sosai a ciki da wajen kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Taken Ukiyo-e
keyAchievements.description: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen fadada jigon Ukiyo-e, wanda asali ya fi karkata ga oiran da 'yan wasan kwaikwayo, zuwa zane-zanen wurare, tsirrai, da dabbobi.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka Masu Yawa
keyAchievements.description: Yayi aiki ba tare da tsayawa ba tun daga kuruciyarsa har mutuwarsa, inda ya kirkiri zane-zane sama da 30,000, sassakan itace, da hotunan littattafai.

keyAchievements.title: Sabbin Hanyoyin Zane da Fasahar Kwatance
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukarsa a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan mashahuran fasaha a tarihin fasaha saboda sabbin hanyoyinsa da gwanintar fasahar zane.

keyAchievements.title: Wallafa "Hokusai Manga"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri "Hokusai Manga", mai dauke da dubban zane-zane, wanda nan take yayi nasara sosai kuma akayi amfani da shi azaman littafin koyon zane.

keyAchievements.title: Gwajin Zane na Kasashen Yamma (Perspective)
keyAchievements.description: Yana daya daga cikin masu fasahar Japan na farko da suka gwada tsarin zane na yamma don nuna zurfi da girmar abubuwa a cikin ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri Akan Fasahar Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi babban tasiri ga masu zanen Impressionist kamar Vincent van Gogh da Claude Monet yayin yaduwar Japonism a fadin Turai a karshen karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar "Ra'ayoyi 100 na Dutsen Fuji"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri wani muhimmin aiki mai suna "Ra'ayoyi 100 na Dutsen Fuji", wanda ake daukarsa a matsayin 'koli a littattafan zanensa'.

faq.question: Wanene Katsushika Hokusai?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai zane na Ukiyo-e kuma mai zanen itace na Japan a lokacin Edo wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen fadada jigon Ukiyo-e zuwa zane-zanen wurare, tsirrai, da dabbobi.

faq.question: Menene fitaccen aikin Hokusai?
faq.answer: Aikinsa na "Babbar Teguwa daga Gabar Kanagawa", wanda ke cikin tsarinsa na "Ra'ayoyi 36 na Dutsen Fuji", shi ne mafi shahara a ayyukansa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Hokusai yayi ga fasahar kasashen yamma?
faq.answer: Ya yi babban tasiri ga masu zanen Impressionist kamar Vincent van Gogh da Claude Monet yayin yaduwar Japonism a fadin Turai a karshen karni na 19.

faq.question: Sunaye nawa Hokusai yayi amfani da su a rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: An san ya yi amfani da akalla sunaye 30 a rayuwarsa, wanda hakan ke da nasaba da sauyin salonsa da ayyukan fasaharsa.

faq.question: Yaushe Hokusai ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Mayu, 1849, sannan ya ci gaba da nuna aniyar sa ta yin zane-zane mafi kyau har zuwa lokacin mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Torquay, yankin Devon, Birtaniya.
Ta tafi Paris don koyon waka da piano tana da shekaru 16.
Tayi aurenta na farko da Archibald Christie, Kanar na Royal Flying Corps na Birtaniya.
Tayi aiki a dakin maganin asibiti yayin Yakin Duniya na Farko.
An haifi diyarta daya tilo Rosalind Hicks.
An neme ta aka rasa na kwanaki 10 a ranar 8 ga Disamba, lamarin da ya dauki hankalin manema labarai.
Ta sake yin aure da Max Mallowan, masanin kimiyyar tsoffin abubuwa na kasa.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE).
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Dame Commander of the Order of the British Empire (DBE).
Ta rasu tana da shekaru 85.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a Matsayin Marubuciyar Labaran Bincike
keyAchievements.description: An kira ta 'Sarauniyar Labaran Bincike' bayan rubuta labarai na bincike kusan 80, sannan ta kirkiri shahararrun masu bincike Hercule Poirot da Miss Marple wadanda suka samu farin jini sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Tarihin Sayarwa a Duniya
keyAchievements.description: An sayar da littattafanta sama da biliyan daya a turanci, da kuma wasu biliyan daya da aka fassara su zuwa harsuna 103, inda hakan ya sa ta shiga tarihin Guinness World Records.

keyAchievements.title: Marubuciyar da Aka Fi Fassara Ayyukanta
keyAchievements.description: An kiyaye ta a matsayin marubuciyar da aka fi fassara ayyukanta a duniya bisa ga 'Index Translationum'.

keyAchievements.title: Wasan Kwaikwayo Mai Dogon Lokaci
keyAchievements.description: An gudanar da wasan kwaikwayonta "The Mousetrap" daga farkon nuninsa a London a shekarar 1955 har zuwa Nuwamba 2012.

faq.question: Menene asalin sunan Agatha Christie?
faq.answer: Asalin sunanta shine Dame Agatha Christie, Lady Mallowan, DBE.

faq.question: Wane sunan karya Agatha Christie tayi amfani dashi?
faq.answer: Ta yi amfani da sunan karya na Mary Westmacott lokacin da take rubuta labaran soyayya.

faq.question: Wadanne shahararrun masu bincike Agatha Christie ta kirkira?
faq.answer: Ta kirkiri shahararren mai bincike na kasar Belgium Hercule Poirot da kuma Miss Marple.

faq.question: Guda nawa aka sayar daga ayyukan Agatha Christie?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta sun sayar da sama da biliyan daya a turanci da kuma wasu biliyan daya da aka fassara su zuwa harsuna 103, inda ta shiga tarihin Guinness World Records.

faq.question: Wane wasan kwaikwayo ne yafi shahara a ayyukan Agatha Christie, kuma har yaushe aka nuna shi?
faq.answer: An nuna wasan kwaikwayonta "The Mousetrap" daga shekarar 1955 a London har zuwa Nuwamba 2012.

timeline.event: An haifi Samuel Langhorne Clemens (Mark Twain).
Ya shiga fagen adabi da "Kwadon dake Tsalle".
Samuel Langhorne Clemens (Mark Twain) ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Shahararren marubucin Amurka wanda aka fi sani da sunan sa na adabi Mark Twain.

keyAchievements.title: "Kasada ta Tom Sawyer"
keyAchievements.description: Labari ne da ke nuna kasadar wani yaro Tom Sawyer da Huckleberry Finn tare da Kogin Mississippi.

keyAchievements.title: "Kwadon dake Tsalle"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shine aikin da ya ba shi damar shiga fagen adabi a shekarar 1865.

keyAchievements.title: "Tafiya ta marasa laifi"
keyAchievements.description: Wani aiki ne wanda ya samu farin jini sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Aiki 3 na Mississippi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kunshi "Kasada ta Tom Sawyer", "Rayuwa a kan Mississippi", da "Kasada ta Huckleberry Finn", inda ya bayyana 'yanci da ruhin Amurkawa.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar Zamantakewa
keyAchievements.description: Ayyuka ne da suke magana akan Turai a zamanin feudal, ciki har da "Sarki Arthur da Yankee a Kotu", "Yarima da Matalauci", da "Bakon Mamaki".

keyAchievements.title: Sukar Kiristoci Masu Tsananin Addini
keyAchievements.description: A karshen rayuwarsa, ya wallafa "Wasiku daga Duniya" inda ya soki addinin Kiristanci na Amurka a wancan lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Sukar Tsarin Bauta
keyAchievements.description: A karshen rayuwarsa, ya yi aiki tukuru don fallasawa da gyara dabi'ar 'yanci mai dauke da bauta.

faq.question: Menene asalin sunan Mark Twain?
faq.answer: Asalin sunan Mark Twain shine Samuel Langhorne Clemens.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Mark Twain?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "Kasada ta Tom Sawyer", wani labari game da yaro Tom Sawyer da Huckleberry Finn akan Kogin Mississippi.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan adabi na Mark Twain ya fito?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da ma'aunin zurfin ruwa wanda ya dace dashi lokacin da yake matsayin matukin jirgin ruwa na Kogin Mississippi a matsayin sunansa na adabi.

faq.question: Wane irin addini Mark Twain ya yi imani dashi?
faq.answer: Mark Twain dan ci gaba ne na Presbyterian, amma ya soki Kiristoci masu tsattsauran ra'ayi na Amurka a wancan lokacin.

mark-twain.missingDataNote: Ba a nuna ainihin shekarun wasu al'amura kamar lokacin da iyalinsa suka koma Hannibal, rasuwar mahaifinsa da fara koyon aiki, ko lokacin neman zinare a cikin ainihin takardar ba don haka an cire su daga jadawalin lokaci. Bugu da kari, ba a hada kwanan watan wallafa na fitattun ayyuka ba saboda karancin bayanai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Frankfurt am Main, Jamus.
Ya fara shakkun imani bayan girgizar kasa a Lisbon.
Ya sake jin shakkun imani sakamakon Yakin Shekaru Bakwai.
Soyayyarsa da Gretchen ta ruguje.
Yayi soyayya da Anna Katharina Schönkopf yayin da yake karatu a Jami'ar Leipzig.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko, "Caprice na Masoya".
Ya koma gida inda yake murmurewa sannan ya bunkasa jin tsoron Allah ta hanyar cudanya da Susanne von Klettenberg.
Ya sami digirin digirgir a fannin shari'a a Jami'ar Strasbourg, inda ya hadu da Herder kuma ya bude idanunsa game da asalin adabi, lamarin da ya kawo motsin 'Storm and Stress'.
Ya fara aikin lauya.
Ya wuce Babbar Kotun Wetzlar don yin aikin koya, inda ya hadu da Charlotte Buff.
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Götz von Berlichingen".
Ya wallafa littafin "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther".
Ya yi alkawarin aure da Lili Schönemann amma daga baya suka fasa.
Ya isa Weimar bisa gayyatar Duke Karl August na Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach.
Ya jagoranci harkokin gwamnati kusan shekaru 10 a farkon zamansa a Weimar, inda ya gina nasarori a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga sarki kuma shugaban majalisar ministoci.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na bakin ciki "Iphigenia in Tauris" (salo na zance).
Ya rubuta "Torquato Tasso".
Ya ce, "Ni ba makiyin Kirista ko Kirista na baki (un-christian) ba ne, sai dai ni ba Kirista bane (non-christian)."
Ya kafa ra'ayinsa na adabin gargajiya yayin tafiyarsa a Italiya, kuma ya rubuta "Iphigenia in Tauris" (salo na waka).
Yayi tafiya zuwa Italiya wanda ya dauki tsawon shekara daya da rabi.
Ya wallafa "Egmont".
Ya koma Jamus.
Ya fara zama tare da Christiane von Vulpius.
Ya haifi dansa na fari, August.
An fara wallafa "Torquato Tasso".
Ya bi Duke August a lokacin Yakin Coalition na Farko da Faransa, inda yayi fada a Yakin Valmy.
Ya yi fada a Siege na Mainz.
Yayin dawowarsa daga taron kimiyyar halitta a Jena, ya hadu da Schiller kuma suka zama abokai.
Ya rubuta littafin ilimi "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship".
Ya rubuta wakar labari "Hermann da Dorothea".
Rasuwar Schiller ta girgiza shi sosai.
Ya kammala kashi na farko na "Faust".
Ya kammala "Theory of Colours".
Ya rubuta "Italian Journey".
Ya rubuta "West-Eastern Diwan".
Ya kammala "Wilhelm Meister's Journeyman Years".
Ya rubuta "Marienbad Elegy".
Ya rubuta "Second Roman Stay".
Ya kammala kashi na biyu na "Faust".
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Ayyukan Adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala adabin gargajiya na Jamus ta hanyar kirkirar ayyukan adabi da yawa ciki har da "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Cibiyar Al'ada ta Weimar
keyAchievements.description: Ya koma Weimar a shekarar 1775 kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen mayar da birnin cibiyar al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a Matsayin Ma'aikacin Gwamnati da Masanin Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Yayi aiki a matsayin shugaban kasa a Masarautar Weimar inda ya shiga harkokin gwamnati, kuma ya bar abubuwa masu yawa sannan yayi nuna sha'awa a fannoni daban daban na kimiyyar halitta kamar ilimin tsirrai, tsarin jiki, ma'adinai, ilimin kasa, da ka'idar launi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Adabin Gargajiya na Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa adabin gargajiya yayin tafiyarsa zuwa Italiya sannan ya hadu da Schiller, kuma tare suka bunkasa tsarin gargajiya na Weimar a Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Daraktan Gidan Wasan Kwaikwayo na Sarauta
keyAchievements.description: A matsayin darakta na gidan wasan kwaikwayo na sarauta, yayi aiki a bangaren gudanarwa, jagoranci, horar da 'yan wasa, da sauransu, inda ya daga wasan kwaikwayon zuwa matsayi na duniya.

faq.question: Wanene Goethe?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci mai tsarin gargajiya, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kimiyya na Jamus wanda yayi aiki a matsayin shugaban kasa a Masarautar Weimar.

faq.question: Menene fitattun ayyukan Goethe?
faq.answer: Fitattun ayyukansa sun hada da "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

faq.question: Wane matsayi Goethe ya dauka game da addini?
faq.answer: An haife shi a gidan mabiya addinin Lutheran, amma ya fara shakkun addini bayan girgizar kasa ta Lisbon da Yakin Shekaru Bakwai, sannan ya kira kansa 'wanda ba Kirista ba' (non-christian).

faq.question: Wace rawa Goethe yayi a Weimar?
faq.answer: Ya koma Weimar a shekarar 1775 inda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen mayar da birnin cibiyar al'ada kuma yayi aiki a matsayin dan gwamnati da ke tsara al'amuran kasa.

timeline.event: An haifi Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley.
Ta rasa mahaifiyarta kwanaki 11 bayan an haife ta.
Ta fara soyayya da Percy Bysshe Shelley, daya daga cikin mabiya siyasar mahaifinta.
Ta samar da ra'ayin rubuta littafin "Frankenstein" yayin da take shafe lokacin rani kusa da Geneva a Switzerland, tare da Lord Byron da John William Polidori.
Ta auri Percy Bysshe Shelley bayan kashe kanta da matar Percy, Harriet tayi.
Ma'auratan Shelley sun bar Birtaniya sannan suka koma Italiya.
An wallafa littafin "Frankenstein; ko Modern Prometheus".
Mijinta Percy Bysshe Shelley ya nutse kuma ya mutu yayin da wata guguwa ta nutsar da kwale-kwalen shi kusa da Viareggio.
Ta koma Birtaniya.
An wallafa littafin tarihi "Valperga".
An wallafa littafin bayanin karshen zamani "Dan Adam na Karshe".
Ta rubuta mukalolin tarihin rayuwa don kundin tsarin sani na Dionysius Lardner mai suna "Cabinet Cyclopaedia".
An wallafa littafin tarihi "The Fortunes of Perkin Warbeck".
An wallafa littafin "Lodore".
An wallafa littafin "Falkner".
An wallafa littafin tafiya "Rambles in Germany and Italy".
Ta rasu sakamakon wata cuta da ake tunanin kansa ne na kwakwalwa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Frankenstein"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littafin adabin Gothic "Frankenstein; ko Modern Prometheus" (1818), wanda ake dauka a matsayin daya daga cikin misalan farko na labaran kimiyyar zahiri (science fiction).

keyAchievements.title: Gyara da Gabatar da Ayyukan Mijinta
keyAchievements.description: Ta gyara sannan ta gabatar da ayyukan mijinta, mawakin Romanticism kuma masanin falsafa Percy Bysshe Shelley.

faq.question: Wane aiki ne yasa aka fi sanin Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Har zuwa shekarun 1970, an fi saninta da littafin "Frankenstein" da kuma kokarinta na wallafa ayyukan mijinta.

faq.question: Su waye iyayen Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Mahaifinta masanin falsafar siyasa ne William Godwin, kuma mahaifiyarta masaniyar falsafa ce kuma mai fafutukar kare hakkin mata Mary Wollstonecraft.

faq.question: Menene babban jigon ayyukan Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta sukan ce hadin kai da tausayi, musamman abin da mata ke aikatawa a cikin iyali, sune hanya don kawo gyara a tsarin al'umma.

mary-shelley.missingDataNote: Ba a hada da shekarar da mahaifin Mary Shelley ya auri Mary Jane Clairmont ba saboda ba a nuna hakan a ainihin takardar ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ayrshire, Scotland a ranar 6 ga Agusta.
Ya cancanta a matsayin likita daga Kwalejin Likitanci ta Asibitin St. Mary, London.
Ya gano sinadarin lysozyme, wanda shine babbar nasarar farko a binciken maganin kwayoyin cuta.
Ba zato ba tsammani ya gano sinadarin maganin penicillin a cikin gungun naman kwayoyin cuta.
Ya karbi Kyautar Nobel a fannin Likitanci tare da Florey da Chain.
An haife shi a Tsibirin Nevis dake Tekun Caribbean.
Ya bi George Washington a matsayin amintaccen mataimaki a lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yancin Amurka.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Amurka kuma ya rubuta Takaddun Federalist.
Shugaba Washington ya nada shi a matsayin Sakataren Baitulmalin Amurka na farko.
Ya rasu sakamakon mugun rauni da ya samu a fadan da yayi da abokin hamayyarsa na siyasa, Aaron Burr.
An haife shi a Boston, Massachusetts a ranar 17 ga Janairu.
Ya wallafa fitowar farko na "Poor Richard's Almanack" wanda ya sami nasara sosai.
Yayi shahararren gwajin tashi da abin tashi (kite) domin tabbatar da cewa walkiya wutar lantarki ce.
Ya bayar da gudummawa wajen tsara Sanarwar 'Yancin Amurka a matsayin memba na Kwamitin Mutane Biyar.
Ya sanya hannu sannan ya tattauna kan Yarjejeniyar Paris wadda ta kawo karshen Yakin Neman 'Yancin Amurka a hukumance.
An haife shi a gidan York kusa da Strand, London.
Ya shiga Kwalejin Trinity, Jami'ar Cambridge.
Ya fara aikin shari'a ta hanyar shiga Kungiyar Gray's Inn.
Ya koma gida bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
An zabe shi a matsayin dan majalisa daga mazabar Bossiney, Cornwall.
Ya zama matashin lauya (Barrister).
Ya zama Babban Lauya (Bencher).
An zabe shi a matsayin mai karatu a shari'a (Reader).
Ya zama magatakarda a Kotun Star Chamber.
Yayi aiki a matsayin mashawarcin sirri ga Robert Devereux, Earl na Essex.
Ya rubuta 'Certain Observations Made Upon a Libel' don mayar da martani ga Jesuit Robert Parsons.
An zabe shi a matsayin dan majalisa na mazabar Middlesex.
An kira shi a matsayin Mashawarcin Sarauniya Elizabeth I a kan shari'a kuma ya zama lauyan masarauta.
An kama shi saboda gaza biyan bashi.
Ya shiga cikin shari'ar cin amanar kasa na Earl na Essex.
Ya sami matsayin jarumi (Knight) a matsayin karamin sarki.
Ya auri Alice Barnham, diyar Viscountess na St. Albans.
Ya wallafa 'The Advancement of Learning'.
Ya zama Mataimakin Babban Lauyan Gwamnati (Solicitor General).
Ya fara aikin magatakarda a Kotun Star Chamber a hukumance.
Ya zama Babban Lauyan Gwamnati (Attorney General).
Ya gabatar da tuhuma akan Robert Carr, Earl na Somerset da matarsa Frances Howard bisa laifin kisa kuma ya yi nasarar tabbatar da hukuncin.
Ya zama Wakilin Sarki (Regent) na tsawon wata guda.
An nada shi matsayin Babban Jojin Kasa (Lord Chancellor) kuma ya zama Baron Verulam.
Ya wallafa 'Novum Organum'.
An kara masa matsayi zuwa Viscount St. Albans.
Majalisa ta tsige shi bisa zargin cin hanci kuma aka kwace masa dukkan mukamai da lakabobi.
Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon huhu.

keyAchievements.title: Uban falsafar gwaji ta zamani kuma mai kafa tubalin juyin juya halin kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nazarin falsafar halitta kuma ya jagoranci ci gaban hanyoyin kimiyya, wanda daga baya ya kafa tubalin juyin juya halin kimiyya. Ana yi masa kallon daya daga cikin masu assasa falsafar zamani tare da Descartes.

keyAchievements.title: Mawallafin falsafar gwaji da littafin 'Novum Organum'
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da falsafar gwaji cewa za a iya gano dabi'ar halitta ta hanyar tunani na inductive, ya soki hanyar Aristotle kuma ya rubuta 'Novum Organum'.

keyAchievements.title: Buga 'The Advancement of Learning'
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 'The Advancement of Learning', ya tsara rabe-raben tsarin ilimi kuma ya jaddada muhimmancin lura ta hanyar tsarin tunani ga neman gaskiya a nan gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Shahararren kalaman 'Ilimi Iko Ne'
keyAchievements.description: An fi saninsa da kalaman 'Ilimi Iko Ne' (scientia est potentia).

keyAchievements.title: Ba da shawarar rabe-raben ɗakin karatu
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki nauyin dakunan karatu tare da ba da shawarar tsarin rabe-rabe wanda ya raba littattafai gida uku: tarihi, waka, da falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Jigon Dokar Hadin Kan Masarautar
keyAchievements.description: An dauke shi a matsayin jigon Dokar Hadin Kan Masarautar da ta zama tubalin kafuwar Masarautar Birtaniya, ta hanyar bayar da shawarar mamaye Scotland.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne ake daukar Francis Bacon?
faq.answer: Ana kallonsa a matsayin uban falsafar gwaji ta zamani kuma tare da Descartes, a matsayin mai kafa falsafar zamani. Ya jagoranci ci gaban hanyoyin kimiyya da kafa tubalin juyin juya halin kimiyya.

faq.question: Menene babban da'awar falsafar Francis Bacon?
faq.answer: Ya tabbatar da falsafar gwaji cewa za a iya gano dabi'ar halitta ta hanyar tunani na inductive, sannan ya ba da shawarar cire son zuciya da dogaro da lura da gwaje-gwaje don kaiwa ga gaskiya.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan littattafai ne Francis Bacon ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sun hada da 'Novum Organum', wanda ya kafa tsarin gwaji, da 'The Advancement of Learning', wanda ya rarraba tsarin ilimi kuma ya jaddada muhimmancin lura.

faq.question: Wadanne shahararrun kalamai ne Francis Bacon ya bari?
faq.answer: An fi saninsa da kalaman nan, 'Ilimi Iko Ne' (scientia est potentia).

faq.question: Wane irin ofisoshin gwamnati Francis Bacon ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Babban Lauya da Babban Joji a kasar Ingila lokacin mulkin Sarki James I, kuma Babban Joji a lokacin yakan rike mukamin Firayim Minista.

francis-bacon.missingDataNote: A rubutun asali, an ambaci lokacin da ya auri Alice Barnham sau biyu a matsayin 1604 da 1606. An zabi 1604 tare da cikakken bayanin 'Ya auri Alice Barnham, diyar Viscountess na St. Albans, wanda ya sanya shi zama dan sarauta na gaskiya'.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 27 ga watan Disamba a Weil der Stadt, Daular Roma Mai Tsarki.
Ya wallafa 'Mysterium Cosmographicum', littafin ilimin taurari na farko da ke kare tsarin Copernicus.
Ya koma Prague don aiki a matsayin mataimaki ga shahararren masanin taurari Tycho Brahe.
Ya wallafa 'Astronomia Nova', inda ya gabatar da dokoki biyu na farko na motsin taurari.
Ya wallafa 'Harmonices Mundi', wanda ke kunshe da doka ta uku ta motsin taurari.
An haife shi a 83 Beals Street, Brookline, Massachusetts, Amurka a ranar 29 ga Mayu.
Ya karanci alakar kasa da kasa (international relations) a Jami'ar Harvard kuma ya kammala karatu da sakamako mai kyau (cum laude).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin memba na Majalisar Wakilai ta Amurka (House of Representatives).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin memba na Majalisar Dattijai ta Amurka (Senate).
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban kasa mafi karancin shekaru a tarihin Amurka bayan ya doke Richard Nixon, dan takarar jam'iyyar Republican, a zaben shugaban kasa.
Ya fara gudanar da aikin shugaban kasa tun ranar 20 ga Janairu.
Ya kaddamar da Peace Corps na Amurka ta hanyar umarnin shugaban kasa (executive order) a watan Maris.
Harin Bay of Pigs na 'yan gudun hijira na Cuba a ranar 17 ga Afrilu ya kare da rashin nasara.
Ya kafa U.S. Military Assistance Command, Vietnam (MACV) karkashin jagorancin Paul Harkins a babban birnin Saigon a watan Fabrairu.
Majalisa ta amince da kudurin fadada kasuwanci (Trade Expansion Act) na Kennedy a watan Satumba.
Rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba (Cuban Missile Crisis) ya barke bayan da Amurka ta gano cewa Tarayyar Soviet tana kafa makaman linzami a Cuba a watan Oktoba.
Ya ziyarci Berlin ta Yamma a ranar 26 ga Yuni kuma ya yi jawabi yana sukar tsarin gurguzu (communism).
Lee Harvey Oswald ya kashe shi a Dallas a ranar 22 ga Nuwamba.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniyar hana gwajin makaman nukiliya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shawo kan rikicin Berlin a Turai da rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba a Caribbean, kuma ya cimma yarjejeniyar hana gwajin makaman nukiliya (Partial Test Ban Treaty).

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayin New Frontier
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna sabon ruhin jagoranci 'New Frontier' a cikin jawabin karbar takarar shugaban kasa na jam'iyyar Democratic ta Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Peace Corps
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Peace Corps ta hanyar umarnin shugaban kasa a watan Maris na shekara ta 1961 don tura dubban 'yan Amurka zuwa kasashe masu tasowa don inganta yanayin rayuwarsu.

keyAchievements.title: Magance rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba
keyAchievements.description: Ya magance rikicin ta hanyar ba wa rundunar sojan ruwa umarnin killace (blockade) Cuba sakamakon kafa makaman linzami na Tarayyar Soviet a can.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa manufar shiga Yakin Vietnam
keyAchievements.description: Ya kara yawan masu ba da shawarar soja na Amurka a Kudancin Vietnam don kare gwamnatin Ngo Dinh Diem kuma ya kafa MACV.

keyAchievements.title: Kokarin aiwatar da ikon buga kudi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin sauya tsohon banki zuwa sabon bankin kasa mai ikon tsara da buga kudi a karkashin tsarin mulki don tabbatar da harsashin kudin shiga na kasa.

faq.question: Shugaban kasa na nawa Kennedy ya kasance a Amurka?
faq.answer: John F. Kennedy ya kasance shugaban kasa na 35 na Amurka.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kashe John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: An kashe John F. Kennedy a Dallas a ranar 22 ga Nuwamba, 1963 ta hannun Lee Harvey Oswald.

faq.question: Menene daya dari cikin manyan manufofin John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: Daya dari cikin manyan manufofinsa ita ce nuna sabon ruhin jagoranci 'New Frontier'.

faq.question: Wane addini John F. Kennedy yake bi?
faq.answer: John F. Kennedy ya kasance Kiristan Roman Catholic guda daya tilo a cikin shugabannin kasar Amurka na lokacin.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan rikice-rikice na kasa da kasa suka faru lokacin mulkin John F. Kennedy?
faq.answer: Lokacin mulkinsa, abubuwa da dama sun faru kamar harin Bay of Pigs, rikicin makaman linzami na Cuba, da ginin katangar Berlin (Berlin Wall).

faq.question: Shin John F. Kennedy ne kadai shugaban kasa da ya karya al'adar Ohio (Ohio jinx)?
faq.answer: E, shi ne kadai shugaban kasa da ya karya 'Ohio jinx' ta hanyar samun nasara a zaben shugaban kasa duk da cewa bai samu kuri'un masu zabe na jihar Ohio ba.

timeline.event: An haife ta a ranar 24 ga Mayu a Fadar Kensington, London.
Ta hau karagar mulkin Birtaniya tana da shekaru 18 bayan rasuwar William IV.
Ta auri dan uwanta, Yarima Albert na Saxe-Coburg da Gotha.
Ta sami lakabin Sarauniyar Indiya, lamarin da ke nuna kololuwar Daular Birtaniya.
Ta rasu a ranar 22 ga Janairu, wanda ya kawo karshen mulkinta na shekaru 63 kuma ya kawo karshen zamanin Victoria.
An haife shi a ranar 13 ga Afrilu a Shadwell, Virginia.
Ya tsara Takardar Bayyanar da 'Yancin Kai na Amurka a matsayin babban marubuci.
An nada shi a matsayin Sakataren Harkokin Wajen Amurka na farko a karkashin Shugaba George Washington.
Ya zama Shugaban Amurka na uku.
Ya jagoranci Sayen Louisiana (Louisiana Purchase), wanda ya kara fadada kasar Amurka sosai.
An haife shi a Gwangseok-dong, Haeju-bu, Lardin Hwanghae a matsayin dan fari ga mahaifinsa Ahn Tae-hun da mahaifiyarsa Jo Maria.
Ya auri Kim Ah-ryeo kuma ya hadu da Kim Gu a karon farko.
Mahaifinsa Ahn Tae-hun ya shiga addinin Kiristanci (Katolika).
Yana da shekaru 19, ya shiga Katolika kuma ya karbi sunan giciye Thomas.
Gudanar da ayyukan mishan na Katolika da inganta kafa jami'ar Katolika.
An samu hatsaniya tsakanin mahaifinsa Ahn Tae-hun da wani likitan kasar Sin mai suna Seo Won-hun.
Ya daki Seo Won-hun tare da Lee Yong-il da wasu mutane kusan 10.
Da samun labarin Yarjejeniyar Eulsa, ya je Shanghai don neman tallafin farfado da ikon kasa, amma aka ki bashi goyon baya ya dawo; mutuwar mahaifinsa Ahn Tae-hun.
Ya koma Jinnampo a Kudancin Pyongan inda ya gudanar da kasuwancin kwal, sannan ya rufe kuma ya kafa Makarantar Samheung don fara fafutukar ilimi.

Ya karbi ragamar Makarantar Don-eui a Nampo kuma yayi aiki a matsayin malami; Ya goyi bayan fafutukar biyan bashin kasa kuma aka nada shi shugaban ofishin reshen Gwanseo; Ya tsallaka zuwa Rasha (Primorsky Krai) ya shiga rundunar masu adalci.
Bayan wargaza rundunar sojojin Daular Koriya, ya yi gudun hijira zuwa Manchuria.

A karkashin Jeon Je-deok, a matsayin Laftanar Janar na Rundunar Koriya ta Kasa kuma kwamandan musamman na dakarun 'yanci, ya ritsa Kogin Tumen tare da Eom In-seop da maza kusan 100, suka shiga cikin gida don kai farmaki kan sojojin Japan.
Tare da wasu mutane 11 masu ra'ayi daya, sun kafa Kungiyar Dong-eui Danji sannan suka yanke wani bangare na dan yatsansu na haggu domin yin rantsuwar jini.
Ya bar Vladivostok ya tafi Harbin.
Ya kashe Ito Hirobumi a Harbin kuma sojojin Rasha suka kama shi.
Kotun Yankin Kanto ta ba shi hukuncin kisa a wani kurkuku a Lushun.
Yayi ganawa da Babban Jojin Kotun daukaka kara inda ya ki amincewa da a duba matakinsa na shugaban sojoji masu adalci a matsayin na mai kisa.
Ya karbi gafarar zunubai daga wurin Fada Joseph Wilhelm.
Gudanar da mass na karshe a karkashin Fada Wilhelm.
An jinkirta kisa sannan ya bar wasiyya ga kanne biyu.
An aiwatar da hukuncin kisa da karfe 10 na safe, yana da shekaru 32.
An karrama shi da Lambar Yabo ta Gina Kasar Koriya (Order of Merit for National Foundation).

keyAchievements.title: Kashe Ito Hirobumi
keyAchievements.description: A ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1909 a Harbin, ya kashe dan siyasar Japan Ito Hirobumi, lamarin da ya ba da gagarumar gudunmawa ga fafutukar 'yancin kai da yakar Japan.

keyAchievements.title: Fafutukar Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Makarantar Samheung kuma ya sayi Makarantar Don-eui a Nampo don yin aiki tukuru don dawo da ikon kasa ta hanyar ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Sojoji Masu Adalci (Righteous Army)
keyAchievements.description: Ya ketare zuwa yankin Rasha (Primorsky Krai) a 1907 don shiga cikin yunkurin sojoji masu adalci, kuma a 1908 yayi fada da sojojin Japan a matsayin Laftanar Janar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Dong-eui Danji
keyAchievements.description: A 1909, ya kafa Kungiyar Dong-eui Danji tare da abokan aiki 11 kuma suka yanke yatsan su domin nuna aniyar samun 'yancin kai da jininsu.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Rubuce-rubuce
keyAchievements.description: A cikin kurkuku, ya bar tarihin tunani ta hanyar rubuta littafin da ba a kammala ba 'Akan Zaman Lafiyar Gabas' (On Peace in the East) da littafin tarihin kansa 'Tarihin Ahn Eung-chil'.

keyAchievements.title: Barin Rubuce-rubucen Hannu
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar rubuce-rubuce (Calligraphy) da dama yayin da yake daure a kurkukun Lushun, kuma an ayyana wasu daga ciki a matsayin dukiyar kasa.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Ahn Jung-geun?
faq.answer: An haifi Ahn Jung-geun a ranar 2 ga Satumba, 1879, a Gwangseok-dong, Haeju-bu, Lardin Hwanghae a matsayin dan fari ga Ahn Tae-hun da Jo Maria.

faq.question: Wa Ahn Jung-geun ya kashe?
faq.answer: Ahn Jung-geun ya kashe dan siyasar Japan Ito Hirobumi a ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1909 a Harbin.

faq.question: Me yasa Ahn Jung-geun ya kashe Ito Hirobumi?
faq.answer: Ahn Jung-geun ya kashe Ito Hirobumi ne saboda ya yanke shawarar cewa ya aikata laifuka 15, ciki har da kashe Sarauniya Myeongseong, kulla Yarjejeniyar Eulsa, da tsige Sarki Gojong.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kashe Ahn Jung-geun?
faq.answer: Ahn Jung-geun an kashe shi a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1910, bayan kashe Ito Hirobumi.

faq.question: Ina gawar Ahn Jung-geun take?
faq.answer: An binne gawar Ahn Jung-geun a makabartar fursunoni kusa da Kurkukun Lushun, amma har yanzu ba a san ainihin wurin ba.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan littattafai ne Ahn Jung-geun ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Ahn Jung-geun ya rubuta 'Akan Zaman Lafiyar Gabas' (On Peace in the East) da kuma littafin tarihin ruyuwarsa 'Tarihin Ahn Eung-chil' a kurkuku.

faq.question: Mene ne sunan giciyen Ahn Jung-geun?
faq.answer: Sunan giciyen Ahn Jung-geun shine Thomas.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Wenshui, kasar Sin a zamanin Daular Tang.
Ta zama Sarauniya bayan sarki Gaozong ya tsige Sarauniya Wang.
Ta zama uwar sarauniya kuma mace mai cikakken iko a kasar Sin bayan mutuwar Sarki Gaozong.
Ta kaddamar da kanta a matsayin Sarki (Emperor) mace ta farko kuma ta kafa Daular Zhou wacce bata jima ba.
An cire ta daga kan mulki ta hanyar juyin mulki kuma ta mutu jim kadan bayan dawowar Daular Tang.
An haife shi a Majae, Chobu-myeon, Gwangju-bu, Gyeonggi-do.
Bayan mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya yi ritaya ya koma karkara, ya sanyawa Jeong Yak-yong sunan yara Gwinong (Komawa Noma).
Ya auri Pungsan Hong, diyar jami'in soja Hong Hwa-bo.
Mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya zama mataimakin ministan kudi, suka koma zama a Seoul inda ya hadu da Lee Ga-hwan da Lee Seung-hun.
Ya halarci taron koyar da koyarwar yamma (Katolika) wanda Kwon Cheol-shin ya jagoranta a Jueosa da Cheonjinam a Yangju, Gyeonggi-do.
Ya ci jarrabawar musamman na murnar nada Yarima mai jiran gado sannan ya zama Saengwon.
Ya saurari bayani game da koyarwar Katolika daga Lee Byeok, wanda yake suruki ne ga yayan shi Jeong Yak-hyeon.
Al'ummar Myeongnyebang da Lee Seung-hun ya jagoranta an gano su sannan aka kai su kotu don fuskantar hukunci, lamarin da ake kira da Rigimar Myeongnyebang.
Sarki Jeongjo ya ayyana Katolika a matsayin wata muguwar koyarwa (heresy) kuma ya sanya dokar hana shi, sannan ya ba da umarnin bincike da kona littattafan Yammacin duniya.
Ya ci jarrabawar gwamnati yana da shekaru 27 ya shiga aikin gwamnati.

Ba da daɗewa ba bayan Lamarin Jinsan, inda Yun Ji-chung yayi jana'izar mahaifiyarsa a hanyar Katolika a Jinsan, Jeolla-do, an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Haemi a Seosan amma aka sake shi bayan kwanaki 11.
Ya tsara na'urar ɗaukar nauyi don amfani da shi wurin aikin ginin bangon Suwon Hwaseong.
Mahaifinsa Jeong Jae-won ya rasu.
Yayi koyarwa a Sungkyunkwan kuma ya yi rangadin Yeoncheon, Saknyeong da sauransu a matsayin mai sa ido na sirri na sarki na Gyeonggi-do.
An rage masa mukami zuwa Geumjeong Chalbang saboda tsanantawar Eulmyo (Zalunci na Eulmyo).

Sakamakon zargin da kwamandan soja Park Jang-seol ya yi, an tura Lee Seung-hun zuwa Yesan, an rage matsayin Lee Ga-hwan zuwa Magajin Garin Chungju, sannan Jeong Yak-yong ya koma Geumjeong Chalbang a Hongju.
Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin Ministan Shari'a (Chameui), an tuhumi dan uwansa Jeong Yak-jeon, sai ya mika wata wasika yana kare kansa sannan yayi murabus.
Yayin da yake gudun hijira a gida, ya sami labarin mutuwar Sarki Jeongjo sannan ya tafi Seoul.
Sarauniya Jeongsun ta ba da umarnin danna Katolika sannan ta fara cire yan kabilan Namin (Southerners).
An kama shi sannan aka kulle shi a kurkuku, daga baya aka rage masa hukunci zuwa gudun hijira aka sake shi.
Ya fara zaman gudun hijira na tsawon shekaru 18 a wurare daban-daban ciki har da Janggi a Gyeongsang-do, da Gangjin a Jeolla-do.
Danshi Jeong Nong-jang ya rasu saboda cutar kyanda.
An saki dokar gudun hijirarsa ya koma matsayin Sakataren Sarki.
Ya koma garinsu.
Lokacin gudun hijirarsa a Gangjin, ya tsara tsarin raba filaye don gyara rashin adalci a tsarin filaye.
Ya rasu a gidansa a Mahyeon-ri.
An bashi lambar yabo sannan ya samu sunan lakabi 'Mundo'.

keyAchievements.title: Babban aikin rubuce-rubuce
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafai sama da 500, wanda ya sa aka san shi a matsayin mutumin da ya rubuta littattafai mafi yawa tun da aka kirkiro haruffan Sinawa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Mongminsimseo'
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da aka rubuta game da jagororin kula da tunani na gwamnonin larduna wadanda ke mulkin mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Heumheumshinseo'
keyAchievements.description: Littafin da ya rubuta yayin da yake magajin garin Goksan-bu, dangane da lamurra na zahiri, inda ya fayyace dokoki da ka'idojin yin hukunci.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Gyeongseyupyo'
keyAchievements.description: Littafin da ke tattauna duk wasu tsare-tsare na cibiyoyi da dokoki da suka shafi gudanar da kasa wanda zai iya zama muhimmin abin koyi.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Magwahoetong'
keyAchievements.description: Bisa littafin Lee Heon-gil mai suna 'Majingibang', ya rubuta 'Magwahoetong', littafin lura da cutar kyanda wanda ya ceci rayukan jama'ar Joseon da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar na'urar Geojunggi
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin ginin Suwon Hwaseong, ya kera babbar na'ura ta amfani da igiya da burdodi don ɗaga manyan duwatsu.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin gwiwar Ilmin Silhak
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada ilimin Silhak wanda ya samo asali daga Yu Hyeong-won da Seongho Lee Ik a waje daya.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin raba fili (Jeongjeonron)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara raba fili kyauta da kuma yin aikin tare - don inganta raba arziki kuma don warware rashin raba filaye dai-dai.

keyAchievements.title: Zabensa a matsayin wani muhimmin mutum na tarihi daga UNESCO
keyAchievements.description: An zabe shi a matsayin wani muhimmin mutum na tarihi daga UNESCO a shekarar 2012 don tunawa da cika shekaru 250 da haihuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jeong Yak-yong kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Jeong Yak-yong a ranar 5 ga Agusta, 1762, kuma ya rasu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1836.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Jeong Yak-yong?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa guda 3 sune 'Mongminsimseo', 'Heumheumshinseo', da 'Gyeongseyupyo'.

faq.question: Menene alakar Jeong Yak-yong da addinin Katolika?
faq.answer: Wani lokaci ya kasance mai sha'awar addinin Katolika, amma ya bar addinin bayan Zaluncin Sinhae (1791), sannan kuma a lokacin Zaluncin Sinyu (1801), yayi matukar kokari wajen gano mabiya addinin Katolika.

faq.question: Menene Jeong Yak-yong ya yi a lokacin yana gudun hijira?
faq.answer: A cikin shekarun 18 na zaman gudun hijirarsa, ya rubuta littattafai masu yawa ciki har da 'Mongminsimseo' da 'Gyeongseyupyo'.

faq.question: Wace irin gudunmawa Jeong Yak-yong ya bayar wajen ginin Suwon Hwaseong?
faq.answer: Lokacin da ake ginin Suwon Hwaseong, ya kirkiro na'urar (Geojunggi) don ɗaga manyan kayayyaki ta hanyar amfani da kago da igiya.

faq.question: Menene burin falsafar Jeong Yak-yong?
faq.answer: Ya yi burin kirkiro tsarin Gyeongsechiyong na Silhak (ilimi mai amfani), ya koma asalin koyarwar Confucius da Mencius don daidaita gurbatattun ra'ayoyi, sannan ya yi burin samun jihar da ke kulawa da masu rauni a fannin tattalin arziki.

faq.question: Shin UNESCO ta zabi Jeong Yak-yong a matsayin muhimmin mutumin tarihi na duniya?
faq.answer: E, an zabi Jeong Yak-yong a matsayin muhimmin mutumin tarihi na duniya ta UNESCO a shekarar 2012 don murnar cika shekaru 250 da haihuwarsa.

timeline.event: Haihuwa (kimanin).
Mutuwa (kimanin).

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Falsafar Confucius
keyAchievements.description: Ya gaji kuma ya ci gaba da falsafar Confucius, yana mai yin tasiri mai girma wajen isar da koyarwar Noma ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin 'Mencius'
keyAchievements.description: Akwai wani littafi mai suna 'Mencius' wanda ya kunshi tunanin Mencius, wanda ake ganin cewa dalibansa ne suka rubuta shi.

keyAchievements.title: Bayar da shawarar Kyakkyawan Halitta
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi jayayya cewa dabi'ar dan Adam tana da kyau (Kyakkyawar dabi'a), kuma zuciyar mutum tana da dabi'u hudu: Jin kai, adalci, da'a da kuma hikima.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafawa a kan Siyasar Nuna Jin Kai (Injeong) da Mulkin Sarauta
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya cika shekaru 40, ya zagaya duniya yana tallata mulkin jin kai da siyasa ta hanyar shugabanci na sarauta.

keyAchievements.title: Da'awar Ilimin Sashe Hudu (Sadanseol)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa a cikin zuciyar dan Adam akwai fuskoki hudu: juyayi, kunya, tawali'u, da ma'anar daidai da kuskure.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Dangantaka Biyar (Oryunseol)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ka'idar Oryunseol, wanda ke takaita dangantakar mutane guda biyu: soyayya tsakanin uba da da, adalci tsakanin sarki da mai yi masa hidima, banbanci tsakanin miji da mata, tsari tsakanin babba da matashi, da kuma amana tsakanin abokai.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Falsafar Juyin Mulki
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da ra'ayin juyin mulki wanda ke cewa sarkin da ya ci amanar jama'arsa sannan yayi watsi da jin kai da adalci bai wuce wani dan iska ba, sannan hukunta irin wannan sarki ba laifi ba ne.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Duban Tarihi (Cyclical)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi kokarin tabbatar da halaccin Confucius bisa tsarin duban tarihi wanda ke ganin cewa wani babban malami na fita a duk bayan shekaru dari biyar.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa mahaifiyar Mencius ta yi kaura sau uku?
faq.answer: Mahaifiyar Mencius ta yi kaura sau uku tatsuniya ce da ta bayyana a cikin 'Biographies of Exemplary Women' da malamin Han Dynasty Liu Xiang ya rubuta, kuma ra'ayin masana yana nuna cewa da wuya ya zama gaskiya.

faq.question: Daga wajen waye Mencius ya koya?
faq.answer: Mencius yayi karatun Rubuce-rubuce guda shida karkashin jagorancin Zisi, wanda jikan Confucius ne.

faq.question: Menene sunan mahaifiyar Mencius?
faq.answer: Sunan mahaifiyar Mencius shine Ji (伋).

faq.question: Waye ya harhada littafin Mencius mai suna 'Mencius'?
faq.answer: Akwai masu cewa ita ce aikin nasa a karshen rayuwarsa, amma dai ya dace a ce an dauka dalibansa ne suka harhada littafin 'Mencius'.

timeline.event: Haihuwa.
Ya zama jami'in da ke yiwa Sarki Wu rakiya akan rangadi a lardunan Jiangnan, Shandong, Henan.
Kafin mutuwar mahaifinsa Sima Tan ya bukace shi da ya kammala littafin tarihi.
Ya gaji mahaifinsa a matsayin Babban Masanin Tarihi (Taishiling).
Ya gyara kalanda sannan ya kirkiro Kalandar Taichu.
Yayin da yake kare Janar Li Ling, ya batawa Sarki Wu rai kuma aka yi masa hukuncin datsa mazakuta.
Mutuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Harhada Shiji (Tarihin Masana)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta jerin litattafan tarihi guda 130 dake raba labarin tarihi bisa rayuwar mutane wanda ya faro daga Emperor na farko har zuwa Sarki Wu.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara Kalandar Taichu
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 104 Kafin Almasihu, ya gyara kalanda ya kammala Kalandar Taichu.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Sima Qian?
faq.answer: Masanin tarihi ne na kasar Sin daga daular Han, marubucin littafin 'Shiji' kuma daya daga cikin manyan masana tarihin Gabas.

faq.question: Me yasa akayiwa Sima Qian hukuncin datsa mazakuta?
faq.answer: A shekarar 99 Kafin Almasihu, bayan da Janar Li Ling ya sha kaye a hannun kabilar Xiongnu, Sima Qian ya kare Li Ling, wanda hakan ya batawa Sarki Wu rai don haka aka masa hukuncin.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Sima Qian?
faq.answer: Babban littafinsa shi ne 'Shiji', da sauran litattafai da ya rubuta kamar 'Letter to Ren An' da 'Bishaobuwufu'.

faq.question: Wane ofishin gwamnati Sima Qian ya rike?
faq.answer: Ya gaji mahaifinsa ya zama Babban Masanin Tarihi (Taishiling), sannan kuma bayan hukuncinsa, an nada shi Sakataren Fadar Sarki.

timeline.event: Mutuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Gadon Falsafar Daoism (Taoism) da Cigabanta
keyAchievements.description: Ya gaji koyarwar Laozi ya kuma ci gaba da bunkasa shi wanda ya sanya shi zama babban mutum na addinin Daoism.

keyAchievements.title: Falsafar Kasancewar Abu Daya (Monism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin cewa komai na duniya abu daya ne.

keyAchievements.title: Da'awar Komawa Ga Halitta da Banza
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da tunanin Laozi, yana jayayya akan neman komawa ga halitta kuma a koma banza (komai ba komai bane).

keyAchievements.title: Neman Kwanciyar Hankali na Mutum guda
keyAchievements.description: Sabanin Laozi, ya maida hankali sosai wajen neman kwanciyar hankali na daban.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Falsafar Cikakkiyar Rayuwa
keyAchievements.description: Yayi kallon rayuwar 'yanci da kuma samun walwala a matsayin rayuwar dake da manufa wanda hakan ke cire damuwar gangar jiki da kwakwalwa kuma ana samun kyakkyawar zuciya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Tsarin Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin ilimin da ke cewa samun fahimta akan wani abu da nuna fifiko ba shi da amfani, kuma cikakkiyar jahilci ne kadai ke da kyau.

faq.question: Mene ne ainihin sunan Zhuangzi?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan Zhuangzi shine Zhou.

faq.question: Wane ra'ayi ne Zhuangzi ya gada kuma ya haɓaka?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi ya gaji kuma ya ɓunkasa ra'ayoyin Laozi.

faq.question: Wane aikin gwamnati Zhuangzi yayi?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi ya zama jami'in gwamnati a Qiyuan (Meng).

faq.question: Shin Zhuangzi ya amince da tayin Sarki Wei na Chu?
faq.answer: Sarki Wei na jihar Chu ya roke shi da yayi aiki dashi a siyasance, amma Zhuangzi ya ƙi.

faq.question: Mene ne kyawawar rayuwa a cewar Zhuangzi?
faq.answer: Zhuangzi yaga rayuwar da take da manufa itace kawar da asalin bakin ciki: da jiki da kuma hankali, kuma akan kawo halin 'Huhjeong' da 'Yeomdam' na tunani. Ta hanyar wannan, mutum zai iya samun yanci da walwala daga bin dokokin dabi'a da ba za a iya kutsawa da komai ba.

faq.question: A ta fuskar falsafa, mene ne banbanci tsakanin Zhuangzi da Laozi?
faq.answer: Duk da yake Laozi yana da ɗan sha'awar siyasance da gaskiyar zamantakewa, Zhuangzi ya damu ne kawai da jin dadi da kwanciyar hankali na mutum guda.

zhuangzi.missingDataNote: Shekarar haihuwar Zhuangzi (kimanin Kafin Almasihu shekara ta 369) ba a tabbatar da ita ba, kuma ainihin shekarun abubuwan da suka faru a rayuwarsa irin su ofishin gwamnatinsa da ƙin tayin Sarki Wei, ba a bayyana su a cikin ainihin rubutun ba. Bugu da kari, rubutun bai samar da jerin ayyukan Zhuangzi ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Yangdu na lardin Langya a karshen Daular Han.
Bayan mashahurin ziyara sau uku (Samgochoryeo), shugaban yaki Liu Bei ya ɗauke shi aiki.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa duka a fannin diflomasiyya da dabarun gudanarwa don samun nasara ga dakarun hadin gwiwa a Yakin Chibi.
An nada shi Fira Minista a sabuwar kasar Shu Han.
Ya rasu saboda jinya a Wuzhangyuan a lokacin balaguro na ƙarshe na yaki a Arewa akan kasar Wei.
Lokacin da ya rayu a matsayin sarki na 3 na daular Maurya na Magadha.
Yiwuwar haihuwa
Yiwuwar hawan mulki
Ci nasara a kan yankin Kalinga
Bayanin ziyarar Sambodhi (itacen Bodhi mai tsarki a Bodh Gaya).
Ya kusanci kungiyar mambobin addinin Buddha (Sangha) kuma ya zagaya masarautarsa.
Ya fara zana umarni (edicts) don yada Dharma.
Ya kafa mukamin Dhamma Mahamatta.
Ya ba da umarnin fadada stupa na Buddha Kanakamuni.
Ya ba da kyautar kogon Khalatika.

keyAchievements.title: Mulkin masarauta
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na sarki na 3 na daular Maurya na Magadha, ya mulki masarautar da ta mamaye mafi girman sashen yankin kasar India.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa da yada addinin Buddha
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na mai taimaka wa addinin Buddha, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yada addinin Buddha a duk fadin tsohuwar Asiya.

keyAchievements.title: Yada Dhamma
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya ci nasara a kan Kalinga, ya sadaukar da kansa ga yada 'Dhamma', wato kyawawan dabi'u.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da tallafawa gine-ginen Katolika (Buddha)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba masa a cikin labaran addinin Buddha don kafa stupas da dama, tallafawa taro na uku (Third Buddhist Council), tallafawa masu yada addini, da kuma ba da manyan kyaututtuka ga Sangha.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a tarihin kasar India
keyAchievements.description: Ya shahara a matsayin daya dari cikin manyan sarakuna na kasar India tun baada aka fassara rubutun Brahmi a karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar kasar India ta zamani
keyAchievements.description: Alamar Jamhuriyar India ta fito ne dari hoton zakuna na Ashoka (Lion Capital of Ashoka), kuma a tsakiyar tutar kasar India akwai Ashoka Chakra, wato taya na Ashoka.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan jin dadin jama'a
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da ayyukan jin dadin jama'a kamar kafa asibitoci don mutane da dabbobi, shuka ganyayyakin magani, gina rijiya, da kuma dasa bishiyoyi a gefen hanyoyi.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta jin dadin dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta jin dadin dabbobi ta hanyar soke hukuncin kisa, hana kashe dabbobi don yanka na addini, da kuma soke farauta na masarauta.

faq.question: Menene sunan Ashoka yake nufi?
faq.answer: 'A-shoka' a zahiri yana nufin 'mara bakin ciki'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan taken Ashoka?
faq.answer: Manyan takensa sune 'Priyadasi' ('mai kallon mutane da kyau') da 'Devanampiya' ('wanda alloli ke so').

faq.question: Shin Ashoka dan addinin Buddha ne?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana karara cewa shi dan addinin Buddha ne ta hanyar kiran kansa Upasaka (dan addinin Buddha na farar hula) da kuma Shaka a cikin karamin umarnin dutse na 1.

faq.question: Shin Ashoka ya tsananta wa sauran addinai?
faq.answer: Umarninsa sun jaddada hakuri da sauran addinai gaba danya, kuma ya sadaukar da koguna ga masu addinin da ba na Buddha ba sannan ya bayyana cewa duka Brahmins da Shramanas sun cancanci girmamawa.

faq.question: Menene 'Dhamma' yake nufi ga Ashoka?
faq.answer: Ga Ashoka, Dhamma yana nufin manufar dabi'u da ta kunshi kulawa da al'umma, hakuri da addinai, sanin yanayi, bin dokokin dabi'u na gama gari, da kuma soke yaki.

faq.question: Shin Ashoka ya kasance mai tsananin fushi kafin ya shiga addinin Buddha?
faq.answer: Labaran gargajiya na Sri Lanka da na Arewacin India sun nuna cewa Ashoka ya kasance mai tsananin fushi kafin ya karbi addinin Buddha.

faq.question: Yaya Yakin Kalinga ya yi tasiri a kan Ashoka?
faq.answer: Mummunan halin da aka fuskanta a lokacin yakin ya janyo masa nadama game da fada da makamai, wando ya sa ya fara sha'awar addinin Buddha a cikin shekaru masu zuwa.

faq.question: Wadanne kokari Ashoka ya yi don jin dadin dabbobi?
faq.answer: Ya inganta jin dadin dabbobi ta hanyar soke hukuncin kisa, hana kashe dabbobi don yanka na addini, soke farauta na masarauta, da kuma kafa asibitocin dabbobi.
