timeline.event: An haife shi da suna Yi San, da ga Yarima Sado a Daular Joseon.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarki na 22 a Daular Joseon.
Ya kafa Gyujanggak wanda ke matsayin dakin karatu na masarauta don inganta al'adu da kawo cigaba a siyasance.
Ya fara ginin gidan sarki a Suwon Hwaseong domin ya motsa mazaunin sarki.
Ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani, inda ya bar tsare-tsarensa na kawo gyara ba a kammala ba.
An haife shi a lokacin daular Tang.

Yayi aikin sufi da koyarwar Daoism kuma ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu yawa akan duwatsu a Sichuan tare da wani masanin Daoism mai suna Dongyanzi, sannan daga bisani ya fice don yin balaguro a yankunan Jiangnan.
Yana da shekaru 43 ya sami umarnin Sarki Xuanzong don ya kasance kusa da Fada, kuma ya zauna a Chang'an.
Gajiya da ayyukan gwamnati, ya fuskanci matsaloli da babban jami'in gwamnati Gao Lishi sannan yayi murabus.
Ya sake komawa Jiangnan.
Ya shiga rundunar Sarki Li Lin, da na sha shida na Xuanzong, amma rundunar tayi tawaye don haka aka yi masa gudun hijira zuwa Yelang (Guizhou na yanzu).
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 61 a gidan kanensa Li Yangbing wanda shi ne Hakimin garin Dangtu a Lardin Anhui.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Mawaƙi na Tarihin Sin
keyAchievements.description: Shahararren mawaƙi a lokacin daular Tang, kuma tare da Du Fu, ana daukarsa ɗaya daga cikin manyan mawaƙan tarihi na kasar Sin.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙin Aljanna (Shixian)
keyAchievements.description: Li Bai ana kiransa da 'Mawakin aljanna', sannan ana masa lakabi da 'Gwanin haziki' don wakokinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙi mai yawan Wake
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar waqoqi sama da guda 1,100 wanda suka kunshi Daoism da maye.

keyAchievements.title: Gwanin Tsofaffin Waƙoƙi da Waƙoƙin Jueju
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙware musamman akan rubuta tsofaffin waqoqi da jueju (gajeren wake) kuma wakokinsa ana masu laqabi da dukiya.

keyAchievements.title: Salo mai kyanci kuma na 'Yanci a rubutun Wake
keyAchievements.description: Waƙoƙinsa na da girma, girmamawa, kuma cike suke da abubuwan yanci.

faq.question: Mene ne laƙabi da sunan da Li Bai ke amfani dasu?
faq.answer: Sunan kirar Li Bai shi ne Taibai (太白), da kuma lakabin Qinglian Jushi (靑蓮居士).

faq.question: Wane laƙabi ake kiran Li Bai da shi?
faq.answer: Li Bai ana masa kallon daya daga cikin manyan mawakan tarihi a kasar Sin, ana masa kirari da 'Mawakin aljanna' (Shixian).

faq.question: Waƙoƙin Li Bai nawa suka rage zuwa yanzu?
faq.answer: Akwai kimanin waƙoƙi 1,100 da suka rage zuwa yanzu.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni ne suka fi fitowa a waƙoƙin Li Bai?
faq.answer: Muhimman batutuwan waƙoƙinsa galibi sune addinin Daoism da mayen giya.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Li Bai?
faq.answer: Tabbataccen zancen da ake da shi a halin yanzu shine an haife shi ne a Tsakiyar Asiya, a garin Suyab lokacin daular Tang.

faq.question: Shin Li Bai ya sami ilimin zamani (formal education)?
faq.answer: Li Bai ba shi da ilimin boko (formal education) saboda mahaifinsa dan kasuwa ne wanda yake balaguro.

faq.question: Yaushe Li Bai ya rasu?
faq.answer: Li Bai ya mutu a shekarar 762, yana da shekaru 61, a gidan Li Yangbing, kanensa, hakimin lardin Dangtu, Anhui.

faq.question: Waɗanne irin halaye waƙoƙin Li Bai ke da shi?
faq.answer: Waƙoƙinsa masu girma ne kuma girmamawa, inda suke haɗa haɗe-haɗe (fantasy) da dabi'u masu 'yanci masu yawa.

li-bai.missingDataNote: Rashin bayanin tafiye-tafiye da yayi tare da Du Fu bayan murabus din sa, gami da lokacin jinkiri daga hukuncinsa na gudun hijira wanda ba'a fayyace tsayayyen shekara ko shekarunsa a asalin rubutun ba a jera su cikin lokaci na yau.

timeline.event: An haife shi a yankin Harima na kasar Japan a lokacin hargitsin zamanin Sengoku.
Ya yi yaki a Yakin Sekigahara, inda ake kyautata zaton ya fadi yayin da yake bangaren Sojojin Yamma.
Ya yi nasara akan shahararren abokin hamayyarsa Sasaki Kojiro a wani shahararren fadan da aka yi a Tsibirin Ganryujima.
Ya koma kogo na Reigando inda ya mayar da hankali kan rayuwarsa kuma ya tsara falsafarsa.
Jim kadan kafin mutuwarsa, ya kammala littafin 'The Book of Five Rings', wanda shi ne babban aikinsa akan tsarin falsafa na yaki.
An haife shi a yankin Owari a matsayin magajin dangin Oda.
Ya yi galaba akan dumbin sojojin Imagawa Yoshimoto a yakin Okehazama.
Ya shiga birnin Kyoto ya kwace iko da babban birnin inda ya mayar da Ashikaga Yoshiaki a matsayin shugaban farfaganda (puppet shogun).
A Yakin Nagashino, ya yi amfani da bindigogin hannu (Matchlocks) inda ya samu nasara wacce ta kawo sauyi akan yadda ake yakin kasar Japan.
Wani mai yi masa aiki mai suna Akechi Mitsuhide ya ci amanarsa wanda hakan ya jawo ya tilasta kansa kashe kansa a wani lamari da aka sani da Honno-ji Incident.
An haife shi a ranar 12 ga Nuwamba a yankin Xiangshan, lardin Guangdong.
Ya kafa kungiyar Xingzhonghui a Honolulu domin hambarar da daular Qing.
Tawayen Wuchang ya yi nasara wanda ya haifar da rushewar daular Qing ta sarakuna.
Ya yi aiki a taƙaice a matsayin shugaban wucin gadi na farko na Jamhuriyar Sin da aka kafa sabo.
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar sankarar hanta a Beijing, ya bar siyasarsa ta 'Ka'idojin Jama'a Uku' ba tare da an kammala ba.
An haife shi a matsayin Matsudaira Takechiyo a lardin Mikawa.
Ya sami 'yancin gidan bayan mutuwar Imagawa Yoshimoto a yakin Okehazama.
Ya jagoranci rundunar Gabas zuwa nasara a yakin Sekigahara, inda ya kwace ikon Japan.
Sarki ya nada shi Shogun, wanda ya kafa daular Tokugawa a hukumance.
Ya lalata gidan Toyotomi a yakin Osaka kuma ya tabbatar da cikakken iko a kan Japan.
An haife shi a matsayin ɗan wani matalaucin manomi a Nakamura, gundumar Aichi, lardin Owari (Rana ta 6 ta watan 2 na shekara ta 6 ta zamanin Tenbun).
Ya fara aiki a matsayin bawan Oda Nobunaga.
Ya auri Nene, 'yar riko ta Asano Nagakatsu (Shekara ta 4 ta Eiroku).

Ya taka rawar gani a harin da aka kai kan sansanin Omimitsukuri, kuma lokacin da Oda Nobunaga ya sanya Ashikaga Yoshiaki a matsayin shogun, ya tafiyar da lamuran siyasa a Kyoto tare da Akechi Mitsuhide da Niwa Nagahide (Watan 9 na shekara ta 11 ta Eiroku).
Ya shiga yakin yaki da Asakura Yoshikage a lardin Echizen kuma ya nuna bajinta wajen jagorantar masu gadin baya a Kanegasaki (Shekarar farko ta Genki).
Bayan halakar da gidan Azai, an ba shi yankuna uku a Omi, ya zama ubangijin gidan kurkukun Nagahama, kuma ya canza sunansa na karshe zuwa Hashiba (Shekarar farko ta Tensho).
Ya dawo ba tare da izini ba yayin da aka tura shi domin taimakon Shibata Katsuie, kuma ya ci Matsunaga Hisahide na lardin Yamato (Yakin Shigisan) (Shekara ta 4 ta Tensho).
Ya karkashin daimyo Ukita Naoie na lardin Bizen da Mimasaka (Shekara ta 7 ta Tensho).
Ya kai hari ya kuma sa Bessho Nagaharu, shugaban sansanin Miki a lardin Harima, ya mika wuya (Yakin Miki). Ya kai hari a sansanin Arikoyama na Yamana Akihiro a lardin Tajima (Shekara ta 8 ta Tensho).
Ya kama sansanin Tottori (Yakin Tottori). Ya kai hari a sansanin Iwaya kuma ya kawo lardin Awaji karkashin ikonsa (Shekara ta 9 ta Tensho).
Ya nemi karin karfi daga Oda Nobunaga a lokacin harin ruwa kan sansanin Takamatsu a Bitchu (Shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya sami labarin cewa ubangidansa Oda Nobunaga ya kashe kansa a yakin Honno-ji (Rana ta 2 ta watan 6 na shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya doke Akechi Mitsuhide a yakin Yamazaki (Rana ta 13 ta watan 6 na shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
A taron Kiyosu, an yanke shawarar zaben jikan Oda Nobunaga, Sanboushi, a matsayin magajinsa (Rana ta 27 ta watan 6 na shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Ya gudanar da jana'izar Oda Nobunaga tare da dan rikonsa Hashiba Hidekatsu a matsayin babban mai zaman juyayi (Rana ta 15 ta watan 10 na shekara ta 10 ta Tensho).
Rigimarsa da Shibata Katsuie ta kara kamari, ya kewaye sansanin Nagahama, ya kama sansanin Kameyama, kuma ya karbi Sanboushi daga Oda Nobutaka (Shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya doke Shibata Katsuie a yakin Shizugatake (Rana ta 21 ta watan 4 na shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya fara gina gidan sarautar Osaka a filin Ishiyama Hongan-ji (Shekara ta 11 ta Tensho).
Ya yi rigima da Oda Nobukatsu, wanda Tokugawa Ieyasu ya mara wa baya (Yakin Komaki da Nagakute) (Shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
Uba da dan Ikeda Tsuneoki da Motosuke, da Mori Nagayoshi an kashe su a yakin Nagakute (Rana ta 9 ta watan 4 na shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
Ya kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Oda Nobukatsu (Rana ta 11 ta watan 11 na shekara ta 12 ta Tensho).
An nada shi a matsayin Ministan Cikin Gida na matsayin koli na biyu (Rana ta 10 ta watan 3 na shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da yakin neman zabe a Kishu (Rana ta 21 ta watan 3 na shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya kaddamar da yakin Shikoku (Rana ta 25 ta watan 7 na shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
An nada shi matsayin Kampaku (Rana ta 11 ta watan 7 na shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Sassa Narimasa na Etchu ya mika wuya ga Hideyoshi (Rana ta 25 ta watan 8 na shekara ta 13 ta Tensho).
Ya tilastawa kanwarsa Asahi raba aure, ya aurar da ita ga Ieyasu, kuma ya tura mahaifiyarsa Omandokoro a matsayin garkuwa zuwa ga Ieyasu (Shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Kotun sarki ta ba shi sunan gidan Toyotomi (Rana ta 9 ta watan 9 na shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya karfafa ikonsa ta hanyar zama Daijo-daijin (Rana ta 25 ta watan 12 na shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya sha kashi a hannun sojojin Shimazu karkashin jagorancin Shimazu Iehisa a kogin Hetsugi a Bungo (Yakin Hetsugigawa) (Shekara ta 14 ta Tensho).
Ya jagoranci sojoji 200,000 don mamaye Kyushu, lamarin da ya sa gidan Shimazu mika wuya (Yakin Kyushu) (Shekara ta 15 ta Tensho).
Ya ba da umarnin korar Bateren (kiristoci) (Watan 6 na shekara ta 15 ta Tensho).
Ya aiwatar da dokar farautar takuba ta Katanagari (Shekara ta 16 ta Tensho).
An haifi dansa Tsurumatsu daga matarsa Yododono kuma ya nada shi magaji (Shekara ta 17 ta Tensho).
Ya tura sojoji 210,000 zuwa Kanto don kayar da gidan Hojo, ya kewaye gidan sarautar Odawara (Yakin Odawara) (Shekara ta 18 ta Tensho).

Lokacin da magajinsa Tsurumatsu ya mutu sakamakon rashin lafiya, ya karbi wansa Hidetsugu a matsayin dan riko kuma ya ba shi matsayin Kampaku, inda ya dauki lakabin Taiko ga kansa (Shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
Ya umurci masanin shan shayi Sen no Rikyu da ya yi seppuku (kashe kansa) (Shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
Ya murkushe tawayen da Kunohe Masazane ya tayar a yankin Tohoku (Shekara ta 19 ta Tensho).
An fara yakin mamayewar Japan a kan Koriya (Shekarar farko ta Bunroku).
An fara tattaunawar zaman lafiya da daular Ming. Matarsa Yododono ta haifi Hideyori (Shekara ta 2 ta Bunroku).
Ya cire Kampaku Toyotomi Hidetsugu, ya kore shi zuwa Dutsen Koya, sannan daga baya ya sa shi yin seppuku saboda zargin cin amana (Shekara ta 4 ta Bunroku).
Tattaunawar zaman lafiya da Ming ta ruguje (Shekara ta 5 ta Bunroku).
Ya sake kai hari kan Koriya da sojoji 140,000 (Mamayewar Japan na biyu akan Koriya) (Shekara ta 2 ta Keicho).
Ya mutu a gidan sarautar Fushimi (Rana ta 18 ta watan 8 na shekara ta 3 ta Keicho).

keyAchievements.title: Manyan Jarumai 3 na Sengoku
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran sa ɗaya daga cikin manyan jarumai guda uku na zamanin Sengoku, tare da Oda Nobunaga da Tokugawa Ieyasu.

keyAchievements.title: Magajin Ayyukan Oda Nobunaga
keyAchievements.description: Bayan rikicin Honno-ji, ya kayar da Akechi Mitsuhide kuma ya gaji ayyukan Oda Nobunaga.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Kan Japan
keyAchievements.description: Ya tilasta wa gidan Hojo mika wuya don hada kan Japan sannan kuma ya kawo karshen yakin Sengoku wanda ya dauki lokaci mai tsawo ana yi.

keyAchievements.title: Nadi a Matsayin Kampaku da Daijo-daijin
keyAchievements.description: An nada shi a matsayin Kampaku (Mai bawa sarki shawara) da Daijo-daijin (Babban Minista), ya kafa iko sannan kotun sarki ta ba shi sunan Toyotomi.

keyAchievements.title: Taiko Kenchi da Katanagari
keyAchievements.description: Ya aiwatar da tsare-tsaren Taiko Kenchi (kimanta filaye) da Katanagari (ƙwace takuba) don tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali a cikin kasar Japan.

keyAchievements.title: Hawa Karagar Mulki Daga Karamin Matsayi
keyAchievements.description: Mutumin da ke da matsayi mafi kaskanci a kasar Japan ya zama babban mai mulkin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Gidan Sarautar Osaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina Gidan Sarautar Osaka a kan filin da Ishiyama Hongan-ji ya kasance.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Mamaye Koriya
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne babban mutumin da ya jagoranci farmakin da aka kai wa Koriya a shekarar farko ta Bunroku (1592).

faq.question: Yaya asalin Toyotomi Hideyoshi yake?
faq.answer: An ce an haife shi ne a matsayin ɗan wani matalaucin manomi a Nakamura, gundumar Aichi, lardin Owari. Saboda kaskancin matsayinsa, ana zargin cewa rubuce-rubucen tarihi game da asalin nasa an gurbata su ko kuma an kawata su a zamanin nasa da kuma na baya saboda jin kunyar kaskancinsa.

faq.question: Me ya sa Toyotomi Hideyoshi bai zama Shogun ba?
faq.answer: Domin kuwa an haife shi daga gidan talakawa, ba daga tsatson jinin Minamoto (Genji) ba ne, bai samu damar zama Shogun ba saboda ka'idar cewa 'Genji ne kawai ka iya zama Shogun'. A maimakon haka, ya hau matsayin Kampaku da Daijo-daijin.

faq.question: Menene babban dalilin da ya sa Toyotomi Hideyoshi ya kaddamar da yakin mamaye Koriya?
faq.answer: Gabaɗaya ana fassara cewa ya nemi ne ya kwato yankin kudancin Koriya, wanda yake ikirarin cewa yankin su ne a da, kuma ya fatattaki sojojin daular Ming don samun dalilin da zai sa ya zama Shogun. Kuma ya yi hakan ne don ya kyautata dangantakar da ke tsakanin su ta hanyar ba da sabbin filaye ga mayakansa masu biyayya don ƙarfafa su.

faq.question: Mene ne yanayin jikin Toyotomi Hideyoshi?
faq.answer: An kira shi 'Karamin Biri' saboda kamaninsa da biri, gajere ne kuma mai mummuna fuska. Fasto Luís Fróis ya rubuta cewa yana da yatsun hannu 6 a hannunsa na dama (polydactyly).

faq.question: Yaya aka tafiyar da labarin mutuwar Toyotomi Hideyoshi?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a gidan sarautar Fushimi a shekara ta 3 ta Keicho (1598). Saboda gudun kar kwarin gwiwar sojojinsa ya fadi, ba a gudanar da jana'iza ba, an rufa asirin mutuwarsa. Kabarinsa ya lalace ta hanyar fashewa bayan yakin Sekigahara.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Yarima Chulalongkorn, ɗan Sarki Mongkut na ƙasar Siam.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, ya hau karagar mulki yana da shekaru 15 a matsayin Sarki Rama V.
Ya kaddamar da tsarin dakatar da bauta da aikin karfi a hankali a Siam.
Bayan Yakin Faransa da Siam mai hatsari, ya sallama wasu yankuna domin kiyaye yancin kai na Siam.
Ya mutu a ranar 23 ga watan Oktoba, kuma ana tuna da shi a matsayin babban sarkin da ya kawo ci gaba kuma ya kiyaye Siam daga mulkin mallaka.
An haife shi a wani fitaccen gidan sojoji a Carthage (Tunisia ta yau).
Ya kunna Yakin Punic na Biyu kuma ya mamaye kasar Italiya ta hanyar tsallaka tsaunin Alps da giwayen yaki.
Ya sami ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorin fasahar yaƙi a tarihi a kanta Roma a Yaƙin Cannae.
Ya sha kashi a hannun Janar na Roma Scipio Africanus a gagarumin Yakin Zama.
Ya kashe kansa da guba a Bithynia domin kaucewa a kama shi a mika shi ga Roma.
An haife shi a gidan Malaman Addini (Ulama) a birnin Tangier, na ƙasar Maroko.
Yana da shekaru 21, ya bar garinsu domin yin aikin Hajji a ƙasar Makka.
Ya isa birnin Alexandria.
Bayan ya shafe wata guda a Makka, ya bi sahun ayarin da ke komawa kasar Iraqi.
Ya isa birnin Baghdad.
Ya bar Baghdad ya nufi arewa ta gabar kogin Tigris.
Ya isa birnin Aden.
Ya ziyarci Sultan na Kilwa, Al-Hasan ibn Sulaiman.
Ya ziyarci birnin Mogadishu.
Ya yanke shawarar neman aiki a fadar Sarkin Delhi Muhammad bin Tughluq, inda ya tashi daga Anatolia ya koma cikin ayarin dake tafiya zuwa Delhi.
Ya isa Constantinople inda ya gana da Andronikos III Palaiologos.
Ya isa masarautar Samudera Pasai dake yankin Aceh a arewacin tsibirin Sumatra.
Ya bar Guangzhou ya fara tafiyarsa na komawa gida.
Ya isa Damascus inda ya sami labarin cewa mahaifinsa ya mutu shekaru 15 da suka gabata.
Lokacin da Alfonso na 11 na Castile ya farma yankin Tangier, ya hada kai da sauran Musulmai don kare tashar jiragen ruwa.
Ya bar Fez ya nufi Sijilmasa.
Ya isa Taghaza tare da ayarin fatake.
Ya koma cikin ayarin da ya bar Mali ya nufi Timbuktu.
Ya koma Sijilmasa.
Ya koma Maroko.
Bisa umarnin Sarki, ya ba Ibn Juzayy labarin tafiye-tafiyensa, wanda Ibn Juzayy ya tattara ya rubuta a matsayin 'Rihla na Ibn Battuta'.
Ya riga mu gidan gaskiya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Fitaccen Littafin Tafiye-Tafiye (Rihla)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta sanannen littafin tafiye-tafiye 'Rihla' da ke rubuta tarihin duniyar Musulunci a tsakiyar karnoni da kuma fadi da dama fiye da hakan.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiye-Tafiye masu Faɗi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi balaguro mai nisan kilomita 120,000 wanda ya hada da kasashen Musulmi na wancan lokacin, da kuma ƙasar Sin, da tsibirin Sumatra, inda ya bar muhimman bayanai akan al'adu da dabi'u.

keyAchievements.title: Naɗi a Matsayin Alƙali a Daular Delhi
keyAchievements.description: Sarkin Delhi, Muhammad bin Tughluq, ya nada shi a matsayin alkali (Qadi) sannan kuma ya yi aiki a wurin.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Ibn Battuta?
faq.answer: An haifi Ibn Battuta a ranar 24 ga Fabrairu, 1304, a gidan Malaman Addini (Ulama) a garin Tangier, dake kasar Maroko.

faq.question: Wane kima littafin tafiye-tafiyen Ibn Battuta yake da shi?
faq.answer: Littafinsa na tafiye-tafiye ya ba da labarin tafiye-tafiye da ya kai kimanin kilomita 120,000 wanda ya hada da kusan duk kasashen Musulunci na wancan lokaci, kasar Sin, da Sumatra, kuma yana da babbar kima wajen nazarin al'adun dan adam.

faq.question: Wane aiki ne Ibn Battuta ya yi?
faq.answer: Matafiyi ne, mai bincike, kuma marubucin fitaccen littafin tafiye-tafiye (Rihla). An nada shi a matsayin alkali (Qadi) a zamanin Daular Delhi, kuma ya shafe karshen rayuwarsa a matsayin alkali a Maroko.

faq.question: Wane ne ya rubuta littafin tafiye-tafiyen Ibn Battuta?
faq.answer: Ibn Battuta ya gaya wa Ibn Juzayy labarin tafiye-tafiyensa bisa umarnin Sarki, sai Ibn Juzayy ya tattara su ya rubuta a matsayin littafin 'Rihla na Ibn Battuta'.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gidan sarautar daular Khmer.
Ya shaida yadda masarautar Champa makwabciyarsu ta lalata Angkor, babban birnin Khmer.
Ya yi nasarar fatattakar masu mamaye Champa kuma aka nada shi a matsayin sarkin daular Khmer.
Ya ba da umarnin gina gidan ibada na Ta Prohm don karrama mahaifiyarsa.
Ya rasu bayan ya kammala manyan gine-gine kamar Angkor Thom da kuma gidan ibada na Bayon.
Ya zama Mansa na daular Mali kuma ya fara mulkinsa.
Wani mai ziyara da ya zo Mali ya rubuta game da tsaro a daular Mali da kuma tsananin dokar da sarki ke zartarwa.
Ya kammala mulkinsa na daular Mali.
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Gina zamanin zinariya na daular Mali
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina zamanin zinariya ta hanyar mulkar daular Mali dari shekarar 1312 zuwa 1332.

keyAchievements.title: Aikin haji na Mecca da ayyukan sadaka
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin tafiyarsa ta haji zuwa Mecca, ya tafi da bayi 12,000, mata 800, da tan 11 na zinariya, kuma ya raba zinariya ga matalauta.

keyAchievements.title: Gayyatar masana da gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya dawo da masana da dama lokacin da ya koma gida, kuma ya sa wani mai tsara gine-gine (architect) na kasar Spain ya gina fadar masarauta da masallatai a babban birnin Timbuktu.

faq.question: Yaushe Mansa Musa ya mulki daular Mali?
faq.answer: Mansa Musa ya mulki daular Mali dari shekarar 1312 zuwa 1332.

faq.question: Yaya aikin haji na Mecca na Mansa Musa yake?
faq.answer: Ya tafi da bayi 12,000, mata 800, da tan 11 na zinariya a lokacin aikin haji na Mecca, kuma ya raba zinariya ga matalauta a kan hanya.

faq.question: Wane kiyasi daular Mali ta samu a lokacin Mansa Musa?
faq.answer: Bisa ga bayanan wani mai ziyara a shekara ta 1325, daular Mali ta kasance kasa ce da ba a cika samun rashin adalci ba kuma masu tafiya suna iya tafiya lafiya sakamakon tsananin dokar da sarki ke zartarwa.

timeline.event: An haifi Shaka kaSenzangakhona a Masarautar Mthethwa.
Ya zama Sarki na Masarautar Zulu (Zulu Kingdom).
Ya yi nasara a yakin da ya yi da Zwide a kusa da Pongola.
Ya sake fuskantar Sikhunyane, dan Zwide.
Rasuwar mahaifiyarsa Nandi.
Kanne dinsa na gefe (half-brothers) sun kashe shi.

keyAchievements.title: Babban gyaran soja
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na daya dari cikin sarakuna masu fada aji na kabilar Zulu, ya kaddamar da babban gyaran soja.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara tsarin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami tallafi dari Masarautar Mthethwa don gyara tsarin soja da ake kira ibutho.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Iklwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da 'Iklwa', wani gajeren mashi na soka mai dauke da dogon mashi mai fadi.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa' (Horn of the Bull)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa' (Horn of the Bull) wacce ta murkushe dakarun Zwide a Yakin Gqokli Hill.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada mulki bisa karfin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya doke abokan gabarsa bisa karfin soja kuma ya shigar da mayakan da suka tsere zuwa cikin rundunarsa don fadada mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da garkuwar Nguni
keyAchievements.description: Ana zargin cewa ya shigar da garkuwar Nguni mafi girma da nauyi.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da dabarar amfani da garkuwa
keyAchievements.description: An yarda cewa ya koya wa mayaka dabarar amfani da gefen hagu na garkuwa don janye garkuwar abokin gaba zuwa dama, wando ke bayyana hakarkarin abokin gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Horon tattaki mai sauri
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance yana ba da horon tattaki mai sauri (forced marches) a cikin yanayi mai zafi da duwatsu.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin tallafawa kayan yaki na matasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da yara maza masu shekaru 6 ko fiye a matsayin mayaka na gwaji (udibi) don daukar abinci, tukwane, tabarmi, da kuma makamai na ragi.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara tsarin rundunoni bisa shekaru
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara kungiyoyi daban-daban na shekaru zuwa rundunoni, ya ajiye su a cikin krals na soja na musamman, kuma ya basu sunaye da alamomi na musamman.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dokar soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da mummunan tunani ga sojoji cewa idan suka rasa kwarin gwiwa ko suka sha kashi a yaki, mummunan sakamako zai biyo baya, wando ya ba su kuduri mara tausayi.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da kabilun da aka ci nasara a kansu
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigar da mayakan kabilun da ya ci nasara a kansu zuwa cikin rundunarsa kuma ya yi amfani da su don cin nasara a kan sauran kabilun.

faq.question: Yaushe Shaka Zulu ya haifu kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Shaka kaSenzangakhona kusan shekara ta 1787, kuma ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Satumba, 1828.

faq.question: Shin Shaka Zulu ya kasance Sarki na Masarautar Zulu?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance Sarki na Masarautar Zulu dari shekarar 1816 zuwa 1828.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan gyare-gyaren soja na Shaka Zulu?
faq.answer: Ya shigar da gajeren mashi 'Iklwa', ya samar da dabarar 'Kahon Sa', kuma ya tsara tsarin rundunoni bisa shekaru.

faq.question: Yaya Shaka Zulu ya rasu?
faq.answer: Kanne dinsa na gefe Dingane kaSenzangakhona da Mlangana, da kuma Mbopa kaSithayi sun kashe shi a watan Satumba na shekarar 1828.

faq.question: Wace rawa Shaka Zulu ya taka a Mfecane?
faq.answer: Lokacin mulkin Shaka yana daya da lokacin Mfecane, kuma fadada sojansa ya janyo babban hijira da rudani, amma akwai cece-kuce game da rawar da ya taka.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Baghdad (Kiyasi)
Ya rubuta littafin 'Lissafi da Lambobin Indiya'
Ya rubuta sanannen littafinsa 'al-Kitab al-mukhtasar fi hisab al-jabr wa'l-muqabala' (Takaitaccen Littafi kan Lissafi ta Hanyar Kammalawa da Daidaitawa)
Mutuwa (Kiyasi)
An fassara littafinsa kan lissafi zuwa harshen Latin
Ayyukansa sun watsu zuwa Turai ta hanyar fassarar Latin
An fassara littafinsa na 'Lissafi ta Hanyar Kammalawa da Daidaitawa' zuwa Latin

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Aljebra 'Lissafi ta Hanyar Kammalawa da Daidaitawa'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin da aka dauka a matsayin farkon lissafin Aljebra na zamani, inda ya gabatar da hanyoyin magance daidaito na digiri na daya da na biyu (linear da quadratic equations).

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Lissafi 'Lissafi da Lambobin Indiya'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin da ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gabatar da lambobin Indiya-Larabawa da hanyoyin lissafi zuwa kasashen yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Jadawalin Ilimin Taurari 'Zij al-Sindhind'
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi jadawalin lissafin taurari wanda ya ƙunshi kalanda, lissafin ilimin taurari, da kuma jadawalin lissafin sine da cosine a fannin ilimin lissafin triangles.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Ilimin Kasa 'Siffar Duniya'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara ilimin yanayin kasa na Ptolemy sannan ya rubuta littafi wanda ya hada da inda garuruwa 2,402 suke, tare da siffofin kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Nazarin Injinan Aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nazari kan injinan aiki kamar astrolabe (na'urar duba taurari) da na'urar gane lokaci ta rana (sundial).

keyAchievements.title: Kasancewa cikin Aikin Zana Taswira da Auna fadin Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen yin taswira ga Khalifa Al-Ma'mun sannan ya kasance a cikin aikin auna kewayen duniya.

faq.question: A wane matsayi aka fi sanin Al-Khwarizmi?
faq.answer: Shi masanin lissafi ne na farisa wanda ya kirkiro ka'idojin lissafi na asali (sawa, ragi, rabawa, da rarrabawa) ta amfani da lambobin Larabawa daga Indiya, ya yi amfani da lamba 0 da ka'idar sanya lambobi, kuma ana kiransa 'Uban Aljebra'.

faq.question: Ta yaya kalmomin 'algorithm' da 'algebra' suka samo asali?
faq.answer: Kalmar 'algorithm' ta samo asali ne daga sunansa, sannan 'algebra' ta samo asali daga littafinsa <al-jabr wa al-muqabala>.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Al-Khwarizmi, kuma mene ne ke cikinsu?
faq.answer: A cikin manyan littattafansa akwai 'Lissafi ta Hanyar Kammalawa da Daidaitawa', wanda ya gabatar da hanyoyin warware matsalolin daidaito na digiri na daya da na biyu, 'Lissafi da Lambobin Indiya' wanda ya yada lambobin Indiya-Larabawa a yamma, da kuma 'Siffar Duniya' wanda ya yi gyara ga ilimin kasa na Ptolemy.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 14 ga Afrilu, a dangin Dalit ('wadanda ba a tabawa') a Mhow, a lokacin da Indiya take karkashin mulkin Birtaniya.
Ya cancanci zama lauya a London kuma ya fara kamfen na tsawon rayuwa na yaki da wariyar al'umma a Indiya.
An nada shi a matsayin Ministan Shari'a na farko a Indiya mai cin gashin kanta.
Ya sami nasarar jagorantar tsara kundin tsarin mulkin Indiya wanda a hukumance ya soke tsarin rashin taba al'ummar Dalit.
Ana gab da mutuwarsa, ya shiga addinin Buddah tare da dubban daruruwan mabiyansa.
An haife shi a tsohuwar Indiya, amma ainihin asalin inda ya fito ya kasance batun muhawara a tarihi.
Tare da taimakon malaminsa Chanakya, ya hambarar da daular Nanda ya kuma kafa daular Maurya.
Ya fadada daular zuwa yamma bayan da ya doke Seleucus I Nicator, daya daga cikin manyan janar-janar din Alexander the Great.
Ya sauka daga kan karagar mulki domin dansa Bindusara kuma ya zama mai tsatsauran ra'ayin addinin Jainism.
Ya kawo karshen rayuwarsa ta hanyar azumi (sallekhana) a Shravanabelagola kamar yadda addinin Jainism ya tanadar na samun ci gaban ruhi.
An haife shi a ranar 18 ga Mayu a Nishapur, na farisa (Iran ta yau).
Ya rubuta takarda mai tasiri game da lissafin Aljebra mai taken 'Rubuce-rubuce kan Nuna Tabbacin Matsalolin Aljebra'.
Sarkin Seljuk Malik-Shah na Farko ya gayyato shi don kafa dakin lura da taurari a birnin Isfahan.
Ya kammala Kalanda na Jalali, wanda kalanda ce mai cikakken inganci da ake bi da rana.
Ya rasu a Nishapur, inda ya bar babban tasiri a fannin lissafi, ilimin taurari, da rubutun wakoki (Rubaiyat).
An haife shi a cikin iyalin Yahudawa masu kudi a New York.
Ya kammala karatun chemistry a Jami'ar Harvard da sakamako mai kyau (summa cum laude).
Ya tafi karatu a Cavendish Laboratory na Jami'ar Cambridge da ke Birtaniya.
Ya karanci theoretical physics a Jami'ar Göttingen da ke Jamus kuma ya rubuta kasidun ilimi (papers) guda 16.
Ya fara koyarwa a Jami'ar California, Berkeley.
Ya auri Katherine Harrison, wacce ta kasance matar tsohon memba na jam'iyyar gurguzu (Communist Party).
Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos Laboratory don gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan (Manhattan Project).
An kore shi dari dukkan mukaman gwamnati baada ya ki amincewa da kera hydrogen bomb.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society of London.
An gano cewa yana da ciwon kansa na wuya da kai (throat cancer).
Ya rasu yana barci a gidansa da ke Princeton yana da shekaru 62.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan don kera atomic bomb a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos National Laboratory a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike da koyarwa a fannin theoretical physics
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi bincike a kan theoretical physics a Jami'ar Göttingen na Jamus kuma ya wallafa kasidu da dama, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin shahararren malami a Jami'ar California, Berkeley.

keyAchievements.title: Zabe a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society
keyAchievements.description: An zabe shi a matsayin memba na kasashen waje na Royal Society of London a shekara ta 1962.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Robert Oppenheimer?
faq.answer: An haifi Robert Oppenheimer a ranar 22 ga Afrilu, 1904 a New York.

faq.question: Menene ainihin shahararren aikin Robert Oppenheimer?
faq.answer: Ya gudanar da Tsarin Manhattan don kera atomic bomb a matsayin shugaban Los Alamos National Laboratory a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.

faq.question: Me yasa Robert Oppenheimer ya bar mukamansa na gwamnati?
faq.answer: An kore shi dari dukkan mukamansa na gwamnati baada ya ki amincewa da kera hydrogen bomb.

faq.question: Wadanne harsuna Robert Oppenheimer ya koya?
faq.answer: Ya koyi harshen Italian don karanta "Divine Comedy" na Dante, ya koyi Sanskrit don karanta littattafan falsafar India, kuma ya kware a harshen Greek a lokacin makarantar sakandare.

timeline.event: An haife shi a wani sanannen gidan Kurdawa a Tikrit, dake kasar Iraqi a yau.
An nada shi wazir na daular Fatimid a Masar kuma ya karfafa ikonsa a siyasance.
Ya kafa Daular Ayyubid sannan ya fara faɗaɗa ikonsa a filayen Masar da Siriya.
Ya yi nasarar fatattakar mayakan Kurisiyya (Crusaders) a Yaƙin Hattin kuma ya kwato birnin Kudus.
Ya rasu sakamakon zazzabi a birnin Damascus, inda ya raba dukkan dukiyarsa ga jama'arsa kafin rasuwarsa.
An haife shi a ranar 22 ga Disamba a Erode dake lardin Madras, Indiya karkashin mulkin Birtaniya.
Ya samo wani littafin takaitaccen lissafin ilimi na G. S. Carr, wanda ya zaburar da tsananin basirarsa ta fannin lissafi.
Ya fara aika wasiku na tarihi da G. H. Hardy, wani shahararren masanin lissafi na Birtaniya.
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na Royal Society, inda ya zama daya daga cikin mafi karancin shekaru a cikinsu.
Ya rasu a Indiya yana da karancin shekaru 32, ya bar dubban ra'ayoyi da ba a tabbatar da su ba na fannin lissafi.
An haife shi a ranar 6 ga Nuwamba a Trabzon dake cikin Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya hau kan karagar mulkin Daular Usmaniyya a matsayin Sultan na 10 na daular.
Ya kayar da Masarautar Hungary a gagarumin Yaƙin Mohács.
Ya jagoranci kewaye Vienna a karon farko da Daular Usmaniyya ta yi, inda ya kai gagarumar kololuwa ta fadada daular a Turai.
Ya rasu yayin kewaye Szigetvár, inda ya kawo karshen mulkin da yafi kowane tsawo a tarihin Daular Usmaniyya.
An haife shi a matsayin Narendranath Datta a ranar 12 ga Janairu a Calcutta dake Indiya karkashin Birtaniya.
Ya haɗu da malaminsa Sri Ramakrishna, inda ya fuskanci babban sauyi a rayuwarsa ta ruhaniya.
Ya gabatar da shahararren jawabi a Majalisar Addinai ta Duniya a birnin Chicago, inda ya gabatar da addinin Hindu ga Yamma.
Ya kafa Ofishin Ramakrishna Mission don bayar da taimakon zamantakewa da na ruhaniya mai fadi.
Ya rasu a ranar 4 ga Yuli yayin da yake yin zuzzurfan tunani a Belur Math.
Sun bude kantin keke na farko, Wright Cycle Exchange, wanda ya ba da tallafi ga gwaje-gwajen jiragen sama na farko.
Sun fara binciken jirgin sama ta hanyar gina abin wasan yara (kite) mai fuka-fuki biyu don gwada ra'ayin sarrafa karkatar da fuka-fuki.
Sun yi nasarar tashi da jirgin sama mai inji na farko da aka sarrafa a duniya, kuma mafi nauyi fiye da iska, a Kitty Hawk, Jihar North Carolina.
Sun tashi da Wright Flyer III, wanda ake daukarsa a matsayin jirgin sama na farko da ya kammala, kuma wanda za a iya amincewa da shi.
Sun kafa Kamfanin Wright don kera jiragen sama da bayar da horon tuki, domin sayar da kirkirarsu.
An haife shi a Kirkcaldy, Scotland, inda daga baya ya habaka ra'ayoyi na asali kan ilimin tattalin arzikin siyasa.
An nada shi farfesan dabaru (logic) a Jami'ar Glasgow, sannan daga baya ya zama farfesan falsafar dabi'a.
Ya wallafa 'Theory of Moral Sentiments', wanda ke yin bayani kan asalin dabi'ar dan adam da juyayi.
Ya wallafa 'The Wealth of Nations', wanda ya kafa ka'idojin asali na tattalin arzikin kasuwa mai walwala.
An nada shi Kwamishinan Kwastam na Scotland, inda ya shafe shekarunsa na karshe yana sanya ido kan kasuwancin da ya rubuta a kai.
An haife shi a Syracuse
Ya mutu a lokacin Yakin Punic na Biyu
Cicero ya gano kabarin Archimedes kusa da Syracuse
Masanin tarihin lissafi dan kasar Denmark, Heiberg, ya gano 'The Method of Mechanical Theorems' a Istanbul
Masanin kimiyya dan kasar Girka Ioannis Sakkas ya yi nasarar gudanar da gwaji don sake yin madubin Archimedes
An sayar da 'The Method of Mechanical Theorems' a gwanjon Christie da ke New York
An bude 'The Method of Mechanical Theorems' ga jama'a
Daliban Cibiyar Fasaha ta Massachusetts sun gudanar da gwaji don sake yin madubin Archimedes

keyAchievements.title: 정역학 및 유체정역학 연구
keyAchievements.description: 물리학 분야에서 정역학과 유체정역학을 연구했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 지레와 도르래 원리 설명
keyAchievements.description: 지레와 도르래의 원리를 설명했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 기계 제작
keyAchievements.description: 최초의 승강기, 아르키메데스 나선양수기, 해상 공격용 거울 등의 기계를 제작했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 수학적 업적
keyAchievements.description: 십진법 도입, 포물선으로 둘러싸인 도형의 넓이 계산, 원주율 계산 등의 수학적 업적을 남겼습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 아르키메데스의 원리 발견
keyAchievements.description: 불규칙한 물체의 부피를 측정하는 방법을 발견하여 금관의 순도를 증명했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 아르키메데스 나선양수기 개발
keyAchievements.description: 속이 빈 원기둥에 나선을 붙여 회전축을 돌려 물을 퍼 올리는 기구를 개발했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 아르키메데스 갈고리 고안
keyAchievements.description: 무거운 금속 갈고리를 이용해 적선을 전복시키는 방어용 무기를 고안했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 아르키메데스 거울 고안
keyAchievements.description: 햇볕을 모아 불을 붙이는 일종의 화경을 고안했다고 전해집니다.

keyAchievements.title: 지레의 원리 규명
keyAchievements.description: 《평면의 균형》에서 지레의 여러 원리를 밝혔습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 천체 모형 제작
keyAchievements.description: 태양과 달, 다섯 행성의 움직임을 보여주는 천체 모형을 제작했다고 키케로가 언급했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 원주율 근삿값 계산
keyAchievements.description: 다각형을 이용하여 원주율(π)의 근삿값을 3.1408 < π < 3.1429로 계산했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 포물선의 구적법 증명
keyAchievements.description: 포물선과 직선으로 둘러싸인 도형의 넓이가 내접 삼각형 넓이의 4/3이 됨을 증명했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 매우 큰 수 표현 방법 고안
keyAchievements.description: 《모래알을 세는 사람》에서 모래알 개수와 같은 매우 큰 수를 표현하는 방법을 소개했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 주요 저서 집필
keyAchievements.description: 《평면의 균형에 대해》, 《원의 측정에 대해》, 《구와 원기둥에 대해》 등 여러 수학 및 과학 저서를 집필했습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스는 언제 어디서 태어났나요?
faq.answer: 아르키메데스는 기원전 287년 무렵 고대 그리스 마그나 그라이키아의 일부였던 시라쿠사에서 태어났습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스는 어떻게 사망했나요?
faq.answer: 기원전 212년 무렵 제2차 포에니 전쟁 중 시라쿠사가 로마에 함락될 때 로마 군인에게 살해당했습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스의 가장 유명한 일화는 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 금관의 순도를 확인하기 위해 불규칙한 물체의 부피 측정 방법을 발견하고 '유레카!'를 외친 일화입니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스의 묘비에는 무엇이 새겨져 있었나요?
faq.answer: 그가 증명한 같은 높이의 원기둥과 구의 부피 관계를 나타내는 그림이 새겨져 있었습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스 나선양수기는 어떤 용도로 사용되었나요?
faq.answer: 속이 빈 긴 원기둥에 나선을 붙여 회전축을 돌려 물을 퍼 올리는 기구로, 선박의 물을 배출하는 데 사용되었습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스 거울은 실제로 사용되었나요?
faq.answer: 2세기 작가 루키아노스는 시라쿠사 공방전에서 로마 전함을 불태웠다고 기록했으나, 실제 사용 여부는 르네상스 시대부터 논란이 있었습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스가 남긴 말 중 '내 원을 건드리지마'는 사실인가요?
faq.answer: 이 말은 후대에 지어낸 것으로, 플루타르코스 영웅전에는 언급되지 않습니다.

faq.question: 아르키메데스의 저작 중 근대에 다시 발견된 것이 있나요?
faq.answer: 1906년 덴마크 수학사학자 하이베르그가 이스탄불에서 《부체에 대하여》 등이 수록된 《수학 정리의 방법》을 발견했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin auta a cikin yara hudu a Torun, Poland
Ya rasa mahaifinsa yana da shekaru goma
Ya shiga Jami'ar Krakow inda ya fara nazarin lissafi da ilimin taurari
Ya kammala karatun lissafi da ilimin taurari a Jami'ar Krakow
Ya bar Jami'ar Krakow ya tafi Bologna, Italiya don shiga sashen ilimin addini
Ya zauna a gidan Domenico Maria Novara, farfesan ilimin taurari a Jami'ar Bologna, kuma ya taimaka wajen lura da taurari
Ya kammala karatun doka na shekaru 4 a Jami'ar Bologna sannan ya yi tafiya zuwa Roma
Ya sami izini daga Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta Warmia a Frombork don yin karatu na karin shekaru 2
Ya shiga shirin likitanci a Jami'ar Padua
Ya sami digirin digirgir a fannin dokokin coci daga Jami'ar Ferrara
Ya koma Warmia kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin memba na majalisar dinkin duniya
Ya lura da kuma yi rikodin babban haduwar duniyoyi a cikin Cancer
Ya fassara 'Letters of Morals, Rustics, and Lovers' na Theophylact zuwa Latin
Ya kammala tsarin asali na tsarin taurari na rana (heliocentric) kuma ya raba 'Commentariolus' ga abokansa
Ya gudanar da ayyukan majalisa a matsayin mai ba da shawara
Bayan mutuwar kawunsa Lucas Watzenrode, ya koma Frauenburg a Gabashin Prussia kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin memba na majalisar coci
An ba shi aikin kula da yankunan Warmia inda ya warware matsalolin manoma
Ya rubuta makala kan yin garambawul ga kudi
Lokacin da Teutonic Knights suka kai hari Frombork, ya yi kokarin kare birnin ta hanyar neman taimako daga Sarkin Poland da abokan aikinsa
Ya halarci taron Majalisar Dokokin Royal Prussia don tattauna sake fasalin kera tsabar azurfa
Bayan mutuwar Akbishop Fabian Luzjanski, mambobin majalisar sun zabe shi a matsayin babban bishop na wucin gadi
Poland da Teutonic Knights sun rattaba hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya ta karshe
Ya fara rubuta 'On the Revolutions of the Heavenly Spheres'
Ya kusa kammala aikin nasa kan tsarin sararin samaniya
Sakataren Paparoma ya bayyana ka'idar Copernicus ga Paparoma da kuma Cardinal
Cardinal Schonberg ya rubuta wasika ga Copernicus yana kwadaitar da shi da ya buga littafinsa
An fara aikin buga 'On the Revolutions of the Heavenly Spheres'
An buga 'De revolutionibus orbium coelestium', sannan ya mutu a ranar 24 ga Mayu bayan ya yi fama da zubar jini a kwakwalwa
An gano kasusuwan da ake kyautata zaton na Copernicus ne a karkashin bagaden Cathedral din Frauenburg
Masana ilimin halitta a Jami'ar Uppsala da ke Sweden sun sanar da cewa DNA na gawar ya yi daidai da DNA na gashin da aka samu a cikin littafinsa
An sake yin jana'iza a Poland kusan shekaru 500 bayan mutuwarsa

keyAchievements.title: 태양중심설 주장
keyAchievements.description: 당시 진리처럼 믿어온 지구중심설의 오류를 지적하고 태양중심설(지동설)을 주장하여 근대 자연과학의 획기적인 전환을 가져왔습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 《짧은 해설서》 발표
keyAchievements.description: 1510년경 태양 중심의 천문체계의 기본적인 틀을 완성하고 그 내용을 담은 원고 형태의 요약본을 지인들에게 돌렸습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 《천구의 회전에 관하여》 출판
keyAchievements.description: 1543년 자신의 우주 모델에 관한 내용을 집대성한 책을 출판하여 태양중심설을 체계적으로 제시했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 코페르니쿠스적 전환
keyAchievements.description: 인간중심의 지구중심설에서 객관적인 입장의 태양중심설로의 발상의 전환을 가져와 중세의 우주관을 폐기시키는 결과를 초래했습니다.

faq.question: 코페르니쿠스는 어떤 인물이었나요?
faq.answer: 폴란드의 로마 가톨릭 성직자 겸 천문학자로, 지구중심설의 오류를 지적하고 태양중심설을 주장하여 근대 자연과학의 획기적인 전환을 가져온 인물입니다.

faq.question: 코페르니쿠스의 태양중심설은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 태양이 우주의 중심에 있으며 지구를 포함한 행성들이 태양 주위를 돈다는 이론으로, 당시의 프톨레마이오스 우주 체계에 정면으로 도전한 주장이었습니다.

faq.question: 코페르니쿠스의 주요 저서는 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 1510년경 지인들에게 돌린 <짧은 해설서>와 1543년 출판된 그의 걸작 《천구의 회전에 관하여(De revolutionibus orbium coelestium)》가 있습니다.

faq.question: 코페르니쿠스의 유해는 어떻게 발견되었나요?
faq.answer: 2005년 플라우엔부르크 대성당 제단 아래에서 유골이 발견되었고, 2008년 DNA 분석을 통해 그의 유해로 확인되었습니다.

faq.question: 코페르니쿠스의 이론은 당시 어떤 반응을 얻었나요?
faq.answer: 《천구의 회전에 관하여》 출판 직후에는 반응이 미약했으나, 시간이 흐르면서 널리 퍼졌고 1616년 로마 가톨릭교회로부터 금서로 지정되기도 했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Florence, a tsakiyar Italiya
An yi masa alkawarin aure da Gemma Donati
Ya auri Gemma Donati
Ya sami ilimi fannoni daban-daban ciki har da ilimin addini a Florence
Ya shiga cikin rikicin bangaranci a kusa da Florence da Pisa
Ya zama shugaban Majalisar Birnin Florence
Ya gama aikinsa a matsayin shugaban Majalisar Birnin Florence
Ya mutu a Ravenna sakamakon zazzabin cizon sauro (Malaria)

keyAchievements.title: 《신곡》
keyAchievements.description: 단테의 가장 유명한 작품으로, 기독교 사상에 기반한 이야기이며 근세 문학을 낳게 하였다.

keyAchievements.title: 《새로운 삶》
keyAchievements.description: 베아트리체에 대한 사랑을 다룬 작품으로, 이탈리아어로 된 최초의 중요한 문헌이다.

keyAchievements.title: <토착어에 대하여>
keyAchievements.description: 이탈리아의 토착어를 언어학적으로 분석한 최초의 작품이며, 언어로 말미암은 이탈리아의 통일을 최초로 언급한 책이다.

faq.question: 단테의 본명은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 본명은 두란테 델리 알리기에리(Durante degli Alighieri)이며, 단테는 그의 약칭입니다.

faq.question: 단테의 가장 유명한 작품은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 가장 유명한 작품은 《신곡》이며, 이 작품은 기독교 사상에 기반한 이야기로 근세 문학을 낳게 하였습니다.

faq.question: 단테는 왜 망명 생활을 하게 되었나요?
faq.answer: 흑당이 교황 보니파시오 8세의 야심을 이용하여 백당을 패배시키고 단테를 추방했기 때문입니다.

faq.question: 단테는 왜 라틴어 대신 이탈리아어로 작품을 썼나요?
faq.answer: 《신곡》에 담긴 중세적인 카타르시스와 구원의 메시지를 일반 대중들에게 널리 알리려는 뜻이었습니다.

dante-alighieri.missingDataNote: 베아트리체를 처음 만난 해, 단테의 망명 시작 연도, 단테에게 사형이 선고된 궐석 재판의 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Mainz.
Jama'a sun kori mahaifin Gutenberg kuma ya nemi mafaka a Strasbourg.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Gutenberg shi ma ya koma Strasbourg.
Ya yi amfani da fasahar buga takardu ta karafa.
Ya koma Mainz.
Ya yi nasarar buga rubutu da karafa sannan ya bude gidan buga takardu a Mainz.
Bayan ya inganta shi zuwa karami kuma ci gaban nau'in haruffa, ya buga Tsohon Alkawari na layi 42 sau biyu.
Ya buga 'Biblia Sacra' mai layi 42 a kowane shafi.
Fust ya shigar da kara kan Akbishop na Mainz.
An buga 'Mainz Psalter' a gidan buga takardu na Fust-Schoeffer.
Ya mutu.

keyAchievements.title: 금속 활판 인쇄술 사용
keyAchievements.description: 약 1440년 경에 금속 활판 인쇄술을 사용한 독일의 금(金) 세공업자이다.

keyAchievements.title: 활자 설계 및 대량 생산 기술 전파
keyAchievements.description: 활자 설계, 활자 대량 생산 기술을 유럽에 전파하였다.

keyAchievements.title: 인쇄 기술 결합
keyAchievements.description: 금속 활판 인쇄 기술과 유성 잉크, 목판 인쇄기 사용을 결합하였다.

keyAchievements.title: 활자 제작 재료 및 방식 채용
keyAchievements.description: 활자 제작 재료로 합금을 사용하고, 주조 방식을 채용하였다.

keyAchievements.title: 구텐베르크 성서 인쇄
keyAchievements.description: 고딕 활자를 사용하여 최초로 36행의 라틴어 성서인 <구텐베르크 성서>를 인쇄하였다.

keyAchievements.title: 42행 구약 성서 인쇄
keyAchievements.description: 1453년경 활자를 개량한 후, 2회에 걸쳐 42행의 구약 성서를 인쇄하여 우수한 인쇄 품질로 호평받았다.

keyAchievements.title: 《비블리아 사크라Biblia Sacra》 인쇄
keyAchievements.description: 1455년 각 페이지에 42행이 들어가는 《비블리아 사크라Biblia Sacra》를 인쇄하였다.

faq.question: 구텐베르크의 본명은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 본명은 요하네스 겐스플라이시이며, 구텐베르크는 통칭입니다.

faq.question: 구텐베르크는 언제 태어났나요?
faq.answer: 구텐베르크는 1397년 아니면 1398년에 마인츠에서 태어난 것으로 알려집니다.

faq.question: 구텐베르크의 주요 업적은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 주요 업적은 활자 설계, 활자 대량 생산 기술을 유럽에 전파하고, 이 기술과 유성 잉크, 목판 인쇄기 사용을 결합한 것입니다.

faq.question: 구텐베르크는 어떤 책을 인쇄했나요?
faq.answer: 그는 가톨릭교회의 면죄부, 최초의 36행 라틴어 성서인 <구텐베르크 성서>, 그리고 1455년에는 42행의 《비블리아 사크라Biblia Sacra》 등을 인쇄했습니다.

faq.question: 구텐베르크의 인쇄술이 인류사에 미친 영향은 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 발명은 유럽 전역에 책이 대량으로 퍼지게 하여 정보 혁명을 일으켰고, 르네상스, 종교개혁, 인본주의 운동의 밑거름이 되었습니다.

timeline.event: Ya raba sinadaran tartaric acid, inda ya gano bambancin siffar kwayoyin halitta wanda ya aza harsashin ilimin kimiyyar stereochemistry.
Ya yi shahararren gwajin 'swan-neck flask' wanda ya karyata ka'idar cewa kwayoyin halitta na tsiro da kansu.
Ya mallaki haƙƙin mallakar fasahar pasteurization, wanda ke lalata ƙwayoyin cuta masu illa don hana lalacewar ruwan inabi da madara.
Ya yi nasarar ƙirƙira da kuma gwada allurar riga-kafin cutar antrax ta amfani da kwayoyin cutar da aka raunana.
Ya yi allurar riga-kafin ciwon hauka na farko da aka yi wa dan adam cikin nasara, inda ya yi wa yaro dan shekara 9, Joseph Meister, allurar.
An haife shi a matsayin dan wani dangi mai arziki kuma mai fada a ji a Florence, Italiya, a lokacin kololuwar lokacin Renaissance.
An nada shi a matsayin Sakatare na Biyu a Jamhuriyar Florence, inda yake lura da harkokin diflomasiyya da na soja.
Lokacin da dangin Medici suka sake karbe mulki, an kore shi daga mukaminsa, kuma an daure shi na dan lokaci tare da azabtar da shi.
Yayin da yake gudun hijira, ya rubuta 'The Prince', muhimmin kasida kan karfin siyasa da mulki.
An buga 'Discourses on Livy', wanda ke nuna zurfin ra'ayinsa kan siyasance a matsayin mai goyon bayan tsarin jamhuriya, bayan mutuwarsa.
An haife shi a matsayin François-Marie Arouet a Paris, kuma daga baya ya dauki sunan alkalami Voltaire.
An daure shi a gidan yarin Bastille na tsawon watanni 11 saboda rubuta wakokin ban dariya da ke yi wa gwamnatin Faransa ba'a.
Ya buga 'Philosophical Letters', wanda ya yada falsafar Ingilishi kuma ya haifar da babbar adawa a cikin Faransa.
Ya buga 'Candide', babban littafinsa wanda ke jefa dariya don sukar kyakkyawan zato a falsafa.
Ya zama jigo a yakin neman hakurin addini inda ya fara fafutukar wanke Jean Calas daga zargin da ake masa.
An haife shi a Edinburgh, Scotland, a cikin iyali da ke mayar da hankali kan iya magana da gyaran lafazi.
Ya kafa makarantar horar da malamai ga kurame a Boston wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan bincikensa kan sauti.
Ya sami haƙƙin mallakar fasahar tarho inda ya yi nasarar watsa muryar ɗan adam a bayyane a karon farko.
Ya zama daya daga cikin wadanda suka kafa kungiyar National Geographic Society, wadda daga baya ya shugabanta.
Ya mutu a Nova Scotia; an yi shiru ga dukkan wayoyin tarho a Arewacin Amurka na tsawon minti daya domin nuna girmamawa a gare shi.
Ta dauki darasin tuki jirgin sama na farko, sannan ta sayi jirginta na farko, Kinner Airster.
Ta samu daukaka a duniya a matsayin macen farko da ta ketare tekun Atlantika a matsayin fasinja.
Ta zama macen farko da ta yi nasarar tuka jirgi ita kadai ba tare da tsayawa ba ta ketare tekun Atlantika.
Ta zama mutum na farko da ya yi tuki shi kadai daga Hawaii zuwa babban yankin Amurka.
Ta bace a tsakiyar tekun Pasifik a lokacin da take kokarin kewaye duniya da jirgin sama.
Ya yi hijira daga Scotland zuwa Amurka tare da iyalinsa, suka zauna a Allegheny, Pennsylvania.
Ya bar kamfanin jirgin kasa na Pennsylvania don mai da hankali wajen saka hannun jari a masana'antar kera karafa da ke bunkasa.
Ya buga makala mai tasiri mai taken 'Gospel of Wealth', inda ya bukaci masu arziki da su yi amfani da dukiyarsu wajen ciyar da al'umma gaba.
Ya kafa kamfanin karafa na Carnegie wanda ya samar da babbar daular masana'antu da ke iko da kera karafa a Amurka.
Ya sayar da kamfaninsa na karafa ga J.P. Morgan a kan dalar Amurka miliyan 480 kuma ya zama cikakken mai taimakon jama'a.
An haife shi a Boston, Massachusetts, kuma ya zama maraya da wuri inda dangin Allan suka rike shi.
Ya buga littafinsa na farko na wakoki 'Tamerlane and Other Poems' da sunan alkalami 'A Bostonian'.
Ya fitar da 'The Murders in the Rue Morgue', wanda aka fi sani da littafin labarin binciken kwakwaf na zamani na farko.
Ya buga wakarsa mai taken 'The Raven', wadda ta ba shi nasara nan take a fagen adabi da kuma yabo mai fadi.
Ya mutu a asirce a Baltimore yana da shekaru 40 a duniya a yanayin da ba a iya fassara shi ba har yau.
An haife shi a Oak Park, Illinois.
Ya yi makarantar sakandare a Oak Park and River Forest High School.
Ya rubuta makalarsa ta farko a jaridar makarantar 'The Trapeze'.
A matsayinsa na direban motar asibitin sojoji a Italiya, ya sami rauni sosai sakamakon harin bam, sannan aka ba shi lambar yabo ta Silver Star Medal.
Ya koma Amurka kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin mai rubutu mai zaman kansa kuma ma'aikacin marubuta a 'Toronto Star Weekly'.
Ya auri Hadley Richardson kuma ya koma Paris, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin wakilin waje na 'Toronto Star'.
Ya hadu da Ezra Pound a shagon sayar da littattafai na Sylvia Beach na 'Shakespeare and Company'.
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko 'Three Stories and Ten Poems' kuma an haifi dansa Jack Hemingway.
Ya wallafa 'In Our Time' kuma ya sadu da F. Scott Fitzgerald.
Ya buga littafinsa na farko 'The Sun Also Rises'.
Ya saki Hadley Richardson, ya auri Pauline Pfeiffer, sannan ya buga gajerun labaru na 'Men Without Women'.
An haifi dansa Patrick, kuma ya sami labarin mutuwar mahaifinsa ta hanyar kashe kansa.
Ya buga littafinsa 'A Farewell to Arms'.
Daman hannunsa ya karye a wani hatsarin mota.
An haifi dansa na uku, Gregory Hemingway.
Ya tafi yawon bude ido (safari) a Kenya da Pauline.
Ya sayi jirgin kamun kifi mai suna Pilar.
Ya buga 'Green Hills of Africa'.
Ya tafi Spain don ruwaito labaran Yakin Basasar Spain a madadin NANA (North American Newspaper Alliance), kuma ya buga 'To Have and Have Not'.
Ya fara zama a Otal din Ambos Mundos a Havana, Cuba.
Ya auri Martha Gellhorn kuma ya buga 'For Whom the Bell Tolls'.
Ya tafi kasar Sin tare da Martha.
Ya zauna a Landan da wasu sassan Turai, kuma ya kasance dan jarida yayin taron Normandy da kuma yakin 'yantar da Paris.
Ya saki Martha Gellhorn.
Ya auri Mary Welsh.
An ba shi kyautar lambar yabo ta Bronze Star sakamakon jarumtakarsa a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.
Ya buga 'Across the River and into the Trees'.
Ya lashe Kyautar Pulitzer kan 'The Old Man and the Sea' kuma ya yi tafiyarsa ta biyu zuwa Afirka.
Ya tsira daga hatsarin jiragen sama guda biyu a Afirka kuma ya lashe Kyautar Nobel kan Adabi.
Ya bar Cuba sannan ya sayi gida a wajen Ketchum, Idaho.
Ya tashi daga Cuba zuwa New York inda aka kwantar da shi a Asibitin Mayo Clinic.
Bayan ya fito daga asibitin Mayo Clinic, ya koma Ketchum, kuma a ranar 2 ga Yuli, ya kashe kansa da bindiga (shotgun).

keyAchievements.title: 문체 혁신
keyAchievements.description: 빙산 이론이라 불리는 간결하고 절제된 표현 방식으로 20세기 소설에 강한 영향을 미쳤습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 노벨 문학상 수상
keyAchievements.description: 1954년에 노벨 문학상을 수상했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 퓰리처상 수상
keyAchievements.description: 1952년 《노인과 바다》로 퓰리처상을 수상했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 주요 작품 출판
keyAchievements.description: 《태양은 다시 떠오른다》(1926), 《무기여 잘 있거라》(1929), 《누구를 위하여 종은 울리나》(1940), 《노인과 바다》(1951) 등 다수의 대표작을 출판했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 동성훈장 수상
keyAchievements.description: 1947년 제2차 세계 대전 중의 용맹함을 인정받아 동성훈장을 수상했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: 문학적 영향
keyAchievements.description: 미국 문학의 전반적인 문체에 큰 영향을 끼쳤으며, 2012년 시카고 문학 명예의 전당에 헌액되었습니다.

faq.question: 어니스트 헤밍웨이의 대표적인 문체는 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 헤밍웨이는 '빙산 이론'이라 불리는 간결하고 절제된 표현 방식을 사용하여 20세기 소설에 큰 영향을 미쳤습니다.

faq.question: 헤밍웨이는 언제 노벨 문학상을 수상했나요?
faq.answer: 헤밍웨이는 1954년에 노벨 문학상을 수상했습니다.

faq.question: 헤밍웨이의 주요 작품으로는 어떤 것들이 있나요?
faq.answer: 그의 주요 작품으로는 《태양은 다시 떠오른다》, 《무기여 잘 있거라》, 《누구를 위하여 종은 울리나》, 《노인과 바다》 등이 있습니다.

faq.question: 헤밍웨이는 어떻게 생을 마감했나요?
faq.answer: 1961년 7월 2일, 아이다호주 케첨에서 산탄총으로 스스로 목숨을 끊었습니다.

faq.question: 헤밍웨이 작품의 주요 주제는 무엇인가요?
faq.answer: 그의 작품에는 사랑, 전쟁, 황야, 패배가 주요 주제로 등장하며, 자연은 부활과 휴식의 장소로 묘사됩니다.

timeline.event: Ya kammala karatu a Jami'ar Harvard kuma ya fara abota ta rayuwa tare da abokin ra'ayinsa (transcendentalist) Ralph Waldo Emerson.
Ya koma wani karamin gida da ya gina da kansa a kusa da Tafkin Walden, inda ya fara gwajin rayuwa mai sauki na tsawon shekaru 2.
Ya kwashe dare guda a kurkuku saboda kin biyan harajin kanshi don nuna rashin amincewa da bautar da yaran mutane da kuma yakin Mexico da Amurka.
Ya buga kasidarsa ta 'Civil Disobedience', wadda ke bayyana falsafarsa game da yin tsayin daka ba tare da tashin hankali ba a kan gwamnati mara adalci.
Ya buga babban littafinsa 'Walden', wanda ya kunshi tunani kan saukin rayuwa a cikin dabi'a (nature).
Ya kulla haɗin gwiwa da Anthony Drexel kuma ya kafa Drexel, Morgan & Co., wanda ya gabaci J.P. Morgan & Co.
Ya jagoranci haɗewar Edison General Electric da Thomson-Houston Electric Company don kafa General Electric.
Ya jagoranci wata ƙungiya don samar da oza miliyan 3.5 na zinariya ga Baitulmalin Amurka, don daidaita tattalin arziki.
Ya sayi kamfanin Andrew Carnegie kuma ya kafa United States Steel Corporation (US Steel), kamfanin farko na dala biliyan a duniya.
Ya jagoranci ceton kuɗi ga manyan cibiyoyi da yawa don hana rikicin kuɗi na 1907.
An haife shi a Boston, Massachusetts, a cikin dangin limaman Unitarian.
Ya buga makalarsa ta farko, 'Nature,' wacce ta kafa tsarin falsafar Amurka na Transcendentalism.
Ya gabatar da jawabin 'The American Scholar,' inda ya yi kira mai shahara don neman yancin ilimi daga Turai.
Ya buga 'Essays: First Series,' wanda ya ƙunshi makala mai tasiri 'Self-Reliance.'
Ya fito a matsayin fitaccen mai jawabi na adawa da bauta, yana gabatar da laccoci sosai don ƙungiyar kawar da bauta.
Ta haɗu da Elizabeth Cady Stanton, wanda ya haifar da haɗin gwiwa mai karfi da ɗorewa a ƙungiyar yancin mata.
Ta kafa National Woman Suffrage Association (NWSA), wacce aka sadaukar don tabbatar da gyaran tsarin mulki don ba mata yancin yin zaɓe.
An kama ta saboda jefa ƙuri'a a zaben shugaban kasa a Rochester, New York, don gwada Kwaskwarima na 14.
Ta fara buga jerin littattafan 'History of Woman Suffrage' tare da Stanton da Matilda Joslyn Gage.
Shekaru 14 bayan mutuwarta, an amince da Kwaskwarima na 19, wanda ya ba mata yancin yin zaɓe, kuma aka fi sani da Kwaskwarimar Susan B. Anthony.
An haife shi na biyu a cikin yara tara a cikin dangin masu aiki a West Hills, New York.
Ya buga bugu na farko na 'Leaves of Grass' da kudinsa, wanda ya canza yanayin waƙoƙin Amurka sosai.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Washington D.C. don kula da ɗan'uwansa da ya ji rauni, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin jinya na sa kai a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa.
Ya buga 'Drum-Taps,' tarin waƙoƙi masu taɓa zuciya waɗanda ke nuna abubuwan da ya gani a Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka.
Ya shirya bugu na ƙarshe (deathbed edition) na 'Leaves of Grass' kafin ya mutu a Camden, New Jersey.
An haife shi a Kiel, Holstein.
Ya shaida tafiyar sojojin Prussia da Ostiriya a Kiel yayin Yaƙin Schleswig na Biyu.
Iyalinsa sun koma Munich, kuma ya shiga Makarantar Maximilian.
Ya fara karatunsa a Jami'ar Munich.
Ya yi karatu a Jami'ar Friedrich Wilhelm da ke Berlin na tsawon shekara ɗaya.
Ya kare takardar shaidar digirin digirgir ɗin sa (Ph.D.) mai taken 'Game da Dokar Thermodynamics ta Biyu.'
Ya sami Habilitation ta hanyar buga takardar Habilitation 'Equilibrium states of isotropic bodies at different temperatures.'
An naɗa shi a matsayin mataimakin farfesa na theoretical physics a Jami'ar Kiel.
Ya auri Marie Merck.
An naɗa shi a matsayin magajin Kirchhoff a Jami'ar Friedrich-Wilhelms ta Berlin.
Ya zama cikakken farfesa.
Ya karkata hankalinsa kan matsalar black-body radiation.
Ya buga 'Treatise on Thermodynamics.'
Ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa Ƙungiyar Masana Physics ta Jamus (DPG).
Ya gabatar da sabon ƙirƙira na dokar Planck's black-body radiation, wanda ya haɗa da tsinkayen ƙididdigar makamashi (energy quantization).
Ya zama shugaban Ƙungiyar Masana Physics ta Jamus (DPG) (har zuwa 1909).
Matarsa ta farko, Marie Planck, ta mutu.
Ya auri matarsa ta biyu, Marga von Hoesslin.
Ya yi nasarar kawo Einstein zuwa Berlin ta hanyar ƙirƙirar masa sabon matsayin farfesa.
Babban ɗansa, Karl, ya mutu a Yaƙin Verdun.
Diyarsa, Grete, ta mutu tana haihuwar ɗanta na fari.
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel a Physics saboda gano quanta na makamashi (an bayar da shi ne a 1919).
Diyarsa, Emma, ta mutu.
Tare da Fritz Haber, ya kafa Notgemeinschaft der Deutschen Wissenschaft (Ƙungiyar Taimakon Gaggawa ta Kimiyyar Jamus).
Ya yi ritaya daga Berlin, kuma Erwin Schrödinger ya gaje shi.
Ya zama shugaban Ƙungiyar Kaiser Wilhelm (KWG).
Yana da shekaru 74 a lokacin da 'yan Nazi suka hau mulki, kuma ya tattauna batun kula da farfesoshi na Yahudawa tare da Hitler.
Wa'adinsa na shugabancin Ƙungiyar Kaiser Wilhelm (KWG) ya ƙare.
Ya cika shekaru 80 da haihuwa, kuma ya yi murabus daga shugabancin Cibiyar Ilimi ta Prussian a lokacin da 'yan Nazi suka karbe ta.
Gidansa da ke Berlin ya lalace sakamakon harin bama-bamai daga sama, wanda ya haifar da asarar dukkan bayanan kimiyya da wasiƙunsa.
An kashe ɗansa, Erwin, saboda shiga cikin yunkurin kisan Hitler.
Ya mutu a Göttingen.
An canza sunan Ƙungiyar Kaiser Wilhelm zuwa Ƙungiyar Max Planck (MPG).

keyAchievements.title: Gano Quanta na Makamashi
keyAchievements.description: Ya lashe kyautar Nobel a Physics a shekarar 1918 don gano quanta na makamashi, wanda ya canza fahimtar tsarin atomic da subatomic.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Ka'idar Quantum
keyAchievements.description: Shahararsa a matsayin masanin kimiyyar physics tana da nasaba ne da rawar da ya taka a matsayin wanda ya kirkiro ka'idar quantum, wani ra'ayi ne na juyin juya hali wanda ya ci karo da classical physics.

keyAchievements.title: Dokar Planck's Black-Body Radiation
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar nazarinsa kan matsalar black-body radiation, ya samo dokar Planck's black-body radiation wacce ke bayyana ainihin abin da aka gani ta hanyar gwaji na tsarin black-body spectrum.

keyAchievements.title: Planck Constant (h)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da Planck constant (h) ta hanyar hasashen cewa makamashin electromagnetic yana fita ne kawai a cikin yanayin ƙididdigewa, yana aza harsashin ka'idar quantum.

keyAchievements.title: Fahimtar Farko da Gudummawa ga Ka'idar Relativity
keyAchievements.description: Yana daga cikin mutane kalilan da suka gane muhimmancin ka'idar special relativity ta Albert Einstein nan take, kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen sake tsara ka'idar.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabancin Cibiyoyin Kimiyyar Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban Kungiyar Masana Physics ta Jamus (DPG) da shugaban Kungiyar Kaiser Wilhelm (KWG), yana rike da manyan mukamai a fagen kimiyyar Jamus.

faq.question: Wane muhimmin gano na kimiyya Max Planck ya yi?
faq.answer: Max Planck ya gano quanta na makamashi kuma ya kafa ka'idar quantum, wanda ya kawo juyin juya hali ga fahimtar tsarin atomic da subatomic.

faq.question: Yaushe Max Planck ya lashe Kyautar Nobel ta Physics?
faq.answer: Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta Physics a shekarar 1918 don gano quanta na makamashi, kodayake an ba shi a zahiri a shekarar 1919.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Max Planck ya ɗauka game da gwamnatin Nazi?
faq.answer: Ya yi kokarin taimakawa abokan aikinsa Yahudawa da kuma kare yancin kimiyya, ya tattauna yadda ake kula da farfesoshi na Yahudawa tare da Hitler, kuma ya yi murabus daga shugabancin Cibiyar Prussian don nuna adawa da 'yan Nazi.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Max Planck game da addini?
faq.answer: Shi ɗan darikar Lutheran na Jamus ne, kuma ya yi imani da Allah mai iko da komai, masani, kuma mai jin ƙai (kodayake ba lallai ba ne a matsayin allahntaka na mutum ba), kuma ya gani cewa duka kimiyya da addini suna da buri daya: 'Zuwa ga Allah!'

timeline.event: An haife ta a Alexandria, a matsayin diyar Theon, masanin falsafa da lissafi (geometer).
Masu zanga-zanga na Kiristoci sun kashe ta kuma sun lalata gawarta.

keyAchievements.title: Littafi game da lissafin taurari na Diophantus
keyAchievements.description: An gano sashi na littafinta a dakin karatu na Vatican kusan karni na 15.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin littafin "Arithmetica" na Diophantus
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiyasta shi a matsayin babban aikin bincike domin ta shigar da sababbin hanyoyin warwarewa da kuma tambayoyi da dama ban da na Diophantus.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Conics" na Apollonius
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin "Conics" na Apollonius.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Almagest" na Ptolemy
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin babban littafin Ptolemy "Almagest".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta Theon.

faq.question: Wace ce Hypatia?
faq.answer: Hypatia ta kasance shahararriyar mace masaniyar falsafa ta Neoplatonism da kuma masaniyar lissafi na kasar Greek da ta yi aiki a Alexandria, tsohuwar kasar Egypt.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Hypatia?
faq.answer: Ta rubuta bayanai kan "Arithmetica" na Diophantus, "Conics" na Apollonius, da "Almagest" na Ptolemy, kuma ta rubuta bayanin "Elements" na Euclid tare da mahaifinta Theon.

faq.question: Yaya Hypatia ta mutu?
faq.answer: Masu zanga-zanga na Kiristoci sun kashe ta kuma sun lalata gawarta baada da aka kalle ta a matsayin mai adawa da Archbishop Cyril.

faq.question: Wane ne mahaifin Hypatia?
faq.answer: An haifi Hypatia a matsayin diyar Theon, masanin falsafa da lissafi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Basra, a Iraki ta yanzu, a lokacin Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci.
Ya yi ikirarin hauka don kauce wa fushin Halifa Fatimid bayan ya gaza shawo kan ambaliyar kogin Nilu.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa, 'The Book of Optics' (Kitab al-Manazir), wanda ya yi tasiri matuka kan fahimtar kimiyya game da haske.
Ya rubuta muhimman ayyuka kan ilimin taurari da lissafi wanda ya kalubalanci tsarin Ptolemy.
Ya mutu a Alkahira, ya bar tarihi a matsayin uban kimiyyar haske (optics) na zamani kuma jagora a tsarin kimiya (scientific methodology).
An haife shi a matsayin dan Etienne Pascal, jami'in haraji na Rouen, a Clermont-Ferrand, Faransa.
Ya gano da kansa cewa jimillar kusurwoyin ciki na triangle ya kai digiri 180.
Ya gano Pascal's triangle.
Ya shiga taron mako-mako na kungiyar masana lissafi na Faransa.
Ya tabbatar da Pascal's theorem, wando ya zama harsashin projective geometry.
Ya samar da propositions 400 ta amfani da Pascal's theorem.
Ya kera calculator ta farko, wato Pascaline.
Ya kafa Pascal's law wando ya zama harsashin hydrostatics ta hanyar gwaji da mercury column.
Ya gudanar da gwaje-gwajen vacuum ta amfani da bututu daban-daban a Rouen.
Masu kimiyya da dama ciki har da Mersenne sun gudanar da gwaje-gwajensa a Paris.
Ya wallafa "Discours sur le vide" (Kalamai kan vacuum).
Ya bar Rouen ya koma Paris saboda lalacewar lafiyarsa.
Ya yi jayayya da Descartes game da wanzuwar vacuum.
Ya rubuta kasida "Experiences nouvelles touchant le vide" (Sababbin gwaje-gwaje kan vacuum).
Ya gudanar da 'gwajin Pascal' don lura da canjin tsawo na mercury column bisa ga tsayi a Dutsen Puy de Dôme.
Ya rubuta kasida don tsara sakamakon gwajin Dutsen Puy de Dôme.
Ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya don mayar da hankali kan addini.
Ya bayyana dokar matsa lamba (Pascal's principle) a cikin "Treatise on the Equilibrium of Liquids".
Hatsarin motar dawakai (carriage accident) ya faru.
Ya rubuta bayanin imani baada ya ce ya ji murya daga sama, kuma ya nutse cikin ilimin addinin Kiristanci.
Ya fuskanci wahala ta hankali sakamakon yawan ciwon kai.
Ya ba da gidansa ga talakawa da suka kamu da smallpox kuma ya koma gidan yayarsa don zama.
Ya rasu sakamakon seizure.
Périer ya wallafa "Treatise on the Equilibrium of Liquids" baada rasuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's triangle
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne tsarin binomial coefficients a cikin siffar triangle a fannin lissafi.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's theorem
keyAchievements.description: Wannan theorem ne wando ya zama harsashin projective geometry, kuma ya tabbatar da shi yana da shekaru 16.

keyAchievements.title: Pascaline (Pascal's calculator)
keyAchievements.description: Wannan ita ce calculator ta farko a duniya da ya kera ta yana da shekaru 19, kuma tana iya yin tara da ragewa.

keyAchievements.title: Pascal's law (Pascal's principle)
keyAchievements.description: Doka ce da ke cewa idan aka kaddamar da matsa lamba ga sashi na fluid da ba ya motsi a cikin akwati da aka rufe, wannan matsa lamba yana tafiya ko'ina a cikin fluid din da karfi daya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin probability theory
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin probability theory tare da Pierre de Fermat ta hanyar musayar wasiku.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken cycloid
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga ci gaban lissafi ta hanyar bincikar cycloid don mantawa da ciwon kansa na kai.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Pensées"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne littafinsa da bai kammala ba wando ke kunshe da kariya ga addinin Kiristanci, kuma yana dauke da shahararriyar kalma "Mutum ciyawa ce mai tunani".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Lettres provinciales" (Provincial Letters)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ya rubuta don kare limaman Jansenist da Jesuits ke tsananta musu, kuma ana daukar sa a matsayin farkon adabin prose na zamani na Faransa.

faq.question: Wane ne Blaise Pascal?
faq.answer: Shi masanin halayyar dan adam ne na kasar Faransa, masanin lissafi, masanin kimiyya, masanin addini, masanin physics, mai kera injina, marubuci, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kididdiga, kuma musamman ya sadaukar da lokaci mai yawa ga falsafa da ilimin addini.

faq.question: Menene Pascaline (Pascal's calculator)?
faq.answer: Ita ce calculator ta farko a duniya da ya kera ta yana da shekaru 19 don taimaka wa mahaifinsa wando yake mai kula da akawu (accountant), kuma tana iya yin tara da ragewa kawai.

faq.question: Menene Pascal's principle?
faq.answer: Doka ce da ke cewa idan aka kaddamar da matsa lamba ga sashi na fluid da ba ya motsi a cikin akwati da aka rufe, wannan matsa lamba yana tafiya ko'ina a cikin fluid din da karfi daya.

faq.question: Menene shahararriyar magana ta Pascal?
faq.answer: Ya bar shahararriyar magana cewa "Mutum ciyawa ce mai tunani".

faq.question: Me yasa Pascal ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya?
faq.answer: Ya daina binciken lissafi da kimiyya domin ya mayar da hankali sosai kan addini yana da shekaru 27.

timeline.event: An haife shi auta a cikin babban iyali a Tobolsk, Siberiya.
Ya kammala digirin kimiyya daga Main Pedagogical Institute a Saint Petersburg.
Ya gabatar da Tsarin Lokaci na abubuwa (Periodic Law of elements) ga Kungiyar Masana Kimiyya ta Rasha, inda ya kirkiro Jadawalin Tsarin Lokaci (Periodic Table) na farko.
Don cike gibin da ke cikin jadawalin, ya yi hasashen kasancewa da kaddarorin abubuwan da ba a gano ba kamar su gallium da germanium daidai.
An naɗa shi Darakta na Ma'auni da Sikeli (Weights and Measures) na Rasha, kuma ya daidaita tsarin auna na Rasha.
An haife ta da sunan Augusta Ada Byron a Landan, 'ya ɗaya tilo halacciya ga mawaƙi George Gordon Byron.
An gabatar da ita ga Charles Babbage, fitaccen masani, kuma ta yi matukar sha'awar injinsa na lissafi.
Ta fara fassara takardar wani injiniyan Italiya game da Injin Bincike (Analytical Engine) wanda Babbage ya tsara.
Ta buga fassarar tare da ƙarin bayanai masu yawa, waɗanda ake ganin su ne algorithm na farko na kwamfuta.
Ta mutu sakamakon cutar kansa ta mahaifa tana da shekaru 36, ta bar tarihi a matsayin mai tsara shirye-shiryen kwamfuta na farko a duniya.
An haife shi a ranar 23 ga Yuni
Ya fara karatun lissafi a Jami'ar Cambridge
Ya halarci darussan masanin kimiyyar physics Eddington kan tsarin kimiya kuma ya tabbatar da Central Limit Theorem
Ya bayar da hujjojin korewa ga matsalar Entscheidungsproblem (decision problem) sannan ya tafi Jami'ar Princeton
Ya kammala karatunsa a Jami'ar Princeton kuma ya koma Cambridge
Ya shiga Sashen Rubutun Sirri (GCCS) lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu kuma ya fara nazarin cryptography
Ya ƙirƙiro Injin Turing; a ranar 1 ga Oktoba, ya tura gaba don ƙirƙirar sashin lissafi a Cibiyar Kula da Kimiyyar Physics (NPL) don yin injin ƙirga na lantarki
Ya sami lambar yabo ta Order of the British Empire (OBE) mataki na 4
Ya buga takarda a jaridar falsafa ta 'Mind' kan taken 'Shin injuna za su iya tunani?'
'Yan sandan Burtaniya sun kama shi bisa zargin luwadi kuma an same shi da laifi
Ya buga takarda kan Zeta function
Ya mutu saboda gubar potassium cyanide a ranar 7 ga Yuni
Sarauniya Elizabeth ta II ta yafe wa Turing laifin luwadi a ranar 24 ga Disamba

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Injin Turing
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa qa'idodin algorithm da ƙididdiga ta hanyar wani ƙirar ƙima da ake kira Injin Turing, wanda ya ba da babbar gudummawa ga ci gaban kimiyyar kwamfuta.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Gwajin Turing
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami gagarumar nasara ta hanyar ba da shawarar gwaji wanda ke tantance yadda martanin inji ya zama irin na ɗan adam, tare da tambayar 'Shin yana yiwuwa inji ya yi tunani?'

keyAchievements.title: Fassara Sirrin Enigma
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, ya yi nasarar warware bayanan sirri na sojojin Jamus ta hanyar gabatar da na'urar fassarar sirri da ake kira Bombe.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Central Limit Theorem
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da wannan a cikin 1933 ba tare da sanin cewa masanin lissafi na ƙasar Finland Jarl Waldemar Lindeberg ya riga ya tabbatar da shi a shekarar 1922 ba.

keyAchievements.title: Hujjar Korewa ga Matsalar Entscheidungsproblem
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da hujjojin korewa ga matsalar Entscheidungsproblem (decision problem) a cikin 1936.

faq.question: A wane fanni ne Alan Turing ya zama jagora?
faq.answer: Shi masanin kimiyyar kwamfuta ne, masanin lissafi, masanin rubutun sirri (cryptographer), kuma masanin dabaru (logician) na kasar Ingila wanda yake jigo ne a fagen kimiyyar kwamfuta.

faq.question: Don girmama me aka kafa Kyautar Turing?
faq.answer: Kyauta ce ta shekara-shekara da ACM ke bayarwa ga masu bayar da gagarumar gudummawa a kimiyyar kwamfuta, kuma an kafa ta a cikin 1966 don girmama gudummawar Turing.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Alan Turing 'Uban Kimiyyar Kwamfuta'?
faq.answer: Ana kiransa 'Uban Kimiyyar Kwamfuta' saboda gudummawar da ya bayar ga tsarin ka'idar kimiyyar kwamfuta da basirar wucin gadi (AI).

faq.question: Yaushe aka yafe wa Alan Turing laifin luwadi?
faq.answer: Sarauniya Elizabeth ta II ta yafe wa Turing laifin luwadi a ranar 24 ga Disamba, 2013, shekaru 59 bayan mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Landan, inda ya nuna tsananin sha'awar ilimin lissafi tun yana ƙarami.
Ya ba da shawarar gina Injin Difference Engine don sarrafa ƙididdigar ilimin taurari da teburin lissafi a matsayin inji.
An nada shi a matsayin Lucasian Professor na Mathematics a Jami'ar Cambridge.
Ya ƙirƙiro Injin Bincike (Analytical Engine), wani tsari mai kawo canji wanda ya ba da damar gina injin kwamfuta na zamani wanda za'a iya tsara masa aiki.
Ya mutu a Landan ya bar injinsa na lissafi na farko bai kammalu ba, amma ya aza harsashin tsarin kirkirar kwamfuta na zamani.
An haife shi a Afshana, kusa da Bukhara, ɗa ne ga Abdullah ibn al-Hasan, mai tara haraji na Daular Samanid, da matarsa Sitara.
Iyalinsa sun koma Bukhara lokacin da yake da shekaru biyar, kuma ya shiga wata makaranta mai zaman kanta a Bukhara.
Ya iya haddace ayyukan adabin Larabawa da yawa da kuma Alkur'ani lokacin yana da shekaru goma kacal.
Ya fara duba marasa lafiya lokacin yana da shekaru goma sha shida.
Ya yi karatun kansa tun yana da shekaru goma sha takwas, kuma ya fahimci Falsafar Aristotle ta hanyar sharhin al-Farabi.
Ya rubuta littafinsa na farko, 'Tarin Ilimi Daban-daban' (Compendium of Sciences), ga makwabcinsa al-Aruzi, a lokacin yana da shekaru goma sha takwas.
Daular Samanid ta faɗi bayan hare-haren da Daular Ghaznavid da Daular Karakhanid suka kaddamar.
Mahaifinsa, Abdullah, ya mutu.
Ya rubuta kundin sani (encyclopedia) mai juzu'i 20 na 'The Book of Fair Judgment' ga masanin shari'a al-Barqi lokacin yana ɗan shekara ashirin da ɗaya.
Ya bar Bukhara ya fara tafiye-tafiye a lokacin yana da shekaru ashirin da biyu.
Mamun na biyu, mai mulkin Urgench a yankin Khwarazm ne ya dauke shi aiki, ya zama jami'in gwamnati, sannan ya fara rubuta littafin 'The Canon of Medicine.'
Ya koma Rey, kusa da Tehran, kuma ya rubuta gajerun ayyuka sama da 30.
Ya kammala rubuta littafinsa na 'The Canon of Medicine,' wanda ya fara tun da dadewa.
Shams al-Dawla ya mutu, sannan Ibn Sina ya yi murabus daga mukamin gwamnati kuma ya koma rayuwar keɓewa.
Sama al-Dawla, sabon mai mulkin Hamadan ne ya daure shi.
Isfahan ya fuskanci hari daga Mas'ud na I, mai mulkin Daular Ghaznavid, wanda ya haifar da sace dukiyoyin Ibn Sina, ciki har da tarin littattafansa.
Ya mutu a Hamadan.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara Falsafa da Magunguna
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara ilimin falsafa da magunguna na Girka da Larabawa, tare da haɗa falsafar Aristotle da Neoplatonism, wanda ya yi babban tasiri ga kimiyyar magunguna da falsafar Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'The Canon of Medicine'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'The Canon of Medicine,' wanda ya tattara duk wani bayanin likitanci da aka sani a wancan lokacin, wanda aka yi amfani da shi a matsayin asalin rubutun likitancin Turai har zuwa karni na 17.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'The Book of Healing'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'The Book of Healing,' kundin sani da ya shafi dukkanin fannonin ilimi banda ɗa'a (ethics) da siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a Kimiyyar Halitta (Natural Science)
keyAchievements.description: Ya musanta yiwuwar sauya karafa na alchemy, kuma ya gudanar da bincike a fannoni daban-daban na kimiyyar halitta, kamar lissafi, physics, ilimin taurari, da kimiyyar ma'adanai.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri ga Ilimin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri ga Thomas Aquinas, kuma ya zama silar farkawarka na Aristotle a Turai a karshen karni na 12.

faq.question: Yaya ake kallon matsayin Ibn Sina?
faq.answer: Ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin masanin falsafa na Daular Farisa, masanin likitanci, masanin kimiyya, ɗaya daga cikin manyan likitoci na tsakiyar zamani, kuma babban malami wanda duniyar Islama ta samar.

faq.question: Wane ne babban littafin likitanci na Ibn Sina?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta 'The Canon of Medicine,' wanda ya tattara dukkanin bayanan likitancin da aka sani a wancan lokacin; an yi amfani da wannan littafin a matsayin ginshiƙin ilimin likitanci na Turai har zuwa ƙarni na 17.

faq.question: Wace irin gudummawar falsafa Ibn Sina ya bayar?
faq.answer: Ya tattara ilimin falsafar Girka da Larabawa, inda ya haɗa falsafar Aristotle da Neoplatonism, wanda ya yi tasiri matuka a likitanci da falsafar Turai.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Ibn Sina yake da shi game da alchemy (kimiyyar sauya karafa)?
faq.answer: Ya musanta yiwuwar sauya karafa da masu ilimin alchemy na lokacin suka yi imani da shi, yana mai cewa bambance-bambancen dake tsakanin karafa yana da zurfi, kuma karafa masu daraja da ake sarrafawa ta hanyar alchemy jabu ne kawai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin dangin 'yan kasuwa da masu kera jiragen ruwa a Greenock, Scotland.
Ya ƙirƙiro dabarar (separate condenser) don ƙara ƙarfin aikin Injin Tururi (Steam engine) na Newcomen sosai.
Ya mallaki haƙƙin mallaka na na'urar tururi mai kawo sauyi, wacce ta haɗa da injin na musamman don rage yawan amfani da makamashi (man fetur) sosai.
Ya ƙirƙiri kyakkyawan haɗin gwiwa da Matthew Boulton don kerawa da sayar da ingantaccen injin tururi.
Ya mallaki haƙƙin (sun and planet gear system), yana canza injunan tururi don samar da motsin jujjuya don amfanin injin niƙa da masana'antu.
An haife shi a Wylam, Northumberland, a Ingila, kuma ya fara aiki a ma'adanin kwal na yankin tun yana ƙarami.
Ya gina Injin Tururi na farko, 'Blücher,' don jigilar kwal a tashar ma'adinai ta Killingworth.
Ya bude hanyar dogo ta Stockton and Darlington Railway, inda ya gudanar da jirgin fasinja na farko na tururi a duniya, mai suna 'Locomotion No. 1.'
Ya lashe gasar Rainhill Trials da sanannen jirginsa na 'Rocket,' wanda ya tabbatar da aikin jiragen kasa masu amfani da tururi.
Ya kula da bude hanyar dogo tsakanin biranen Liverpool da Manchester, layin dogo na farko a duniya na fasinjoji a tsakanin birane biyu.
An haife shi ga wani manomi a Heinzendorf, wanda ke cikin Daular Ostiriya.
Ya shiga Majami'ar St. Thomas Abbey na Augustinian a Brno, inda daga baya zai gudanar da shahararrun gwaje-gwajensa.
Ya fara wani gwaji na tsari wanda zai ɗauki shekaru da yawa, inda ya haɗa shuke-shuken wake dubbai a gonar majami'ar.
Ya gabatar da sakamakon bincikensa game da dokokin gado, wadanda suka hada da sifofin karfi (dominant) da kuma marasa karfi (recessive), ga Ƙungiyar Tarihin Halitta ta Brno.
Ya buga takardarsa kan 'Experiments on Plant Hybridization,' wacce aka yi watsi da ita har sai bayan wasu shekaru da dama bayan mutuwarsa kafin a sake gano ta.
An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na fari ga Jean-Antoine Lavoisier da Émilie Lavoisier a birnin Paris.
Ya kammala karatu daga Kwalejin Mazarin.
Ya sami digiri a fannin shari'a.
Ya zama mamba a Cibiyar Kimiyya ta Faransa sannan ya zama mamba a kamfanin masu karbar haraji na Ferme générale.
Ya yi fice bayan buga wata kasida da ta nuna cewa ba za a iya mai da ruwa zuwa kasa ba.
Ya auri Marie-Anne Pierrette Paulze.
Ya buga 'Opuscules Physiques et chimiques' (Gajerun Ayyukan Physics da Chemistry).
Anne Robert Jacques Turgot, Controller-General na Kudi ne ya naɗa shi a matsayin Kwamishinan Gunpowder.
Ta hanyar aiki tare da Pierre-Simon Laplace, ya gano cewa ƙone sinadarin hydrogen yana haifar da ruwa.
Ya zama darakta a Cibiyar Kimiyya ta Faransa.
Tare da Claude Louis Berthollet da sauran su, ya sake sabunta sunayen sinadarai kuma ya buga 'Méthode de nomenclature chimique'.
Ya buga 'Traité Élémentaire de Chimie' (Kananan Ka'idojin Chemistry).
Majalisar Dokoki ta ƙasa ta buƙace shi ya shiga cikin tsarin ƙirƙirar ma'aunin nauyi da ma'auni guda ɗaya.
An rufe Cibiyar Kimiyya ta Faransa da sauran cibiyoyi da yawa.
An daure shi tare da surukinsa, Jacques Paulze.
An same shi da laifi kuma an fille masa kai a Place de la Révolution ta amfani da injin kisan kai (guillotine).
A hukumance an bar Marie-Anne Lavoisier ta karɓi kayan mijinta da aka kwace.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyyar Sinadarai (Chemistry)
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci juyin juya halin kimiyyar sinadarai a ƙarni na 18, wanda ya bar tarihi a cikin tsarin juyin halitta na chemistry da biology.

keyAchievements.title: Rushewar Tsarin Phlogiston Theory da Tabbatar da Ka'idar Konewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da sabon ka'ida kan ƙonewa wanda ya musanta ka'idar phlogiston, ya nuna aikin oxygen a cikin abubuwa, kuma ya haɓaka kimiyyar chemistry da gaske.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Dokar Kiyaye Matsayi (Law of Conservation of Mass)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Dokar Kiyaye Matsayi, wacce ke nuna cewa a yayin wani canji na sinadarai (chemical reaction), ba a kirkirar abu ko kuma lalata shi, kawai yana canza yanayi ne.

keyAchievements.title: Aza Harsashin Sunayen Sinadaran Chemistry Na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya bambanta tsakanin abubuwa (elements) da hadadden abu (compounds), wanda ya jagoranci canjin sunayen sinadarai masu tsari, kuma ya kafa harsashin kimiyyar chemistry na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Hanyoyin Lissafi da Rubuta Jerin Abubuwan Sinadarai (Elements)
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara gabatar da hanyoyin ƙididdiga masu tsari a cikin kimiyyar chemistry, sannan ya shirya cikakken jerin abubuwan farko, yana mai hasashen samun kasancewar silicon.

faq.question: Wane dalili ya sa aka yanke wa Antoine Lavoisier hukuncin kisa?
faq.answer: An zarge shi da zamba wajen biyan haraji da kuma sayar da gurbataccen taba a daidai lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa yake tsanani, kuma an fille masa kai duk da irin gudummawar da ya bayar ga kimiyya.

faq.question: Menene muhimmin nasarar kimiyya na Lavoisier?
faq.answer: Ya jagoranci juyin juya halin kimiyyar chemistry ta hanyar rushe tsarin phlogiston da gano muhimmancin iskar oxygen a cikin yanayin konewa da kuma shakar iska, inda ya tabbatar da Dokar kiyaye tsarin kwayar halitta kuma ya tsara tushen sunayen sinadaran chemistry na zamani.

faq.question: Wace gudummawa matar Lavoisier, Marie-Anne Paulze Lavoisier ta bayar a binciken mijinta?
faq.answer: A matsayin mataimakiyar gwaji, Marie-Anne ta taimaka wajen zayyana kayan gwajin, yin rubutun bayanan sakamakon bincike, da fassarar rubuce-rubuce daga Ingilishi, sannan ta halarci tsarin gina ma'auni na (metric system).

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 3 ga watan Yuli, shekara ta 13 ta mulkin Zhengde na daular Ming
A shekara 35, ya fara aikin tattara ma'aunin magunguna
