Ya rasu a shekara ta 21 ta mulkin Wanli na daular Ming (yana da shekaru 76)
An wallafa 《Compendium of Materia Medica》 (bayan mutuwar Li Shizhen)

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Bencao Gangmu
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 《Bencao Gangmu》, wanda ya tattara ilimin magungunan gargajiya, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga ilimin likitancin gabas da ilimin kimiyyar halitta na baya.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga ilimin allura da gano cututtuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayar da gudunmawa a fannonin ilimin allura da gano cututtuka.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Binhu Maixue
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 《Binhu Maixue》, littafi kan ilimin bugun jini.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Qijing Bamai Kao
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 《Qijing Bamai Kao》, wanda ke magana akan jijiyoyin jiki guda takwas na ban mamaki.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Wuzang Tulun
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 《Wuzang Tulun》, littafi game da sassa biyar na ciki, wanda ya bace a yanzu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Mingmen Kao
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 《Mingmen Kao》, littafi akan kofar rai, amma a yanzu ya bace.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Li Shizhen kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Li Shizhen a ranar 3 ga watan Yuli, 1518, shekara ta 13 ta mulkin Zhengde na daular Ming, kuma ya rasu a shekara ta 1593, shekara ta 21 ta mulkin Wanli, yana da shekaru 76.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Li Shizhen?
faq.answer: Babban aikin Li Shizhen shine 《Bencao Gangmu》. Ban da haka, ya kuma rubuta 《Binhu Maixue》, 《Qijing Bamai Kao》 da sauransu.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Li Shizhen ya rike?
faq.answer: Li Shizhen ya kasance likita a masarautar Chu, ya zama babban likitan sarki, sannan daga baya ya zama gwamnan Huanggang a Hubei a zamanin daular Ming.

faq.question: Yaya tsarin iyalin Li Shizhen yake?
faq.answer: Kakansa da mahaifinsa duka likitoci ne. Sunan mahaifinsa Li Yanwen, sunansa na yabo Na-uk, kuma lakabinsa Yuezhi.

li-shizhen.missingDataNote: Ba a fayyace takamaiman shekarar da ya zama gwamnan Huanggang a Hubei da babban likitan sarki ba a asalin rubutun, don haka ba a saka su a cikin tsarin lokacin ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Bologna, Italiya, kuma ya nuna sha'awa ga ilimin lissafi da wutar lantarki tun yana ƙarami.
Ya yi nasarar aiko da siginar rediyo a nisan mil 1.5 a gidan danginsa a Italiya.
Ya kafa Kamfanin Waya da Sigina na Rediyo a London don tallata sabuwar fasahar da ya kirkira.
Ya zama mutum na farko da ya aiko da siginar rediyo ta tsallake tekun Atlantika, ya karɓi sigina a Newfoundland da aka aiko daga Burtaniya.
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta Physics tare da Karl Ferdinand Braun saboda gudunmawar da suka bayar ga ci gaban fasahar sadarwa mara waya.
An haife shi a Clausthal, Masarautar Hanover
Ya kammala karatun digiri a likitanci daga Jami'ar Göttingen
Ya gabatar da sakamakon bincikensa kan cutar anthrax a Jami'ar Breslau
Ya tabbatar da cewa Bacillus anthracis ne takamaiman silar cutar anthrax
Ya koma Cibiyar Kula da Lafiya ta Kasa a Berlin
Ya zama mutum na farko da ya gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Masar da Indiya kuma ya gano kwayar cutar kwalara
Ya gano sarai cewa kwayar cutar kwalara ita ce takamaiman silar cutar kwalara
Ya gano tuberculin, a matsayin wani abu da ke yaki da kwayar cutar tarin fuka
Ya zama Darakta na farko a Cibiyar Nazarin Cututtuka Masu Yaduwa ta Kasa a Berlin
An ba shi kyautar Nobel ta fannin Ilimin Aikin Jiki da Likitanci saboda kafa ilimin kwayoyin cuta da kuma gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka
Ya rasu a Baden-Baden

keyAchievements.title: Gano musabbabin cutar anthrax da kwalara
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da kwayoyin cuta a matsayin ainihin abin da ke haifar da cutar anthrax a 1877 da kwalara a 1885, wanda ya sa aka yi masa lakabi da 'Uban ilimin kwayoyin cuta'.

keyAchievements.title: Gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka a 1882 sannan kuma ya bayyana cewa cuta ce da ke yaduwa ta iska.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar dabarun binciken kwayoyin cuta
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga ci gaban ilimin kwayoyin halitta ta hanyar ƙirƙirar dabarun daidaita samfura, rini, da hotunan microscope.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Tuberculin
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano tuberculin a matsayin antigen ga kwayar cutar tarin fuka a 1890.

faq.question: Wane ne Robert Koch?
faq.answer: Robert Koch likita ne kuma masanin ilimin kwayoyin cuta dan kasar Jamus, wanda ya rayu tsakanin 1843 da 1910 kuma aka fi sani da 'Uban ilimin kwayoyin cuta'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Robert Koch?
faq.answer: Ya gano kwayoyin cutar da ke haifar da anthrax a 1877 da kwalara a 1885, kuma shi ne mutum na farko da ya gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka a 1882.

faq.question: Yaushe Robert Koch ya karɓi kyautar Nobel?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1905, ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta fannin Ilimin Aikin Jiki da Likitanci saboda kafa ilimin kwayoyin cuta da kuma gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka.

faq.question: Shin Robert Koch ya gano tuberculin?
faq.answer: Eh, a shekara ta 1890 ya gano tuberculin a matsayin antigen ga kwayar cutar tarin fuka, amma daga baya an gano cewa ba shi da tasiri, wanda hakan ya sa darajarsa ta fadi na wani dan lokaci.

robert-koch.missingDataNote: Ba a haɗa takamaiman shekarun aikin sa a matsayin likitan soja a lokacin Yaƙin Faransa da Prussia ba, ko kuma lokacin da yake matsayin likitan karkara ba, saboda ba a bayyana su cikin asalin rubutun ba. Haka kuma, ba a ambaci takamaiman shekarar da ya fara binciken kwayoyin cuta a Jami'ar Berlin ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan wani babban gida a gidan mahaifinsa, Count Landulf na Aquino, a Roccasecca, Italiya.
Ya shiga ƙungiyar Dominican duk da matsanancin adawar iyalinsa waɗanda suka tsare shi na tsawon shekara guda don hanashi hakan.
An naɗa shi Master na Tauhidi a Jami'ar Paris, wanda ya tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin babban masani na zamanin tsakiya.
Ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa, Summa Theologica, wanda ya haɗa falsafar Aristotle da tauhidin Kirista.
Bayan ya fuskanci wani gogewar ruhaniya mai zurfi a lokacin Mass, ya dakatar da rubuce-rubucensa yana mai cewa duk abin da ya rubuta kamar 'kara' yake.
An haife shi da sunan Jalal al-Din Muhammad Rumi a Balkh, a yankin da a yanzu yake cikin Afghanistan ko Tajikistan.
Ya zauna tare da iyalinsa a Konya, Anatolia, inda ya gaji mahaifinsa a matsayin masanin addinin Musulunci.
Wata ganawar ban mamaki da wani malamin sufanci mai yawo, Shams al-Din Tabrizi, ya canza shi ya zama mawaƙi mai cike da sha'awa.
Ya fara rubuta babban littafinsa Masnavi, wani katafaren aikin waka na Farisa wanda ya ƙunshi koyarwar ruhaniya da labaran sufaye.
Ya rasu a Konya, kuma al'ummomin addinai daban-daban sun yi alhinin rasuwarsa kasancewar sun mutunta sakonsa na soyayya da haɗin kai ga kowa.
An haife shi a Córdoba, Al-Andalus, a cikin wani shahararren iyali na malaman Andalusia da alkalai.
An naɗa shi a matsayin alƙali a Seville, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin likitan fada kuma daga baya ya zama babban alƙalin Córdoba.
Ya rubuta The Incoherence of the Incoherence, wani karfi na kare falsafa daga hare-haren masanin tauhidi na baya, Al-Ghazali.
Malaman addini masu ra'ayin rikau sun yi adawa da falsafarsa ta hankali, wanda ya kai ga rasa tagomashin siyasa sannan aka kore shi zuwa Lucena.
Ya rasu a Marrakesh, amma ya bar fassarori kan ayyukan Aristotle da za su yi gagarumin tasiri ga falsafar turai a zamanin tsakiya.
An haife shi a cikin wani babban iyali na masu ilimi a New York; shi ne yayan marubuci Henry James.
Ya shawo kan tsananin damuwa da cututtukan jiki kuma ya karɓi digiri na likitanci daga Jami'ar Harvard.
Ya buga The Principles of Psychology, wani ƙaton littafi mai shafuka 1,200 wanda ya sake fasalta ilimin halin ɗan adam a matsayin kimiyyar zamani.
Ya wallafa The Varieties of Religious Experience, wanda ya dogara da laccocinsa na Gifford, don bincika yanayin ruhin ɗan adam.
Ya wallafa Pragmatism, wanda ya ƙarfafa al'adar falsafar Amurka na kimanta gaskiya bisa sakamakon a aikace.
An haife shi a Marbach, Württemberg, a Daular Rumu Mai Tsarki.
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko da aka fi sani da 'The Robbers' a ɓoye.
An nada shi a matsayin farfesa a fannin tarihi da falsafa a Jami'ar Jena.
Ya kulla abokantaka mai kusanci da matukar amfani tare da Johann Wolfgang von Goethe.
Ya rasu a Weimar yana da shekaru 45 a duniya.
An haife shi a matsayin bawa a Diamond, Missouri.
Ya zama Ba-Amurke dan asalin Afrika na farko da ya sami digiri na farko a fannin kimiyya.
Ya zama shugaban sashin aikin gona a Cibiyar Tuskegee bisa gayyatar Booker T. Washington.
Ya wallafa jaridar bincike mai taken 'Yadda Ake Noma Gyada da Hanyoyi 105 da Mutane Za Su Iya Amfani Da Ita'.
Ya rasu a Tuskegee, Alabama, inda ya bar duk abin da ya tara a rayuwarsa domin kafa Gidauniyar Bincike ta George Washington Carver.
An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan.
Sakamakon rikicin ruhi da sauran dalilai, ya yi watsi da mukamansa duk da shahararsa, sannan ya yi tafiye-tafiye a matsayin sufi zuwa Makka da sauran yankuna.
Ya koma garinsu kuma ya rasu a can.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Incoherence of the Philosophers
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi don sukar wasu masana falsafa, yana cewa sun cusa falsafar Girka da yawa cikin Musulunci har hakan ya haifar da ra'ayoyin da suka saba wa Alqur'ani.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Revival of the Religious Sciences da Deliverance from Error
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar wasu fitattun ayyuka kamar 'The Revival of the Religious Sciences' da 'Deliverance from Error' wadanda suka yi babban tasiri ga al'ummomin da suka zo daga baya.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗa tauhidin al'ada da Sufanci
keyAchievements.description: Babban nasararsa shi ne haɗa tauhidin al'ada da Sufanci, wanda ya kawo sabon rayuwa ga tsarin addinin Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Riƙon Addinin Musulunci na Gaskiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya taimaka wajen kare addinin Musulunci na gaskiya ta hanyar sukar falsafar Ibn Sina.

keyAchievements.title: Kawo canji a ilimin Musulunci
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo gagarumin canji a tunanin Musulunci ta hanyar raba ilimin Musulunci da scholastic theology sannan ya rayar da Alqur'ani da Hadisi.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da matsayin Sufanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da matsayin Sufanci a cikin addinin Musulunci, wanda ya sa talakawan musulmi suka amince da shi.

faq.question: Yaya ake kallon Al-Ghazali?
faq.answer: Ana daukarsa a matsayin babban musulmi bayan Annabi Muhammad, kuma babban masanin tauhidi a fannin falsafa da sufanci.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Al-Ghazali?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da 'The Incoherence of the Philosophers', 'The Revival of the Religious Sciences', da 'Deliverance from Error'.

faq.question: Mene ne babbar nasarar Al-Ghazali?
faq.answer: Babbar nasararsa ita ce haɗa tauhidin al'ada tare da sufanci, tare da kare musulunci na al'ada daga falsafar Ibn Sina ta hanyar sukanta.

faq.question: Ta yaya Al-Ghazali ya kawo canji a tunanin Musulunci?
faq.answer: Ya raba ilimin Musulunci daga scholastic theology, ya rayar da Alqur'ani da Hadisi, ya kafa matsayin sufanci, kuma ya sanya al'ummar musulmi su rungume shi.

al-ghazali.missingDataNote: Ba a fayyace takamaiman shekarar da ya fara aiki a matsayin farfesa a Makarantar Nizamiyya a Baghdad ba, kuma ba a bayyana shekarar da ya rubuta The Incoherence of the Philosophers a asalin rubutun ba.

timeline.event: Haifuwa
Ya shiga buya a kauyen Qalat Ibn Salama da ke yankin Oran na Algeria don mayar da hankali kan binciken ilimi.

Ya koma Cairo, Egypt don yin laccoci daban-daban, ya sami amincewar Sultan Barquq na daular Mamluk, kuma ya zama farfesa a makarantu da dama sannan an nada shi a matsayin babban alkali na mazhabar Maliki.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: "Kitab al-Ibar" (Littafin Darussa)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne na tarihin duniya wando ya nemi tsara tarihin Musulunci na Yammacin Asiya, kuma yana kunshe da bayanai da tarihin Larabawa, Persians, da kuma Berbers.

keyAchievements.title: "Muqaddimah" (Gabatarwa)
keyAchievements.description: Gabatarwa ce ta littafin "Kitab al-Ibar" wacce ta kasance shahararren littafi na duniya da ke binciki tsari da dokokin canjin al'umma kuma yana neman amsa tambayoyi na asali na tarihin al'adu.

faq.question: Wane ne Ibn Khaldun?
faq.answer: Ibn Khaldun ya kasance masanin tarihi, mai tunani, kuma dan siyasa na tsakiyar zamanin Musulunci wando ya yi aiki daga shekarar 1332 zuwa 1406. Ya fito ne dari sanannen dangin Khaldun da suka gudu zuwa Tunis daga Seville, Spain.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan littattafan Ibn Khaldun?
faq.answer: Manyan littattafansa sune "Kitab al-Ibar", wando ya kasance tarihin duniya da ke neman tsara tarihin Musulunci na Yammacin Asiya, da kuma "Muqaddimah", wando ya kasance gabatarwa a farkon littafin. Musamman "Muqaddimah" ana kiyasta shi a matsayin shahararren littafi na duniya da ke binciki dokokin canjin al'umma.

faq.question: Yaya tarihin siyasa na Ibn Khaldun yake?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a matsayin sakatare, jakada, da kuma babban alkali a gwamnatocin Musulunci daban-daban kamar daular Hafsid, daular Marinid, da kuma daular Nasrid, amma ya rayu cikin tafiye-tafiye da dama saboda shiga cikin makirci ko kuma rikici na siyasa. Wannan kwarewa ta siyasa ta yi tasiri sosai ga tunaninsa na masani a baya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Moses ben Maimon a Córdoba a cikin Daular Almoravid.
Ya kammala Commentary on the Mishnah, babban ginshiƙi na wallafe-wallafen rabba.
Ya kammala Mishneh Torah, wani katafaren kundin dokokin Yahudawa.
Ya wallafa The Guide for the Perplexed, babban aikin falsafarsa wanda ya nemi daidaita bangaskiya da hankali.
Ya rasu a Fustat (Alkahira), Masar, kuma daga baya an binne shi a Tiberias.
An haife shi a Gabashin Iran ko Tsakiyar Asiya (Kimanin lokacin da ya rayu).
Yana da shekaru 30, ana cewa ya sami wahayinsa na farko daga babban allah Ahura Mazda.
Ya fuskanci matsananciyar adawa daga malaman addini na yankinsa, wanda ya sa shi yin shekaru yana yawo yana yada sakon kadaita Allah.
Ya mayar da Sarki Vishtaspa zuwa addininsa, wanda ya tabbatar da samun goyon bayan siyasa da tsira ga addinin.
Ana kyautata zaton wani malami dan adawa ne ya kashe shi yayin da yake addu'a a gaban bagadi.
An haife shi a garin jami'a na Alcalá de Henares kusa da Madrid.
Ya bi wani kadinal na Italiya zuwa Roma, ya zama soja kuma ya shiga yakin Lepanto, inda ya samu rauni wanda ya nakasa hannunsa na hagu.
Yan fashin teku sun kama shi kuma aka yi garkuwa da shi don ya yi bauta a Algiers har tsawon shekaru 5.
Da taimakon kungiyar Trinitarian, an biya kudin fansarsa kuma ya koma Madrid inda ya fara rubuce-rubuce.
Ya wallafa littafin labari mai taken La Galatea, wanda bai sami karbuwa sosai ba.
Ya wallafa kashi na 1 na Don Quixote, wanda ya samu farin jini sosai.
Ya kammala kashi na 2 na Don Quixote.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 69.

keyAchievements.title: Don Quixote
keyAchievements.description: Wannan aiki ne da mutane da yawa ke daukarsa a matsayin littafin zamani na farko a nahiyar Turai.

keyAchievements.title: La Galatea
keyAchievements.description: Ya wallafa littafinsa mai suna La Galatea, amma bai sami karbuwa sosai ba.

faq.question: Mene ne sunan barkwancin Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Ana masa lakabi da 'Yariman Hazakai' (el Príncipe de los Ingenios).

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: An haife shi a garin jami'a na Alcalá de Henares kusa da Madrid.

faq.question: Mene ne ainihin sana'ar Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubucin litattafai, mawaƙi, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo.

faq.question: Yaya ake kallon ayyukan Miguel de Cervantes?
faq.answer: Ana ganin ayyukansa a matsayin wasu daga cikin muhimman ayyukan adabi a kowane lokaci, musamman Don Quixote wanda aka dauke shi a matsayin littafin zamani na farko a Turai.

miguel-de-cervantes.missingDataNote: Kadan ne aka sani game da rayuwarsa a lokacin kuruciya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin wani gidan sarakuna na Rasha a estate na Yasnaya Polyana.
Ya wallafa littafinsa na farko, 'Childhood', wanda ya sami nasarar gaggawa a fagen adabi.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa na koli, 'War and Peace'.
Ya wallafa 'Anna Karenina', wanda aka yaba a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi kyawun litattafai a tarihi.
Ya rasu sakamakon ciwon huhu a tashar jirgin kasa na Astapovo bayan ya bar gidansa domin neman rayuwar tsanani.
An haife ta a Heian-kyo, Japan.
Ta tafi lardin Echizen tare da mahaifinta bayan an nada shi a matsayin gwamnan lardin.
Ta koma Kyoto kuma ta auri Fujiwara no Nobutaka.
An haifi 'yarta Kenshi (Kataiko).
Mijinta Nobutaka ya mutu sakamakon cutar kwalara.
Ta rubuta The Tale of Genji (Genji Monogatari).
Fujiwara no Michinaga ya gayyace ta zuwa kotun sarki, ta zama mace mai jiran gado ga Sarauniya Shoshi.
An ambaci wata ma'aikaciyar kotun sarki Fujiwara Takako a cikin littafin tarihin kotun sarki (an yi imanin cewa wannan shine ainihin sunan Murasaki).
Ta rasu.
An kammala fassarar turanci mai kundi 6 na The Tale of Genji.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta The Tale of Genji
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta The Tale of Genji, wanda ake daukarsa a matsayin daya daga cikin littattafan duniya na farko, a cikin harshen Japananci.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Littafin Tarihin Murasaki Shikibu
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta tarihin rayuwarta mai taken The Diary of Lady Murasaki.

keyAchievements.title: Karatun Harshen Sinanci da Koyarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ta koyi Harshen Sinanci na Gargajiya a wajen mahaifinta malami, wanda ya kasance abin ki ga mata a zamanin Heian, kuma ta koyar da Sarauniya Shoshi Harshen Sinanci.

faq.question: Mene ne ainihin sunan Murasaki Shikibu?
faq.answer: Murasaki Shikibu sunan alƙalami ne. Ba a san ainihin sunanta ba, amma ana tunanin cewa ita ce Fujiwara Takako, wata mace ma'aikaciyar fada da aka ambata a cikin tarihin fadar sarki a shekarar 1007.

faq.question: Ta yaya Murasaki Shikibu ta koyi Harshen Sinanci?
faq.answer: Al'ada ne ba a koya wa mata Harshen Sinanci a zamanin Heian, amma tun tana girma tare da mahaifinta malami, ta nuna bajinta ta musamman kuma ta sami damar yin amfani da shi sosai.

faq.question: Yaushe aka rubuta The Tale of Genji?
faq.answer: An rubuta The Tale of Genji tsakanin shekara ta 1000 zuwa 1012.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma me yasa Murasaki Shikibu ta zama ma'aikaciyar fada?
faq.answer: Sakamakon shahararta a matsayin marubuciya, Fujiwara no Michinaga ya gayyace ta don zama ma'aikaciyar fada ga Sarauniya Shoshi a lokacin tana da shekaru tsakanin farkon zuwa tsakiyar 30s.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar Sei Shonagon da Murasaki Shikibu take?
faq.answer: Murasaki Shikibu ta ɗauki Sei Shonagon a matsayin abokiyar hamayya, kuma ta soki girman kanta tare da nuna gwanintarta a Harshen Sinanci.

murasaki-shikibu.missingDataNote: Ana tunanin takamaiman shekarar haihuwar Murasaki Shikibu tana kusan 970 ko 978, sannan shekarar mutuwarta tana kusan 1025 ko watakila ta yi rayuwa har zuwa 1031. Lokacin da ta fara rubuta The Tale of Genji bai tabbata ba, sannan ba a san adadin sauran matan mijinta Fujiwara no Nobutaka da 'ya'yansa ba. Ba a sami tabbatacciyar hujja da ke nuna cewa an kai Murasaki fadar sarki a matsayin wata baiwar Michinaga ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Hilaire-Germain-Edgar De Gas a Paris, Faransa.
Ya shiga École des Beaux-Arts, ya karanta zane a ƙarƙashin Louis Lamothe.
Ya taimaka wajen shirya da baje kolin ayyukansa a bikin baje kolin Impressionist na farko a Paris.
Ya nuna 'Little Dancer of Fourteen Years', wanda shi ne kawai mutum-mutumin da ya nuna ga jama'a a lokacin rayuwarsa.
Ya mutu a Paris, kusan makaho, ya bar dubban ayyuka da ba a nuna ba.
An haife shi a Dublin, Ireland.
Ya buga littafinsa na farko kuma na ƙarshe, 'The Picture of Dorian Gray'.
Ya fara gabatar da wasan kwaikwayonsa mai ban dariya, 'The Importance of Being Earnest'.
An same shi da laifin babban rashin mutunci kuma an yanke masa hukuncin ɗaurin shekaru biyu masu tsanani.
Ya mutu a lokacin da yake gudun hijira a Paris yana da shekaru 46.
An haife shi a Calcutta, Bengal Presidency, British India.
Ya kafa makarantar gwaji a Santiniketan wacce daga baya ta zama Jami'ar Visva-Bharati.
Ya buga 'Gitanjali', wani tarin waƙoƙi masu tasiri sosai.
Ya zama wanda ba ɗan Turai ba na farko da ya lashe kyautar Nobel a fannin Adabi.
Ya mutu a Calcutta yana da shekaru 80.
An haife ta kusa da Mexico City, New Spain.
Ta shiga Convent of San Jerónimo inda ta shafe sauran rayuwarta.
An buga littafin waƙoƙinta na 'Inundación Castálida' a Spain.
Ta rubuta 'Respuesta a Sor Filotea', tana kare haƙƙin mata na neman ilimi da bincike.
Ta mutu tana kula da 'yan uwanta mata a lokacin wata annoba a Mexico City.
An haife ta a matsayin 'yar Li Gefei.
Ta auri Zhao Mingcheng.
Zhao Mingcheng ya shiga cikin lamarin Yuanyou, inda suka fara rabuwa da Li Qingzhao.
Faduwar Daular Song ta Arewa.
Mutuwar Zhao Mingcheng.
Ta sake auren Zhang Ruzhou.
Ta mutu.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Jinshi Lu" (Littafin Karfe da Duwatsu)
keyAchievements.description: Tare da mijinta Zhao Mingcheng, sun yi nazarin rubutun karfe da duwatsu, tare da tattara "Jinshi Lu".

keyAchievements.title: Samar da waƙoƙin Song Ci
keyAchievements.description: Ta gabatar da ayyuka masu haske waɗanda ke bin al'adar Li Yu da Yan Jidao, tare da kyakkyawan bayani mai cike da hazaka.

keyAchievements.title: Yin tsokaci kan mawaƙan daular Song
keyAchievements.description: An san ta da yin dacewar sharhi ga mawaƙan lokacin daular Song.

faq.question: Wacece Li Qingzhao?
faq.answer: Li Qingzhao mawaƙiya ce 'yar ƙasar Sin daga lokacin Daular Song ta Kudu, wacce aka fi sani da Yi'an Jushi. An haife ta a shekarar 1081, a ƙarshen Daular Song ta Arewa.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin Li Qingzhao?
faq.answer: Tare da mijinta Zhao Mingcheng, sun tattara "Jinshi Lu". Ta sami yabo a tarihin adabi saboda ƙirƙirar waƙoƙin Song Ci, waɗanda suke da haske kuma suna nuna bayani mai cike da hazaka.

faq.question: Yaya rayuwar Li Qingzhao ta canza?
faq.answer: Rayuwarta ta kasu kashi biyu bayan faduwar daular Song ta Arewa: a rabin farko, ta rubuta ayyuka masu cike da farin ciki da soyayya, yayin da a rabi na biyu, ta rubuta ayyuka da ke nuna bakin cikin lokacin da kuma na kashin kanta.

li-qingzhao.missingDataNote: Shekarar haihuwar Li Qingzhao ta zo daban-daban a matsayin 1084 da 1081 a ainihin rubutun, don haka mun ɗauki 1081 wanda aka ambata a cikin sashin 'rayuwa'.

timeline.event: An haife shi.
Ya rubuta shahararrun wakokinsa 'Ino futatsu no naka ni ikitaru sakura kana' da 'Kumo ori-ori hito wo yasumuru tsukimi kana'.
Ya rubuta shahararren wakarsa 'Furuike ya kawazu tobikomu mizu no oto' (Tsohuwar rijiya, kwado ya fada, sautin ruwa) a shekarar 1686.
Ya rasu (ranar 28 ga watan Nuwamba, ranar 12 ga watan 10 na kalandar gargajiya).

keyAchievements.title: Karbuwar salon Haikai no Renga
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin rayuwarsa, an san ayyukansa a cikin tsarin hadin gwiwa na Haikai no Renga.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon Haiku
keyAchievements.description: A yau, ana kallon sa a matsayin gwarzon Haiku (wando ake kira Hokku a wancan lokacin).

keyAchievements.title: Mawaki mai shaharar duniya
keyAchievements.description: Wakokinsa suna da shaharar duniya gaba danya, kuma a kasar Japan ana sake buga yawancin wakokinsa a jikin abubuwan tunawa ko wuraren tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara a duk fadin Japan
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga fannin waka yana da karancin shekaru, kuma ya zama sananne a duk fadin Japan ta hanyar shigar da kansa cikin yanayin ilimi na Edo.

keyAchievements.title: Wahayi (inspiration) ta hanyar tafiye-tafiye
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yawo a duk fadin Japan, ciki har da arewa, gabas, da yamma, don samun wahayi na rubuta ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Waka mai dogara kan kwarewar dabi'a
keyAchievements.description: Wakokinsa sun sami tasiri daga kwarewar da ya samu kai tsaye game da duniyar da ke kewaye da shi, kuma ya takaita ra'ayinsa game da yanayi ta hanyar amfani da abubuwa masu sauki.

faq.question: Wane ne Matsuo Basho?
faq.answer: Matsuo Basho ya kasance mawaki na farkon lokacin Edo shogunate wando aka haife shi a shekarar 1644 kuma ya rasu a ranar 28 ga watan Nuwamba, 1694 (ranar 12 ga watan 10 na kalandar gargajiya). Sunansa na yaranta shi ne Kinsaku, kuma ana kiran sa Matsuo Chuemon Munefusa.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin Matsuo Basho?
faq.answer: A lokacin rayuwarsa, an san ayyukansa a cikin tsarin hadin gwiwa na Haikai no Renga, kuma a yau ana kallon sa a matsayin gwarzon Haiku. Wakokinsa suna da shaharar duniya gaba danya kuma ana sake buga su a jikin abubuwan tunawa ko wuraren tarihi a duk fadin Japan.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun wakokin Matsuo Basho?
faq.answer: Shahararrun ayyukansa sun hada da 'Ino futatsu no naka ni ikitaru sakura kana' da 'Kumo ori-ori hito wo yasumuru tsukimi kana' da aka rubuta a shekarar 1685, da kuma 'Furuike ya kawazu tobikomu mizu no oto' da aka rubuta a shekarar 1686.

faq.question: Yaya Matsuo Basho ya gudanar da ayyukansa na waka?
faq.answer: Ya sami abincinsa ta hanyar zama malami, amma kuma ya yi yawo a duk fadin Japan don samun wahayi, inda ya nisanta kansa da rayuwar gari ko ta al'umma da ke da alaka da adabi. Wakokinsa sun sami tasiri daga kwarewar da ya samu kai tsaye game da duniyar da ke kewaye da shi, wando ya sa ya takaita ra'ayinsa game da yanayi.

faq.question: Wane sashi na aikinsa Matsuo Basho ya fi kallo da muhimmanci?
faq.answer: Ya yarda cewa mafi kyawun aikinsa shi ne shiga da jagorantar Renku, kuma ya fi daukar alaka da tsarin Haikai da muhimmanci fiye da Hokku kadai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Ingila.
An zabe shi a matsayin ɗan majalisa mai wakiltar Kingston upon Hull.
Ya fara sadaukar da rayuwarsa domin soke cinikin bayayi.
An zartar da Dokar Cinikin Bayayi, wacce ta kawar da cinikin bayayi a Daular Birtaniya gaba ɗaya.
Ya mutu kwanaki uku kacal bayan ya ji cewa Dokar Soke Bautar ta wuce a majalisa.
An haifi François-Dominique Toussaint (Toussaint Louverture).
Bayan jin labarin Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, bakaken bayi sun nemi a yi amfani da ka'idojin 'Yanci, Daidaito, da 'Yan'uwanci a Saint-Domingue.
An fara juyin juya halin bayi a yankin Faransa na Saint-Domingue, inda Toussaint ya zama ɗaya daga cikin shugabanni.
Ya tattauna yarjejeniya inda Faransa ta soke bauta a yankunanta.
Ya yi nasarar kare mamayewar da sojojin Birtaniya da na Spain suka yi.
Majalisar Kasa ta Jamhuriyar Faransa ta Farko ta ayyana soke bautar bakar fata a dukkanin yankunanta.
Ya gudanar da mulkin yankin da amincewar gwamnan Faransa.
Ya fitar da tsarin mulki wanda ya soke bauta har abada kuma ya bayyana cewa dukkan mutane suna da daidaito ba tare da la'akari da kalar fatarsu ba.
Napoleon I ya tura runduna mai girma don dawo da ikon mulki da sake kafa bauta.
Toussaint ya halarci tattaunawar zaman lafiya amma aka kamo shi.
Ya mutu a kurkuku a Faransa.
Jama'ar da suka gaji ruhin Toussaint sun 'yantar da Port-au-Prince kuma suka amince da bayanin neman 'yancin kai.
An kafa Jamhuriyar Haiti.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar fafutukar neman 'yancin kan Haiti
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo karshen bauta sannan ya jagoranci fafutukar neman 'yancin kan Saint-Domingue (yanzu Haiti) daga Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Yin aiki a matsayin Janar din sojojin Faransa kuma mai mulkin mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Janar a cikin sojojin Faransa kuma mai gudanarwa na Saint-Domingue.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin juyin juya halin bayi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daga cikin shugabannin juyin juya halin bayin da ya faru a Saint-Domingue a 1791.

keyAchievements.title: Tattauna kan soke bauta
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattauna don Faransa ta soke bauta a yankunanta a matsayin sharadin fatattakar sojojin Birtaniya da Spain.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro tsarin mulki da ayyana soke bauta
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1801, ya fitar da tsarin mulki wanda ya soke bauta har abada kuma ya bayyana daidaiton dukkan mutane ba tare da la'akari da kalar fatarsu ba.

faq.question: Wanene Toussaint Louverture?
faq.answer: Dan juyin juya hali kuma mai fafutukar neman 'yancin kan Haiti wanda ya kawo karshen bauta sannan ya jagoranci fafutukar neman 'yancin kan Saint-Domingue (yanzu Haiti) daga Faransa.

faq.question: Menene asalin sunan Toussaint Louverture?
faq.answer: Sunansa François-Dominique Toussaint.

faq.question: Ta yaya Toussaint Louverture ya zama dan juyin juya hali?
faq.answer: Ya zama dan juyin juya hali ta hanyar koyon Faransanci da kansa da kuma karanta littattafan masana irin su Voltaire.

faq.question: Yaushe juyin juya halin bayin da Toussaint Louverture ya jagoranta ya faru?
faq.answer: Ya faru a ranar 22 ga Agusta, 1791, a yankin Faransa na Saint-Domingue.

faq.question: Ta yaya Toussaint Louverture ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya amince da tayin tattaunawar zaman lafiya da kwamandan sojojin Faransa ya yi a karshen 1802, amma aka kamo shi aka daure a Faransa, inda ya mutu a kurkuku a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1803.

faq.question: Me ya faru da Haiti bayan mutuwar Toussaint Louverture?
faq.answer: Jean-Jacques Dessalines ya zama dan juyin juya hali kuma ya ci gaba da ruhin Toussaint. Ya 'yantar da Port-au-Prince a 1803, ya karbi bayanin neman 'yancin kai, kuma ya ayyana Jamhuriyar Haiti a 1804.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin baiwa mai suna Isabella Baumfree a Ulster County, New York.
Ta tsere da 'yarta jaririya don neman 'yanci.
Ta zama bakar mace ta farko da ta lashe shari'a kan farin namiji, don dawo da danta.
Ta yi shahararren jawabin ta na 'Ain't I a Woman?' a taron Hakkin Mata na Ohio.
Ta mutu a gidanta da ke Battle Creek, Michigan.
An haife ta a Moss Side, Manchester, Ingila.
Ta kafa Kungiyar Neman 'Yancin Zabe ta Mata (Women's Franchise League).
Ta kafa kungiyar Women's Social and Political Union (WSPU), wacce aka sani da fafutukar neman zabe ga mata.
Ta dakatar da gwagwarmayar neman yancin zabe don tallafawa kokarin yakin gwamnatin Birtaniya yayin yakin duniya na daya.
Ta mutu 'yan makwanni kadan kafin gwamnati ta ba wa dukkan mata da suka haura shekaru 21 'yancin zabe daidai da maza.
Ya tafi Spain don yin karatu a matsayin likita.
A cikin watan Fabrairu a Berlin, ya kammala rubuta littafinsa mai suna "Noli Me Tángere".
Ya kafa "La Liga Filipina," wata kungiya ta jagoranci don fafutukar neman 'yancin kan Philippines.
Yayin da yake gudanar da ayyukan kungiyar, gwamnatin kasar Spain ta kama shi kuma ta yi masa gudun hijira zuwa Dapitan, tsibirin Mindanao.
An zarge shi a matsayin shugaban da ke da hannu a juyin juya halin Philippines, kuma sojojin mulkin mallaka na Spain suka harbe shi a fili a Bagumbayan kusa da Manila a ranar 30 ga Disamba.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Noli Me Tángere"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafin "Noli Me Tángere," wanda ya soki rikicewar mulkin mallaka kuma ya kwatanta yadda Turawan Spain ke nuna wariya ga 'yan Philippines.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyar hadin kan kishin kasa ta Philippines
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar hadin kan kishin kasa ta Philippines don yin suka ga mulkin mallaka na Spain saboda burinsa na ganin an 'yantar da Philippines.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa La Liga Filipina
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa "La Liga Filipina," wanda shi ne jagoranci don yunkurin neman 'yancin kan Philippines.

faq.question: Wanene José Rizal?
faq.answer: Likita ne, marubuci, mawaki, dan jarida, malami, kuma dan gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kan Philippines.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe José Rizal?
faq.answer: An harbe shi a gaban jama'a a shekarar 1896 daga sojojin mulkin mallaka na Spain saboda an zarge shi da zama shugaban masu kula da juyin juya halin Philippines.

faq.question: Menene shahararrun ayyukan José Rizal?
faq.answer: Shi ne marubucin "Noli Me Tángere" da "El Filibusterismo," kuma ya rubuta wakoki da kasidu da dama.

faq.question: Ta yaya ake tunawa da José Rizal a Philippines?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban 'yancin kan Philippines, kuma ana bikin 30 ga Disamba, ranar da ya mutu, a matsayin Ranar José Rizal.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin 'ya ta biyu ga Edward John Wollstonecraft da Elizabeth Dickson a Spitalfields, London.
Ta sami 'yancin kanta ta hanyar aiki a matsayin mai tayawa Sarah Dawson hira a Bath, Somerset.
Ta koma gida don kasancewa da mahaifiyarta mai fama da rashin lafiya a kan gadon mutuwarta.
Ta gamsar da 'yar uwarta Eliza, wacce ke fama da damuwa bayan haihuwa, da ta tsere daga aurenta mara dadi.
Ta bar makarantar da ta kafa don bin kawarta Fanny Blood zuwa Lisbon domin ta yi jinyarta.
Ta buga "Thoughts on the Education of Daughters"; ta yanke shawarar zama marubuciya.
Ta buga littafinta na farko, "Mary: A Fiction"; kuma ta buga littafinta tilo na yara, "Original Stories from Real Life."
Ta rubuta "A Vindication of the Rights of Men" a matsayin mayar da martani ga littafin Edmund Burke "Reflections on the Revolution in France."
Ta rubuta aikinta mafi shahara kuma mai tasiri, "A Vindication of the Rights of Woman"; a watan Disamba ta tafi Paris, sannan ta dawo wata daya kafin kashe Louis na XVI.
Faransa ta ayyana yaki akan Birtaniya.
Kwamitin Tsaron Jama'a, karkashin jagorancin Jacobins, ya dauki mulki a Faransa.
Ta kamu da son wani dan kasadar Amurka, Gilbert Imlay; Imlay yayi rajistarta a matsayin matarsa ta karya domin ta sami shaidar zama 'yar kasar Amurka.
Ta haifi 'yarta ta farko, Fanny Imlay.
Faduwar Jacobins.
"An Historical and Moral View of the French Revolution," wanda aka rubuta a Le Havre, Arewacin Faransa, an buga shi a London.
Ta bar Faransa.
Ta koma London don neman Imlay, amma ya ƙi amincewa su sasanta.
Ta yi kokarin kashe kanta ta hanyar amfani da gubar laudanum, amma Imlay ya ceci ranta.
Ta buga "Letters Written During a Short Residence in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark," tarin wasiƙun da ta rubuta wa Imlay yayin tafiye-tafiyenta a Scandinavia.
Ta koma Somers Town, a arewa maso yammacin London, tare da William Godwin.
Ta haifi 'yarta ta biyu, Mary.
Ta mutu daga cutar zazzabin haihuwa (tana da shekaru 38).
An buga littafinta da ba a kammala ba, "Maria: or, The Wrongs of Woman," bayan mutuwarta.
Mijinta, William Godwin, ya buga "Memoirs of the Author of A Vindication of the Rights of Woman."

keyAchievements.title: "A Vindication of the Rights of Woman" (1792)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne littafin falsafar mata na farko wanda ya ba da kariya ga yancin ilimi da daidaiton yancin mata, yana jayayya cewa mata ba su gaza maza ba face kawai sun rasa ilimi ne.

keyAchievements.title: "A Vindication of the Rights of Men" (1790)
keyAchievements.description: A matsayin mayar da martani ga Edmund Burke na "Reflections on the Revolution in France," shi ne rubutun siyasa na farko kuma na masu fafutukar kare hakkin mata wanda ya kai hari ga tsarin sarauta, ya kare jamhuriya, kuma ya soki yaren da Burke ya yi amfani da shi mai nuna son zuciyar jinsi.

keyAchievements.title: "An Historical and Moral View of the French Revolution" (1794)
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke takaita tarihin farko na juyin juya halin Faransa, inda yake mayar da martani ga yanayin kin juyin juya hali a Birtaniya, kuma yana jayayya cewa juyin juya halin ya samo asali ne daga rikicin zamantakewa, tattalin arziki, da siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: "Letters Written During a Short Residence in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark" (1796)
keyAchievements.description: Yana da wani littafin tafiye-tafiye ne dauke da tunani game da al'umma da mutanen Scandinavia, tambayoyi kan asali, da kuma dangantakarta da Imlay, yana bincika darajar gogewar mutum da hasashe yayin da yake ba da goyon baya ga 'yancin mata da ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuce-rubucen Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar "Thoughts on the Education of Daughters" (1787) da littafin yara "Original Stories from Real Life" (1788), ta ce ya kamata yara su koyi yin tunani mai zurfi da kuma dabi'un aji na matsakaita.

faq.question: Menene mafi shaharar littafin Mary Wollstonecraft?
faq.answer: Mafi shaharar littafinta shi ne "A Vindication of the Rights of Woman," wanda aka buga a shekarar 1792.

faq.question: Wane irin ra'ayi Mary Wollstonecraft ke da shi game da ilimin mata?
faq.answer: Ta yi jayayya cewa mata a dabi'ance ba su kasa maza ba; kawai suna bayyana a matsayin kasa da maza saboda rashin ilimi, don haka ya kamata su sami ilimi mai kyau.

faq.question: Akwai wata shahararriyar mutum a cikin 'ya'yan Mary Wollstonecraft?
faq.answer: E, 'yarta ta biyu, Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, ta auri Percy Bysshe Shelley daga baya ta zama Mary Shelley, marubuciyar littafin nan mai suna "Frankenstein."

faq.question: Wane masanin falsafa ne Mary Wollstonecraft ta yi mu'amala da shi?
faq.answer: Ta yi mu'amala da marubuci mai tsatsauran ra'ayi Thomas Paine, masanin falsafa William Godwin, da sauransu, kuma ta auri William Godwin musamman.

faq.question: Menene matsayin Mary Wollstonecraft game da juyin juya halin Faransa?
faq.answer: Ta yi la'akari da mulkin Jacobins da Mulkin Ta'addanci, amma a lokaci guda ta ci gaba da kasancewa a kan cewa juyin juya halin babbar nasara ce.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin Lucretia Coffin a Nantucket, Massachusetts.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa Kungiyar Yaki da Bauta ta Mata ta Philadelphia.
Ta halarci Taron Yaki da Bauta na Duniya a London amma ba a ba ta gurbi ba saboda jinsinta.
Ta haɗa gwiwa wajen shirya Taron Seneca Falls, taron farko na yancin mata.
Ta mutu a Cheltenham, Pennsylvania.
An haife shi a cikin wani dangi na masu arziki a Jamhuriyar Venice.
Ya bar Venice tare da mahaifinsa da baffansa don fara tafiya mai nisa zuwa Asiya.
Ya isa fadar Kublai Khan a kasar Sin kuma yayi aiki a matsayin jakada na tsawon shekaru 17.
Yayin da yake gidan yari a hannun mutanen Genoa, ya fada wa wani a rubuta littafinsa mai suna "The Travels of Marco Polo."
Ya mutu a matsayin mai arziki a Venice, inda ya bar gado mai dorewa a fannin bincike da kewayawa.
An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na uku na Estêvão da Gama a Sines, Portugal.
Ya shiga Order of Santiago, inda Yarima John (daga baya John II) ya kasance Babban Malami.
Sarki John II ya tura shi zuwa Algarve don magance rikici da Faransa.
Ya tashi daga tashar jiragen ruwa na Belém a Lisbon don tafiyarsa ta farko zuwa Indiya.
Ya fara zama a wani tsibiri kusa da Mozambique.
Ya isa tashar jiragen ruwa ta Mombasa.
Ya isa Malindi.
Ya bar Malindi zuwa Indiya tare da wani sabon matuƙin jirgin ruwa.
Ya isa Calicut, Indiya.
Ya bar Calicut ya fara tafiyar dawowa gida.
Ya taso daga Indiya.
Ya isa Malindi.
Ya koma Lisbon.
Ya umurci tawagar farko na tafiya ta biyu zuwa Indiya kuma ya bar gida.
Ya isa Mozambique, ya kafa wurin kasuwanci, kuma ya rattaba hannu kan yarjejeniyar ciniki da Sofala.
Ya isa tsibirin Anjediva kusa da Goa, Indiya.
An kame jirgin aikin hajji na Musulunci "Miri," wanda ya haifar da kisan kiyashi.
Ya koma Kannur don yin tattaunawar ciniki.
Ya isa gaɓar tekun Calicut.
Ya kaddamar da harin wuta ba gaira ba dalili a tashar jirgin ruwa ta Calicut.
Ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa cike da kayan kamshi daga Indiya kuma ya fara tafiyar dawowa gida.
Ya isa Lisbon.
An nada shi Mataimakin Sarkin Indiya; ya tashi daga Lisbon a watan Afrilu kuma ya isa Indiya a watan Satumba (Tafiyarsa ta 3).
Sarki Manuel I ya ba shi lakabin Count of Vidigueira don karrama gudummawar da ya bayar wajen gano sabbin hanyoyin teku.
Sarki John III ya nada shi matsayin mai ba da shawara kan harkokin siyasa.
Ya mutu daga cutar zazzabin cizon sauro a Cochin, Indiya.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Hanyar Jirgin Ruwa zuwa Indiya
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ganowar Cape of Good Hope da Bartolomeu Dias ya yi, ya buɗe hanyar jirgin ruwa zuwa Indiya wanda ya daɗe yana zama babban burin Portugal.

keyAchievements.title: Turawa na Farko da suka Bude Hanyar Teku zuwa Indiya
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne Bature na farko da ya yi tafiya ta Tekun Atlantika da kuma tekun kudancin Afirka har zuwa Indiya.

keyAchievements.title: Karbar Lakabin Count of Vidigueira
keyAchievements.description: An gane shi don nasarar gano sabbin hanyoyin jirgin ruwa kuma Sarki Manuel I ya ba shi lakabin Count na Vidigueira a 1519.

keyAchievements.title: Yin Tafiya Zuwa Indiya Sau Uku a Jimlace
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin rayuwarsa, ya yi tafiya zuwa Indiya sau uku gaba ɗaya.

keyAchievements.title: Nadin a matsayin Mataimakin Sarkin Indiya
keyAchievements.description: An naɗa shi a matsayin Mataimakin Sarkin Indiya a 1514 kuma yayi aiki a matsayin Mataimakin Sarki har ya mutu a 1524.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Vasco da Gama?
faq.answer: An haifi Vasco da Gama a shekarar 1469 a Sines, da ke yankin Alentejo a kudu maso yammacin kasar Portugal.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorin da Vasco da Gama ya samu?
faq.answer: Vasco da Gama shi ne bature na farko da ya yi balaguro ta Tekun Atlantika da gabar tekun kudancin Afirka zuwa Indiya, inda ya bude hanyar teku zuwa Indiya.

faq.question: Sau nawa Vasco da Gama ya yi tafiya zuwa Indiya?
faq.answer: Vasco da Gama ya yi tafiya zuwa Indiya sau uku gaba daya a rayuwarsa.

faq.question: A ina Vasco da Gama ya mutu?
faq.answer: Vasco da Gama ya mutu daga cutar malariya a Cochin, Indiya, a ranar 24 ga Disamba, 1524.

faq.question: Tsawon wane lokaci tafiyarsa ta farko zuwa Indiya ta dauka?
faq.answer: Balaguron farko da Vasco da Gama ya yi zuwa Indiya ya dauki tsawon shekaru 2 gaba daya, wato tun da ya bar Lisbon a watan Yuli 1497 har zuwa dawowarsa.

vasco-da-gama.missingDataNote: An bayyana cewa asalin matuƙin jirgin ruwan da aka ɗauka aikin yi a Malindi ya sha bamban dangane da majiyar da aka dogara da ita, don haka mun cire wannan bayanin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Sabrosa, Portugal.
Ya shiga rundunar jiragen ruwa ta Portugal, ya fuskanci yakinsa na farko yayin da suke tafiya Indiya.
Ya tashi daga Spain, yana jagorantar rundunar Moluccas don neman hanyar yamma zuwa tsibiran Kayan Kamshi (Spice Islands).
Ya zama Bature na farko da ya gano mashigin ruwa na Magellan Strait kuma ya yi tafiya zuwa Tekun Pasifik.
An kashe shi a yakin Mactan a Philippines; duk da haka, daga bisani tawagarsa ta kammala kewayen duniya na farko.
An haife shi a Staten Island, New York.
A lokacin da yake da shekaru 16, ya fara sana'ar jirgin ruwan fasinja a tashar jiragen ruwa ta New York.
Ya kafa kamfaninsa na jirgin ruwa mai amfani da tururi kuma ya mamaye hanyoyin kasuwanci a kan Kogin Hudson.
Ya canza akalar kasuwancinsa daga harkar jigilar kayayyaki zuwa masana'antar layin dogo, inda ya samu ikon sarrafa Layin Dogo na New York Central.
Ya rasu a birnin New York a matsayin mutum mafi arziki a Amurka.
Haihuwa
Ya shiga aikin sa kai a matsayin manzo don kulla yarjejeniya da Da Yuezhi (Greater Yuezhi) da daular Han ta yi don yaki da Xiongnu, kuma ya nufi yankunan Yammaci (Western Regions).
Ya dawo daular Han.
Ya ba da gudunmawa ga harin daular Han karkashin jagorancin Emperor Wu a kan Xiongnu, kuma aka ba shi lakabin Marquis of Bowang (博망후).
전쟁 기일을 맞추지 못한 것을 문책받아 평민으로 강등됨
An tura shi a matsayin manzo zuwa Wusun.
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Bude Hanyar Silki (Silk Road)
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa mai girma ga bude Hanyar Silki (Silk Road).

keyAchievements.title: Yada ilimi game da yankunan Yammaci
keyAchievements.description: Ya yada ilimi mai daraja game da yankunan Yammaci ga daular Han, wando ya taimaka wajen kafa sabbin dabarun yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga yaki da Xiongnu
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa sosai ta hanyar amfani da kwarewarsa da kuma sanin geografi lokacin da Emperor Wu ya kai hari a kan Xiongnu a shekarar 123 BC.

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar kulla yarjejeniya da Wusun
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da shawarar kulla yarjejeniya ta aure da kuma komawar Wusun zuwa gabas don kafa harsashin inganta alakar daular Han da Wusun.

faq.question: Wane ne Zhang Qian?
faq.answer: Zhang Qian ya kasance mai tafiya, jakada, da kuma mai bincike na daular Han ta kasar Sin a karni na 2 BC, kuma ya ba da gudunmawa mai girma ga bude Hanyar Silki.

faq.question: Menene ainihin dalilin da ya sa aka tura Zhang Qian zuwa yankunan Yammaci?
faq.answer: Daular Han ta nemi manzo don kulla yarjejeniya da Da Yuezhi don yaki da Xiongnu, kuma Zhang Qian ya shiga aikin sa kai don nufar Da Yuezhi.

faq.question: Menene babban sakamakon da binciken Zhang Qian a yankunan Yammaci ya kawo wa daular Han?
faq.answer: Ko da yake ba a kulla yarjejeniyar ba, ilimi mai daraja game da yankunan Yammaci da Zhang Qian ya dawo da shi ya taimaka wa daular Han sosai wajen kafa sabbin dabarun yaki.

faq.question: Wadanne kayayyaki aka ce Zhang Qian ya dawo da su daga yankunan Yammaci?
faq.answer: Akwai labaran gargajiya cewa ya dawo da kayayyaki kamar inabi na yamma, rumman (pomegranate), da kuma peach.

zheng-he.missingDataNote: 원문에는 정화(鄭和)가 '명나라의 환관 출신 장군'이라는 사실만 명시되어 있으며, 그 외의 구체적인 연대기, 업적, 자주 묻는 질문에 대한 정보는 부족하여 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Herstal, Liege, Belgium a matsayin babban dan Pepin the Short da Bertrada na Laon.
Mahaifinsa Pepin the Short ya zama Sarkin Franks tare da amincewar Paparoma Zachary.
Paparoma Stephen II ya ba da lakabin sarauta ga Pepin da yaransa Charlemagne da Carloman.
Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa Pepin the Short, ya gaji sarauta kuma ya karbi ikon Austrasia da kuma yankunan arewa.
Ya zama mai mulki daya tilo bayan rasuwar kanwarsa Carloman I (카를로만 2세).
Ya fara kai hari a kan Saxons.
Ya rusa daular Lombards da ke arewacin Italiya kuma ya hade ta.
Ya halarci taron Easter tare da Paparoma a Rome, kuma ya sake tabbatar da alkawarin mika kasar Paparoma.
Ya sha kashi sosai sakamakon harin Basque a Yakin Roncevaux Pass a lokacin tafiyarta ta Iberian Peninsula.
Ya ziyarci Rome don ba da albarka ga yaransa maza biyu Pepin da Louis, kuma ya basu sarautar Lombard da Aquitaine.
Matarsa Hildegard da mahaifiyarsa Bertrada sun rasu daya bayan daya, kuma ya sake auren Fastrada.
Ya ci nasara a kan Thuringia da Bavaria, kuma ya sauke Duke Tassilo III na Bavaria.
Ya doke Avars sosai a kusa da Kogin Danube kuma ya kore su zuwa wajen iyaka.
Ya gina fadar masarauta da cocin masarauta a Aachen, arewa maso yammacin Jamus, kuma ya sanya shi a matsayin babban birni na zahiri.
Paparoma Leo III ya gudu zuwa fadar Charlemagne don neman taimako baada da abokan gabarsa suka kai masa hari.
Paparoma Leo III ya nada shi a matsayin Holy Roman Emperor a St. Peter's Basilica.
Louis the Pious ya ci nasara a kan Barcelona.
Khan Theodore (조던) na Avars ya ziyarci Aachen don yin rantsuwa a matsayin mai biyayya ga Charlemagne kuma ya shiga addinin Kiristanci.
Shugabannin kabilu ciki har da Višeslav na Croatia sun mika wuya da kansu.
Michael I Rangabe, sarki na Byzantine Empire, ya amince da Charlemagne a matsayin sarki.
Ya bayyana dansa da ya rage da rai, Louis the Pious, a matsayin magaji na hukumance a kotun Aachen, kuma aka yi masa nadin sarauta a matsayin co-emperor.
Ya rasu sakamakon matsalolin pleurisy da kuma damuwa a fadar Aachen.
Paparoma Paschal III ya nada Charlemagne a matsayin waliyyi (saint) bisa bukatar Frederick I.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Daular Franks
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye mafi yawan yankunan Yamma da Tsakiyar Turai don fadada daular Franks sosai kuma ya sami hadin kai na siyasa na Yammacin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Zama Holy Roman Emperor
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nadin sarauta na Holy Roman Emperor dari Paparoma Leo III a watan Disamba, 800 don hada mafi yawan Yammacin Turai ta fuskar siyasa da addini a karon farko tun bayan daular Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Carolingian Renaissance
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da Carolingian Renaissance ta hanyar inganta fasaha, addini, da kuma al'adu ta hanyar coci a lokacin mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara dokoki da kafa tsarin gwamnati guda daya
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara dokoki na kowane kabila don mulkar katon fili kuma ya tura jami'ai dari tsakiya don samar da mulki na gaba danya.

keyAchievements.title: Yada da kuma hada addinin Kiristanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi hadin kai na tunani ta hanyar sa kabilun da ya ci nasara a kansu su shiga addinin Catholic, kuma ya tura masu yada addini don taimaka musu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyoyin al'adu da ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina fadar masarauta da cocin masarauta a Aachen, kuma ya kafa dakin karatu na masarauta da makarantar fada don jagorantar farfado da ilimi da fasaha.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Charlemagne (Carolus the Great)?
faq.answer: Akwai ra'ayin cewa an haifi Charlemagne a ranar 2 ga watan Afrilu, 740 ko 742, ko kuma a shekarar 747.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Charlemagne da 'Uban Turai'?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa da 'Uban Turai' saboda Carolingian Renaissance ya kafa harsashin asalin Turai ta yanzu.

faq.question: Yaushe Charlemagne ya zama Holy Roman Emperor?
faq.answer: Charlemagne ya sami nadin sarauta na Holy Roman Emperor dari Paparoma Leo III a watan Disamba, 800.

faq.question: Menene tsayin Charlemagne?
faq.answer: Bisa ga tarihin Einhard da kuma sakamakon tono kabari a shekarar 1861, tsayin Charlemagne ya kai kusan 190-191 cm.

faq.question: Wadanne harsuna Charlemagne ya yi amfani da su?
faq.answer: Ya iya magana da harshen Latin cikin sauki ban da harshensa na asali, kuma ya iya harshen Greek kadan.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Charlemagne?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Herstal, Liege, Belgium, wando ya kasance sashi na daular Franks.

timeline.event: Ya yi mulki a matsayin Sapa Inca na tara na Masarautar Cusco kuma sarki na farko na Daular Inca (Inca Empire).
An tabbatar da shi a matsayin magaji baada ya kare Cusco lokacin da Chanka suka kai hari.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin Daular Inca
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin bunkasa karamar Masarautar Cusco zuwa babbar Daular Inca wacce ta mulki duk yammacin Kudancin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada filin daular
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin mulkinsa, Collasuyu da Chinchasuyu sun shiga karkashin ikon Daular Inca.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada da gyara babban birnin Cusco
keyAchievements.description: Ya canza Cusco, wando ya kasance karamin gari na lardi kawai, ta hanyar fadada shi sosai don ya dace da zama babban birnin daular.

keyAchievements.title: Sake gyara Coricancha
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara gine-gine da dama na Daular Inca kamar sake gyara Coricancha, haikalin rana.

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da manufar tilasta kaura (mitma)
keyAchievements.description: 제국 중앙 주민들을 국경지대로 강제 이주시켜 변방 지역을 개척하게 하는 식민 정책을 시행했습니다.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan Pachacuti?
faq.answer: 케추아어로 '시간과 공간을 흔드는 자' 또는 '지구를 흔드는 자'라는 뜻이며, '유팡키'는 '영광'을 의미합니다.

faq.question: Wane matsayi Pachacuti ya rike a Daular Inca?
faq.answer: Shi ne Sapa Inca na tara na Masarautar Cusco kuma sarki na farko na Daular Inca.

faq.question: Wane ne mahaifin Pachacuti?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa shi ne Viracocha Inca.

faq.question: Yaya Pachacuti ya zama magajin sarauta?
faq.answer: An tabbatar da shi a matsayin magaji kusan shekarar 1438 baada ya kare Cusco shi kadai lokacin da mahaifinsa da yayansa suka gudu saboda harin Chanka.

faq.question: Wane ne ake zargin ya gina Machu Picchu?
faq.answer: Mafi yawan masana kimiyyar kayan tarihi (archaeologists) suna zargin cewa Pachacuti ne ya gina Machu Picchu.

timeline.event: Haifuwar Akbar
Mahaifinsa Humayun ya sake cin nasara a kan India.
Ya zama sarki na uku na Daular Mughal yana da shekaru 13.
Ya doke sojojin Hindu a kusa da Delhi.
Ya sake gyara tsohuwar katangar Agra kuma ya ba ta suna 'Akbarabad'.
Ya fara gina sabon babban birni Fatehpur Sikri a kusa da Agra.
An fara amfani da Fatehpur Sikri a matsayin babban birni.
Babban boren adawa da gyare-gyarensa ya faru.
An mayar da babban birni daga Fatehpur Sikri zuwa Lahore.
Lahore ya kasance babban birnin Akbar.
Mutuwar Akbar

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa Daular Mughal
keyAchievements.description: Ya bunkasa Daular Mughal da kakansa Babur ya kafa zuwa kasa mai girma da ta dace da daula ta gaske.

keyAchievements.title: Karbar iko da daukar ma'aikata masu fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Ya karbi iko da kansa baada ya cika shekaru, kuma ya dauki ma'aikata masu fasaha ba tare da la'akari da asalinsu ba.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ya kulla yarjejeniya da sarakunan Rajput, ya mamaye mafi yawan arewacin India ta hanyar amfani da sabbin sojoji, kuma ya fadada mulkinsa zuwa kudu ta hanyar tafiya yankin Deccan a karshen mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran tsari (reforms)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara tsarin haraji ta hanyar soke Jizya (harajin da ake dorawa wadanda ba Musulmi ba a karkashin dokar Musulunci).

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da tsarin Mansabdari
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin Mansabdari don karfafa sojoji da kuma tsara ma'aikatan gwamnati daki-daki.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala kabarin mahaifinsa Humayun, ya sake gyara tsohuwar katangar Agra don kiran ta da 'Akbarabad', kuma ya fara gina Fatehpur Sikri don amfani da ita a matsayin babban birni.

keyAchievements.title: Hakuri da addinai (religious tolerance)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna sha'awa ga addinai da dama, kuma ya kafa ra'ayin addini na 'Din-i Ilahi' wando ke girmama dukkan addinai gaba danya.

keyAchievements.title: Kare al'adu da ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ko da yake bai sami ilimi ba a lokacin yarintarsa, ya kasance mai son fasaha da kare ilimi, kuma ya gudanar da aikin fassara daga Sanskrit zuwa harshen Persian.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Akbar the Great?
faq.answer: An haifi Akbar a ranar 25 ga watan Oktoba, 1542.

faq.question: Wane sarki ne Akbar the Great a Daular Mughal?
faq.answer: Akbar the Great ya kasance sarki na uku na Daular Mughal.

faq.question: Yaushe Akbar the Great ya zama sarki?
faq.answer: Akbar ya zama sarki a shekarar 1556 yana da karancin shekaru 13.

faq.question: Wane haraji ne Akbar the Great ya soke?
faq.answer: Akbar ya soke Jizya (harajin da ake dorawa wadanda ba Musulmi ba a karkashin dokar Musulunci).

faq.question: Menene tsarin soja da na gwamnati da Akbar the Great ya kaddamar?
faq.answer: Akbar ya kaddamar da tsarin Mansabdari don karfafa sojoji da kuma tsara ma'aikatan gwamnati daki-daki.

faq.question: Menene babban birnin da Akbar the Great ya gina?
faq.answer: Akbar ya fara gina sabon babban birni Fatehpur Sikri a kusa da Agra.

faq.question: Yaya ra'ayin addini na Akbar the Great yake?
faq.answer: Akbar ya nuna sha'awa ga addinai da dama, kuma ya kafa ra'ayin addini na 'Din-i Ilahi' wando ke girmama dukkan addinai gaba danya.

timeline.event: An haifi Nzinga Mbande.
Ta karbi ikon Ndongo baada mutuwar kanwarta Mbandi.
Mulkin Masarautar Ndongo
Portugal ta kaddamar da yaki a kan Ndongo.
Sojojin Nzinga sun gaji sosai, wando ya sa ta gudu zuwa gudun hijira.
Ta sake gina sojojinta ta hanyar kulla yarjejeniya da Imbangala, kuma ta ci nasara a kan Masarautar Matamba.
Mulkin Masarautar Matamba
Ta kulla yarjejeniya da Dutch West India Company wacce ta kwace Luanda dari hannun Portugal.
Ta sake karbar mafi yawan yankin Ndongo.
Portugal ta sake kwace Luanda, kuma Dutch sun bar Angola.
Kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Portugal.
Rasuwar Nzinga Mbande

keyAchievements.title: Magance rikicin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami horon soja da na siyasa a lokacin yarintarta, kuma ta nuna kwarewa wajen magance rikicin siyasa a matsayin jakada ga Daular Portugal.

keyAchievements.title: Cin nasara a kan Masarautar Matamba
keyAchievements.description: Ta sake gina sojojinta ta hanyar kulla yarjejeniya da Imbangala, kuma ta ci nasara a kan Masarautar Matamba dari shekarar 1631 zuwa 1635.

keyAchievements.title: Sake dawo da Ndongo
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami damar sake dawo da mafi yawan Ndongo tsakanin shekarar 1641 da 1644 ta hanyar kulla yarjejeniya da Dutch.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a kan Portugal
keyAchievements.description: Ta doke Portugal a yakoki da dama ta hanyar kulla yarjejeniya da Dutch.

faq.question: Wadanne masarautu Nzinga Mbande ta mulka?
faq.answer: Nzinga Mbande ta mulki masarautun Ambundu na Ndongo (1624-1663) da Matamba (1631-1663) da ke arewacin Angola a yanzu.

faq.question: Yaushe Nzinga Mbande ta karbi ikon Ndongo?
faq.answer: Nzinga Mbande ta karbi ikon Ndongo a shekarar 1624 baada mutuwar dan uwanta Mbandi.

faq.question: Wadanne yarjejeniyoyi (alliances) Nzinga Mbande ta kulla?
faq.answer: Don neman kariya, Nzinga Mbande ta auri janar na Imbangala Kasanje, kuma ta kulla yarjejeniya da Dutch West India Company a shekarar 1641 wacce ta kwace Luanda dari hannun Portugal.

timeline.event: An haife shi a tsibirin Samos, Asia Minor.
An kore shi sakamakon boren jama'a baada ya yi laccoci a Mytilene.
Ya kafa 'The Garden' (정원) a Athens, wando ya kasance wurin haduwar makarantarsa.
Ya rasu sakamakon kidney stones (요로결석).

keyAchievements.title: Kaddamar da Epicureanism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Epicureanism (makarantar Epicurus).

keyAchievements.title: Nuna manufar falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kalli cewa manufar falsafa ita ce samun rayuwa mai dadi da kwanciyar hangali.

keyAchievements.title: Uban falsafar hedonism
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama uban falsafar hedonism ta hanyar kare atomism da kuma hedonism a cikin etiks.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayoyin Ataraxia da Aponia
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana kwanciyar hankali na zuciya (ataraxia) da kuma rashin ciwo (aponia) a matsayin siffofin rayuwa mai dadi da kwanciyar hangali.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayi game da mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya koyar da cewa mutuwa karshen jiki da rai ne, don haka ba abin tsoro ba ne.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ra'ayi game da alloli
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna cewa alloli ba sa hukunta mutane ko ba su lada, kuma ba sa kula da mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa atomism
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana cewa dukkan abubuwan da ke faruwa a duniya suna fitowa ne dari motsi da kuma alakar atoms da ke motsawa a sarari mara komai.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da ra'ayin yancin zabar abu (free will)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kauce wa determinism kuma ya nuna yancin zabar abu ta hanyar bayyana cewa motsin atoms yana canza hanya lokaci-lokaci maimakon tafiya a kan layi daya kawai.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin daidaiton dan adam
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da daidaiton dan adam ga mutanen Greek ta hanyar yarda da mata da bayi su shiga makarantarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna ka'idar bayanai daban-daban (principle of multiple explanations)
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna 'ka'idar bayanai daban-daban' wacce ta taimaka wa falsafar kimiyya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin manufar falsafar Epicurus?
faq.answer: Ga Epicurus, manufar falsafa ita ce samun rayuwa mai dadi da kwanciyar hangali wacce ke da siffar kwanciyar hangali (ataraxia), zaman lafiya, yanci dari tsoro, da kuma rashin ciwo (aponia).

faq.question: Yaya Epicurus ya koyar game da mutuwa?
faq.answer: Epicurus ya koyar da cewa mutuwa ba abin tsoro ba ne saboda ita ce karshen jiki da rai, kuma idan muna raye babu mutuwa, sannan idan mutuwa tana nan ba ma nan, don haka mutuwa ba komai ba ce a gare mu.

faq.question: Wadanne ne siffofin makarantar Epicurus?
faq.answer: Makarantar Epicurus ita ce makarantar farko da ta yarda da mata a hukumance, ta dauki abota a matsayin muhimmin abu na farin ciki, kuma ta goyi bayan buya maimakon shiga siyasa.

faq.question: Menene jin dadi (pleasure) yake nufi ga Epicurus?
faq.answer: Epicurus ya kalli jin dadi a matsayin rashin zafi, kuma ya nemi jin dadi mai dorewa da kwanciyar hangali maimakon na wucin gadi ko na jiki.

epicurus.missingDataNote: 에피쿠로스의 18세 군 복무 시작 연도, 콜로폰으로 이주한 연도, 람프사쿠스에 학교를 세운 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 22 ga watan Satumba a Newington, a matsayin dan na uku na yara 4 na James Faraday da Margaret.
Ya zama mai koyon aiki (apprentice) ga George Riebau, wando ke gudanar da shagon sayar da littattafai, yana da shekaru 13.
Ya sanya hannu kan kwangilar koyon aiki na shekaru 7 tare da George Riebau a ranar 7 ga watan Agusta.
Ya karanta "Conversations on Chemistry" na Jane Marcet da kuma juzu'i na 3 na Encyclopædia Britannica na James Tytler.
Ya fara rubuta bayanai baada ya karanta labarai game da fasaha da kimiyya a cikin jaridu da mujallu.
Ya sami tikitin laccoci na chemistry na Humphry Davy don sauraron su; ya rubuta wasika ga Davy don neman taimako.
Ya fara aiki a Royal Institution tun daga watan Maris; ya fara tafiya zuwa Turai a matsayin sakatare da mai taimakawa na Davy a ranar 13 ga watan Oktoba.
Ya tafi Naples, Italiya don hawa Dutsen Vesuvius, kuma ya hadu da Alessandro Volta a Pavia.
Ya dawo Birtaniya a ranar 23 ga watan Afrilu; an sake daukar sa aiki a watan Mayu a matsayin mai kula da kayayyakin dakin gwaje-gwaje da na mineralogy na Royal Institution.
Ya auri Sarah Barnard a ranar 12 ga watan Yuni; ya wallafa rubutu game da electromagnetic rotation a cikin "Quarterly Journal of Science".
Ya bar rubutu "Magana na iya komawa wutar lantarki (magnetism turns into electricity)" a cikin littafin dakin gwaje-gwajensa.
Ya sami nasarar samar da liquid chlorine (염소의 액화).
Ya gano benzene; Royal Society ta ba shi aikin bincikar siffofin gani na gilashin da za a yi amfani da shi a telescope.
Ya gano tsarin molecular na naphthalene, ya kera samfuran crystal guda biyu, kuma ya kafa 'Royal Institution Christmas Lectures' (아이들을 위한 크리스마스 강연회).
Ya wallafa kasida game da practical chemistry a watan Afrilu; ya fara gwaje-gwaje kan optical glass baada Royal Institution ta ba shi makera ta musamman.
Ya bayyana nasarar binciken optical glass a Bakerian Lecture na Royal Society.
Ya fara gwaje-gwajen electromagnetism a ranar 29 ga watan Agusta kuma ya gano electromagnetic induction.
Ya fara binciken electrochemical decomposition a karshen shekara kuma ya gano dokar Faraday ta farko (Faraday's first law).
Ya gano dokar Faraday ta biyu a karshen shekara ta hanyar yin gwaji da abubuwa daban-daban da aka narkar a ruwa ta amfani da voltameter.
Ya gano cewa wutar lantarki (electric charge) na conductor tana yaduwa ne kawai a saman conductor din.
Ya wallafa juzu'i na 1 na "Experimental Researches in Electricity" (전기의 실험적 연구).
Ya sami nasarar samar da liquid ammonia, carbon dioxide, da sauran abubuwa da dama.
Ya hadu da William Thomson a Jami'ar Cambridge a watan Yuni; ya bayyana cewa magnetism da haske suna da alaka a ranar 18 ga watan Satumba kuma ya gano Faraday effect.
Ya fara gwaji don bincikar canjin diamagnetic material sakamakon magnetism, kuma ya ambaci ra'ayin magnetic field (자기장).
Ya sami damar zama a wani gida kusa da Hampton Court a gefen Kogin Thames na London bisa bukatar Sarauniya Victoria.
Ya wallafa "Experimental Researches in Chemistry and Physics" (화학 및 물리학의 실험적 연구).

Ya gabatar da sakamakon bincikensa kan gravity da wutar lantarki ga "Philosophical Transactions", amma an ba shi shawarar janye shi; ya yi laccarsa "The Chemical History of a Candle" (양초 한 자루에 담긴 화학 이야기) a Christmas Lectures na Royal Institution.
Rashin iya tunawa (memory loss) ya fara; ya yi laccarsa ta karshe a lokacin Kirsimeti.
Ya yi gwaji don gani ko electromagnetic field yana shafar spectrum na sodium da sauran metals da aka kona.
Ya rasu a ranar 25 ga watan Agusta.

keyAchievements.title: Gano electromagnetic induction
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano electromagnetic induction, diamagnetism, da kuma dokokin electrolysis, kuma ya kera electromagnetic rotation device wando ya zama asalin electric motor.

keyAchievements.title: Gano benzene da gabatar da kalmomin chemistry
keyAchievements.description: A matsanin masanin chemistry, ya gano benzene, ya binciki chlorine clathrate hydrate, kuma ya fara gabatar da kalmomi kamar anode, cathode, electrode, da ion.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar samar da liquid gas
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami nasarar samar da liquid chlorine, ammonia, carbon dioxide, da sauransu don tabbatar da wanzuwar critical point da kuma sauyawar yanayin abu.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike kan kera optical glass
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki siffofin gani na gilashin da za a yi amfani da shi a telescope don kera gilashi mai kyau ba tare da kumfa ko karce ba.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Faraday effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da alakar magnetic field da haske, kuma ya gano yadda polarized light ke juyawa a cikin magnetic field.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara diamagnetism da paramagnetism
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da sunan diamagnetism (wando ke tsayawa perpendicular ga magnetic field) da paramagnetism (wando ke tsayawa parallel), kuma ya gano cewa mafi yawan gas diamagnetic ne yayin da oxygen yake paramagnetic.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da magnetic field
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi imani cewa lines of magnetic force suna da ma'anar physics, kuma ya fara gabatar da magnetic field wando ke nuna canjin tasiri dari magnetic poles guda biyu dangane da matsayi.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Faraday cage principle
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano cewa electric charge na conductor tana yaduwa ne kawai a saman conductor din kuma ba ta da wani tasiri a cikin cikinsa mara komai.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Christmas Lectures
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Christmas Lectures' a shekarar 1826 don yada kimiyya ga jama'a, kuma wannan ya zama al'adar Royal Institution na London.

faq.question: Yaya asalin ilimi na Michael Faraday yake?
faq.answer: Faraday bai sami ilimi na makaranta ko na gaba da sakandare ba a lokacin yarintarsa, kuma ya koyi karatu, rubutu, da lissafi masu sauki kawai. Ya sami ilimin kimiyya ta hanyar karatu da kansa.

faq.question: Shin Faraday ya kware a lissafi?
faq.answer: Karfin lissafin Faraday bai kai ga iya trigonometry ba kuma ya iya algebra mai sauki kawai, amma yana da babban tunani na gani da hangen nesa. A baya, James Clerk Maxwell ya sake tsara ka'idojinsa ta hanyar lissafi.

faq.question: Shin Faraday ya nemi suna ko dukiya?
faq.answer: A'a. Bai damu da dukiyar duniya ba, ya ki yarda a wallafa laccocinsa, kuma ya ki karbar mukamin shugaban Royal Society da kuma lakabin Knight (knighthood). Tunaninsa na tawali'u da saukin kai sun fito ne dari imanin addininsa.

faq.question: Shin Faraday yana da yara?
faq.answer: A'a. Faraday ya auri Sarah Barnard amma basu taba samun yara ba. Sai dai ya kafa laccoci na kimiyya don yara kuma ya shiga da kansa don yada kimiyya ga jama'a.

faq.question: Yaya addinin Faraday ya shafi bincikensa na kimiyya?
faq.answer: Faraday ya kasance memba na kungiyar Sandemanians, wadanda suka kasance masu bin addinin Kiristanci na kashin kai. Tawalihunsa, saukin kansa, da kuma neman ilimi na gaskiya suna da alaka ta kusa da wannan addini na sa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Falaise, Masarautar Normandy.
Ya sami rantsuwar biyayya dari manyan mutanen Norman a matsayin magajinsa.
Ya gaji mukamin Duke na Normandy baada mahaifinsa Robert I ya rasu a Nicaea.
Ya danne boren kuma ya fara kaddamar da ikonsa a kan lardin Duke.
Ya yi nasara a Yakin Val-ès-Dunes tare da Sarkin Faransa Henry I.
Ya sami nasarar korar Guy of Burgundy.
Ya auri Matilda na Flanders.
Ana kallo cewa Sarki Edward na Ingila ya zabi William a matsayin magajinsa.
Ya kare Normandy dari harin bangarori biyu na Henry da kuma masu boren Norman.
Henry da Geoffrey Martel sun sha kashi a Yakin Varaville.
Ya karfafa mulkinsa a kan filin Normandy.
Ya karbi ikon Maine da ke makwabtaka da shi.
Ya tabbatar da ikon sa a kan Maine.
Ya tsara manyan jiragen ruwa don mamaye Ingila.
Ya doke Harold kuma ya kashe shi a Yakin Hastings.
An nada shi a matsayin Sarkin Ingila a Westminster Abbey da ke London.
Ya yi shirye-shiryen mulkar Ingila sannan ya koma Normandy.
Ya danne boren Edwin da Morcar kuma ya gina katangar Warwick, York, da Nottingham.
Ya danne boren Edgar the Ætheling da ya kai hari a York.
Ya gana da wakilan Paparoma guda uku don gudanar da taron gyara da kuma sake tsara Cocin Ingila.
Ya danne boren karshe na arewa kuma ya tsare Morcar.
Ya kai hari a Scotland don doke Malcolm kuma ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Abernethy.
Ya karbe Le Mans na Maine don kawo karshen yakin.
Ya danne 'Boren Earls'.
Ya sha kashi a hannun Sarkin Faransa Philip I a Yakin Dol.
Sabani ya faru tsakaninsa da babban dansa Robert.
Robert ya hambarar da shi dari kan doki a lokacin da ake kewaye Gerberoy.
Ya kulla yarjejeniya da Robert kuma ya sake tabbatar da cewa Robert zai karbi Normandy baada mutuwarsa.
Ya ziyarci Wales.
Ya ba da umarnin kama dan uwansa na gefe Odo.
Rasuwar matarsa Queen Matilda.
Ya ba da umarnin tsara littafin Domesday Book.
An kammala aikin Domesday Book mafi yawa kuma aka kulla Rantsuwar Salisbury.
Ya kaddamar da yaki zuwa Vexin, Faransa.
Ya rasu a Saint-Gervais priory kusa da Rouen.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa matsayin Duke na Normandy
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa mulkinsa a kan filin Normandy kusan shekarar 1060 baada ya yi fada mai tsawo don mukamin Duke.

keyAchievements.title: Cin nasara a kan Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya mamaye Ingila a shekarar 1066, ya yi nasara a Yakin Hastings, kuma ya zama Sarkin Ingila wando ya jagoranci Norman Conquest.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Domesday Book
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da umarnin tsara Domesday Book a shekarar 1086, wando yake binciken dukkan filayen da ake da su a Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin mulkar Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina katangogi da dama a Ingila, ya kafa manyan mutanen Norman, kuma ya canza tsarin malaman coci na Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniya da Flanders
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami babban abokin kariya na County of Flanders ta hanyar auren Matilda na Flanders.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi William I?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 8 ga watan Nuwamba, 1028 a Falaise, Masarautar Normandy.

faq.question: Yaya William I ya zama Sarkin Ingila?
faq.answer: Ya mamaye Ingila baada mutuwar Edward the Confessor a shekarar 1066, ya yi nasara a Yakin Hastings, kuma aka nada shi a matsayin Sarkin Ingila a London a ranar Kirsimeti na wannan shekarar.

faq.question: Menene Domesday Book?
faq.answer: Domesday Book shi ne bincike da William I ya ba da umarnin tsara shi a shekarar 1086 don nuna dukkan filayen da ake da su a Ingila.

faq.question: Yaushe William I ya rasu?
faq.answer: William I ya rasu a ranar 9 ga watan Satumba, 1087 a Saint-Gervais priory kusa da Rouen lokacin da yake yaki a arewacin Faransa.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar iyalin William I take?
faq.answer: An haife shi a matsayin dan shege (illegitimate son) na Duke Robert I na Normandy da kuma metres dinsa Herleva, kuma ya auri Matilda na Flanders inda ya sami yara maza hudu da mata biyar ko shida.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan daya tilo na Cambyses I, Sarkin Anshan na kabilar Persian, da kuma Mandane, diyar Sarki Astyages na Media.
Ya tada bore ga kakansa Astyages don fara yaki da Media.
Ya ci nasara a kan Daular Media ta hanyar karbar Ecbatana.
Ya nufi Sardis, babban birnin Lydia.
Sarkin Lydia Croesus ya sha kashi sosai kuma Sardis ya fadi.
Biranen Ionian na Greek da ke gabar Tekun Aegean sun mika wuya ga Persia.
Mamaye Neo-Babylonian Empire da faduwar Babylon
Ya rasu a yakin da ya yi da makiyaya (nomads) na Tsakiyar Asiya a gabashin Tekun Caspian.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Babban Daular Persia
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da Persia zuwa babban daula ta hanyar mamaye mafi yawan Yammacin Asiya, Tsakiyar Asiya, har zuwa India.

keyAchievements.title: Cin nasara a kan Daular Media
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci nasara a kan Daular Media ta hanyar karbar Ecbatana a shekarar 549 BC.

keyAchievements.title: Cin nasara a kan Lydia
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci nasara a kan Lydia ta hanyar mamaye Sardis, babban birnin Lydia a shekarar 546 BC.

keyAchievements.title: Cin nasara a kan Neo-Babylonian Empire
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci nasara a kan Neo-Babylonian Empire ta hanyar mamaye Babylon a shekarar 539 BC.

keyAchievements.title: Yantar da Yahudawa da yarda da sake gina haikali
keyAchievements.description: Ya yantar da Yahudawa da aka kama zuwa Babylon don su koma Jerusalem, kuma ya yarda da sake gina haikali mai tsarki na Jerusalem.

keyAchievements.title: Manufar hakuri da addinai
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna manufar hakuri da addinai da kuma karbar kowa don hada kan manyan kabilu daban-daban na Daular Persia.

keyAchievements.title: Cyrus Cylinder
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar Cyrus Cylinder, wando ake kallo a matsayin sanarwar farko ta yancin dan adam da ta haramta bauta.

faq.question: Daga ina sunan Cyrus ya fito?
faq.answer: Masana tarihin Greek na da sun rubuta cewa sunan Cyrus ya fito ne dari 'Kuros' wando ke nufin rana, kuma yana da alaka da ma'anar 'kamar rana' a harshen Persian na da.

faq.question: Yaya ake ambatar Cyrus a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki?
faq.answer: An rubuta shi a matsayin 'Cyrus' (고레스) a Tsohon Alkawari, inda ya bayyana a matsayin sarki da ya yantar da Yahudawa dari bautar Babylon kuma ya yarda da sake gina haikalin Jerusalem.

faq.question: Yaya Cyrus ya rasu?
faq.answer: Bisa ga masana tarihin da, ya mutu a yakin da ya yi da makiyaya na Tsakiyar Asiya a gabashin Tekun Caspian, kuma Herodotus ya rubuta cewa ya rasu a yakin da ya yi da sarauniyar Massagetae.

faq.question: Menene Cyrus Cylinder?
faq.answer: Ana kallon sa a matsayin sanarwar farko ta yancin dan adam da ta haramta bauta, kuma a yanzu ana ajiye shi a daki na 52 na British Museum.

faq.question: A ina kabarin Cyrus yake?
faq.answer: Yana a Pasargadae, kuma an shigar da shi cikin jerin UNESCO World Heritage Sites.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Vienna, Austria.
Ya sami digiri na uku (Ph.D.) a Jami'ar Vienna.
Ya auri Annemarie (Anny) Bertel.
Ya koma Jami'ar Zurich.
Ya wallafa kasidar wave mechanics "Quantisation as an Eigenvalue Problem" wacce ke kunshe da Schrödinger equation.
Ya gaje Max Planck a Jami'ar Friedrich Wilhelm na Berlin.
Ya bar Jamus saboda adawa da tsarin Nazi.
Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics tare da Paul Dirac.
Ya gabatar da gwajin tunani na Schrödinger's cat (슈뢰딩거의 고양이).
An kore shi a Graz baada hadewar Austria (Anschluss), kuma ya gudu zuwa Italiya sannan ya koma Dublin.
Ya zama shugaban makarantar theoretical physics a Dublin Institute for Advanced Studies.
Ya rubuta "What Is Life?" (생명이란 무엇인가).
Ya zama dan kasar Ireland.
Ya yi murabus a Dublin.
Ya koma Vienna.
Ya rasu sakamakon cutar tuberculosis (결핵) yana da shekaru 73 a Vienna.
Sashen physics na Trinity College Dublin ya ba da shawarar soke sunan Schrödinger Lecture Theatre saboda tarihin cin zarafin jima'i da ya yi.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Schrödinger equation
keyAchievements.description: Ya kera equation da ke bada hanyar lissafin wave function na system da kuma yadda yake canzawa a tsawon lokaci, wando ya kafa harsashin quantum mechanics.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Nobel Prize in Physics
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics tare da Paul Dirac a shekarar 1933 don kera Schrödinger equation.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta What Is Life?
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki rayuwa ta fuskar physics kuma ya tattauna matsalar gado (heredity), wando ya ba da wahayi ga gano DNA double helix structure.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da gwajin tunani na Schrödinger's cat
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shahararren gwajin tunani ne da aka kera shi don sukar Copenhagen interpretation na quantum mechanics, kuma shi ne daya dari cikin manyan abubuwan gadonsa.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike kan Unified Field Theory
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yunkuri da dama don kafa Unified Field Theory wando ke hada gravity, electromagnetism, da kuma nuclear force.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike kan color theory
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna babban sha'awa ga psychology, musamman color perception da colorimetry, kuma ya wallafa kasidu da dama a kan wannan fanni.

faq.question: Wane aiki ne Erwin Schrödinger ya sami Nobel Prize a kai?
faq.answer: Ya sami Nobel Prize in Physics tare da Paul Dirac a shekarar 1933 don kera Schrödinger equation.

faq.question: Menene Schrödinger's cat?
faq.answer: Wannan shahararren gwajin tunani ne da aka kera shi don sukar Copenhagen interpretation na quantum mechanics.

faq.question: Wane littafi Schrödinger ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta "What Is Life?", wando ke kunshe da bayani kan genetic code da kuma negentropy na halittu.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina Schrödinger ya haifu kuma ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Vienna, Austria a ranar 12 ga watan Agusta, 1887, kuma ya rasu sakamakon cutar tuberculosis (결핵) yana da shekaru 73 a Vienna a ranar 4 ga watan Janairu, 1961.

faq.question: Me yasa Schrödinger ya bar Jamus?
faq.answer: Ya bar Jamus a shekarar 1933 saboda ya tsani kyamar Yahudawa (anti-Semitism) na Nazis.

timeline.event: An haifi Giuseppe Maria Garibaldi, janar kuma kishin kasa na kasar Italiya.
Ya sami shaidar zama kyaftin na dukkan jiragen ruwan kasuwanci (merchant ships).
Ya hadu da Giovanni Battista Cuneo, dan gudun hijira na siyasa na Italiya a Taganrog, Rasha, kuma ya shiga kungiyar Young Italy (청년 이탈리아당).
Ya gudu zuwa Marseille baada an yanke masa hukuncin kisa sakamakon shiga cikin boren Piedmont.
Ya shiga cikin mayakan Ragamuffin a Brazil don taimaka wa yancin kai na Riograndense Republic.
Anita Ribeiro ta shiga cikin jirgin ruwan Garibaldi "Rio Pardo".
An haifi dansa na farko Menotti.
Ya koma Montevideo don yin aiki a matsayin dan kasuwa da kuma malami.
Ya auri Anita a Montevideo; ya jagoranci rundunar jiragen ruwan Uruguay kuma ya kafa 'Italian Legion' (이탈리아 군단).
An haifi diyarsa ta biyu Rosita; ya kafa Italian Legion a Montevideo.
An haifi diyarsa ta uku Teresita.
Ya yi nasara a Yakin Cerro da kuma Yakin San Antonio.
Ya koma kasarsa Italiya baada ya sami labarin barkewar juyin juya hali a Palermo.
An nada shi a matsayin Janar na Sojojin Kasa na Roman Republic; ya gudu zuwa arewacin Italiya baada faduwar Roman Republic; matarsa Anita ta rasu a lokacin da suke gudu.
Ya zama mazaunin New York.
Ya tuka jirgin ruwa na Commonwealth zuwa bakin Kogin Tyne a arewa maso gabashin Ingila a matsayin kyaftin.
Ya koma Italiya.
Yakin yancin kai na Italiya na Biyu ya barke; ya jagoranci 'Hunters of the Alps' (알프스의 사냥꾼들) don mamaye Varese da Como.
Ya jagoranci dubban sojojin taimako don sauka a Marsala, Sicily.
Ya doke dakarun Bourbon a Calatafimi.
Ya kaddamar da harin kewaye Palermo.
Ya shiga babban birnin Naples.
Dakarun taimako sun sami nasara a Yakin Kogin Volturno.
Ya hadu da Victor Emmanuel II a Teano kuma ya gaisa da shi ta hanyar musafaha.
An kafa hadaddiyar Masarautar Italiya (Kingdom of Italy).
Ya bar Genoa ya sauka a Palermo, inda ya tara dakarun taimako a karkashin taken "Rome ko Mutuwa".
Ya sauka a Melito kuma ya yi tattaki zuwa duwatsun Calabria.
Ya hadu da sojojin ticking (ko sojojin hukuma) a Dutsen Aspromonte kuma an kama shi a matsayin fursuna baada yaki.
Ya tara 'Hunters of the Alps' tare da tallafin gwamnatin Italiya, ya jagorance su zuwa Trentino, kuma ya doke sojojin Austria a Bezzecca.
Ya sake yin tattaki zuwa Rome, amma sojojin Papal States da sojojin taimako na Faransa suka marawa baya suka tsayar da shi.
Yakin Franco-Prussian ya barke.
Ya rasu a Tsibirin Caprera.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga hadewar Italiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga hadewar Italiya da kuma kafa Masarautar Italiya.

keyAchievements.title: Jarumin Duniya Guda Biyu (Hero of the Two Worlds)
keyAchievements.description: An san shi da 'Jarumin Duniya Guda Biyu' saboda ayyukansa na soja da suka shafi Kudancin Amurka da kuma Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Taimaka wa yancin kai na Kudancin Amurka
