keyAchievements.title: Fitaccen marubuci na zamanin Victoria
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin marubuci, mawaƙi, ɗan jarida, kuma mai fassara, ɗaya daga cikin fitattun marubuta na zamanin Victoria.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta litattafai guda 7 ciki har da "Adam Bede", "The Mill on the Floss", "Silas Marner", "Romola", "Middlemarch", da "Daniel Deronda", yana nuna ra'ayin gaskiya da fahimtar tunani.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar littattafan falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara "Rayuwar Yesu" ta Strauss (1846) da "Asalin Kiristanci" ta Feuerbach (1854).

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan edita a "Westminster Review"
keyAchievements.description: Daga 1851 zuwa tsakiyar 1854, ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin edita na "Westminster Review", yana gudanar da ainihin aikin bugawa kuma ya ba da gudummawar kasidu da sharhi da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Shawo kan son zuciya ta hanyar amfani da sunan bogi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da sunan bogi "George Eliot" don guje wa son zuciya ga mata marubuta da kuma tabbatar da cewa an kimanta ayyukansa ba tare da son kai ba.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan George Eliot?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunan George Eliot shi ne Mary Anne Evans.

faq.question: Menene babban dalilin da ya sa George Eliot ta yi amfani da sunan bogi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance don guje wa son zuciya cewa marubutan mata za su iya rubuta litattafan soyayya na yau da kullun ne kawai, don tabbatar da cewa an kimanta litattafansa dabam da kansa a matsayin edita da mai sharhi, kuma don guje wa badakalar rayuwa ta sirri.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun litattafan George Eliot?
faq.answer: Akwai "Adam Bede", "The Mill on the Floss", "Silas Marner", "Romola", "Middlemarch", da "Daniel Deronda".

faq.question: Wadanne siffofi ne litattafanta ke da su?
faq.answer: Yawancin litattafanta suna gudana ne a yankunan karkara na Ingila kuma sun shahara da ra'ayin gaskiya da kuma zurfin tunani.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan ayyuka ne George Eliot ta fassara?
faq.answer: Ta fassara "Rayuwar Yesu" ta Strauss da "Asalin Kiristanci" ta Feuerbach.

timeline.event: Mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yi amfani da cewa an haife shi ne a Ingila kusan shekara ta 1565.
Ya bar Gravesend a cikin jirgin Hopewell don fara gagarumar tafiyarsa ta farko.
Jirgin Hopewell da ma'aikatan jirgin sun koma Ingila.
Ya sake tashi a cikin jirgin Hopewell don fara tafiya don nemo hanyar Arewa maso Gabas.
An ba shi izini daga Kamfanin Yammacin Indiya na Holland a cikin jirgin Halve Maen (Half Moon) don neman hanyar Arewa maso Gabas.
Ya tashi a cikin jirgin Discovery don gano hanyar Arewa maso Yamma.
Ya bace a cikin Tekun Hudson bayan da 'yan tawayen suka watsar da shi tare da dansa John da wasu abokansa guda 7 a cikin wani karamin kwale-kwale.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Kogin Hudson, Mashigin Hudson, da Tekun Hudson
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1610, ya binciko arewacin Kanada kuma ya gano Kogin Hudson, Mashigin Hudson, da Tekun Hudson.

keyAchievements.title: Gano hanyoyin ruwa na Arewacin Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Kodayake ya gaza samun hanyar zuwa Asiya, ya gano hanyoyin ruwa daban-daban na Arewacin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Abubuwan da ya gano sun kafa harsashi ga sauran tafiye-tafiyen Turawa don mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci a Arewacin Amurka.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Hudson?
faq.answer: Yawancin masana tarihi sun yi imanin cewa an haifi Henry Hudson kusan 1565 a Ingila.

faq.question: Yaya Henry Hudson ya bace?
faq.answer: A ranar 23 ga Yuni, 1611, ya bace bayan da 'yan tawayen suka tilasta masa shiga cikin wani karamin kwale-kwale tare da dansa John da wasu abokansa guda 7 sannan aka watsar da su a Tekun Hudson.

faq.question: Menene babban burin binciken Henry Hudson?
faq.answer: Babban burin binciken Henry Hudson shi ne nemo hanyar Arewa maso Yamma ko Arewa maso Gabas zuwa Asiya.

faq.question: Menene gadon da binciken Henry Hudson ya bari?
faq.answer: Abubuwan da ya gano sun kafa harsashi ga mulkin mallaka da kasuwanci a Arewacin Amurka, kuma wurare da yawa da ya binciko kuma ya kewaya ana kiransu da sunansa a yau.

timeline.event: An haifi Homer

timeline.year: Ƙarshen ƙarni na 8 BC ko farkon ƙarni na 7 BC
timeline.event: Rubuta littafin "Iliad" da "Odyssey" (kimantawa)

keyAchievements.title: Rubutun "Iliad" da "Odyssey"
keyAchievements.description: An san shi a matsay인 marubucin litattafan almara guda biyu waɗanda ke kafa harsashin adabin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka, wato "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Waye Homer?
faq.answer: Homer ya kasance mawaƙin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka wanda aka haifa kusan ƙarni na 8 BC, kuma an san shi da marubucin "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan Homer?
faq.answer: An san shi a matsayin marubucin litattafan almara guda biyu waɗanda ke kafa harsashin adabin tsohuwar ƙasar Girka, wato "Iliad" da "Odyssey".

faq.question: Menene sanannun gaskiya game da rayuwar Homer?
faq.answer: A zamanin da, an yi imanin cewa shi mawaƙi ne makaho daga Ionia, amma masana na zamani suna ɗaukar wannan a matsayin labari. Kusan babu tabbataccen bayani game da rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka rubuta "Iliad" da "Odyssey"?
faq.answer: Ana jin cewa an rubuta waɗannan waƙoƙin ne a kusa da ƙarshen ƙarni na 8 BC ko farkon ƙarni na 7 BC.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cocin Steventon, Hampshire.
Ta yi karatu a Makarantar Kwana ta Mata ta Reading Abbey a Reading, Berkshire.
Ta fara rubuta litattafai tana da shekaru 14.
Ta rubuta "Elinor and Marianne" a cikin tsarin wasiƙa.
Ta hadu da wani matashi dan kasar Ireland mai suna Tom Lefroy, kuma ta rubuta "First Impressions".
Ta fara rubuta "Sense and Sensibility" bisa tushen "Elinor and Marianne".
Bayan mahaifinta ya mika aikin limanci, dangin sun koma Bath (Somerset).
해리스 빅 위저드의 프로포즈를 받았으나 하루 만에 거절했다.
Ta sayar da "Lady Susan" ga kamfanin Crosbie & Co.
Mahaifinta ya rasu.
Da taimakon yayanta na uku Edward, ta zauna a gidan kula da kaya a Chawton.
Ta rubuta "Mansfield Park" kuma ta buga "Sense and Sensibility" ba tare da sunanta ba.
Ta buga "Pride and Prejudice" wanda ya ginu a kan "First Impressions".
Ta buga "Mansfield Park".
Kafin buga "Emma", ta girmama kuma ta sadaukar da shi ga Yarima mai jiran gado (daga baya George IV).
Lafiyarta ta ci gaba da tabarbarewa kuma ta dade a kan gado.
Ta rasu a Winchester tana da shekaru 42 lokacin da take rubuta "Sanditon".
An buga "Northanger Abbey" da "Persuasion".

keyAchievements.title: Fara rubuta litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ta fara rubuta litattafai tana da shekaru 14 kuma ta girma a matsayin marubuciya tare da goyon bayan danginta.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Sense and Sensibility"
keyAchievements.description: Wannan shi ne daya daga cikin ayyukanta na farko da aka buga ba tare da sunanta ba a shekara ta 1811.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Pride and Prejudice"
keyAchievements.description: An buga shi a watan Janairu 1813, kuma ainihin sunansa shi ne "First Impressions".

keyAchievements.title: Buga da kuma sadaukar da "Emma"
keyAchievements.description: An buga shi bayan an sadaukar da shi ga Yarima mai jiran gado (daga baya George IV) a watan Oktoba 1815.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa 'Babban Al'ada' na Litattafan Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta ta da kafa 'Babban Al'ada' na litattafan Ingila ta hanyar bayyana rayuwar mata na tsakiya da na sama na Ingila a ƙarni na 18 tare da hangen nesa mai kyau da salo mai daɗi.

keyAchievements.title: Adabin gaskiya mai sukar al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Ta kirkiro ingantaccen duniyar fasaha bisa ga gaskiya ta hanyar yin amfani da cikakken lura da kuma hangen nesa mai tsanani don yin ba'a da yanayin abin duniya da munafunci na al'ummar lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Sake kimanta adabi bayan mutuwarta da kuma tasirin al'adun shahara
keyAchievements.description: Tun daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, ta sami yabo mai girma daga masu sharhi kuma ta shiga cikin manyan littattafan adabi, kuma a ƙarshen ƙarni na 20, ayyukanta sun zama fitattu ta hanyar sake yin su a matsayin fina-finai da wasan kwaikwayo.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jane Austen?
faq.answer: An haife ta a ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1775 a cocin Steventon, Hampshire.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Jane Austen?
faq.answer: Akwai "Sense and Sensibility" (1811), "Pride and Prejudice" (1813), "Mansfield Park" (1814), da "Emma" (1816).

faq.question: Wane irin litattafai ne Jane Austen ta rubuta?
faq.answer: Yana da siffar kwatanta rayuwar mata na tsakiya da na sama na Ingila a ƙarni na 18 tare da hangen nesa mai kyau da salo mai daɗi.

faq.question: Jane Austen ta kasance shaharariya a lokacin rayuwarta?
faq.answer: Ba ta kasance mai shahara sosai ba lokacin da take raye, amma ta zama sananna a ƙarni na 20 yayin da aka daidaita ayyukanta zuwa fina-finai sau da yawa.

faq.question: Jane Austen ta yi aure?
faq.answer: 톰 러프로이라는 청년과의 연애담이 있었으나 결실을 맺지 못했고, 1802년 해리스 빅 위저드의 프로포즈를 받았으나 하루 만에 거절했습니다.

faq.question: Yaushe Jane Austen ta rasu?
faq.answer: Ta rasu a ranar 18 ga Yuli, 1817 tana da shekaru 42.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pentonville, Landan, Ingila
Fara koyon yaren Girka
Fara koyon Latin, Euclid, da algebra da kuma yin aiki a matsayin malamin kannensa
Ya kai matakin da zai iya karanta ainihin rubuce-rubucen Plato ko Demosthenes
Fara nazarin ainihin rubuce-rubucen dabaru na Scholastic da na Aristotle
Fara nazarin tattalin arzikin siyasa
Ya zauna a kasar Faransa na tsawon shekara guda, inda ya halarci darussan sinadarai, ilimin dabbobi, da dabaru a Jami'ar Kimiyya ta Montpellier
Fuskantar matsalar tabin hankali ko gajiya ta jijiya
Kafa kungiyar masu ra'ayin amfani (Utilitarian Society) tare da abokansa
Buga littafin "Tsarin Dabaru" (A System of Logic)
Buga littafin "Essays on Some Unsettled Questions of Political Economy"
Buga littafin "Ka'idodin Tattalin Arzikin Siyasa" (Principles of Political Economy)
Aure tare da Harriet Taylor
Mutuwar Harriet Taylor da murabus daga Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya
Buga littafin "Akan 'Yanci" (On Liberty)
Buga "Utilitarianism" da "Considerations on Representative Government"
An zabe shi a matsayin Rector na Jami'ar St Andrews kuma an zabe shi a matsayin dan majalisar dokoki na mazabar Westminster ta London
Kammala wa'adin dan majalisar dokoki
Rarraba littafin "Karkashin Mata" (The Subjection of Women) da kuma ba da shawarar hakkin kada kuri'a ga mata a karon farko a majalisar dokoki
Ya rasu a Avignon, Faransa kuma an buga "Tarihin Rayuwa" (Autobiography)
Buga littafin "Akan Addini" (Three Essays on Religion)
Buga littafin "Chapters on Socialism"

keyAchievements.title: Kammala tsarin dabaru
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1843, ya buga "Tsarin Dabaru", inda ya kammala dabarar shiga ta Bacon kuma ya gabatar da wata hanyar mai ma'ana ga binciken kimiyyar halitta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ka'idar siyasa ta yanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar littafinsa "Akan 'Yanci", ya bar wani shahararren rubutu a kan manufar yanci, kuma ya gabatar da ka'idojin dimokuradiyyar yanci ta zamani wadda ke kare yancin fadin albarkacin baki a matsayin hakki na asali na dan kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Habaka ra'ayin amfani (Utilitarianism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya habaka tsarin kansa ta hanyar hada ra'ayin amfani na Bentham, wanda ya kasance uban gidansa kuma malaminsa, da ra'ayin Saint-Simonianism da Romanticism.

keyAchievements.title: Kare hakkin mata da sake fasalin al'umma
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na dan majalisa, ya ba da shawarar sake fasalin al'umma daban-daban kamar hakkin mata, wakilcin daidaituwa, kungiyoyin kwadago, da tsara gonaki ta hanyar hadin gwiwa, kuma ya fara gabatar da hakkin kada kuri'a na mata a majalisar dokoki.

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni na ka'idar gurguzu ta kasuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin daya daga cikin masana farko na gurguzu ta kasuwa ta hanyar ba da shawarar maye gurbin kamfanonin jari-hujja da hadin gwiwar ma'aikata.

faq.question: Yaya aka gudanar da ilimin John Stuart Mill?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa James Mill ne ya fi ba shi ilimi, kuma ya kasance yaro mai hazaka wanda ya koyi yaren Girka tun yana dan shekara uku, da Latin da kuma ilimin lissafi na gaba tun yana dan shekara takwas.

faq.question: Wace ra'ayi Mill ke da ita game da addini?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai sukar addini kansa, bai taba samun imani ba, ya musanta koyarwar Kiristanci kuma ya dauki addini a matsayin babban makiyin yanci.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Harriet Taylor ta yi a kan John Stuart Mill?
faq.answer: Harriet ta yi tasiri mai mahimmanci a kan tunanin Mill, musamman wajen karfafa matsayinsa na kare hakkin mata, kuma ta yi tasiri wajen rubuta littattafan "Akan 'Yanci" da "Karkashin Mata".

faq.question: Menene John Stuart Mill ya yi tunani game da 'tsayayyen yanayi' (stationary state)?
faq.answer: Ya yi imanin cewa tsayayyen yanayin jari da arziki ba abu ne mai ban tsoro ba, a maimakon haka yana iya zama yanayi na farin ciki wanda ya fi na yanzu ci gaba sosai, kuma ya yi hasashen cewa bil'adama za su fi mayar da hankali ga dabi'u kamar daraja, mutunci, da shari'a maimakon damuwa da kudi.

faq.question: John Stuart Mill ya kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu?
faq.answer: Ya kira kansa mai ra'ayin gurguzu, kuma ana daukar shi a matsayin daya daga cikin masana farko na gurguzu ta kasuwa ta hanyar ba da shawarar maye gurbin kamfanonin jari-hujja da hadin gwiwar ma'aikata.

timeline.event: An haife ta a wani kauyen kasar Faransa.
Ta hadu da Jacques Biétrix de Rozières kuma ta yi doguwar dangantakar soyayya da shi.
A shekarar da mahaifinta na asali ya rasu, ta fara aikinta na marubuciya kuma ta rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza".
Ta buga kasida mai suna "Wasiƙu zuwa ga Mutane" (Letters to the People).
Ba a iya gabatar da "Zamore da Mirza" ba, kuma ta rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mai suna "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" (The Black Market).

Ta zama memba na "Kungiyar Jama'a" (Social Club) ko kuma "Kungiyar Abokai na Gaskiya", kuma ta fara rubuta "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa" (Declaration of the Rights of Woman and the Female Citizen).
Yan kungiyar Jacobin sun kama kuma sun daure yan kungiyar Girondin wadanda abokan kawancen ta ne.
An kashe yan kungiyar Girondin a guillotine.
Kungiyar Jacobin ta yanke mata hukuncin kisa.
An kashe ta.
An ayyana sunan wani mahaɗar hanyoyi a birnin Paris a matsayin "Olympe de Gouges".

keyAchievements.title: Kare hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi ikirari mai ban mamaki cewa ya kamata a ba mata hakkin kada kuri'a a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa"
keyAchievements.description: Ganin cewa kund인 tsarin mulkin kasar Faransa na shekarar 1791 bai shafi hakkin kada kuri'a na mata ba, ta rubuta sanarwar da ke bayyana daidaiton hakkin mata.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan yaki da bautar da bakaken fata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi kokari wajen kare hakkin bakaken fata ta hanyar rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza" a shekarar 1784, da kuma "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" a shekarar 1789.

keyAchievements.title: Shawarar yarjejeniyar aure da dokar kare mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta ba da shawarar dokoki don raba dukiya daidai tsakanin miji da mata, raba dukiya daidai lokacin kisan aure, da kuma kare mata matsalata da 'ya'yansu.

keyAchievements.title: Kare tsarin mulkin sarauta
keyAchievements.description: Ta nuna rashin amincewa da soke tsarin mulkin sarauta a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa kuma ta kare Sarki Louis XVI da Sarauniya Marie Antoinette.

faq.question: Wacece Olympe de Gouges?
faq.answer: Olympe de Gouges ta kasance mai fafutukar kare hakkin dan kasa kuma mai tsaurin ra'ayi wajen kare hakkin mata wadda ta bukaci a ba mata hakkin kada kuri'a a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa.

faq.question: Menene babban aikin rubutunta?
faq.answer: Babban aikinta shi ne "Sanarwar Yancin Mata da Yar Kasa" (Declaration of the Rights of Woman and the Female Citizen) wanda aka rubuta a shekarar 1791.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe ta?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1793, kungiyar Jacobin ta kashe ta a kan zargin ayyukan cin amana da kuma kokarin dawo da tsarin mulkin sarauta, bisa ga abubuwan da ke cikin kasidarta ta "The Three Urns, or the Salvation of the Fatherland, by an Aerial Traveller" da kuma wasan kwaikwayo da ba a kammala ba mai suna "France Saved, or the Tyrant Dethroned".

faq.question: Wane matsayi take da shi game da hakkin bakaken fata?
faq.answer: Ta nuna adawa da bautar da bakaken fata ta hanyar rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na yaki da bautar da mutane mai suna "Zamore da Mirza" a shekarar 1784 da kuma "Kasuwar Bakaken Fata" a shekarar 1789.

faq.question: Wane matsayi take da shi game da juyin juya halin Faransa?
faq.answer: Kodayake ta yi maraba da juyin juya halin Faransa, ta ji takaici cewa hakkin daidaiton da juyin juya halin ya gabatar bai shafi mata ba, kuma ta ki amincewa da kokarin juyin juya halin na soke tsarin mulkin sarauta sannan ta goyi bayan ci gaba da sarauta.

olympe-de-gouges.missingDataNote: 17세에 결혼하고 남편이 일찍 죽었다는 내용은 있으나, 해당 사건의 정확한 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략했습니다.

timeline.event: An haifi Plotinus
Mutuwar Plotinus

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ra'ayin Neoplatonism
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi "Wanda ya kafa Neoplatonism" saboda ya mayar da hankali sosai wajen koyar da tunanin Plato.

keyAchievements.title: Kiyaye da kuma gyara ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Almajirinsa Porphyry ya kiyaye ayyukansa guda 54, kuma ya tsara su zuwa rukunoni 6 na littattafai 9 kowanne.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Enneads"
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa da almajirinsa Porphyry ya tsara ana kiransu da "Enneads" a yau.

keyAchievements.title: Nazarin manufar 'Daya' (The One)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana tunaninsa ta hanyar mayar da hankali kan tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka fito daga "Daya".

keyAchievements.title: Habaka manufar 'Fitowa' (Emanation)
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da hankali kan manufar "Fitowa" (Emanation) yayin da yake amsa tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka kasance daga "Daya".

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Plotinus kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haifi Plotinus a shekara ta 205 kuma ya rasu a shekara ta 270.

faq.question: Wane salon falsafa ne aka san Plotinus da kafa shi?
faq.answer: Ana kiran Plotinus da "Wanda ya kafa Neoplatonism" saboda ya mayar da hankali sosai wajen koyar da tunanin Plato.

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan Plotinus?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa guda 54 da almajirinsa Porphyry ya tsara zuwa rukunoni 6 na littattafai 9 kowanne ana kiransu da "Enneads" a yau.

faq.question: Menene ainihin ra'ayi na falsafar Plotinus?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da tunaninsa ta hanyar mayar da hankali kan tambayar yadda abubuwa da yawa suka fito daga "Daya" (Hen), kuma ya mayar da hankali kan manufar "Fitowa" (Emanation).

faq.question: Akwai wani abu da aka sani game da dangin Plotinus ko girmashi?
faq.answer: Babu wani labari da aka watsa game da danginsa ko girma.

plotinus.missingDataNote: 플로티노스의 가족 및 성장에 관한 이야기는 원문에 전해오는 것이 없다고 명시되어 있습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Borge kusa da Oslo
Ya yanke shawarar zama mai bincike bayan ya burge da ketare Greenland na Fridtjof Nansen
Bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa, ya bar makarantar likitanci kuma ya shiga Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Norway
An zabe shi a matsayin babban jami'in jirgin bincike na Kudancin Duniya
Ya zama kyaftin saboda gudummawar da ya bayar wajen fita daga kankara ta hanyar ba da umarni ga jirgin Belgica
Ya fara tafiyar bincike na Arewa kuma ya tabbatar da matsayin Magnetic North Pole
Ya isa Nome, Alaska, kuma ya dawo bayan ya bude Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma
Ya yanke shawarar cin nasara a Kudancin Duniya kuma ya tafi tafiyar bincike na Kudancin Duniya
Ya zama mutum na farko da ya ci nasara a kan Kudancin Duniya
Ya yi kokarin binciko Tekun Arewa a cikin jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu na Norge tare da Umberto Nobile da sauransu, inda suka wuce saman Pole na Arewa sannan suka sauka a Alaska
Ya bace yayin da yake neman abokinsa Umberto Nobile, kuma an tabbatar da mutuwarsa bayan an gano sassan jirgin sama

keyAchievements.title: Tafiya ta farko ta bil'adama zuwa Kudancin Duniya
keyAchievements.description: A ranar 14 ga Disamba, 1911, ya zama mutum na farko da ya isa Kudancin Duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Isa Pole na Arewa na farko na bil'adama
keyAchievements.description: Ya isa Pole na Arewa a karon farko ta hanyar amfani da jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu.

keyAchievements.title: Bude Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya isa Nome, Alaska a shekara ta 1905 kuma ya bude Hanyar Arewa maso Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa wajen gano Hanyar Arewa maso Gabas
keyAchievements.description: Kodayake ya yi ta yawo a cikin binciken Arewa tare da jirgin Maud, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen gano Hanyar Arewa maso Gabas.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa wajen rage nisa na duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar binciken Tekun Arewa a shekara ta 1926, ya taimaka wajen rage nisa na duniya ta hanyar hada yammacin Turai, Asiya, da Arewacin Amurka ta Tekun Arewa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Roald Amundsen?
faq.answer: An haifi Roald Amundsen a ranar 16 ga Yuli, 1872.

faq.question: Yaushe Roald Amundsen ya rasu?
faq.answer: Roald Amundsen ya rasu a ranar 18 ga Yuni, 1928.

faq.question: Ina Roald Amundsen ya isa a matsayin mutum na farko?
faq.answer: Roald Amundsen ya isa Kudancin Duniya a ranar 14 ga Disamba, 1911 a matsayin mutum na farko, kuma ya kai Pole na Arewa a cikin jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu a matsayin na farko.

faq.question: Menene sirrin nasarar Roald Amundsen a binciken Kudancin Duniya?
faq.answer: Ya kasance saboda shiri na tsanaki kamar kyawawan tufafi, kafa alamun hanya, zabar mambobin kungiya na tsanaki, karbar shawarwarin mambobin kungiya, samar da abinci mai kyau, watsar da kayan da ba su da amfani, da kuma nazarin dalilan gazawar sauran masu bincike.

timeline.event: Haihuwa
Buga "Sanarwar Hanyoyi" (Declaration of Sentiments) a taron farko na hakkin mata da aka gudanar a Seneca Falls, New York
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar taron farko na hakkin mata
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1848, ta fitar da Sanarwar Hanyoyi a taron farko na hakkin mata da aka gudanar a Seneca Falls, New York, kuma galibi ana daukar wannan a matsayin farkon kungiyar hakkin mata da hakkin kada kuri'a na mata da aka tsara.

keyAchievements.title: Yin ikirarin falsafa game da rawar mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi ikirarin cewa mace ita ce mai sarrafa kaddarar kanta, ya kamata ta sami hakki iri daya da sauran mambobi a matsayin yar kasa, kuma rawar da take takawa a matsayin "uwa, mata, 'yar uwa, 'ya" kawai rawar baka ce.

faq.question: Wacece Elizabeth Cady Stanton?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Cady Stanton ta kasance mai fafutukar kare hakkin jama'a a Amurka, mai yaki da bauta, kuma jagora a farkon kungiyar hakkin mata.

faq.question: Menene mafi mahimmancin aikinta?
faq.answer: A shekara ta 1848, ta fitar da Sanarwar Hanyoyi a taron farko na hakkin mata da aka gudanar a Seneca Falls, New York, kuma galibi ana daukar wannan a matsayin farkon kungiyar hakkin mata da hakkin kada kuri'a na mata da aka tsara.

faq.question: Yaya ta yi ikirari game da rawar mata?
faq.answer: Ta yi ikirarin cewa mace ita ce mai sarrafa kaddarar kanta, ya kamata ta sami hakki iri daya da sauran mambobi a matsayin yar kasa, kuma rawar da take takawa a matsayin "uwa, mata, 'yar uwa, 'ya" kawai rawar baka ce.

timeline.event: An haifi Henrik Johan Ibsen a Skien, Norway.
Yana da shekaru 18, ya haifi da namiji mai suna Hans Jacob Hendrichsen Birkdalen tare da Else Sophie Jensdatter Birkedalen.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwaysonsa na farko "Catiline" a karkashin sunan bogi "Brynjolf Bjarme", kuma ya gabatar da wasansa na farko na kan danta mai suna "The Burial Mound".
Ya zama darektan fasaha na Christiania Theatre kuma ya auri Suzannah Thoresen.
An haifi dansa Sigurd.
Ya bar Christiania ya tafi Sorrento, Italiya, inda ya fara rayuwarsa a kasashen waje na tsawon shekaru 27.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "Brand" wanda ya kawo masa yabo daga masu sharhi da kuma nasarar kudi.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "Peer Gynt" wanda Edvard Grieg ya tsara kidan sa.
Ya tashi daga Italiya zuwa Dresden, Jamus.
Ya buga tarin wakokinsa guda daya tilo mai suna "Digte" (Poems).
Ya rubuta "Emperor and Galilean" wanda ke nuna rayuwar Sarkin Roma Julian the Apostate, kuma an ba shi matsayin jarumi.
Ya koma Munich kuma ya fara aiki a kan wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko na gaskiya na zamani mai suna "Pillars of Society".
An buga wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko na gaskiya na zamani "Pillars of Society" kuma an gabatar da shi a karon farko.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "A Doll's House" wanda ya kawo masa yabo na duniya.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "Ghosts" wanda ke dauke da sharhi kan dabi'un al'ummar Ibsen.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "An Enemy of the People" wanda ya shafi jigo mai cike da cece-kuce.
Ya buga wasan kwaikwayo "The Wild Duck" wanda mutane da yawa ke dauka a matsayin mafi kyawun aikin Ibsen.
Ya buga aikinsa na baya "Hedda Gabler" wanda ya binciki rikice-rikice na tunani.
Ya koma Christiania, Norway bayan ya kammala rayuwarsa a kasashen waje na tsawon shekaru 27.
Ya buga aikinsa na baya "The Master Builder" wanda ya binciki rikice-rikice na tunani, kuma an ba shi matsayin kwamanda.
Ya sami Babban Gicciye na Royal Norwegian Order of St. Olav.
Ya sha fama da shanyewar jiki (stroke) sau da yawa.
An zabe shi a matsay인 dan takarar Kyautar Nobel a Adabi.
An zabe shi a matsay인 dan takarar Kyautar Nobel a Adabi.
An zabe shi a matsay인 dan takarar Kyautar Nobel a Adabi.
Ya rasu a gidansa da ke Christiania yana da shekaru 78.
Don bikin cika shekaru 100 da mutuwar Ibsen, an gudanar da bukukuwan 'Shekarar Ibsen' a Norway da wasu kasashe daban-daban, kuma "A Doll's House" shi ne wasan kwaikwayo da aka fi gabatarwa a duniya.
An fara gudanar da 'Delhi Ibsen Festival' duk shekara a Delhi, India.
Hakon Anton Fageras ya kera bust guda biyu na tagulla na Ibsen wadanda za a ajiye a Ibsen Park da ke Sorrento, Italiya da kuma gundumar Skien.
Ya kera mutum-mutumin marmara na Ibsen don Ibsen Museum da ke Oslo.
Google ya gabatar da Doodle don bikin cika shekaru 185 da haifuwar Henrik Ibsen.

keyAchievements.title: Uban wasan kwaikwayo na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta shi a matsayin mafi kyawun marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a duniya a ƙarni na 19 kuma ana kiran shi 'Uban wasan kwaikwayo na zamani'.

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni na wasan kwaikwayo na gaskiya
keyAchievements.description: Ko da yake ya rubuta ayyukan almara na waka, ya kafa harsashin wasan kwaikwayo na gaskiya.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin wasan kwaikwayo da aka fi gabatarwa a duniya
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne marubucin wasan kwaikwayo da aka fi gabatarwa a duniya bayan Shakespeare.

keyAchievements.title: Yabo na duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami yabo na duniya ta hanyar ayyuka kamar "Brand", "Peer Gynt", da "A Doll's House".

keyAchievements.title: Sake tsara ka'idojin wasan kwaikwayo
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake rubuta ka'idojin wasan kwaikwayo gaba daya ta hanyar amfani da ra'ayin gaskiya.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin wasan kwaikwayo mai tasiri
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri a kan George Bernard Show, Oscar Wilde, James Joyce da sauransu.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henrik Ibsen kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 20 ga Maris, 1828 kuma ya rasu a ranar 23 ga Mayu, 1906.

faq.question: Yaya ake kimanta Henrik Ibsen a matsayin mutum?
faq.answer: Ana kiran shi mafi kyawun marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a duniya a ƙarni na 19 da kuma 'Uban wasan khoaikwayo na zamani'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne shahararrun ayyukan Henrik Ibsen?
faq.answer: Akwai "A Doll's House", "Ghosts", "An Enemy of the People", "The Wild Duck", da "Peer Gynt".

faq.question: Henrik Ibsen ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Adabi?
faq.answer: An zabe shi a matsayin dan takarar Kyautar Nobel a Adabi a shekarun 1902, 1903, da 1904.

faq.question: Wace ra'ayi ta siyasa Henrik Ibsen ke da ita?
faq.answer: Ya bayyana ra'ayin gurguzu na cewa kasa la'ana ce ga mutum daya kuma ya kamata a soke ta.

Ya sami ilimin firamare a mahaifarsa
21 ga Satumba, ya rasu a Brindisi

keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Aeneid", wato babban wasan almara na kasar Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Georgics"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Georgics".

keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Eclogues".

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga adabin Latin
keyAchievements.description: Ana kimanta ayyukansa da nuna ainihin yaren Latin da adabin Latin.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri ga adabin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri ga marubutan Turai ta hanyar samar da ma'auni na kyan gani ga tsararraki daban-daban.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana a cikin "Divine Comedy" na Dante
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana a matsay인 mai jagorantar lahira a cikin "Divine Comedy" na Dante.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Virgil kuma yaushe ya rasu?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga Oktoba, 70 BC kuma ya rasu a ranar 21 ga Satumba, 19 BC.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Virgil?
faq.answer: Manyan ayyukansa sun hada da "Aeneid" wanda babban wasan almara na kasar Roma ne, da kuma "Georgics" da "Eclogues".

faq.question: Wace falsafa Virgil ya koya?
faq.answer: Ya koyi falsafar Epicureanism, kuma ya sami zurfin ilimin falsafar tsohuwar kasar Girka a makarantar Epicurean wadda Siro ke jagoranta.

faq.question: Virgil ya kammala "Aeneid"?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta "Aeneid" na tsawon shekaru 11 kafin mutuwarsa, amma ya rasu kafin ya kammala shi.

faq.question: Wane aiki iyayen Virgil suka yi?
faq.answer: Iyayensa sun fito ne daga talakawa, mahaifinsa ya kasance manomi kuma mai kera tukwane.

virgil.missingDataNote: 원문 내 연도 정보의 불일치(로마 이주 시점과 초등교육 종료 시점) 및 오기(나폴리 이주 시점의 '기원후' 표기)로 인해 일부 사건의 연도는 타임라인에서 제외되었습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Sarauniyar Faransa da ta Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance Sarauniyar Sarkin Faransa Louis VII, amma bayan saki ta zama Sarauniyar Sarkin Ingila Henry II.

keyAchievements.title: Mahaifiyar Sarakunan Ingila guda biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama mahaifiyar Richard I da Sarki John na Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa da yada al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ta tallafa wa mawaƙa da marubuta kuma ta yada al'adun fada na kudancin Faransa masu kayatarwa a Faransa da Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Gajerar filaye masu fadi
keyAchievements.description: 아버지로부터 아키텐 공국과 푸아티에 백국의 광대한 영지를 계승했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Gudanar da mulki a matsayin mai rikon sarauta
keyAchievements.description: Ta gudanar da mulki a matsayin mai rikon sarauta lokacin da danta Richard I ya shiga Yakin Yaki na Uku (Third Crusade).

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar tattaunawar fansa
keyAchievements.description: Lokacin da aka tsare Richard I, ta tafi yankin Daular Roma mai Tsarki don jagorantar tattaunawar fansarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da dokar teku
keyAchievements.description: Ta gabatar da dokar teku (Rolls of Oleron) a Oleron dake karkashin mallakarta da kuma Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen habaka al'adun kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen habaka al'adun kasuwanci tsakanin tashoshin jiragen ruwa na kasashen Yaki da Constantinople.

keyAchievements.title: Kula da 'ya'yanta
keyAchievements.description: Ta ci gaba da rayuwa har lokacin mulkin danta mafi kankanta John tana taimaka wa 'ya'yanta.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen auren masarautar Faransa
keyAchievements.description: Ta zabi Blanche of Castile a matsayin matar Louis na Faransa kuma ta tabbatar da auren.

faq.question: Menene shekarar haihuwar Eleanor?
faq.answer: Ana jin cewa an haife ta ne a shekara ta 1122 bisa ga bayanan da ke nuna cewa tana da shekaru 82 lokacin da ta rasu a shekara ta 1204.

faq.question: Wacece Eleanor ta kasance matar sarauta ga?
faq.answer: Ta kasance Sarauniyar Sarkin Faransa Louis VII, amma bayan saki ta zama Sarauniyar Sarkin Ingila Henry II.

faq.question: Su wane ne mutanen da Eleanor ta tallafa musu?
faq.answer: Ta tallafa wa mawaƙa da marubuta sakamakon tasirin Poitiers wanda ya kasance cibiyar adabin soyayya a ƙarni na 12.

faq.question: Daga yaushe zuwa yaushe Eleanor ta kasance a daure?
faq.answer: An tsare ta daga shekara ta 1173 har zuwa mutuwar Henry II a shekara ta 1189.

faq.question: Wane ne a cikin 'ya'yan Eleanor ya zama Sarkin Ingila?
faq.answer: Daga cikin 'ya'yan da ta haifa da Henry II, Richard I da Sarki John sun zama Sarakunan Ingila.

faq.question: Shin bayanan cewa Eleanor ta jagoranci 'Kotun Soyayya' gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: Masanin tarihi Alison Weir ya kammala cewa wannan kagaggen labari ne na adabi na Capellanus, kuma bai bayyana a ko'ina ba in ban da littafin Capellanus.

eleanor-of-aquitaine.missingDataNote: 엘레오노르의 정확한 출생연도와 출생지는 밝혀지지 않았습니다. 엘레오노르의 머리색이나 눈의 색과 같은 상세한 외모 묘사는 남아있지 않습니다. 존 스피드의 저작에 1158년 필립이라는 아이를 낳았다는 기록이 있으나, 그 근거가 현재 전해지지 않아 불확실합니다.

13 ga Mayu, an haife ta a matsayin diya ta farko ga Charles VI na Daular Roma mai Tsarki da Elisabeth Christine na Brunswick-Wolfenbuttel
Ta fada cikin soyayya da Francis Stephen na Lorraine
12 ga Fabrairu, ta auri Francis Stephen na Lorraine
Bayan mutuwar Charles VI, Yakin Gado na Austria ya barke
13 ga Maris, ta haifi danta Joseph
25 ga Yuni, an nada ta a matsayin Sarauniyar Hungary
11 ga Satumba, ta yi jawabi a majalisar Hungary don samun kudaden yaki da sojoji
Ta sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Dresden don amincewa da mallakar Silesia ga Prussia
4 ga Oktoba, ta yi nasarar nada mijinta Francis Stephen a matsayin Sarki
Yarjejeniyar Aix-la-Chapelle ta kawo karshen Yakin Gado na Austria
Yakin Shekaru Bakwai ya barke tsakanin Prussia da Austria
Bayan mutuwar Elizabeth na Rasha da hawan Peter III zuwa sarauta, Rasha ta janye daga Yakin Shekaru Bakwai
An hada dukkan cibiyoyin soji a karkashin Hukumar Yaki ta Fada don zama babban rukunin yanke shawara
Yarjejeniyar Hubertusburg ta tabbatar da mallakar Silesia ga Prussia a karshe
Bayan mutuwar mijinta Francis I, danta Joseph II ya zama Sarkin Daular
An aiwatar da yancin zabar tufafi
Ta amince da auren soyayya na diyarta ta hudu Maria Christina
An aiwatar da murkushe 'yan kungiyar Jesuit
29 ga Nuwamba, ta rasu

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran gida da na soja
keyAchievements.description: Ta gudanar da gyaran gida ta hanyar amfani da Haugwitz da gyaran soja ta hanyar Daun don ciyar da Austria gaba.

keyAchievements.title: Juya mulki na diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ta kulla kawance da Faransa ta hanyar amfani da Kaunitz, inda ta kawo karshen gaba da aka yi tun zamanin Maximilian I kuma ta cimma juyin juya halin diflomasiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ilimin tilas
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa ilimin tilas ta hanyar gina makarantun firamare a duk fadin kasar kafin sauran kasashe, wanda ya taimaka wajen habaka ilimin jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Hana karuwanci da kakkabe shi
keyAchievements.description: Ta hana karuwanci, kuma an kama karuwai da dillalansu sannan aka yi musu bulala tare da tura su gidan gyaran hali don yin aikin tilas.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa karfin soja
keyAchievements.description: Ta kara karfin sojan Austria sosai ta hanyar kafa kwamitin gudanar da mulkin soja, hada Hukumar Yaki ta Fada, da kuma amfani da tsarin aikin soja na tilas.

faq.question: Maria Theresa ta kasance Sarauniya?
faq.answer: A hukumance, ta kasance matar Sarki ce maimakon Sarauniyar Daular Roma mai Tsarki, amma saboda karancin ikon siyasa na mijinta, mutane sun dauke ta a matsayin Sarauniya ta gaske.

faq.question: Wadanne 'ya'ya Maria Theresa ta haifa?
faq.answer: Ta haifi 'ya'ya 16 (maza 5 da mata 11) tare da Francis Stephen na Lorraine, wadanda suka hada da Joseph II, Leopold II, da Marie Antoinette.

faq.question: Maria Theresa ta samu nasarar dawo da Silesia?
faq.answer: Ta yi kokarin dawo da Silesia ta hanyar Yakin Gado na Austria da Yakin Shekaru Bakwai, amma ta gaza kuma a karshe ta amince da mallakarta ga Prussia.

faq.question: Yaya Maria Theresa ta zama mai mulkin Masarautar Habsburg?
faq.answer: Bayan mahaifinta Charles VI ya gaza haihuwar da namiji, an sanar da ita a matsayin magajiyar Masarautar Habsburg a karkashin takardar mulki (Pragmatic Sanction) a shekara ta 1713, kuma ta gaji filayensa baada mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Wace manufar ilimi Maria Theresa ta aiwatar?
faq.answer: Ta kafa ilimin tilas ta hanyar gina makarantun firamare a duk fadin kasar kafin sauran kasashe, kuma ta rarraba litattafai iri daya don habaka ilimin jama'a.

timeline.event: Sarauniyar tsohuwar kabilar Iceni ta Birtaniya wadda ta jagoranci tawaye ga Daular Roma.
An yi watsi da wasiyar mijinta Prasutagus, an mamaye masarautarsa kuma aka kwace dukiyoyinsa, sannan aka yi wa Boudica bulala aka yi wa 'ya'yanta fyade.
Ta jagoranci mutanen Iceni, Trinovantes da sauran kabilu don tayar da tawaye.
Ta mamaye kuma ta lalata Camulodunum (Colchester na yanzu), wanda ya kasance babban birnin Trinovantes.
An doke Runduna ta Tara ta Hispania (Legio IX Hispana) ta Daular Roma lokacin da suke kokarin dawo da Camulodunum.
Gwamna Suetonius ya bar kariyar Londinium (London na yanzu) kuma ya kona daukacin birnin.
An bar Verulamium (St Albans na yanzu) kuma ya zama toka.
Sojojin tawaye na Boudica sun sha kaye a hannun sojojin Roma karkashin jagorancin Suetonius a Yakin Watling Street.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar tawaye ga Daular Roma
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 60 AD ko 61 AD, ta jagoranci babban tawaye ga Daular Roma tare da kabilun Iceni da Trinovantes.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye Camulodunum da doke sojojin Roma
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin tawayen, ta mamaye kuma ta lalata Camulodunum, tsohon babban birnin Trinovantes, kuma ta doke Runduna ta Tara ta Hispania ta Daular Roma da ke kokarin dawo da shi.

faq.question: Wacece Boudica?
faq.answer: Boudica ta kasance Sarauniyar tsohuwar kabilar Iceni ta Birtaniya wadda ta jagoranci tawaye da bai yi nasara ba ga Daular Roma mai mamaye a shekarar 60 AD ko 61 AD.

faq.question: Me yasa Boudica ta tayar da tawaye?
faq.answer: Ya kasance don yin tir da zaluncin Roma bayan da aka yi watsi da wasiyar mijinta Prasutagus, aka mamaye masarautarsa, aka kwace dukiyoyinsa, aka yi mata bulala sannan aka yi wa 'ya'yanta fyade.

faq.question: Yaya aka bayyana karshen Boudica?
faq.answer: Akwai ra'ayoyi daban-daban game da mutuwar Boudica, kamar cewa ta kashe kanta, sojojin Roma sun kama ta da rai, ko kuma ta rasu sakamakon rashin lafiya.

timeline.event: An haifi Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Turi (Askia the Great)
Ya kalubalanci gadon sarauta na Sonni Baru, dan Sonni Ali
Ya zama mai mulki na farko na Daular Askia a Daular Songhai
Dansa Askia Musa ya sauke shi daga mulki
Mutuwar Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Turi (Askia the Great)

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa da fadada Daular
keyAchievements.description: Ya karfafa daularsa don zama mafi girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka, inda ya fadada yankuna daga Taghaza a arewa zuwa iyakokin Yatenga a kudu, kuma daga Air a arewa maso gabas zuwa Futa Djallon a Guinea.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada kasuwanci
keyAchievements.description: Ya hanzarta fadada kasuwanci tare da Turai da Asiya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa cibiyoyin ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ilimi ta hanyar kafa makarantu da yawa a cikin daular.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa addinin Musulunci
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa addinin Musulunci a matsay인 muhimmin bangare na daular.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da tsarin mulki da inganta tsarin gwamnati
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da tsarin mulki na gwamnati mara misaltuwa a Yammacin Afirka, inda ya karfafa da kuma inganta tsarin gargajiya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin tattalin arziki da haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daidaitattun ma'aunin kasuwanci da ka'idoji, ya samar da tsaro a hanyoyin kasuwanci, kuma ya kafa tsarin haraji mai tsari.

faq.question: Waye Askia the Great?
faq.answer: Askia the Great shi ne Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Turi, mai mulki na farko na Daular Askia wanda ya mulki Daular Songhai daga shekara ta 1493 zuwa 1528. An san shi da gina daula mafi girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka da kuma kafa addinin Musulunci.

faq.question: Yaushe Askia the Great ya yi mulki?
faq.answer: Askia the Great ya mulki Daular Songhai daga shekara ta 1493 zuwa 1528.

faq.question: Yaya Askia the Great ya samu iko?
faq.answer: Ya kalubalanci gadon sarauta na Sonni Baru, dan Sonni Ali a shekarar 1492, kuma ya doke shi sannan ya zama mai mulkin Daular Songhai a shekarar 1493.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Askia the Great?
faq.answer: Ya fadada da karfafa Daular Songhai don zama mafi girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka, ya fadada kasuwanci da Turai da Asiya, kuma ya kafa makarantu da yawa. Ya kuma kafa addinin Musulunci a matsayin muhimmin bangare na daular, sannan ya gabatar da tsarin mulki na gwamnati da tsarin haraji mai tsari.

faq.question: Yaya mulkin Askia the Great ya kare?
faq.answer: Dansa Askia Musa ya sauke Askia the Great daga sarauta a shekarar 1528.

timeline.event: An haifi Abu Rayhan al-Biruni
Mutuwar Abu Rayhan al-Biruni

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga ilimin kimiyyar kasa da kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gagarumar gudummawa ga fannonin ilimin kasa da kimiyyar kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Geodesy
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi Uban Geodesy saboda gagarumar gudummawar da ya bayar ga kimiyyar kasa.

al-biruni.missingDataNote: FAQ 항목은 원문에 명시된 질문과 답변이 없어 생략되었습니다. 구체적인 수학, 천문학, 물리학, 자연과학, 역사학, 연대학, 언어학 분야의 개별 업적은 원문에 명시되어 있지 않아 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Folkestone, Kent, Ingila
Ya fara karatun likitanci da sauran ilimi a Gonville and Caius College, Jami'ar Cambridge
Sauke karatu daga Jami'ar Cambridge
Tafiya don karatu a Jami'ar Padua, Italiya
Bayan ya kammala karatunsa a kasashen waje, ya dawo ya bude asibiti a Landan
Aure tare da Elizabeth Browne
An zabe shi a matsayin memba na Royal College of Physicians
An nada shi a matsayin likita a St. Bartholomew's Hospital
An nada shi a matsayin malamin ilimin jikin dan adam da aikin tiyata a kwalejin
Ya fara gabatar da lakcocin da ke bayyana ra'ayoyinsa da abubuwan da ya gano game da zuciya da jini
Ya zama likitan fada na Sarki James I
Ya zama likitan fada na Sarki Charles I
《동물의 심장과 혈액의 운동에 관한 해부학적 연구》를 출판
《동물발생론》을 저술
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban Royal College of Physicians amma ya ki amsar mukamin
Ya rasu a ranar 3 ga Yuni a Landan, Ingila

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ka'idar zagayen jini
keyAchievements.description: 《동물의 심장과 혈액의 운동에 관한 해부학적 연구》를 출판하여 혈액순환론을 제시하고 근대과학의 순서에 따라 증명했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga ilimin embryology
keyAchievements.description: 《동물발생론》을 저술하여 동물은 모두 알에서 발생한다고 주장했습니다.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken zuciya da hanyoyin jini
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da cewa bawuloli da ke tsakanin atria da ventricles, da kuma na veins, suna barin jini ya gudana ne kavai a hanya daya, kuma ya gano cewa ventricles suna aiki kamar famfo.

keyAchievements.title: Gano pulmonary circulation
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano pulmonary circulation wanda ke farawa daga vena cava zuwa tsarin arteries.

faq.question: Menene babban hanyar binciken William Harvey?
faq.answer: 하비는 기존 이론의 모순을 제시하고 반박한 후 새로운 가설을 설정하고 실험을 통해 검증하는 근대과학의 연구 틀을 따랐습니다.

faq.question: Shin an amince da ka'idar zagayen jini ta William Harvey lokacin da aka fitar da ita?
faq.answer: Ba a amince da ka'idar zagayen jini tasa ba a lokacin, kuma an ce ko malaminsa Fabricius ya soki Harvey.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan abubuwan da suka yi tasiri a kan binciken William Harvey?
faq.answer: Lalaccen anatomy na fili a Jami'ar Padua, hanyar bincike mai dogaro da gwaje-gwaje na malaminsa Fabricius, da kuma ra'ayin microcosm na Aristotle sun yi tasiri a kan bincikensa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Fieldhead, Birstall, kusa da Leeds, a arewacin Ingila
Mutuwar mahaifiyarsa Mary Priestley
Bayan mahaifinsa ya sake yin aure, an mika shi ga innarsa Sarah Keighley da kawunsa John Keighley
Ya shiga makarantar hauza ta wadanda ba sa bin cocin kasa (Dissenting Academy) a Daventry, Northamptonshire
Ya sauke karatu daga Daventry Academy kuma ya fara aiki a matsayin liman a Needham Market, Suffolk a kudancin Ingila
Ya koma wata coci a Nantwich, Cheshire, inda ya kafa makaranta don koyar da dalibai da kansa
Ya rubuta littafin nahawu "Rudiments of English Grammar" kuma ya sami aiki a matsayin malamin adabi a Warrington Academy
Ya zama liman na wadanda ba sa bin cocin kasa a Warrington, kuma ya auri Mary Wilkinson
An ba shi digirin digirgir a kan shari'a (Doctor of Laws) daga Jami'ar Edinburgh
Ya zama memba na Royal Society sakamakon bincikensa a kan wutar lantarki
Ya buga "The History and Present State of Electricity" kuma an nada shi a matsayin liman a Mill Hill Chapel a Leeds, Yorkshire
Ya gabatar da hanyar yin ruwan soda a matsayin "Directions for Impregnating Water with Fixed Air", kuma ya buga juzu'i na farko na "Institutes of Natural and Revealed Religion"
An ba shi Lambar Copley don gano hanyar yin ruwan soda kuma ya zauna a Calne, Wiltshire
Ya samu iskar oxygen ta hanyar dumama sinadarin red mercuric oxide, kuma ya hadu da Antoine Lavoisier a Paris don tattauna gano iskar oxygen
Ya sanar da gano "dephlogisticated air" (oxygen)
Ya buga "Disquisitions Relating to Matter and Spirit" da "Doctrine of Philosophical Necessity Illustrated"
Ya bar Calne ya koma Birmingham inda ya yi aiki a matsayin liman a New Meeting House
Ya buga "An History of the Corruptions of Christianity"

Ya rubuta wata kasida da ke sukar littafin Edmund Burke "Reflections on the Revolution in France", kuma ya koma Hackney kusa da Landan bayan da taron tashe-tashen hankula a Birmingham ya lalata gidansa da cocinsa
Ya bar Ingila ya koma Amurka inda ya zauna a Northumberland, Pennsylvania
Ya buga littafinsa na karshe a fannin kimiyya mai suna "The Doctrine of Phlogiston Established and That of the Composition of Water Refuted"
Ya rasu a Northumberland, Amurka

keyAchievements.title: Gano iskar oxygen
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1774, ya gano iskar oxygen ta hanyar dumama sinadarin red mercuric oxide sannan ya calling ta da "dephlogisticated air" kuma ya bayyana siffofinta.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar ruwan soda
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hanyar yin ruwan soda ta hanyar narkar da carbon dioxide a cikin ruwa kuma ya sanar da ita a shekara ta 1772, wanda ya sa aka ba shi Lambar Copley.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken wutar lantarki
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama memba na Royal Society ta hanyar bincikensa a kan wutar lantarki, kuma ya buga "The History and Present State of Electricity" a shekara ta 1767.

keyAchievements.title: Gano gas daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano gas daban-daban kamar nitrous oxide, ammonia, hydrogen chloride, sulfur dioxide, silicon tetrafluoride, nitrogen, da carbon monoxide.

keyAchievements.title: Gano yadda tsirrai ke samar da iskar oxygen
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano cewa haske yana da mahimmanci ga girman tsirrai kuma tsirrai suna samar da iskar oxygen, wanda ya kafa harsashi ga binciken photosynthesis.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawar ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta litattafai da ke da alaka da ilimi kamar "Rudiments of English Grammar" da "Biography", kuma ya gabatar da manhajar ilimi ta aikace-aikace don daukaka matakin ilimi na Warrington Academy.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa ka'idar siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi tasiri a kan ra'ayin amfani ta hanyar ba da shawarar hakkin jama'a da na tawaye a cikin littafinsa "An Essay on the First Principles of Government".

faq.question: Waye Joseph Priestley?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin sinadarai, liman, masanin addini, masanin ilimi, masanin siyasa, kuma masanin falsafar halitta na kasar Ingila, wanda ya ba da gudummawa a fannoni da dama kamar yanci, siyasa, addini, da falsafar gwaji.

faq.question: Menene mafi shahararren aikinsa?
faq.answer: An fi saninsa da gano iskar oxygen, wadda ya kira da "dephlogisticated air" a shekara ta 1774.

faq.question: Yaya ya gano iskar oxygen?
faq.answer: A ranar 1 ga Agusta, 1774, ya gano cewa iskar da aka samu ta hanyar dumama sinadarin red mercuric oxide da hasken rana ta hanyar madubin hangen nesa (convex lens) tana sa kyandir ya fi konewa.

faq.question: Wace akida ta addini da siyasa yake da ita?
faq.answer: A addinance ya goyi bayan Unitarianism, a siyasance liberalism, kuma a falsafance materialism.

faq.question: Yaya alakarta take da Lavoisier?
faq.answer: Priestley ya gaya wa Lavoisier game da gano iskar oxygen a shekara ta 1774, amma shi da kansa ya yi imani da ka'idar phlogiston har karshen rayuwarsa kuma ya ki amincewa da juyin juya halin sinadarai na Lavoisier.

faq.question: Yaya karshen rayuwarsa ta kasance?
faq.answer: Sakamakon tashe-tashen hankula a Birmingham a shekara ta 1791, ya kasance daban da mutane a Ingila, kuma a shekara ta 1794 ya koma Amurka inda ya karkare rayuwarsa a matsayin liman a Northumberland.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stenbrohult, Sweden.
Ya shiga Jami'ar Lund.
Ya koma Jami'ar Uppsala.
Ya rubuta makala kan jima'i na tsirrai mai suna "Praeludia Sponsaliorum Plantarum".
An amince da balaguron Lapland kuma aka fara shi.
Ya sami digirin likitanci daga Jami'ar Harderwijk a Netherlands.
Buga bugun farko na "Systema Naturae".
Ya zama mai kula da tsirrai kuma likita na sirri a Hartekamp.
Buga littafin "Genera Plantarum".
Ya koma Sweden kuma ya nemi auren Sara Elisabeth Moraea.
Ya auri Sara Elisabeth Moraea.
Ya zama farfesa na likitanci a Jami'ar Uppsala.
Ya canza ma'aunin zafi na Celsius zuwa ma'aunin da ake amfani da shi a yau.
Ya sami matsay인 babban likita "Archiater" daga Sarkin Sweden Adolf Frederick.
Ya zama Rector na Jami'ar Uppsala.
Buga bugun farko na "Species Plantarum".
Buga bugun na 10 na "Systema Naturae".
An ba shi matsayin mai daraja kuma aka ba shi sunan Carl von Linne.
Ya yi murabus daga Jami'ar Uppsala saboda dalilai na lafiya.
Ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Janairu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin rarraba halittu
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gagarumar gudummawa wajen kafa harsashin rarraba halittu, wanda ya sa ake kiran shi 'Uban ilimin shuka na zamani'.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin binomial nomenclature
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin sunaye guda biyu (binomial nomenclature) wanda ke kunshe da sunan genus da na species, kuma ya mayar da shi na hukuma ta hanyar amfani da shi a cikin ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Habaka tsarin jima'i na tsirrai
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da tsarin jima'i na tsirrai wanda ke rarraba azuzuwa da oda dangane da yawan stamens da pistils na shuka.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta manyan littattafan rarraba halittu
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta manyan littattafai masu dauke da tsarin rarraba dabbobi da shuke-shuke kamar "Systema Naturae" da "Species Plantarum".

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da tsarin rarraba mataki-mataki
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da dauloli guda uku na dabbobi, tsirrai, da ma'adinai, tare da matakai kamar phylum, class, order, family, genus, species, da variety.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'tattalin arzikin halitta'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin "tattalin arzikin halitta" (economy of nature) don bayyana yadda halitta ke sabunta kanta da kuma zagayen ta, wanda ya kafa harsashi ga binciken ilimin kiyaye muhalli (ecology).

faq.question: Waye Carl von Linne?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin tsirrai na kasar Sweden, wanda ya ba da gagarumar gudummawa wajen kafa harsashin rarraba halittu, wanda ya sa ake kiran shi 'Uban ilimin shuka na zamani'.

faq.question: Menene mafi mahimmancin aikin rarraba halittu na Carl von Linne?
faq.answer: Shi ne kafa tsarin sunaye guda biyu (binomial nomenclature) wanda ke hada sunan genus da na species, kuma ya mayar da shi na hukuma ta hanyar amfani da shi a cikin ayyukansa.

faq.question: Yaya Linnaeus ya rarraba halittu?
faq.answer: Ya rarraba halittu ta hanyar gabatar da dauloli guda uku na dabbobi, tsirrai, da ma'adinai, tare da matakai kamar phylum, class, order, family, genus, species, da variety.

faq.question: Shin har yanzu ana amfani da tsarin rarraba halittu na Linnaeus a yau?
faq.answer: Kodayake rarraba halittu na Linnaeus ya kasance harsashi ga ilimin rarraba halittu na zamani, an yi gyare-gyare da yawa a kai bayan an sami kura-kurai kamar rarrabawa bisa sassan haifuwa na tsirrai.

faq.question: Wace rawa daliban Linnaeus suka taka?
faq.answer: Daliban Linnaeus wadanda ake kira da "Apostles" sun yi balaguro zuwa sassa daban-daban na duniya don tattara sabbin samfuran halittu, wanda ya taimaka wajen samar da tsarin rarraba halittu na duniya na Linnaeus.

timeline.event: An haife shi a gunduma ta 2 na Vienna, Daular Austria
Ya wuce jarrabawar karshe ta Akademisches Gymnasium
Ya mika makalar bincike kan alpha particles ga Physikalische Zeitschrift
Ya koma addinin Lutheran kuma ya sami baftisma ta Kiristanci
Ya buga makaloli guda biyu kan beta radiation
Ya koma Kaiser Wilhelm Institute (KWI) don yin aiki ba tare da albashi ba a sashen radiochemistry na Otto Hahn
An dauke shi a matsayin ma'aikaci na din-din-din a KWI
Ya gano isotope mai karko na protactinium a karon farko tare da Otto Hahn kuma ya sami Leibniz Medal
Ya sami dakin bincikensa na kansa a Kaiser Wilhelm Institute for Chemistry

Ya bayyana yadda lokacin da electron na cikin atom ya fita, electron na waje yake cike gurbinsa, kuma banbancin makamashi tsakanin lokutan biyu yana komawa ga wani electron na waje wanda ke fita daga atom din (Auger effect)
Ya zama cikakken farfesa na ilimin lissafi (physics) a Jami'ar Berlin, wanda ya sa ta zama mace ta farko da ta zama cikakken farfesa a Jamus
Ya fara "bincike fiye da uranium" tare da Otto Hahn
Bayan hadewar Jamus da Austria (Anschluss), ta fada cikin hadari yayin da Dokokin Rarraba Jinsi na Nuremberg suka shafe ta
Ta bar Berlin ta gudu zuwa Sweden don guje wa tsanantawa ta Nazis
Ta buga sakamakon binciken nuclear fission a cikin jaridar Nature tare da Otto Robert Frisch
Ta gaza samun Kyautar Nobel a Kimiyyar Sinadarai (Chemistry) kan nuclear fission
Ta yi murabus daga Siegbahn Institute kuma ta koma sabon dakin bincike da Hukumar Makamashin Nukiliya ta Sweden ta kafa a Royal Institute of Technology
Ta sami zama dan kasar Sweden
Ta yi ritaya gaba daya kuma ta koma kasar Ingila inda mafi yawan danginta ke zaune
Ta rasu lokacin tana barci (tana da shekaru 89)
An sanya wa sinadari mai lamba 109 sunan Meitnerium don girmama Lise Meitner

keyAchievements.title: Gano nuclear fission
keyAchievements.description: Ta gano a karon farko tare da Otto Hahn cewa uranium yana rarrabuwa (nuclear fission) idan ya sha shakar neutrons.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana ka'idar fitar da makamashi ta nuclear fission
keyAchievements.description: Ta gane tare da Otto Robert Frisch cewa rarrabuwar nukiliya tana tare da fitar da makamashi mai yawa sakamakon raguwar nauyi da kuma daidaiton nauyi da makamashi (mass-energy equivalence).

keyAchievements.title: Gano isotope mai karko na protactinium
keyAchievements.description: Ta gano isotope mai karko na protactinium a karon farko tare da Otto Hahn.

keyAchievements.title: Bayyana ka'idar Auger effect
keyAchievements.description: Ta bayyana yadda lokacin da electron na cikin atom ya fita, electron na waje yake cike gurbinsa, kuma banbancin makamashi tsakanin lokutan biyu yana komawa ga wani electron na waje wanda ke fita daga atom din.

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta farko da ta zama cikakken farfesa a Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama cikakken farfesa na ilimin lissafi (physics) a Jami'ar Berlin, wanda ya sa ta zama mace ta farko da ta zama cikakken farfesa a Jamus.

faq.question: Wace irin masani ce Lise Meitner?
faq.answer: Ta kasance masaniyar physics ce 'yar asalin Yahudawan Austria da Sweden, wadda ta kware a fannin radioactivity da nuclear physics, kuma ta ba da gudummawa mai muhimmanci ga gano nuclear fission tare da Otto Hahn.

faq.question: Lise Meitner ta sami Kyautar Nobel?
faq.answer: A'a, Otto Hahn ne kadai ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Kimiyya ta shekarar 1944 don gano nuclear fission, kuma Meitner ba ta samu ba.

faq.question: Shin an sanya wa Meitnerium suna ne don girmama Lise Meitner?
faq.answer: E, sinadarin mai lamba 109 Meitnerium da aka gano a shekara ta 1997 an sanya masa suna ne don girmama Lise Meitner.

faq.question: Lise Meitner ta shiga cikin kera makaman nukiliya?
faq.answer: A'a, ta ki amincewa da tayin shiga aikin Manhattan Project, inda ta bayyana cewa, 'Ba ni da abin yi da kera bam!'

timeline.event: An haife ta a wani gidan Yahudawa a Erlangen, Bavaria, Jamus.
Lokacin da Jami'ar Erlangen-Nuremberg ta amince da shigar mata, ta yi rajista a matsayin dalibar ilimin lissafi.
Ta sami digirin digirgir (PhD) a karkashin Paul Gordan.
Ta koma Gottingen, Jamus.
An nada ta a matsayin malama a Jami'ar Gottingen.
Ta buga makala mai suna "Idealtheorie in Ringbereichen" (Theory of Ideals in Ring Domains).
Ta buga makala mai suna "Abstrakter Aufbau der Idealtheorie in algebraischen Zahl- und Funktionenkörpern" (Abstract Structure of Ideal Theory in Algebraic Number and Function Fields).
Bayan da dokokin wariyar launin fata na Nazis suka hana ta koyarwa, ta gudu daga Jamus ta zama malama a Bryn Mawr College, Amurka.
Ta rasu a ranar 14 ga Afrilu.

keyAchievements.title: Noetherian ring
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa manufar kiran zobe inda dukkan ideals ke da iyaka a matsayin "Noetherian ring".

keyAchievements.title: Lasker-Noether theorem
keyAchievements.description: Ta gabatar da babban sakamako wajen rarraba ideal zuwa primary ideals a cikin commutative algebra.

keyAchievements.title: Noether's theorem
keyAchievements.description: Ta buga wani muhimmin theorem na mathematical physics wanda ke nuna daidaito tsakanin symmetries da conservation laws.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar central simple algebras
keyAchievements.description: A cewar Emil Artin da Helmut Hasse, ta kafa ka'idar central simple algebras.

keyAchievements.title: "Idealtheorie in Ringbereichen"
keyAchievements.description: A cikin wannan makalar, ta yi nazari a kan ascending chain condition na ideals.

keyAchievements.title: "Abstrakter Aufbau der Idealtheorie in algebraischen Zahl- und Funktionenkörpern"
keyAchievements.description: A cikin wannan makalar, ta tabbatar da cewa commutative ring inda unique prime factorization na ideals ke aiki shi ne Dedekind domain, kuma ta tabbatar da isomorphism theorems na rings.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Emmy Noether?
faq.answer: 에미 뇌터는 독일 바이에른주 에를랑겐의 유대인 가정에서 태어났습니다.

faq.question: Menene babban fannin binciken Emmy Noether?
faq.answer: Emmy Noether ta fi yin bincike a kan algebra, inda ta bar sakamako da yawa kamar Noetherian ring da Lasker-Noether theorem.

faq.question: Yaushe Emmy Noether ta sami digirin digirgir?
faq.answer: Emmy Noether ta sami digirin digirgir a shekara ta 1907 a karkashin jagorancin Paul Gordan.

faq.question: Me yasa Emmy Noether ta bar Jamus?
faq.answer: Bayan da dokokin wariyar launin fata na gwamnatin Nazi na shekarar 1933 suka hana ta koyarwa, ta gudu daga Jamus ta koma Amurka.

faq.question: Menene Noether's theorem ke magana a kai?
faq.answer: Noether's theorem wani muhimmin aiki ne na mathematical physics wanda ke nuna daidaito tsakanin symmetries da conservation laws.

timeline.event: An haife shi a wani gidan sarauta na Prussian a Berlin.
Ya fara samun ilimi bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
Ya sami ilimi a gida tare da yayansa ta hanyar malami mai zaman kansa.
Bayan ya shiga kuma ya sauke karatu daga Freiberg School of Mines, ya zama ma'aikacin gwamnati a sashen kula da mahakar ma'adinai na gwamnatin Prussia.
Ya ziyarci yankunan mahakar gishiri na kasashe daban-daban na tsakiyar Turai.
Ya gaji dukiya mai yawa bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa.
Ya fara balaguron bincike na kasashen Amurka na karkashin mallakar Spain tare da tallafi daga Firaministan Spain.
Ya dawo daga Kudancin Amurka.
An buga juzu'i 23 na littafinsa "Voyage aux regions equinoxiales du Nouveau Continent".
Ya buga "Ansichten der Natur" (Views of Nature) a Berlin.
Ya nuna ra'ayi da hanyoyin kwatanta yanayi na kasashe daban-daban ta hynar makalarsa kan isotherms.
Ya koyar da ilimin geography na halitta a Jami'ar Vienna.
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 90 kuma an yi masa jana'izar kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Kosmos"
keyAchievements.description: Bayan ya binciko Kudancin Amurka da Tsakiyar Asiya kuma ya lura da yanayin kasa da kiyaye muhalli, ya tattara bayanai masu yawa don rubuta shahararren aiki mai suna "Kosmos" wanda ake dauka a matsayin ginshiki na geography na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Uban geography na zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama uban geography na zamani tare da Carl Ritter.

keyAchievements.title: Sanya wa Humboldt Current suna
keyAchievements.description: An sanya wa igiyar ruwan teku da ke gudana a gabar tekun Peru sunan Humboldt Current don girmama bincikensa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin physical geography da geophysics
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa harsashin physical geography da geophysics ta hanyar binciken tsaunuka na yankin zafi na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken lura da meteor shower
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi lura da meteor shower a tsibirin Tenerife na Canary Islands, kuma bincikensa a kan wannan zagaye ya kasance harsashi ga lura da sararin samaniya na yau.

keyAchievements.title: Buga "Ansichten der Natur"
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciko kuma ya yi nazari a kan Dutsen Vesuvius a Italiya sannan ya buga "Ansichten der Natur" a Berlin a shekara ta 1807.

keyAchievements.title: Makala kan isotherms
keyAchievements.description: A cikin makalarsa kan isotherms (1817), ya nuna ra'ayi da hanyoyin kwatanta yanayi na kasashe daban-daban, kuma ya bayyana yadda zafin jiki ke raguwa yayin da tsawo ke karuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken maganadisun duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano cewa karfin maganadisun duniya yana raguwa daga poles zuwa equator.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa cibiyoyin lura da maganadisu da yanayi na duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tashoshin lura da maganadisu na duniya kuma ya kafa cibiyar binciken yanayi a Prussia.

keyAchievements.title: Tattarawa da bincikar samfurori masu yawa
keyAchievements.description: Ya binciki alakar tsirrai da muhallinsu sannan ya tattara samfurori kusan 60,000, wadanda suka hada da dubban sabbin species da genera.

faq.question: Waye Alexander von Humboldt?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin geography na Jamus, masanin kimiyyar halitta, masanin tarihi na halitta, kuma mai bincike, wanda ya zama uban geography na zamani tare da Carl Ritter.

faq.question: Menene shahararrun littattafanya?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa shi ne "Kosmos" wanda ya ginu a kan bayanan bincikensa na Kudancin Amurka da Tsakiyar Asiya, kuma ana daukar shi a matsayin ginshiki na geography na zamani.

faq.question: Yaya Humboldt Current yake da alaka da shi?
faq.answer: An sanya wa igiyar ruwan teku da ke gudana a gabar tekun Peru sunan Humboldt Current don girmama bincikensa a kai.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni ya ba da gudummawa a kai?
faq.answer: Baya ga geography, kimiyyar halitta, tarihin halitta, da bincike, ya bar sakamako masu kyau a fannoni daban-daban kamar dabbobi da tsirrai, astronomy, yanayi, ma'adinai, da teku.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin da na farko a wani gidan sarauta na Denmark.
Ya fara sha'awar astronomy bayan ya ga solar eclipse, kuma ya shiga Jami'ar Copenhagen.
Ya gane rashin daidaito na cross-staff kuma ya samar da teburin gyara don kayan aiki.
Ya koma Copenhagen sakamakon yaki tsakanin Sweden da Denmark.
Ya yi karatu kuma ya sauke karatu daga Jami'ar Wittenberg da Jami'ar Rostock.
An yanke wani sashe na hancinsa a lokacin fada da dan uwansa Manderup Parsberg.
Ya zama sananne a fannin astrology bayan ya yi hasashen mutuwar Sarkin Daular Ottoman.
Sarki Frederick II ya yi masa alkawarin zama memba na Roskilde Cathedral.
Ya zauna a Augsburg kuma ya mayar da hankali sosai wajen lura da sararin samaniya.
Ya gano sabon tauraro (supernova) a cikin constellation Cassiopeia kuma ya bar bayanan lura na tsawon watanni 14.
Ya auri masoyiyarsa Kirstine.
Ya buga littafinsa "De nova stella".
Kayayyakin lura da aka gyara a Augsburg sun lalace sakamakon hadari.
Ya zauna a dakin lura da sararin samaniya na Hesse-Kassel don haduwa da William IV.
Ya zama memba kuma ya kafa Uraniborg Observatory a tsibirin Hven.
Ya gano comet kuma ya bar bayanan lura.
Ya kara gina Stjerneborg Observatory.
Ya buga littafinsa "Introduction to the New Astronomy".
Mutuwar Sarki Frederick II ta sanya matsayinsa a cikin hadari.
Ya buga littafinsa "De Mundi Aetherei Recentioribus Phaenomenis".
Bayan hawan Christian IV zuwa sarauta, ya sami sabani da gidan sarauta sakamakon rage alawus dinsa, sannan ya bar tsibirin Hven.
Ya buga littafinsa "Astronomiae Instauratae Mechanica".
Ya koma Prague bisa gayyatar Sarkin Daular Roma mai Tsarki Rudolf II.
Ya rasu.
An buga littafinsa "Astronomiae Instauratae Progymnasmata".

keyAchievements.title: Gano da kuma lura da supernova
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano supernova a cikin constellation Cassiopeia a shekara ta 1572 kuma ya bar bayanan lura na tsawon watanni 14.

keyAchievements.title: Ingantattun bayanan lura da sararin samaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya bar ingantattu kuma daidaitattun bayanan lura da sararin samaniya ta hanyar lura da ido ba tare da amfani da telescope ba.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Tychonic system
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da nasa tsarin "Tychonic system" (tsarin geocentric-heliocentric) wanda ke hada tsarin Copernicus da na Ptolemy.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da yanayin comet
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da cewa comet yana faruwa ne a nesa da ya fi wata, wanda ya karyata tsarin geocentric na lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Gina dakunan lura da sararin samaniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina Uraniborg Observatory da Stjerneborg Observatory a tsibirin Hven don amfani da su a matsayin cibiyoyin lura da sararin samaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gano lunar libration
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano yanayin lunar libration inda kusurwar wata ke girgiza ta hanyar lura da canje-canje na tsayin wata.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa harsashin dokokin Kepler
keyAchievements.description: Ingantattun bayanan bincikensa sun kasance harsashi mai muhimmanci ga almajirinsa Johannes Kepler wajen gano dokokin motsin taurari.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga likitanci da ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya habaka ilimin ganye don taimaka wa likitanci, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ilimin astronomy da ganye ta hanyar kungiyar bincike ta Uraniborg.

faq.question: Me yasa Tycho Brahe ya rasa hancinsa?
faq.answer: An yanke wani sashe na hancinsa da takobi lokacin da ya yi fada da dan uwansa Manderup Parsberg a shekara ta 1566.

faq.question: Yaya Tycho Brahe ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ana jin cewa ya rasu ne sakamakon fashewar mafitsara bayan ya daure fitsari don nuna ladabi a wajen taron cin abinci na shekara ta 1601.

faq.question: Wane tsarin sararin samaniya Tycho Brahe ya gabatar?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da tsarin "Tychonic system" inda duniya ke tsakiya a tsaye, rana da wata da taurari suna zagaye da ita, sannan sauran taurari suna zagaye da rana.

faq.question: Tycho Brahe ya yi amfani da telescope?
faq.answer: A'a, ya yi mafi ingancin lura da ido ba tare da amfani da telescope ba.

faq.question: Wane tasiri bayanan lura na Tycho Brahe suka yi?
faq.answer: Ingantattun bayanan bincikensa sun kasance harsashi mai muhimmanci ga almajirinsa Johannes Kepler wajen gano dokokin motsin taurari.

timeline.event: An haifi John Muir (21 ga Afrilu)
Mutuwar John Muir (24 ga Disamba)

keyAchievements.title: Masanin fannoni daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin masanin halitta, marubuci, masanin falsafar muhalli, masanin tsirrai, masanin dabbobi, da masanin kankara.

keyAchievements.title: Goyi bayan kiyaye namun daji na Amurka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daga cikin mutanen farko da suka goyi bayan kiyaye namun daji na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Uban National Parks
keyAchievements.description: '국립공원의 아버지'로 불렸다.

keyAchievements.title: 존 뮤어 트레일
keyAchievements.description: 네바다 산의 등산로가 '존 뮤어 트레일'로 불리고 있다.

john-muir.missingDataNote: FAQ 항목은 원문에 정보가 없어 생략되었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Llanbadoc kusa da Usk, Wales, Ingila.
Ya bar makarantar firamare ta Hertford saboda matsalolin kudi na iyali.
Ya bar London ya koma Cwmcarn kusa da Welsh.
Ya yi aikin taswirar kasa a yammacin Ingila da Wales.
Ya tashi zuwa Brazil tare da Henry Bates a cikin jirgin Mischief.
Ya yi bincike tare da masanin tsirrai Richard Spruce da kaninsa Herbert.
Ya rasa samfuran da ya tattara lokacin da jirgin Helen ya kama da wuta lokacin komawarsa Ingila.
Ya yi balaguro a Malay Archipelago da Gabashin Indiya don tattara samfurori da kuma nazarin halitta.
Ya samar da ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaben halitta (natural selection) ba tare da dogaro da Charles Darwin ba.
Ya koma Ingila don tsara kayayyakin da ya tattara da kuma yin lakcoci.
Ya fara sha'awar ilimin asiri (spiritualism).
Ya auri Annie Mitten kuma yana da 'ya'ya uku.
Matarsa Annie Mitten ta kamu da ciwon daji na ciki sakamakon shaye-shaye.
Ya buga littafinsa "The Malay Archipelago" wanda ke kunshe da bincikensa da balaguro.
Ya rubuta makaloli 25 tare da taimakon Lyell da Darwin.
Ya fara samun alawus don girmama gudummawar da ya bayar ga ci gaban kimiyya tare da taimakon Darwin.
Ya buga littafinsa "Man's Place in the Universe".
An ba shi kyautar Order of Merit (OM).
Ya rasu yana da shekaru 90 a gidansa na karkara a Old Orchard.

keyAchievements.title: Gano ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaben halitta tare
keyAchievements.description: A shekara ta 1858, ya samar da ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaben halitta (natural selection) ba tare da dogaro da Charles Darwin ba, wanda ya taimaka wajen gaggauta buga littafin Darwin "On the Origin of Species".

keyAchievements.title: Gano Wallace Line
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin bincikensa a yankin Kogin Amazon da Malay Archipelago, ya gano Wallace Line wanda ke nuna rarrabuwar dabbobi tsakanin Asiya da Oceania.

keyAchievements.title: Habaka Wallace effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gagarumar gudummawa ga ci gaban ka'idar juyin halitta a ƙarni na 19 ta hanyar habaka Wallace effect wanda ke bayyana launin gargadi na dabbobi da kuma rarrabuwar halittu.

keyAchievements.title: Uban biogeography
keyAchievements.description: Ana kiran shi 'Uban biogeography' saboda gudummawar da ya bayar ga binciken alakar rarraba halittu da geography.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "The Malay Archipelago"
keyAchievements.description: Littafinsa "The Malay Archipelago" wanda ke dauke da bincikensa da balaguro ya zama daya daga cikin shahararrun littattafan balaguron kimiyya a ƙarni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken rayuwa a wajen duniya (extraterrestrial life)
keyAchievements.description: A cikin littafinsa "Man's Place in the Universe" na shekara ta 1904, ya yi kokari na farko mai kyau don kimanta yiwuwar samun rayuwa a sauran duniyoyi, kuma ya kasance daya daga cikin masana kimiyya na farko da suka rubuta binciken rayuwa a duniyar Mars.

faq.question: Waye Alfred Russel Wallace?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin halitta na kasar Ingila, mai bincike, masanin geography, masanin dan adam, kuma masanin halitta (biologist), wanda ya samar da ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaben halitta (natural selection) ba tare da dogaro da Charles Darwin ba.

faq.question: Menene Wallace Line?
faq.answer: Wallace Line ita ce layin da ya gano a lokacin bincikensa a yankin Kogin Amazon da Malay Archipelago, inda ya ga rarrabuwar dabbobi tsakanin Asiya da Oceania.

faq.question: Wadanne manyan littattafai Wallace ya bari?
faq.answer: Ya bar littattafai kamar "Palm Trees of the Amazon and Their Uses", "Travels on the Amazon", "The Malay Archipelago", da "Man's Place in the Universe".

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Wallace da 'Uban biogeography'?
faq.answer: Ana kiran shi 'Uban biogeography' saboda gudummawar da ya bayar ga binciken alakar rarraba halittu da geography.

faq.question: Yaya alakar Alfred Russel Wallace take da Charles Darwin?
faq.answer: Wallace ya samar da ra'ayin juyin halitta ta hanyar zaben halitta (natural selection) ba tare da dogaro da Charles Darwin ba a shekara ta 1858, wanda ya taimaka wajen gaggauta buga littafin Darwin "On the Origin of Species".

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga Mayu a Faransa.
Ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Physics tare da matarsa Marie Curie.
Ya sami Lambar Davy (Davy Medal).
Ya sami Lambar Matteucci (Matteucci Medal).
A ranar 19 ga Afrilu, ya rasu sakamakon hadarin mota (carriage accident) lokacin da yake kan hanyarsa ta zuwa wurin aiki a Sorbonne University.

keyAchievements.title: Piyoni a fannin kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne piyoni a fannonin crystallography, magnetism, piezoelectricity, da radiation.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Kyautar Nobel a Physics tare
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Physics tare da matarsa Marie Curie a shekara ta 1903.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Lambar Davy
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Lambar Davy (Davy Medal) a shekara ta 1903.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Lambar Matteucci
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Lambar Matteucci (Matteucci Medal) a shekara ta 1904.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Pierre Curie?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1859.

faq.question: Yaushe Pierre Curie ya rasu?
faq.answer: Ya rasu ne a ranar 19 ga Aprilu, 1906 sakamakon hadarin carriage (carriage accident).

faq.question: Wadanne kyaututtuka Pierre Curie ya samu?
faq.answer: Pierre Curie ya sami Kyautar Nobel a Physics da Lambar Davy a shekara ta 1903, da kuma Lambar Matteucci a shekara ta 1904.

faq.question: Menene manyan fannonin binciken Pierre Curie?
faq.answer: Pierre Curie ya kasance mai ba da gudummawa a fannonin crystallography, magnetism, piezoelectricity, da radiation.

faq.question: Wacece Pierre Curie ya aura?
faq.answer: Pierre Curie ya auri Marie Curie.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsay인 da na farko a cikin 'yan uwa 10 a Kinnordy, Angus, Scotland
Sauke karatu daga Jami'ar Oxford
Buga makalarsa ta farko mai suna "On a Recent Formation of Freshwater Limestone in Forfarshire"
Ya zama memba na Royal Society
Ya bar aikin shari'a ya fara aikin geology gaba daya
An nada shi a matsayin farfesa na geology a King's College London
Ya rubuta juzu'i 3 na farko na "Principles of Geology"
Tafiya zuwa Amurka da Kanada
Buga littafin "Travels in North America"
An ba shi matsayin Knight Bachelor
Buga littafin "A Second Visit to the United States"
Ya sami Lambar Copley (Royal Society)
An ba shi matsayin Baronet
Ya sami Lambar Wollaston (Geological Society of London)
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Kammala hanyar kashi (percentage method)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nazari a kan marine Tertiary strata na Italiya tare da Roderick Murchison kuma ya kammala hanyar kashi (percentage method) tare da taimakon Gerard Paul Deshayes.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Principles of Geology"
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta "Principles of Geology" wanda ke bayyana abubuwan da suka shafi kasa a karkashin ra'ayin cewa "yanzu ita ce makullin da zai bude baya" kuma ya kafa tsarin zamani na geology.

keyAchievements.title: Yada ka'idar uniformitarianism
keyAchievements.description: Ya yada ka'idar uniformitarianism wadda James Hutton ya gabatar ta hanyar littafinsa "Principles of Geology".

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta littattafan tafiye-tafiye bisa ka'idojin geology
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafan tafiye-tafiye masterpieces/travelogues masu dauke da ka'idojin geology kamar "Travels in North America" da "A Second Visit to the United States" dangane da abubuwan da ya gani a tafiyarsa zuwa Amurka da Kanada.

faq.question: Waye Charles Lyell?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin geology na kasar Ingila wanda ya kafa geology na zamani, kuma ana kiran shi Uban geology.

faq.question: Menene babban littafin Charles Lyell?
faq.answer: Shi ne "Principles of Geology" wanda aka rubuta daga 1830 zuwa 1833, kuma littafi ne da ya kafa tsarin zamani na geology kuma ya yada ka'idar uniformitarianism.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Charles Lyell ya yi a kan Charles Darwin?
faq.answer: Charles Darwin ya sami juzu'i na farko na littafin "Principles of Geology" na Lyell a matsay인 kyauta kafin tafiyar jirgin Beagle kuma ya karanta shi da kyau, wanda ya taimaka masa sosai wajen fitar da ka'idar juyin halitta.

faq.question: Wadanne kyaututtuka Charles Lyell ya samu?
faq.answer: Ya sami Lambar Copley a shekara ta 1858 da Lambar Wollaston a shekara ta 1866, kuma an nada shi a matsayin Knight a shekara ta 1848 da Baronet a shekara ta 1864.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Farab a Tsakiyar Asiya
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tsarin falsafa wanda ya ginu a kan Aristotle kuma yana da Neoplatonism a matsayin babban ginshiki.

keyAchievements.title: Barin littattafai da yawa
keyAchievements.description: 《이지론(理智論)》, 《이상도시론(理想都市論)》 등 다수의 저서를 남겼다.

keyAchievements.title: Karanta fannonin ilimi daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ya kware a fannin kimiyya, falsafa, dabaru, sociology, likitanci, lissafi, da kidi.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin falsafa na farko na kasar Iran a zamanin Musulunci
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne masanin falsafa na farko na kasar Iran da ya bayyana a zamanin Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Kira shi da suna 'Malami na Biyu'
keyAchievements.description: An korea/kira shi da suna 'Malami na Biyu' bayan Aristotle.

faq.question: Waye Al-Farabi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masanin falsafa na Musulunci (dan asalin Turkic) wanda ya rayu daga shekara ta 872 zuwa 950, kuma ya kware a fannon kimiyya, falsafa, dabaru, sociology, likitanci, lissafi, da kidi.

faq.question: Menene manyan ayyukan Al-Farabi?
faq.answer: Ya kafa tsarin falsafa wanda ya ginu a kan Aristotle da Neoplatonism, kuma ya bar littattafai da yawa da suka hada da "Akan Ilimi" da "Garin Kyawawa".

faq.question: Wane suna aka rada wa Al-Farabi?
faq.answer: An kira shi da suna 'Malami na Biyu' bayan Aristotle.

faq.question: A ina aka haifi Al-Farabi?
faq.answer: An haife shi kusa da Farab a Tsakiyar Asiya.

faq.question: Wadanne yare Al-Farabi ya iya sosai?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai iya yaren Larabci, Faransanci, da Turkanci, da ma sauran yarurruka da gama.

timeline.event: An haife shi a tsakiyar birnin London, Ingila.
Ya shiga Canterbury College, Jami'ar Oxford.
An zabe shi a matsayin dan majalisa na kasa (House of Commons).
Ya auri Jane Colt.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin magajin gari na London da kuma shugaban majalisar dokoki.
Mutuwar matarsa ta farko Jane Colt.
Ya rubuta littafinsa "Utopia".
Ya zama mai taimaka wa Sarki a matsayin mai rikon sarauta na wucin gadi da kuma 'ma'aikacin sirri'.
An ba shi matsayin Knight.
Ya zama Shugaban Majalisar Dokoki ta Ingila.
An nada shi a matsayin Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster.
An nada shi a matsayin Lord Chancellor.
Ya ki sanya hannu a kan wasikar neman soke auren Henry VIII.
Ya yi murabus daga mukamin Lord Chancellor.
An umarce shi da ya yi rantsuwar mubaya'a ga Dokar Gado (Oath of Succession) da majalisar ta kafa.
An tsare shi a Hasumiyar London (Tower of London).
An kashe shi a kan zargin cin amana.
Paparoma Leo XIII ya zabe shi a matsayin mai albarka (beatified).
Paparoma Pius XI ya bayyana shi a matsayin Waliyyi (canonized).
