faq.answer: Ta sanya buga kidi ba tare da kallon rubutu ba a matsayin ka'idar wasa, kuma ta canza tsarin wasan piano da abubuwan da ake bugawa ta hanyar rage muhimmancin ayyukan fasaha kawai.

faq.question: Yaushe Clara Schumann ta rasu?
faq.answer: Clara Schumann ta rasu a ranar 20 ga Mayu, 1896 tana da shekaru 76, kuma an binne ta kusa da mijinta Robert Schumann a Bonn.

faq.question: Akwai takardar kudi da ke dauke da hoton Clara Schumann?
faq.answer: E, hoton Clara Schumann wanda Andreas Staub ya kera a shekara ta 1835 an yi amfani da shi a kan takardar kudi ta 100 Deutsche Mark dari/daga shekara ta 1989 zuwa 2002.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Cedarville, Illinois
Ta sauke karatu daga Rockford College
Ta kafa Hull House a Chicago tare da Ellen Gates Starr
An zabe ta a matsayin shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom
Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler
Ta rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Hull House
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa Hull House, dakin zama na farko na Amurka a Chicago tare da Ellen Gates Starr a shekara ta 1889.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorantar motsin zaman lafiya na yaki da yaki (anti-war peace movement)
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci motsin zaman lafiya na yaki da yaki a lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farki.

keyAchievements.title: Shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom
keyAchievements.description: An zabe ta a matsayin shugabar kungiyar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom a shekara ta 1915.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler a shekara ta 1931.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jane Addams?
faq.answer: An haife ta a Cedarville, Illinois a ranar 6 ga Satumba, 1860.

faq.question: Yaushe Jane Addams ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: Ta sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya tare da Nicholas Murray Butler a shekara ta 1931.

faq.question: Wane irin daki ne Hull House wanda Jane Addams ta kafa?
faq.answer: Hull House ya kasance dakin zama na farko na Amurka wanda ke da makarantar dare ga manya, makarantar yara (kindergarten), kungiyar yara, dakin abinci na sadaka, da kuma gallery na fasaha.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Italiya
Ta zama shugabar makarantar nakasassu ta kasa
Ta dauki yara 60 daga unguwannin marasa karfi na Rome sannan ta kirkiro 'Montessori method of education'
Buga littafin "Il segreto dell'infanzia" (The Secret of Childhood)
Buga littafin "La mente del bambino" (The Absorbent Mind)
Mutuwa

keyAchievements.title: Habaka Montessori method of education
keyAchievements.description: Ta kirkiro wani tsarin ilimi wanda ke taimaka wa yara wajen nuna kansu cikin yanci bisa ga ikon bunkasa na kansu, kuma ta yada shi a duk duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gano kayan wasan horar da hankali (sensory training toys)
keyAchievements.description: Ta gano kayan wasan da ke taimakawa wajen bunkasa hankalin yara ta hanyar amfani da kayan wasan da aka yi amfani da su ga yara masu larurar hankali ga yara marasa larura.

faq.question: Wacece Maria Montessori?
faq.answer: Ta kasance masaniyar ilimi kuma likita ta kasar Italiya wadda ta habaka Montessori method of education kuma ta yada shi a duk duniya.

faq.question: Menene ainihin ka'idar Montessori method of education?
faq.answer: Ta yi imanin cewa yara suna da ikon bunkasa kansu ta fuskar hankali, kuma ilimi ya kamata ya zama wanda ke ba yara damar nuna kansu da bunkasa kansu cikin yanci.

faq.question: Menene rawar da malami yake takawa a Montessori method of education?
faq.answer: Ta bayyana cewa malami ya kamata ya lura da ayyukan yara kuma ya jagorance su yadda ya kamata, ya samar da yanayin da ke taimaka wa yara a ayyukansu na kansu, kuma ya shiga tsakani kawai lokacin da bukata ta taso.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ranar 10 ga Disamba a Newburyport, Massachusetts, Amurka
Kafa jaridar "The Liberator" wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta
Dakatar da jaridar "The Liberator" da kuma soke bauta ta hanyar Doka ta 13 ta Tsarin Mulkin Amurka
Neman fadada hakkin jefa kuri'a na mata
Ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Mayu a New York City, New York, Amurka

keyAchievements.title: Kafa da buga jaridar "The Liberator"
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa jaridar "The Liberator" a shekara ta 1831 wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta, kuma ya ci gaba da buga ta har zuwa shekara ta 1865 lokacin da aka soke bauta ta hanyar Doka ta 13 ta Tsarin Mulkin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa kungiyar American Anti-Slavery Society
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daga cikin wadanda suka kafa American Anti-Slavery Society, kuma ya ba da shawarar soke bauta nan take ba tare da wani biyan kudi ba.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin hakkin kada kuri'a na mata
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi fadada hakkin jefa kuri'a na mata a shekarun 1870.

faq.question: Waye William Lloyd Garrison?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai fafutukar soke bauta, dan jarida, kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa na Amurka, wanda ya kafa jaridar "The Liberator" wadda ke ba da shawarar soke bauta.

faq.question: Menene sunan jaridar da William Lloyd Garrison ya kafa?
faq.answer: Sunan jaridar da ya kafa shi ne "The Liberator", kuma an buga ta daga shekara ta 1831 zuwa 1865.

faq.question: Wane matsayi William Lloyd Garrison ya dauka game da soke bauta?
faq.answer: Ya nemi soke bauta nan take ba tare da wani biyan kudi ba, kuma ko da yake da farko ya ginu a kan zaman lafiya na Kiristanci, ya goyi bayan gwagwarmayar makami baada/bafter barkewar Yakin Basasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin babban da na liman Lutheran a Kaysersberg, Alsace.
Ya yi karatu a makarantar kauye.
Ya fara karatu a makarantar sakandare ta kasuwanci.
Ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) na falsafa a Jami'ar Strasbourg ta hanyar nazarin Kant.
Ya zama liman a Strasbourg.
Ya sami digirin digirgir na ilimin addinin Kiristanci (Doctor of Theology) ta hanyar nazarin rayuwar Yesu da farkon Kiristanci.
Ya zama malami a sashen ilimin addini na jami'ar da ya kammala.
Ya shiga fannin karatun likitanci yana da shekaru 30.
Ya taimaka wajen kafa kungiyar Bach Society a Paris kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ.
Ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Lambarene, French Equatorial Africa tare da matarsa Helene Bresslau.
Ya buga littafinsa na addini "The Quest of the Historical Jesus".
Mahaifiyarsa ta rasu sakamakon murkushe ta da dokin sojojin Faransa ya yi.
An tsare shi a sansanin fursunonin yaki na Faransa.
Ya canza takardar zama dan kasa daga Jamus zuwa Faransa.
Ya koma Lambarene, Afirka bayan ya tara kudi a Turai.
Ya buga littafin tarihin rayuwarsa "Out of My Life and Thought".
Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya.
An ba shi lambar yabo ta girmamawa ta Order of Merit (honorary OM) ta Ingila.
Ya yi fafutukar yaki da makaman kare-dangi (nuclear weapons) ta hanyar jawabi a rediyo da rubuce-rubuce a jaridu.
Ya rasu a Lambarene yana da shekaru 90.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952 sakamakon gudummawar da ya bayar ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka da kuma bunkasa dangantakar dan adam bisa ga falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' (Girmama Rayuwa).

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Asibitin Albert Schweitzer
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Asibitin Albert Schweitzer a Lambarene, Gabon da ke yammacin Tsakiyar Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin mai buga organ da mawaƙi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nazari a kan mai tsara kidan nan na Jamus Johann Sebastian Bach, kuma ya yi tasiri a kan motsin gyaran organ a farkon ƙarni na 20, sannan ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ na Bach Society na Paris.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digirin digirgir (PhD) na falsafa da ilimin addini
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami digirin digirgir na falsafa a kan nazarin Kant a Jami'ar Strasbourg, da kuma digirin digirgir na ilimin addini a kan nazarin rayuwar Yesu da farkon Kiristanci.

keyAchievements.title: Sadaukar da kai ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka
keyAchievements.description: Ya sadaukar da daukacin rayuwarsa ga aikin kula da lafiya na mutanen bakar fata a Lambarene, French Equatorial Africa tare da matarsa tun daga shekara ta 1913.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Reverence for Life'
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'Reverence for Life' wanda ke nuna cewa dukkan rayuwa tana da tsarki kuma babu wata rayuwa da ya kamata a sadaukar da ita a cikin littafinsa "Out of My Life and Thought".

keyAchievements.title: Fafutukar zaman lafiya ta yaki da makaman kare-dangi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi fafutukar yaki da makaman kare-dangi a shekara ta 1957 ta hanyar jawabi a rediyo da rubuce-rubuce a jaridu, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a kan fafutukar zaman lafiya.

faq.question: Waye Albert Schweitzer?
faq.answer: Albert Schweitzer ya kasance likita, mai buga organ, masanin falsafa, masanin addini, kuma liman na Lutheran dan asalin kasar Jamus da Faransa, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka bisa ga falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' kuma ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Schweitzer na 'Reverence for Life'?
faq.answer: 'Reverence for Life' wani ra'ayi ne na Kiristanci da ke nuna cewa dukkan rayuwa tana da tsarki kuma babu wata rayuwa da ya kamata a sadaukar da ita, kuma ya bayyana wannan a cikin littafinsa "Out of My Life and Thought" sannan ya yi aiki da shi.

faq.question: Me yasa Schweitzer ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya yi imanin cewa ya dace a raba farin ciki ga kowa, kuma ya girma da fahimtar cewa 'ba zan iya rayuwa cikin farin ciki ni kadai ba', don haka ya shiga fannin likitanci yana da shekaru 30 sannan ya fara aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyukan kidi Schweitzer ya yi?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya kasance mai buga organ kuma masanin tarihin Bach, inda ya taimaka wajen kafa Bach Society na Paris kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin mai buga organ, sannan ya gudanar da yawace-yawacen wasa a Turai don tara kudi don aikin Afirka.

faq.question: Yaushe Schweitzer ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: Schweitzer ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a shekara ta 1952 sakamakon yadda falsafarsa ta 'Reverence for Life' ta ba da gudummawa ga aikin kula da lafiya a Afirka da kuma bunkasa dangantakar dan adam.

faq.question: Yaya aka canza takardar zama dan kasa ta Schweitzer?
faq.answer: Yankin Alsace inda aka haifi Schweitzer ya kasance wuri mai yawan rikicin yankuna tsakanin Jamus da Faransa, kuma ya canza takardar zama dan kasa daga Jamus zuwa Faransa a shekara ta 1919.

timeline.event: Ta koma addinin Kiristanci lokacin da take zama a Ingila.
의회 회의의 10명의 여성 대표 중 한 명이었다.
Ta kafa kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission a kauyen Kedgaon, mil 40 gabas da birnin Pune.

keyAchievements.title: Samun laƙabi
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance mace ta farko da ta sami laƙabin Pandita da Sarasvati a matsayin masaniya a kan yaren Sanskrit bayan ta wuce jarrabawar malaman Jami'ar Calcutta.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Sharada Sadan
keyAchievements.description: Ta fara kafa Sharada Sadan don mata marasa miji (widows) ta hanyar amfani da kudin da aka tara.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Mukti Mission
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission a kauyen Kedgaon, mil 40 gabas da birnin Pune.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sunan Pandita Ramabai?
faq.answer: Ainihin sunanta shi ne Pandita Ramabai Sarasvati.

faq.question: Wadanne laƙabi Pandita Ramabai ta samu?
faq.answer: Ta sami laƙabin Pandita da Sarasvati a matsayin masaniya a kan yaren Sanskrit bayan ta wuce jarrabawar malaman Jami'ar Calcutta.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan kungiyoyi da Pandita Ramabai ta kafa?
faq.answer: Ta kafa Sharada Sadan don mata marasa miji da kuma kungiyar sadaka ta Kiristanci Mukti Mission.

pandita-ramabai.missingDataNote: 산스크리트어 학자 칭호 획득 및 샤라다 사단 설립의 정확한 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Bristol, Gloucestershire, Ingila
Daukacin iyalin sun koma Amurka da zama a New York
Iyalinsa sun zauna a Cincinnati, Ohio
Ta shiga Geneva Medical College a New York
Ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka (valedictorian) dari/daga Geneva Medical College
Ta sadaukar da kanta ga kula da kuma yi wa sojoji raunana magani lokacin da Yakin Basasa ya barke
Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York
Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a London
Ta rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka dari/daga Geneva Medical College
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama likita bayan ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka dari/daga Geneva Medical College na New York a shekara ta 1849.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa makarantar likitanci
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York a shekara ta 1865 da kuma London a shekara ta 1874.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan kula da lafiya lokacin Yakin Basasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sadaukar da kanta ga kula da kuma yi wa sojoji raunana magani lokacin da Yakin Basasa ya barke a shekara ta 1861.

faq.question: Wacece Elizabeth Blackwell?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Blackwell ta kasance likita ta kasar Ingila wadda aka haiba/haifa a shekara ta 1821 kuma ta rasu a shekara ta 1910.

faq.question: Yaushe Elizabeth Blackwell ta yanke shawarar zama likita?
faq.answer: Ta yanke shawarar zama likita sakamakon tasirin Harriet Beecher Stowe a Cincinnati, Ohio.

faq.question: Wane ilimi Elizabeth Blackwell ta samu?
faq.answer: Ta shiga Geneva Medical College na New York a shekara ta 1847 kuma ta sauke karatu a matsayin mafi hazaka a shekara ta 1849.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyin kula da lafiya Elizabeth Blackwell ta kafa?
faq.answer: Ta kafa makarantar likitanci a New York a shekara ta 1865 da kuma London a shekara ta 1874.

elizabeth-blackwell.missingDataNote: 엘리자베스 블랙웰이 사망한 장소는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다. 설립한 의과 대학의 정확한 명칭은 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다. 원문에는 엘리자베스 블랙웰이 '최초의 여성 의사'라는 명시적인 언급이 없습니다.

florence-kelley.missingDataNote: 제공된 출처 원문은 '플로렌스 나이팅게일'에 대한 내용이며, 요청된 인물 'florence-kelley'에 대한 정보는 포함되어 있지 않습니다. 따라서 요청된 인물에 대한 정보는 추출할 수 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin dan ma'aikaci a Scotland.
Ya tafi Afirka a matsayin likita na London Missionary Society.
Ya isa Botswana, Kudancin Afirka kuma ya fara aikin mishan.
Ya gano Tafkin Ngami lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya gano Kogin Zambezi lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya gano Victoria Falls kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake Afirka lokacin tafiyarsa ta farko.
Ya zama jakadan Ingila kuma ya binciki yankin Kogin Zambezi a matsayin shugaban bincike na Tsakiyar Afirka, sannan ya 'yantar da bayi.
Ya sake tafiya Afirka bisa bukatar Royal Geographical Society kuma ya gano Tafkin Mweru da Tafkin Bangweulu.
Ya kamu da zazzabi a Ujiji kusa da Tafkin Tanganyika, amma tawagar bincike ta Stanley ta cece shi.
Ya rasu kusa da Tafkin Bangweulu sakamakon matsananciyar rauni da rashin lafiya.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken Afirka da gano wurare
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar tsallake hamadar Kalahari, ya gano Tafkin Ngami, Kogin Zambezi, da Victoria Falls, kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake Afirka daga shekara ta 1849 zuwa 1856.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan 'yantar da bayi
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga tsakanin fataucin bayi na mutanen Portugal a yankin Kogin Zambezi a shekara ta 1858 kuma ya 'yantar da bayi daruruwa.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken taswirar kasa na Tsakiyar Afirka
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci gaba da binciken Tsakiyar Afirka ta hanyar gano Tafkin Mweru da Tafkin Bangweulu bisa bukatar Royal Geographical Society.

keyAchievements.title: Buga bayanan bincike
keyAchievements.description: Ya dawo gida bayan ya kammala binciken Afirka kuma ya buga "Missionary Travels" wanda ke kunshe da kwarewarsa.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi David Livingstone?
faq.answer: An haife shi a ranar 19 ga Maris, 1813 a Scotland.

faq.question: Menene ainihin aikin David Livingstone?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan mishan na cocin Congregational na Scotland kuma mai bincike.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan abubuwan da David Livingstone ya gano a Afirka?
faq.answer: Ya gano Tafkin Ngami, Kogin Zambezi, da Victoria Falls, kuma ya yi nasarar tsallake hamadar Kalahari da tsallake Afirka.

faq.question: Yaya David Livingstone ya rasu, kuma yaya aka yi da gawarsa?
faq.answer: 그는 1873년 5월 1일 뱅웰루 호반에서 사망했으며, 그의 심장은 잠비아에 묻히고 방부 처리된 시신은 영국 웨스트민스터 사원에서 국장으로 치러졌습니다.

faq.question: Wadanne ayyukan al'umma David Livingstone ya yi a Afirka?
faq.answer: Ya shiga tsakanin fataucin bayi na mutanen Portugal a yankin Kogin Zambezi kuma ya 'yantar da bayi daruruwa.

timeline.event: An haifi Alfred Bernhard Nobel
Mahaifin Nobel ya koma Saint Petersburg, Rasha tare da iyalinsa
Ya tafi Paris, Faransa don ci gaba da bincike
Ya tafi kasar Amurka don yin karatu na shekara guda yana da shekaru 18
Ya shigar da lambar mallaka (patent) ta farko a kan gas meter a ofishin patent na Ingila
Mahaifin Nobel ya damka masana'antar ga dansa na biyu Ludvig Nobel
Ya sami lambar mallaka ta farko ta kasar Sweden a kan "hanyar kera gunpowder"
Ya kera detonator
Hadarin fashewar dakin adana nitroglycerin ya faru a masana'antar Heleneborg da ke Stockholm, wanda ya yi sanadin mutuwar mutane 5 da suka hada da kanensa Emil
Ya kera blasting cap wanda ke inganta detonator
Ya kera dynamite kuma ya sami lambar mallaka a Amurka da Ingila
Ya fara baje kolin dynamite a wani dakin fasa dutse a Redhill, Surrey, Ingila
Ya kera gelignite
Ya sami lambar mallaka a kan gelignite
An zabe shi a matsay인 memba na Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences
Ya sami lambar mallaka a kan ballistite
Yayan Alfred Nobel Ludvig ya rasu, wanda ya sa wasu jaridu suka buga labarin mutuwar Alfred Nobel bisa kuskure
Ya sami digirin girmamawa na Doctor (honorary doctorate) dari/daga Jami'ar Uppsala
Ya sanya hannu a kan wasiyarsa ta karshe a Swedish-Norwegian Club da ke Paris don kafa Kyautar Nobel
Ya rasu a gidansa na hutu da ke Sanremo, Italiya
An kafa tsarin Kyautar Nobel
Sveriges Riksbank (Babban Bankin Sweden) ya ba da gudummawa ga Nobel Foundation don kafa 'Kyautar Tattalin Arziki na Girmama Alfred Nobel'
Peter Nobel, tattaba-kunnen Alfred Nobel, ya nemi a raba kyautar tattalin arziki da ainihin Kyautar Nobel
Nobel Foundation tana da kadarorin zuba jari na kusan biliyan 6 na kasar Sweden (kronor)

keyAchievements.title: Kera dynamite
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri daɗaɗɗen fashewar abu da ake kira dynamite, kuma ya sami haƙƙin mallaka a cikin 1867.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Gelignite
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1875, ya ƙirƙiri gelignite, wanda ya fi dynamite ƙarfi da tsaro, kuma ya sami haƙƙin mallaka a cikin 1876.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Ballistite
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1887, ya sami haƙƙin mallaka na ballistite, wani nau'i na foda marar hayaƙi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kyautar Nobel
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Kyautar Nobel ta amfani da dukiyarsa ta gado, don yin kyautar shekara-shekara ga mutanen da suka bayar da 'mafi girman amfanin ɗan adam'.

keyAchievements.title: Mallakar Haƙƙin Mallaka 355
keyAchievements.description: A rayuwarsa, ya yi gudummawa masu muhimmanci da yawa ga kimiyya, har da yin rajista na haƙƙin mallaka 355 a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Haɓakar Bofors
keyAchievements.description: Ya girbe kamfanin ƙarfe Bofors ya zama manyan masana'antar kera bindigogi da kayan soja.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Fuse da Kwal na Fashewa
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1863, ya ƙirƙiri fuse, kuma a cikin 1865, ya tsara kwal na fashewa wanda ya inganta kan fuse.

faq.question: Wane ƙirƙira Alfred Nobel ya shahara da shi?
faq.answer: Ya ƙirƙiri daɗaɗɗen fashewar abu da ake kira dynamite, kuma ya kuma ƙirƙiri gelignite da ballistite.

faq.question: Ta yaya Kyautar Nobel ta fara?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwarsa, Nobel ya ba da mafi yawan dukiyarsa don kafa asusun gudanar da Kyautar Nobel, kuma ana ba da wannan kyauta shekara-shekara ga mutanen da suka bayar da 'mafi girman amfanin ɗan adam'.

faq.question: Nawa haƙƙin mallaka Nobel ya mallaka a rayuwarsa?
faq.answer: A rayuwarsa, Nobel ya yi rajista na haƙƙin mallaka 355 a duniya.

faq.question: Yaushe Alfred Nobel ya mutu?
faq.answer: Nobel ya mutu a ranar 10 ga Disamba, 1896 a gidansa na yawon shakatawa a San Remo, Italiya.

faq.question: Menene abubuwan da aka sanya sunan Alfred Nobel?
faq.answer: Nobelium, ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan da aka ƙirƙira, an sanya masa suna bisa gare shi, kuma a Stockholm akwai gidan tarihi na Nobel da ke magana da rayuwarsa da Kyautar Nobel.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Paris a matsayin Charles Pierre de Frédy, Baron de Coubertin
Ya ba da sanarwar shirin maido da wasannin Olympics, ya shelanta shirin a taron Ƙungiyar Wasanni ta Paris. Ya zama alkalin wasa na gasar rugby ta Faransa.
Ya shirya Kwamitin Wasannin Olympics na Duniya (IOC) kuma ya zama Sakatare-Janar.
Ya shirya wasannin Olympics na zamani na farko a Athens, Girka, kuma ya ɗauki mukamin Shugaban IOC.
An shirya wasannin Olympics a Paris amma an rufe shi da Baje Kolinsu na Duniya.
An shirya wasannin Olympics a St. Louis amma an rufe shi da Baje Kolinsu na Duniya.
Ya ƙirƙiri wasanni biyar na zamani don wasannin Olympics na lokacin rani.
Ya sauka daga mukamin Shugaban IOC bayan wasannin Olympics na lokacin rani a Lausanne.
Ya kasance ɗan takara don Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya amma bai sami ta ba.
Ya mutu sakamakon bugun jini a Geneva a ranar 2 ga Satumba.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Wasannin Olympics na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wasannin Olympics na zamani da niyya ta maido da wasannin Olympics na zamanin da don taimakawa ga zaman lafiya na duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Shirya IOC da Yin Aiki a matsayin Shugaba
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1894, ya shirya IOC kuma ya zama Sakatare-Janar, daga baya ya ɗauki mukamin Shugaba ya kuma kafa harsashin wasannin Olympics na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Haɓaka Yarjejeniyar Olympics da ka'idodi
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɓaka Yarjejeniyar Olympics da ka'idodi, gami da tsarin bude da rufe wasannin.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Alama ta Olympics mai Zobenni Biyar
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara tutar Olympics mai zobenni biyar, wanda shi ne alama ta Olympics.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Wasanni Biyar na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri wasanni biyar na zamani don wasannin Olympics na lokacin rani na 1912.

keyAchievements.title: Shirya Ƙungiyar Ilimi ta Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ya shirya Ƙungiyar Ilimi ta Duniya kuma an zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban daraja na rayuwa.

faq.question: Wane ne Pierre de Coubertin?
faq.answer: Shi malami ne na Faransa kuma wanda ya kafa wasannin Olympics na zamani.

faq.question: Menene babban dalili da ya sa ya kafa wasannin Olympics na zamani?
faq.answer: Yayin da yake neman sauyin ilimi, ya gane mahimmancin wasanni, kuma binciken masanin tarihin Jamus game da wuraren Olympia ya sa ya tsara ra'ayin maido da wasannin Olympics na zamanin da.

faq.question: Mene ne rawarsa a Kwamitin Wasannin Olympics na Duniya (IOC)?
faq.answer: A cikin 1894, ya shirya IOC kuma ya zama Sakatare-Janar na farko, daga baya ya ɗauki mukamin Shugaba ya kuma jagoranci motsin Olympics.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar lambar yabo ta Pierre de Coubertin?
faq.answer: Lambar yabo ce da ake bayarwa ga ɗan wasan da ya nuna ƙwazon wasanni a wasannin Olympics, kuma ana ɗaukar ta ɗaya daga cikin mafi girman daraja da ɗan wasan Olympics zai iya karɓa.

faq.question: Menene ya nufin cim ma ta hanyar wasannin Olympics?
faq.answer: Ya nemi hada matasa daga ƙasashe daban-daban ta hanyar wasannin Olympics don taimakawa ga zaman lafiya na duniya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Store Frøen
Farkon tafiya zuwa gaɓar tekun Greenland
Ya sami digiri na uku daga Jami'ar Christiania tare da rubutun <Tsarin da Haɗuwa na Abubuwan Histological na Tsarin Jijiyar Cibiya>
Ya haye filin kankara na Greenland da ski daga gabas zuwa yamma tare da Otto Sverdrup da sauransu
Ya yi ƙoƙarin haye Tekun Arctic a cikin jirgin bincike Fram da ya tsara kuma ya gina
Ya kai ga maki na arewa 86° 14´ tare da Hjalmar Johansen, yana yin rikodin matsayin mafi arewa da ɗan adam ya taɓa a wancan lokaci
Bayan yin hunturu a tsibirin Franz Josef, ya sadu da ƙungiyar bincike ta Burtaniya karkashin Frederick George Jackson kuma ya koma
An nada shi kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin Jakadan Norway a Burtaniya
Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya saboda aikinsa a matsayin Wakilin Babba na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe
Ya kafa tare da wasu ƙungiyar siyasa mai adawa da gurguzu Fedrelandslaget
Ya gama rayuwarsa a Lysaker kusa da Oslo

keyAchievements.title: Haye Filin Kankara na Greenland
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1888, ya haye filin kankara na Greenland da ski daga gabas zuwa yamma tare da Otto Sverdrup da sauransu.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken Arctic da Kaiwa Mafi Arewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi ƙoƙarin haye Tekun Arctic a cikin jirgin Fram da ya tsara kuma ya gina, yana kai ga maki na arewa 86° 14´ a cikin 1895, mafi arewa da ɗan adam ya taɓa a wancan lokaci.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga Ka'idar Neuron
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi da'awar cewa hanyar sadarwar jijiya ta ƙunshi ƙwayoyin halitta daban-daban masu haɗuwa da juna, yana zama ɗaya daga cikin masu kafa ka'idar neuron.

keyAchievements.title: Binciken Ilimin Teku
keyAchievements.description: Bisa kwarewa a jirgin Fram, ya yi nazari kan yanayi da dalilin igiyoyin ruwa na teku, kuma ya kasance farfesa na ilimin teku a Jami'ar Oslo.

keyAchievements.title: Gudummawa ga 'Yancin Kai da Diplomasiyya ta Norway
keyAchievements.description: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shawo kan Yarima Carl na Denmark ya karɓi gadon sarautar Norway, kuma yana aiki a matsayin Jakadan Norway a Burtaniya, ya yi ƙoƙarin samun goyon bayan Burtaniya don kare ƙasar Norway.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Agajin 'Yan Gudun Hijira da Fitar da Fasfo na Nansen
keyAchievements.description: A matsayin Babban Kwamishinan 'Yan Gudun Hijira na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe, ya fara dawowar fursunonin yaƙi da agajin 'yan gudun hijira, ya kuma fitar da fasfo na Nansen don 'yan gudun hijira, yana gudanar da ayyukan jin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a cikin 1922 saboda ayyukansa na jin kai a Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe.

faq.question: Wane ne Fridtjof Nansen?
faq.answer: Fridtjof Nansen maɓiya Norwegian ne, masanin kimiyya, kuma jakada, kuma ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a cikin 1922 saboda aikinsa a matsayin Wakilin Babba na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe.

faq.question: Mene ne manyan nasarorin bincike na Fridtjof Nansen?
faq.answer: A cikin 1888, ya haye filin kankara na Greenland da ski, kuma a cikin 1893, ya yi ƙoƙarin haye Tekun Arctic a cikin jirgin Fram, yana kai ga maki na arewa 86° 14´ a cikin 1895, wanda shi ne mafi arewa a wancan lokaci.

faq.question: Wane gudummawa ta ilimi Fridtjof Nansen ya bayar?
faq.answer: Shi ɗaya ne daga cikin masu kafa ka'idar neuron, yana da'awar cewa hanyar sadarwar jijiya ta ƙunshi ƙwayoyin halitta daban-daban, ya yi nazari kan yanayi da dalilin igiyoyin ruwa na teku, kuma ya kasance farfesa na ilimin dabbobi da ilimin teku a Jami'ar Oslo.

faq.question: Me ya sa Fridtjof Nansen ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya?
faq.answer: Ya sami Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya a cikin 1922 saboda gudummawarsa ga ayyukan jin kai, gami da fara dawowar fursunonin yaƙi da agajin 'yan gudun hijira da fitar da fasfo na Nansen a matsayin Babban Kwamishinan 'Yan Gudun Hijira na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe.

faq.question: Mene ne fasfo na Nansen?
faq.answer: Fasfo na Nansen takardar tafiya ce da Fridtjof Nansen ya fitar don 'yan gudun hijira yayin da yake aiki a matsayin Babban Kwamishinan 'Yan Gudun Hijira na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe.

timeline.event: An haifi George Eastman (Yuli 12)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 226,503 'Method and Apparatus for Coating Plates' (Satumba)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 226,503 'Method and Apparatus for Coating Plates' (Afrilu)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 248,179 'Photographic Apparatus' (mai riƙe fim na rulo) na David H. Houston (Yuni 21)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 248,179 'Photographic Apparatus' (mai riƙe fim na rulo) na David H. Houston (Oktoba 11)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 306,594 'Photographic Film' (Maris 7)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 306,470 'Photographic Film' (Mayu 10)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 317,049 (tare da William H. Walker) 'Roll Holder for Photographic Films' (Agusta)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 306,470 'Photographic Film' (Oktoba 14)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 306,594 'Photographic Film' (Oktoba 14)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 317,049 (tare da William H. Walker) 'Roll Holder for Photographic Films' (Mayu)
Shigar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 388,850 'Camera' (Maris)
Fitar da Haƙƙin Mallaka na Amurka 388,850 'Camera' (Satumba)
Fim na rulo ya zama harsashin ƙirƙirar fim na sinima
Mutuwar George Eastman (Maris 14)

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Eastman Kodak
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kamfanin da ake kira Eastman Kodak.

keyAchievements.title: Fitar da Fim na Rulo da Gudummawa ga Yaɗa Daukar Hoto
keyAchievements.description: Ya fitar da fim na rulo, yana taimakawa wajen sanya daukar hoto ya zama sananne ga jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Harsashin Ƙirƙirar Fim na Sinima
keyAchievements.description: Fim na rulo ya zama harsashin ƙirƙirar fim na sinima a cikin 1888.

keyAchievements.title: Nadin Gidan Tarihi na George Eastman a matsayin Abin Tarihi na Ƙasa
keyAchievements.description: An nada Gidan Tarihi na George Eastman a matsayin Abin Tarihi na Ƙasa na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Tauraro Biyu a Titinin Daraja na Hollywood
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne kawai mutum da ke wakilta ta tauraro biyu a Titinin Daraja na Hollywood.

faq.question: Wane kamfani George Eastman ya da alaka da shi?
faq.answer: George Eastman ya kafa kamfanin da ake kira Eastman Kodak.

faq.question: Mene ne manyan nasarorin George Eastman?
faq.answer: Ya fitar da fim na rulo, yana taimakawa wajen sanya daukar hoto ya zama sananne ga jama'a, kuma fim na rulo ya zama harsashin ƙirƙirar fim na sinima a cikin 1888.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar Gidan Tarihi na George Eastman?
faq.answer: An nada Gidan Tarihi na George Eastman a matsayin Abin Tarihi na Ƙasa na Amurka.

timeline.event: An haifi Elisha Graves Otis (Agusta 3)
A shekara 19, ya bar gidansa ya koma New York.
Ya ƙirƙiri lif tare da na'urar aminci.
Ya kafa Otis Elevator a New York.
Ya nuna lif da na'urar aminci a bainar jama'a a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York.
Otis Elevator ya shigar da lif na farko don fasinjoji a New York.
Ya sami haƙƙin mallaka mai alaƙa da amincin lif amma ya mutu ba da daɗewa ba (Afrilu 8).

keyAchievements.title: Ƙirƙirar Lif na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri lif tare da na'urar aminci, yana kafa harsashin lif na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Otis Elevator
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Otis Elevator a New York a cikin 1853.

keyAchievements.title: Nuna Lif mai Aminci a Bainar Jama'a
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1854 a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York, ya yanke igiyar lif mai tashi don nuna aikin na'urar aminci a bainar jama'a.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Lif na Farko don Fasinjoji
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar Otis Elevator, ya shigar da lif na farko don fasinjoji a New York a cikin 1857.

faq.question: Me Elisha Otis ya shahara da shi?
faq.answer: Shi ne wanda ya ƙirƙiri lif na zamani kuma wanda ya kafa Otis Elevator.

faq.question: Yaushe Elisha Otis ya ƙirƙiri lif mai aminci?
faq.answer: Ya ƙirƙiri lif tare da na'urar aminci a cikin 1851.

faq.question: Yaushe aka kafa Otis Elevator?
faq.answer: An kafa Otis Elevator a New York a cikin 1853.

faq.question: Ta yaya Elisha Otis ya nuna lif mai aminci?
faq.answer: A cikin 1854 a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York, ya yanke igiyar lif mai tashi don nuna aikin na'urar aminci.

timeline.event: An aika shi zuwa China tare da Yun Sa-woong, Choi Cheon-gu, da sauransu don koyon siffar na'urorin taurari
An yabe shi saboda gudummawarsa ga ƙirƙirar na'urorin taurari kuma an 'yantar da shi, an kuma nada shi a matsayin Byeolja na Sangyiwon na matakin 5
An inganta shi zuwa aiki na matakin 5 na farko kuma an umarce shi da ƙirƙirar agogon ruwa na farko, Gyeongjeomjigi
An ƙara masa mukami na Hogun na matakin 4 na farko
Ya kammala agogon ruwa mai sarrafa kansa ta ruwa, Jagyeongnu
Ya shiga cikin tsirfar haruffan karfe Gapinja, wanda Yi Cheon shi ne babban mai kula da shi
Ya kammala agogon sararin samaniya Ongnu kuma ya shigar da shi a Heumgyeonggak

keyAchievements.title: Jagyeongnu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala agogon ruwa mai sarrafa kansa ta ruwa, Jagyeongnu, wanda ke ba da sanarwar lokaci ta atomatik.

keyAchievements.title: Ongnu
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri agogon sararin samaniya Ongnu wanda ke nuna motsin rana da wata a cikin samfuri kuma yana ba da damar lura da lokaci, lokutan shekara, da motsin jikin sama.

keyAchievements.title: Na'urorin Kallo na Taurari
keyAchievements.description: Ya ƙirƙiri na'urorin kallo na taurari daban-daban gami da Daegaui, Sogaui, Hyeonjuilgu, Cheonpyeongilgu, Jeongnamilgu, Angbuilgu, Ilseongjeongsiui, da Gyupyo.

keyAchievements.title: Gapinja
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga cikin tsirfar haruffan karfe Gapinja da aka yi da tagulla, yana taimakawa ga ci gaban fasahar bugu.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Jang Yeong-sil?
faq.answer: Shekarar haihuwar Jang Yeong-sil ba a rubuta ta a sarari ba, amma bisa rubuce-rubucen da ke nuna cewa yana da shekara kusan 34 a lokacin da aka 'yantar da shi a 1423, an yi hasashen an haife shi tsakanin 1389 da 1390.

faq.question: Mene ne matsayin Jang Yeong-sil?
faq.answer: Jang Yeong-sil ya kasance bawa na gwamnati na Dongnae-hyeon asali, amma an gane ƙwarewarsa ta fasaha mai ban mamaki kuma Taejong da Sejong suka zaɓe shi.

faq.question: Me ya sa aka cire Jang Yeong-sil daga mukami?
faq.answer: Sakamakon faɗuwar keken sarki Sejong, an ɗauke shi a matsayin rashin girmama sarki kuma an hukunta shi da cirewa daga mukami, kuma bayan haka ya ɓace daga tarihi.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar iyali ta Jang Yeong-sil?
faq.answer: Mahaifinsa ɗan gudun hijira ne na daular Yuan, ya fito daga Suzhou da Hangzhou, kuma mahaifiyarsa ta kasance gishiri a Dongnae-hyeon na Joseon. An ce yana da 'yar'uwa guda ɗaya, kuma an ce 'yar'uwarsa ƴar uwa ta yi aure da masanin taurari Kim Dam.

jang-yeong-sil.missingDataNote: 출생년도와 사망년도가 명확히 기록되어 있지 않으며, 관직에서 물러난 이후의 행적에 대한 기록이 없습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Myeongdongchon, Bukgando
Shigar da Makarantar Firamare ta Myeongdong da fitar da mujallar adabi 《Sae Myeongdong》
Kammala Makarantar Firamare ta Myeongdong da shigar da Makarantar Firamare ta Farko ta Hwalyonghyeon
Canja makaranta zuwa Makarantar Tsakiya ta Sungsil a Pyongyang da bugawa waƙar 'Kwana'
Shigar da Makarantar Tsakiya ta Gwangmyeong sakamakon rufe Makarantar Tsakiya ta Sungsil
Kammala Makarantar Tsakiya ta Gwangmyeong
Shigar da Kwalejin Yonhui
Bugawa waƙa a mujallar 《Sonyeon》 da karɓar kuɗin rubutu na farko
An canza sunan gidan zuwa 'Hiranuma'
Kammala sashen adabi na Kwalejin Yonhui
Shigar da sashen Adabin Ingilishi na Jami'ar Rikkyo a Tokyo
Shigar da sashen Adabin Ingilishi na Jami'ar Doshisha a Kyoto
An kama shi da 'yan sandan Japan da zargin keta Dokar Tsaro ta Jama'a
An yanke masa hukunci shekara biyu a Kotun Gunduma ta Kyoto kuma an ɗaure shi a Kurkukun Fukuoka
Ya mutu a kurkuku a Kurkukun Fukuoka
An gabatar da manyan ayyukansa na ƙarshe a Gyeonghyang Sinmun da gudanar da taron tunawa
Fitar da bugu na farko na tarin waƙoƙi na bayan mutuwa 《Sama da Iska da Tauraro da Waƙa》
Fitar da bugu na hukuma na tarin waƙoƙi na bayan mutuwa 《Sama da Iska da Tauraro da Waƙa》
연세대에 유작 〈서시〉가 새겨진 ‘윤동주 시비’ 건립
Kafa Kyautar Adabi ta Yun Dong-ju da fara zaɓan masu lashe kyauta
Ba da lambar yabo ta National Foundation Merit Order of Independence bayan mutuwa
Kafa tukunyar waƙa 〈Gabatarwa〉 a Makarantar Tsakiya ta Longjing
Kafa tukunyar waƙa 〈Gabatarwa〉 a Jami'ar Doshisha na Japan
An zaɓe shi a matsayin mai fasahar Koriya da ya haskaka ƙarni na 20 ta Ƙungiyar Masu Sukar Fasaha ta Koriya

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a matsayin Mai Gwagwarmayar 'Yancin Kai, Mawaƙi, da Marubuchi
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai, mawaƙi, da marubuchi na Joseon a lokacin mulkin mallakar Japan.

keyAchievements.title: Fitar da Mujallar Adabi 《Sae Myeongdong》
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin yana makarantar firamare ta Myeongdong, ya fitar da mujallar adabi 《Sae Myeongdong》 ya fara ayyukan adabi.

keyAchievements.title: Shiga Duniyar Adabi
keyAchievements.description: Yayin yana Kwalejin Yonhui, ya buga waƙa a mujallar 《Sonyeon》 kuma ya shiga duniyar adabi a hukumance.

keyAchievements.title: Fitar da Tarin Waƙoƙi na Bayan Mutuwa 《Sama da Iska da Tauraro da Waƙa》
keyAchievements.description: Bayan mutuwarsa, an fitar da tarin waƙoƙi na bayan mutuwa 《Sama da Iska da Tauraro da Waƙa》 wanda ya ƙunshi yawancin ayyukansa, yana haifar da babban tasiri.

keyAchievements.title: An gane shi a matsayin Masanin Kimiyya mai Lamiri
keyAchievements.description: An gane shi a matsayin masanin kimiyya mai lamiri na ƙarshen lokacin mulkin mallakar Japan, kuma waƙoƙinsa sun ƙunshi sukar mulkin Japan da tunani kan kai.

keyAchievements.title: An Ƙima a matsayin Mawaƙin Juriya na Ƙasa
keyAchievements.description: Ana ƙimansa a matsayin mawaƙin juriya na ƙasa da kuma mawaƙi mai ƙarfin nufin da taushi na waƙa.

keyAchievements.title: An zaɓe shi a matsayin Mawaƙi da Mutanen Koriya suka fi so
keyAchievements.description: An zaɓe shi a matsayin mawaƙi da mutanen Koriya suka fi so a cikin 1991.

keyAchievements.title: Ba da lambar yabo ta National Foundation Merit Order of Independence bayan mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: A cikin 1990, gwamnatin Koriya ta Kudu ta ba shi lambar yabo ta National Foundation Merit Order of Independence bayan mutuwa don girmama gudummawarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kyautar Adabi ta Yun Dong-ju
keyAchievements.description: An kafa Kyautar Adabi ta Yun Dong-ju a cikin 1985 ta Ƙungiyar Marubutan Koriya don ci gaba da ruhin waƙoƙinsa.

faq.question: Yaushe da ina aka haifi Yun Dong-ju?
faq.answer: An haifi Yun Dong-ju a ranar 30 ga Disamba, 1917 a Myeongdongchon, Bukgando.

faq.question: Wane makaranta Yun Dong-ju ya kammala?
faq.answer: Ya kammala Makarantar Firamare ta Myeongdong da Makarantar Tsakiya ta Gwangmyeong na Jilin, kuma ya kammala Kwalejin Yonhui.

faq.question: Mene ne tarin waƙoƙin Yun Dong-ju da aka fi sani?
faq.answer: Yawancin ayyukansa sun kasance a cikin tarin waƙoƙi na bayan mutuwa 《Sama da Iska da Tauraro da Waƙa》 wanda aka fitar bayan mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Me ya sa aka kama Yun Dong-ju a Japan?
faq.answer: A ranar 14 ga Yuli, 1943, an kama shi da 'yan sandan Japan a matsayin mugu na akida ƙarƙashin Dokar Tsaro ta Jama'a kuma an ɗaure shi a Kurkukun Fukuoka.

faq.question: Yaushe Yun Dong-ju ya mutu?
faq.answer: Yun Dong-ju ya mutu a kurkuku a Kurkukun Fukuoka a ranar 16 ga Fabrairu, 1945.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa Yun Dong-ju ya canza sunansa?
faq.answer: Ya canza sunansa zuwa 'Hiranuma' a ƙarshen 1941, kuma ra'ayin da ya fi ƙarfi shi ne cewa wannan zaɓi ne na tilas don yin karatu a Japan.

faq.question: Ta yaya ake ƙima Yun Dong-ju?
faq.answer: Ana ƙimansa a matsayin mawaƙin juriya na ƙasa da kuma mawaƙi mai ƙarfin nufin da taushi na waƙa, kuma waƙoƙinsa sun ƙunshi wahalar masanin kimiyya na zamanin mulkin mallaka da tunani kan kai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Colonus, gundumar Athens, a matsayin ɗan wani dogon hali.

timeline.year: A shekarar da ya cika shekara 16
timeline.event: An zaɓe shi a matsayin yaro mai jagorar waƙa a liyafa don girmama Yaƙin Salamis.
A shekara 29, ya ɗauke suna ta hanyar cin nasara akan Aeschylus, wanda ya fi shi girma, a gasar bala'i ta bikin Dionysus.
An zaɓe shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin masu jagorancin goma na Ƙungiyar Delos.
Ya shiga rayuwar siyasa, ya rike muhimman mukamai da yawa, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin admiral na ruwa.
Mutuwa.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan Mawaƙan Bala'i Uku na Girka
keyAchievements.description: Ana ƙidayarsa tare da Aeschylus da Euripides a matsayin manyan mawaƙan bala'i uku na tsohuwar Girka.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Nasara a Gasar Bala'i
keyAchievements.description: Ya lashe gasar bala'i ta bikin Dionysus sau 24, ana kiransa mai cika fasahar bala'i.

keyAchievements.title: Sauyin Fasahar Bala'i
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke trilogies, ya ƙara yawan mambobinsu na waƙar rawa, ya yi amfani da 'yan wasan kwaikwayo uku, kuma ya yi amfani da kayan aiki da fentin bango, yana taimakawa ga ci gaban wasan kwaikwayo.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Siyasa da Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya shiga rayuwar siyasa kafin da bayan Yaƙin Peloponnesian, ya rike mukamai na shugaban Ƙungiyar Delos da admiral na ruwa.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan da Suka Rage
keyAchievements.description: Akwai ayyukan bala'i guda 7 da suka rage, gami da 《Mata na Trachis》, 《Ajax》, 《Antigone》, 《Sarki Oedipus》, 《Electra》, 《Philoctetes》, da 《Oedipus a Colonus》.

keyAchievements.title: Laƙabi na Jarumi Bayan Mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: Bayan mutuwarsa, 'yan ƙasar Athens sun ba shi laƙabi na jarumi 'Dexion'.

faq.question: Yaushe Sophocles ya haifuwa kuma ya mutu?
faq.answer: Sophocles ya haifuwa a 497 K.H. kuma ya mutu a 406 K.H.

faq.question: Ta yaya ake ƙima Sophocles?
faq.answer: Shi mawaƙin bala'i ne na Athens na tsohuwar Girka, ana ƙidayarsa tare da Aeschylus da Euripides a matsayin manyan mawaƙan bala'i uku na Girka.

faq.question: Wane gudummawa Sophocles ya bayar ga fasahar bala'i?
faq.answer: Ana kiransa mai cika fasahar bala'i, ya taimakawa ga ci gaban wasan kwaikwayo ta hanyar sokewa trilogies, ƙara yawan mambobinsu na waƙar rawa, da yin amfani da 'yan wasan kwaikwayo uku.

faq.question: Mene ne manyan ayyukan Sophocles da suka rage?
faq.answer: Akwai ayyuka guda 7, gami da 《Mata na Trachis》, 《Ajax》, 《Antigone》, 《Sarki Oedipus》, 《Electra》, 《Philoctetes》, da 《Oedipus a Colonus》.

faq.question: Shin Sophocles ya kuma yi ayyukan siyasa?
faq.answer: Ya shiga rayuwar siyasa kafin da bayan Yaƙin Peloponnesian, yana aiki a matsayin shugaban Ƙungiyar Delos da admiral na ruwa.

sophocles.missingDataNote: 16살 되던 해에 발생한 사건의 정확한 연도는 원문에 명시되어 있지 않습니다.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Euclid
Ya yi aiki a Alexandria a lokacin mulkin Ptolemy I Soter
Mutuwar Euclid

keyAchievements.title: 《Elements》
keyAchievements.description: Yana da juzu'i 13 kuma yana magana da ilimin lissafi da ka'idar lamba, kuma yana ɗaya daga cikin mafi tasiri littattafai a tarihin lissafi tare da ci gaban ma'ana wanda ke cire sakamakon daga axioms masu tabbaci.

keyAchievements.title: 《Data》
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke magana da ilimin lissafi.

keyAchievements.title: 《Phaenomena》
keyAchievements.description: Littafi ne da ke magana da ilimin lissafi na fili.

keyAchievements.title: 《Optics》
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne tsohon rubutun Girka da ke magana da ilimin haske.

keyAchievements.title: 《On Divisions of Figures》
keyAchievements.description: Yana magana da matsalolin rarrabu fikira da aka bayar cikin ma'auni da aka bayar, kuma wani ɓangare kawai ya rage a cikin fassarar Larabci.

keyAchievements.title: 《Catoptrics》
keyAchievements.description: Yana magana da matsalolin ilimin lissafi ta amfani da madubi.

faq.question: Akwai labari game da ɗalibin da ya tambayi Euclid game da amfanin lissafi?
faq.answer: An ruwaito labari mai shahara cewa a lokacin laccar Euclid, ɗalibi ya tambayi game da amfanin lissafi, sai Euclid ya ce a ba wa ɗalibin kuɗin tagulla uku a kore shi daga aji.

euclid.missingDataNote: 에우클레이데스의 삶에 관해 알려진 바가 많지 않으며, 그에 대한 언급은 그가 살았던 세기 후에 쓰여진 것이 대부분이다. 《거울 광학》은 후대의 작품으로 추측되며, 여러 저서가 손실되어 짧은 인용만 전해진다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Mdungazwe, ɗan Muzila, sarkin Daular Gaza.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, ya ci nasara a yaƙin gado na sarautar ya yi sarauta, yana ɗaukan sunan Ngungunhana.
Ya ƙaura da babban birnin daga arewa zuwa Manjacaze a kudu, yana kara kusa da cibiyar tasirin Fotigal.
Sojojin Fotigal karkashin Joaquim Mouzinho de Albuquerque sun shelanta yaƙi, kuma a watan Disamba, an kama Ngungunhana a garin mai tsarki na Chaimite.
Bayan faretin titini a Lisbon, an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa tsibirin Azores na Fotigal da ke Tekun Atlantic.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a tsibirin Terceira na Tsibirin Azores.
An mayar da gawarsa zuwa Mozambique kuma an sake binne shi tare da girmama shi a matsayin jarumi na ƙasa.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗewar Daular Gaza
keyAchievements.description: Bayan rikicin gado na sarautar, ya haɗa daular cikin nasara kuma ya kafa iko kan ƙungiyoyin da suke yin takara.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙwarewar Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi ƙoƙarin gwaninta don yin adawa da muradun mulkin mallaka na Burtaniya da Fotigal don kare 'yancin daular.

keyAchievements.title: Alama ta Juriya
keyAchievements.description: Duk da cewa ya ci tura a ƙarshe, juriyarsa ta ƙarfi ga mulkin mallaka na Fotigal ya sa ya zama jarumi na ƙasa na Mozambique da alama ta gwagwarmaya ta adawa da mulkin mallaka.

faq.question: Me ya sa ake kiransa 'Zaki na Gaza'?
faq.answer: Wannan sunan yana nufin shahararsa ta ƙarfi a matsayin mayaƙi da juriyarsa ta ƙarfi ga Fotigal, kuma yana alama ƙarfin hali da alfahari na Daularsa ta Gaza.

faq.question: Shin Ngungunhana yana da abokanan ƙawancen?
faq.answer: Ya yi ƙoƙarin yin kawancen tare da Kamfanin Afirka ta Kudu na Burtaniya karkashin Cecil Rhodes don adawa da Fotigal. Koyaya, waɗannan ƙoƙarce-ƙoƙarcen diflomasiyya a ƙarshe sun kasa samar da goyon bayan soji da yake bukata.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da gawarsa bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: An binne shi a Tsibirin Azores. A cikin 1985, an mayar da gawarsa zuwa Mozambique kuma an sake binne shi tare da girmama shi a matsayin jarumi na ƙasa, wanda hakan ya tabbatar da gadonsa.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin 'yar Usman dan Fodio, wanda ya kafa Khalifancin Sokoto.
Ta shaƙi Yaƙin Fulani wanda ya kai ga kafa Khalifancin Sokoto.
Ta kafa hanyar sadarwa ta 'Jaji' (ko Yar Taru) na malaman mata masu yawo.
Dan uwanta Muhammad Bello ya zama Khalifa na biyu, kuma ita ta yi aiki a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mafi amintattun masu ba shi shawara.
Ta mutu a Sokoto, ta bar gadon littattafai sama da 60 da tsarin ilimi mai inganci.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Hanyar Sadarwa ta Jaji (Yar Taru)
keyAchievements.description: Ta gina tsarin malaman mata masu yawo don ilimantar da mata a yankunan karkara a duk fadin Khalifanci.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙiya da Masaniya Mai Yawan Aiki
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littattafai sama da 60 da harshen Larabci, Fulfulde, da Hausa, tana rubuta tarihi, doka, da tauhidi.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Ba Khalifa Shawara
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin mai amintacciyar ba shawara ga dan uwanta Khalifa Muhammad Bello, tana tasiri kan manufofin jiha game da ilimi da jin daɗin jama'a.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar 'Nana' a sunanta?
faq.answer: 'Nana' take ce mai girmamawa mai kama da gimbiya ko mace mai daraja, ba sunan ta na gaskiya ba. Sunan ta na gaskiya shi ne Asma'u bint Usman dan Fodio.

faq.question: Wane harshe Nana Asma'u ta iya magana da shi?
faq.answer: Ita mai yaren harshe da yawa ce, tana iya magana da aƙalla harsuna 4, gami da Larabci, Fulfulde, Hausa, da Tamasheq (harshen Tuareg).

faq.question: Shin gadonsa yana da muhimmanci har yanzu a yau?
faq.answer: Eh, aikinta muhimmin misali ne na tarihi na feminism na Musulunci da ilimin mata a Afirka, kuma motsin ilimin ta yana ci gaba da ba da wahayi ga ayyuka da yawa na zamani.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Masar, amma asalin haihuwar ta ba a san shi a sarari ba.
Ta yi aure da Fir'auna Amenhotep IV, wanda daga baya ya canza sunansa zuwa Akhenaten.
Akhenaten ya fara juyin juya halin addini. Gidan sarki ya ƙaura zuwa babban birnin sabon Akhetaten (yanzu Amarna).
Nefertiti ta ɓace daga rubuce-rubucen tarihi da suke akwai. Ba a san ƙaddararsa ba.
Bayan mutuwar Akhenaten, an maido da tsoffin alloli a hankali a ƙarƙashin mulkin Tutankhamun.
Masanin tarihin Jamus Ludwig Borchardt ya gano sananniyar rigar Nefertiti ta dutsen farar ƙasa mai launi a Amarna.

keyAchievements.title: Juyin Juya Halin Addini
keyAchievements.description: Ta taimaka jagoran canjin juyin juya hali daga shirkan gargajiya na Masar zuwa bautar ɗaya ta rana Aten.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Mulkin Haɗin Gwiwa na Masar
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi amfani da iko mai yawa, kuma sau da yawa ana nuna ta a cikin matsayi da ke nuna iko na Fir'auna, yana nuna cewa tana da matsayin kusan daidai da mijinta Akhenaten.

keyAchievements.title: Alama ta Fasahar Amarna
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama babban jigo na sabon salon fasahar dabi'a wanda ke nuna dangin sarauta tare da kusanci da hakikaniyar da ba a taɓa ganin irin su ba.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar sunana?
faq.answer: Sunana Nefertiti yana nufin 'Kyakkyawa ta zo' a cikin harshen tsohuwar Masar.

faq.question: Me ya sa kai da Akhenaten kuka bauta wa allah ɗaya kawai?
faq.answer: Mun yi imani cewa Aten, faifan rana, shi ne mai ƙirƙira kuma mai tallafawa duk rayuwa a duniya, ba a Masar kawai ba. Mun nemi maye gurbin tsoffin alloli da wanda muka gansu suna da rikitarwa da lalacewa da wannan madogara guda ɗaya mai tsarki da gaskiya na haske.

faq.question: Me ya faru da ke?
faq.answer: Bayan shekara 12 na mulkin mijina, ƙaddararmu wani asiri ne da ya binne a cikin yashi na lokaci. Wasu suna imani na mutu, wasu suna ganin na rasa tagomashi, har wasu suna tsammanin na yi mulki a matsayin Fir'auna bayan haka. Rubuce-rubuce sun yi shiru, amma gadonmu yana ci gaba har abada.

timeline.event: Wannan shi ne ranar gargajiya da rubuce-rubucen zamanin da ke bayarwa cewa Dido ta gina Carthage.
Wannan shi ne ranar gargajiya ta mutuwar Dido bisa ga masanin tarihi Timaeus.
Mawaƙin Roman Virgil ya rubuta waƙar bala'i 'Aeneid', wadda take ɗauke da shahararren da mafi tasiri a labarin rayuwar Dido da ƙaunar bala'i da Aeneas.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Carthage
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci mutanenta daga Tyre ta kuma gina ɗaya daga cikin mafi ƙarfi da dawwamammen biranen duniyar zamanin da ta hanyar hikima da jagoranci.

keyAchievements.title: Tattaunawar Fata na Sa
keyAchievements.description: Sanannen wayo nata na yanke fatar sa zuwa zaren da suka yi kewaye ƙasar da yawa ya zama alama na asali kuma harsashi na gina sabuwar mulki.

keyAchievements.title: Asalin Jarumar Bala'i
keyAchievements.description: Labarinta a cikin 'Aeneid' na Virgil ya ba ta dawwama a matsayin asalin mace mai ƙarfi da ke kama da ƙauna ta bala'i da cin amana, kuma ya yi tasiri ga fasaha da adabin Yamma na ƙarni da yawa.

faq.question: Shin Dido mutum ne na gaskiya?
faq.answer: Kasancewar ta ainihi ta gaskiya ana ta jayayya. Wasu masana tarihin Girka da Roma na zamanin da sun rubuta ta a matsayin mutum na gaskiya, amma shahararren labarin rayuwarta a cikin 'Aeneid' na Virgil ƙirƙira ce ta adabi da ke haɗa abubuwan tarihi da tatsuniya.

faq.question: Me ya sa Dido ta kashe kanta?
faq.answer: A cikin 'Aeneid' na Virgil, ta kashe kanta cikin baƙin ciki bayan Aeneas ya bar ta don cika ƙaddarar sa a Italiya. A tatsuniyoyin da suka gabata, ana cewa ta kashe kanta don gujewa auren tilas tare da sarki na gari da kuma don kasancewa amintacciya ga mijinta da ya mutu.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar la'anar Dido?
faq.answer: La'anar da Dido ta jefa a Aeneas da zuriyarsa a cikin 'Aeneid' tana aiki a matsayin labarin asalin tatsuniya game da gasa mai zafi tsakanin Carthage da Rome da kuma Yaƙe-yaƙen Punic guda uku.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Ramavo daga iyayen da ba su da suna.
Bayan mutuwar mijinta Sarki Radama I, ta hau gadon sarauta na Masarautar Madagascar, ta ɗauki sunan Ranavalona.
Ta ba da umarnin hana imani na Kirista a Madagascar, wanda ya haifar da tsanantawa ga Kiristoci na Malagasy.
Ta fatattaki harin haɗin gwiwa na ruwa na Faransa-Burtaniya a tashar jiragen ruwa ta Tamatave cikin nasara, tana nuna ƙarfin soji.
An gano kuma an dakatar da yunkurin juyin mulki da ɗanta Radama II da masu goyon bayan Turawa kamar Jean Laborde da Joseph-François Lambert suka shirya.
Ta mutu a cikin barci, ta kammala mulki na shekara 33. Ɗanta Radama II ya gaje ta, wanda ya sauya manufofinta na keɓewa.

keyAchievements.title: Kare Ikon Mallakar Ƙasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi nasarar turawa mamayar mulkin mallaka na Turai fiye da shekaru 30, tana kare 'yancin Madagascar na dogon lokaci bayan da ƙasashe da yawa sun fadi.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Gashin Kai na Masana'antu
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa cibiyoyin masana'antu na gida da ke samar da makamai na zamani, masaku, da sauran kayayyaki, yana rage dogaro ga shigo da kayayyaki daga ƙasashen waje.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ta gina ta kuma ta kiyaye babban sojoji masu horon da ya dace, dake dauke da makamai da aka kera a gida, wanda ya iya kare tsibirin daga mamayar ƙasashen waje.

faq.question: Me ya sa Ranavalona I aka kira 'Sarauniyar Mahaukaciya' ko 'Mace Caligula' a wajen Turawa?
faq.answer: Manufofinta, kamar tsanantawa masu tashin hankali musamman ga Kiristoci da kuma amfani da yaɗuwar gwajin guba na 'Tangena' wanda ya kashe dubban mutane, an ɗauke su da rashin wayewa da zalunci daga hangen Turawa. Waɗannan bayanai kuma sun taimaka wajen yin hujjar cewa mulkinta ba shi da halali da kuma tabbatar da katsalandan na mulkin mallaka mai yiyuwa.

faq.question: Mene ne gwajin 'Tangena'?
faq.answer: Shi ne gargajiyar gwajin shari'a, inda aka tilasta wa wanda aka tuhuma ya sha guba da aka cire daga 'ya'yan shuka ta Tangena. An ɗauki rayuwa a matsayin shaida ta rashin laifi, kuma mutuwa tana nufin laifi. Ranavalona ta yi amfani da shi sosai don kawar da masu adawa da siyasa da tilasta biyayya ta zamantakewa da ta addini.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ta ƙi dukkan Turawa?
faq.answer: Ba haka ba gabaɗaya. Ta yi zurfin zargi ga gwamnatocin Turai ta kuma kore mabiya-addini, amma ta zaɓi ɗaukar wasu baƙin ƙasa na musamman da ta ga sun zama dole. Babbar misali ita ce Faransawan Jean Laborde, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka cibiyar masana'antu da soja nata.

faq.question: Mene ne gadonsa a Madagascar?
faq.answer: Gadonsa yana da rikitarwa kuma ana ta jayayya. Wasu suna kallonta a matsayin azzalumi mai zalunci wanda ya kai wani bangare mai yawa na jama'a ga mutuwa. Wasu kuma suna kimanta ta a matsayin jarumar ƙasa wanda ta kare mulkin ikon Malagasy da al'adun gargajiya da ƙarfi daga igiyar mulkin mallaka na Turai kuma ta kare 'yancin ƙasar na shekaru da yawa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Roha, Habasha. Bisa tatsuniya, lokacin haihuwarsa kudan zuma sun kewaye shi, wanda ya sa mahaifiyarsa ta ba shi sunan Lalibela ('kudan zuma sun amince da sarautarsa').
Ya gudu a gudun hijira sakamakon rikici da dan uwansa na uba daban Sarki Harba.
Ya tsira daga yunkurin guba, kuma ana cewa ya ga wahayi mai tsarki na coci-coci da aka sassaƙa daga dutse.
Ya yi mulki a matsayin Sarkin Habasha bayan dan uwansa ya ba shi sarautar.
Ya ba da umarni da kuma kula da ginin coci-coci 11 na monolithic da aka sassaƙa daga dutse a babban birninsa, wanda aka sake masa suna Lalibela don girmama shi.
Ya mutu bayan ya sauka daga sarautar don yin rayuwar keɓantaccen mutum a tsufansa. Daga baya Cocin Orthodox na Tewahedo na Habasha ya tsarkake shi.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Coci-coci na Dutse
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da umarni na sassaƙa coci-coci 11 na monolithic daga dutse mai ƙarfi, yana ƙirƙirar Gado na Tarihi na Duniya na UNESCO.

keyAchievements.title: Gina 'New Jerusalem'
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa babban birninsa a matsayin babban wurin makiyaya na Kiristoci don maye gurbin Urushalima.

keyAchievements.title: Nadin sa a matsayin Waliyyi
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mafi muhimmancin tsarkaka a Cocin Orthodox na Tewahedo na Habasha saboda tsoron Allahnsa da nasarori na imani masu girma.

faq.question: Shin coci-cocin Lalibela sun gina da gaske daga dutse ɗaya?
faq.answer: Eh, su gine-ginen monolithic ne na dutse ɗaya. Ma'ana, an sassaƙa su daga ɗimbin tuff mai ƙarfi na volcanic, kuma ba a gina su a sama ƙasa ba amma an ƙona su ƙasa.

faq.question: Me ya sa Lalibela ake kiran shi 'New Jerusalem'?
faq.answer: Bayan Saladin ya ci Urushalima a cikin 1187 ya sa aikin hajji zuwa Ƙasar Tsarki ya zama mai wahala da haɗari, Sarki Lalibela ya yi niyyar sanya wannan garin ya zama madadin wurin makiyaya ga Kiristoci. Ko tsarinta da sunayen coci-cocin suna kwaikwayon na Urushalima.

faq.question: Shin gaskiya ne cewa mala'iku sun taimaka wajen ginin coci-cocin?
faq.answer: Bisa al'adar Habasha da tarihin tsarkaka, mala'iku sun yi aiki tare da ma'aikata na ɗan adam a daren kowane dare, suna ninka saurin ci gaban yau da kullun. Wannan tatsuniya tana bayyana saurin gini da girman da ke kama da ba zai yiwu ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Granada a matsayin al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Wazzan, kadan kafin ko bayan faɗuwar Granada.
Iyalinsa an kore su daga Granada suka zauna a Fez, Morocco.
Ya bi kawunsa zuwa tafiyoyin diflomasiyya a duk fadin Arewacin Afirka, ya kai Timbuktu da Daular Songhai.
Ya fita wata babbar tafiya, ya ziyarci Constantinople kuma ya hau kogin Nilu na Masar.
An kama shi a teku da fashin teku na Kiristoci kuma aka kai shi Rome.
An yi masa baftisma a Cocin Saint Peter's Basilica ta Paparoma Leo X, ya sami sunan Joannes Leo de Medicis.
Ya kammala rubutun babban aikinsa na 'Description of Africa' da harshen Italiyanci.
Ya bar Rome. Shekarunsa na ƙarshe sun kasance mara tabbas, kuma wasu masana tarihi suna imani ya koma Tunis.
An fara buga 'Description of Africa' ta Giovanni Battista Ramusio a Venice.
Wannan shekarar da aka yi hasashen mutuwarsa, amma ranar da wurin daidai ba a san su ba.

keyAchievements.title: Bayanin Afirka (Della descrittione dell'Africa)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta mafi cikakken da mai tasiri bayani ga Turawa na ƙarni da yawa game da kasa, al'ada, da siyasar Arewacin Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Daidaita Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar rayuwarsa da aikansa, ya yi aiki a matsayin musamman gada tsakanin duniyar Musulunci ta Arewacin Afirka da duniyar Kiristanci ta Renaissance Europe.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin Harsuna Daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Ya iya harsuna da yawa gami da Larabci, Italiyanci, kuma mai yiyuwa Sipaniyanci da Ibraniyanci, yana ba da damar ayyukan ilimi da diflomasiyya a al'adun daban-daban.

faq.question: Shin Leo Africanus sunan ta na gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: A'a. Sunan ta na gaskiya shi ne al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Wazzan. Ya sami sunan Joannes Leo de Medicis lokacin da Paparoma Leo X ya yi masa baftisma, kuma bayan shahararren littafinsa ya zama sananne da Leo Africanus (Leo na Afirka).

faq.question: Me ya sa littafinsa ya kasance da muhimmanci?
faq.answer: Kafin aikinsa, ilimin Turawa game da ciki Afirka ya dogara ga tsoffin rubuce-rubuce da labaru bakin ƙofa. Littafinsa ya ba da cikakkun kayan farko bisa tafiya da lura kai tsaye game da manyan birrane kamar Timbuktu, hanyoyin kasuwanci, tsarin siyasa, da al'adun gargajiya na gida.

faq.question: Shin ya ci gaba da zama Kirista?
faq.answer: Ba a san ba. Bayan ya bar Rome kusan 1529, ayyukansa sun zama mara tabbas. Wasu masana tarihi suna imani yana iya ya koma Tunis na Arewacin Afirka ya kuma sake musulumta, amma babu tabbatattun shaidun.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Mosega, Transvaal, a matsayin ɗan Mzilikazi, wanda ya kafa Masarautar Ndebele.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, ya hau gadon sarautar bayan yakin basasa ya kuma tabbatar da ikon sa a kan Matabeleland.
Ya ba da Rudd Concession ga wakilan Cecil Rhodes, yana ba da haƙƙin ma'adinai na dukan mulkinsa ba da sani ba.
Yaƙin Matebele na Farko ya fara. An ci Ndebele ta Maxim guns na Kamfanin Afirka ta Kudu na Burtaniya.
Ya mutu yayin gudun arewa bayan ya kone babban birninsa Bulawayo. Mutuwarsa ta sanar da ƙarshen 'yancin Masarautar Ndebele.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗakar Masarautar Ndebele
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɗa ƙasar Ndebele cikin nasara bayan rikicin gado na sarautar kuma ya yi mulki fiye da shekaru 20.

keyAchievements.title: Turawa ta Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da gwanin diflomasiyya na shekaru don jinkirta da sarrafa mamayar Turai, yana ƙoƙarin kare mulkin ikon mulkin.

faq.question: Shin an yaudari Lobengula ya sanya hannu a kan Rudd Concession?
faq.answer: Eh, haka ne. Yarjejeniyar baki ta tattauna ayyukan hakar ma'adanai masu iyaka, amma takardar rubuce da ba ya iya karantawa ta ba Kamfanin Afirka ta Kudu na Burtaniya haƙƙin ma'adanai na musamman da izini don yin duk abin da ya zama dole don haɓaka shi, yana ba da mulkin ikon a ainihin hali.

faq.question: Me ya sa Yaƙin Matebele na Farko ya fara?
faq.answer: Kamfanin Afirka ta Kudu na Burtaniya ya yi amfani da harin da ƙungiyoyin Shona (waɗanda kamfanin ke kare su) suka kai shi a matsayin uzuri na mamayar. Kamfanin yana so ya ci wannan yanki don tabbatar da albarkatun ma'adanai na Matabeleland.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Lobengula?
faq.answer: Bayan an ci sojojinsa, ya kone babban birninsa Bulawayo ya gudu arewa. Ya mutu a farkon 1894 yayin gudun, amma ainihin dalilin mutuwa (ƙanjamau, guba, ko kashe kansa) yana da shakka. Ba sojojin Burtaniya suka sami gawarsa ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Sahle Miriam a Ankober, Shewa.
Sarki Tewodros II ya daure shi a matsayin fursunoni na siyasa a kagaren Magdala.
Ya tsere daga Magdala ya zama Sarkin Shewa.
Bayan mutuwar Yohannes IV, ya zama Sarkin Habasha, ya ɗauki sunan Menelik II.
Ya rattaba hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Wuchale tare da Italiya, amma tana ɗauke da sharuɗɗan da ke haifar da takaddama.
Bayan ya gane yaudarar Italiya, ya soke Yarjejeniyar Wuchale.
Ya jagoranci nasarar sojojin Habasha ta ƙarshe akan sojojin Italiya a Yaƙin Adwa, yana tabbatar da mulkin ikon Habasha.
Ya kula da muhimmin lokacin zamanantar da, gami da ginin Addis Ababa, da kuma gabatar da layin dogo, wutar lantarki, da tsarin gidan waya na zamani.
Ya mutu a Addis Ababa, ya bar gado a matsayin mai haɗakar ƙasa da mai zamanantar da ita.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yaƙin Adwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci nasarar ƙarshe ta Habasha akan Italiya a cikin 1896, yana tabbatar da cewa Habasha ta kasance ƙasa ta Afirka ɗaya tilo da ta yi nasarar tsayin daka da mulkin mallaka na Turai a lokacin rarraba Afirka.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Habasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina babban birni na zamani Addis Ababa kuma ya gabatar da fasahohin mahimmanci kamar wayar tarho, wayar tarho, wutar lantarki, da layin dogo na ƙasa na farko.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗa Daular Habasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɗa yankuna da ƙabilu daban-daban cikin iyakokin Habasha ta zamani ta hanyar diflomasiyya da ayyukan soji.

faq.question: Me ya sa Yaƙin Adwa yake da muhimmanci?
faq.answer: Wannan shi ne misali na farko da wata ƙasa da ba ta Turai ta ci sojojin Turai na zamani a yaƙi. Wannan nasara ta zama mai ƙarfi alama na turawa da motsin 'yancin kai na Afirka a duk duniya.

faq.question: Mene ne takaddamar da ke kewaye Yarjejeniyar Wuchale?
faq.answer: Sigar Amharic ta fayyace cewa Sarki zai iya amfani da Italiya don dangantakar diflomasiyya, yayin da sigar Italiyanci ta sanya shi tilas, ta sanya Habasha a ainihin hali ƙasar da aka kare. Menelik II ya soke yarjejeniyar nan da nan bayan ya gano wannan yaudara.

faq.question: Ta yaya Menelik II ya hau mulki?
faq.answer: Bayan ya tsere daga kurkuku na shekaru 10, ya zama Sarkin Shewa. Daga nan ya tabbatar da iko ya kuma faɗaɗa tasiransa fiye da shekaru 20 har ya ƙarfafa sosai don neman kursiyin sarki a cikin 1889.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar sunan 'Menelik'?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da sunan sarautar Menelik II a matsayin magana ga Menelik I na farko, Sarkin Habasha na tatsuniya wanda ake cewa shi ɗan Sarki Sulemanu da Sarauniya Sheba ne a Littafi Mai Tsarki. Wannan sunan ya haɗa mulkinsa da wannan tsohon asali mai daraja.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Lepoqo kusa da tsaunin Maloti.
Ya tattara magoya baya yayin yaƙe-yaƙen Difaqane ya kuma kafa kansa a matsayin shugaba.
Ya ƙaura mutanensa zuwa kagaren dutse na Thaba Bosiu don ingantaccen tsaro.
Ya karbi mabiya-addinin Furotesta na Faransa daga Ƙungiyar Mishan ta Evangelism ta Paris, waɗanda suka zama masu ba shi muhimman shawara.
Takaddamar ƙasa da Jihar Afirka ta Kudu ta Orange ta Boer ta haifar da Yaƙin Jiha na Farko-Basotho (Yaƙin Senekal).
Yaƙin Jiha na Biyu-Basotho (Yaƙin Sekiti) ya sa Basotho suka rasa yankin da ya fi yawa.
Ya yi aikin neman taimako na nasara ga Sarauniya Victoria, yana haifar da Basutoland (yanzu Lesotho) ya zama ƙasar da aka kare ta Burtaniya, yana gujewa haɗewa.
Ya mutu a Thaba Bosiu, ya bar ƙasa mai haɗaka.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda Ya Kafa Ƙasar Basotho
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɗa ƙabilu daban-daban masu magana da Sotho da 'yan gudun hijira da suka gudu daga yaƙe-yaƙen Difaqane zuwa ƙasa guda mai haɗaka.

keyAchievements.title: Ƙwarewar Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da gwanin tattaunawa, ƙawancen, da karamci don sarrafa rikice-rikice da masu fafatawa na Afirka, Baboere, da Burtaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Kagaren Thaba Bosiu
keyAchievements.description: Ya zaɓi kuma ya ƙarfafa tudun Thaba Bosiu, wannan kagaren na dabi'a wanda ba a taɓa ci shi ba a duk rayuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Kare Burtaniya
keyAchievements.description: Mafi girman nasararsa ta diflomasiyya shi ne sanya Basutoland ta zama ƙasar da Burtaniya ke kare ta, yana tabbatar da tsiranta a matsayin mai zaman kanta.

faq.question: Me ya sa Moshoeshoe I ake ɗauka a matsayin wanda ya kafa Lesotho?
faq.answer: Ya tattara ƙungiyoyi daban-daban da suka gudu daga rikicin Difaqane ya ba su haihuwar jama'a, ya kuma kafa harsashin siyasa da na yanki na ƙasar Lesotho ta zamani.

faq.question: Ta yaya ya bi da abokan gaba?
faq.answer: Moshoeshoe ya yi amfani da dabara biyu. Ya kare kagaren dutse na Thaba Bosiu da soji, amma ta gwanin diflomasiyya ya ba da ƙasa, abinci, da kare wa mafarin abokan gaba ya sanya su bayinsa masu aminci.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar Thaba Bosiu?
faq.answer: Thaba Bosiu (ma'ana 'Dutsen Dare') shi ne babban birnin sa da kagare. Kagaren na dabi'a yana da kusan ba za a iya cin sa ba, yana ba ƙasar sa ta ƙarami damar tsayin daka da sojojin da suka fi yawa da kayan aiki.

faq.question: Me ya sa ya nemi kawance da mabiya-addini na Turai?
faq.answer: Shi mai aiwatarwa ne wanda ya ga mabiya-addini a matsayin hanyoyi masu tamani na ilimi, iya karatu da rubutu, da fasahohi (kamar bindigogi da gatal). Hakanan suna aiki a matsayin sakatarori na diflomasiyya da matsakanci tsakaninsa da sauran ƙarfin Turai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a tsibirin Labab kusa da Dongola, Sudan.
Ya sami suna a matsayin masanin Sufi mai mutunci da kuma mai zuhudi.
Ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Mahdi ('Mai Ceto da aka yi annabci') ya kuma fara kiran jihadi (yaƙin mai tsarki) akan gudanarwar Turkawa-Masar.
Sojojinsa na Ansar sun ci babban birnin El Obeid, suna yin canji na yaƙi.
Ya kewaye babban birnin Turkawa-Masar na Sudan Khartoum, wanda Janar Charles Gordon na Burtaniya ke kare shi.
Ansar sun ci Khartoum suka kashe Janar Gordon, sun ƙare mulkin ƙasashen waje a ainihin hali.
Ya mutu da typhus a sabon babban birnin Omdurman bayan watanni 6 kawai bayan nasaransa mafi girma.

keyAchievements.title: Haɗa Sudan
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɗa ƙabilu da ƙabilanci daban-daban na Sudan cikin nasara ƙarƙashin tuta na motsin addinin sa.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarar Yaƙin Mahdi
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci yaƙin juyin juya hali mai nasara a kan soji mafi ƙwarewa na fasaha na Turkawa-Masar da Burtaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Jihar Mahdi
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina babba, mai zaman kanta Jihar Musulunci (Mahdiyya) a Sudan wanda ya ci gaba na shekaru 15 bayan mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Mene ne ma'anar take na 'Mahdi'?
faq.answer: A cikin Musulunci, Mahdi yana nufin mai ceto ko 'mai shiryawa' da aka yi annabci zai bayyana kafin Ranar Shari'a don kawar da mugunta da zalunci a duniya.

faq.question: Me ya sa ya yi adawa da gwamnatin Turkawa-Masar?
faq.answer: An motsa shi ta hanyar faɗin rashin gamsuwa game da haraji mai yawa na gwamnati, cin hanci da rashawa, da kuma rashin biyayya ga shari'ar Musulunci.

faq.question: Mene ne mahimmancin faɗuwar Khartoum?
faq.answer: Ya sanar da nasarar ƙarshe na sojojin Mahdi, ya ƙare mulkin Turkawa-Masar a Sudan, kuma mutuwar Janar Gordon na Burtaniya ta haifar da babban rikicin siyasa a Burtaniya.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Jihar Mahdi bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Magajinsa Khalifa Abdallahi ibn Muhammad ya yi mulki, kuma an ci shi da sojojin haɗin gwiwa na Burtaniya-Masar a cikin 1899, wanda ya haifar da kafa Sudan na Burtaniya-Masar.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Yarima Kondo a Abomey, babban birnin Masarautar Dahomey.
Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Sarki Glele, ya hau gadon sarautar ya ɗauki sunan Behanzin.
Yaƙin Faransa-Dahomey na Farko ya ɓarke. Sojojin Behanzin, gami da Dahomey Amazons, suna yaƙi da sojojin Faransa cikin matsalolin.
Yaƙin Faransa-Dahomey na Biyu ya ɓarke. Sojojin Faransa sun fara mamaya mafi girma.
Sojojin Faransa sun ci babban birnin Abomey. Behanzin ya gudu ya fara yaƙin guerrilla.
Don dakatar da zubar da jini ƙara, Behanzin ya mika wuya ga sojojin Faransa.
An tura shi gudun hijira ta Faransa da farko zuwa Martinique, sannan zuwa Algeria.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Algiers, Algeria. An mayar da gawarsa zuwa Dahomey (yanzu Benin) a cikin 1928.

keyAchievements.title: Turawa ta Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci turawa mai zafi da tsari fiye da shekaru 4 a kan sojojin mulkin mallaka na Faransa mafi ƙwarewa ta fasaha.

keyAchievements.title: Alama ta Adawa da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama mai ƙarfi da dawwamammen alama na turawa Afirka ga mulkin mallaka na Turai, ana yabansa a duk fadin nahiya.

keyAchievements.title: Umurnin Dahomey Amazons
keyAchievements.description: Ya umurci 'Mino' ko Dahomey Amazons, waɗanda suka kasance ɗaya daga cikin rukunoni na mata na gaba kawai a tarihi, mashahurin da jarumtakar su.

faq.question: Me ya sa Dahomey ta yi yaƙi da Faransa?
faq.answer: Yaƙin ya taso daga faɗaɗa mulkin mallaka na Faransa da kuma takaddamar yanki da mulkin ikon, musamman da'awar Faransa ga birni na tasha Cotonou, babban tushen samun kuɗi na Dahomey.

faq.question: Wane ne Dahomey Amazons?
faq.answer: Dahomey Amazons, ko 'Mino,' suna soji na mata gabaɗaya na Masarautar Dahomey. Suna shahararrun da jarumtakar da ƙwarewar yaƙi masu ban sha'awa, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa a yaƙe-yaƙe da Faransa.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Behanzin bayan ya mika wuya?
faq.answer: Ba a ba shi izini ya zauna a mulkinsa ƙarƙashin mulkin Faransa ba an tura shi gudun hijira. An tura shi Martinique a Caribbean, sannan Algeria a Arewacin Afirka, inda ya zauna har mutuwarsa a cikin 1906.

faq.question: Me ya sa ake kiransa 'Sarkin Shark'?
faq.answer: An ba shi sunan sarautar Behanzin wanda sau da yawa ana haɗa shi da karin maganar 'kifin shark mai fushi yana haukar tafkin' (yana nufin shingen tafki). Wannan ya alama ikon sa da matsayin sa na ƙalubale ga Faransa kamar shark da ke haukar ruwa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ibyana, Lardin Gharbiyya.
An nada shi a matsayin alkalin kotun ɗaukaka kara.
An nada shi a matsayin Ministan Ilimi.
An nada shi a matsayin Ministan Shari'a.
Ya kafa Wafd (tawaga) don neman 'yancin kai daga Burtaniya.
An kama shi kuma an kore shi zuwa Malta, wanda ya ƙaddamar da Juyin Juya Halin Masar na 1919.
Burtaniya ta shelanta 'yancin kai na sunan Masar gefe ɗaya. Zaghloul yana gudun hijira na biyu.
Ya zama Firaministan Masar na farko da aka zaɓa ta hanyar dimokraɗiyya.
Ya mutu a Alkahira.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Jam'iyyar Wafd
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa mafi tasirin jam'iyyar kishin ƙasa a Masar, yana tattara talakawa don 'yancin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Juyin Juya Halin 1919
keyAchievements.description: Koda a gudun hijira, jagorancinsa ya ƙarfafa ƙaura ta ƙasa da ke nuna buƙatar haɗin gwiwa na yancin Masar.

keyAchievements.title: Cimma 'Yancin Kai na Sunan
keyAchievements.description: Daurewansa na siyasa da tattaunawarsa ya tilasta Burtaniya ta yi sanarwar gefe ɗaya na 1922 da ke ƙare kariyar.

keyAchievements.title: Firaminista na Farko da aka Zaɓa
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama Firaministan Masar na farko ƙarƙashin sabuwar kundin tsarin mulki, yana ɗaukar muhimmin mataki zuwa dimokraɗiyyar majalisar wakilai.

faq.question: Me ya sa ake kiransa 'Uban Al'umma'?
faq.answer: Shi babban mutum ne na motsin kishin ƙasa na Masar, kuma jagorancinsa da sadaukar da kansa kai tsaye ya haifar da ƙarshen kariyar Burtaniya da kuma haihuwar ƙasar Masar ta zamani mai rabi-'yancin kai.

faq.question: Mene ne mahimmancin Juyin Juya Halin 1919?
faq.answer: Yana ɗaya daga cikin farkon nasararrun ƙaurar jama'a ta adawa da mulkin mallaka na ƙarni na 20, yana nuna ikon rashin biyayya na jama'a ba tare da tashin hankali ba da zanga-zangar jama'a, kuma ya canza alaƙa tsakanin Masar da Burtaniya a gindin ginshiƙi.

faq.question: Shin Masar ta sami 'yancin kai na gaskiya bayan 1922?
faq.answer: A'a, 'yancin kai ya kasance na sunan. Burtaniya ta riƙe iko kan muhimman yankuna kamar tsaron Kogi na Suez, tsaron kasa, kare muradun baƙin ƙasa, da Sudan. Cikakkiyar 'yancin kai ya ɗauki ƙarin shekaru da yawa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a yankin Konyan na Guinea na yanzu.
Bayan an kama mahaifiyarsa a cikin farmaki na bauta, ya fara aikin soji don 'yantar da ita.
Ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Almami (shugaba) ya kuma hukumance ya kafa Daular Wassoulou.
Faruwar farkon yaƙin soja na babban-sikeli tare da sojojin mulkin mallaka na Faransa.
Ya gudanar da ayyukan jan da tura na 'ƙone ƙasa' na dabara ta ƙaura duka daularsa gabas don gujewar kewawa na Faransa.
An kama shi a harin kwatsam na Kyaftin Henri Gouraud na Faransa a Guélémo.
Ya mutu da huhu a tsibirin Ndjolé na Gabon yayin gudun hijira.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda Ya Kafa Daular Wassoulou
keyAchievements.description: Ya haɗa ƙasashe da yawa na ƙarami na Yammacin Afirka zuwa ƙasa ɗaya mai ƙarfi ta Musulunci ƙarƙashin mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Ƙirƙira na Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa zamani, sojoji masu ƙwarewa da makamai na Turai, masu tallafi daga ma'aikatan kayan makamai na gida.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoran Turawa ta Adawa da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci ɗaya daga cikin mafi tsawo da ingantattun motsin turawa a kan faɗaɗa mulkin mallaka na Faransa a Afirka, wanda ya ci gaba kusan shekaru 20.

faq.question: Me ya sa Samori Touré ake ɗauka a matsayin jarumi na ƙasa na Guinea?
faq.answer: Ana yabansa da gwanin soji, ginin ƙasa, da kuma turawa mai zafi da na dogon lokaci ga mulkin mallaka na Turai, ya zama alama na mulkin ikon Afirka da alfahari.

faq.question: Ta yaya aka ci shi a ƙarshe?
faq.answer: An ci shi ta hanyar haɗin abubuwa da yawa: albarkatun dogon lokaci na mafi ƙarfi na sojojin Faransa, yunwa mai lalacewa da ta raunana daularsa, da kuma harin ƙarshe da ya haifar da kama shi a cikin 1898.

faq.question: Mene ne haɗinsa da Guinea ta zamani?
faq.answer: Eh, jikan jikansa Ahmed Sékou Touré ya zama Shugaban Guinea na farko bayan 'yancin kai daga Faransa a cikin 1958, yana ci gaba da gadon gwagwarmayar mulkin ikon Guinea.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Ajayi a Osogun, Yorubaland (yanzu Najeriya).
An kama shi da masu kama bayi na Fulani kuma an sayar da shi a matsayin bawa.
An ceto shi daga jirgin bayi na Fotigal ta hannun Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Burtaniya sannan aka kai shi Freetown, Sierra Leone.
Ya shiga Cocin Anglican inda aka ba shi suna Samuel Crowther.
Ya shiga cikin Balaguron Neja na Burtaniya a matsayin mai fassara kuma mai wa'azi.
Cocin Mission Society (CMS) ta nada shi a matsayin limamin coci a Burtaniya kuma ya buga littafin 'Yoruba Vocabulary'.
An nada shi a matsay인 Bishop na farko dan Afirka na Cocin Anglican a Katolika na Canterbury.
An buga cikakken Littafi Mai Tsarki na Yoruba (Bibeli Mimọ), aikin fassarar da ya jagoranta.
Ya mutu ranar 31 ga Disamba a Legas.

keyAchievements.title: Bishop na farko dan Afirka na Cocin Anglican
keyAchievements.description: An nada shi a shekarar 1864, ya kasance jagora a fannin shugabanci na gida a cocin Afirka kuma ya kula da Ofishin Jakadancin Neja.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki na Yoruba
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci wani gagarumin aikin fassara dukkan Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa harshen Yoruba, wanda ya zama tushen adabin Yoruba da addinin Kirista.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba a fannin ilimin harshen Yoruba
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga 종합 nahawu da kamus na farko na harshen Yoruba, wanda ya daidaita rubutun harshen kuma ya ba da damar ilimi ga mutane da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Ofishin Jakadancin Gida
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya jagoranci Ofishin Jakadancin Neja, wanda ya kunshi 'yan Afirka zalla kuma ya inganta tsarin Kiristancin Afirka mai cin gashin kansa.

faq.question: Shin Samuel Ajayi Crowther Kirista ne tun haihuwa?
faq.answer: A'a, an haife shi ne a gidan Yoruba kuma ya bi addinin gargajiya na Yoruba. Ya shiga addinin Kirista ne a Sierra Leone bayan an cece shi daga jirgin bayi.

faq.question: Me yasa ayyukansa na harshe ke da matukar muhimmanci?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa sun daidaita harshen Yoruba, inda suka samar da tsarin rubutu da nahawu guda daya. Wannan ya ba da damar ilmantarwa ga mutane da yawa, kiyaye al'adu, da kuma samar da muhimman littattafai kamar Littafi Mai Tsarki na Yoruba wanda har yanzu ake amfani da shi yau.

faq.question: Shin ya fuskanci kalubale a matsayinsa na Bishop?
faq.answer: E, musamman a shekarunsa na karshe. Ya fuskanci nuna bambanci sosai daga matasan masu wa'azi na Turai wadanda suka kalubalanci ikonsa da hanyoyinsa, wanda hakan ya sa Cocin Mission Society ta rusa Ofishin Jakadancin Neja da ke karkashin jagorancin 'yan Afirka gaba daya.

faq.question: Yaya aka kama shi kuma aka cece shi?
faq.answer: Masu satar bayi na Fulani ne suka kama shi a kauyensu yana dan shekara 13. Bayan an sayar da shi sau da yawa, an dora shi a wani jirgin Fotigal da ke tafiya Amurka, amma rundunar yaki da fataucin bayi ta Sojan Ruwan Burtaniya ta tare jirgin, kuma aka cece shi a Sierra Leone.

timeline.event: An haife shi a yankin Buhoodle na kasar Habasha ta yanzu, kusa da kan iyakar Somaliland.
Ya yi tafiya zuwa Makka da Madina inda ya shiga kungiyar sufaye ta Salihiyya, wanda hakan ya zurfafa akidojinsa na addini da siyasa.
Ya shelanta jihadi a kan kasashen da suka yi mulkin mallaka, wanda ke nuna farkon yakin nuna tirjiya na Dervish a hukumance.
Ya jagoranci dakarun Dervish da yaki da Burtaniya, Habasha, da Italiya a manyan yakin neman zabe guda hudu, inda ya tabbatar da shahararsa a matsayin babban jagoran soja.
Ya kafa babban birninsa a Taleh, wani katon ginin katanga da ya zama tsakiyar kasar Dervish.
Hukumar Sojan Sama ta Burtaniya (RAF) ta fara harbin bom na sama a kan Taleh da sauran katangar Dervish, wanda ya lalata kayayyakin more rayuwa na kungiyar.
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar mura yayin da yake sake tattara dakarunsa da suka tarwatsa a yankin Ogaden, wanda ya kawo karshen yakin Dervish na shekaru 20.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya kafa kasar Dervish
