faq.answer: Wannan shahararren labari ne, amma yawancin masana tarihi na zamani suna kallonsa a matsayin labarin bogi na baya da aka kera don nuna jarumtakarsa. Babu wani bayani game da wannan a cikin rubuce-rubucen Larabci na farko na yakin.

faq.question: Me yasa ya fadi daga mulki?
faq.answer: An ce babban jami'isa Musa ibn Nusayr ya yi kishin nasararsa. Caliph ya kira su duka zuwa Damascus saboda fargabar siyasa cewa za su yi karfi sosai, kuma ba a sake ba wa Tariq ikon jagorantar sojoji ba.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cikin dangin sarauta a yankin Semien na kasar Habasha.
Ta auri Sahle Maryam na Shewa, wanda daga baya ya zama Sarki Menelik II.
Ta zabi wurin kuma ta ba da sunan Addis Ababa ('Sabuwar Fure'), wanda zai zama babban birnin Habasha na gaba.
Ta zama Sarauniyar Habasha bayan hawan karagar mulki na Menelik II. Ta nuna shakku a kan yarjejeniyar Wuchale ta harshen Italiyanci.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa ta dabara ta hanyar jagorantar dakarunta da kuma ba wa Menelik II shawara a Yakin Adwa, wanda ya haifar da gagarumar nasara ta Habasha yaki da Italiya.
Sarki Menelik II ya mutu. Abokan hamayyarta a fada wadanda ke fargabar tasirinta sun cire Taytu daga mulki.
Ta mutu a Entoto yayin da take tsare a tsohuwar fada.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Adwa
keyAchievements.description: Shawarwarinta na dabara da jagorancin soja sun kasance da muhimmanci ga nasarar Habasha wajen kayar da sojojin Italiya da kuma kiyaye 'yancin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Addis Ababa
keyAchievements.description: Ta zabi wurin da zai zama babban birnin Habasha kuma ta ba shi suna 'Addis Ababa' (Sabuwar Fure).

keyAchievements.title: Turawa ta Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ita ce ta farko da ta fahimci dabarar yaudara ta Yarjejeniyar Wuchale kuma ta nace a kan soke ta.

faq.question: Me yasa Taytu Betul take da muhimmanci a tarihin Habasha?
faq.answer: Ta kasance sarauniya mai iko wadda ta yi mulki tare da mijinta Menelik II yadda ya kamata. Kwararar basirarta na siyasa da soja ta kasance da muhimmanci wajen kare Habasha daga mulkin mallaka na Italiya, musamman a Yakin Adwa, wanda ya mayar da Habasha alamar 'yancin Afirka.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Taytu'?
faq.answer: Sunanta Taytu (ko Taitu) yana nufin 'Rana'. Saboda ficewarta da kuma kwarjininta, galibi ana kiran ta 'Rana ta Habasha'.

faq.question: Me ya faru da ita bayan mutuwar Sarki Menelik II?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwar Menelik a shekarar 1913, abokan hamayyarta na siyasa wadanda ke fargabar tasirinta sun kulla makirci don cire ta daga mulki. An tsare ta a tsohuwar fadar Entoto inda ta zauna a can har zuwa mutuwarta a shekarar 1918.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Bauchi, Arewacin Najeriya.
Ya tafi Burtaniya don yin karatu a Cibiyar Ilimi ta Jami'ar London.
An zabe shi a matsayin mamba na Majalisar Arewa da kuma Majalisar Wakilai ta Tarayya.
Ya zama Babban Minista na farko na Najeriya.
Ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Najeriya mai cin gashin kanta a ranar 1 ga Oktoba.
Najeriya ta zama jamhuriya, kuma ya ci gaba da kasancewa Firayim Minista.
An kashe shi a lokacin juyin mulkin soja ranar 15 ga Janairu.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Samun 'Yancin Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar tattaunawa don samun 'yancin kai cikin lumana na Najeriya daga Burtaniya a shekarar 1960.

keyAchievements.title: Firayim Minista na Farko na Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Firayim Minista na farko kuma daya tilo na kasar, inda ya kafa tsarin gwamnati na farko da manufofinta.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare Akidar Pan-Africanism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance muhimmin mutum wajen kafa kungiyar hadin kan Afirka (OAU) a shekarar 1963, kuma ya kare hadin kai da hakkin cin gashin kai na Afirka.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Muryar Zinariya ta Afirka'?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mawaƙi mai hazaka da kwarjini, kuma ya sami wannan sunan saboda jawabansa masu karfi da ma'ana a majalisa da taron kasashen duniya.

faq.question: Menene jam'iyyar siyasar sa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance jagoran kungiyar Northern People's Congress (NPC), wadda ita ce jam'iyya mafi karfi a Arewacin Najeriya lokacin Jamhuriya ta Fakar.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: An sace shi daga gidansa kuma aka kashe shi a lokacin juyin mulkin soja na farko a Najeriya a watan Janairu shekarar 1966, wanda ya kawo karshen Jamhuriya ta Fakar ta kasar cikin bakin ciki.

timeline.event: Ya hau karagar mulki a matsay인 Fir'auna na Masar da Kush.
Lokaci ne na zaman lafiya da wadata, inda aka gudanar da gagarumin aikin gine-gine a Karnak, Kawa, da Jebel Barkal.
Sarkin Assyria Esarhaddon ya mamaye Masar, ya ci Memphis da yaki, sannan ya tilasta wa Taharqa gudu zuwa kudu.
Bayan mutuwar Esarhaddon, Taharqa ya sake kwace Memphis na wani lokaci.
Sarkin Assyria Ashurbanipal ya kaddamar da wani babban hari inda ya kwashe dukiyar birnin Thebes.
Ya mutu a Napata sannan aka binne shi a piramid na Nuri da ke Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin kai da Wadata
keyAchievements.description: Ya mulki wata babbar daula da ta tashi daga Nubia zuwa Delta ta kogin Nile, wanda ya kawo lokacin zaman lafiya da wadatar tattalin arziki.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Gina Katon Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da daya daga cikin manyan tsare-tsare na gine-gine na zamaninsa, inda ya gyara da kuma gina haikalai a Masar da Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci farfado da fasaha, addini, da al'adun Masar bisa kwarin gwiwa daga al'adun Tsohuwar Daula.

faq.question: Shin an ambaci Taharqa a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki?
faq.answer: E, ana kyautata zaton shi ne 'Tirhaka Sarkin Habasha (Kush)' da aka ambata a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki na Ibraniyawa (2 Sarakuna 19:9; Ishaya 37:9), wanda ya yaki Sarki Sennacherib na Assyria.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Fir'auna na 'Nubia' ko 'Kush'?
faq.answer: Taharqa ya fito ne daga Masarautar Kush da ke cikin kasar Sudan ta yanzu (Nubia ta da). Daularsa, watau Daular 25, ta ci Masar da yaki sannan ta mulki kasar na kusan karni daya.

faq.question: Me ya faru da masarautarsa bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Bayan janyewar Taharqa, Assyrian sun kafa daular Masar ta gida. Masarautar Kush ta ci gaba da bunkasa a Nubia na tsawon shekaru dubu daya, amma ba ta sake samun ikon mallakar Masar ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Carthage da ke karkashin mulkin Roma a Afirka.
Ya shiga addinin Kirista.
Ya rubuta manyan litattafan kare addinin Kirista, watau 'Apologeticus' da kuma 'Ad Nationes'.
Ya fara nuna goyon baya ga kungiyar Montanism, inda ya fi son rayuwa ta tsantsani.
Ya rubuta 'Adversus Praxean', wani babban littafi da ke bayyana koyarwar Uku Cikin Daya (Trinity).
Ya yanke alaka gaba daya da babbar coci sannan ya zama jagoran kungiyarsa ta kashin kansa.
Ya mutu a Carthage.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Ilimin Addini na Latin
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne babban marubucin Kirista na farko da ya yi amfani da harshen Latin, inda ya samar da kalmomi don ilimin addini na Yammacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da kalmar 'Trinity'
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya fara amfani da kalmar Latin 'Trinitas' (Trinity) don bayyana alakar da ke tsakanin Uba, da Da, da kuma Ruhu Mai Tsarki.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Kare Addini mai Yawan Ayyuka
keyAchievements.description: Littafinsa na 'Apologeticus' wani babban aiki ne na farko da ke kare hakki na shari'a da dabi'u na Kiristoci.

faq.question: Shin Tertullian tsarkaka ne?
faq.answer: A'a, ba a amince da shi a matsayin tsarkaka ba a cikin Cocin Katolika ko na Orthodox, musamman saboda shigarsa kungiyar Montanism da ake kallo a matsayin bidi'a.

faq.question: Wanne harshe Tertullian ya yi amfani da shi wajen rubuce-rubucensa?
faq.answer: Ya fi yin rubuce-rubuce da harshen Latin, amma ya kware a harshen Helenanci kuma yana iya kasancewa ya rubuta wasu ayyukansa na farko da aka rasa da harshen Helenanci.

faq.question: Menene Montanism?
faq.answer: Montanism wani yunkuri ne na farko na Kiristanci wanda ke jaddada sabuwar wahayi na annabci, tsauraran dabi'u, da kuma ayyukan tsantsani, wanda hakan ya jawo hankalin Tertullian.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Kassa Hailu a yankin Qwara na Daular Habasha.
Ya shahara a matsayin 'shifta' (mai tayar da zaune tsaye) kuma ya tara babban sojan da ya ba shi daukaka.
Ya kayar da manyan sarakunan yankin na lokacin Zemene Mesafint (Lokacin Sarakuna) a jer인 yakoki masu mahimmanci.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Habasha a matsayin Sarki, inda ya yi amfani da sunan sarauta Tewodros II.
Ya fara gagarumin sauye-sauye don tsara ikon gudanarwa a tsakiya, zamanantar da soja, da kuma rage ikon sarakunan gargajiya da na coci.
Ya tura wasika ga Sarauniya Victoria na Burtaniya don neman kawance na soja, amma bai sami amsar wasika ba.
A matsayin martani ga wulakanci na diflomasiyya, ya tsare jakadan Burtaniya Charles Duncan Cameron da sauran Turawa, wanda ya haifar da tashin hankali.
Burtaniya ta kaddamar da balaguron Abyssinia, wani gagarumin aikin soja don ceto mutanen da aka tsare.
Bayan an kayar da sojojinsa a Yakin Magdala, ya kashe kansa ta hanyar amfani da bindiga da Sarauniya Victoria ta ba shi don kauce wa kama shi a matsayin fursuna.

keyAchievements.title: Kawo Karshen 'Lokacin Sarakuna'
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko da ya sake hada kan Habasha karkashin ikon tsakiya bayan ya kayar da sarakunan yankin da suka rabu da yaki na tsawon fiye da karni daya.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin Zamanantarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya nemi samar da dakarun soja kwararru na zamani, ya gyara tsarin haraji, ya tsara gwamnati a tsakiya, kuma ya shigo da fasahar Turai da masu sana'a.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Habasha ta Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Duk da cewa ya kare cikin bakin ciki, mulkinsa ya samar da muhimman ginshikai da kuma kishin kasa na Habasha ta zamani.

faq.question: Me yasa ya zabi sunan Tewodros?
faq.answer: Ya yi amfani da sunan sarauta Tewodros II don cika wani shahararren annabci da ke cewa wani sarki adali mai suna Tewodros zai bayyana, wanda zai kawo karshen 'Lokacin Sarakuna' sannan ya maido da daukakar Daular Habasha.

faq.question: Me yasa ya yi yaki da Daular Burtaniya?
faq.answer: Rikicin ya fara ne bayan ya tura wasika ga Sarauniya Victoria don neman kawance, amma ma'aikatar harkokin waje ta Burtaniya ta yi watsi da wasika. Da jin cewa an wulakanta shi, ya tsare Turawa da dama ciki har da jami'an Burtaniya, wanda hakan ya sa sojojin Burtaniya suka kaddamar da balaguro zuwa Magdala don kubutar da su.

faq.question: Menene gadon Tewodros II a Habasha a yau?
faq.answer: Ana girmama Tewodros II a matsayin gwarzon kasa kuma uban Habasha ta zamani a yau. Ana kallonsa a matsayin wani jagora mai hangen nesa, ko da yake ya kare cikin bakin ciki, wanda ke da burin gina kasa mai karfi, dunkulalliyar kasa, kuma mai cin gashin kanta wadda za ta iya yaki da mahara na kasashen waje.

timeline.event: An yi amanna cewa an haife shi a matsayin Tutankhaten a birnin Amarna.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Masar yana dan kimanin shekaru 9 bayan mutuwar sarki na baya Smenkhkare.
Ya canza sunansa zuwa Tutankhamun, ya maido da babban birnin zuwa Thebes, kuma ya fara maido da bautar alloli na gargajiya na Masar.
Ya mutu yana da kimanin shekaru 19 sannan aka binne shi a wani kabari da aka shirya cikin gaggawa a Kwarin Sarakuna (KV62).
Masanin kimiya na Burtaniya Howard Carter ya gano kabarinsa wanda ke nan cikakke gaba daya, karkashin daukar nauyin kudi na Lord Carnarvon a shekarar 1922 CE.

keyAchievements.title: Maido da Addinin Gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke bautar allahn daya tilo na Aten da mahaifinsa Akhenaten ya kafa, inda ya maido da bautar alloli daban-daban na gargajiya da kuma mahimmancin allahn Amun-Ra.

keyAchievements.title: Mayar da Babban Birni
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da fadar sarauta daga Amarna wadda Akhenaten ya gina zuwa cibiyoyin gudanarwa da addini na gargajiya na Memphis da Thebes.

keyAchievements.title: Shahara bayan Mutuwa
keyAchievements.description: Babban 'nasararsa' ta ginu ne a kan kabarinsa da aka samu gaba daya cikakke a zamanin yau, wanda ya samar da haske na musamman game da yaya ake binne sarakuna a Masar ta da.

faq.question: Yaya Tutankhamun ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalilin yana da mahawara. Shaidu daga jikinsa sun nuna cewa yana da matsalolin lafiya da yawa ciki har da gurguntaccen kafa, cutar kashi, da zazzabin cizon sauro. Karyewar kafa mai tsanani da ya samu daf da mutuwarsa wadda ta harbu da kwayoyin cuta tana iya kasancewa ta haifar da mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Me yasa kabarinsa yake da kankanta ga sarki?
faq.answer: Mutuwarsa da ba a yi tsammani ba da wuri tana nufin cewa ba a sami lokacin kammala katon kabari na sarauta ba. Wani karamin kabari da aka yi don wani da ba na sarauta ba ne aka sauya shi da sauri don binne shi.

faq.question: Shin akwai 'La'anar Fir'auna' da gaske?
faq.answer: '저주'는 대체로 언론이 만들어낸 것입니다. 무덤 개봉 후 일련의 사망 사건들, 예를 들어 카나본 경이 감염된 모기 물림으로 사망한 것이 전설에 불을 지폈지만, 통계 분석 결과 발굴에 관련된 사람들 사이에 비정상적인 사망률은 없었습니다.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsay인 Yarima Kwaku Dua III.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Asantehene bayan wani lokaci na yakin basasa, inda ya zabi sunan sarauta Prempeh I.
Ya mika wuya ga sojojin Burtaniya don hana lalata Kumasi, sannan aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Sierra Leone.
An sake tura shi gudun hijira zuwa tsibiran Seychelles. Lokacin da yake gudun hijira, 'Yakin Kujerar Zinariya' ya barke.
An ba shi damar komawa Gold Coast (Ghana ta yanzu) a matsayin talaka.
Gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Burtaniya ta maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene (Sarkin Kumasi).
Ya mutu a Kumasi.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Hadakar Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo karshen yakin basasa lokacin da ya hau karagar mulki kuma ya sake hada kan larduna daban-daban na Hadakar Ashanti.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar tirjiya da mulkin mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Kin mika Kujerar Zinariya da kuma mika wuyarsa cikin lumana don kare mutanensa ya mayar da shi wata babbar alama ta tirjiya.

keyAchievements.title: Kiyaye Asalin Ashanti
keyAchievements.description: Komawarsa daga gudun hijira da maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene ya farfado da kishin kasa da asalin al'adun mutanen Ashanti.

faq.question: Me yasa Kujerar Zinariya take da mahimmanci?
faq.answer: An yi amanna cewa Kujerar Zinariya (Sika Dwa Kofi) ta sauko ne daga sama kuma tana dauke da ruhin al'ummar Ashanti. Ba kawai kujerar sarki ba ce, face babbar alama ce ta iko, hadin kai, da kuma ci gaban al'ummar Ashanti.

faq.question: Me yasa Prempeh I ya mika wuya ga Burtaniya ba tare da yaki ba a shekarar 1896?
faq.answer: Sakamakon fuskantar sojojin Burtaniya masu makamai mafi inganci, Prempeh I ya zabi ya mika wuya don hana lalata birnin Kumasi da kisan kiyashin mutanensa. Wannan wata shawara ce ta zahiri don kare al'ummar Ashanti.

faq.question: Me ya faru bayan ya dawo daga gudun hijira?
faq.answer: Mutanensa sun tarbe shi a matsayin gwarzo a shekarar 1924. A shekarar 1926, Burtaniya ta maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene (Sarkin Kumasi) amma ba a matsayin Asantehene na daukacin hadakar ba. Kasancewarsa ya taimaka wajen sake hada kan al'ummar Ashanti.

timeline.event: Ya gaji Masarautar Kush daga mahaifinsa Kashta inda ya zama Sarkin Napata.
Ya kaddamar da yakin soja zuwa Masar don yaki da ikon da ke bunkasa na Tefnakht na Sais.
Ya kammala cin Masar da yaki bayan ya mamaye manyan birane da suka hada da Hermopolis da babban birnin Memphis.
Ya kafa shahararren 'Dutsen Nasara' (Victory Stele) a haikalin Amun da ke Jebel Barkal don tunawa da yakinsa.
Ya mutu sannan aka binne shi a makabartar sarauta ta El-Kurru, wadda ke dauke da piramid na farko irin na Masar a Nubia.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Masar da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar mamaye da kuma cin Masar da ta rabu da yaki, inda ya kayar da hadakar sarakunan Arewacin Masar.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Daular 25
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daular Kush (Daular 25) wadda ta mulki Masar na kusan karni guda.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Hada kan Kasashe Biyu
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina wata babbar daula da ta tashi daga zurfin Nubia zuwa Delta ta tekun Mediterranean kuma ya yi mulki a matsayin 'Ubangijin Kasashe Biyu'.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Farfado da Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa ya fara zamanin farfadowa a Masar, inda ya maido da salon fasaha na da da sadaukarwar addini, musamman bautar allahn Amun.

faq.question: Shin Piye dan kasar Masar ne ko kuwa dan Nubia?
faq.answer: Piye sarki ne na Nubia na Masarautar Kush da ke cikin kasar Sudan ta yanzu. Sai dai al'adun Kush sun sami tasiri sosai daga al'adun Masar, kuma Piye ya dauki kansa a matsayin magaji na gaskiya kuma mai kare al'adun Masar na da.

faq.question: Me yasa wani lokacin ake kiran sa Piankhy?
faq.answer: '피앙키'는 그의 이름에 대한 오래된 판독으로, 현재는 틀린 것으로 간주됩니다. 현대 이집트학자들은 그의 상형문자 이름에 대한 정확한 음역이 '피예'라는 데 동의합니다.

faq.question: Shin ya yi mulki a cikin kasar Masar?
faq.answer: A'a. Bayan nasarar da ya samu, Piye ya koma babban birninsa na asali watau Napata da ke Nubia inda ya mulki kasashensa guda biyu a can, sannan ya bar ragamar mulkin Masar ga sarakunan gida da kuma magadansa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Lagos, Najeriya karkashin mulkin Burtaniya.
Ya sami horon aikin injiniya na gida (civil engineering) a Burtaniya, wanda ya sa ya zama injiniya na farko dan Najeriya.
Ya yi ritaya daga aikin gwamnati na mulkin mallaka sannan ya zama mai auna filaye na kashin kansa kuma babban mai sukar gwamnati.
Ya kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko a Najeriya, watau Nigerian National Democratic Party (NNDP).
Ya kafa jaridar 'Lagos Daily News', wadda ta zama babban makamin ayyukansa na yaki da mulkin mallaka.
Tare da Nnamdi Azikiwe, ya kafa kungiyar National Council of Nigeria and the Cameroons (NCNC).
Ya mutu a Kano yana da shekaru 81 lokacin da yake cikin wata tafiyar siyasa ta kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Jam'iyyar Siyasa ta Farko a Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kungiyar Nigerian National Democratic Party (NNDP) a shekarar 1923, wanda ya samar da tsarin siyasa na farko ga 'yan Najeriya.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Aikin Jarida na Kishin Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Jaridarsa 'Lagos Daily News' ta kasance babban makami wajen hada ra'ayin jama'a yaki da manufofin mulkin mallaka.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Kishin Kasar Najeriya
keyAchievements.description: Kokarinsa na din-din-din ya samar da ginshikin akida da tsari ga yunkurin samun 'yancin Najeriya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Herbert Macaulay 'Uban Kishin Kasar Najeriya'?
faq.answer: Saboda yana daya daqun mutanen farko kuma mafi tasiri wajen tsara tirjiyar siyasa da mulkin Burtaniya, kafa jam'iyya ta farko, da kuma kare hakkin cin gashin kai na Najeriya, wanda ya zaburar da daukacin 'yan kishin kasa.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar sa take da Nnamdi Azikiwe?
faq.answer: Macaulay ya kasance babban dan siyasa wanda ya zaburar da matasan kishin kasa kamar Azikiwe. Sun yi aiki tare don kafa NCNC, inda suka hada karfin siyasar Macaulay da kuma shaharar kishin kasa ta zamani ta Azikiwe.

faq.question: Menene aikin sa kafin ya sadaukar da kansa ga siyasa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance injiniyan gida da mai auna filaye da aka horas a Burtaniya. Wannan ilimin ya ba shi basira ta musamman game da ayyukan gine-gine da manufofin filaye na mulkin mallaka, wadanda galibi yake suka a matsayin zalunci.

faq.question: Shin an taba tsare Herbert Macaulay a gidan yari?
faq.answer: E, hukumomin mulkin mallaka sun tsare shi a gidan yari sau biyu saboda ayyukansa na siyasa. Sai dai wannan tsarewar ta kara masa shahara kuma ta karfafa matsayinsa na sadaukarwa ga kishin kasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pella, Cape Colony (Afirka ta Kudu ta yanzu).
Ya zama Kaptein (Sarki) na mutanen Witbooi Nama bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Moses Witbooi.
Ya rubuta shahararren wasika ga Sarkin Herero Maharero yana gargadin shi game da kulla 'yarjejeniyar tsaro' da kasar Jamus.
An matsa masa lamba don ya sa hannu a kan yarjejeniyar tsaro da Jamus baada shekaru da yawa yana nuna tirjiya.
Ya karya yarjejeniyar sannan ya shelanta yaki da Jamus, inda ya shiga cikin babban Yakin Herero-Nama.
Ya mutu a ranar 29 ga Oktoba lokacin da yake jagorantar dakarunsa yaki da Jamus kusa da Vaalgras.
Hotonsa yana bayyana a kan daukacin takardun kudi na Dalar Namibia, wanda ke tabbatar da matsayinsa na gwarzon kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Tirjiya da Mulkin Mallaka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daqun shugabannin Afirka na farko da suka bayyana kyakkyawan hangen nesa na hadin kan kabilu daban-daban yaki da babban hadari na mulkin mallaka na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon Kasar Namibia
keyAchievements.description: Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban kasar Namibia ta zamani kuma babban gwarzon kasa, inda hotonsa ke bayyana a kudaden kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Littafin Tarihin Witbooi
keyAchievements.description: Dinbin rubuce-rubucen tarihinsa na yau da kullum da wasikunsa suna cikin jerin Taskar Tarihi ta Duniya ta UNESCO, wanda ke samar da hangen nesa na Afirka na musamman game da mulkin mallaka.

faq.question: Me yasa Witbooi ya yi yaki da sauran kungiyoyi na Namibia kamar Herero a farko?
faq.answer: Kafin lokacin mulkin mallaka na Jamus, rikici tsakanin kabilun gida a kan albarkatu kamar makiyaya, ruwa, da sarrafa hanyoyin kasuwanci ya kasance siffa ta yau da kullum a siyasar yankin.

faq.question: Me yasa hoton Hendrik Witbooi ke kan kudaden Namibia?
faq.answer: An dora hotonsa a kan kudin Dalar Namibia don girmama shi a matsayin babban gwarzon kasar kuma alama mai karfi ta dogon yakin neman samun 'yanci daga ikon waje.

faq.question: Menene sakamon yakinsa da Jamus?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa Witbooi ya mutu kuma sojojin Jamus sun murkushe tirjiyar da karfi, wanda ya kai ga kisan kiyashi na Herero da Nama, yakin gwagwarmayarsa ya zama ginshikin tarihin kishin kasar Namibia da kuma yakin samun 'yanci a karni na 20.

timeline.event: An haife ta a cikin dangi mai daraja da dukiya a Minya, Masar.
An tilasta mata auren dan uwanta Ali Pasha Sha'arawi tana da shekaru 13.
Ta tsara kuma ta jagoranci daya daga cikin zanga-zangar farko na mata a kan titi yaki da mulkin Burtaniya lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Masar.
Ta cire mayafin fuskarta a fili a babban tashar jirgin kasa ta Alkahira, wanda ya zama lokaci mai muhimmanci ga gwagwarmayar mata a Masar.
Ta kafa kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union (EFU) kuma ta zama shugabarta ta farko.
EFU ta fara buga wata jarida mai tasiri ta mata mai suna 'L'Egyptienne'.
Ya tara taron farko na mata na kasashen Larabawa a Alkahira sannan ta zama shugabar kafa kungiyar Arab Feminist Union.
Ta rasu a Alkahira tana da shekaru 68.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union (EFU)
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa EFU a shekarar 1923, wadda ta zama kungiyar mata ta farko kuma mafi tasiri da ta yi yakin neman hakkin mata a Masar.

keyAchievements.title: Matakin Cire Mayafi a Fili
keyAchievements.description: Matakin cire mayafi da ta yi a shekarar 1923 ya zama babban alama ta 'yantar da mata da kuma adawa da manufofin ware mata a duniyar Larabawa.

keyAchievements.title: Jagoranci a Juyin Juya Halin 1919
keyAchievements.description: Ta tattara mata don shiga cikin zanga-zangar kishin kasa yaki da mulkin mallaka na Burtaniya, inda ta hada gwagwarmayar mata da samun 'yancin kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kungiyar Arab Feminist Union
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1944, ta fadada kokarinta ta hanyar kafa wata kungiyar Pan-Arab don hada kan yunkurin mata a daukacin yankin.

faq.question: Me yasa matakinta na cire mayafi yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mataki na nuna tirjiya a fili da kuma na siyasa yaki da tsarin 'harem' wanda ke ware mata. Ya zama alama mai karfi da ke neman samar wa mata gurbi a cikin rayuwar jama'a da ta siyasa.

faq.question: Shin ta mayar da hankali ne kawai a kan hakkin mata?
faq.answer: A'a. Ta kuma kasance mai kishin kasar Masar sosai. Ta yi imanin cewa 'yantar da mata yana da alaka ta asali da 'yantar da Masar daga mulkin mallaka na Burtaniya, inda ta bayyana cewa kasa ba za ta iya kasancewa mai 'yanci ba idan rabin al'ummarta ba su da 'yanci.

faq.question: Menene manyan manufofin Egyptian Feminist Union?
faq.answer: EFU ta yi yakin neman hakkin kada kuri'a na mata, gyaran dokokin iyali game da aure, saki, da kula da yara, da kuma fadada damar samun ilimi ga 'yan mata da mata.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Thagaste, Numidia (Souk Ahras na Algeria ta yanzu).
Ya fara karantar ilimin magana a Carthage, inda ya sami mata ta wucin gadi wadda ta haifi dansa Adeodatus.
Ya zama mabiyin addinin Manichaeism.
Ya koma Milan don yin aiki a matsayin malamin ilimin magana sannan ya hadu da Bishop Ambrose.
Ya fuskanci shahararren sauyin addini zuwa Kiristanci a wani lambu a Milan.
Ambrose ya yi masa baftisma tare da dansa Adeodatus a Milan.
An nada shi a matsayin limami a Hippo Regius (Annaba na Algeria ta yanzu).
Ya zama Bishop na Hippo kuma ya rike wannan matsayin har zuwa mutuwarsa.
Ya rubuta littafin tarihinsa na kashin kansa mai suna 'Confessions'.
Ya rubuta 'The City of God' a matsayin martani ga ikirarin arna na cewa faduwar Roma (410 CE) ta faru ne saboda watsar da allolin Roma.
Ya mutu a Hippo Regius lokacin da Vandal suka kewaye birnin.

keyAchievements.title: Confessions (Confessiones)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa salon rubuta tarihin rayuwar kashin kansa, wanda ya samar da zurfin fahimta ta hankali da addini game da rayuwarsa ta ruhaniya.

keyAchievements.title: The City of God (De Civitate Dei)
keyAchievements.description: Wani gagarumin aiki ne na falsafar Kirista wanda ya tsara tunanin siyasa da addini na Yammacin duniya fiye da shekaru dubu.

keyAchievements.title: Koyarwar Zunubin Asali da Alheri
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da muhimman koyarwar Kirista a kan dabi'ar dan adam, zunubi, da kuma bukatar alherin Allah don ceto, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ilimin addini na Yammacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Koyarwar Yaki na Adalci (Just War Theory)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana ka'idoji na farko kuma masu tasiri game da lokacin da kasa za ta iya yin yaki bisa ka'ida ta dabi'a.

faq.question: Menene Manichaeism da Augustine ya bi?
faq.answer: Wani babban addini ne na Gnostic wanda annabci Mani ya kafa. Ya samar da tsarin duniya na rabuwa tsakanin duniyar haske ta ruhaniya mai kyau da kuma duniyar duhu ta zahiri mai mummuna.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon 'Confessions' a matsayin babban aiki na musamman?
faq.answer: Saboda yana daya daqun litattafan tarihin rayuwa na kashin kansa na farko a Yammacin duniya da ya hada labarin kashin kansa, tunanin falsafa, da addu'a tare da zurfin nazari da ba a taba gani ba a lokacin.

faq.question: Menene babban ra'ayin 'The City of God'?
faq.answer: Augustine ya yi jayayya cewa tarihi wani rikici ne tsakanin 'birane' guda biyu: Birnin Dan Adam na kasa (bisa son kai da ikon duniya) da kuma Birnin Allah na sama (bisa son Allah). Ya bayyana cewa makoma ta karshe ta bil'adama tana cikin Birnin Allah ne, ba wai a kowace daula ta kasa kamar Roma ba.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayin Augustine game da mummuna?
faq.answer: Bayan ya rabu da rayuwarsa ta baya na Manichaeism, Augustine ya yi jayayya cewa mummuna ba wani abu ne na zahiri ko iko da kansa ba. Maimakon haka, ya bayyana mummuna a matsayin 'privatio boni', watau rashi ko rashin alheri, kamar yadda duhu yake kasancewa rashin haske.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Anomabu, Gold Coast (Ghana ta yanzu).
Ya tafi Fourah Bay College da ke Freetown, Sierra Leone don neman ilimi mai zurfi.
Ya tafi Inner Temple da London don karantar doka.
Ya sami shaidar zama lauya kuma ya koma Gold Coast don yin aikin lauya.
Ya buga shahararren littafinsa mai suna 'Ethiopia Unbound: Studies in Race Emancipation'.
An zabe shi a matsayin mamba na Majalisar Dokoki mai wakiltar gundumar teku.
Ya kafa kuma ya jagoranci kungiyar National Congress of British West Africa (NCBWA) a Accra.
Ya mutu a Accra, Gold Coast.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa National Congress of British West Africa (NCBWA)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa yunkurin siyasa na farko tsakanin kasashen mulkin mallaka wanda ke kare hakkin cin gashin kai da gyaran tsarin mulki a British West Africa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta 'Ethiopia Unbound'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta daya daqun litattafan Afirka na farko da harshen Turanci, wanda ya zama ginshikin Pan-Africanism da kishin al'adu.

keyAchievements.title: Kare Hakkin 'Yan Gari
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinya na lauya kuma dan siyasa, ya kare hakkin filaye na Afirka da mutuncin hukumomin gargajiya yaki da manufofin mulkin mallaka.

faq.question: Menene manyan manufofin National Congress of British West Africa?
faq.answer: Babban burin shi ne fadada shigar 'yan Afirka a cikin gudanar da mulkin mallaka na British West Africa, kuma a karshe samun ikon cin gashin kai a cikin Daular Burtaniya.

faq.question: Me yasa littafinsa 'Ethiopia Unbound' yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Yana da mahimmanci saboda aiki ne na farko da ya hada almara da falsafar siyasa don yin kira ga 'yancin al'adu da siyasa na Afirka, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan marubuta da 'yan kishin kasa na Afirka masu zuwa.

faq.question: Menene 'Pan-Africanism' ke nufi a gare shi?
faq.answer: Ga Casely Hayford, yana nufin hadin kan daukacin mutanen Afirka a doron kasa da kuma kasashen waje don yaki da mulkin mallaka, dawo da al'adunsu, da kuma yin aiki tare don ci gaban siyasa da tattalin arziki.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Fort-de-France, Martinique da ke karkashin mulkin Faransa.
Ya tafi Dominica don shiga dakarun Free French lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.
Ya karanci magani da hauka (psychiatry) a Lyon, Faransa, kuma ya sami shaidar zama likitan hauka.
Ya buga littafinsa na farko mai suna 'Black Skin, White Masks'.
Ya zama shugaban sashin hauka a asibitin Blida-Joinville a Algeria.
Ya yi ritaya daga aikinsa a asibiti don nuna adawa da manufofin mulkin mallaka na Faransa kuma ya shiga kungiyar FLN ta Algeria.
Ya buga littafin 'A Dying Colonialism'.
Ya buga littafinsa mafi shahara 'The Wretched of the Earth' tare da gabatarwa daga Jean-Paul Sartre.
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar daji ta jini (leukemia) a Bethesda, Maryland, Amurka yana da shekaru 36.

keyAchievements.title: Black Skin, White Masks (1952)
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban aiki ne da ke nazarin tasirin tunani na mulkin mallaka da wariyar launin fata a kan mutanen da aka mulka.

keyAchievements.title: The Wretched of the Earth (1961)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kallonsa a matsayin ginshikin binciken mulkin mallaka na bayan yaki, littafin yana sukar mulkin mallaka sannan yana tattauna rawar da yaki ke takawa wajen samun 'yanci.

keyAchievements.title: Likitocin Hauka na Juyin Juya Hali
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sabbin hanyoyi na likitancin hauka don magance matsalolin tunani na mutanen da aka mulka, inda ya hada wahalhalun tunaninsu da tsarin al'umma na zalunci.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan Yunkurin Samun 'Yanci
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun kasance babban kwarin gwiwa ga yunkurin yaki da mulkin mallaka da samun 'yancin bakar fata a duniya, ciki har da Amurka, Afirka ta Kudu, da kuma Palestine.

faq.question: Me yasa ra'ayin Frantz Fanon game da yaki yake da cike da cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Fanon ya yi jayayya cewa yaki yana iya kasancewa wani abu mai 'yantar da tunani ga mutanen da aka mulka don dawo da mutuncinsu daga zaluncin masu mulkin mallaka. Masu suka suna cewa wannan yana daukaka yaki ne, yayin da masu goyon baya ke kallonsa a matsayin nazari mai zurfi na zalunci da tirjiya.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakar Frantz Fanon take da Jean-Paul Sartre?
faq.answer: Sartre ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Fanon. Sun hadu a shekarar 1961, kuma Sartre ya burge da rubutun Fanon na 'The Wretched of the Earth' wanda ya sa ya rubuta shahararren gabatarwa mai cike da cece-kuce.

faq.question: Menene 'yantar da kai daga mulkin mallaka' a cewar Fanon?
faq.answer: Ga Fanon, 'yantar da kai daga mulkin mallaka ba wai kawai samun 'yancin siyasa ba ne. Wani tsari ne mai zurfi kuma galibi na yaki wanda ke ruguza tsarin mulkin mallaka sannan ya samar da 'sabuwar halitta' wadda ke da 'yanci daga nauyin tunani da al'adu na mulkin mallaka.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Great Barrington, Massachusetts.
Ya zama bakar fata na farko dan Afirka ta Amurka da ya sami digirin digirgir (PhD) a Jami'ar Harvard.
Ya buga shahararren littafinsa mai suna 'The Souls of Black Folk'.
Ya taimaka wajen kafa kungiyar Niagara Movement wadda ke neman hakkin dan kasa ga bakar fata.
Ya hada hannu wajen kafa kungiyar NAACP (National Association for the Advancement of Colored People).
Ya yi aiki a matsayin edita na jaridar 'The Crisis' ta NAACP.
Ya tsara babban taron Pan-African na farko a Paris.
Ya koma Ghana bisa gayyatar Shugaba Kwame Nkrumah.
Ya mutu a Accra, Ghana yana da shekaru 95.

keyAchievements.title: The Souls of Black Folk
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban aiki ne na adabi da zamantakewa na bakar fata na Amurka wanda ya samar da ra'ayoyin 'double consciousness' da kuma 'veil'.

keyAchievements.title: Hadaka wajen kafa NAACP
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daya daga cikin kungiyoyin kare hakkin dan adam mafi tasiri a tarihin Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Pan-Africanism
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara tarurrukan Pan-African da yawa don samar da hadin kai na duniya da kuma ra'ayin yaki da mulkin mallaka a tsakanin mutanen zuriyar Afirka.

faq.question: Menene 'double consciousness'?
faq.answer: Wani rikici ne na cikin gida da mutanen da ake zalunta ke fuskanta a cikin al'umma. Yana bayyana yadda bakar fata na Amurka ke kallon kansu ta fuskar al'ummar farar fata mai nuna wariya yayin da suke kokarin kiyaye asalin kansu.

faq.question: Me yasa ya sami sabani da Booker T. Washington?
faq.answer: Du Bois ya nuna adawa da yarjejeniyar 'Atlanta Compromise' ta Washington, wadda ke goyon bayan ilimin sana'a da ci gaban tattalin arziki maimakon neman daidaiton siyasa da al'umma nan take. Du Bois ya nace a kan cikakken hakkin dan kasa da kuma ci gaban bakar fata masu ilimi da fasaha ('Talented Tenth').

faq.question: Me yasa ya zama mai ra'ayin gurguzu sannan ya koma Ghana?
faq.answer: Bayan ya cire rai da tsarin jari hujja da nuna wariya na Amurka sannan ya fuskanci tsangwama lokacin zamanin McCarthy, ya karbi akidar gurguzu a matsayin mafita ga rashin adalci na duniya. Ya koma Ghana don yin aiki a kan 'Encyclopedia Africana' da kuma zama a sabuwar kasar Afirka mai 'yanci.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Constantinople, babban birnin Daular Byzantine.
An nada shi a matsayin babban alkali kuma mai ba da shawara a Mistra, babban birnin Daular Morea.
Ya halarci taron Majalisar Florence-Ferrara a matsayin memba na wakilan Byzantine da ke neman hada kan Cocin Gabas da na Yamma.
Ya burge masana na Italiya ta hanyar gabatar da shahararren jawabi a kan fifikon Plato a kan Aristotle a Florence.
Ya koma Mistra inda ya rubuta babban littafinsa mai cike da cece-kuce 'Nomoi' (Laws), wanda ke ba da shawarar sabuwar kasa bisa tsarin Neoplatonism.
Ya mutu a Mistra shekara daya kacal kafin faduwar Constantinople a hannun Daular Usmaniyya.
An kona littafinsa mai cike da cece-kuce 'Nomoi' a fili da umarnin tsohon dalibinsa, Shugaban Coci Gennadius Scholarius.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Gabatar da Plato ga Yammacin Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Jawabansa a Majalisar Florence sun sake tayar da sha'awar Plato a Yammacin Turai, wanda ya yi tasiri kai-tsaye a kan Renaissance na Italiya.

keyAchievements.title: Zaburar da Makarantar Plato (Platonic Academy)
keyAchievements.description: Tunaninsa ya zaburar da Cosimo de' Medici don daukar nauyin fassarar ayyukan Plato da kuma kafa shahararren ginin Platonic Academy a Florence.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta makala mai tasiri kamar 'On the Differences Between Aristotle and Plato' don kare tsarin Plato yaki da tsarin Aristotle da ya mamaye lokacin.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Plethon'?
faq.answer: Ya dauki sunan 'Plethon' (wanda ke nufin mai cike da abu) saboda yana kama da sunan 'Platon' (Plato) kuma yana nuna zurfin sadaukarwarsa ga koyarwar masanin falsafar.

faq.question: Shin ya yi nasara wajen hada kan coci a Majalisar Florence?
faq.answer: A'a. Babban tasirinsa ba na addini ba ne. Kodayake majalisar da ya halarta tana neman hadin kan coci, babban gadonsa ya kasance na falsafa ne, inda ya fara farfado da tsarin Plato a Italiya.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kona littattafansa?
faq.answer: Saboda littafinsa na karshe 'Nomoi' (Laws) ya ba da shawarar wani sabon addinin kasa wanda ya hada tsarin Neoplatonism da arnan Girka na da, wanda Cocin Orthodox ke kallonsa a matsayin bidi'a.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Velyki Sorochyntsi, Lardin Poltava na Daular Rasha (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Ya sami babban nasararsa ta farko ta adabi ta hanyar buga 'Evenings on a Farm Near Dikanka'.
Ya kaddamar da wasan kwaikwayonsa na barkwanci 'The Government Inspector', wanda ya haifar da babban cece-kuce.
Ya rayu a kasashen waje, galibi a Roma, inda ya rubuta 'Dead Souls'.
Ya buga kashi na farko na babban littafinsa 'Dead Souls' da kuma shahararren gajeren labarinsa 'The Overcoat'.
Ya kona rubutun kashi na biyu na 'Dead Souls' lokacin da yake cikin hauka na addini, kuma ya mutu bayan kwanaki goma sakamakon tsananin azabtar da kansa (asceticism).

keyAchievements.title: Dead Souls
keyAchievements.description: Ya bude hanyar salon 'prose poem' kuma ya nuna gurbacewar dabi'u na yankunan Rasha cikin salon barkwanci.

keyAchievements.title: The Overcoat
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban aiki ne na salon zahiri (realism) na Rasha wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan marubuta da yulu, ciki har da Fyodor Dostoevsky.

keyAchievements.title: The Government Inspector
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban wasan kwaikwayo ne na barkwanci wanda ke nuna gurbacewa, kwadayi, da kuma yaudarar kai ta jami'an gwamnati a yankunan Rasha.

faq.question: Shin Gogol dan kasar Rasha ne ko kuwa dan Ukraine?
faq.answer: An haife shi ne a gidan Cossack na Ukraine a cikin kasar Ukraine ta yanzu. Ya rubuta ayyukansa da harshen Rasha kuma ayyukansa suna da mahimmanci a adabin Rasha, amma gadonsa na Ukraine ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukansa na farko da kuma hangen nesansa na duniya. Asalinsa batu ne na mahawaran al'adu tsakanin kasashen biyu.

faq.question: Me yasa ya kona kashi na biyu na 'Dead Souls'?
faq.answer: Lokacin da yake cikin babban tashin hankali na ruhaniya karkashin tasirin wani liman mai tsrajin ra'ayi, Gogol ya yi imanin cewa ayyukansa zunubi ne kuma ba su da addini sosai. Ya kona rubutun kwanaki goma kacal kafin mutuwarsa, da jin cewa ya kasa nuna hanyar ceto ga kasar Rasha.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar kalmar 'Gogolian'?
faq.answer: Tana nufin wani salo na musamman na adabi wanda ke hada zafafan barkwanci, abubuwa na ban mamaki (surreal/grotesque), da kuma zurfin bakin ciki ko damuwa. Yana nuna rashin ma'anar duniya wanda ke da ban tausayi da kuma ban dariya lokaci guda.

timeline.event: An haife shi a St. Petersburg, Daular Rasha.
An nada shi a matsayin Gwamna-Janar na Gabashin Siberia.
Ya jagoranci balaguron ba tare da izini ba a gefen kogin Amurka lokacin Yakin Crimea kuma ya kafa sansanonin Rasha.
Ya kulla Yarjejeniyar Aigun da Daular Qing, inda ya tabbatar da gefen hagu na kogin Amur a matsayin yankin Rasha kuma ya sami lakabin 'Amursky'.
Yarjejeniyar Beijing ta tabbatar kuma ta fadada yankunansu, inda aka ba su yankin da zai zama Lardin Maritime (Primorsky).
Ya yi ritaya daga matsayin Gwamna-Janar saboda sabani da gwamnati ta tsakiya.
Ya mutu a Paris, Faransa.

keyAchievements.title: Yarjejeniyar Aigun (1858)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da gefen hagu na kogin Amur a matsayin yankin Rasha ga Daular Qing, wanda ya sake fasalin kan iyaka a Gabas Mai Nisa gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Mulki a Gabas Mai Nisa na Rasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya kula da sansanoni da ci gaban Gabashin Siberia, wanda ya haifar da kafa manyan birane kamar Khabarovsk da Vladivostok kai-tsaye.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Hanyar Tekun Pacific
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun ba wa Daular Rasha tashoshin jiragen ruwa a Tekun Pacific wadanda ke bude duk shekara da kuma karfin soja a Gabashin Asiya.

faq.question: Me yasa kogin Amur yake da matukar mahimmanci ga Rasha?
faq.answer: Domin yana zama hanya mai mahimmanci ta sufuri da ke hada cikin Siberia da Tekun Pacific, yana kauce wa hanyoyin kasa masu wuya, sannan yana samar da yankin noma mai albarka.

faq.question: Shin ya yi aiki ne da izinin Tsar?
faq.answer: Kodayake ayyukansa na farko sun kasance masu karfi da rashin izini, ya yi aiki ne da fahimtar cewa Tsar yana goyon bayan burinsa na fadada kasa kuma zai amince da nasararsa a baya.

faq.question: Menene gadonsa a Rasha da kuma China?
faq.answer: A Rasha, ana yaba masa a matsayin gwarzon kasa da ya fadada daular. A China, ana kallon yarjejeniyoyin da ya kulla a matsayin 'yarjejeniyoyi marasa adalci' da aka kulla a lokacin raunin kasa da aka sani da 'Karni na Wulakanci'.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Moscow, Daular Rasha.
Ya kammala karatu a Petrovskaya Agricultural Academy (yanzu Timiryazev Agricultural Academy ta Moscow).
Ya tsara Dokar Homologous Series in Variation, wadda ke zama muhimmiyar ka'ida a fannin ilimin halittu na juyin halitta.
Ya jagoranci Hukumar Kula da Shuke-shuke ta Leningrad, wadda ya sake tsara ta ta zama All-Union Institute of Plant Industry.
Ya buga littafinsa mai cike da ci gaba 'The Centers of Origin of Cultivated Plants'.
Hukumar NKVD ta kama shi lokacin da yake wani bincike a Ukraine, inda ya zama wanda aka zalunta a siyasa karkashin jagorancin Trofim Lysenko.
An yanke masa hukuncin kisa a kan zargin zagon kasa, leken asiri, da sauran zarge-zargen boge. Daga baya an rage hukuncin zuwa gidan yari na shekaru 20.
Ya mutu sakamakon yunwa a gidan yarin Saratov.
An wanke sunansa bayan mutuwarsa lokacin da Nikita Khrushchev ya janye manufofin Stalin (de-Stalinization).

keyAchievements.title: Cibiyoyin Asali
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano cibiyoyin asali guda 8 na shuke-shuke, wanda ya kawo sauyi ga ilimin kwayoyin halitta (genetics) da juyin halitta na amfanin gona.

keyAchievements.title: Taskar Kwayoyin Shuke-shuke ta Farko a Duniya (Seed Bank)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa babbar tarin kwayoyin shuke-shuke a duniya a Leningrad, wanda ya zama muhimmiyar taska ga banbancin kwayoyin halitta na bil'adama.

keyAchievements.title: Dokar Homologous Series
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara dokar homologous series wadda ke hango canjin shuke-shuke masu alakar jini, wanda ya taimaka wajen neman halaye masu amfani.

faq.question: Me yasa binciken Vavilov yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Bincikensa ya samar da tushen kimiyya na zamanantar da kiwon shuke-shuke da kiyaye albarkatun kwayoyin halitta, wanda ke da muhimmanci ga tsaron abinci na duniya yaki da cututtuka, kwari, da canjin yanayi.

faq.question: Wane ne Trofim Lysenko?
faq.answer: Lysenko ya kasance masanin halittu da Stalin ke so, wanda ya inganta ra'ayoyin karya na ilimin kwayoyin halitta (Lysenkoism). Ya ki amincewa da ilimin genetics kuma yana da alhakin tsangwamar masana kimiyya da dama ciki har da Vavilov.

faq.question: Me ya faru da taskar kwayoyinsa (seed bank) lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu?
faq.answer: Lokacin da aka kewaye Leningrad na tsawon kwanaki 900, masana kimiyya na cibiyar sun kare tarin kwayoyin shuke-shuke daga mutane masu jin yunwa, beraye, da kuma bom. Wasu masana kimiyya sun gwammace su mutu sakamakon yunwa duk da cewa suna kusa da kwayoyin shuke-shuke da za a iya ci, don kare tarin kwayoyin ga al'ummar gobe.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kimborovo, Lardin Smolensk na Daular Rasha.
Ya kaddamar da balaguronsa na farko mai girma zuwa yankin Ussuri da ke Gabas Mai Nisa na Rasha.
Ya gudanar da balaguron farko na Tsakiyar Asiya, inda ya bincika Mongolia, Hamadar Gobi, sannan ya kai ga kogin Yangtze.
Ya jagoranci balaguron Tsakiyar Asiya na biyu, inda ya bincika yankin Lop Nor da kuma kwarin Dzungarian.
A lokacin balaguro na uku, ya bincika sassa na Tibet kuma ya bayyana dokin daji na Przewalski a kimiyance a karon farko.
Ya gudanar da balaguro na hudu, inda ya yi tafiya daga Hamadar Gobi ta tsaunin Tian Shan.
Ya mutu sakamakon zazzabin typhoid a Karakol, Kyrgyzstan lokacin da yake shirin fara balaguron Tsakiyar Asiya na biyar.

keyAchievements.title: Balaguron Tsakiyar Asiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara manyan larduna da ba a taba yin taswirarsu ba a Mongolia, Tibet, da Xinjiang don ilimin labarin kasa na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Gano Dokin Daji na Przewalski
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne Turai na farko da ya bayyana dokin daji na karshe da ke wanzu a kimiyance, wanda ka samu lakabin sunansa bayan haka.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawar Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara manyan abubuwa na zoology da botany, inda ya bayyana sabbin shuke-shuke da dabbobi sama da 200 ga kimiyyar Turai.

faq.question: Shin ya taba kaiwa ga birnin Lhasa, babban birnin Tibet?
faq.answer: A'a, duk da yunƙurin da ya yi da yawa, jami'an Tibet ko kuma tsananin yanayi koyaushe suna sa shi juyawa kafin ya kai birnin.

faq.question: Menene dokin daji na Przewalski?
faq.answer: Wani nau'i ne na musamman na dokin daji da ke fuskantar barazanar karewa, wanda ya fito daga yankin steppe na Tsakiyar Asiya. Shi ne Turai na farko da ya bayyana shi a kimiyance, kuma yanzu an sanya wa dokin sunansa.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu sakamakon zazzabin typhoid bayan ya sha gurbataccen ruwa daga kogin Chu daidai lokacin da zai fara balaguronsa na biyar a Karakol, Kyrgyzstan a shekarar 1888.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakarsa take da mutanen gida?
faq.answer: Balaguronsa suna da tsarin soja, kuma ra'ayoyinsa game da mutanen gida galibi sun kasance na wulakanci da ke nuna halin mulkin mallaka na zamaninsa, wanda hakan ya haifar da tashin hankali da rikice-rikice akai-akai.

timeline.event: An haifi Danylo Romanovych.
An kashe mahaifinsa, Roman Mai Girma, a yaki. Aka tilasta wa Danylo da iyalinsa tafiya gudun hijira.
Ya sake dawo da mulkin Lardin Volhynia, wanda ya kafa matsayinsa na farko na iko.
Ya ci Lardin Halych da yaki, inda a karshe ya hada Halych da Volhynia a karkashin mulkinsa.
Dakarunsa sun kwace Kyiv, tsohon babban birnin Rus', daf da lalata shi da mamayar Mongol ta yi.
Ya tafi Sarai, babban birnin Golden Horde, don mika wuya ga Batu Khan don kare masarautarsa daga lalacewa.
Wani wakilin Paparoma ya nada shi a matsayin 'Sarkin Ruthenia' a Drohiczyn, don neman kawance da Yammacin Turai.
Danylo Halytskyi ya mutu, inda ya bar masarauta mai karfi da dunkulewa ga magadansa.

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Galicia-Volhynia
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar hada lardunan Halych (Galicia) da Volhynia zuwa kasa guda mai karfi bayan shekaru da dama yana gwagwarmaya.

keyAchievements.title: Nadin Sarauta
keyAchievements.description: Wakilin Paparoma ya nada shi Sarkin Ruthenia, wanda ya daukaka matsayinsa sannan ya daidaita masarautarsa da Yammacin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Rayuwar Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da dabarun siyasa sosai a tsakanin Mongol Golden Horde da ikokin kasashen Katolika na Turai don kare yankinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Birane
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa sabbin birane da dama, ciki har da Lviv (wanda aka sanya wa sunan dansa, Lev) da kuma Chelm, wanda ya zama babban birninsa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Halytskyi'?
faq.answer: Yana nufin 'na Halych' (Galicia) a harshen Ukraine. Halych shi ne lardin da ya yi yaki na tsawon shekaru da dama don iko da shi sannan ya mayar da shi cibiyar masarautarsa dunkulalliya.

faq.question: Me yasa ya mika wuya ga Mongols?
faq.answer: Bayan ya shaida yadda Mongols suka lalata sauran lardunan Rus', ya zabi mika wuya ta zahiri don kare al'ummarsa da masarautarsa daga lalacewa gaba daya, wata shawara da aka rubuta a matsayin 'gwamma a yi maka sumba da a dake ka'.

faq.question: Shin kawancensa da Paparoma ya yi nasara?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya sami kambin sarauta wanda ya tabbatar da mulkinsa a idon Turai, yakin addini mai girma da aka yi alkawarinsa da Mongols bai taba faruwa ba, wanda hakan ya tilasta masa ci gaba da dabarunsa shi kadai.

faq.question: Menene gadonsa mai dorewa?
faq.answer: Babban gadonsa mai dorewa shi ne kafa Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia a matsayin babbar daular Gabashin Turai da kuma kafa birane kamar Lviv, wanda har yanzu yake zama babban cibiyar al'adu a yau.

timeline.event: Ya hau karagar mulkin Georgia yana dan shekara 16.
Ya dakatar da biyan haraji ga Daular Seljuk sannan ya shelanta 'yanc인 Georgia.
Ya tara taron Ruisi-Urbnisi Synod don gyara Cocin Orthodox na Georgia.
Ya kafa kusan iyalai 40,000 na Kipchaks a Georgia don karfafa sojojinsa.
Ya samu gagarumar nasara yaki da dakarun hadaka na Seljuk a Yakin Didgori.
Ya 'yantar da Tbilisi bayan shekaru 400 sannan ya mayar da shi babban birnin Georgia.
Bayan mutuwarsa, an binne shi a karkashin kofar babban birnin Gelati Monastery kamar yadda ya bar umarni.

keyAchievements.title: Yakin Didgori
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu 'nasara ta mu'ujiza' yaki da makiya masu yawa, wanda ya kawo karshen ikon Seljuk a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin kai da Tsara Iko a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da sarakunan yaki masu tawaye sannan ya tsara ikon kasa a tsakiya, wanda ya samar da masarauta mai karko da dunkulewa.

keyAchievements.title: Sauye-sauyen Soja da na Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dakarun soja na din-din-din (Monaspa), ya gyara tsarin shari'a, sannan ya sake tsara Kipchaks don samar da dakarun soja masu karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Gelati Academy, wadda ta zama babbar cibiyar ilimi, sannan ya inganta ci gaban al'adun Georgia, wanda ya fara 'Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia'.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Mai Gina' (Aghmashenebeli)?
faq.answer: Wannan lakabi yana nuna babban aikinsa na gina kasa ciki har da sauye-sauyen soja da na gudanarwa, hadin kan kasa, kafa cibiyoyin ilimi kamar Gelati Academy, da gina coci-coci da gidajen ibada, ban da nasarorinsa na soja.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin Yakin Didgori?
faq.answer: Wannan yakin ya kasance muhimmiyar lokaci a tarihin Georgia da Caucasus. Nasarar da aka samu yaki da hadakar soji masu yawa ta tabbatar da 'yancin Georgia, ta ba da damar sake kwace Tbilisi, sannan ta nuna farkon Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia.

faq.question: Me yasa ya kafa Kipchaks a Georgia?
faq.answer: Ya bukaci dakarun soja masu aminci da karfi wadanda ba sa karkashin sarakunan Georgia masu tawaye. Ya hada kusan iyalai 40,000 na Kipchaks, wanda ya ba shi dakarun dawakai 40,000 masu karfi ga sojojinsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Khanbaliq (Beijing ta yanzu), Yuan China.
Ya fara aikin ziyara daga kasar China zuwa Jerusalem tare da dalibinsa Rabban Markos.
An zabi Rabban Markos a matsayin Catholicos na Cocin Gabas a matsayin Mar Yaballaha III.
Ilkhan Arghun ya tura shi a matsayin jakada zuwa Turai.
Ya yi tafiya a fadin Turai, inda ya gana da Sarkin Byzantine Andronikos II, kardinal-kardinal a Roma, Sarki Philip IV na Faransa, da kuma Sarki Edward I na Burtaniya.
Ya koma Ilkhanate tare da wasiku da kyaututtuka daga shugabannin Turai.
Ya mutu a Baghdad.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiyar Diflomasiyya ta Farko daga Gabas Asiya zuwa Turai
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mutum na farko da aka sani da ya yi tafiya daga fadar Yuan da ke China zuwa fadar sarakunan Turai a matsayin jakada na hukuma.

keyAchievements.title: Tarihin Al'adu Daban-daban
keyAchievements.description: Tafiyarsa, wadda wani na lokacin ya rubuta, tana samar da hangen nesa na musamman na 'reverse' a kan Turai ta karni na 13 daga mahakuntan Gabas.

keyAchievements.title: Tattaunawar Addini ta Mataki Mai Girma
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na Kiristan Nestorian, ya gudanar da mahawarar addini da kardinal-kardinal a Roma, wanda ya samar da haske na musamman game da tattaunawar Kiristoci a lokacin.

faq.question: Shin tafiyarsa ta yi nasara?
faq.answer: A fannin diflomasiyya, a'a. Kodayake an karbe shi da girmamawa, kawance na soja da aka ba da shawararsa na Franco-Mongol yaki da Mamluks bai taba faruwa ba saboda siyasar cikin gida ta Turai da sauyin manufofi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'reverse Marco Polo'?
faq.answer: Saboda tafiyarsa daga Gabas zuwa Yamma tana nuna kishiyar tafiyar Marco Polo daga Yamma zuwa Gabas, kuma rubuce-rubucensa suna samar da hangen nesa na Gabas a kan Turai, kamar yadda na Polo ya samar da hangen nesa na Turai a kan Gabas.

faq.question: Wanne addini ya yi amfani da shi?
faq.answer: Shi memba ne na Cocin Gabas, wadda galibi ake kira Nestorian Christianity, wadda ta kasance muhimmiyar darikar Kiristanci a Asiya a kan Hanyar Siliki lokacin.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin Larysa Petrivna Kosach a Novohrad-Volynskyi, Daular Rasha (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Ta fara samun alamun cutar kashi (bone tuberculosis), wata rash인 lafiya da za ta shafe ta a daukacin rayuwarta.
Ta buga wakarta ta farko 'Lily of the Valley' a cikin jaridar Zorya ta Lviv tana da shekaru 13, inda ta yi amfani da sunan bogi 'Ukrainka'.
An buga tarin wakokinta na farko 'On the Wings of Songs' a Lviv.
Ta fassara littafin Communist Manifesto zuwa harshen Ukraine.
Ta auri masanin al'adu da kade-kade Klyment Kvitka.
Ta rubuta aikinta mafi shahara, wasan kwaikwayo na almara 'The Forest Song' (Lisova Pisnya), a cikin kwanaki goma sha biyu kacal lokacin da rashin lafiyarta ta lafa.
Ta mutu a Surami, Georgia tana da shekaru 42 sakamakon rashin lafiyarta.

keyAchievements.title: The Forest Song (Lisova Pisnya)
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukarsa a matsayin babban aikin wasan kwaikwayo na Ukraine, wasan kwaikwayo na almara yana bincika jigogin halitta, soyayya, da kuma ruhin dan adam.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Modernism na Ukraine
keyAchievements.description: Ta shigo da sabbin jigogi na tunani, siffofi, da kuma hangen nesa na duniya ga adabin Ukraine, inda ta mayar da shi gaba da populism na karni na 19.

keyAchievements.title: Muryar Mata (Feminist Voice)
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar rubuce-rubucenta da rayuwarta, ta kare 'yancin ilimi na mata kuma ta kalubalanci tsarin maza a cikin al'ummar Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Kwararriyar Mai Harsuna da Yawa da kuma Mai Fassara
keyAchievements.description: Tana jin harsuna da dama kuma ta fassara manyan ayyukan adabi na duniya zuwa harshen Ukraine, wanda ya bunkasa al'adarta ta gida.

faq.question: Me yasa ta yi amfani da sunan bogi 'Ukrainka'?
faq.answer: Ita da mahaifiyarta sun zabi sunan bogi 'Lesya Ukrainka' (Lesya macen Ukraine) don nuna asalin kishin kasarta, wani mataki na nuna tirjiya lokacin da Daular Rasha ta haramta amfani da harshen Ukraine.

faq.question: Yaya rashin lafiyarta ta shafi aikinta?
faq.answer: Yakin da ta yi a daukacin rayuwarta da cutar kashi ya haifar da ci gaba da ciwo sannan ya tilasta mata yin tafiya don neman magani. Wannan wahala ta yi tasiri sosai a kan aikinta, wanda galibi yake bincika jigogin gwagwarmaya, juriya, da kuma rikici tsakanin ruhu da jiki mai rauni.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayoyinta na siyasa?
faq.answer: Bisa tasirin kawunta Mykhailo Drahomanov, tana da ra'ayoyin gurguzu da na mata masu karfi. Ta soki mulkin kama-karya na Rasha kuma ta nemi 'yancin kasa da al'adu na Ukraine.

faq.question: Game da menene 'The Forest Song'?
faq.answer: Wasan kwaikwayo ne na almara game da soyayyar bakin ciki tsakanin Mavka, yar sarki ta daji, da kuma wani talaka dan adam, Lukash. Yana bincika rikici tsakanin duniyar halitta da al'ummar dan adam, 'yanci da takurawa, da kuma kyawu yaki da rayuwar yau da kullum.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Panjrud, wani kauye a Transoxiana, wanda a lokacin yake zama bangaren Daular Samanid (Tajikistan ta yanzu).
Ya shahara sosai sannan ya zama mawaƙin fada mai daraja ga sarkin Samanid Nasr II a Bukhara.
Goyon bayan da Nasr II ya bayyar ga masu wa'azi na Isma'ili ya haifar da adawa daga malaman Sunni da kuma juyin mulki a fada.
Bayan juyin mulkin, an kori Rudaki daga fada, aka makantar da shi, sannan ya koma mahaifarsa cikin wulakanci.
Ya mutu a cikin talauci da rashin shahara a mahaifarsa Panjrud.
Masanan kimiya na Soviet da Tajik sun sake gano kabarinsa, wanda ya tabbatar da bayanan tarihinsa na makantarwa da kuma wurin binne shi na karshe.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Wakokin Farsi
keyAchievements.description: Ana daukarsa a matsayin hazikin adabi na farko mai girma na harshen Farsi na zamani, inda ya kafa siffofi da jigogi da za su mamaye tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Samar da Diwan
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne mawaƙi na farko da ya tattara ayyukansa a cikin diwan (tarin ayyukan mawaƙi), wanda ya kafa misali ga daukacin mawaƙan Farsi na baya.

keyAchievements.title: Gwanin Siffofin Waka
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance gwani a siffofin waka daban-daban, ciki har da qasida (ode), ghazal (lyric), da kuma ruba'i (quatrain), wanda ya samar da tsari ga mawaƙan baya.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar 'Kalila wa Dimna'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wakar fassarar shahararren tarin tatsuniyoyi na 'Kalila wa Dimna', wani babban aiki wanda wasu sassa kalilan ne khoa ya rage yau.

faq.question: Shin an haifi Rudaki makaho?
faq.answer: Bayanai sun rabu. Wasu marubuta na da sun ce an haife shi makaho, amma hotuna masu ban sha'awa a cikin wakokinsa sun sa mafi yawan masana na zamani yarda cewa an makantar da shi ne a shekarunsa na baya a matsayin hukuncin siyasa.

faq.question: Nawa ne na wakokinsa ya rage?
faq.answer: Kodayake an ce ya rubuta wakoki sama da miliyan daya, wani sashi kalilan—kasa da layuka 2,000—ne ya rage yau, galibi a matsayin kalmomi da aka ambata a cikin kamus na baya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Adamu na Mawaƙa'?
faq.answer: Wannan lakabi yana nuna matsayinsa na asali a adabin Farsi, kamar yadda Adamu yake zama mutum na farko a addinan Ibrahim. Ana kallon sa a matsayin wanda ya fara samar da mawaƙan Farsi masu girma.

faq.question: Daga ina Rudaki yake?
faq.answer: An haife shi a kasar Tajikistan ta yanzu kuma ana girmama shi a matsayin mawaƙin kasa na Tajikistan. Sai dai ya rubuta da harshen Farsi kuma ya yi aiki a fadar Samanid a Bukhara (Uzbekistan ta yanzu), wanda hakan ya mayar da shi fitaccen mutum a daukacin kasashen da ke jin harshen Farsi, ciki har da Iran da Afghanistan.

timeline.event: An haife shi a ciki ko kusa da Kashgar a cikin daular mulki ta Kara-Khanid Khanate.
Ya gudu daga mahaifarsa sakamakon rikicin siyasa bayan mahaifinsa ya gaza wajen karbar mulki.
Ya yi tafiya sosai a kasashen mutanen Turkic, inda ya tattara bayanai na harshe da al'adu.
Ya zauna a Baghdad kuma ya fara rubuta Diwan Lughat al-Turk.
Ya kamaala tsari na karshe na Diwan, inda ya gabatar da shi ga Abbasid Caliph.
Ya mutu a Upal, wani karamin birni kusa da Kashgar, inda kabarinsa yake zama wurin girmamawa yau.

keyAchievements.title: Diwan Lughat al-Turk
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta kamus na farko na harsunan Turkic, wanda ya kiyaye babban ilimi na harshe da al'adu.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Ethnolinguistics
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da daya daqun bincike na farko na harshe da al'adu ta hanyar tafiya da rubuta kabilu daban-daban.

keyAchievements.title: Taswirar Duniya ta Farko ta Turkic
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada da taswirar duniya a cikin Diwan dinsa, wadda ta mayar da hankali kan yankin Turkic, wanda ke nuna hangen nesa na musamman na Turkic.

faq.question: Me yasa Diwan Lughat al-Turk yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ya fi zama kamus kawai; babban littafi ne na bayanai na rayuwar Turkic ta karni na 11, ciki har da wakoki, karin magana, al'adu, da kuma wuraren kabilu, wanda ke samar da haske na musamman a kan duniyarsu.

faq.question: Shin shi masanin harshe ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kuma kasance masanin tarihi, masanin al'adu, masanin labarin kasa, da kuma mai kera taswira. Aikinsa babban aiki ne na fannoni daban-daban.

faq.question: Ya rubuta shi ne ga manyan mutane masu magana da harshen Larabci na Abbasid Caliphate a Baghdad, don koya musu harshen Turkic da kuma nuna daukakar al'adunsa da mahimmancinsa, musamman tun lokacin da Seljuk Turks suka zama sabon karfin soja da na siyasa.
faq.answer: He wrote it for the Arabic-speaking elite of the Abbasid Caliphate in Baghdad, aiming to teach them the Turkic language and demonstrate its cultural richness and importance, especially as the Seljuk Turks had become the new military and political power.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Constantine Psellos a Constantinople.
Ya fara aikinsa na siyasa a fadar Sarki Michael V.
An nada shi a matsayin 'Consul of the Philosophers' (Hypatos ton Philosophon), wanda hakan ya sa ya zama shugaban Jami'ar Constantinople.
Sakamakon matsin lamba, ya shiga gidan ibada na sufaye (monastery) inda ya dauki sunan sufanci Michael.
Sarauniya Theodora ta sake kiran sa zuwa fadar sarki.
Ya rubuta 'Chronographia', aikinsa na tarihi mafi shahara.
Ana kyautata zaton ya mutu a wajen wannan shekarar, kodayake ainihin ranar ba ta da tabbas.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Chronographia
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin rayuwar sarakunan Byzantine guda 14 daki-daki da na kashin kansa, wanda har yanzu yake zama babban tushen tarihi na Daular Byzantine ta karni na 11.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na 'Consul of the Philosophers', ya farfado da Jami'ar Constantinople sannan ya goyi bayan nazarin falsafar Girka ta da, musamman ta Plato.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Ba da Shawara na Siyasa mai Tasiri
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara ga sarakuna da sarauniyoyi da dama, inda ya tsara siyasar Byzantine na tsawon shekaru da yawa ta hanyar iliminsa da diflomasiyya.

faq.question: Menene ya sa 'Chronographia' ta Psellos ta kasance ta musamman?
faq.answer: Sabanin sauran tarihin lokacin, 'Chronographia' wani littafi ne na tunawa na kashin kansa, cike da hotunan mutane na musamman, makircin fada, da kuma ra'ayoyin Psellos kansa da hujjojinsa. Ya fi kama da tarihin siyasa na zamani fiye da busasshen tarihin abubuwan da suka faru.

faq.question: Shin shi sufi ne ko kuwa dan siyasa?
faq.answer: Ya kasance duka biyun. An tilasta masa zama sufi na wani dan lokaci saboda matsin lamba na siyasa amma da sauri aka sake kiran sa zuwa fadar sarki. Ya daidaita rayuwarsa ta ilimi da addini tare da aikinsa na siyasa mai matukar aiki da buri.

faq.question: Menene abin da ya fi mayar da hankali a kai a falsafa?
faq.answer: Psellos Neoplatonist ne. Ya nemi ya hada koyarwar Kirista da falsafar Plato da mabiyansa, yana mai imanin cewa hikimar da za ta iya ba da haske ga bangaskiyar Kirista.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Mishaninskaya (wanda daga baya aka sauya wa suna zuwa Lomonosovo) a Lardin Arkhangelsk, Rasha.
Yana da shekaru 19, ya bar kauyensa sannan ya yi tafiya a kasa zuwa Moscow don yin rajista a Slavic Greek Latin Academy.
An tura shi kasar Jamus don karantar ilimin chemistry, physics, da metallurgy a Jami'ar Marburg.
Ya koma Rasha sannan an nada shi a matsayin mataimakin farfesa a St. Petersburg Academy of Sciences.
Ya kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na chemistry na bincike da koyarwa na farko a Rasha.
Ya hada hannu wajen kafa Jami'ar Moscow State tare da mai tallafa masa Ivan Shuvalov, bisa tsarin da ya bayyar.
Ya lura da wucewar Venus sannan shi ne mutum na farko da ya gano kuma ya tabbatar da wanzuwar sararin samaniya (atmosphere) a kan wannan duniyar.
Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon sanyi na huhu (pneumonia) a St. Petersburg sannan aka binne shi a makabartar Lazarevskoe.

keyAchievements.title: Dokar Kiyaye Nauyi (Law of Conservation of Mass)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana a cikin wasika zuwa ga Leonhard Euler (1748) cewa a cikin gwajin chemistry, nauyin abubuwan da aka hada daidai yake da nauyin abubuwan da aka samu, wanda ya zama tushen dokar kiyaye nauyi.

keyAchievements.title: Jami'ar Moscow State
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro kuma, tare da Ivan Shuvalov, ya kafa jami'a ta farko ta Rasha a Moscow a shekarar 1755, wadda yanzu ke dauke da sunansa.

keyAchievements.title: Sararin Samaniya na Venus
keyAchievements.description: Lokacin wucewar Venus a shekarar 1761, shi ne mutum na farko da ya bayyana ra'ayin cewa akwai sararin samaniya a kan Venus bisa ga abin da ya gani na 'Lomonosov's arc'.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Tsarin Harshen Rasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga 'Russian Grammar' (1755), wanda ya daidaita harshen adabi na Rasha ta hanyar banbance tsakanin salo na Sama, Tsakiya, da na Kasa, wanda ya tsara harshen Rasha na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Fasahar Mosaics
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake gano kuma ya farfado da fasahar mosaic ta da, inda ya kafa masana'anta don kera gilashin kala-kala da kuma samar da manyan ayyukan fasahar mosaic.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Lomonosov ya yi tafiya a kasa har zuwa Moscow?
faq.answer: E, wani shahararren labari ne kuma na gaskiya a tarihin rayuwarsa. A lokacin sanyi na shekarar 1730, yana da shekaru 19, ya bar kauyensa tare da ayarin motocin daukar kifi sannan ya yi tafiya sama da kilomita 1,000 (fiye da mil 600) zuwa Moscow don neman ilimin da ba zai iya samu ba a gida.

faq.question: Menene babban gudunmawar kimiyya mafi mahimmanci ta Lomonosov?
faq.answer: Yana da wuya a zabi guda daya, amma tsara tsarin dokar kiyaye nauyi a fannin chemistry da kuma gano sararin samaniya na Venus suna cikin mafi mahimmanci. Kafa Jami'ar Moscow da ya yi shi ne gadonsa mafi dorewa ga ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Uban Kimiyyar Rasha'?
faq.answer: Ya sami wannan lakabi ne saboda ayyukansa na asali wajen kafa cibiyoyin kimiyya na Rasha, ciki har da dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na chemistry a Rasha da kuma Jami'ar Moscow, da kuma bincikensa daban-daban wadanda suka tabbatar da cewa mutanen Rasha za su iya yin fice a manyan matakai na kimiyya.

faq.question: Shin Lomonosov ya kasance mawaƙi kuma?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance babban mutum a adabin Rasha na karni na 18. Ya rubuta wakoki na yabo (odes), wakoki, da wasannin kwaikwayo na bakin ciki, kuma aikinsa a kan tsarin harshen Rasha ya taimaka wajen daidaita harshen adabi da mawaƙan da suka biyo baya suka yi amfani da shi, ciki har da Pushkin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Hadiach, Lardin Poltava, Daular Rasha.
Ya yi karatu a Jami'ar Kyiv sannan ya zama babban memba na kungiyar dalibai ta 'Hromada'.
Ya zama malami (docent) a tarihin da a Jami'ar Kyiv.
An kori shi daga aikinsa sakamakon dokar Ems Ukaz wadda ta haramta harshen Ukraine, sannan ya tafi gudun hijira na siyasa.
Ya kafa shahararren mujallar siyasa ta harshen Ukraine 'Hromada' a Geneva, Switzerland.
Ya karbi aikin farfesa a Jami'ar Sofia da ke Bulgaria.
Ya mutu a Sofia, Bulgaria, sannan aka binne shi a can.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Gurguzu na Ukraine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daqun masu ra'ayin gurguzu na farko kuma mafi tasiri a Ukraine, inda ya hada manufofin gurguzu da kishin kasa na cin gashin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Mujallar Hromada
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya gyara mujallar siyasa ta 'Hromada' a Geneva, wadda ta zama muhimmiyar kafa ta tunanin siyasar Ukraine a gudun hijira.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Tarayya (Federalist Theory)
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara cikakken tunanin siyasa don sake tsara Daulolin Rasha da Austro-Hungarian a matsayin tarayya don ba wa kasashe kamar Ukraine damar cin gashin kai.

keyAchievements.title: Jagorancin Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban jagora na ilimi ga shugabannin Ukraine na gaba, ciki har da 'yar yayarsa, shahararriyar marubuciya Lesia Ukrainka.

faq.question: Menene Ems Ukaz kuma yaya ya shafi Drahomanov?
faq.answer: Wata doka ce ta shekarar 1876 ta Tsar Alexander II wadda ta takaita amfani da harshen Ukraine a rubuce sosai. Adawar Drahomanov ga wannan doka da sauran manufofi makamantansu ta kai ga korarsa daga Jami'ar Kyiv sannan ta tilasta masa tafiya gudun hijira.

faq.question: Shin Drahomanov mai kishin kasa (nationalist) ne?
faq.answer: Ra'ayoyinsa suna da zurfi. Ya kasance mai kishin kasa wanda ya goyi bayan hakki da al'adun Ukraine, amma ya soki kishin kasa na bangaranci ko wariya. Ya goyi bayan tsarin tarayya inda Ukraine za ta sami damar cin gashin kai tare da sauran kasashe, maimakon rabuwa gaba daya.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakarsa take da Lesia Ukrainka?
faq.answer: Ya kasance kawunta (daga wajen mahaifiya) kuma babban jagoran ilimi gare ta. Tunaninsa na siyasa da al'umma, wadanda suka raba ta hanyar wasiku da dama, sun yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukanta na adabi da kuma ci gaban siyasar kanta.

faq.question: Me yasa ya tashi daga Geneva zuwa Sofia?
faq.answer: Kodayake Geneva ita ce cibiyar buga litattafansa, kungiyarsa ta siyasa ta rabu saboda sabanin akida. A shekarar 1889, ya karbi aikin farfesa a Jami'ar Sofia, wanda ya samar masa da kwanciyar hankali na ilimi a shekarunsa na baya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Chelm, Congress Poland, Daular Rasha.
An nada shi a matsayin Farfesa na Tarihi a Jami'ar Lviv da ke Austria-Hungary.
Ya buga kashi na farko na babban littafinsa, 'History of Ukraine-Rus''.
An zabe shi a matsayin shugaban Central Rada (Majalisa) a Kyiv bayan Juyin Juya Halin watan Fabrairu.
An zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Kasa na Ukrainian People's Republic.
Ya rayu a gudun hijira a Vienna da Prague bayan faduwar jamhuriyar.
Ya koma Soviet Ukraine don ci gaba da ayyukansa na ilimi.
Hukumar 'yan sandan sirri ta Soviet (OGPU) ta kama shi sannan an tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Moscow.
Ya mutu a cikin yanayi na ban mamaki a Kislovodsk, Rasha.

keyAchievements.title: History of Ukraine-Rus'
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin kashi 10 mai girma wanda ya kafa ci gaba na tarihin Ukraine, daban da tarihin Rasha da Poland.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban Kasa na Farko na Ukraine
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi aiki a matsay인 shugaban kasa na farko na Ukraine ta zamani mai cin gashin kanta, watau Ukrainian People's Republic.

keyAchievements.title: Shugaban Shevchenko Scientific Society
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya kungiyar a Lviv ta zama babbar cibiyar ilimi ta harshen Ukraine, wadda ta zama kamar makarantar kimiyya ta farko.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Asalin Ukraine na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa na ilimi da siyasa sun kasance ginshiki wajen tsara kishin kasa da kuma rubuta tarihin Ukraine na zamani.

faq.question: Shin Hrushevsky mai ra'ayin gurguzu ne?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu mai sassauci kuma babban memba na Ukrainian Party of Socialist-Revolutionaries, wadda ta goyi bayan cin gashin kai na kasa, muryar jama'a, da kuma gyaran filaye ga talakawa.

faq.question: Me yasa ya koma Soviet Ukraine a shekarar 1924?
faq.answer: Ya koma ne karkashin manufar Soviet ta 'Ukrainization', yana fatan zai iya ba da gudunmawa ga al'adu da ilimin Ukraine. Ya yi imanin cewa zai iya yi wa Ukraine abubuwa da yawa daga ciki, wata shawara da daga baya ta zama bak인 시기 yayin da gwamnatin Stalin ta tsananta zalunci.

faq.question: Menene gadon Hrushevsky a Ukraine a yau?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa kuma daya daqun uban kasa na farko na Ukraine ta zamani. Hotonsa yana kan takardar kudin hryvnia 50, kuma ana kallon aikinsa a matsayin ginshikin karatun tarihin Ukraine da asalin kasa.

faq.question: Shin ya kammala tarihin kashi 10 dinsa?
faq.answer: Ya kammala kuma ya buga daukacin kashi guda goma, wanda ya shafi tarihin Ukraine tun lokacin da zuwa shekarun 1660. Aikinsa ya samar da cikakken bayani na ilimi don ikirarin Ukraine na da dogon tarihin kashin kanta.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Andijan a kwarin Fergana.
Ya hau karagar mulkin Fergana yana dan shekara 12.
Ya fara cin Samarkand da yaki amma da sauri ya rasa shi.
Ya ci Kabul da yaki sannan ya mayar da shi sabon sansaninsa.
Ya kayar da Ibrahim Lodi a Yakin Panipat na farko sannan ya mamaye Delhi.
Ya kayar da dakarun hadaka na Rajput a Yakin Khanwa sannan ya tabbatar da ikonsa.
Ya mutu a Agra, Daular Mughal.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Daular Mughal
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar nasararsa a Yakin Panipat, ya kafa ginshikin daya daqun dauloli mafi karfi a tarihin kasar India.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Baburnama
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta daya daqun littattafan tarihin rayuwa na kashin kansa na farko a adabin Musulunci, wanda ya samar da babban haske game da rayuwarsa da zamaninsa.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Yakin Bindiga (Gunpowder Warfare) a India
keyAchievements.description: Yin amfani da dabarun soja na bindigogi da manyan bindigogi a filin yaki shi ne babban dalilin nasarorinsa na soja a India.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Babur'?
faq.answer: Sunan 'Babur' ya fito ne daga harshen Farsi wanda ke nufin 'Zaki' (ko Tiger), kuma ya sami wannan sunan ne saboda jaruntakarsa a yakin.

faq.question: Me yasa Samarkand yake da matukar mahimmanci a gare shi?
faq.answer: Samarkand shi ne babban birni na kakansa Timur (Tamerlane), kuma sake kwace shi ya kasance burin daukacin rayuwarsa don tabbatar da hakkinsa na magajin Daular Timur.

faq.question: Shin Baburnama yana da gaskiya ta tarihi?
faq.answer: Ana kallon Baburnama a matsayin littafi mai cike da gaskiya da daidaito na zamaninsa. Kodayake an rubuta shi ne daga mahakuntansa kansa, ya bayyana nasarorinsa da gazawarsa daki-daki, wanda ya mayar da shi babban tushen tarihi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin 'porphyrogennitos' (an haife shi a dakin sarauta), dan Sarki Romanos II da Sarauniya Theophano.
Ya zama sarki mai iko bayan mutuwar John I Tzimiskes, amma ainihin ikon yana hannun Basil Lekapenos.
Ya fuskanci kuma daga baya ya murkushe jerin zanga-zangar cikin gida mai girma karkashin jagorancin manyan kwamandoji Bardas Skleros da Bardas Phokas.
Ya kulla kawance mai mahimmanci da Vladimir I na Kiev, inda ya sami dakarun soji 6,000 (tushen Varangian Guard) a madadin auren kanwarsa Anna.
Ya samu gagarumar nasara a kan sojojin Bulgaria a Yakin Kleidion.
Ya kammala cin Daular Bulgaria ta Farko da yaki, inda ya hada ta gaba daya a cikin Daular Byzantine.
Ya mutu lokacin da yake shirin yakin soja don sake kwace Sicily, inda ya bar daular a matsayinta mafi girma na yanki da kudi.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Bulgaria da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Bayan wani yaki mai tsanani na tsawon shekaru da yawa, ya kayar da Daular Bulgaria ta Farko gaba daya, wadda ta kasance babbar abokiyar hamayyar daular a Turai na tsawon daruruwan shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Varangian Guard
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa shahararriyar runduna ta Varangian Guard, dakarun soji na musamman wadanda ke aiki a matsayin masu tsaron sarki na kashin kansa.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Tattalin Arziki
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar rayuwa ta tsantsani, gyaran filaye ga sarakunan daular, da kuma ingantaccen tsarin haraji, ya bar taskar mulki da babban ragi lokacin mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Yakin Gabas
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci yakoki masu nasara yaki da Fatimid Caliphate da sauran ikoki na gabas, wanda ya kare kan iyakar Anatolia ta daular.

faq.question: Me yasa gaske ake kiran sa 'Bulgar-Slayer'?
faq.answer: Ya sami lakabin 'Boulgaroktonos' saboda gagarumin yaki da murkushe Daular Bulgaria da ya yi. Sunan ya kasance tare da shi bayan nasararsa a Kleidion a shekarar 1014, inda aka ce ya makantar da fursunonin yaki na Bulgaria guda 15,000.

faq.question: Shin ya taba yin aure ko kuwa yana da yara?
faq.answer: A'a. Basil II ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa gaba daya ga kasa da soja. Bai taba yin aure ba kuma ya mutu ba tare da haihuwa ba, wanda a karshe ya haifar da rikicin neman magaji sannan ya taimaka wajen faduwar daular Macedonian bayan mutuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaya dangantakarsa take da Kievan Rus'?
faq.answer: Ya kulla kawance mai mahimmanci da Vladimir Mai Girma. A madadin taimakon soja (Varangian Guard) da kuma auren Anna kanwar Basil, Vladimir ya koma addinin Kirista na Orthodox, wanda ya haifar da shigar daukacin Kievan Rus' addinin Kirista.

faq.question: Shin shi mai gudanarwa ne mai kyau?
faq.answer: E, ya kasance mai gudanarwa mai inganci sosai. Ya takaita ikon sarakuna masu filaye, ya gyara tsarin haraji don ya kasance mai adalci da inganci, sannan ya yi amfani da tsantsanin kudi sosai, wanda ya bar daular da dukiya mai yawa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Pingyang, wanda yake zama Linfen, Shanxi, China ta yanzu.
Ya bar babban birnin Eastern Jin watau Chang'an don tafiya kasar India neman littattafan addinin Buddha.
Ya yi nasarar tsallake Hamadar Taklamakan da Tsaunin Pamir mai hadari, inda ya isa Arewa maso Yammacin India.
Ya yi tafiya sosai a Arewacin India, yana koyon harshen Sanskrit da tara littattafai, inda ya shafe shekaru uku a Pataliputra.
Ya tafi Sri Lanka ('Masarautar Zaki') don samun karin littattafai, sannan ya fara tafiyarsa ta teku mai hadari zuwa gida.
Bayan ya tsira daga guguwa mai tsanani da kuma tsayawa a Java ba tare da shiri ba, a karshe ya koma kasar China a Laoshan, Shandong ta yanzu.
Ya zauna a Jiankang (Nanjing ta yanzu), inda ya fassara littattafan da ya tara sannan ya rubuta labarin tafiyarsa, 'A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms' (Foguo Ji).
Ya mutu a Xin Monastery da ke Jingzhou yana dan kimanin shekaru 85.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiyar Addini zuwa India
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala tafiya ta kasa da teku ta tsawon shekaru 14 daga China zuwa India da komawa gida don dawo da littattafan addinin Buddha a lokacin da yake da manyan shekaru.

keyAchievements.title: A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms (Foguo Ji)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta daya daqun muhimman labaran tafiya na tarihi, wanda ya samar da shaidar gani da ido ta musamman ta Tsakiya da Kudancin Asiya a farkon karni na 5.

keyAchievements.title: Fassarar Littattafan Addinin Buddha
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara muhimman littattafan Sanskrit zuwa harshen Sinanci, musamman Mahasamghika Vinaya, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan dabi'un sufaye a Gabashin Asiya.

faq.question: Me yasa Faxian ya yi tafiya zuwa India?
faq.answer: Ya shiga damuwa saboda rashin cika da rashin daidaito na dokokin Vinaya (dokokin sufaye) da ke kasar China, don haka ya nemi samun cikakken tsarin asali daga India, mahaifar addinin Buddha.

faq.question: Nawa ne tsawon lokacin tafiyar Faxian ya dauka?
faq.answer: Daukacin tafiyarsa ta addini, tun daga barin Chang'an zuwa komawa China, ta dauki kimanin shekaru 14-15, daga wajen 399 zuwa 414 CE.

faq.question: Shin labarin tafiyar Faxian yana da gaskiya ta tarihi?
faq.answer: E, ana kallon 'A Record of Buddhist Kingdoms' (Foguo Ji) a matsayin babban tushe mai gaskiya da kuma kima ga tarihi, labarin kasa, da yanayin addini na yankunan da ya ziyarta a farkon karni na 5.

faq.question: Shin Faxian ya yi tafiyar shi kadai ne?
faq.answer: A'a, ya fara tafiyarsa ne daga Chang'an tare da wasu sufaye, ciki har da Huijing, Daozheng, Huiying, da Huiwei. Sai dai sakamakon tsananin wahalar tafiyar, wasu sun mutu yayin da wasu kuma suka zabi zama a India, don haka a karshe Faxian ya koma China shi kadai daga cikin kungiyar tasu ta farko.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Germania, wani birni mai katanga a cikin kasar Bulgaria ta yanzu.
Sarki Justin I ya nada shi a matsayin kwamandan soja a gabashin iyakar kasa.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen murkushe bore na Nika a Constantinople, wanda ya kare karagar mulki ta Sarki Justinian.
