keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci kariya ta jaruntaka, kodayake ta gaza a karshe, na babban birninsa na tsawon kwanaki 53 yaki da sojojin Ottoman da suka fi shi yawa gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Sadaukarwa (Martyrdom)
keyAchievements.description: Mutuwarsa a yaki ta sauya shi ya zama shahararren mutum na sadaukarwa ga asalin kasar Greek da kuma addinin Kirista na Orthodox, wanda aka sani da 'Marble Emperor'.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ya ce 'Birnin ya rushe kuma ina raye'?
faq.answer: Wannan wata shahararriyar magana ce ta tatsuniya, wataƙila ba ta gaske ba ce. Maganarsa da aka fi sani ta tarihi ita ce ki yarda da ya yi na mika birnin ga Sultan Mehmed II, inda ya bayyana cewa ba nasa ba ne da zai bayyar.

faq.question: Me yasa wani lokacin ake kiran sa Constantine XII?
faq.answer: Wasu masana tarihi suna hada da Constantine Laskaris, wanda kila an nada shi sarki lokacin da aka kewaye birnin a Fourth Crusade a shekarar 1204. Sai dai, Constantine XI shi ne tsari da lambar da masana tarihi suka fi amfani da ita.

faq.question: Shin an taba samun gawarsa?
faq.answer: A'a, ba a taba tantance gawarsa ba bayan yakin. Wannan rashin tabbas ya taimaka wa tatsuniyoyi na komawarsa, musamman tatsuniyar 'Marble Emperor' wanda ke barci yana jiran 'yantar da birnin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin jikan Genghis Khan.
An shelanta shi a matsayin Great Khan na Daular Mongol bayan ya kayar da dan uwansa Ariq Boke.
Ya kafa daular Yuan a hukumance sannan ya shelanta kansa a matsayin Sarkin China.
An ce Marco Polo ya isa fadar Kublai Khan a Dadu (Beijing).
Ya kammala cin Daular Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya hada daukacin kasar China karkashin mulkinsa.
Ya kaddamar da mamayar teku guda biyu na Japan, wadanda duka biyun suka gaza, wani sashi sakamakon guguwa mai girma.
Ya mutu a Dadu yana da shekaru 78.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Daular Yuan
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daular farko ta kasashen waje wadda ta mulki daukacin kasar China, inda ya mayar da babban birnin zuwa Dadu (Beijing ta yanzu).

keyAchievements.title: Hada kan Kasar China
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala cin Southern Song da yaki, wanda ya kawo karshen rabuwar kasar China ta tsawon shekaru sama da 300.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Kasuwanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya (Eurasian Trade)
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa, wanda yake zama bangaren Pax Mongolica, ya shaida hanyoyin kasuwanci masu aminci da bunkasa kamar Hanyar Siliki, wadda ke hada Gabas da Yamma.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Tallafa wa Al'adu da Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta fasaha, kimiyya, da injiniyanci, sannan ya yi amfani da hakurin addini, wanda ya ba wa addinai daban-daban damar zama tare a cikin daularsa.

faq.question: Shin Kublai Khan dan kasar China ne?
faq.answer: A'a, shi dan kasar Mongol ne na kabilar Borjigin. Sai dai, ya zama sarki na farko na daular Yuan ta China, inda ya karbi tsarin siyasa da al'adu na China don gudanar da mulki.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Marco Polo ya hadu da Kublai Khan?
faq.answer: Kodayake labarin Marco Polo kansa shi ne babban tushen labarin, mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ya yi aiki a fadar Kublai Khan na tsawon kusan shekaru 17, duk da cewa ainihin tsarin aikinsa ana yin muhawara a kai.

faq.question: Me yasa mamayar Japan da Kublai Khan ya yi ta gaza?
faq.answer: Duka mamayar biyu a shekarun 1274 da 1281 sun gaza sakamakon hadakar tirjiya mai karfi ta mutanen Japan da kuma guguwa mai karfi (typhoons), wadda mutanen Japan daga baya suka kira ta 'kamikaze' ko 'iskoki na Allah'.

faq.question: Yaya Kublai Khan yake da alaka da Genghis Khan?
faq.answer: Kublai Khan jikan Genghis Khan ne. Shi ne dan hudu na Tolui, wanda ya kasance dan karanci shekaru na Genghis Khan.

timeline.event: Born in Kyiv, daughter of Grand Prince Yaroslav the Wise of Kievan Rus'.
Ta auri Sarki Henry I na Faransa a Reims Cathedral, wando ya sanya ta zama Sarauniyar Franks.
Ta haifi danta na farko kuma sarki na gaba, Philip I.
Sarki Henry I ya mutu. Anne ta yi aiki a matsayin mai kula da dansa Philip I mai shekaru takwas.
Ta auri Count Ralph IV na Valois, wanda ya haifar da babbar badakala da kuma cire ta daga coci na wani dan lokaci.
Sa hannu na karshe da aka rubuta a kan takarda karkashin mulkin danta Philip. Ainihin ranar mutuwarta ba ta da tabbas.

keyAchievements.title: Sarauniya da Mai Kula mai Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinta na daya daqun mutanen sarauta kalilan masu ilimi a fadar Faransa, ta shiga cikin gudanar da mulki sosai, inda sa hannunta ke bayyana a kan takardun hukuma.

keyAchievements.title: Gadar Al'adu
keyAchievements.description: Aurenta ya kafa babban alakar siyasa da al'adu tsakanin Kievan Rus' mai karfi da kuma daular Capetian ta Faransa da ke bunkasa.

keyAchievements.title: Mahaifiyar Sarki
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi nasarar tabbatar da karagar mulki ga danta Philip I, kuma ta hanyarsa, ta zama kakar sarakunan Faransa na gaba.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Anne na Kyiv tana da ilimi fiye da na fadar Faransa?
faq.answer: E, shaidun tarihi sun nuna cewa fadar Yaroslav the Wise a Kyiv ta kasance babban cibiyar ilimi. Anne tana iya karatu da rubutu a Old East Slavic, da kuma wataƙila Helenanci, yayin da manyan mutane da yawa na Yammacin Turai, ciki har da mijinta Sarki Henry I, kila ba su da ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa aurenta na biyu ya kasance mai matukar cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Her second husband, Count Ralph IV of Valois, was already married. He repudiated his wife to marry Anne, which led the Pope to excommunicate them both for adultery and bigamy.

faq.question: Menene gadonta mai dorewa?
faq.answer: Babban gadonta mai dorewa shi ne shigar da sunan Helenanci 'Philip' a cikin iyalai na sarauta na Yammacin Turai, wanda ta ba wa dansa. Haka kuma ana tunawa da ita a matsayin sarauniya mai iko da ilimi wadda ta hada alakar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yammacin Turai.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Pskov (kimanin shekara) sannan daga baya ta auri Igor na Kyiv.
Drevlians sun kashe Igor na Kyiv. Olga ta zama mai kula da danta Sviatoslav.
Ta gudanar da daukar fansa na kashi hudu yaki da Drevlians, wanda ya kare da kona babban birninsu Iskorosten.
Ta kafa gyare-gyaren gudanarwa, inda ta kafa hanyoyin 'pogosti' (cibiyoyin gudanarwa) don tara haraji cikin tsari.
Ta tafi Constantinople sannan aka yi mata baftisma a addinin Kirista na Orthodox, inda ta dauki sunan Kirista Elena (Helen).
Ta mutu a Kyiv. Daga baya Cocin Orthodox ta nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Iko
keyAchievements.description: Ta dauki fansar mutuwar mijinta cikin rash인 tausayi, inda ta kayar da Drevlians sannan ta karfafa ikonta ga daular Rurik.

keyAchievements.title: Gyare-gyaren Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa tsarin shari'a da na gudanarwa na farko a Kievan Rus', inda ta samar da 'pogosti' don tara haraji da gudanar da mulki cikin tsari.

keyAchievements.title: Shigar da Addinin Kirista
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta shiga addinin Kirista, wanda ya kafa ginshikin shigar addinin Kirista na daukacin kasar ta hannun jikanta, Vladimir Mai Girma.

faq.question: Shin daukar fansar Olga ta kasance ta gaske?
faq.answer: Kodayake ana iya samun karin gishiri a cikin Primary Chronicle, masana tarihi suna kallon ainihin al'amuran daukar fansarta a matsayin bayyanar nasararta da karfafa ikonta cikin rashin tausayi yaki da kabilar Drevlian mai tawaye.

faq.question: Me yasa ake girmama Olga a matsayin tsarkaka?
faq.answer: Ana girmama ta a matsayin tsarkaka a cikin Cocin Eastern Orthodox da Roman Catholic saboda zama sarki na farko na Rus' da ta karbi addinin Kirista. Wannan ya ba ta lakabin 'Isapostolos' (Equal-to-the-Apostles).

faq.question: Shin ta yi nasarar shigar da danta Sviatoslav addinin Kirista?
faq.answer: A'a, ta gaza shawo kan danta Sviatoslav, wanda ya ci gaba da zama arna. Sai dai, tasirinta ya sa jikanta Vladimir Mai Girma ya mayar da addinin Kirista ya zama addinin kasa na Kievan Rus'.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin bauta (serfdom) a kauyen Moryntsi, Daular Rasha.
An 'yantar da shi daga bauta ta hanyar kokarin Karl Bryullov da Vasily Zhukovsky.
Ya buga tarin wakokinsa na farko kuma mafi shahara, 'Kobzar'.
An kama shi saboda shigarsa cikin kungiyar siyasa ta Brotherhood of Saints Cyril and Methodius sannan an tura shi gudun hijira.
An sake shi daga gudun hijirarsa na soja na tsawon shekaru goma bayan mutuwar Tsar Nicholas I.
Ya mutu a Saint Petersburg yana da shekaru 47. Daga baya aka sake binne shi a Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Kobzar (The Bard)
keyAchievements.description: Tarin wakokinsa wadanda suka kafa ginshikin adabin Ukraine na zamani da kuma harshen adabi na Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Harshen Ukraine na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya daukaka harshen Ukraine na gida, wanda a baya ake kallonsa a matsayin yare kawai, ya zama matsayin adabi mai girma.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar 'Yantar da Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Rayuwarsa ta gwagwarmaya da wakokinsa na juyin juya hali sun mayar da shi alama mai karfi da dorewa ta yakin neman 'yancin kai na Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Hazikin Mai Fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Bayan waka, ya kasance hazikin mai zane, inda ya samar da ayyuka sama da 800 sannan ya zama Academician a Imperial Academy of Arts.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Kobzar'?
faq.answer: Lakabin ya fito ne daga tarin wakokinsa mafi shahara. 'Kobzars' sun kasance mawaƙan gargajiya na Ukraine wadanda ke tafiya a kasa, suna rera wakoki na tarihi yayin da suke rera wani makami mai suna kobza. Sunan yana hada shi da wannan tsohuwar al'adar gargajiya.

faq.question: Shin shi mawaƙi ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance kwararren mai zane kuma mai fasaha. Ya kasance cikakken memba na Imperial Academy of Arts a Saint Petersburg kuma ya samar da daruruwan hotunan mutane, shimfidar kasa, da kuma zane-zane.

faq.question: Me yasa gudun hijirarsa yake da matukar tsanani?
faq.answer: Tsar Nicholas I ya yi fushi sosai da wakarsa ta barkwanci ta Shevchenko 'The Dream,' wadda ke nuna wulakanci ga Tsar da matarsa. Sakamakon haka, Tsar da kansa ya kara tsauraran kalmomin 'karkashin tsauraran tsaro, tare da haramta rubutu da zane' a cikin hukumcinsa, da nufin lalata ruhinsa na fasaha.

faq.question: Yaya ya sami 'yancinsa daga bauta (serfdom)?
faq.answer: Manyan masu zane na Rasha sun gane hazakarsa ta fasaha. Sun tsara caca (lottery), inda suka sayar da hoton mawaƙi Vasily Zhukovsky wanda Karl Bryullov ya zana, sannan suka yi amfani da rubles 2,500 da aka tara don sayan 'yancinsa daga hannun mai gidan a shekarar 1838.

timeline.event: An haifi Tamar ga Sarki George III da Sarauniya Burdukhan.
Mahaifinta George III ya nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulki da magajiya.
Ta zama sarki daya tilo na Georgia bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, inda ta dauki lakabin 'Mepe' (Sarki).
Sarakuna sun tilasta mata auren sarki na Rus' Yuri Bogolyubsky.
Ta kashe auren sannan ta kori Yuri saboda mummuna dabi'unsa.
Ta zabi kuma ta auri sarki na Alan David Soslan.
Sojojin Georgia karkashin jagorancin David Soslan sun samu gagarumar nasara a Yakin Shamkor.
Dakarun Georgia sun samu nasara a kan Seljuk Sultanate na Rum a Yakin Basian.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa Daular Trebizond a bakin Tekun Black a matsayin kasar karkashin tsaron Georgia.
Tamar ta mutu, inda ta bar masarauta mai karfi da wadata. Daga baya an nada ta a matsayin tsarkaka.

keyAchievements.title: Mace ta Farko da ta Mulki Georgia
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama mace ta farko da ta mulki Georgia da kanta, inda ta dauki lakabin maza 'Mepe' (Sarki) don nuna cikekken ikonta na sarki.

keyAchievements.title: Mafi Girman Lokacin Zinariya na Georgia
keyAchievements.description: Mulkin ta ya nuna kololuwar karfin siyasa, karfin tattalin arziki, da bunkasar al'adu na Georgia a Lokacin Tsakiya (High Middle Ages).

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Kasa ta hanyar Soja da Nasarori
keyAchievements.description: Ta jagoranci manyan nasarori na soja a Shamkor (1195) da Basian (1202), wanda ya fadada tasirin Georgia a daukacin Caucasus.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Al'adu da Addini
keyAchievements.description: Zamaninta ya shaida bunkasar fasaha da adabi, ciki har da wakar tarihi ta Shota Rustaveli, kuma ta kasance babbar mai tallafa wa coci-coci da monasteries na Georgian Orthodox.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kira Tamar 'Sarki' (Mepe) maimakon 'Sarauniya'?
faq.answer: Don tabbatar da mulkinta a cikin al'ummar maza da kuma tabbatar da matsayinta na sarki mai cikekken iko, daidai da kowane sarki namiji, maimakon a kalle ta a matsayin matar sarki (queen consort) ko mai kula mara karfi.

faq.question: Menene Zamanin Zinariya na Georgia?
faq.answer: Wani lokaci ne na tarihi a Lokacin Tsakiya, daga karni na 11 zuwa na 13, lokacin da Masarautar Georgia ta kai kololuwar karfin soja, yankin kasa, da kuma nasarorin al'adu. Ana kallon mulkin Tamar a matsayin mafi girmansa.

faq.question: Shin Tamar ta Georgia tsarkaka ce?
faq.answer: E, ana girmama ta sosai a cikin Cocin Georgian Orthodox a matsayin tsarkaka, wadda aka nada ta a matsayin 'Holy Righteous King Tamar'. Ana bikin ranar ta ranar 1 ga Mayu (da kuma 14 ga Mayu).

faq.question: Yaya alakarta take da mawaƙi Shota Rustaveli?
faq.answer: Shota Rustaveli, mawaƙin kasa na Georgia, ya rubuta wakarsa 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' lokacin mulkinta. An sadaukar da wakar ga Tamar, yana yaba mata sannan yana nuna dabi'u na jarumtaka na fadarta.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Constantinople ko Cyprus, a cikin dangi na talakawa; mahaifinta ya kasance mai kula da dabbobin bear ga Hippodrome.
Ta hadu da Justinian, magajin karagar mulki, a Constantinople. Ta kasance tana aiki a matsayin actress da kuma courtesan.
Ta auri Justinian. Ya canza doka don ba da damar aurensu, tun da a baya doka ta hana jami'ai auren actresses.
An nada ta a matsayin Augusta (Sarauniya) tare da Justinian a matsayin Augustus (Sarki) na Daular Byzantine.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shawo kan Justinian ya zauna sannan ya murkushe Bore na Nika, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa.
Ta kaddamar da manyan gyaran al'umma, ciki har da dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole sannan suka fadada hakkin mata a saki da mallakar filaye.
Ta mutu, wataƙila sakamakon cutar daji (cancer), a Constantinople. Justinian ya yi alhini sosai gare ta kuma bai sake yin aure ba.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Bore na Nika
keyAchievements.description: Kin guduwa da ta yi da kuma jawabinta mai karfi sun zaburar da Sarki Justinian ya murkushe babban boren, wanda ya kare karagar mulkinsa da daular.

keyAchievements.title: Dokokin Hakkin Mata
keyAchievements.description: Ta kare dokoki wadanda suka haramta karuwanci na dole, suka ba wa mata karin hakki wajen saki, sannan suka ba su damar mallakar da gadon dukiya.

keyAchievements.title: Abokiyar Mulki ta Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara ga Justinian da abokiyar mulki ta zahiri, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin daula, addini, da na waje.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Miaphysites
keyAchievements.description: Duk da cewa addinin kasa na hukumance shi ne Chalcedonian Christianity, ta yi amfani da ikonta don kare da tallafa wa al'ummar Miaphysite, wadanda ake kallo a matsayin bidi'a.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Theodora actress ce da kuma courtesan?
faq.answer: E, masanin tarihin lokacin Procopius ya rubuta game da rayuwarta ta farko a cikin 'Secret History' dinsa. Kodayake ana kallon labarinsa a matsayin na gaba da kuma wataƙila da karin gishiri saboda dalilai na siyasa, masana tarihi gaba daya sun amince da ainihin bayanai na tarihinta na mai wasa.

faq.question: Yaya ta zama sarauniya idan ta fito daga dangi na talakawa?
faq.answer: Justinian yana son ta sosai. Ya shawo kan kawunsa, Sarki Justin I, ya soke dokar da ta haramta wa manyan jami'ai auren actresses, wanda ya bude hanyar shari'a don aurensu a shekarar 525.

faq.question: Menene tasirinta na addini?
faq.answer: Theodora ta kasance Kirista Miaphysite tagari, reshen Kiristanci da cocin daula ta Chalcedon ke kallo a matsayin bidi'a. Ta yi amfani da babban tasirinta don kare abokan zamanta na Miaphysites daga zalunci sannan ta kafa monasteries, wanda ya yi babban tasiri a kan addini na daular.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ita da Justinian sun yi mulki a matsayin daidai da juna?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa Justinian ne ke da babban iko a matsayin sarki, tushen tarihi ya nuna cewa Theodora ta yi amfani da babban iko. An nada ta a matsayin abokiyar mulkinsa a hukumance, sunanta ya bayyana a kan dokoki, kuma galibi tana gudanar da harkokinta na siyasa na kashin kansa, wanda ya sanya ta zama daya daqun sarauniyoyi mafi karfi a tarihi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Daular Byzantine.
Ya isa kasashen Rasha, inda aka rubuta shi a karon farko a Novgorod.
Ya zana frescoes a Church of the Transfiguration a kan titin Ilin, Novgorod.
Ya koma Moscow sannan ya yi aiki a kan ayyuka daban-daban, ciki har da na Grand Prince.
Ya yi aiki a kan iconostasis na Cathedral of the Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin tare da Andrei Rublev da Prokhor na Gorodets.
Ya mutu, wataƙila a Moscow.

keyAchievements.title: Frescoes na Church of the Transfiguration
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sabbin frescoes a Novgorod, wadanda aka sani da hotuna masu rai, masu ma'ana da kuma kalar monochromatic.

keyAchievements.title: Makarantar Zana Hoto ta Moscow (Moscow School of Painting)
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinsa na babban gwanaye a Moscow, ya yi tasiri sosai a kan bunkasar salo na musamman na Rasha na zana hoton icon.

keyAchievements.title: Koyar da Andrei Rublev
keyAchievements.description: Ya koyar da Andrei Rublev kuma ya yi aiki tare da shi, wanda yake zama daya daqun shahararrun masu zane na Rasha na Lokacin Tsakiya, inda ya mika masa tunaninsa na fasaha.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'the Greek'?
faq.answer: Don bambanta shi a matsayin wanda ya fito daga Daular Byzantine (wadda al'adarta take ta Girka) a cikin sabon gidansa a cikin lardunan Rasha.

faq.question: Menene na musamman game da salon zanensa?
faq.answer: Salonsa yana da ban mamaki da kuma nuna asalin kansa a lokacin, inda yake amfani da zane mai karfi da kuma haske na musamman ('hasken Theophanic') don nuna karfin ruhaniya maimakon kwanciyar hangali.

faq.question: Shin ya zana frescoes kawai ne?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya fi shahara da frescoes, ya kasance kwararre na panel icons da manuscript illumination, kodayake ayyukansa kalilan ne suka rage.

timeline.event: An haife shi a cikin kabilar Ashina sannan daga baya ya sami ilimi a babban birnin Tang na Chang'an.
Ya tsere daga ikon Tang sannan ya shawo kan Qutlugh (daga baya Ilterish Khagan) ya yi tawaye yaki da Daular Tang.
An kafa Second Turkic Khaganate; an nada Tonyukuk a matsayin babban mai tsara dabara da kwamanda (Apa Tarkan).
Ilterish Khagan ya mutu. Tonyukuk ya ci gaba da aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara karkashin sabon Khagan, Qapaghan.
Bayan an kashe Qapaghan Khagan, Tonyukuk ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafa wa Bilge Khagan don tabbatar da karagar mulki yaki da juyin mulki.
Ya rubuta nasa rubutun tunawa na bango, daya daqun tsoffin rubuce-rubucen adabin Turkic da suka rage, wadanda aka rubuta su a siffar mutum na farko.
Ya mutu yana da babban shekaru, bayan ya yi aiki ga Khagans guda uku sannan ya tabbatar da ginshikin daular.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Kafa Turkic Khaganate
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban mai tsara dabara a bayan nasarar tawaye yaki da Daular Tang, wanda ya kai ga kafa Second Turkic Khaganate a shekarar 682.

keyAchievements.title: Nasarorin Soja
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinya na kwamandan soja, ya jagoranci sojojin Turkic zuwa nasarori da dama yaki da Tang, Kyrgyz, da kuma Turgesh, wanda ya kare iyakokin Khaganate.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuce-rubucen Tonyukuk
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta rubutun tunawarsa na kashin kansa, wanda ya samar da labari na musamman na mutum na farko na kafa Khaganate da kuma babban rubutu na adabin Turkic.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Tonyukuk 'Bismarck of the Turks'?
faq.answer: This title refers to his role as a master statesman and strategist who, like Otto von Bismarck for Germany, unified his people and forged a powerful empire through political cunning and military might.

faq.question: Shin Tonyukuk ya zama Khagan (sarki) ne?
faq.answer: A'a, Tonyukuk bai taba zama Khagan ba. Ya kasance babban mai ba da shawara, mai tsara dabara, da kwamandan soja (tare da lakabin Apa Tarkan), yana aiki a matsayin mai iko a bayan karagar mulki ga Khagans guda uku na baya: Ilterish, Qapaghan, da Bilge.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin rubuce-rubucen Tonyukuk?
faq.answer: Suna daya daqun tsoffin ayyuka da aka sani da aka rubuta da harshen Old Turkic ta amfani da rubutun Orkhon. A siffar ta musamman, labari ne na mutum na farko da dan siyasa ya rubuta, wanda ke samar da bayanai masu kima a kan siyasa, dabarun soja, da hangen nesa na manyan mutane na Turkic na farko.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Kesh (Shahrisabz ta yanzu, Uzbekistan) a cikin kabilar Barlas.
Ya samu raunuka masu tsanani a kafar dama da hannunsa, wanda ya ba shi lakabin 'Timur mai Dori' (Timur the Lame).
Ya zama sarki mai iko na yankunan yamma na Chagatai Khanate sannan ya kafa Samarkand a matsayin babban birninsa.
Ya mamaye India sannan ya lalata birnin Delhi, wanda ya haifar da lalacewa mai girma.
Ya ci Baghdad da Damascus da yaki, wanda ya fadada daularsa zuwa yamma.
Ya kayar da kuma kama Sultan na Ottoman Bayezid I a Yakin Ankara.
Ya mutu a Otrar lokacin da yake tafiyar soja don cin Ming China da yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Timurid
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa wata babbar daula mai karfi wadda ta mamaye Tsakiyar Asiya, Gabas ta Tsakiya, da sassa na India.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Daular Usmaniyya
keyAchievements.description: Nasararsa a Yakin Ankara a shekarar 1402 ta raunana sojojin Ottoman sannan ta jinkirta fadadarta na tsawon shekaru da dama.

keyAchievements.title: The Timurid Renaissance
keyAchievements.description: Goyon bayansa ga fasaha, gine-gine, da kimiyya ya sauya Samarkand ya zama wuri mai kyau na al'adu sannan ya kaddamar da babban yunkuri na fasaha da ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Golden Horde
keyAchievements.description: Yakokin da ya yi yaki da Tokhtamysh sun raunana Golden Horde gaba daya, wanda ya sauya ma'aunin iko a Gabashin Turai da Tsakiyar Asiya.

faq.question: Shin Timur dan kasar Mongol ne ko kuwa na Turk?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan asalin Turco-Mongol. Kodayake ya yi ikirarin gadon Mongol daga Genghis Khan don tabbatar da mulki, fadar sa da sojojinsa sun kasance na al'adu da harshen Turkic, kuma shi musulmi ne nagari.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Tamerlane?
faq.answer: Tamerlane siffar Turai ce ta sunan bogi na Farsi 'Timur-i-Lang,' wanda ke nufin 'Timur mai Dori.' Wannan yana nuni ga gurguntarsa ta din-din-din da ya samu daga raunuka lokacin kuruciyarsa.

faq.question: Yaya rashin tausayin mamayar da ya yi take?
faq.answer: Yakokin da ya yi sun kasance sanannu da rashin tausayi. Ya kasance sananne wajen ba da umarnin kisan kiyashi na mutane a biranen da suka nuna masa tirjiya, wani lokacin ma yana gina hasumiya da kokon kansu a matsayin gargadi ga sauran mutane.

faq.question: Menene gadonsa mai dorewa?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa daularsa ta rabe bayan mutuwarsa, babban gadonsa mai dorewa shi ne na al'adu. Farfadowar Timurid (Timurid Renaissance) da ya tallafa wa a Samarkand ta samar da gine-gine da fasaha masu kyau wadanda suka yi tasiri a kan yankin na tsawon karni da dama, ciki har da Daular Mughal ta baya a India.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Suceava, Moldavia, a cikin dangin sarakuna na Romania (Movila).
Ya zama monk a Kyiv Pechersk Lavra (Monastery of the Caves).
An zabe shi a matsayin Archimandrite (babban shugaban monastery) na Kyiv Pechersk Lavra.
Ya kafa makaranta a Lavra, inda ya mayar da hankali a kan ilimin addini da liberal arts.
An zabe shi a matsayin Metropolitan na Kyiv, Halych, da daukacin Rus'. Ya hade makarantarsa da Kyiv Brotherhood School don kafa Kyiv-Mohyla Collegium (daga baya Academy).
Ya kira taro a Kyiv don tattaunawa da kuma amincewa da littafin koyarwarsa, wanda zai zama shahararren 'Orthodox Confession of Faith'.
Ya mutu a Kyiv, inda ya bar dukiyarsa ga Collegium sannan ya karfafa gadonsa a matsayin babban mai gyara da kuma malami.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Mohyla Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa babban cibiyar ilimi na gaba wanda ke hada al'adar Orthodox da ilimin humanist na Yammacin Turai.

keyAchievements.title: The Orthodox Confession of Faith
keyAchievements.description: Ya kula da samar da babban littafi wanda ke bayyana koyarwar Orthodox daki-daki don yaki da tasirin Catholic da Protestant, wanda daga baya synod na pan-Orthodox ya amince da shi.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Ayyukan Ibada da na Coci
keyAchievements.description: Ya daidaita ayyukan coci, ya gyara littattafan ibada, sannan ya inganta ilimi da tarbiyyar limamai, wanda ya farfado da Cocin Orthodox a Ukraine.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Buga Littattafai
keyAchievements.description: A matsayinya na Archimandrite na Lavra, ya farfado da injin buga littattafai na wurin, inda ya buga littattafai na addini, ibada, da na ilimi da dama.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Mohyla a Ukraine alhali sunan iyalinsa Movila ne?
faq.answer: Iyalinsa sun kasance na asalin Romania (Moldavia) da sunan Movila. Lokacin da ya zama sananne a Kyiv, an daidaita sunansa zuwa harshen gida, wanda ya zama 'Mohyla' a harshen Ukraine.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin Mohyla Academy?
faq.answer: Ta kasance makarantar farko ta kalar ta a duniyar Eastern Slavic, wadda ke samar da ilimi mai girma da ke hada ilimin addini na Orthodox da Latin, Greek, da kuma liberal arts. Ta samar da sabbin masana masu ilimi wadanda suka tsara al'adu da addini na Ukraine na tsawon tsararraki.

faq.question: Shin Petro Mohyla yana kokarin mayar da Cocin Orthodox ta zama ta 'Latin' ne?
faq.answer: Wannan wata tattaunawa ce ta tarihi mai sarkakiya. Mohyla ya yi amfani da tsarin ilimi na Yammacin duniya na Latin da kuma harshen addini a matsayin makamai don kare da kuma bayyana Orthodoxy yaki da matsin lamba na Yamma. Masu sukar lamarin sun ce wannan ya shigo da abubuwa na kasashen waje, yayin da masu goyon baya ke cewa ya yi amfani da 'makaman abokan gaba' cikin hikima don karfafa bangaskiyarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Votkinsk, Daular Rasha.
Ya yi karatu a Saint Petersburg Conservatory da aka kafa sabo.
Piano Concerto No. 1 dinsa ya fara fitowa a Boston, wanda ya samu nasara nan take.
Ya fitar da 'Swan Lake' wanda ya gaza a farko, ya shiga cikin auren rashin nasara, sannan ya fara rubuta wasiku na tsawon shekaru 13 da mai tallafa masa Nadezhda von Meck.
Ya rubuta Fourth Symphony dinsa da kuma opera 'Eugene Onegin'.
Ballet na 'The Sleeping Beauty' ya fara fitowa. Nadezhda von Meck ta katse alakar su da goyon bayanta farat daya.
Ballet na 'The Nutcracker' ya fara fitowa a Saint Petersburg.
Ya jagoranci fitowar Symphony No. 6 dinsa, watau 'Pathetique', sannan ya mutu bayan kwanaki tara.

keyAchievements.title: Ballets Masu Dorewa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'Swan Lake', 'The Sleeping Beauty', da kuma 'The Nutcracker', wadanda suka zama ginshikin repertoire na ballet.

keyAchievements.title: Symphony No. 6 'Pathetique'
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wata symphony ta kashin kansa mai cike da sabbin abubuwa wadda ake kallo a matsayin babban aiki na kade-kade na late-Romantic.

keyAchievements.title: Girmamawa ta Duniya ga Kade-kade na Rasha
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance daya daqun mawaƙan Rasha na farko da kade-kadensu suka sami matsayi mai dorewa a duniya, wanda ya daukaka kade-kade na gargajiya na Rasha a fagen duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kwararren Melodies
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba wa ayyukansa saboda kyawawan melodies masu tashi sama da kuma zurfin tunani na ruhaniya, wanda ke mayar da kade-kade na gargajiya ya kasance mai sauki ga mutane da yawa.

faq.question: Yaya Tchaikovsky ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalilin mutuwa shi ne cutar amai da gudawa (cholera). Sai dai, har yanzu akwai ra'ayoyin cewa abokan karatunsa na da ne suka tilasta masa kashe kansa ta hanyar 'court of honor' don kauce wa badakala ta fili a kan kasancewarsa dan luwadi. Ainihin yanayin ya kasance batun muhawara tsakanin masana tarihi.

faq.question: Shin Tchaikovsky ya taba haduwa da mai tallafa masa, Nadezhda von Meck?
faq.answer: A'a, sun zabi kada su taba haduwa da idonsu. Daukacin alakar su ta tsawon shekaru 13, wadda ta samar masa da goyon baya na kudi da na ruhaniya, an gudanar da ita ne ta hanyar wasiku kawai.

faq.question: Shin 'Swan Lake' ta samu nasara lokacin da ta fara fitowa?
faq.answer: A'a, ainihin shirin na shekarar 1877 ya kasance rashin nasara ga masu sukar lamarin da mutane gaba daya, galibi sakamakon rashin choreography da tsarawa mai kyau. Ta samu matsayinta na classic ne kawai bayan mutuwarsa tare da shahararren farfadowar shekarar 1895 ta Marius Petipa da Lev Ivanov.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Pathetique', lakabin Symphony dinsa ta 6?
faq.answer: Kalmar Rasha 'Pateticheskaya' (Патетическая) ta fi dacewa a fassara ta da 'mai zafi' ko 'mai cike da ji' maimakon ma'anar Turanci ta 'pathetic' ko 'pitiable'. Tana nuni ga tsananin motsin rai na symphony da kuma tsarinta na wasan kwaikwayo.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Caesarea, Palaestina Prima.
An nada shi a matsayin adsessor (mai ba da shawara kan shari'a) ga Kwamanda Belisarius.
Ya bi Belisarius a yakin da ya yi yaki da Vandals a Arewacin Afirka.
Ya shiga cikin Yakin Gothic a Italiya.
Ya shaida barkewar Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian (Plague of Justinian) a Constantinople.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa, The Wars of Justinian.
Kila ya rubuta Secret History (Anecdota).
Ya rubuta On the Buildings of Justinian.
Ya mutu, wataƙila a Constantinople.

keyAchievements.title: The Wars of Justinian
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta cikakken tarihin littattafai guda takwas na yakokin da Sarki Justinian I ya yi, wanda yake zama babban tushe na lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: The Secret History (Anecdota)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta labarin sirri na badakala na fadar sarki, wanda ya bayyana zargin cin hanci da rashawa da kuma rashin tausayi na Justinian da Theodora.

keyAchievements.title: Shaidan Gani da Ido na Tarihi
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hangen nesa na musamman na shaidan gani da ido a kan manyan al'amuran kamar Yakin Vandalic da Gothic da kuma Cutar yaduwa ta Justinian.

faq.question: Shin Procopius yana da aminci ga Sarki Justinian?
faq.answer: Amincinsa yana da sarkakiya. A fili, a cikin ayyuka kamar 'The Wars' da 'The Buildings', ya yaba wa Justinian. A asiri kuma, a cikin 'Secret History', ya soki shi da tsanani, wanda ke nuna rashin jin dadi mai zurfi.

faq.question: Yaya ingancin bayanan tarihinsa yake?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa na fili gaba daya ana kallon su da inganci ga al'amuran soja da na siyasa, kodayake suna da wariya ga fadar sarki. 'Secret History' tana da wariya sosai kuma tana cike da gulma, amma tana samar da wani labari na daban mai kima, kodayake da karin gishiri, ga labarin hukuma.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da Kwamanda Belisarius?
faq.answer: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan shari'a da sakatare na Belisarius na tsawon shekaru da dama. Duk da cewa rubuce-rubucensa na fili suna yaba wa kwamandan, 'Secret History' kuma ta hada da suka, wanda ke nuna alaka mai sarkakiya wadda ta lalace bayan lokaci.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Cappadocia, dan Exarch na Afirka.
Ya hambarar da azzalumin Sarki Phocas sannan aka shelanta shi sarki a Constantinople.
Sojojin Sassanid Persian karkashin Khosrow II sun kwace Jerusalem sannan suka kwace Giciye na Gaskiya (True Cross).
Ya jagoranci wasu yakokin soja masu hazaka da jaruntaka da kansa yaki da Daular Sassanid.
Bayan ya kayar da Persians, ya dawo da Giciye na Gaskiya sannan ya mayar da shi Jerusalem a cikin tattaki na nasara.
Ya mayar da Helenanci harshen kasa na hukumance na Daular, yana musanya Latin, sannan ya karbi lakabin 'Basileus'.
Sojojin Byzantine sun fuskanci babban kashi mai tsanani yaki da sojojin Rashidun Caliphate a Yakin Yarmouk.
Sojojin Larabawa da ke ci gaba sun ci lardunan Syria, Palestine, da kuma Egypt da yaki.
Ya mutu a Constantinople, bayan ya kare daular daga abokin gaba daya amma ya shaida yadda wani abokin gaban daban ya rarraba ta.

keyAchievements.title: Kayar da Daular Sassanid
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci wasu yakoki masu hazaka da kansa wadanda suka kawo karshen yakin shekaru 26 sannan suka murkushe abokin hamayyar Daular Byzantine na shekaru da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Gudanarwa da na Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da tsarin Theme, inda ya raba larduna zuwa yankunan soja, wadanda suka zama ginshikin tsaron Byzantine na tsawon karni da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Mayar da Daula ta zama ta Girka (Hellenization)
keyAchievements.description: Ya canza harshen daula na hukumance daga Latin zuwa Helenanci, wanda ke nuna al'adun gaskiya na daular sannan ya nuna sauyi daga asalin Roma zuwa Byzantine.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon Heraclius a matsayin kwamandan soja mai girma?
faq.answer: Ya bar dabarun yaki na yau da kullum, ya jagoranci sojojinsa da kansa a kan yakoki na jaruntaka a cikin kasar abokan gaba, sannan ya kayar da Sassanid Persians gaba daya duk da cewa sun fi shi yawa.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin canza harshen kasa na hukumance zuwa Helenanci?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban mataki a kan sauya tsari daga 'Daular Roma ta Gabas' zuwa 'Daular Byzantine,' inda ya yarda cewa ginshikinta na al'adu da mutane na Girka ne, ba wai Latin ba.

faq.question: Idan ya samu nasara sosai, me yasa ya rasa yankuna da yawa ga Larabawa?
faq.answer: Yakokin da aka shafe shekaru da dama ana yi da Persia sun cinye dakarun soja da na kudi na Daular Byzantine gaba daya, wanda ya bar ta cikin hadari ga sabbin sojojin Larabawa masu karsashi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Chen Yi kusa da Luoyang, Henan.
Ya zama monk na addinin Buddhist gaba daya.
Ya fara tafiyarsa zuwa India, inda ya bijire wa dokar Sarki ta haramta tafiye-tafiye.
Ya yi tafiya a daukacin India, yana karatu a Jami'ar Nalanda da tara littattafan addini.
Ya koma babban birnin Tang, Chang'an, tare da littattafan addini na Buddhist guda 657.
Ya kammala littafinsa na tafiye-tafiye mai shahara, 'Great Tang Records on the Western Regions'.
Ya jagoranci babban aikin fassara da gwamnati ke daukar nauyi har zuwa mutuwarsa.
Ya mutu a Tongchuan, Shaanxi.

keyAchievements.title: Tafiya zuwa India
keyAchievements.description: Ya gudanar da tafiya ta kasa na shekaru 17 mai nisan mil 10,000 zuwa India don samun littattafan addini na Buddhist na gaske.

keyAchievements.title: Fassaran Littattafan Addini
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara sassan littattafan addini na Buddhist sama da 1,330 zuwa harshen Sinanci, wanda ya bayyana sannan ya fadada koyarwar Buddhist a Gabashin Asiya sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Great Tang Records on the Western Regions
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta cikakken littafin tafiye-tafiye wanda har yanzu yake zama babban tushe ga tarihi da yanayin kasa na karni na 7 na Tsakiyar Asiya da India.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Makarantar Yogacara a China
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa makarantar Faxiang (Yogacara ko 'Mind-Only') ta addinin Buddhism a China, wata babbar al'ada ta falsafa.

faq.question: Shin Xuanzang ne 'Tripitaka' daga 'Journey to the West'?
faq.answer: E, ainihin Xuanzang na tarihi shi ne asalin da ya yi wahayi ga kirkirarren mutum Tang Sanzang (Tripitaka) a cikin shahararren littafin Sinanci 'Journey to the West'. Sai dai, littafin tatsuniya ne kawai, kuma ainihin tafiyarsa ba ta hada da sarkin biri ko aljanin alade ba.

faq.question: Me yasa tafiyarsa ta kasance ta haram?
faq.answer: A farkon Daular Tang, Sarki Taizong ya haramta wa mutanensa tafiye-tafiye zuwa kasashen waje saboda rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da barazana a iyakoki. Dole ne Xuanzang ya sulale ya fita daga daular.

faq.question: Menene gudunmawarsa mafi mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Kodayake tafiyarsa ta kasance mai ban mamaki, gudunmawarsa mafi dorewa shi ne aikin fassara mai girma da daki-daki da ya yi. Fassaran dinsa suna da inganci sosai wanda suka zama ma'auni na tsawon karni da dama sannan suka tsara ci gaban addinin Buddhism a China, Korea, da kuma Japan.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Chornukhy, Cossack Hetmanate, a cikin dangin Cossack.
Ya yi karatu lokaci-lokaci a Kyiv-Mohyla Academy, inda ya yi fice a harsuna, kade-kade, da kuma falsafa.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai rera waka a Imperial Chapel da ke St. Petersburg.
Ya yi tafiya a daukacin Turai a matsayin bangaren wani aiki, inda kila ya ziyarci Hungary, Vienna, da sauran cibiyoyin ilimi.
Ya koyar da ilimin waka (poetics) da tarbiyya (ethics) a Pereiaslav da Kharkiv Collegiums, amma an kore shi saboda hanyoyinsa da ra'ayoyinsa da ba a saba da su ba.
Ya fara rayuwarsa a matsayin masanin falsafa mai yawo, yana tafiya a fadin Ukraine, yana koyarwa, da kuma rubutu.
Ya mutu a kauyen Ivanivka (yanzu Skovorodynivka), bayan an ce ya tona kabarinsa da kansa a ranar da ta gabaci mutuwarsa.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Falsafar Ukraine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ginshikin falsafar gida ta Ukraine da ayyukansa a kan sanin kai, farin ciki, da kuma 'duniyoyi uku'.

keyAchievements.title: Manufar 'Aiki mai Dabi'a' (Srodna Pratsia)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da ra'ayi mai tasiri cewa ana samun farin ciki na gaske ta hanyar yin aikin da ya dace da dabi'ar mutum ta dabi'a.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Adabi da na Kade-kade
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tattaunawa ta falsafa da dama, tatsuniyoyi ('Fables of Kharkiv'), wakoki ('The Garden of Divine Songs'), sannan ya kera kade-kade na coci.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Socrates na Ukraine'?
faq.answer: Kamar Socrates, ya koyar ta hanyar tattaunawa, ya jaddada sanin kai ('San kanka'), sannan ya rayu cikin sauki da tsantsani, yana kalubalantar ka'idojin al'umma ba tare da ya rubuta falsafarsa a cikin littafi mai tsari ba.

faq.question: Shin ya taba buga ayyukansa?
faq.answer: A'a, babu daya daqun ayyukansa da aka buga lokacin yana raye. Sun yadu ne a siffar rubutun hannu (manuscript) a tsakanin abokansa da mabiyansa, wanda ya kasance al'ada a lokacin.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar rubutun kabarinsa, 'Duniya ta yi kokarin kama ni, amma ta kasa'?
faq.answer: Yana nuna alamar kin yarda da ya yi a rayuwarsa ga sha'awoyi na duniya kamar dukiya, matsayi, da takura na hukuma don samun 'yanci na ruhaniya da na ilimi.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Washington, County Durham, England.
Ta kammala karatu a Oxford da babban digiri na farko (first-class honours) a tarihin zamani.
Ta fara karatu na gaske na harshen Larabci sannan ta yi tafiyarta ta farko mai girma zuwa hamadar Siriya.
Hukumar Leken Asiri ta Birtaniya (British Intelligence) ta dauke ta aiki lokacin barkewar Yakin Duniya na Farko.
An nada ta a matsayin Oriental Secretary ga Babban Kwamishinan Birtaniya a Baghdad.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a Taron Alkahira, tana goyon bayan samar da kasar Iraq karkashin Sarki Faisal I.
Ta kafa Baghdad Archaeological Museum (daga baya Iraq Museum).
Ta mutu a Baghdad sakamakon shan kwayoyin barci da yawa, wanda ake kyautata zaton kashe kanta ta yi.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Gina Kasar Iraq ta Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen zana iyakokin sabuwar kasar da kuma nada Faisal I a matsayin sarkinta.

keyAchievements.title: Wadda ta Kafa Iraq Museum
keyAchievements.description: Ta kafa gidan kayan tarihi na kasa a Baghdad don kiyaye tsohon gadon al'adu na Mesopotamia.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Masu Bincike da Masu Hakar Kayan Tarihi
keyAchievements.description: Tafiye-tafiye na musamman da cikakken bincike na hamadar Larabawa da ta yi sun samar da bayanai masu kima na sirri da fahimtar al'adu.

faq.question: Shin Gertrude Bell 'yar leken asiri ce?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa ta yi aiki ga Hukumar Leken Asiri ta Birtaniya kuma ta tara bayanai, rawarta ta fi zama ta jami'ar siyasa da jakadiya, tana amfani da babban iliminta na yankin don tsara manufofi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran ta 'Sarauniyar Hamada'?
faq.answer: Wannan lakabi yana nuna ikonta na musamman na yin tafiya a daukacin hamadar Larabawa da kuma tasirin alakarta da shugabannin kabilu masu iko.

faq.question: Menene gadonta mai dorewa?
faq.answer: Gadonta mai dorewa kuma mai sarkakiya shi ne kasar Iraq ta zamani, wadda ta taimaka wajen samar da iyakokinta da tsarin siyasa. Iraq Museum ita ce gadonta na al'adu da aka fi yaba wa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Nader Qoli a lardin Khorasan na Persia.
Ya shiga aikin Safavid Tahmasp II sannan ya zama babban kwamandansa.
Ya hambarar da sarkin Safavid na karshe sannan aka nada shi Shah na Persia, wanda ya kafa daular Afsharid.
Ya mamaye Daular Mughal, ya kayar da sojojinsu a Yakin Karnal, sannan ya lalata babban birnin, Delhi.
Ya ci Bukhara da Khiva da yaki, wanda ya fadada daular Persia zuwa girmanta mafi girma a zamanin yanzu.
Wasu rukunin jami'ansa suka kashe shi, wanda ya haifar da rushewar daularsa cikin sauri.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Hada kan Persia
keyAchievements.description: Ya kori mamaya na Afghan, Ottoman, da kuma Rasha, wanda ya kawo karshen lokaci na rudani sannan ya sake hada kasar karkashin mulkinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina dakarun soja da na ruwa masu karfi na zamani, wanda ya mayar da Persia kasa mafi karfin soja a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Mamaye India
keyAchievements.description: Nasarar mamaye Daular Mughal da lalata Delhi da ya yi ya kawo dukiya mai yawa, ciki har da Peacock Throne da lu'u-lu'u na Koh-i-Noor, zuwa Persia.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Nader Shah 'Napoleon na Persia'?
faq.answer: Ana kwatanta shi da Napoleon saboda dabarunsa na soja masu kyau, hawan sa daga dangi na talakawa don ya zama sarki, da kuma gagarumin mamayarsa.

faq.question: Menene ya haifar da faduwarsa?
faq.answer: Mulkinsa ya zama mai tsanani da nuna fargaba na zalunci, musamman bayan wani yunkurin kisa. Rashin tausayinsa da haraji mai tsanani sun haifar da bore a ko'ina sannan kwamandojinsa suka kashe shi a karshe.

faq.question: Menene ganimarsa mafi shahara daga India?
faq.answer: Ya kwashe dukiyar Mughal a Delhi, inda ya dauki abubuwa masu kima na tarihi kamar Peacock Throne da lu'u-lu'u na Koh-i-Noor da Daria-i-Noor.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Tekirdag, Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya shiga cikin kungiyar sirri ta Young Ottomans.
Ya gudu zuwa London da Paris, inda ya hada hannu wajen buga jaridar Hurriyet (Freedom).
Ya shirya wasan kwaikwayonsa Vatan Yahut Silistre (Fatherland or Silistra), wanda ya kai ga tura shi gudun hijira a Famagusta, Cyprus.
An shelanta tsarin doka (Constitution) na farko na Ottoman; Kemal ya yi aiki a kwamitin tsara ta.
Sultan Abdulhamid II ya dakatar da tsarin dokar sannan ya sake tura Kemal gudun hijira.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a tsibirin Chios.

keyAchievements.title: Mamban Farko na Young Ottomans
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban jagoran ilimi a cikin yunkurin Young Ottomans, wanda ya goyi bayan tsarin mulki na sarauta (constitutional monarchy) da kuma zamanantarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Marubutan Wasan Kwaikwayo da Novel na Turkish
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo mai tasiri 'Vatan Yahut Silistre' da kuma novel na farko na Turkish na zamani, 'İntibah' (Awakening).

keyAchievements.title: Mai Kare 'Mahaifa' da 'Yanci'
keyAchievements.description: Ya yada manufofin 'vatan' (mahaifa) da kuma 'hürriyet' ('yanci), wanda ya kafa ginshikin tunani ga kishin kasa na Turkish na zamani.

faq.question: Menene Young Ottomans suke kokarin cimmawa?
faq.answer: Young Ottomans sun kasance kungiyar sirri ta masana wadanda ke son gyara Daular Usmaniyya. Sun nemi hada ra'ayoyin demokradiyya na Yamma, kamar tsarin doka da majalisa, da ka'idojin Musulunci don samar da asalin Ottoman na zamani da dunkulewa sannan su yaki mamayar Turai.

faq.question: Me yasa wasan kwaikwayonsa 'Vatan Yahut Silistre' ya kasance mai matukar cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Wasan kwaikwayon, wanda ke nuna kariya ta jaruntaka na wani sansani lokacin Yakin Crimean, ya tada karsashin kishin kasa mai tsanani a tsakanin masu kallo. Zanga-zangar jama'a da ta biyo baya gwamnati ta kalle ta a matsayin kalubale kai-tsaye ga ikon Sultan, wanda ya kai ga kama Kemal da tura shi gudun hijira.

faq.question: Menene gadon Namik Kemal a kasar Turkey ta zamani?
faq.answer: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa da kuma 'Mawaƙin Mahaifa.' Ra'ayoyinsa a ka tsarin doka, kishin kasa, da 'yanci sun yi tasiri sosai a kan yunkurin Young Turk kuma, a karshe, a kan Mustafa Kemal Ataturk, wanda ya kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya nemi mafaka a wurin Nizari Isma'ilis (Assassins), inda a karshe aka tsare shi a Alamut Castle.
Alamut Castle ta shiga hannun Mongols. Tusi ya shiga aikin sarkin Mongol Hulagu Khan.
An fara ginin Maragheh observatory karkashin jagorancin Tusi.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa a kan tarbiyya, Akhlaq-i Nasiri (The Nasirean Ethics).
Kungiyar Maragheh observatory ta kammala shahararren tsarin taswirar taurari, Zij-i Ilkhani.
Ya mutu a Kadhimiya, kusa da Baghdad, sannan aka binne shi a wani masallaci kusa da Imam na Shia na bakwai.

keyAchievements.title: Maragheh Observatory
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya jagoranci observatory mafi cigaba a zamaninsa, wanda ya janyo manyan masana daga daukacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: The Tusi Couple
keyAchievements.description: Wata theorem ta lissafi wadda ke samar da tafiya ta madaidaiciya (linear motion) daga hadin gwiwar tafiye-tafiye na zagaye guda biyu, wadda Copernicus ya yi amfani da ita daga baya.

keyAchievements.title: Zij-i Ilkhani (Ilkhanic Tables)
keyAchievements.description: Tsarin taswirar taurari mai inganci sosai wanda ke nuna motsin taurari, wanda ya zama tsarin da aka fi amfani da shi na tsawon karni da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Akhlaq-i Nasiri (Nasirean Ethics)
keyAchievements.description: Babban aiki a kan tarbiyya wanda ke hada tunanin Aristotelian, Platonic, da na Musulunci, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan falsafar Musulunci na tsawon tsararraki.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Tusi ya kasance dan yarin Assassins?
faq.answer: A farko ya nemi tsari a wurinsu amma daga baya aka hana shi fita, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi dan yari gaba daya. Sai dai, an kula da shi a matsayin masani, ba wai dan yari na talakawa ba, kuma ya sami damar ci gaba da ayyukansa na kimiyya da falsafa.

faq.question: Yaya Tusi ya yi tasiri a kan Copernicus?
faq.answer: Tsarin lissafi na Tusi, watau 'Tusi couple,' ya bayyana a cikin babban aikin Copernicus, De revolutionibus. Ana amfani da shi don musanya equant na Ptolemy. Ana yin muhawara a kan ko Copernicus ya koya game da shi ne ta hanyar rubuce-rubucen Byzantine ko na Larabci, amma kamanceceniya ta lissafi ba ta da tantama.

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni ne Tusi ya ba da gudunmawa a kai?
faq.answer: Ya kasance masani na gaske (polymath) wanda ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga sararin samaniya, lissafi (musamman trigonometry), falsafa, tarbiyya, dabara (logic), optics, likitanci, da kuma addini. Ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 150 a rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Menene rawarsa a lokacin mamayar Mongol?
faq.answer: Lokacin da Mongols suka kewaye sansanin Alamut na Assassin, Tusi ya taimaka wajen tattaunawar mika wuya cikin zaman lafiya. Iliminsa da hikimarsa sun burge sarkin Mongol Hulagu Khan, wanda ya nada shi a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan kimiyya, wanda ya kare rayuwarsa sannan ya ba shi damar cimma manyan nasarorinsa.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Nebuchadnezzar II.
Ya kayar da mutanen Egypt a Yakin Carchemish; ya hau karagar mulki ta Babylon.
Kewaye Jerusalem na farko. Ya tura Sarki Jehoiachin da sauran manyan mutane zuwa Babylon.
Kewaye Jerusalem na biyu. Ya lalata birnin da Haikalin Suleiman (Solomon's Temple), wanda ya fara Babylonian Captivity.
Ya gudanar da kewaye birnin Tyre na tsawon shekaru 13.
Ya yi mulki a matsayin sarki, yana kula da manyan ayyukan gine-gine a Babylon, ciki har da Ishtar Gate.
Ya mutu a Babylon, inda dansa Amel-Marduk ya gaje shi.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Kasa ta Judah da Lalata Jerusalem
keyAchievements.description: Ya murkushe Masarautar Judah, ya lalata Haikalin Suleiman sannan ya tura mutanenta gudun hijira, wani muhimmiyar al'amari a tarihin Yahudawa.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Gina Babylon
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya Babylon ta zama birni mafi girma da ban sha'awa a zamaninsa, inda ya gina Ishtar Gate da kuma ziggurat na Etemenanki.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da ikon Daular Neo-Babylonian a fadin Near East bayan ya kayar da sojojin Egypt da na Assyria a Carchemish.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Nebuchadnezzar ya gina Hanging Gardens of Babylon?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa marubuta na da kamar Berossus sun ba shi girmamawa na gina Hanging Gardens ga matarsa, babu wata hujja ta tarihi ta gaske ko kuma rubutun Babylon na lokacin da ya tabbatar da wanzuwarsu. Labarinsu ya kasance bangare na tatsuniya na mulkinsa.

faq.question: Me yasa yake da babban matsayi a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban abokin gaba a cikin Old Testament saboda cin Jerusalem da yaki, lalata Haikali na Farko, da kuma tilasta wa Yahudawa shiga Babylonian Captivity. Littafin Daniel kuma ya nuna shi sosai, inda ya yi bayani kan alakarsa da annabi Daniel da kuma lokacin haukarsa da ake zargi.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da allahn Marduk?
faq.answer: A matsayinya na sarkin Babylon, Nebuchadnezzar shi ne babban bawan Marduk, allahn da ke kare birnin. Rubuce-rubucensa galibi suna ba wa Marduk girmamawa ga nasarorinsa sannan suna bayyana gagarumin ginin haikali da ya yi a matsayin ayyukan ibada don girmama allahn.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Abu Ali Hasan ibn Ali Tusi a Tus, Persia.
An nada shi a matsayin vizier ga Sultan na Seljuk Alp Arslan.
Ya tabbatar da karagar mulki ga Malik-Shah I bayan kisan Alp Arslan, wanda ya sanya shi zama mutum mafi iko a daular.
Ya kafa makarantun Nizamiyyah a daukacin daular, inda mafi shahara a cikinsu aka kafa ta a Baghdad a shekarar 1065.
Ya rubuta Siyasatnama (Book of Government), babban aiki a kan gudanar da mulki.
An kashe shi kusa da Nahavand, Persia, wanda ake amanna cewa wani mamban kungiyar Order of Assassins ne ya yi kisan.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Daular Seljuk a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da tsarin gudanarwa mai karfi a tsakiya wanda ya hada yankuna masu yawa da daban-daban na Daular Seljuk.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Nizamiyyahs
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa hanyoyin jami'o'i da gwamnati ke daukar nauyi (Nizamiyyahs) wadanda suka zama manyan cibiyoyin ilimi da na gudanarwa.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Siyasatnama
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'Book of Government' (Siyasatnama), wani babban rubutu a kan tsarin siyasa da gudanar da mulki a duniyar Musulunci.

faq.question: Menene makarantun Nizamiyyah?
faq.answer: Sun kasance tsarin jami'o'i na ilimi mai zurfi wadanda Nizam al-Mulk ya kafa. Sun inganta ilimin addini da dokar Sunni na Musulunci, sun horar da jami'an gwamnati na gaba, sannan sun yaki ra'ayoyi masu hamayya.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe Nizam al-Mulk?
faq.answer: Kodayake ana zargin Order of Assassins (Hashshashin) a hukumance, babban ikonsa ya haifar da abokan gaba da yawa a fadar sarki, ciki har da ministoci masu hamayya da mambobin dangin sarakuna, wadanda kila suna da hannu a ciki.

faq.question: Game da menene 'Siyasatnama'?
faq.answer: 'Siyasatnama' ko 'Book of Government' wani littafi ne a kan sarauta da gudanar da mulki. Yana ba wa sarakuna shawara a kan adalci, gudanarwa, ladabi na fada, da kuma yadda za su fuskanci barazana ta ciki da ta waje.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Darius.
Ya kwace karagar mulki ta Daular Achaemenid bayan ya hambarar da mai kwace mulki Gaumata.
Ya murkushe bore a ko'ina a daukacin daular.
Ya fara aiki a kan Behistun Inscription don tabbatar da mulkinsa.
Ya fara ginin sabon babban birnin girmamawa, Persepolis.
Ya kaddamar da yakin soja da bai yi nasara ba yaki da Scythians a Turai.
Bore na Ionian ya fara, wanda ke nuna farkon Yakin Greco-Persian.
Mamayar farko ta Persian a Greece ta zo karshe da rashin nasara a Yakin Marathon.
Ya mutu a Persia lokacin da yake shirin tafiyar soja ta biyu yaki da Greece.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Tsara Daula (Satrapy System)
keyAchievements.description: Ya raba daular zuwa larduna (satrapies), inda kowanne ke karkashin jami'an da ke ba shi rahoto kai-tsaye gare shi, wanda ya tabbatar da iko a tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Hanyar Sarauta (The Royal Road)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina babban titin kilomita 2,700 daga Susa zuwa Sardis, wanda ya ba da damar sadarwa cikin sauri da kuma motsin sojoji ta hanyar gidajen aikewa (postal stations).

keyAchievements.title: Daidaita Kudade da Ma'aunai
keyAchievements.description: Introduced the gold daric and silver siglos, creating a unified economic system across the vast empire.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Persepolis
keyAchievements.description: Ya fara ginin babban birnin girmamawa, wanda ke nuna dukiya, iko, da al'adu daban-daban na Daular Achaemenid.

faq.question: Shin Darius yana da alaka da Cyrus Mai Girma?
faq.answer: Ba sosai ba. Darius ya kasance a cikin wani reshe daban na daular Achaemenid. Ya karfafa ikirarin mulkinsa ta hanyar auren Atossa, yar Cyrus Mai Girma.

faq.question: Menene Behistun Inscription?
faq.answer: Babban rubutu na harsuna daban-daban da aka zana a kan bango, wanda ke nuna yadda Darius ya hau karagar mulki. Ya kasance muhimmiyar kashi ta tallan sarki sannan yana da matukar mahimmanci ga fahimtar rubutun cuneiform na zamani.

faq.question: Shin Darius ya ci Greece da yaki?
faq.answer: A'a. Shahararren mamayarsa na farko ya fuskanci kashi a Yakin Marathon a shekarar 490 BCE. Ya mutu kafin ya kaddamar da mamaya ta biyu mafi girma, wadda aka bar wa dansa, Xerxes I.

timeline.event: An haife shi a al-Qalamoun, kusa da Tripoli, a Ottoman Syria.
Ya koma Alkahira, Egypt, don yin aiki tare da Muhammad Abduh.
Ya kafa jarida mai tasiri Al-Manar (The Lighthouse).
Bayan mutuwar Abduh, ya zama babban murya na yunkurin Islamic Modernist.
Ya kafa 'Society for Preaching and Guidance' a Alkahira.
An zabe shi a matsayin Shugaban Syrian National Congress.
Soke Daular Ottoman (Ottoman Caliphate) ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunaninsa na siyasa na baya.
Ya mutu a Alkahira, Egypt.

keyAchievements.title: Buga Al-Manar
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga jarida mai tasiri Al-Manar na tsawon shekaru sama da 35, wadda ta yada ra'ayoyin gyaran Musulunci a daukacin duniyar Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Tafsir al-Manar
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta sharhi mai girma a kan Alkur'ani, Tafsir al-Manar, inda ya ci gaba da aikin da Muhammad Abduh ya fara.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Modernism da Salafism
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada ra'ayoyin modernism na Abduh da ka'idojin Salafism, wanda ya samar da tsarin ilimi na musamman da kuma mai tasiri.

faq.question: Menene Salafism, kamar yadda Rida ya fahimta?
faq.answer: Ga Rida, Salafism na nufin komawa ga ayyuka da bangaskiya na 'magabata nagari' (the Salaf al-Salih), tsararraki uku na farko na Musulmai, a matsayin mafi tsarkin tsari na Musulunci, don gyara addinin daga abubuwan da aka kara daga baya da kuma camfi.

faq.question: Yaya ra'ayinsa a kan Caliphate ya sauya?
faq.answer: A farko ya kasance mai goyon bayan Ottoman Caliphate, soke ta a shekarar 1924 ya sa ya yi tunani a kan sabon tsari na kasar Musulunci, watau 'Islamic Caliphate' bisa shawara (shura) kuma karkashin jagorancin sarki mai cancanta, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Islamist na baya.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da kishin kasa na Larabawa (Arab nationalism)?
faq.answer: Tana da sarkakiya. Ya goyi bayan cin gashin kansa na Larabawa daga Ottoman Turks sannan ya jagoranci Syrian National Congress, amma biyayyarsa ta karshe tana ga hadin kai na Ummah (al'umma) ta Musulunci fiye da kishin kasa na yare.

timeline.event: An haifi Reza Khan a Alasht, lardin Mazandaran, Persia.
Ya jagoranci juyin mulki tare da Persian Cossack Brigade, inda ya zama Ministan Yaki.
Majlis (majalisa) ta zabe shi a matsayin Shah, wanda ya kawo karshen daular Qajar sannan ya kafa daular Pahlavi.
Ya nemi kasashen waje a hukumance su yi amfani da sunan 'Iran' maimakon 'Persia' a cikin rubuce-rubuce na hukuma.
Ya kafa Jami'ar Tehran, wadda take zama ginshikin gyare-gyaren iliminsa.
Ya kaddamar da dokar 'Kashf-e hijab', wadda ta haramta duk wani lullubi (veil) a fili cikin cece-kuce.
An tilasta masa sauka daga mulki sakamakon mamayar Anglo-Soviet a Iran lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu.
Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Johannesburg, South Africa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Pahlavi
keyAchievements.description: Ya hambarar da daular Qajar sannan ya kafa tasa, inda ya yi mulki a matsayin Shah na farko na layin Pahlavi daga shekarar 1925 zuwa 1941.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Kasa da Zamanantarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da manyan ayyuka na masana'antu, ya gina ababen more rayuwa na kasa kamar Titin Jirgin Kasa na Trans-Iranian, sannan ya gyara tsarin soja, shari'a, da na ilimi.

keyAchievements.title: Raba Addini da Gwamnati da Zamanantarwa da salon Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya aiwatar da manufofi don rage ikon limamai (clergy), ya inganta ilimi na zamani (secular education), sannan ya tilasta tsarin sutura na Yamma don zamanantar da al'umma.

faq.question: Shin Reza Shah sarki ne?
faq.answer: E, shi ne Shah na Iran. 'Shah' lakabi ne na Farsi ga sarki.

faq.question: Me yasa ya canza sunan kasar daga Persia zuwa Iran?
faq.answer: A shekarar 1935, ya nemi kasashen waje su yi amfani da sunan 'Iran', sunan gida na kasar, don nuna rabuwa da baya da kuma tabbatar da asalin kasa na zamani a duniya.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da dakarun Allied da Axis lokacin Yakin Duniya na Biyu (WWII)?
faq.answer: Ya shelanta cewa Iran ba ta da bangare a Yakin Duniya na Biyu amma dakarun Allied sun zarge shi da tausayawa Jamus ta Nazi. Wannan zargi, tare da mahimmancin dabarar Iran, ya kai ga mamayar Anglo-Soviet a shekarar 1941 sannan an tilasta masa sauka daga mulki.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Mardinu, Babylonia, a cikin Daular Parthian.
Ya sami wahayinsa na farko daga tagwayensa na ruhaniya, watau Syzygos.
Ya sami wahayinsa na biyu, wanda ke ba shi umarnin fara aikinsa a fili.
Ya tafi Daular Kushan a Afghanistan da India ta yanzu, inda ya fuskanci tunanin Buddhist.
Ya koma Persia sannan aka ba shi damar tattaunawa da sabon Sarkin Sasanian, Shapur I, inda ya sami goyon bayansa.
Ya yi wa'azi sannan ya yada addininsa a daukacin Daular Sasanian da sauran wurare karkashin kariyar sarki.
Malaman addini na Zoroastrian sun zarge shi da bidi'a, inda aka tsare shi sannan aka kashe shi da umarnin Sarki Bahram I.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Manichaeism
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wani babban addini na duniya na gnostic wanda ke hada abubuwan Zoroastrian, Kirista, da kuma Buddhist sannan ya yadu daga Rome zuwa China.

keyAchievements.title: Marubucin Sabon Littafin Addini
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littattafai masu tsarki da dama, ciki har da Shabuhragan, wadanda aka zana su da kyau don isar da sakonsa.

keyAchievements.title: Hangen Nesa na Universal Missionary
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara coci mai tsari tare da bayyananniyar manufa ta mishan (missionary goal) don samar da addini guda daya na duniya ga daukacin bil'adama, wanda ya wuce iyakokin al'adu da na yare.

faq.question: Menene ainihin bangaskiya ta Manichaeism?
faq.answer: Manichaeism addini ne na musamman na dualistic wanda ke imanin cewa sararin samaniya filin yaki ne tsakanin duniyar ruhaniya mai kyau ta Haske da kuma duniyar jiki mummuna ta Duhu.

faq.question: Me yasa Manichaeism ta bace a karshe?
faq.answer: Ta fuskanci zalunci mai tsanani da dorewa daga addinan kasa masu hamayya kamar Zoroastrianism, Roman Christianity, da kuma daga baya, Musulunci, wanda ya kai ga raguwarta a hankali da kuma bacewarta gaba daya a karni na 16.

faq.question: Shin Mani mai zane ne?
faq.answer: E, Mani ya kasance shahararren mai zane da marubuci. Ya yi imanin cewa fasaha ita ce hanya mafi mahimmanci don isar da sakonsa na Allah, kuma rubuce-rubucen Manichaean sun kasance sanannu da kyau sannan suna da daraja sosai.

faq.question: Menene kalmar 'Manichaean' ke nufi yau?
faq.answer: A yau, ana yawan amfani da kalmar 'Manichaean' don bayyana kowane ra'ayi na duniya wanda ke kallon abubuwa a cikin tsari mai sauki, a matsayin abu mai kyau gaba daya yaki da mummuna gaba daya.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Constantinople.
Ya hau karagar mulki bayan hambarar da dan uwansa, Mustafa IV.
The 'Auspicious Incident' (Vaka-i Hayriye), inda ya soke kungiyar Janissary.
Yarjejeniyar Adrianople ta kammala Yakin Russo-Turkish, wadda ta ba wa Serbia da Greece ikon cin gashin kai.
Ya kafa jaridar Ottoman ta farko ta hukumance, Takvim-i Vekayi (Calendar of Events).
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis), jim kadan kafin a shelanta Edict of Gülhane (bangaren Tanzimat) da ya tsara.

keyAchievements.title: Soke Janissaries
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawar da rundunar soja mai karfi kuma ta gargajiya wadda ta dade tana kawo cikas ga zamanantarwa da kuma sarrafa siyasa.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Soja na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Asakir-i Mansure-i Muhammediye' (Sojoji Masu Nasara na Muhammad), rundunar soja ta zamani irin ta Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Gudanarwa a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya musanya majalissun shawara na gargajiya (Divan) da ma'aikatun irin na Turai don tsara ikon kasa a tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Ginshikin Tanzimat
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da gyare-gyaren shari'a da na al'umma wadanda za a tattara su a cikin dokar Tanzimat (Tanzimat Edict), wadda ke inganta daidaito tsakanin mutanen Ottoman.

faq.question: Me yasa Janissaries suka nuna adawa da gyare-gyare haka?
faq.answer: Janissaries sun sauya daga dakarun yaki na musamman zuwa karfin siyasa da na tattalin arziki mai karfi, kuma sun kalli gyare-gyare a matsayin barazana kai-tsaye ga gatansu da tasirinsu.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Tanzimat'?
faq.answer: 'Tanzimat' is Turkish for 'reorganization.' It refers to a period of intense reform in the Ottoman Empire from 1839 to 1876, which Mahmud II's reign set in motion.

faq.question: Menene 'Auspicious Incident'?
faq.answer: Ya kasance al'amari a shekarar 1826 inda Mahmud II ya yi amfani da dakarunsa na bindigogi masu aminci don murkushe boren Janissary, wanda ya kai ga lalacewa da soke kungiyar gaba daya, wanda hakan ya kawar da babban cikas ga gyare-gyarensa.

faq.question: Shin gyare-gyaren Mahmud II sun yi nasara?
faq.answer: Sun kasance nasara mai gauraya. Duk da cewa ya kafa ginshiki mai mahimmanci na zamanantar da kasa da soja, daular ta ci gaba da fuskanci asarar yankuna da kuma rikici na ciki, kuma galibi ana fuskantar tirjiya ga gyare-gyaren.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Edirne, babban birnin Ottoman a lokacin.
Ya fara hawa karagar mulki yana da shekaru 12 bayan mahaifinsa ya sauka, amma an cire shi aka mayar da mahaifinsa sakamakon makircin fada da barazana ta waje.
Ya hau karagar mulki a karo na biyu bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Murad II.
Ya ci Constantinople da yaki bayan an kewaye ta na tsawon kwanaki 53, wanda ya kawo karshen Daular Byzantine sannan ya mayar da ita babban birnin Ottoman, watau Istanbul.
Ya ci Daular Trebizond da yaki, kasar magajiya ta Byzantine ta karshe mai girma.
Ya yi yaki mai tsayi da tsada da Republic of Venice don ikon tekunan Aegean da Adriatic.
Ya tattara 'Kanunname,' dokar kasa wadda ta tsara iko a tsakiya sannan ta tsara tsarin kasar Ottoman na tsawon karni da dama.
Ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani lokacin wani yakin soja na sabo, inda dalilin mutuwarsa ya kasance batun muhawara ta tarihi (guba ko dabi'a).

keyAchievements.title: Cin Constantinople (1453)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kawo karshen Daular Byzantine ta shekaru 1,100 sannan ya kafa Istanbul a matsayin sabon babban birnin Ottoman mai wadata.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci manyan yankuna da yaki a Anatolia da Balkans (ciki har da Serbia, Bosnia, da kuma Albania), wanda ya sauya kasar Ottoman ta zama babbar daula a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Shari'a da na Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da 'Kanunname,' tsarin doka (secular legal code) wando ya tsara iko a tsakiya sannan ya bayyana tsarin gwamnati da al'ummar Ottoman.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Fasaha da Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa jami'o'i, ya gayyaci masana na Italiya da Girka zuwa fadarsa, sannan ya samar da al'adu masu kyau na ilimi da fasaha a Istanbul.

faq.question: Me yasa cin Constantinople da yaki yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ya kasance babban nasara ta alama, cikar burin Musulunci da aka dade ana fata, kuma ya ba wa Ottomans ikon dabarar kasuwanci a kan hanyoyin kasuwanci masu mahimmanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsu na babban iko a duniya.

faq.question: Shin yana da hakuri da sauran addinai?
faq.answer: Ya nuna wani mataki na zahiri. Bayan nasarar cin kasa da yaki, ya ba wa al'ummar Greek Orthodox, Armenian, da kuma Yahudawa damar kiyaye dokokin addininsu da cibiyoyinsu karkashin tsarin Millet, kodayake wadanda ba musulmai ba ana musu haraji na musamman.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalilin mutuwarsa a shekarar 1481 yana da muhawara. Yayin da yake kan tafiyar soja, ba zato ba tsammani ya kamu da rashin lafiya sannan ya mutu. Wasu masana tarihi sun nuna cewa an ba shi guba ne, wataƙila ta hannun dansa na farko Bayezid ko kuma jami'an Venice, yayin da wasu ke gaskata cewa ya mutu ne sakamalon cuta ta dabi'a kamar gout.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Salonica (Thessaloniki ta yanzu, Greece), Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya jagoranci sojojin Ottoman zuwa nasara a Yakin Gallipoli, wanda ya ba shi shahara ta kasa.
Ya kaddamar da Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish (Turkish War of Independence) yaki da dakarun Allied.
Ya kafa Grand National Assembly ta Turkey a Ankara.
Ya soke Ottoman Sultanate.
Ya shelanta Jamhuriyar Turkey sannan aka zabe shi a matsayin shugabanta na farko.
Ya kaddamar da musanya rubutun Ottoman Turkish na Larabci da haruffan Turkish na Latin.
Ya ba wa mata cikakken hakkin zabe (universal suffrage) sannan majalisa ta ba shi sunan mahaifi 'Atatürk' (Uban Mutanen Turkey).
Ya mutu a Dolmabahçe Palace, Istanbul, yana da shekaru 57.

keyAchievements.title: Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci Yunkurin Kasa na Turkish (Turkish National Movement) zuwa nasara yaki da mamayar Allied, wanda ya kare ikon cin gashin kanta na Turkey ta zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey
keyAchievements.description: Ya soke Ottoman Sultanate ta shekaru 600 sannan ya kafa jamhuriya ta zamani (secular republic) a matsayinta.

keyAchievements.title: Gyare-gyaren Atatürk (Kemalism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu yawa a siyasa, shari'a, harshe, ilimi, da al'adu don samar da kasa ta zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Hakkin Zabe na Mata
keyAchievements.description: Ya kare hakkin mata, inda ya ba wa mata na Turkey hakkin zabe a shekarar 1934, wanda ya rigayi kasashe da dama na Yamma.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Atatürk'?
faq.answer: Yana nufin 'Uban Mutanen Turkey.' Majalisar Dokoki ta Turkey ta ba shi wannan sunan a shekarar 1934 karkashin 'Dokar Sunan Mahaifi' (Surname Law), wadda ta bukaci daukacin mutane su karbi sunan mahaifi na gado.

faq.question: Me yasa ya musanya rubutun Larabci da haruffan Latin?
faq.answer: Gyaran yana da burin kara yawan mutane masu karatu da rubutu, domin sababbin haruffan suna da saukin koya sannan sun fi dacewa da sauti na harshen Turkish. Kuma mataki ne na alama na mayar da al'adun Turkey zuwa Yamma da kuma nisanta daga tarihin Ottoman da na Musulunci.

faq.question: Shin Atatürk kama-karya ne?
faq.answer: Mulkinsa yana da sarkakiya. Ya gudanar da mulkin jam'iyya daya sannan ya yi amfani da babban iko don aiwatar da gyare-gyare cikin sauri, wanda wasu ke kallo a matsayin na kama-karya. Sai dai, burinsa da ya bayyana shi ne kafa ginshikin demokradiyya ta gaba, kuma ana girmama shi a Turkey a matsayin wanda ya kafa kasar.

faq.question: Menene ra'ayinsa game da addini?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mai tsantsar ra'ayin raba addini da gwamnati (secularist). Ya yi imanin cewa addini al'amari ne na kashin kansa kuma ya kamata a raba shi gaba daya da rayuwar jama'a, siyasa, da doka. Wannan ka'ida, watau laïcite, ta zama ginshikin Jamhuriyar Turkey.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kavala, Daular Usmaniyya (yanzu a Greece).
Ya isa Egypt a matsayin mataimakin kwamandan dakarun Albanian na sojojin Ottoman.
Sultan na Ottoman ya nada shi a matsayin Wali (gwamna) na Egypt bayan bukatar jama'a.
Consolidates power by massacring the Mamluk leaders at the Citadel in Cairo.
Ya yi yaki yaki da Wahhabis a Arabia a madadin Sultan, wanda ya fadada tasirinsa.
Ya ci Sudan da yaki, yana neman zinariya, bayi, da kuma dakarun soja na sabo.
Ya shiga cikin Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Greek (Greek War of Independence), amma sojojinsa na ruwa sun lalace a Yakin Navarino.
Yakin Farko na Egyptian-Ottoman. Dansa Ibrahim Pasha ya ci Syria da yaki sannan ya ci gaba zuwa Anatolia.
Yakin Biyu na Egyptian-Ottoman. Shiga cikin maganar na Turai ya tilasta masa janyewa daga Syria amma ya ba wa iyalinsa mulkin gado na Egypt.
Ya sauka daga mulki saboda rashin lafiya.
Ya mutu a Alexandria.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Kasar Egypt ta Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daular sannan ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu yawa wadanda suka zamanantar da sojojin Egypt, tattalin arziki, da kuma al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da sojoji masu karfi irin na Turai da kuma dakarun ruwa na zamani, wanda ya mayar da Egypt babban karfin soja a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Tattalin Arziki a Tsakiya
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa ikon mallakar kasa na musamman (state monopolies) a kan noma da kasuwanci, musamman a kan auduga, don daukar nauyin gagarumin ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Ilimi da na Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura ayyukan ilimi zuwa Turai sannan ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa na tsakiya don gudanar da kasar yadda ya dace.

faq.question: Shin Muhammad Ali dan kasar Egypt ne?
faq.answer: A'a, shi dan asalin Albanian ne, an haife shi a Kavala a kasar Greece ta yanzu, wadda a lokacin take zama bangaren Daular Usmaniyya. Ya zo Egypt ne a matsayin sojan Ottoman kuma an ce bai taba koyon magana da harshen Larabci sosai ba.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'wanda ya kafa kasar Egypt ta zamani'?
faq.answer: Gyare-gyarensu sun canza Egypt gaba daya daga lardin Ottoman da aka watsar zuwa kasa mai karfi da zaman kanta ta zahiri tare da rundunar soja mai karfi, gwamnati ta tsakiya, da kuma tattalin arziki na zamani, wanda ya kafa ginshikin kasar ta zamani.

faq.question: Shin yana son hambarar da Sultan na Ottoman ne?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa ya yi manyan yakoki guda biyu yaki da Sultan sannan ya nemi samar da babbar daula ta kashin kansa, ainihin burinsa kila shi ne tabbatar da mulkin gado ga iyalinsa da kuma kafa kasa mai karfi da zaman kanta da ke da tsakiya a Egypt, maimakon ya karbi karagar mulki ta sarki a Istanbul da kansa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a wani kauye a Lower Egypt.
Ya shiga Jami'ar Al-Azhar da ke Alkahira.
Ya hadu da babban mai ba shi shawara, Jamal al-Din al-Afghani.
An kore shi daga Egypt saboda goyon bayansa ga Bore na Urabi ('Urabi Revolt).
Ya samar da jaridar pan-Islamic 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa' tare a Paris.
Ya koma Egypt daga gudun hijira.
An nada shi a matsayin Grand Mufti na Egypt, babban iko na kasa a kan shari'ar Musulunci.
Ya mutu a Alexandria, Egypt.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Islamic Modernism
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana tsari na sake fassara ka'idojin Musulunci dangane da kalubale na zamani, yana jaddada hankali da dacewa.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya goyi bayan tsarin darussa na zamani a makarantun addini, ciki har da kimiyyar zamani, don samar da sabbin shugabanni nagari.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Shari'a a matsayin Grand Mufti
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da fatawowi na ci gaba (fatwas) a kan batutuwa kamar kudin ruwa na banki da matsayin mata, yana amfani da ikonsa don aiwatar da canji.

faq.question: Menene babban burin Muhammad Abduh?
faq.answer: Babban burinsa shi ne ya gyara tunani da cibiyoyin Musulunci don tabbatar da cewa Musulunci yana tafiya da zamani, hankali, da kuma kimiyya, wanda hakan ya farfado da al'ummar musulmi karkashin matsin lamba na mulkin mallaka.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kore shi?
faq.answer: An tura shi gudun hijira saboda alakarsa da Bore na kasa na Urabi (1881-1882), wanda ke neman kawo karshen tasirin Birtaniya da Faransa a kan Egypt.

faq.question: Menene bambanci tsakanin Abduh da mai ba shi shawara al-Afghani?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa duka biyun masu gyara ne, al-Afghani ya kasance dan siyasa na pan-Islamist mai tsauraran ra'ayi wanda ya mayar da hankali a kan juyin juya hali na yaki da mulkin mallaka. Bayan gudun hijirarsa, Abduh ya mayar da hankalinsa ga canji a hankali na dogon lokaci ta hanyar ilimi da gyaran shari'a daga cikin tsarin.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Agirnas kusa da Kayseri, Anatolia.
An shigar da shi cikin rundunar Ottoman Janissary ta hanyar tsarin Devsirme.
Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent ya nada shi a matsayin Babban Injiniyan Gine-gine na Sarki (Chief Imperial Architect).
Ya kammala Şehzade Mosque a Istanbul, wanda yake kallo a matsayin aikinsa na farko mai girma.
Ya kammala Süleymaniye Mosque a Istanbul, alamar zamanin zinariya na Ottoman.
Ya kammala Selimiye Mosque a Edirne, wadda yake kallo a matsayin babban aikin rayuwarsa (masterpiece).
Ya mutu a Istanbul yana da babban shekaru sannan aka binne shi a wani kabari da ya kera da kansa kusa da Süleymaniye Mosque.

keyAchievements.title: Süleymaniye Mosque (Istanbul)
keyAchievements.description: Wani babban tsari da fasaha ta gine-gine da ta zama alamar iko da girmar mulkin Sultan Suleiman.

keyAchievements.title: Selimiye Mosque (Edirne)
keyAchievements.description: Mimar Sinan da kansa yana kallon ta a matsayin babban aikinsa, inda ya inganta tsarin babban rufi na zagaye (dome structure) sannan ya samar da babban fili na ciki dunkulalle.

keyAchievements.title: Gadar Mehmed Paša Sokolović (Višegrad)
keyAchievements.description: Wurin Gadon Duniya na UNESCO, wannan gadar mai kyau tana nuna gwanintarsa a fannin civil engineering da kuma daidaituwarta da shimfidar kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Mai Gina
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba masa da kera da kuma ginin gine-gine sama da 300, ciki har da masallatai 92, dakunan addu'a 52, makarantu 55, masauki (caravanserais) 20, da kuma fadoji 35.

faq.question: Gine-gine nawa ne Mimar Sinan ya kera?
faq.answer: Ana yaba masa da daukar nauyin gine-gine sama da 300, ciki har da masallatai, fadoji, gadoji, hanyoyin ruwa (aqueducts), da makarantu, kodayake shi da kansa ya kera kuma ya kula da kadan daga cikinsu.

faq.question: Menene asalin Mimar Sinan?
faq.answer: An haife shi a matsayin Kirista (kila Cappadocian Greek ko Armenian) sannan ya shiga kasar Ottoman ta hanyar tsarin Devşirme, inda ya shiga addinin Musulunci sannan ya sami horo a matsayin injiniyan soja kafin ya zama mai kera gine-gine (architect).

faq.question: Menene ake kallo a matsayin babban aikin Mimar Sinan?
faq.answer: Sinan da kansa yana kallon Selimiye Mosque a Edirne a matsayin babban aikinsa, wanda ke nuna kololuwar nasarorinsa na gine-gine da kuma cikar aikin rayuwarsa.

faq.question: Yaya asalin sojansa ya shafi aikinsa?
faq.answer: Kwarewarsa a matsayin injiniyan soja ta ba shi babban ilimi na zahiri kan kayan aiki, kayayyakin gini, da kuma karkon gine-gine. Wannan ginshiki na injiniyanci ya ba shi damar fadada iyakokin zanen gine-gine, inda ya samar da manyan rufi na zagaye (domes) da kuma gine-gine masu karfi a kan babban sikeli.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Hamadan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya bar Hamadan sannan ya yi tafiya a daukacin daular Buyid, yana neman ilimi da goyon baya.
Ya isa Nishapur sannan ya yi shahararren tattaunawa ta adabi da masana Abu Bakr al-Khwarizmi, inda ya sami lakabinsa 'Badi' al-Zaman'.
Ya rubuta aikinsa mafi shahara, Maqamat, wanda ya samar da sabon kalar adabi.
Ya mutu a Herat (Afghanistan ta yanzu) yana da shekaru 38 kacal.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro Maqama
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da kalar adabi na Maqama, labarai a cikin rhyming prose (saj') wadanda ke dauke da mutum mai wayo da kuma mai ba da labari.

keyAchievements.title: Kwarewar Zantukan Larabci (Arabic Prose)
keyAchievements.description: Ana kallon ayyukansa a matsayin kololuwar salon adabi na Larabci, wanda ke nuna gwaninta ta musamman ta kalmomi, rhetoric, da kuma rhyming prose.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan Adabin Larabci
keyAchievements.description: Maqamat dinsa ta zama tsari ga marubuta na baya na tsawon karni da dama, musamman al-Hariri na Basra.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Badi' al-Zaman'?
faq.answer: Wani lakabi ne na girmamawa a harshen Larabci wanda ke nufin 'Abin Mamaki na Zamanin' (The Wonder of the Age), wanda aka ba shi bayan ya lashe wani shahararren tattaunawa ta adabi.

faq.question: Shin al-Hamadani dan Larabawa ne ko kuwa dan Persia?
faq.answer: Ya kasance dan asalin Persia, an haife shi a Hamadan, amma ya sami ilimi kuma ya zama kwararre a harshen Larabci, wanda ya kasance harshen sadarwa na ilimi da adabi a lokacin.

faq.question: Menene ainihin jigon Maqamat dinsa?
faq.answer: Maqamat tana amfani da labaran kasada na wani mai yawo mai wayo don sukar al'umma, nuna gwanintar harshe, da kuma bincikar jigogi na yaudara, rayuwa, da kuma ikon kalmomi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Nurs, Bitlis Vilayet, Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya tafi Istanbul, inda ya ba da shawarar gyare-gyaren ilimi don hada ilimin addini da na zamani.
An tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Burdur, sannan zuwa kauyen Barla mai nisa, wanda ya fara lokacin gudun hijira da tsarewa na tsawon shekaru 25.
Ya rubuta mafi yawan tarin Risale-i Nur lokacin da yake gudun hijira a Barla.
Ya fuskanci shari'arsa ta farko mai girma da tsarewa a Eskisehir, tare da dalibansa da dama.
Ya mutu a Urfa, Turkey. Daga baya gwamnatin soja ta mayar da kabarinsa zuwa wani wurin da ba a sani ba.

keyAchievements.title: Tarin Risale-i Nur
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta sharhin Alkur'ani mai shafuka 6,000 wanda ke amsa...'ani mai shafuka 6,000 wanda ke amsa tambayoyi na zamani na bangaskiya, kimiyya, da falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin Nur (The Nur Movement)
keyAchievements.description: Ya haifar da wani babban yunkuri na addinin Musulunci wanda ba na siyasa ba a Turkey da kuma daukacin duniya, wanda ke mayar da hankali a ka ilimi da farfadowar ruhaniya.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Bangaskiya da Hankali
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wata karna don kare gaskiyar addini ta amfani da hujjojin hankali da dabarun da ke tafiya da kimiyya ta zamani.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Bediuzzaman'?
