faq.answer: Yana nufin 'Abin Mamaki na Zamanin' (The Wonder of the Age), wani lakabi da aka ba shi lokacin kuruciyarsa saboda hazakarsa ta musamman, rike bayanai a kai, da kuma dabarun tattaunawa.

faq.question: Shin Said Nursi dan siyasa ne?
faq.answer: Ya shiga cikin rayuwar jama'a lokacin kuruciyarsa amma daga baya ya dauki matsayin 'nisantar siyasa,' yana mayar da hankali gaba daya a kan aikin ruhaniya da na bangaskiya ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa.

faq.question: Menene ainihin sakon Risale-i Nur?
faq.answer: Babban burinta shi ne tabbatar da gaskiyar Alkur'ani da bangaskiyar Musulunci ta amfani da hujjojin hankali da lura daga duniyar dabi'a, yana yaki da materialism da kafirci (atheism) na zamanin yanzu.

faq.question: Me yasa aka tsananta masa?
faq.answer: Jamhuriyar Turkey ta raba addini da gwamnati (secularist) ta kalli koyarwarsa ta addini mai tasiri da kuma al'umma da ke bunkasa a kusa da shi a matsayin barazana ga manufofinta na secular, wanda ya kai ga tura shi gudun hijira, sanya ido, da kuma tsare shi akai-akai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Kipchak Turk a Pontic-Caspian Steppe.
An sayar da shi a matsayin bawa a Syria, wanda a karshe Sultan na Ayyubid na Egypt ya saya shi.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kayar da Seventh Crusade a Yakin Al Mansurah.
Ya jagoranci sojojin gaba na Mamluk zuwa nasara a kan Mongols a Yakin Ain Jalut.
Ya kashe Sultan Qutuz sannan ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sultan na Mamluk.
Ya kwace birnin Crusaders na Antioch, wanda ya zama babban kashi ga kasashen Crusaders.
Captures the formidable Crusader castles of Krak des Chevaliers and Montfort.
Ya mutu a Damascus, wataƙila ta hanyar guba.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Ain Jalut
keyAchievements.description: Ya dakatar da motsin sojojin Mongol da ake ganin ba za a iya tsayar da su ba zuwa Gabas ta Tsakiya, wani babban lokaci a tarihin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Rushe Kasashen Crusaders
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci manyan sansanonin Crusaders da yaki cikin tsari kamar Antioch da Krak des Chevaliers, wanda ya kawo karshen ikonsu a Levant.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Daular Mamluk
keyAchievements.description: Ya gyara sojoji, ya gina ababen more rayuwa kamar magudanan ruwa (canals) da gadoji, sannan ya kafa hanyar aika sakonni (postal network), wanda ya samar da kasa mai karko da karfi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Baybars 'wanda ya kafa' Mamluk Sultanate na gaske?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa shi ne sarki na hudu, nasarorinsa na soja, gyaran gudanarwa, da kuma karfafa ikonsa sun sauya kasar Mamluk ta zama daula mai karko da kuma karfi, wanda ya kafa ginshikin mulkinta na shekaru 250.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunansa, al-Bunduqdari?
faq.answer: Yana nufin 'mai harbin baka' (the crossbowman), yana nuni ga mai gidan da ya fara saya shi a matsayin bawa, amir Aydakin al-Bunduqdar.

faq.question: Shin Baybars sarki ne maras tausayi?
faq.answer: An san shi da rashin tausayi ga abokan gaba da abokan hamayya na siyasa, ciki har da kashe sarkin da ya gabace shi. Sai dai, a matsayin sarki, an kuma san shi da adalci, ibada, da kuma manyan ayyukan jama'a wadanda suka amfani mutanensa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Shiraz, Persia.
Ya bar Shiraz don yin karatu a Baghdad a Jami'ar Nizamiyya bayan mamayar Mongol.
Ya fara tafiya ta shekaru talatin a daukacin Gabas ta Tsakiya, Arewacin Afirka, da Anatolia.
Ya kammala wakarsa ta tarihi 'Bustan' (The Orchard).
Ya kammala aikinsa mafi shahara, 'Gulistan' (The Rose Garden).
Ya mutu a garinsu na Shiraz.

keyAchievements.title: Gulistan (The Rose Garden)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wannan babban aikin zantuka da waka, wanda ke samar da jagorancin tarbiyya da na al'umma ta hanyar labarai sannan yana daya daqun manyan ayyuka masu tasiri a adabin Farsi.

keyAchievements.title: Bustan (The Orchard)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wannan waka ta tarihi mai tsawo gaba daya cikin verse, yana mayar da hankali a kan kyawawan dabi'u kamar adalci, tawali'u, da gamsuwa, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsa na mai ba da tarbiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan Adabi na Duniya
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun kasance cikin sassan farko na adabin Farsi da aka fassara zuwa harsunan Yammacin duniya, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan mutane kamar Voltaire, Goethe, da kuma Ralph Waldo Emerson.

faq.question: Me yasa Saadi yake da shahara haka?
faq.answer: Saadi ya shahara saboda manyan ayyukansa guda biyu, 'Gulistan' da 'Bustan', wadanda ke hada labarai masu ban sha'awa, shawara ta zahiri, da kuma zurfin falsafar tarbiyya a cikin salo mai sauki da kyau wanda ya burge masu karatu na tsawon karni da dama.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Saadi'?
faq.answer: Ya dauki sunan bogi 'Saadi' don girmama Atabeg (sarki) na gida na Fars, Sa'd ibn Zangi, wanda ya kasance mai tallafa masa.

faq.question: Menene maganarsa da ta fi shahara?
faq.answer: Wakarsa da ta fi shahara, wadda take zama bangaren 'Gulistan' dinsa, ita ce 'Ya'yan Adam sassa ne na jiki guda...'. Akwai siffar wannan waka da aka rubuta ta a kofar shiga ginin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (United Nations) da ke New York.

timeline.event: Ya hau karagar mulki, ya hambarar da Ur-Zababa na Kish, sannan ya kafa birnin Akkad.
Ya gudanar da yakokin soja da dama, inda ya ci kasashen birni na Sumerian da yaki kamar Uruk, Ur, da Lagash.
Ya kafa Daular Akkadian, wadda ta hada Mesopotamia sannan ta samar da daula ta farko da aka sani a duniya.
Ya mutu bayan ya yi mulki na shekaru 56, inda ya mika daular ga dansa, Rimush.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Daula ta Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya ci kasashen birni daban-daban na Mesopotamia da yaki sannan ya hada su, wanda ya samar da daula ta farko da aka sani a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Sababbin Abubuwa na Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa rundunar soja ta din-din-din (standing army) ta sojoji 5,400, wani sabon ra'ayi wanda ya ba da damar gudanar da yakokin soja na dogon lokaci.

keyAchievements.title: Gyare-gyaren Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya daidaita ma'aunai, gwaje-gwaje, da kuma kalandar, sannan ya mayar da harshen Akkadian ya zama harshen gwamnati na hukumance, wanda ya saukaka kasuwanci da gudanarwa.

faq.question: Shin labarin haihuwar Sargon na gaske ne?
faq.answer: Ana kallon sa a matsayin tatsuniya, wadda kila an kafa ta don tabbatar da mulkinsa ta hanyar nuna goyon bayan Allah da kuma boye asalin sa da ba na sarauta ba. Labarin yana kama da labarin Littafi Mai Tsarki na Musa na baya.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Sargon'?
faq.answer: Sunan 'Sargon' (Šarru-kīn a harshen Akkadian) yana nufin 'sarki na gaske.' Kila ya dauki wannan sunan lokacin da ya hau karagar mulki don tabbatar da hakkinsa na yin mulki.

faq.question: Yaya Daular Akkadian ta rushe?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwar Sargon, daular ta fuskanci bore akai-akai. Duk da cewa magadansa sun rike ta na wani lokaci, hadakar rikici na ciki, hare-hare na waje (musamman ta hannun Gutians), da kuma wataƙila yunwa ta sauyin yanayi sun kai ga rushewarta kusan shekarar 2154 BCE.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga Ardashir I, wanda ya kafa Daular Sasanian.
Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarki na biyu na Sasanian (King of Kings).
Ya kayar da sojojin Roma karkashin Sarki Gordian III a Yakin Misiche.
Ya gudanar da yakin soja na biyu yaki da Roma, inda ya lalata babban birnin Antioch.
Ya samu nasararsa mafi shahara a Yakin Edessa, inda ya kayar sannan ya kama Sarkin Roma Valerian.
Ya kafa birnin Bishapur, ta amfani da sojoji da injiniyoyi na Roma da aka kama don ginin sa.
Ya mutu, inda ya bar daula mai babban fadada da kuma karfafa.

keyAchievements.title: Kama Sarki Valerian
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu nasarar da ba a taba gani ba na kayarwa da kuma kama sarkin Roma, Valerian, wani wulakanci ga Roma wanda aka kiyaye shi a kan bango na Sasanian.

keyAchievements.title: Fadada Daula da Karfafa ta
keyAchievements.description: Ya fadada yankin Daular Sasanian zuwa Roman Syria da Armenia sannan ya karfafa mamayar mahaifinsa.

keyAchievements.title: Wanda ya Kafa Birane
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa manyan birane da dama, ciki har da Bishapur da Gundeshapur, wadanda suka zama cibiyoyin al'adu, gudanarwa, da kuma ilimi masu mahimmanci.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Sarki Valerian da aka kama?
faq.answer: Bayanan tarihi sun bambanta. Hanyoyin Sasanian sun ce an mutunta shi, yayin da hanyoyin Roma suka nuna cewa an wulakanta shi, wataƙila Shapur ya yi amfani da shi a matsayin matakin kafa na mutum. Ya mutu a tsare, kuma an yi amfani da gwanintarsa, tare da na sojojinsa, don ayyukan gine-gine a Persia.

faq.question: Menene manufar addini ta Shapur I?
faq.answer: Shapur I ya kasance mabiya Zoroastrian amma ya bi tsarin hakuri da addini. Ya kare annabi Mani, wanda ya kafa Manichaeism, sannan ya ba wa al'ummar Kirista da na Yahudawa damar bunkasa a cikin daularsa.

faq.question: Menene hotunan Naqsh-e Rostam?
faq.answer: Suna daya daqun zane-zane a kan bango na duwatsu a Iran. Shapur I ya ba da umarnin zana hoton da ke nuna nasararsa a kan sarakunan Roma guda uku: Gordian III, Philip the Arab, da kuma Valerian da aka kama.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Constantinople, dan Sultan Mustafa III.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Ottoman lokacin yakokin Austro-Turkish da Russo-Turkish.
Ya sanya hannu a kan Yarjejeniyar Jassy, wadda ta kawo karshen yakin da Russia sannan ta ba shi damar mayar da hankali a kan gyare-gyaren gida.
Ya kafa 'Nizam-ı Cedid' (New Order) a hukumance don zamanantar da kasar, yana farawa da sabuwar rundunar soja.
Ya fuskanci mamayar Faransa a Ottoman Egypt da Syria, karkashin jagorancin Napoleon Bonaparte.
Boren Janissary karkashin jagorancin Kabakçı Mustafa ya hambarar da shi, sannan aka soke gyare-gyarensa.
An kashe shi a Topkapı Palace da umarnin magajinsa, Mustafa IV, lokacin wani yunkuri na maido da shi a kan karagar mulki.

keyAchievements.title: Sojojin Nizam-ı Cedid (New Order)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa rundunar soja ta zamani, wadda ta sami horo a Turai don kalubalantar ikon Janissaries na gargajiya.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Diflomasiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya bude ofisoshin jakadanci na din-din-din na farko na Ottoman a manyan biranen Turai kamar London, Paris, da Vienna.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Fasaha da Kade-kade
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance kwararren mawaƙi, mai rubutun zamani (calligrapher), da mawaƙi wanda ya kera ayyuka da dama, wanda ya inganta bunkasar al'adu lokacin mulkinsa.

faq.question: Menene Nizam-ı Cedid?
faq.answer: Ya kasance jerin gyare-gyare a karshen karni na 18 da ke da burin zamanantar da Daular Usmaniyya. Babban al'amarinsa shi ne samar da sabuwar rundunar soja irin ta Yamma, amma kuma ya hada da canje-canje na kudi, gudanarwa, da kuma diflomasiyya.

faq.question: Me yasa Janissaries suka nuna adawa da Selim III?
faq.answer: Sun kalli sabuwar rundunar sojarsa, Nizam-ı Cedid, a matsayin barazana kai-tsaye ga ikon sojojinsu na karni da dama, tasirin siyasa, da kuma matsayinsu na gata a cikin daular.

faq.question: Shin mulkin Selim III ya kasance rashin nasara gaba daya?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa an soke gyare-gyarensa sannan aka kashe shi, kokarinsa ya kasance yunkuri na farko mai girma na zamanantarwa irin ta Yamma. Ana kallon mulkinsa a matsayin babban sauyi na tarihi, kodayake na bakin ciki, wanda ya kafa ginshikin gyare-gyaren Tanzimat na baya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Herat, kasar Afghanistan ta yanzu.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Safavid yana da shekaru 16 lokacin juyin mulki na soja yaki da mahaifinsa.
Ya sanya hannu a kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya mai tsanani da Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya bayyar da manyan yankuna don siyan lokaci na gyare-gyare na ciki.
Ya mayar da babban birnin Qazvin zuwa Isfahan sannan ya kayar da Uzbeks kusa da Herat, wanda ya kare iyakar gabas.
Ya yi yaki mai nasara yaki da Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya dawo da yankunan da suka hada da Baghdad, Azerbaijan, da kuma Georgia.
Tare da taimakon rundunar sojan ruwa ta Ingila, ya kwace tsibirin Hormuz mai dabarar yaki daga hannun Portuguese.
Ya sake kwace Baghdad daga hannun Ottomans.
Ya mutu a Mazandaran, inda ya bar gado mai karfi amma mara karko sakamakon rashin magaji mai cancanta.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da dakarun 'ghulam', sojojin bawa na musamman wadanda ke da aminci ga Shah kadai, wanda ya lalata ikon kabilar Qizilbash.

keyAchievements.title: Sake Kwace Yankuna
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar yakokin soja yaki da Daular Usmaniyya da Uzbeks, wanda ya maido da iyakokin gargajiya na Persia.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanin Zinariya na Isfahan
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya Isfahan ta zama babban birni mai ban sha'awa, cibiyar fasaha, gine-gine, da kasuwanci ta duniya, wadda Naqsh-e Jahan Square ke nuna girmanta.

keyAchievements.title: Wadata ta Tattalin Arziki
keyAchievements.description: Ya farfado da tattalin arzikin Persia ta hanyar mallakar da inganta kasuwancin siliki, gina ababen more rayuwa, da kuma tabbatar da tsaron jama'a a kan hanyoyin kasuwanci.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Abbas I 'Mai Girma'?
faq.answer: Ana kiran sa 'Mai Girma' saboda maido da karfin soja da na siyasa na Persia, fadada iyakokinta, da kuma jagorancin zamanin zinariya na al'adu da tattalin arziki.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da 'ya'yansa maza?
faq.answer: Abin bakin ciki shi ne, ya zama mai tsoron makirci. Ya ba da umarnin kashe dansa na farko kuma magaji Mohammad Baqer Mirza sannan ya makantar da wasu 'ya'yansa maza guda biyu, wanda hakan ya bar daula ba tare da magaji mai cancanta ba.

faq.question: Su wane ne 'ghulams'?
faq.answer: Ghulams sun kasance dakarun soja na musamman wadanda ke dauke da mutanen Circassia, Georgia, da kuma Armenia da suka shiga Musulunci sannan suka sami horo. Suna da aminci mai tsanani ga Shah da kansa, ba wai ga kabilu ba.

faq.question: Yaya alakarta take da Turai?
faq.answer: Ya nemi kawance da kasashen Turai, kamar Spain da Ingila, don samar da wani fage na biyu yaki da abokin gaba na gama gari, Daular Usmaniyya. Wannan ya kai ga karuwar alakar diflomasiyya da ta kasuwanci tsakanin Persia da Turai.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Nineveh, dan karanci shekaru na Sarki Esarhaddon.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Assyria bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
Ya gudanar da manyan yakoki a Egypt, wanda ya kare da lalata Thebes.
Yakin basasa na lalacewa ya fara da yayansa Shamash-shum-ukin, sarkin Babylon.
Ya kayar da yayansa sannan ya lalata birnin Babylon, wanda ya kawo karshen yakin basasa.
Ya lalata babban birnin Elamite na Susa, wanda ya lalata masarautar hamayya ta Elam gaba daya.
Ya mutu, inda ya bar Daular Assyria a kololuwar girmanta amma tana da matukar rauni a ciki.

keyAchievements.title: The Library of Ashurbanipal
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara daki-daki sannan ya tsara dakin karatu na farko a cikin duniyar da, inda ya kiyaye rubuce-rubucen cuneiform sama da 30,000.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya rike Daular Neo-Assyrian a kololuwar girmanta na yankin kasa, wadda ta tashi daga Tsaunukan Caucasus zuwa Egypt da kuma daga Cyprus zuwa yammacin Iran.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Elam da Yaki
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da masarautar hamayya ta Elam gaba daya, inda ya lalata babban birninta Susa sannan ya kawo karshen barazanarta ga Mesopotamia.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne Ashurbanipal yana da ilimi (literate)?
faq.answer: E. A siffarsa ta musamman ga sarkin Assyria na zamaninsa, ya yi alfahari a cikin rubuce-rubucensa kan ikonsa na karantawa da rubuta rubutun cuneiform mai sarkakiya, ciki har da na da na Sumerian.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da Daular Assyria bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Daular, wadda ta raunana sakamakon yakin basasa na shekaru da dama da kuma yakoki akai-akai, ta rushe cikin sauri. A cikin shekaru ashirin da mutuwarsa, an lalata Nineveh sannan daular ta bace gaba daya.

faq.question: Yaya aka sake gano dakin karatunsa?
faq.answer: An gano kufai na dakin karatunsa a tsakiyar karni na 19 ta hannun masanin hakar kayan tarihi na Birtaniya Austen Henry Layard a shafin ancient Nineveh, a kasar Iraq ta yanzu. Rubuce-rubucen da aka gano a can su ne ginshikin ilimin Assyriology na zamani.

faq.question: Menene hotonsa da ya fi shahara a fannin fasaha?
faq.answer: An zana shi sosai a cikin fadoji a cikin wani shiri da aka sani da 'Garden Party', inda yake kwance a kan gado yayin da kan sarkin Elamite Teumman da aka yanke ke rataye a jikin wata bishiya kusa da shi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Alkahira, Egypt, a cikin dangi mai dukiya mai asalin hadaka na Turkish, Arab, Circassian, Kurdish, da kuma Greek.
Ya kammala karatu a Makarantar Shari'a sannan Khedive Tewfik ya tura shi yin karatu a Faransa na tsawon shekaru uku.
Ya koma Egypt sannan aka nada shi a babban matsayi a fadar Khedive Abbas II.
Hukumomin Birtaniya sun tilasta masa tafiya gudun hijira saboda wakokinsa na kishin kasa da kuma goyon bayan 'yancin kai na Egypt. Ya zabi zama a Andalusia, Spain.
Ya koma Egypt daga gudun hijira sannan aka girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa.
Abokan aikinsa sun nada shi a matsayin 'Amir al-Shu'ara' (The Prince of Poets) a wani taro mai girma, wanda ke nuna matsayinsa na mawaƙi na gaba a duniyar Larabawa.
Ya mutu a Alkahira yana da shekaru 64.

keyAchievements.title: Yarima na Mawaƙan (Amir al-Shu'ara)
keyAchievements.description: Abokan aikinsa sun nada shi sarki a hukumance a shekarar 1927, wanda ya amince da shi a matsayin mawaƙi mafi girma na harshen Larabci na zamaninsa.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Wasan Kwaikwayo na Wakar Larabci
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigo da kuma kafa kalar wasan kwaikwayo na waka a cikin adabin Larabci na zamani da wasanni kamar 'The Death of Cleopatra' da 'Majnun Laila'.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Wakokin Larabci
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada tsarin wakokin Larabci na da da tasirin Turai, wanda ya farfado da harshe da jigogin wakokin Larabci na zamanin yanzu.

keyAchievements.title: Muryar Kasa ta Egypt
keyAchievements.description: Wakokinsa na kishin kasa sun zaburar da yunkurin kishin kasa na Egypt sannan suka karfafa rawarsa a matsayin alamar al'adu da siyasa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Prince of Poets'?
faq.answer: Kwamitin mawaƙa da marubuta na Larabawa ya ba shi lakabin 'Amir al-Shu'ara' a shekarar 1927 don girmama gudunmawarsa ta musamman, gwanintarsa a harshen Larabci, da kuma rawarsa wajen farfado da zamanantar da wakokin Larabci.

faq.question: Menene tasirin gudun hijirarsa a Spain?
faq.answer: Gudun hijirarsa a Andalusia (Spain) ya kasance lokaci na babban aiki na fasaha. Ya samar da wahayi ga wasu ayyukansa mafi karfi, inda ya bayyana bakin cikin rabuwa da Egypt sannan ya kwatanta da daukakar daular Larabawa da ta bace a Spain.

faq.question: Menene ayyukansa da suka fi shahara?
faq.answer: Ayyukansa da suka fi shahara sun hada da tarin wakokinsa 'Al-Shawqiyyat', da kuma wasannin kwaikwayo na waka kamar 'The Death of Cleopatra', 'Majnun Laila', da kuma 'Cambyses'.

faq.question: Shin har yanzu yana da amfani yau?
faq.answer: E, ana kallon Shawqi a matsayin ginshikin adabin Larabci na zamani. Ana nazarin wakokinsa a makarantu a daukacin duniyar Larabawa, kuma sababbin abubuwan da ya shigo da su a cikin wasan kwaikwayo na waka da wakoki masu dadi suna ci gaba da yin tasiri a kan marubuta yau.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Lofça (yanzu Lovech, Bulgaria).
Ya isa Constantinople don neman ilimi mai zurfi.
An nada shi a matsayin masanin tarihi na hukumance na Daular Usmaniyya.
An nada shi shugaban Mecelle Commission don tsara dokar gida (civil law) ta Ottoman.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin Ministan Shari'a a karon farko na lokuta da dama.
Ya mutu a Constantinople.

keyAchievements.title: The Mecelle (Ottoman Civil Code)
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci kwamitin da ya tsara dokar Hanafi ta zama dokar gida (civil code) ta farko ta Daular Usmaniyya, wadda ta shafi doka a daukacin duniyar Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Tarih-i Cevdet (History of Cevdet)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin Daular Usmaniyya mai kashi 12 daga shekarar 1774 zuwa 1826, wanda yake zama babban rubutu na tarihin Turkish na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Gyare-gyaren Tanzimat
keyAchievements.description: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin dan siyasa da masani a cikin gyare-gyaren zamanantarwa na karni na 19 na kasar Ottoman da al'umma.

faq.question: Menene Mecelle?
faq.answer: Mecelle (Mecelle-i Ahkâm-ı Adliyye) ta kasance dokar gida ta Daular Usmaniyya a karshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20. Ta kasance yunkuri na farko na tsara sashi na dokar Shari'a ga kasa ta zamani.

faq.question: Shin Ahmed Cevdet Pasha mai ra'ayin mazan jiya ne ko kuwa mai gyara?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mutum na musamman wanda ya nemi hadin kai. Ya yi imanin shigo da cibiyoyin irin na Yamma amma ya nace cewa dole ne su ginu a kan kuma su dace da al'adar Musulunci, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi 'mai gyara mai rike da al'ada'.

faq.question: Menene gudunmawarsa mafi mahimmanci bayan Mecelle?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa na tarihi mai kashi 12, 'Tarih-i Cevdet', ana kallon sa a matsayin babban aikin tarihin Ottoman da kuma muhimmin tushe don fahimtar sauyin daular zuwa zamanin zamani.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ray, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
An nada shi babban likita na asibiti a Ray.
Ya koma Baghdad sannan aka nada shi daraktan babban asibiti, wanda ya gano wurinsa ta amfani da wani gwaje-gwaje da ya hada da rube-ruben nama.
Ya rubuta 'A Treatise on Smallpox and Measles' (Kitab al-Judari wa al-Hasbah), littafi na farko da ya bambanta cututtukan biyu ta hanyar lafiya.
Ya mutu a garinsu na Ray. Daga baya dalibansa sun tattara bayanansa a cikin 'Kitab al-Hawi' (The Comprehensive Book).

keyAchievements.title: Bambance Smallpox da Measles
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance na farko da ya samar da bayyani da kuma bambanci na fili tsakanin wadannan cututtuka guda biyu masu yaduwa.

keyAchievements.title: Kitab al-Hawi (The Comprehensive Book)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta encyclopedia na likitanci mai girma wanda ya hada ilimin likitanci na Girka, Siriya, da na Larabci na farko, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan likitanci na tsawon karni.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Likitancin Gwaji (Experimental Medicine)
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi amfani da gwaje-gwaje, kamar rataye nama don tantance wuri mafi tsabta ga asibiti a Baghdad.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga Chemistry/Alchemy
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara rarrabuwar abubuwa na sinadarai (chemical substances), ya bayyana hanyoyin sinadarai da dama, sannan ya kera kuma ya bayyana kayayyakin dakin gwaje-gwaje sama da ashirin.

faq.question: Shin Rhazes likita ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) wanda ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 200 a kan batutuwa daban-daban, ciki har da falsafa, alchemy, kade-kade, tarbiyya, da kuma addini, baya ga rubuce-rubucensa na likitanci.

faq.question: Yaya ya zabi wurin asibitin Baghdad?
faq.answer: Ya rataye sassan danye nama a wurare daban-daban a fadin birnin sannan ya zabi wurin da naman ya rube a hankali, inda ya fahimci cewa shi ne wuri mafi tsabta kuma mafi karancin datti.

faq.question: Menene littafinsa na likitanci mafi mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa littafinsa a kan smallpox da measles ya kasance mai ban mamaki, aikinsa mafi girma da tasiri shi ne 'Kitab al-Hawi' (The Comprehensive Book), wani babban encyclopedia na ilimin likitanci da aka tattara daga bayanansa bayan mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Baghdad, dan Caliph na biyar na Abbasid, Harun al-Rashid.
Harun al-Rashid ya mutu. Dan uwan Al-Ma'mun, watau al-Amin, ya zama caliph a Baghdad, yayin da al-Ma'mun ke gudanar da lardin gabas na Khurasan.
Fitna na Hudu (The Fourth Fitna), yakin basasa tsakanin al-Amin da al-Ma'mun, ya kai kololuwa da Kewaye Baghdad (Siege of Baghdad) da kuma nasarar al-Ma'mun.
Ya kafa House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) a Baghdad, babban cibiyar fassara da bincike.
Ya dauki nauyin tafiyar masana taurari don auna zagayen Duniya (Earth's circumference), inda ya samu sakamako mai inganci kwarai ga zamanin.
Ya kaddamar da 'Mihna' (binciken akida) don aiwatar da koyarwar Mu'tazilite. Ya mutu lokacin yakin soja yaki da Daular Byzantine.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa House of Wisdom
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa babban dakin karatu da jami'a a Baghdad wanda ya zama cibiyar ilimi na Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Yunkurin Fassara Mai Girma
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki nauyin fassarar ayyukan kimiyya da falsafa na Girka, Persia, da kuma India marasa adadi zuwa harshen Larabci.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da kudi ga manyan ayyukan kimiyya, ciki har da lura da taurari da kuma rubutun algebra na farko ta hannun al-Khwarizmi.

faq.question: Menene House of Wisdom?
faq.answer: Ta kasance babbar jami'a ta jama'a, cibiyar ilimi, da dakin karatu a Baghdad lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci. Masana daga asali daban-daban sun taru a can don fassarawa, bincike, da kuma fadada ilimin duniya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon mulkin Al-Ma'mun a matsayin 'Zamanin Zinariya'?
faq.answer: Tallafawarsa ta gaske ga kimiyya, falsafa, likitanci, da fasaha ta kai ga bunkasar ilimi da al'adu da ba a taba gani ba. Mulkinsa ya ga babban ci gaba a algebra, astronomy, da likitanci, yana ginuwa a kan ayyukan dauloli na da.

faq.question: Menene 'Mihna'?
faq.answer: Mihna, ko kuma 'binciken akida,' ta kasance inquisition wadda al-Ma'mun ya fara a shekarar 833 don tilasta mazhabar tunani ta Mu'tazilite, wadda ke cewa Alkur'an halitta ce kuma ba ya wanzu tare da Allah tun fil azal. Ya tsananta wa masana na gargajiya wadanda ba su yarda ba, musamman Ahmad ibn Hanbal.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Baghdad, Abbasid Caliphate, babban cibiyar ilimi.
Ya fara tafiyarsa mai tsawo, wadda za ta dauki tsawon shekaru sama da ashirin sannan ta rufe yankuna masu yawa na Asiya da Afirka.
Ya yi tafiya a daukacin Persia da kuma kwarin Indus da ke India, yana tattara al'adun gida da tarihi.
Ya kammala fasalin farko na babban aikinsa, 'Muruj al-Dhahab' (The Meadows of Gold).
Ya zauna a Fustat (Tsohuwar Alkahira), Egypt, inda ya kwashe shekarunsa na baya yana rubutu da sake duba ayyukansa.
Ya mutu a Fustat, Egypt, inda ya bar ayyuka masu yawa na tarihi amma mafi yawansu sun bace.

keyAchievements.title: The Meadows of Gold and Mines of Gems
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wannan aikin encyclopedia wanda ke hada tarihi, labarin kasa (geography), da ethnography, yana sauyawa daga tsarin lokaci (chronological) zuwa tsarin jigo (thematic).

keyAchievements.title: Ethnography na Majagaba
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta al'adu, bangaskiya, da tsarin al'umma na mutane daban-daban da ya hadu da su, bisa lura ta kai-tsaye da kuma tattaunawa.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Gwiwa na Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada labaran tarihi da tattaunawa ta kimiyya kan geology, zoology, da astronomy, wanda ya samar da cikakken hangen nesa na duniya.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Herodotus na Larabawa'?
faq.answer: Kamar masanin tarihin Girka Herodotus, Al-Masudi ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama sannan ya rubuta tarihi mai fadi wanda ya hada da labarin kasa, al'ada, da lura ta kashin kansa, wanda ya wuce kawai tarihin sarakuna da yakoki.

faq.question: Kashi nawa ne na aikinsa ya tsira?
faq.answer: Abin bakin ciki shi ne, kadan ne ya tsira. Cikin ayyukansa da ake kimantawa kusan 34, guda biyu ne kacal suka tsira: 'The Meadows of Gold' da kuma 'Kitab al-Tanbih wa-l-Ishraf' (The Book of Notification and Revision). Sauran, ciki har da tarihin duniya mai kashi 30, duk sun bace.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ya yi tafiya zuwa China?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa ya rubuta abubuwa da dama game da China, ana yin muhawara a tsakanin masana kan ko ya ziyarci babban yankin China da kansa ko kuwa ya tattara bayanansa ne daga ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa da fatake da ya hadu da su a tashoshin jiragen ruwa a India, Sri Lanka, da kuma Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya. Tabbas ya isa Tekun China (China Sea).

timeline.event: An haife shi a Harran, Upper Mesopotamia (Turkey ta yanzu).
Ya koma Raqqa, Syria, sannan ya fara binciken taurari mai girma.
Ya kammala aikinsa mafi girma, watau Kitāb az-Zīj aṣ-Ṣābi’ (The Sabian Astronomical Tables).
Plato na Tivoli ne ya fara fassara aikinsa zuwa harshen Latin a matsayin 'De Motu Stellarum' (On the Motion of the Stars).
Ya mutu kusa da Samarra, Iraq, lokacin da yake dawowa daga tafiya zuwa Baghdad.

keyAchievements.title: Lissafin Shekarar Rana (Solar Year)
keyAchievements.description: Ya lissafa shekarar rana ta kasance kwanaki 365, awanni 5, mintuna 46, da dakika 24, wanda yake da bambancin minti 2 da dakika 22 kacal daga ainihin kimar zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Sababbin Abubuwa na Trigonometry
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigo da kuma yada amfani da sine, cosine, da tangent, wanda ya mayar da tsarin chords na Girka gurbin sa.

keyAchievements.title: Gyara Precession
keyAchievements.description: Ya tantance precession na equinoxes ya kasance digiri 1 kowace shekara 66, babban ci gaba idan aka kwatanta da kimar Ptolemy ta digiri 1 kowace shekara 100.

keyAchievements.title: Kitāb az-Zīj
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta littafi mai fadi na taswirar taurari guda 57 wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga astronomy na Musulunci da na Turai na tsawon karni da dama.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Ptolemy na Larabawa'?
faq.answer: Wannan lakabi yana nuna babban matsayinsa a fannin astronomy, wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da Ptolemy a duniyar da, sannan yana nuna rawarsa wajen ci gaba da gyara aikin Ptolemy a cikin al'adar Musulunci.

faq.question: Shin Al-Battani ya yi amfani da madubin nesa (telescope)?
faq.answer: A'a, ba a samar da madubin nesa (telescopes) ba sai a karni na 17. Al-Battani ya gudanar da bincikensa mai inganci ta amfani da kayayyaki kamar armillary sphere, mural quadrant, da astrolabe.

faq.question: Yaya aikinsa ya isa Turai?
faq.answer: Babban aikinsa, watau Kitāb az-Zīj, an fassara shi zuwa Latin a karni na 12 a matsayin 'De Scientia Stellarum' ko kuma 'De Motu Stellarum', wanda ya zama littafi na ginshiki ga masana taurari na Renaissance kamar Copernicus.

faq.question: What is a 'Zīj'?
faq.answer: Zij littafi ne na astronomy na Musulunci wanda ke tsara ma'aunin da ake amfani da shi don lissafin taurari na matsayin Rana, Wata, taurari, da kuma duniyoyi. Zij na Al-Battani ya kasance daya daqun mafi inganci da tasiri a zamaninsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Basra (Iraq ta yanzu).
Ya koma Baghdad sannan ya fara samun shahara a tsakanin masana na Abbasid Caliphate.
Ya rubuta manyan ayyukansa, ciki har da 'Book of Animals' (Kitab al-Hayawan) da kuma 'Book of Eloquence and Exposition' (Kitab al-Bayan wa-al-Tabyin).
Al-Mutawakkil ya nada shi dan takaitaccen lokaci a wani matsayi a fadar Caliph, amma ya yi murabus bayan kwanaki uku kacal.
Ya mutu a garinsu na Basra yana da shekaru masu yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Book of Animals (Kitab al-Hayawan)
keyAchievements.description: Babban aiki na zoology, adabi, da falsafa, wanda ke dauke da ra'ayoyin farko na zaɓin dabi'a (natural selection) da hanyoyin abinci (food chains).

keyAchievements.title: Kwararre na Zantukan Larabci (Arabic Prose)
keyAchievements.description: Ya daga darajar zantukan Larabci (Arabic prose) zuwa matsayi mai kyau na fasaha, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan tsararraki na marubuta da salon sa mai dadi da labarai.

keyAchievements.title: Polymath na Majagaba
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da gudunmawa ga fannoni daban-daban da suka hada da theology, sociology, siyasa, da sukar adabi, wanda ke nuna ruhun Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.

faq.question: Shin Al-Jahiz ya gabatar da ka'idar juyin halitta (theory of evolution) ne da gaske?
faq.answer: Ya gabatar da ra'ayoyi kamar yakin neman rayuwa (struggle for existence), dacewa (adaptation), da kuma tasirin muhalli a kan dabbobi, wadanda suke da muhimmanci ga ka'idar juyin halitta, amma bai tsara cikakkiyar ka'idar juyin halitta ba kamar Charles Darwin.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Al-Jahiz'?
faq.answer: Wani lakabi ne mai nufin 'mai manyan idanu' (goggle-eyed), wanda aka ce an ba shi ne saboda nakasar idanunsa tun haihuwa.

faq.question: Yaya Al-Jahiz ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ainihin dalili ba a sani ba, amma wani labari da ya shahara, kodayake kila na bogi ne, ya ce ya mutu ne lokacin da wani tari na littattafai ya fada a kansa a cikin dakin karatunsa na kashin kansa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kufa, Abbasid Caliphate, a cikin dangi mai daraja na kabilar Kindah.
Ya yi tasiri a Baghdad karkashin Caliph al-Ma'mun, yana aiki a House of Wisdom don fassarawa da kuma nazarin rubuce-rubucen falsafa da kimiyya na Girka.
Ya ci gaba da aikinsa na ilimi karkashin tallafin Caliph al-Mu'tasim.
Ya rasa goyon baya lokacin mulkin Caliph al-Mutawakkil. Ya fuskanci zalunci, kuma an kwace dakin karatunsa na kashin kansa na wani lokaci.
An mayar masa da dakin karatunsa da kuma goyon bayansa, wanda ya ba shi damar ci gaba da aikinsa.
Ya mutu a Baghdad, inda ya bar gadon ayyukan rubuce-rubuce sama da 260.

keyAchievements.title: Uban Falsafar Musulunci
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne na farko da ya shigo da kuma hada ra'ayoyin falsafar Girka cikin tsari a cikin al'adun ilimi na Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Cryptanalysis
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta daya daqun littattafai na farko da aka sani a kan cryptanalysis, inda ya shigo da hanyar frequency analysis don warware lambobin sirri (ciphers).

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa a matsayin Polymath
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta abubuwa da dama a kan metaphysics, tarbiyya, lissafi, likitanci, ka'idar kade-kade, da optics, wanda ke nuna fadin iliminsa.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Kade-kade (Music Theory)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne babban masanin ka'idar kade-kade na farko a duniyar Larabawa da Musulunci sannan ya ba da shawarar kara igiya ta biyar a jikin 'ud (lute).

faq.question: Menene House of Wisdom?
faq.answer: Ta kasance babbar cibiyar ilimi lokacin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci a Baghdad. Masana daga asali daban-daban sun taru a can don fassarawa, nazari, da kuma kiyaye ilimi daga daukacin duniya, musamman daga hanyoyin Girka, Persia, da kuma India.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kwace dakin karatun Al-Kindi?
faq.answer: Kila hakan ya faru ne saboda hadakar makircin fada da rikicin akida. Al-Kindi yana da alaka da mazhabar Mu'tazilite mai amfani da hankali, wadda ta rasa goyon bayan Caliph al-Mutawakkil mai tsauraran ra'ayi, kuma abokan hamayyarsa sun yi amfani da wannan don bata masa suna.

faq.question: Menene frequency analysis a cikin cryptography?
faq.answer: Wata dabara ce ta cryptanalytic, wadda Al-Kindi ya fara amfani da ita don warware lambobin sirri, wadda ta hada da bincikar sau nawa haruffa ko rukunin haruffa ke bayyana a cikin rubutun sirri (ciphertext). Hanyar tana aiki ne saboda wasu haruffa (kamar 'E' a Turanci) suna bayyana akai-akai fiye da sauran a kowane harshe.

faq.question: Shin Al-Kindi ya mayar da hankali ne kawai a kan falsafar Girka?
faq.answer: A'a, duk da cewa ya shahara wajen shigo da falsafar Girka, ya kasance masani (polymath) wanda kuma ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga lissafi, likitanci, optics, ka'idar kade-kade, kuma ya kasance majagaba a fannin cryptanalysis.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Amol, Tabaristan (lardin Mazandaran na yanzu, Iran).
Ya bar gida yana da shekaru 12 don yin karatu a Rayy, sannan ya yi tafiya zuwa Baghdad.
Ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama a fadin Syria, Palestine, da kuma Egypt don tattara hadisai da rahotannin tarihi.
Ya zauna a dindindin a Baghdad, inda ya kwashe sauran rayuwarsa yana koyarwa da rubutu.
Ya kammala babban tarihin sa, watau 'Tarikh al-Rusul wa al-Muluk' (History of the Prophets and Kings).
Ya fuskanci tsangwama daga mazhabar Hanbali a Baghdad, wanda ya kai ga daure shi a gida (house arrest).
Ya mutu a Baghdad yana da shekaru kusan 83-84.

keyAchievements.title: History of the Prophets and Kings
keyAchievements.description: Babban tarihin duniya mai daki-daki tun daga halitta zuwa shekarar 915, wanda ke kiyaye hanyoyin bayanai na da marasa adadi.

keyAchievements.title: Tafsir al-Tabari
keyAchievements.description: Daya daqun mafi fadi da tasiri na sharhin Alkur'ani na farko, wanda ke tattara fassarori da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Jariri Madhhab
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa tashi mazhabar shari'ar Musulunci (fiqh) kodayake ba ta dade ba, wadda ta bambanta da manyan mazhabobin Sunni guda hudu.

faq.question: Me yasa 'History of the Prophets and Kings' dinsa yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Yana daya daqun babban tushe na bayanai na farko ga karni uku na farko na tarihin Musulunci, inda ya kiyaye rahotanni da hanyoyin bayanai wadanda da sun bace.

faq.question: Menene hanyar al-Tabari a matsayin masanin tarihi?
faq.answer: Ya fi amfani da tsarin isnad, wanda ya shahara a nazarin hadisi. Ya kawo sunayen mutanen da suka watsa rahoton na tarihi, wanda ya ba wa masana na baya damar auna amincin hanyoyinsa.

faq.question: Me yasa mazhabarsa ta shari'a (madhhab) ba ta tsira ba?
faq.answer: Ta fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga mazhabar Hanbali wadda ta fi karfi da tasiri a siyasa a Baghdad, wadda ba ta yarda da wasu fassarorinsa na shari'a ba sannan ta yi aiki tukuru don murkushe tasirinsa.

faq.question: Was al-Tabari Sunni or Shia?
faq.answer: Ana kallon al-Tabari a matsayin masanin Sunni. Duk da cewa ya kafa tashi mazhabar shari'a, ayyukansa na akida da na tarihi suna da karfi a cikin al'adar Sunni, kodayake masana na daukacin al'adu suna girmama shi saboda babban iliminsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Muhammad bin Dawud Chaghri.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Seljuk bayan mutuwar kawunsa, Tughril.
Ya kwace Ani, babban birnin Armenia, wanda ya fadada tasirin Seljuk zuwa Caucasus.
Ya sami nasara ta karshe a kan Daular Byzantine a Yakin Manzikert sannan ya kama Sarki Romanos IV Diogenes.
Wani fursuna ya ji masa rauni mai tsanani lokacin yakin soja a Transoxiana sannan ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka, inda dansa Malik-Shah I ya gaje shi.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a Yakin Manzikert (1071)
keyAchievements.description: Ya kayar da sojojin Byzantine wadanda suka fi yawansu yawa, inda ya kama Sarki Romanos IV Diogenes sannan ya bude Anatolia ga hijirar Turkish.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa Daular Seljuk
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada kabilun Turkoman daban-daban sannan ya fadada yankin daular, wanda ya kafa ta a matsayin mai iko a Gabas ta Tsakiya.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Fasaha da Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Karkashin jagorancin mai ba shi shawara Nizam al-Mulk, ya goyi bayan kafa makarantun 'Nizamiyya', wanda ya bunkasa zamanin ci gaban ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran Alp Arslan 'Zaki Mai Karfin Zuciya'?
faq.answer: Alp Arslan suna ne na girmamawa na Turkic. 'Alp' na nufin 'gwarzo' ko 'mai karfin zuciya,' kuma 'Arslan' na nufin 'zaki.' Sunan yana nuna kyakkyawan sunansa na matsayin shugaban soja mai zafi da karfin zuciya.

faq.question: Shin yana da niyyar cin Anatolia da yaki ne?
faq.answer: Most historians believe his primary goal was to secure his borders and counter the Fatimid Caliphate in Egypt. The victory at Manzikert was an unexpected opportunity that led to the gradual Turkification of Anatolia, rather than a premeditated invasion.

faq.question: Yaya Alp Arslan ya mutu?
faq.answer: Lokacin yakin soja a Transoxiana, wani kwamandan sansanin yaki da aka kama mai suna Yussuf al-Khwarizmi, lokacin da aka kawo shi gabansa don yanke masa hukunci, ya afka wa Sultan da wuka a boye, wanda ya ji masa rauni mai tsanani da ya kai ga mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Constantinople (Istanbul ta yanzu) a cikin dangi mai dukiya mai alaka da fadar Ottoman.
An ce ya yi mafarkin Annabi Muhammad, wanda ya fassara shi a matsayin alama ta Allah don fara rayuwar tafiye-tafiye.
Ya fara tafiyarsa ta farko mai girma a wajen Constantinople, wanda ke nuna farkon tafiye-tafiye masu yawa na tsawon shekaru arba'in.
Ya yi tafiye-tafiye da dama a daukacin yankunan Daular Usmaniyya a Anatolia, Rumelia, Levant, Egypt, da kuma kasashe makwabta da suka hada da Persia, Austria, da kuma Russia.
Ya mutu, kodayake ba a san ainihin ranar da kuma wurin ba. Ana amanna cewa ya mutu ne a Constantinople ko Alkahira, bayan ya kammala Seyahatname dinsa mai kashi 10.

keyAchievements.title: Seyahatname (Book of Travels)
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin tafiya mai kashi 10 wanda ke bayyana shekaru 40 na tafiye-tafiye, wanda ke samar da babban hoton duniyar Ottoman ta karni na 17.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin Ethnography da Harshe na Majagaba
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta harsuna daban-daban, karin harshe (dialects), al'adu, da al'adun jama'a a cikin yanki mai fadin kasa, da yawa a karon farko.

keyAchievements.title: Cikakken Rahoto na Kasa da Al'umma
keyAchievements.description: Aikinsa yana samar da bayani mai daki-daki kan birane, gine-gine, hanyoyin kasuwanci, da tsarin al'umma, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi babban tushe ga masana tarihi.

faq.question: Shin daukacin abubuwan da ke cikin Seyahatname gaskiya ne?
faq.answer: Ba duka ba. Kodayake yana da matukar mahimmanci a tarihi, Evliya galibi yana kara gishiri a cikin labarai, yana shigar da tatsuniyoyi, sannan wani lokaci yana bayyana jita-jita a matsayin gaskiya, yana hada gaskiya da tunani.

faq.question: Yaya ya sami kudin tafiyarsa?
faq.answer: Ya fito ne daga dangi mai dukiya sannan galibi yana tafiya ne a matsayin bangare na tafiyar jami'ai ga gwamnoni da pashas, yana aiki a matsayin abokin tafiya, liman, ko mai aika sako, wanda hakan ya ba shi kariya da kayan aiki.

faq.question: Yaya girman Seyahatname yake?
faq.answer: Ya kunshi manyan littattafai guda goma. Kowanne littafi galibi yana rufe wani lokaci na musamman ko yankin kasa na tafiyarsa, kamar Littafi na Farko (Volume I) a kan Istanbul ko kuma Littafi na Goma (Volume X) a kan Egypt da Sudan.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kolozsvár (Cluj-Napoca ta yanzu, Romania).
Aka kama shi lokacin wani rikici sannan aka kawo shi Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya shiga addinin Musulunci.
Ya shiga cikin rundunar Muteferrika, yana aiki a matsayin jakada ga Sultan.
Ya mika bayaninsa, watau 'Vesiletü't-Tıbâa' (The Usefulness of Printing), ga babban mai ba da shawara (Grand Vizier).
Ya sami fatawa da umarnin sarki daga Sultan Ahmed III, wanda ke ba shi damar buga ayyukan da ba na addini ba.
Ya buga littafi na farko daga injin buga littattafansa, watau 'Vankulu Lugati', kamus na Larabci da Turkish mai kashi biyu.
Ya buga 'Cihannuma' na Katip Celebi, babban aiki na labarin kasa (geography), ciki har da sababbin taswirori da ya zana da kansa.
Ya mutu a Constantinople (Istanbul). Injin buga littattafansa ya buga littattafai daban-daban 17 a wannan lokacin.

keyAchievements.title: Injin Buga Littattafai na Ottoman na Hukumance na Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa injin buga littattafai na farko tare da haruffan Larabci masu motsi wanda gwamnatin Ottoman ta amince da shi a hukumance a shekarar 1727.

keyAchievements.title: Buga Muhimman Ayyuka na Zamani (Secular Works)
keyAchievements.description: Ya buga muhimman ayyuka 17 a kan tarihi, labarin kasa, da harshe, ciki har da shahararren kamus na 'Vankulu Lugati' da kuma taswirar 'Cihannuma'.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Cartography na Zamani
keyAchievements.description: Ya zana sannan ya buga wasu taswirori na farko na zamani a Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya sabunta ilimin labarin kasa.

faq.question: Me yasa aka shigo da buga littattafai da haruffan Larabci a makare haka a Daular Usmaniyya?
faq.answer: An fuskanci adawa mai karfi daga dubban marubuta (calligraphers) wadanda suka kalli hakan a matsayin barazana ga hanyar samun abincinsu, da kuma ra'ayin addini na rikau wanda ke tsoron buga Alkur'ani da sauran littattafan addini ta hanyar inji.

faq.question: Shin Muteferrika ne na farko da ya fara buga littattafai a Daular Usmaniyya?
faq.answer: A'a. Al'ummar da ba musulmai ba (Yahudawa, Armenian, Greek) sun gudanar da nasu injina na tsawon karni da dama, amma na Muteferrika shi ne injin buga littattafai na farko da musulmi ke gudanarwa kuma Sultan ya amince da shi a hukumance don bugawa da harshen Ottoman Turkish ta amfani da rubutun Larabci.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da injin buga littattafansa bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Injin buga littattafan ya daina aiki jim kadan bayan mutuwarsa a shekarar 1745 sannan aka dawo da shi bayan shekaru da dama, wanda ke nuna cewa kokarinsa na kashin kansa da kuma goyon baya na babban matsoron sarki ne suka tsaya a bayan aikin farko.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Kavala, Ottoman Rumelia (Greece ta yanzu).
Ya jagoranci sojojin Egypt a Yakin Ottoman-Saudi, inda ya kayar da Daular Saudi ta Farko.
Ya jagoranci dakarun Egypt a Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Greek (Greek War of Independence), inda ya ci Morea da yaki.
Sojojin ruwansa sun lalace sakamakon hadakar dakarun Turai a Yakin Navarino.
Ya jagoranci Yakin Farko na Egyptian-Ottoman, inda ya ci Syria da yaki sannan ya ci gaba zuwa Anatolia.
Ya kayar da sojojin Ottoman gaba daya a Yakin Konya.
Dakarun Turai sun tilasta masa janyewa daga Syria karkashin Yarjejeniyar London (Convention of London).
Ya zama shugaba na riko (regent) ga mahaifinsa mara lafiya, amma ya mutu sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis) bayan 'yan watanni kacal.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanantar da Sojojin Egypt
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya sojojin Egypt zuwa rundunar soja ta zamani irin ta Turai, wanda ya mayar da ita daya daqun mafi karfi a yankin.

keyAchievements.title: Cin Syria da Yaki da Gudanarwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi nasarar mamaye da kuma gudanar da Greater Syria na tsawon kusan shekaru goma, inda ya aiwatar da manyan gyare-gyare na gudanarwa da na shari'a.

keyAchievements.title: Kaye Daular Saudi ta Farko
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci yakin soja da ya murkushe Daular Saudi ta Farko karkashin jagorancin Wahhabi sannan ya sake kwace birane masu tsarki na Mecca da Medina ga Sultan na Ottoman.

faq.question: Shin Ibrahim Pasha dan Muhammad Ali ne na gaske ko kuwa dan riko?
faq.answer: Duk da cewa wasu bayanai na farko na Turai sun ce dan riko ne, nazarin zamani ya tabbatar da cewa shi ne dan na farko na gaske na Muhammad Ali tare da matarsa ta farko.

faq.question: Me yasa bai samu nasarar kwace Constantinople ba a shekarar 1832?
faq.answer: Bayan nasararsa a Konya, hanyar zuwa babban birnin Ottoman ta kasance bude, amma matsin lamba na diflomasiyya da kuma shiga sojoji daga Russia, sannan Birtaniya da Faransa, sun tilasta masa tsayar da tafiyarsa.

faq.question: Yaya ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a watan Nuwamba shekarar 1848 sakamakon cutar huhu (tuberculosis), watanni kadan kacal bayan nada shi shugaba na riko sannan shekara daya kafin mutuwar mahaifinsa, Muhammad Ali.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Cordoba, Al-Andalus (Spain ta yanzu).
An nada shi qadi (alkali) a Seville.
Ya zama babban likita ga caliph na Almohad Abu Yaqub Yusuf a Marrakesh.
Ya rasa goyon bayan siyasa, inda aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Lucena, sannan aka haramta tare da kona ayyukansa na falsafa.
An dawo da shi daga gudun hijira sannan aka maido masa da mutuncinsa jim kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
Ya mutu a Marrakesh, Morocco.

keyAchievements.title: Sharhi a kan Aristotle
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta sharhi masu yawa wadanda suka sake shigo da kuma bayyana ayyukan Aristotle ga masana na Musulunci, Yahudawa, da kuma Kirista.

keyAchievements.title: The Incoherence of the Incoherence
keyAchievements.description: Bayani mai daki-daki don karyata sukar falsafa ta Al-Ghazali, yana kare amfani da hankali da Aristotelianism a cikin tsarin Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Kulliyat fi al-Tibb (Generalities on Medicine)
keyAchievements.description: Babban encyclopedia na likitanci wanda aka yi amfani da shi sosai a matsayin littafin karatu a Turai na tsawon karni da dama, wanda aka sani da Latin a matsayin 'Colliget'.

keyAchievements.title: Fasl al-Maqal (The Decisive Treatise)
keyAchievements.description: Littafin falsafa wanda ke kokarin tabbatar da daidaituwa tsakanin nassoshin Musulunci da falsafar Aristotle.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'The Commentator'?
faq.answer: Dante Alighieri ya ba shi wannan lakabin a cikin 'The Divine Comedy'. Hakan ya faru ne saboda bincikensa daki-daki na ayyukan Aristotle da aka kalla a matsayin fassarori na karshe a Turai na tsawon karni, wanda ya tsara medieval scholasticism sosai.

faq.question: Menene ka'idar 'double truth' da ake yawan danganta ta da shi?
faq.answer: Yana zama ra'ayi na cewa za a iya isa ga gaskiya daya ta hanyar falsafa (hankali) sannan gaskiya guda ta hanyar addini (wahayi), kuma duka biyun za su iya kasancewa masu inganci koda suna cin karo da juna. Averroes da kansa ya yi maganar gaskiya guda daya wadda za a iya isa gare ta ta hanyoyi daban-daban, amma wasu mabiya Latin masu tsauraran ra'ayi sun samar da wannan ra'ayi cikin cece-kuce.

faq.question: Shin ya rubuta game da falsafa ne kadai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske. Ya yi aiki a matsayin alkali (qadi) mai daraja a Seville da Cordoba, ya kasance likitan fada, sannan ya rubuta ayyuka masu tasiri a kan likitanci, astronomy, lissafi, da kuma shari'ar Musulunci.

timeline.event: An haife shi kusa da Bukhara, Transoxiana (Uzbekistan ta yanzu).
Ya warkar da emir na Samanid Nuh ibn Mansur, wanda ya ba shi damar shiga dakin karatun sarki.
Ya fara rayuwar yawo bayan rushewar daular Samanid.
Ya kammala babban aikinsa, watau 'The Canon of Medicine' (Al-Qanun fi'l-Tibb).
Ya kammala encyclopedia na falsafa, watau 'The Book of Healing' (Kitab al-Shifa).
Ya mutu a Hamadan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).

keyAchievements.title: The Canon of Medicine
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wannan encyclopedia na likitanci mai kashi biyar wanda ya zama littafin likitanci na yau da kullum a Turai da duniyar Musulunci na tsawon karni.

keyAchievements.title: The Book of Healing
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta wannan encyclopedia na falsafa da kimiyya mai girma, wanda ya hada da dabara (logic), kimiyyar dabi'a, kwakwalwa (psychology), da metaphysics.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Aromatherapy
keyAchievements.description: Ya tsara amfani da mayukan gida (essential oils) don dalilai na warkewa, inda ya samar da tsarin steam distillation.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Gwiwa na Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya hada Aristotelianism da akidar Musulunci, wanda ya samar da tsarin falsafa mai fadi wanda ya yi tasiri a kan masana na Musulunci da na Turai na baya.

faq.question: Shin Avicenna likita ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske, wanda ya ba da babban gudunmawa ga falsafa, astronomy, dabara, lissafi, da waka, baya ga likitanci.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ne ya hadace Alkur'ani kafin shekaru 10?
faq.answer: Bayanai na tarihi sun ce ya kasance yaro mai hazaka ta musamman wanda ya hadace Alkur'ani gaba daya tun yana da shekaru 10.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Avicenna?
faq.answer: 'Avicenna' ita ce siffar Latin ta sunan Larabci na mahaifinsa, watau 'Ibn Sina' (Dan Sina).

timeline.event: An haife shi a Murcia, al-Andalus (Spain ta yanzu).
Iyalinsa sun koma Seville, babban cibiyar al'adu da ilimi.
Ya sami sauyin ruhaniya mai zurfi sannan ya fara tafiyarsa a kan hanyar Sufi.
Ya bar yankin Iberian gaba daya, wanda ya fara tafiye-tafiye masu yawa.
Ya isa Mecca, inda ya sami wahayi da dama sannan ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa, watau 'The Meccan Illuminations' (Al-Futuhat al-Makkiyya).
Ya zauna a dindindin a Damascus, wadda ta zama gindin ayyukansa na koyarwa da rubutu.
Ya kammala 'The Bezels of Wisdom' (Fusus al-Hikam), aiki mai gajarta da tasiri sosai a kan falsafarsa ta sufanci.
Ya mutu a Damascus sannan aka binne shi a kasan Tsaunin Qasioun.

keyAchievements.title: The Meccan Illuminations (Al-Futuhat al-Makkiyya)
keyAchievements.description: Babban aikinsa, wani babban encyclopedia na ilimin sirri na Musulunci, metaphysics, da kuma cosmology.

keyAchievements.title: The Bezels of Wisdom (Fusus al-Hikam)
keyAchievements.description: Gajeren bayani na koyarwarsa ta sufanci kan dabi'ar annabawa, wanda ake kallo a matsayin ginshikin tunanin Sufi.

keyAchievements.title: Wahdat al-Wujud (The Unity of Being)
keyAchievements.description: Ya bayyana koyarwar metaphysics mai tasiri cewa daukacin wanzuwa gaskiya ce guda daya dunkulalliya, wadda take nuna bayyanar Allah.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'al-Shaykh al-Akbar'?
faq.answer: Yana nufin 'Babban Malami' (the Greatest Master) ko 'Babban Sheikh' a harshen Larabci. Lakabi ne na girmamawa da tsararraki na baya na Sufaye da masana suka ba shi saboda babban tasirinsa.

faq.question: Me yasa koyarwar Ibn Arabi ta kasance mai cike da cece-kuce?
faq.answer: Koyarwarsa ta 'Wahdat al-Wujud' (Unity of Being) wani lokaci ana fassara ta cikin kuskure a matsayin pantheism (cewa Allah shi ne sararin samaniya), wanda ya kai ga zargin bidi'a daga masana masu bin ma'anar zahiri ko na rikau.

faq.question: Shin Ibn Arabi dan Sunni ne ko kuwa Shia?
faq.answer: Ana kallon sa a matsayin musulmi dan Sunni wanda ya bi mazhabar shari'a ta Zahiri lokacin kuruciyarsa. Sai dai, koyarwarsa tana da zurfin gaske ta sufanci (esoteric) kuma galibi tana wuce iyakokin bangaranci, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan masana na al'adun Sunni da na Shia.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ardabil.
Ya shiga boye a Lahijan bayan an kashe mahaifinsa da yayansa.
Ya ci Tabriz da yaki sannan aka nada shi Shah na Azerbaijan yana da shekaru 14.
Ya zama Shah na Iran a hukumance. Ya mayar da Twelver Shi'ism ta zama addinin kasa.
Ya kayar da Uzbeks a Yakin Merv, wanda ya kare iyakarsa ta gabas.
Ya fuskanci kashi na karshe yaki da Daular Usmaniyya a Yakin Chaldiran.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 36.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Daular Safavid
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa Daular Safavid, inda ya sake kafa daular gida ta Iranian wadda za ta yi mulki na tsawon karni biyu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Twelver Shi'ism
keyAchievements.description: Ya mayar da Twelver Shi'ism ta zama addinin kasa na hukumance na Iran, wani yanke shawara da ya tsara asalin addini da na kasa na Iran gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Kan Iran
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar yakokin soja, ya kawo yankuna daban-daban na plateau na Iran karkashin mulki guda daya na tsakiya a karon farko cikin karni da dama.

faq.question: Me yasa Ismail I yake da matukar mahimmanci ga tarihin Iran?
faq.answer: Ya kafa daular Safavid, wadda ke nuna farkon tarihin Iran na zamani, ya hada kasar wuri daya, sannan ya kafa asalin Shi'a wanda ke bayyana Iran har zuwa yau.

faq.question: Menene Qizilbash?
faq.answer: Qizilbash ('Red Heads') sun kasance hadakar kabilun Turkoman masu aminci wadanda ke da cikakken biyayya ga tsarin Safaviyya sannan suka kasance ginshikin sojojin Ismail.

faq.question: Menene ya faru bayan Yakin Chaldiran?
faq.answer: Kashin da ya fuskanci ya rusa imanin Ismail a kan cewa ba za a iya kayar da shi ba. Bai sake jagorantar sojoji da kansa zuwa yaki ba, ya janye daga gudanar da mulki na zahiri, kuma an ce ya fara shan giya.

timeline.event: Haihuwar Zarathushtra a arewa maso gabashin Iran ko yankunan da ke makwabtaka. Ainihin ranar da kuma wurin suna da muhawara tsakanin masana.
Ya sami wahayinsa na farko daga Ahura Mazda da Amesha Spentas (halittu na Allah) lokacin wani biki kusa da kogi.
Ya kwashe shekaru goma yana wa'azin sabon hangen nesansa ba tare da babban nasara ba, inda ya fuskanci tsanantawa da watsarwa daga al'ummarsa.
Ya tafi fadar Sarki Vishtaspa a Bactria sannan ya sami nasarar shigar da shi addininsa, wanda ya samar masa da mai tallafi mai karfi ga bangaskiyarsa.
Mutuwar Zarathushtra. Al'ada ta nuna cewa wani firist mai hamayya ne ya kashe shi lokacin da yake yin addu'a a cikin haikalin wuta (fire temple).

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Zoroastrianism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa daya daqun addinan farko na duniya na monotheistic da aka saukar, wanda ke da tsakiya a kan allahn hikima guda daya, watau Ahura Mazda.

keyAchievements.title: Dualism na Tarbiyya (Ethical Dualism)
keyAchievements.description: Ya shigo da ra'ayin yakin sararin samaniya tsakanin mai kyau (Asha) da mummuna (Druj), inda ya ba bil'adama damar zabi da kansu.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan Addinan Abrahamic
keyAchievements.description: Ra'ayoyinsa a kan monotheism, sama, jahannama, hukunci na karshe, da kuma mutum mai ceto (savior figure) ana amanna cewa sun yi tasiri a kan Judaism, Christianity, da kuma Musulunci.

faq.question: Shin Zarathushtra daya yake da Zoroaster?
faq.answer: E. Zarathushtra shi ne suna a harshen Avestan, yayin da Zoroaster yake siffar fassarar harshen Girka (Greek transliteration), wadda ta fi shahara a cikin rubuce-rubucen Yamma.

faq.question: Shin Zoroastrianism ce addini na farko na monotheistic?
faq.answer: Ana kallon ta a matsayin daya daqun addinan farko na monotheistic da aka saukar, idan ma ba ita ce ta farko ba. Bunkasar ta ta rigayi ko kuma tana daidai da lokacin monotheism na Akhenaten a Egypt da kuma Judaism na farko.

faq.question: Menene Gathas?
faq.answer: Gathas tarin wakokin yabo ne guda 17, wadanda ake amanna cewa maganganun Zarathushtra ne da kansa. Suna samar da ainihin littafin mai tsarki na Zoroastrian, watau Avesta.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Asadabad, inda ainihin wurin haihuwarsa (Iran ko Afghanistan) yake batun muhawara ta tarihi.
Ya zama mai ba da shawara ga sarkin Afghanistan, wanda ke nuna farkon shigarsa cikin siyasar kasa.
Ya zauna a Egypt, inda ya yi tasiri a kan tsararraki na masana, ciki har da Muhammad Abduh, kafin a tura shi gudun hijira sakamakon matsin lamba na Birtaniya.
Ya kafa jaridar yaki da mulkin mallaka 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa' (The Firmest Bond) tare a Paris tare da Muhammad Abduh.
Ya yi aiki a Persia (Iran), inda adawarsa da ba wa Birtaniya ikon taba (tobacco concession) ta Shah ta kai ga korarsa sannan ta taimaka wajen tayar da Zanga-zangar Taba (Tobacco Protest).
Sultan Abdul Hamid II ya gayyace shi zuwa Istanbul, inda ya ci gaba da zama karkashin tallafi da sanya ido na Sultan.
Ya mutu sakamakon cutar daji (cancer) a Istanbul. Daga baya an mayar da gawarsa zuwa Afghanistan a shekarar 1944.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Pan-Islamism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kasance babban mai fada a kan hadin kan siyasa na daukacin Musulmai karkashin shugaba guda don yaki da mulkin mallaka na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Islamic Modernism
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi maganar sake fassara Musulunci ta yadda zai rungumi hankali da kimiyya ta zamani don farfado da al'ummomin musulmi.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Yaki da Mallaka (Anti-Imperialist Activism)
keyAchievements.description: Ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa da kalaman sa a daukacin duniyar Musulunci, ya zaburar da yunkurin yaki da mulkin mallaka da kishin kasa da dama.

faq.question: Was al-Afghani from Afghanistan or Iran?
faq.answer: His birthplace is disputed. He was likely born in Asadabad, Iran, to a Shia family, but he claimed to be from Asadabad, Afghanistan, and of Sunni background to have broader appeal in the predominantly Sunni Muslim world.

faq.question: Menene 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa'?
faq.answer: Ta kasance jarida ta yaki da mulkin mallaka wadda ba ta dade ba amma tana da matukar tasiri wadda ya buga ta tare da Muhammad Abduh a Paris. Ta bukaci hadin kan Musulunci, gyare-gyare, da kuma yaki da kasashen Turai, sannan aka haramta ta a yankunan da ke karkashin ikon Birtaniya kamar Egypt da India.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da Sultan Abdul Hamid II?
faq.answer: Sultan ya gayyace shi zuwa Istanbul don amfani da tasirinsa na Pan-Islamic don amfanin Daular Usmaniyya. Sai dai, alakar tana da sarkakiya; Sultan ya fara tsoron tsauraran ra'ayin al-Afghani sannan ya ajiye shi karkashin tsarewa a gida na zahiri har mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya yi aiki a Baghdad karkashin tallafin dangin Barmakid, viziers ga Caliph Harun al-Rashid.
Dangin Barmakid sun rasa mulki. An ce an tsare Jabir a gida a Kufa.
Ya mutu a Kufa (Iraq ta yanzu).
Ayyukansa, karkashin sunan Latin 'Geber,' an fassara su sannan sun fara tasiri sosai a kan alchemical da kimiyya na Turai.

keyAchievements.title: Gwaje-gwaje na Tsari (Systematic Experimentation)
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci tsarin gwaje-gwaje na zahiri ga alchemy, wanda ya kafa ginshikin chemistry ta zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkiro Kayan Aiki (Invention of Apparatus)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yaba masa da kera ko kuma inganta alembic still, mai matukar mahimmanci ga distillation, da kuma sauran kayan aiki na dakin gwaje-gwaje.

keyAchievements.title: Chemical Synthesis
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da hanyoyin farko da aka sani don samar da mineral acids kamar nitric acid, sulfuric acid, da aqua regia.

keyAchievements.title: Rarraba Abubuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da daya daqun tsarin farko na rarraba abubuwa na sinadarai (chemical substances) bisa ga dabi'unsu.

faq.question: Shin Jabir ibn Hayyan mutum ne na gaske a tarihi?
faq.answer: E, ana kallon sa a matsayin mutum na gaske. Sai dai, babban tarin ayyuka da ake danganta su da shi, watau 'Jabirian corpus', kila shi da kansa da kuma makarantar mabiya ne suka rubuta shi na tsawon karni daya.

faq.question: Shin ya kasance alchemist ne ko kuwa chemist?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mutum mai sauyin tsari. Duk da cewa ya yi aiki a cikin al'adar alchemical (misali, neman philosopher's stone), nacewarsa a kan gwaje-gwaje na tsari da za a iya maimaita su ya sanya shi zama babban ginshiki ga chemistry ta zamani.

faq.question: Menene 'matsalar Jabirian'?
faq.answer: Tana zama muhawara ta masana a kan marubucin dubban littattafai da ake dangantawa da Jabir. Yana da wuya a bambanta ayyukansa na gaske da wadanda aka rubuta daga baya ta hannun mabiyansa da sunansa.

faq.question: Menene kirkirarsa mafi mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Alembic still za a iya cewa ita ce kirkirarsa mafi tasiri. Ta sauya tsarin distillation gaba daya, wani muhimmin tsari don raba ruwaye wanda har yanzu yake da tsakiya ga chemistry da masana'antu yau.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Diyarbakir, Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya koma Istanbul don yin karatu sannan ya shiga cikin yunkurin juyin juya hali na Young Turk.
Ya zama babban mamba na Committee of Union and Progress (CUP) a Salonica, cibiyar ilimi ta yunkurin.
Ya fara buga rubuce-rubucensa masu tasiri a kan sociology da Turkism, wanda ya tsara akidar yunkurin.
Sojojin mamaya na Birtaniya sun kama shi sannan aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Malta tare da sauran shugabannin kishin kasa na Ottoman.
An sake shi daga gudun hijira sannan ya shiga yunkurin kishin kasa na Turkish a Ankara lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yanci.
Ya buga babban aikinsa, 'The Principles of Turkism' (Turkculugun Esaslari), wanda ya tsara akidarsa.
Ya mutu a Istanbul, jim kadan bayan kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey, wadda ra'ayoyinsa suka yi tasiri sosai a kanta.

keyAchievements.title: Tsara Kishin Kasa na Turkish a cikin Tsari
keyAchievements.description: Ana kallon sa a ko'ina a matsayin 'uban kishin kasa na Turkish' saboda hada ra'ayoyin Turkic daban-daban zuwa akida dunkulalliya da aka sani da Turkism.

keyAchievements.title: Tasiri a kan Gyare-gyaren Atatürk
keyAchievements.description: Ra'ayoyinsa a kan secularism, populism, da kishin kasa sun samar da tsarin ilimi kai-tsaye ga da yawa daqun gyare-gyaren ginshiki na Mustafa Kemal Atatürk.

keyAchievements.title: Bambanci tsakanin Al'ada (Culture) da Wayewa (Civilization)
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da wani muhimmin ra'ayi na sociology wanda ke bambanta 'al'ada' (ta kasa da ta ruhaniya) da kuma 'wayewa' (ta duniya da ta jiki), wanda ya jagoranci hanyar Turkey zuwa zamanantarwa.

faq.question: Shin Ziya Gokalp yana da addini?
faq.answer: Kodayake ya kasance babban mai fada a kan secular state inda aka raba addini da siyasa da doka, ya kalli Musulunci a matsayin bangare mai mahimmanci kuma mara rabuwa na al'adar kasa da asalin Turkish.

faq.question: Yaya alakar sa take da Atatürk?
faq.answer: Gokalp ya yi babban tasiri na ilimi a kan Atatürk. Atatürk ya dauki kuma ya aiwatar da da yawa daqun ra'ayoyin Gokalp a kan kishin kasa, secularism, da zamanantarwa lokacin kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey.

faq.question: Menene 'Turkism' kamar yadda Gokalp ya nuna?
faq.answer: Turkism, kamar yadda Gokalp ya bayyana ta, akida ce da ke inganta hadin kai na al'adu da na siyasa na mutanen Turkish. Tana jaddada harshe, tarihi, da al'ada na gama gari—ba wai yare ba—a matsayin ginshikin kasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a kauyen Pari, kusa da Malayer ta yanzu, ga kabilar Zand.
An kashe Nader Shah, wanda ya jefa Iran cikin yakin basasa. Karim Khan ya koma kasarsa sannan ya fara karfafa mulki.
Ya zama babban mai neman mulki a yammacin Iran bayan kafa hadaka ta mutum uku (tripartite alliance).
Ya kafa Shiraz a matsayin babban birninsa bayan ya kayar da daukacin abokan hamayyarsa sannan ya mallaki mafi yawan Iran. Ya karbi lakabin Vakil ol-Ro'aya (Regent of the People).
Mulkinsa yana da alamar zaman lafiya da wadata. Ya ba da umarnin gina manyan ayyukan gine-gine a Shiraz, ciki har da Arg na Karim Khan, Vakil Bazaar, da kuma Masallacin Vakil (Vakil Mosque).
Ya mutu sakamakon cuta ta dabi'a a Shiraz. Mutuwarsa ta haifar da rikicin gado wanda ya kai ga rushewar daular Zand.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Kan Iran
keyAchievements.description: Ya sake hada mafi yawan Iran bayan rikice-rikice na yakin basasa da suka biyo bayan mutuwar Nader Shah.

keyAchievements.title: Zamanin Zaman Lafiya da Wadata
keyAchievements.description: Ana tuna mulkinsa na kusan shekaru 30 a matsayin lokaci na musamman na kwanciyar hankali, adalci, da kuma bunkasar tattalin arziki ga mutanen Iran.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Fasaha da Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya babban birninsa, Shiraz, da manyan ayyukan gine-gine sannan ya inganta bunkasar fasaha da al'adu.

faq.question: Me yasa ya ki karbar lakabin 'Shah' (Sarki)?
faq.answer: Ya fi zaba lakabin 'Vakil ol-Ro'aya' (Regent of the People) don nuna cewa ikonsa ya fito ne daga kuma ana amfani da shi a madadin mutanensa, yana jaddada tsarin mulki mai tawali'u da adalci.

faq.question: Menene ginin sa da ya fi shahara?
faq.answer: Arg na Karim Khan, babban sansani (citadel) da ke tsakiyar Shiraz, wanda ya kasance masaukinsa da kuma cibiyar umarnin soja.

faq.question: Yaya daular Zand ta zo karshe?
faq.answer: Bayan mutuwar Karim Khan, magadansa marasa kwarewa sannan masu rikici sun raunana kasar, wanda ya ba wa Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar damar cin yankunansu da yaki sannan ya kafa daular Qajar.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Constantinople (Istanbul ta yanzu).
An nada shi a matsayin akawu a cikin tsarin kudi na sojojin daular a Anatolia.
Ya shiga cikin yakokin Ottoman yaki da Safavids a Persia, yana tafiya zuwa Baghdad da Hamadan.
Ya gaji babban dukiya, wadda ta ba shi damar barin aikin gwamnati sannan ya nemi rayuwar ilimi.
Ya fara tattara babban aikinsa na bibliographic, watau 'Kashf al-Zunun' (The Removal of Doubt from the Names of Books and Arts).
Ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa na labarin kasa, watau 'Jihannuma' (Mirror of the World).
Ya mutu a Constantinople, inda ya bar da yawa daqun manyan ayyukansa wadanda wasu suka kammala su.

keyAchievements.title: Kashf al-Zunun
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta babban encyclopedia na bibliographic wanda ke tsara littattafai sama da 14,500 da marubuta 9,500 a harsunan Larabci, Farsi, da Turkish.

keyAchievements.title: Jihannuma
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin labarin kasa na duniya (universal geography) mai ban mamaki wanda ke hada bayanan Musulunci da na Turai, wanda ya zama na farko a duniyar Ottoman.

keyAchievements.title: Fezleke
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara cikakken tarihin Ottoman daga shekarar 1592 zuwa 1655, wanda ya kasance muhimmin tushe na tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Mizan al-Haqq
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'The Balance of Truth,' tarin makaloli a kan batutuwan addini da tarbiyya masu cece-kuce, yana fada a kan tsarin amfani da hankali.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran sa Katip Celebi?
faq.answer: 'Katip' means 'scribe' or 'clerk,' reflecting his early career in the Ottoman bureaucracy. 'Çelebi' was an honorific title meaning 'gentleman' or 'man of God.' His real name was Mustafa ibn Abdullah.

faq.question: Menene ya sanya aikinsa 'Kashf al-Zunun' kasancewa mai matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Yana daya daqun mafi fadin aikin bibliographic na zamanin pre-modern, wanda ke samar da muhimman bayanai kan dubban littattafai da marubuta, wadanda da yawa a cikinsu yanzu sun bace ko kuma ba a cika samunsu ba.

faq.question: Shin Katip Celebi masanin tarihi ne kawai?
faq.answer: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske. Ya rubuta abubuwa da dama a kan labarin kasa, bibliography, tarbiyya, addini, da kimiyya, yana kokarin hada daukacin ilimin da ke akwai a zamaninsa.

faq.question: Yaya aikin sojansa ya shafi aikinsa?
faq.answer: Tafiye-tafiyensa lokacin yakin soja sun nuna masa yankuna daban-daban, al'adu, da dakunan karatu a fadin daular. Wannan kwarewa ta kai-tsaye, tare da asarar da ya gani, ta rura wutar burinsa na kiyaye da kuma tsara ilimi ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

timeline.event: An haife shi ga Sarki Darius I da Atossa, yar Cyrus Mai Girma.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Achaemenid bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Darius I.
Ya murkushe babban bore a Egypt, wanda ya tabbatar da ikonsa.
Ya murkushe bore da zafi a Babylon, inda ya kwace mutum-mutumi mai tsarki na Marduk.
Ya kaddamar da babban mamaya a Greece. Ya ci Yakin Thermopylae, ya lalata Athens, amma ya fuskanci kashi na karshe na sojojin ruwa a Yakin Salamis.
Sojojin Persian da aka bari a Greece karkashin janar dinsa Mardonius sun fuskanci kashi na karshe a Yakin Plataea, wanda ya kawo karshen mamayar.
Ya mayar da hankali a kan manyan ayyukan gine-gine, musamman a Persepolis da Susa, inda ya kammala gine-gine da dama wadanda mahaifinsa ya fara.
An kashe shi a wani makirci na fada karkashin jagorancin Artabanus, kwamandan dakarun tsaronsa na sarki.

keyAchievements.title: Murkushe Bore
keyAchievements.description: Ya samu nasarar kwantar da manyan bore a Egypt da Babylon a farkon mulkinsa, wanda ya tabbatar da karkon daular.

keyAchievements.title: Mamayar Greece
keyAchievements.description: Ya tara daya daqun sojoji mafi girma na kasashe daban-daban na duniyar da don yakin neman zabe yaki da kasashen birni na Greek.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan Ayyukan Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala da yawa daqun ayyukan gine-gine na mahaifinsa sannan ya fara nashi, wanda ya fadada kyakkyawan birnin Persepolis sosai.

faq.question: Me yasa ake yawan nuna Xerxes a matsayin mugu ko sarki mai zalunci?
faq.answer: Mafi yawan bayanan tarihi da suka tsira na mamayarsa a Greece masana na Greek (kamar Herodotus) wadanda suka ci nasara ne suka rubuta su, wadanda a dabi'ance suka kwatanta shi a matsayin abokin gaba mai zalunci da girman kai don daukaka nasarar tasu.

faq.question: Shin da gaske Xerxes ya gina gadar jiragen ruwa a daukacin Hellespont?
faq.answer: E, wannan babban aikin injiniyanci ne da aka rubuta shi sosai. Injiniyoyinsa sun hada daruruwan jiragen ruwa wuri daya don samar da gadoji na pontoon guda biyu, wanda ya ba wa manyan sojojinsa damar tsallakawa daga Asiya zuwa Turai.

faq.question: Menene addinin Xerxes?
faq.answer: Xerxes ya kasance mabiya Zoroastrianism, addinin kasa na Daular Achaemenid, wanda ke da tsakiya a kan bautar allahn koli guda daya, watau Ahura Mazda. Ya ambaci Ahura Mazda a cikin rubuce-rubucensa na sarauta.

faq.question: Yaya Xerxes ya mutu?
faq.answer: An kashe shi a shekarar 465 BCE a cikin dakin kwanansa a matsayin bangare na makircin fada. Kila makircin an tsara shi ne ta hannun Artabanus, kwamandan dakarun tsaronsa, wanda ya rike mulki na takaitaccen lokaci kafin dansa na Xerxes, Artaxerxes I ya hambarar da shi.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Harran, Upper Mesopotamia (Turkey ta yanzu).
Ya hadu da Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Shakir, wanda ya gayyace shi zuwa Baghdad don yin aiki a matsayin masani.
Ya shiga cikin rukunin masana a Baghdad, yana aiki karkashin tallafin Banu Musa da kuma daga baya Caliph al-Mu'tadid.
Ya samar da manyan fassarori na ayyukan Girka (Euclid's Elements, Ptolemy's Almagest) da kuma rubuce-rubucensa na asali a kan lissafi, astronomy, da mechanics.
Ya mutu a Baghdad, inda ya bar gado wanda dansa Sinan da jikansa Ibrahim suka ci gaba da shi.

keyAchievements.title: Fassara da Kiyaye Kimiyyar Girka
keyAchievements.description: Ya fassara rubuce-rubucen Girka na ginshiki ta hannun Euclid, Archimedes, Apollonius, da Ptolemy zuwa harshen Larabci, wanda ya sanya su kasance masu saukin shiga ga duniyar Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Trepidation
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da shawarar ka'idar motsin equinoxes don bayyana bambancin da ake gani a cikin precession rate.

keyAchievements.title: Gudunmawa ga Ka'idar Lambobi (Number Theory)
keyAchievements.description: Ya gano wata theorem don gano nau'ikan amicable numbers, wanda ya fadada aikin mutanen Girka na da.

keyAchievements.title: Ginshikin Statics
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'Kitab fi'l-qarastun' (The Book of the Steelyard), babban aiki a kan mechanics da kuma ka'idojin levers da daidaito (equilibrium).

faq.question: Wani addini ne Thabit ibn Qurra ya bi?
faq.answer: Ya kasance mamba na kungiyar addini ta Sabian daga Harran, kungiyar arna ta Hellenistic wadda ke girmama taurari da jikin sama (celestial bodies). Wannan galibi yana haifar da rikici da hukumomin Musulunci na rikau.

faq.question: Menene amicable numbers?
faq.answer: Amicable numbers wasu lambobi ne guda biyu daban-daban wadanda ke da alaka ta yadda hadin gwiwar rarraba na kowanne ya kasance daidai da daya lambar. Dokar Thabit tsari ne na gaba daya wanda ya taimaka wajen gano irin wadannan lambobi.

faq.question: Shin ka'idarsa ta trepidation daidai ce?
faq.answer: A'a, ka'idar trepidation daga baya an musanya ta da fahimta mai inganci ta uniform precession. Sai dai, ta kasance yunkuri mai mahimmanci da tasiri don bayyana bambance-bambancen lura na zamaninsa.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin Fátimih Baraghání a Qazvin, Persia.
Ta zama daya daqun mabiya farko na Bab, inda aka amince da ita a matsayin Wasika ta 17 ta Rayayyu (17th Letter of the Living).
Ta halarci Taron Badasht, inda ta cire lullubinta (veil), wanda ke nuna rabuwa da baya.
An sanya ta karkashin tsarewa a gida (house arrest) saboda koyarwarta mai tasiri.
An kashe ta ta hanyar shake ta a wani lambu da ke Tehran saboda bangaskiyarta ta Babi.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Feminism na Majagaba
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama daya daqun manyan masu fada a kan hakkin mata a Gabas ta Tsakiya, tana kalubalantar ka'idojin addini da na al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Masanin Akida na Babi
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance mace daya tilo da aka nada a matsayin 'Letter of the Living,' mabiya farko na Bab, wadda ta tsara akidar Babi ta farko.

keyAchievements.title: Mawaƙiya Mai Tasiri
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta wakoki masu karfi na ruhaniya da na juyin juya hali wadanda ke ci gaba da zaburar da masu karatu da masu fada yau.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kiran ta Tahirih?
faq.answer: An ba ta lakabin 'Tahirih' (mai nufin 'Mai Tsarki') a Taron Badasht, wanda ya amince da matsayinta na ruhaniya da tsarkin ruhi. Hanyoyin bayanai sun danganta ba da lakabin ko dai ga Bab ko kuma Baha'u'llah.

faq.question: Shin ta taba haduwa da Bab da kanta?
faq.answer: A'a, ba ta taba haduwa da Bab ba. Daukacin alakar tasu ta kasance ta hanyar wasiku da rahotannin sauran mabiya ne, duk da akka ta zama daya daqun shahararrun mabiyansa.

faq.question: Menene mahimmancin cire lullubinta?
faq.answer: A kasar Persia ta karni na 19, mace ta bayyana ba tare da lullubi ba a gaban maza ya kasance mataki mai zafi da ban tsoro. Ya nuna rabuwa da gangan da dokar Musulunci da al'ada, yana shelanta sabbin dokokin ruhaniya da na al'umma na tsarin Babi, wadanda suka hada da daidaito mai girma tsakanin maza da mata.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin Muhammad bin Suleyman, wataƙila a yankin kasar Iraq ta yanzu (Karbala ko Hillah).
Ya sami ilimi mai zurfi, inda ya kware a harsunan Azerbaijani, Farsi, da Larabci, tare da theology da lissafi.
Daular Usmaniyya karkashin Suleiman the Magnificent ta kwace Baghdad daga hannun Safavids, wanda ya sauya tsarin siyasa na rayuwar Fuzuli.
Ya rubuta babban aikinsa, watau wakar tarihi ta soyayya 'Leylâ vü Mecnûn' (Layla da Majnun) a harshen Azerbaijani Turkic.
Ya rubuta shahararren 'Şikâyetnâme' (The Book of Complaint), aikin zantuka na barkwanci yana nuna adawa da rashin samun kudin tallafi na gwamnati da aka yi masa alkawari.
Ya mutu lokacin bullar cutar annoba a Karbala, inda yake aiki a matsayin mai kula da masallacin Imam Husayn.

keyAchievements.title: Divans a Harsuna Uku
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta manyan tarin wakoki (divans) a harsunan Azerbaijani, Farsi, da Larabci, wanda ke nuna gwanintarsa ta harshe da waka da ba ta da tsara.

keyAchievements.title: Leylâ vü Mecnûn
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta siffar Azerbaijani ta musamman ta shahararren labarin soyayya na Gabas ta Tsakiya, wanda ya zama ginshikin adabin Turkic.

keyAchievements.title: Majagaba na Harshen Adabi na Azerbaijani
keyAchievements.description: Ya daga harshen Azerbaijani Turkic zuwa babban matsayi na adabi, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tsararraki na mawaƙa a daukacin duniyar Turkic.

faq.question: Me yasa ya zabi sunan bogi 'Fuzûlî'?
faq.answer: Ya zabi shi ne saboda ya yi amanna cewa babu wani da zai so shi, wanda ya tabbatar da keɓantuwarsa. Sunan yana da ma'anar daban-daban, ciki har da 'mara ladabi' ko 'mara mahimmanci,' amma kuma yana iya nuna inganci mafi girma, wanda ke nuna siffarsa ta fasaha mai sarkakiya.

faq.question: Menene aikinsa mafi shahara?
faq.answer: Aikinsa da aka fi girmamawa shi ne 'Leylâ vü Mecnûn' (Layla da Majnun), wakar tarihi da ke ba da labarin soyayya mai ban tausayi wadda ta wuce duniyar jiki, yana hada sha'awar duniya da sufanci.

faq.question: Shin Fuzûlî dan Sufaye ne?
faq.answer: Kodayake bai shiga cikin wani tsari na Sufi na musamman a hukumance ba, wakokinsa suna da zurfin ra'ayoyin Sufanci, kamar bacewar kai a cikin Allah (fana), radadin rabuwa da Masoyi (Allah), da kuma amfani da soyayya da giya a matsayin alama ga jin dadin ruhaniya.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Paj, kauye kusa da Tus a Khorasan, Daular Sasanian (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya fara rubuta Shahnameh, aikin rayuwarsa, don kiyaye tarihi da tatsuniyoyi na Persia.
Ya kammala fasalin farko na Shahnameh sannan ya gabatar da ita ga Sultan Mahmud na Ghazni, wanda ya biya shi kudi kalilan.
Ya mutu a garinsu na Tus, an ce a cikin talauci, amma ya bar aikin da zai bayyana al'adar Farsi gaba daya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Shahnameh
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da 'Shahnameh' (Book of Kings), wakar tarihi mafi tsawo a duniya ta marubuci guda daya, wadda take da tsakiya ga al'ada da asalin Farsi.

keyAchievements.title: Farfado da Harshen Farsi
keyAchievements.description: Amfani da harshen Farsi da ya kusan yi a cikin Shahnameh ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen farfado da daidaita harshen bayan tsawon karni na ikon Larabci.

faq.question: Me yasa Shahnameh take da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Ta kasance wakar tarihi ta kasa ta Greater Iran, tana kiyaye tatsuniyoyinta, tarihin kafin Musulunci, da harshe. Ana kallon ta a matsayin babban aikin adabi na duniya da kuma ginshikin asalin Farsi.

faq.question: Shin Ferdowsi mai dukiya ne?
