faq.answer: A'a. Duk da asalin sarautarsa, ya kwashe dukiyar iyalinsa a kan aikinsa sannan, kamar yadda tatsuniya ta nuna, ya mutu a cikin talauci bayan mai goyon bayansa, Sultan Mahmud ya watsar da shi.

faq.question: Yaya tsawon Shahnameh yake?
faq.answer: Ta kunshi ma'aurata na waka (rhyming couplets) sama da 50,000, wanda ya mayar da ita fiye da ninki biyu na tsawon Iliad da Odyssey na Homer a hade.

timeline.event: An haifi Ahmed Muhiddin Piri a Gallipoli, Daular Usmaniyya.
Ya fara aikinsa na jirgin ruwa, yana tafiya tare da kawunsa, admiral Kemal Reis.
Ya tattara taswirar duniya ta farko, wadda aka fi sani da taswirar Piri Reis, sannan ya gabatar da ita ga Sultan Selim I.
Ya kammala 'Kitab-ı Bahriye' (Book of Navigation), cikakken taswirar Tekun Mediterranean.
Ya samar da taswirar duniya ta biyu, wadda yanki kalilan dinta da ke nuna Tsakiya da Arewacin Amurka ya tsira.
An nada shi a matsayin Reis (Admiral) na sojojin ruwa na Ottoman a Tekun Indian Ocean.
An kashe shi a Alkahira a kan zargin cin amana da karbar hanci bayan kewaye Hormuz.

keyAchievements.title: The Piri Reis Map of 1513
keyAchievements.description: Daya daqun taswirorin duniya mafi tsufa da suka tsira da ke nuna kasashen Amurka, wadda aka sani saboda cikakken bayani da kuma hanyoyin bayanai na sirri.

keyAchievements.title: Kitab-ı Bahriye (Book of Navigation)
keyAchievements.description: Cikakken taswirar ruwa na Mediterranean, wanda ke dauke da cikakkun taswirori, bayanin tashar jiragen ruwa, da hanyoyin tafiya.

faq.question: Yaya ingancin taswirar Piri Reis yake?
faq.answer: Taswirar tana da inganci kwarai ga zamaninta game da iyakokin teku na Turai da Arewacin Afirka. Bayaninta na kasashen Amurka da wani yanki na kudu da ake zargi (Antarctica) batun muhawara ne mai zafi da tunani tsakanin masana tarihi da na taswira.

faq.question: Me yasa aka kashe Piri Reis?
faq.answer: An kashe shi a kan zargin cin amana da karbar hanci bayan ya janye kewaye birnin Hormuz na Portuguese sannan ya koma Egypt da dakarunsa, wani mataki da abokan gabansa na siyasa suka fassara a matsayin guduwa da rashawa.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar 'Reis'?
faq.answer: "Reis" lakabi ne na Turkish, daidai da kyaftin ko admiral. Ainihin sunan Piri Reis shi ne Ahmed Muhiddin Piri.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Rayy (Iran ta yanzu).
Ya zama Caliph na biyar na Abbasid bayan mutuwar dan uwansa al-Hadi.
Ya kafa ko kuma ya fadada House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) sosai a Baghdad.
Ya kaddamar da babban yakin soja yaki da Daular Byzantine, inda ya isa Bosporus.
Ya raba gadon daular tsakanin 'ya'yansa maza, al-Amin da al-Ma'mun, wanda ya kafa fagen rikicin gaba.
Ya ba da umarnin kama dangi mai karfi na Barmakid, wanda ya kawo karshen tasirinsu a fada.
Ya mutu a Tus (Khorasan, Iran ta yanzu) lokacin da yake kan tafiyar soja don kwantar da bore.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa House of Wisdom
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa 'Bayt al-Hikma' a Baghdad, babban dakin karatu da cibiyar fassara wanda ya zama cibiyar Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasar Al'adu da Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Mulkinsa ya ga ci gaba da ba a taba gani ba a kimiyya, likitanci, lissafi, da falsafa, wanda ya janyo masana daga daukacin duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Alakar Diflomasiyya da Charlemagne
keyAchievements.description: Ya kaddamar da daya daqun manyan canje-canje na diflomasiyya na farko tsakanin duniyar Musulunci da Yammacin Turai, ciki har da shahararriyar kyautar giwa mai suna Abul-Abbas.

faq.question: Shin Harun al-Rashid ya kasance kamar siffarsa a cikin 'Duniya Dubu da Daya' (One Thousand and One Nights)?
faq.answer: Labaran na bogi ne da kuma kayatarwa. Kodayake an san ni da yawo a kan titunan Baghdad a boye don koyo game da mutanena, labaran ban mamaki kirkirar adabi ne wadanda ke nuna wadatar zamanina.

faq.question: Menene House of Wisdom?
faq.answer: Ta kasance babbar cibiyar ilimi lokacin mulkina a Baghdad. Ta fara ne a matsayin dakin karatuna na kashin kansa amma ta zama jami'a ta jama'a da cibiyar fassara inda aka fassara rubuce-rubucen Girka, Farsi, da na India zuwa Larabci, yana kiyaye da kuma fadada ilimi.

faq.question: Me yasa dangin Barmakid suka rasa iko?
faq.answer: Barmakids, viziers dina da na amince da su, sun tara babban iko da dukiya. Rushewarsu ba zato ba tsammani a shekarar 803 kila ya faru ne saboda burina na karfafa ikona da kuma rage tasirinsu, kodayake ainihin dalilan sun kasance batun muhawara ta tarihi.

timeline.event: An haifi Shams-ud-Din Mohammad Hafez-e Shirazi a Shiraz, Persia.
Daular Muzaffarid ta kwace Shiraz, wanda ya shafi matsayin Hafez da goyon bayansa a fada.
Shah Shuja, mai tallafa wa waka, ya maido da Hafez ga matsayinsa a fada bayan lokacin rashin goyon baya.
Ya sake rasa goyon baya kuma kila ya shiga lokacin gudun hijira daga Shiraz.
Timur (Tamerlane) ya ci Shiraz da yaki. Shahararren taro, kodayake kila na bogi ne, ya faru tsakanin mawaƙin da mai cin kasa da yaki.
Ya mutu a Shiraz sannan aka binne shi a Musalla Gardens. Kabarinsa yanzu ya zama alamar kasa da kuma wurin ziyara.

keyAchievements.title: The Divan of Hafez
keyAchievements.description: Tarin wakokinsa, musamman a cikin tsarin ghazal, ana kallon sa a matsayin kololuwar adabin Farsi da kuma alamar al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Kwarewar Ghazal
keyAchievements.description: Ya inganta tsarin waka na lyric na Farsi, watau ghazal, inda ya cika shi da zurfin sufanci da kuma matakan ma'ana da ba a taba gani ba.

keyAchievements.title: Alamar Al'ada ta Dauwama
keyAchievements.description: Ana amfani da wakokinsa don duba (Fal-e Hafez) sannan ta kasance da tsakiya ga al'ada, ilimi, da asalin Iran.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunan 'Hafez'?
faq.answer: Suna ne na bogi mai nufin 'Mai Hadace Alkur'ani' (The Memorizer) ko 'Mai Tsaro,' wanda a al'adance ake ba wa wanda ya hadace daukacin Alkur'ani da rai.

faq.question: Shin wakarsa a kan soyayyar duniya ce ko kuwa soyayya ta Allah?
faq.answer: Tana da sarkakiya shahararriya. Kalmomi kamar 'masoyi,' 'giya,' da 'gidan giya' ana fassara su a matsayin dadin duniya na zahiri da kuma alamar Sufanci ta ruhaniya ga Allah, farin ciki na ruhaniya, da kuma wurin bauta na gaskiya.

faq.question: Menene Fal-e Hafez?
faq.answer: Tana zama al'ada ta duba inda mutanen Iran, suna neman jagoranci ko fahimta, ke yin tambaya sannan su bude Divan na Hafez a shafi na bazata, suna fassara wakar a matsayin amsa.

faq.question: Shin da gaske Hafez ya hadu da mai cin kasa da yaki Timur?
faq.answer: Akwai wata tatsuniya mai shahara game da haduwarsu, inda Hafez ya amsa sukar da Timur ya yi wa wakarsa cikin wayo. Kodayake labari ne mai karfi, mafi yawan masana tarihi suna kallon sa a matsayin na bogi.

timeline.event: An haife ta a Constantinople, Daular Usmaniyya.
Ta kammala karatu a American College for Girls da ke Constantinople.
Ta rabu da mijinta na farko, Salih Zeki, saboda matakinsa na auren mace ta biyu.
Ta gabatar da shahararren kalaman ta a zanga-zangar Sultanahmet yaki da mamayar Allied.
Ta gudu zuwa Anatolia don shiga Yunkurin Kasa na Turkish (Turkish National Movement); ta yi aiki a Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish.
Ta zauna a gudun hijira na kashin kanta a Turai da Amurka saboda rashin amincewa ta siyasa da sabuwar gwamnati.
Ta koma Turkey bayan mutuwar Atatürk.
An zabe ta a matsayin mamba na Grand National Assembly ta Turkey.
Ta mutu a Istanbul.

keyAchievements.title: Mawallafiyar Littattafai na Turkish ta Majagaba
keyAchievements.description: Authored influential novels like "The Shirt of Flame" and "The Clown and His Daughter," which explored themes of national identity and women's roles.

keyAchievements.title: Gwarzon Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin corporal da sergeant a layin gaba, wanda ya mayar da ita babban alamar tirjiya ta kasa.

keyAchievements.title: Babban Feminist da mai fada a kan hakki
keyAchievements.description: Ta kasance daya daqun daliban farko da suka kammala karatu a jami'arta sannan mai fada na tsawon rayuwa a kan ilimin mata da hakki a Turkey.

keyAchievements.title: Mamba na Majalisar Dokoki
keyAchievements.description: An zabe ta a Majalisar Dokoki ta Turkey a shekarar 1950, inda ta ci gaba da aikin jama'a a jamhuriyar da ta taimaka wajen samarwa.

faq.question: Me yasa ake kallon ta a matsayin alamar feminism?
faq.answer: Ta rabu da mijinta saboda kokarin auren mace fiye da daya, ta fadi a kan ilimin mata, sannan littattafanta sun nuna mata masu karfi da zaman kansu, suna kalubalantar tsarin maza na zamaninta.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ta yi yaki a matsayin soja?
faq.answer: E. Lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yanci na Turkish, an shigar da ita a hukumance sannan ta yi aiki a matsayin corporal da kuma daga baya sergeant, musamman a bangaren gudanarwa da na lafiya kusa da layin gaba.

faq.question: Me yasa ta tafi gudun hijira bayan ta taimaka wajen kafa Jamhuriyar?
faq.answer: Ita da mijinta ba su yarda da abin da suka kalla a matsayin tsarin mulkin kama-karya mai girma na gwamnatocin Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ba. Sun zabi gudun hijira na kashin kansu don kauce wa tsanantawa ta siyasa.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Babylon.
Ya hau karagar mulki ta Babylon bayan mahaifinsa, Sin-Muballit ya sauka.
Ya ci biranen Isin da Uruk da yaki.
Ya kayar da hadakar abokan gaba sannan ya ci masarautar Larsa mai karfi da yaki, wanda ya fadada daularsa sosai.
Ya ci masarautar Mari da yaki, wanda ya tabbatar da ikonsa a kan mafi yawan Mesopotamia.
Ya kafa Dokokin Hammurabi (Code of Hammurabi) a kan wani bango na diorite, wanda aka nuna shi ga jama'a a Babylon.
Ya mutu bayan ya yi mulki na shekaru 42, inda dansa Samsu-iluna ya gaje shi.

keyAchievements.title: Dokokin Hammurabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da daya daqun tsarin dokoki na farko da suka fi cika da aka rubuta, wanda ya kafa ka'idojin adalci da tsari ga daularsa.

keyAchievements.title: Hadin Kan Mesopotamia
keyAchievements.description: Ya sauya Babylon daga karamar kasar birni zuwa babbar daula mai kula da fertile crescent ta hanyar cin kasa da yaki da kuma diflomasiyya.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyukan Jama'a da Ababen More Rayuwa
keyAchievements.description: Ya kula da manyan ayyuka da suka hada da fadada magudanan ruwa (canals) don ban ruwa da kuma karfafa bangon birni, wanda ya inganta noma da tsaro.

faq.question: Shin an aiwatar da dokar 'ido ga ido' ga kowa daidai a cikin Dokokin Hammurabi?
faq.answer: A'a, hukumcin ya bambanta bisa ga matsayin al'umma na wanda ya yi laifin da kuma wanda aka yi wa laifin. Laifi yaki da mutum mai daraja yana samun hukumci mai tsanani fiye da laifi guda yaki da talaka ko bawa.

faq.question: Shin Hammurabi ne sarki na farko da ya rubuta dokoki?
faq.answer: A'a, akwai tsarin dokoki na farko kamar na Ur-Nammu da suka wanzu. Sai dai, dokar Hammurabi ta fi fadi, tsari, sannan an kiyaye ta da kyau, wanda hakan ya mayar da ita mafi shahara daga ancient Near East.

faq.question: Menene ya faru da daular Hammurabi bayan mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Daular ta fara raguwa karkashin magajinsa, Samsu-iluna. Ta fuskanci bore a ciki da kuma matsin lamba na waje, a karshe ta takaita sannan ta fada hannun maharba, amma gadon al'ada da na doka na Hammurabi ya dawwama na tsawon karni da dama.

timeline.event: An haife ta a matsayin Aleksandra Lisowska a Ruthenia, Masarautar Poland (Ukraine ta yanzu).
Crimean Tatars ne suka kama ta sannan suka kawo ta Constantinople, inda ta shiga Imperial Harem na Sultan Suleiman.
Ta haifi danta na farko, Şehzade Mehmed, wanda ya karfafa matsayinta a cikin harem.
Suleiman ya yanta sannan ya auri Hurrem a hukumance, wanda ya mayar da ita Haseki Sultan, al'amari da ba a taba gani ba.
Abokin hamayyarta, Grand Vizier Pargalı Ibrahim Pasha, an kashe shi. Mafi yawan masana tarihi sun yarda cewa ta yi tasiri a kan wannan yanke shawara.
Ta fara ginin Haseki Sultan Complex a Constantinople, babban gidauniya na sadaka.
An kashe dan fari na Suleiman, watau Şehzade Mustafa a kan zargin cin amana. Ana kallon Hurrem a matsayin wadda ta tsara rushewarsa don tabbatar da karagar mulki ga 'ya'yanta maza.
Ta mutu a Topkapi Palace sannan aka binne ta a wani kabari na sarki kusa da na Suleiman a Süleymaniye Mosque.

keyAchievements.title: Karya Al'adar Sarki
keyAchievements.description: Ta zama mata ta farko ta sarki da aka aura a hukumance ga Sultan, wanda ya rushe al'adar Ottoman ta karni da dama.

keyAchievements.title: Mai Ba da Shawara kan Siyasa da Jakada
keyAchievements.description: Ta yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara kan siyasa ga Sultan Suleiman sannan ta tafiyar da alakar diflomasiyya da kasashen waje, ciki har da Poland da Persia.

keyAchievements.title: Tallafawa Gine-gine
keyAchievements.description: Ta ba da umarnin gina manyan gine-gine na jama'a da dama, ciki har da Haseki Sultan Complex, wanda ya samar da ayyuka ga al'umma.

keyAchievements.title: Fara Zamanin 'Sultanate of Women'
keyAchievements.description: Ikonta da ba a taba gani ba ya kafa sabon zamani inda mata na sarki suka sami babban tasiri na siyasa.

faq.question: Menene ma'anar sunayen 'Roxelana' da 'Hurrem'?
faq.answer: 'Roxelana' was a European nickname meaning 'the Ruthenian one,' referring to her origins. 'Hurrem' was the name given to her by Suleiman, from the Persian 'Khurram,' which means 'the cheerful one.'

faq.question: Me yasa auren ta da Suleiman yake da matukar mahimmanci?
faq.answer: Fiye da karni daya, sarakunan Ottoman ba su auri mata a hukumance ba, a maimakon haka suna dogara ne da mata na bauta (concubines) don samun magada. Aurenta ya daga matsayinta sama da sauran mata daukacin su sannan ya ba ta tsaro da halacci da ba a taba gani ba.

faq.question: Shin da gaske ba ta da tausayi kamar yadda ake yawan kwatanta ta?
faq.answer: Ta kasance kwararriyar mai gudanar da siyasa wadda ta kawar da abokan hamayya don kare kanta da kuma makomar 'ya'yanta. Duk da cewa ana yin muhawara kan matakin 'rashin tausayi' nata, an dauki matakan ne a cikin yanayi mai zafi na siyasar gado inda asarar galibi take zama mutuwa.

faq.question: Yaya ta yi tasiri a kan gadon karagar mulki?
faq.answer: Ta hanyar zargin tsara rushewar 'ya'ya maza na Suleiman mafi kwarewa daga sauran mata (Mustafa da Bayezid), ta bude Hasse ga danta mara kwarewa sosai, Selim II, don ya zama Sultan, wani al'amari da wasu masana tarihi ke cewa ya nuna farkon raguwar Daular.

timeline.event: An haifi Thomas Edward Lawrence a Tremadog, Wales.
Ya yi karatun Tarihi na Zamani (Modern History) a Jesus College, Oxford, sannan ya yi tafiya ta kafa a Syria don yin bincike a kan sansanonin Crusaders don thesis dinsa.
Yakin Duniya na Farko ya fara; an tura shi zuwa bangaren labarin kasa na General Staff a London sannan kuma daga baya zuwa military intelligence a Alkahira.
Ya shiga cikin Bore na Larabawa (Arab Revolt) a matsayin jami'in hulda na Birtaniya ga sojojin Emir Faisal.
Ya jagoranci sojojin Larabawa kalilan a wata tafiya ta ban mamaki ta daji don kwace tashar jiragen ruwa ta Aqaba mai dabarar yaki wadda Ottoman ke rike da ita.
Ya shiga cikin kwace Damascus, babban nasara ga sojojin Allied da na Larabawa.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga wakilan Larabawa na Emir Faisal a Taron Zaman Lafiya na Paris (Paris Peace Conference), inda ya ji takaicin sakamakon.
Ya shiga Royal Air Force karkashin sunan bogi John Hume Ross don kauce wa shahararsa.
Ya buga wani siffa na kashin kansa na littafinsa na tarihi na yakin, 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom'.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 46 sakamakon raunukan da ya samu a hatsarin babur a Dorset, Ingila.

keyAchievements.title: Rawarsa a cikin Bore na Larabawa (Arab Revolt)
keyAchievements.description: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin mai tsara dabarun soja da jami'in hulda, inda ya hada kabilun Larabawa daban-daban yaki da Daular Usmaniyya lokacin Yakin Duniya na Farko (WWI).

keyAchievements.title: Kwace Aqaba
keyAchievements.description: Ya jagoranci tafiyar daji ta ban mamaki don kwace babbar tashar jiragen ruwa ta Aqaba daga bangarenta na kasa mara kariya, babban nasara ta dabarar yaki.

keyAchievements.title: Seven Pillars of Wisdom
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta tarihin yakin mai ban mamaki da zurfin tunani wanda ake kallo a matsayin classic na adabin Turanci da tarihin soja.

faq.question: Shin 'Lawrence na Arabia' (Lawrence of Arabia) ne ainihin sunansa?
faq.answer: A'a, sunansa Thomas Edward Lawrence. 'Lawrence of Arabia' ya kasance lakabi ne da dan jaridar Amurka Lowell Thomas ya yada shi, wanda rubuce-rubucensa da lakocinsa suka mayar da Lawrence shahararre a daukacin duniya.

faq.question: Me yasa ya shiga aikin soja karkashin sunan bogi bayan yakin?
faq.answer: Ya nemi kauce wa matsin lamba da binciken shahararsa. Yana son rashin shahara da kuma tsayayyen rayuwa ta soja ta talakawa.

faq.question: Shin ya yi nasarar tabbatar da 'yancin kan Larabawa?
faq.answer: Kodayake boren ya kasance nasara ta soja, a karshe ya ji takaici sakamakon Yarjejeniyar Sykes-Picot (Sykes-Picot Agreement), yarjejeniya ta sirri tsakanin Birtaniya da Faransa wadda ta raba Gabas ta Tsakiya zuwa sassan tasiri, wanda ya yaudari alkawuran kafa kasar Larabawa dunkulalliya.

faq.question: Game da menene 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom'?
faq.answer: It is his detailed and highly personal account of his experiences during the Arab Revolt. It's a complex work blending military history, adventure, and deep psychological introspection.
